Matthew1:1 Dore uko ibisekuruza bya Yezu Kristo ukomoka kuri Dawidi no kuri Aburahamu bikurikirana: 
Matthew1:2 Aburahamu yabyaye Izaki, Izaki abyara Yakobo, Yakobo abyara Yuda n'abavandimwe be." 
Matthew1:3 Yuda abyara Perēsi na Zera ababyaranye na Tamari, Perēsi abyara Hesironi, Hesironi abyara Aramu," 
Matthew1:4 Aramu abyara Aminadabu, Aminadabu abyara Nahasoni, Nahasoni abyara Salumoni." 
Matthew1:5 Salumoni abyara Bowazi amubyaranye na Rahabu, Bowazi abyara Obedi amubyaranye na Ruti, Obedi abyara Yese." 
Matthew1:6 Yese abyara Umwami Dawidi. Dawidi yabyaye Salomo amubyaranye na muka Uriya. 
Matthew1:7 Salomo abyara Robowamu, Robowamu abyara Abiya, Abiya abyara Asa." 
Matthew1:8 Asa abyara Yozafati, Yozafati abyara Yoramu, Yoramu abyara Uziya." 
Matthew1:9 Uziya abyara Yotamu, Yotamu abyara Ahazi, Ahazi abyara Hezekiya." 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiya abyara Manase, Manase abyara Amoni, Amoni abyara Yosiya." 
Matthew1:11 Yosiya abyara Yekoniya n'abavandimwe be, babayeho igihe Abayuda bajyanwaga ho iminyago i Babiloni." 
Matthew1:12 Nyuma y'aho bajyaniwe i Babiloni, Yekoniya yabyaye Salatiyeli, Salatiyeli abyara Zerubabeli." 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabeli abyara Abiyudi, Abiyudi abyara Eliyakimu, Eliyakimu abyara Azori." 
Matthew1:14 Azori abyara Sadoki, Sadoki abyara Akimu, Akimu abyara Elihudi." 
Matthew1:15 Elihudi abyara Eleyazari, Eleyazari abyara Matani, Matani abyara Yakobo." 
Matthew1:16 Yakobo abyara Yozefu umugabo wa Mariya, ari na we nyina wa Yezu witwa Kristo." 
Matthew1:17 Kuva kuri Aburahamu kugeza kuri Dawidi hari ibisekuruza cumi na bine, kuva kuri Dawidi kugeza bajyanywe i Babiloni na byo ni cumi na bine, no kuva bajyanywe i Babiloni kugeza kuri Kristo ni cumi na bine." 
Matthew1:18 Dore uko byagenze mu ivuka rya Yezu Kristo. Nyina Mariya wari warasabwe na Yozefu, yasamye inda bitewe na Mwuka Muziranenge kandi atari yabana n'umugabo we." 
Matthew1:19 Yozefu akaba umuntu w'intungane, ntiyashaka kumukoza isoni, ni bwo yigiriye inama yo kumubenga rwihishwa." 
Matthew1:20 Akiri muri ibyo umumarayika wa Nyagasani amubonekera mu nzozi, aramubwira ati: “Yozefu mwene Dawidi, witinya kuzana umugeni wawe Mariya, kuko iyo nda yayisamye bitewe na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Matthew1:21 Azabyara umuhungu umwite Yezu, kuko ari we uzakiza abantu be ibyaha.”" 
Matthew1:22 Byose byabereye kugira ngo bibe nk'uko Nyagasani yari yaratumye umuhanuzi kubivuga ati: 
Matthew1:23 “Dore umukobwa w'isugi azasama inda, azabyara umwana w'umuhungu, bazamwita Emanweli.” (Risobanurwa ngo “Imana iri kumwe natwe.”)" 
Matthew1:24 Yozefu akangutse abigenza uko umumarayika wa Nyagasani yari yamutegetse, azana umugeni we." 
Matthew1:25 Ariko ntibaryamana kugeza igihe yabyariye umwana w'umuhungu. Uwo mwana Yozefu amwita Yezu. 
Matthew2:1 Yezu amaze kuvukira i Betelehemu mu ntara ya Yudeya ku ngoma y'Umwami Herodi, haza abahanga mu by'inyenyeri baturutse iburasirazuba bagera i Yeruzalemu." 
Matthew2:2 Barabaza bati: “Umwami w'Abayahudi uherutse kuvuka ari hehe? Twabonye inyenyeri ye turi iburasirazuba, none twari tuje kumuramya.”" 
Matthew2:3 Umwami Herodi yumvise ibyo ahagarika umutima, we n'abaturage bose b'i Yeruzalemu." 
Matthew2:4 Nuko akoranya abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko bose b'Abisiraheli, ababaza aho Kristo yajyaga kuzavukira." 
Matthew2:5 Baramusubiza bati: “Ni i Betelehemu mu ntara ya Yudeya, kuko ari ko byanditswe n'umuhanuzi ngo:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Nawe Betelehemu yo mu Buyuda, ntabwo uri uw'inyuma mu butegetsi bw'u Buyuda, kuko muri wowe hazaturuka umutegetsi, azaba umushumba w'ubwoko bwanjye bw'Abisiraheli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Nuko Herodi atumiza ba bahanga arabihererana, ababaza neza igihe baboneye ya nyenyeri." 
Matthew2:8 Nuko abatuma i Betelehemu avuga ati: “Nimugende mubaririze neza iby'uwo mwana. Nimumubona muzabimenyeshe, nanjye njye kumuramya.”" 
Matthew2:9 Bamaze kumva amagambo y'umwami baragenda. Ni bwo iyo nyenyeri bari babonye bakiri iburasirazuba ibagiye imbere, irinda igera hejuru y'aho umwana ari irahahagarara." 
Matthew2:10 Babonye iyo nyenyeri barishima cyane. 
Matthew2:11 Nuko binjira mu nzu basanga umwana ari kumwe na nyina Mariya, bamwikubita imbere baramuramya. Bahambura ibintu bazanye bifite agaciro barabimutura. Byari izahabu n'ububani n'imibavu y'igiciro." 
Matthew2:12 Nuko Imana imaze kubaburira mu nzozi ngo be gusubira kwa Herodi, baherako banyura indi nzira basubira mu gihugu cyabo." 
Matthew2:13 Bamaze kugenda umumarayika wa Nyagasani abonekera Yozefu mu nzozi, aramubwira ati: “Byuka ujyane umwana na nyina muhungire mu gihugu cya Misiri, mugumeyo kugeza igihe nzakubwirira, kuko Herodi agiye gushaka umwana ngo amwice.”" 
Matthew2:14 Iryo joro Yozefu arabyuka, ajyana umwana na nyina bajya mu Misiri." 
Matthew2:15 Bagumayo kugeza igihe Herodi apfiriye. Ibyo byabereyeho kugira ngo bibe uko Nyagasani yari yaravuze atumye umuhanuzi ati: “Umwana wanjye naramuhamagaye ngo ave mu Misiri.” 
Matthew2:16 Herodi abonye ko ba bahanga bamutengushye ararakara cyane. Nuko yohereza abantu kwica abana b'abahungu bose b'i Betelehemu n'abo mu mirenge yose ihakikije, bamaze imyaka ibiri cyangwa batarayigezaho, agereranyije n'igihe ba bahanga bari bamubwiye ko ari bwo babonye ya nyenyeri." 
Matthew2:17 Bityo biba uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Yeremiya agira ati: 
Matthew2:18 “Induru yumvikaniye i Rama, humvikanye n'amarira n'umuborogo mwinshi. Rasheli araririra abana be, yanze guhozwa kuko batakiriho.”" 
Matthew2:19 Nuko Herodi amaze gupfa, umumarayika wa Nyagasani abonekera Yozefu mu nzozi akiri mu Misiri," 
Matthew2:20 aramubwira ati: “Byuka ufate umwana na nyina musubire mu gihugu cya Isiraheli, kuko abashakaga kwica uwo mwana batakiriho.”" 
Matthew2:21 Yozefu arabyuka ajyana umwana na nyina, bagerana mu gihugu cya Isiraheli." 
Matthew2:22 Ariko yumvise ko Arikelawo mwene Herodi yabaye Umwami w'i Yudeya asimbuye se, atinya kujyayo. Ni ko kuburirwa ari mu nzozi ngo ajye mu ntara ya Galileya." 
Matthew2:23 Nuko ajyayo atura mu mujyi witwa Nazareti, kugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'abahanuzi ngo: “Azitwa Umunyanazareti.”" 
Matthew3:1 Icyo gihe Yohani Mubatiza atunguka mu butayu bwo muri Yudeya atangaza ati: 
Matthew3:2 “Nimwihane kuko ubwami bw'ijuru bwegereje!” 
Matthew3:3 Yohani uwo ni we wari waravuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangururira mu butayu ati: ‘Nimutunganye inzira ya Nyagasani, nimuringanize aho azanyura.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Yohani yambaraga umwambaro uboheshejwe ubwoya bw'ingamiya, awukenyeje umukandara w'uruhu. Yatungwaga n'isanane n'ubuki bw'ubuhura." 
Matthew3:5 Abaturage b'i Yeruzalemu n'abo mu ntara yose ya Yudeya n'abo mu karere kose kegereye uruzi rwa Yorodani baramusangaga," 
Matthew3:6 akababatiriza mu ruzi rwa Yorodani, bemerera mu ruhame ibyaha byabo." 
Matthew3:7 Yohani abonye Abafarizayi n'Abasaduseyi benshi baje kubatizwa arababwira ati: “Mwa rubyaro rw'impiri mwe, ni nde wabagiriye inama yo guhunga uburakari bw'Imana bwegereje?" 
Matthew3:8 Nuko rero nk'uko igiti cyera imbuto, abe ari ko namwe mugira imigenzereze yerekana ko mwihannye," 
Matthew3:9 kandi ntimukirate muti: ‘Turi bene Aburahamu.’ Erega ndahamya ko no muri aya mabuye Imana ibasha kuremamo bene Aburahamu! 
Matthew3:10 Ndetse n'ubu intorezo irabanguye kugira ngo iteme ibiti ibihereye ku mizi. Nuko rero igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza kigiye gutemwa gitwikwe. 
Matthew3:11 Jyewe ndababatirisha amazi kugira ngo mwihane, ariko nyuma yanjye hagiye kuza undusha ububasha, ntibinkwiriye no kumukuramo inkweto. We azababatirisha Mwuka Muziranenge n'umuriro." 
Matthew3:12 Dore afashe urutaro ngo agosore impeke azihunike mu kigega, naho umurama awucanishe umuriro utazima.”" 
Matthew3:13 Nyuma Yezu ava muri Galileya ajya kuri Yorodani, asanga Yohani ngo amubatize." 
Matthew3:14 Ariko Yohani aramuhakanira ati: “Ni jye wari ukwiriye kubatizwa nawe, none ni wowe unsanze?”" 
Matthew3:15 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Emera ubikore kuko ari byo bikwiye, kugira ngo tuboneze ibyo Imana ishaka.” Yohani aherako aremera." 
Matthew3:16 Yezu amaze kubatizwa ahita ava mu mazi. Muri ako kanya ijuru rirakinguka, abona Mwuka w'Imana amumanukiraho asa n'inuma." 
Matthew3:17 Nuko humvikana ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: “Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane, ni we nishimira.”" 
Matthew4:1 Nuko Yezu ajyanwa na Mwuka w'Imana mu butayu, kugira ngo ahageragerezwe na Satani." 
Matthew4:2 Ahamara iminsi mirongo ine n'amajoro mirongo ine yigomwa kurya, hanyuma arasonza." 
Matthew4:3 Umushukanyi aramwegera aramubwira ati: “Niba uri Umwana w'Imana tegeka ko aya mabuye ahinduka imigati.” 
Matthew4:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Biranditswe ngo ‘Umuntu ntatungwa n'ibyokurya gusa, ahubwo atungwa n'ijambo ryose Imana ivuga.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Satani amujyana i Yeruzalemu umujyi Imana yitoranyirije, amuhagarika ku munara w'Ingoro y'Imana," 
Matthew4:6 aramubwira ati: “Niba uri Umwana w'Imana simbuka ugwe hasi, kuko byanditswe ngo ‘Imana izagutegekera abamarayika bayo, bazakuramira mu maboko yabo, kugira ngo udasitara ku ibuye.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Biranditswe kandi ngo ‘Ntukagerageze Nyagasani Imana yawe.’ ” 
Matthew4:8 Nuko Satani arongera amujyana mu mpinga y'umusozi muremure cyane, amwereka ibihugu byose byo ku isi n'icyubahiro cyabyo," 
Matthew4:9 aramubwira ati: “Biriya byose ndabiguha, nunyikubita imbere ukandamya.”" 
Matthew4:10 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Genda Satani, kuko byanditswe ngo ‘Uzaramye Nyagasani Imana yawe, abe ari we wenyine uyoboka.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Satani amusiga aho, haza abamarayika baramukorera." 
Matthew4:12 Yezu yumvise ko Yohani yafunzwe ajya muri Galileya. 
Matthew4:13 Ntiyaguma i Nazareti, ajya kuba i Kafarinawumu ku nkombe y'ikiyaga, mu ntara ya Zabuloni na Nafutali." 
Matthew4:14 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: 
Matthew4:15 “Nimwumve ntara ya Zabuloni n'iya Nafutali, ahagana ku nyanja no hakurya ya Yorodani, aho ni ho Galileya ituwe n'abanyamahanga." 
Matthew4:16 Abantu bāri mu mwijima bigunze, babonye umucyo mwinshi. Abāri mu gihugu cyacuze umwijima w'urupfu bigunze, urumuri rwarabamurikiye.”" 
Matthew4:17 Kuva ubwo Yezu atangira gutangaza ati: “Nimwihane kuko ubwami bw'ijuru bwegereje.” 
Matthew4:18 Yezu agenda ahakikiye ikiyaga cya Galileya, abona abarobyi babiri bava inda imwe, Simoni witwa Petero na Andereya, barobesha umutego w'amafi mu kiyaga." 
Matthew4:19 Arababwira ati: “Nimunkurikire nzabagira abarobyi b'abantu.” 
Matthew4:20 Bahita basiga aho imitego yabo baramukurikira. 
Matthew4:21 Yigiye imbere gato abona abandi bavandimwe babiri, Yakobo na Yohani bari hamwe na se Zebedeyi mu bwato, batunganya imitego barobeshaga. Na bo Yezu arabahamagara." 
Matthew4:22 Ako kanya basiga se n'ubwato bwabo, baramukurikira." 
Matthew4:23 Nuko Yezu azenguruka Galileya yose yigishiriza abantu mu nsengero zabo, abatangariza Ubutumwa bwiza bw'ubwami bw'ijuru, kandi akiza abantu indwara zose n'ubumuga bwose." 
Matthew4:24 Ibye byamamara cyane mu gihugu cya Siriya, bamuzanira abantu bose barwaye indwara z'amoko atari amwe, imbabare n'abahanzweho, abanyagicuri n'ibimuga maze arabakiza." 
Matthew4:25 Nuko imbaga y'abantu iramukurikira, bamwe baturutse muri Galileya no mu ntara yitwa Dekapoli, abandi baturutse i Yeruzalemu no muri Yudeya no hakurya ya Yorodani." 
Matthew5:1 Yezu abonye ya mbaga y'abantu benshi azamuka umusozi, amaze kwicara abigishwa be baramwegera." 
Matthew5:2 Atangira kubigisha agira ati: 
Matthew5:3 “Hahirwa abafite imitima ikeneye Imana, kuko ubwami bw'ijuru ari ubwabo." 
Matthew5:4 Hahirwa abashavuye, kuko ari bo bazahozwa." 
Matthew5:5 Hahirwa abagwaneza, kuko ari bo bazaragwa isi." 
Matthew5:6 Hahirwa abafite inzara n'inyota byo gutunganira Imana, kuko ari bo bazahazwa." 
Matthew5:7 Hahirwa abanyambabazi, kuko ari bo bazazigirirwa." 
Matthew5:8 Hahirwa abafite imitima iboneye, kuko ari bo bazabona Imana." 
Matthew5:9 Hahirwa abazana amahoro mu bantu, kuko ari bo bazitwa abana b'Imana." 
Matthew5:10 Hahirwa abatotezwa bahōrwa gukora ibyo Imana ishaka, kuko ubwami bw'ijuru ari ubwabo." 
Matthew5:11 “Murahirwa iyo babatuka, bakabatoteza, bakababeshyera ibibi byinshi ari jye babahōra." 
Matthew5:12 Mujye mwishima kandi munezerwe, kuko muzabona ingororano ishyitse mu ijuru. Ni ko batotezaga abahanuzi b'Imana bababanjirije." 
Matthew5:13 “Muri umunyu w'isi. Ariko se iyo umunyu wamaze gukayuka wakongera kuryoshywa n'iki? Nta cyo uba ukimaze, ahubwo ujugunywa hanze abantu bakawukandagira." 
Matthew5:14 “Muri urumuri rw'isi. Umujyi wubatse mu mpinga y'umusozi ntushobora kwihisha," 
Matthew5:15 kandi nta wacana itara ngo aryubikeho akabindi, ahubwo aritereka ahirengeye maze rikamurikira abari mu nzu bose." 
Matthew5:16 Mube ari ko mumurikira abantu, kugira ngo barebe ibyiza mukora bahimbaze So uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew5:17 “Ntimwibwire ko nazanywe no kuvanaho Amategeko cyangwa ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi. Sinazanywe no kubivanaho, ahubwo nazanywe no kubisohoza." 
Matthew5:18 Ndababwira nkomeje ko nta kanyuguti habe n'akadomo na kamwe ko mu Mategeko kazavaho, kugeza ubwo byose bizaba birangiye, ijuru n'isi bigashira." 
Matthew5:19 Umuntu wese uzaca ku itegeko rimwe, naho ryaba rito muri ayo yose, akigisha abantu kugenza nka we, azagirwa uwa nyuma mu bwami bw'ijuru. Ariko uzayumvira akayigisha abandi, azitwa mukuru mu bwami bw'ijuru." 
Matthew5:20 Reka mbabwire, nimudatunganira Imana kurenza abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, ntabwo muzinjira mu bwami bw'ijuru." 
Matthew5:21 “Mwumvise ko aba kera babwiwe ngo: ‘Ntukice’, kuko uwishe umuntu azashyirwa mu rubanza." 
Matthew5:22 Ariko jyewe ndababwira ko umuntu wese urakarira mugenzi we azashyirwa mu rubanza. Kandi umuntu wese ubwira mugenzi we ati: ‘Uri igicucu’, aba akwiye kubibarizwa mu rukiko rw'ikirenga, naho ubwira mugenzi we ati: ‘Wa kigoryi we!’ aba ari uwo gushyirwa mu nyenga y'umuriro." 
Matthew5:23 Noneho nujyana ituro ryawe ku rutambiro kuritura Imana, wahagera ukibuka ko mugenzi wawe afite icyo apfa nawe," 
Matthew5:24 uzasige ituro ryawe aho imbere y'urutambiro, maze ubanze ugende wigorore na we, ubone kuza utange ituro ryawe." 
Matthew5:25 “Nujyana mu rukiko n'uwo muburana, wigorore na we mukiri mu nzira kugira ngo atagushyikiriza umucamanza, na we akaguha umuporisi akagushyira muri gereza." 
Matthew5:26 Ndakubwira nkomeje ko utazavamo utabanje gutanga amafaranga baguciye yose, hatabuze na rimwe." 
Matthew5:27 “Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo: ‘Ntugasambane.’ 
Matthew5:28 Ariko jyewe ndababwira yuko umuntu wese ureba umugore akamurarikira, mu bitekerezo bye aba amaze gusambana na we." 
Matthew5:29 Nuko rero ijisho ryawe ry'iburyo niba ryakugusha mu cyaha, urinogore urite. Icyakubera cyiza ni ukubura rumwe mu ngingo zawe, aho kugira ngo umubiri wawe wose utabwe mu nyenga y'umuriro." 
Matthew5:30 Niba ikiganza cyawe cy'iburyo cyakugusha mu cyaha, ugice ugite. Icyakubera cyiza ni ukubura rumwe mu ngingo zawe, aho kugira ngo umubiri wawe wose utabwe mu nyenga y'umuriro." 
Matthew5:31 “Byavuzwe kandi ko ‘Ushaka kwirukana umugore we agomba kumuha urwandiko rwemeza ko amusenze.’ 
Matthew5:32 Ariko jyewe ndababwira ko umuntu wese wirukana umugore we, bitavuye ku kubana kutemewe n'Amategeko, nyuma agacyurwa n'undi mugabo, aba amugize umusambanyi. Byongeye kandi ucyura umugore wirukanywe, na we aba asambanye." 
Matthew5:33 “Mwumvise ko aba kera babwiwe ngo ‘Ntukarahire ibinyoma, ahubwo uzajye uhigura imihigo wahigiye Nyagasani.’" 
Matthew5:34 Ariko jyewe ndababwira kutarahira rwose, kwaba kurahira mushingiye ku ijuru kuko ari intebe ya cyami y'Imana," 
Matthew5:35 cyangwa ku isi kuko ari yo kabaho ikandagizaho ibirenge, cyangwa kuri Yeruzalemu kuko ari umurwa w'Umwami ukomeye." 
Matthew5:36 Ndetse ntuzanarahire ushingiye indahiro ku mutwe wawe, kuko utabasha guhindura agasatsi kawe na kamwe ngo kabe umweru cyangwa kirabure." 
Matthew5:37 Mujye muvuga gusa muti: ‘Yego, ni byo’, cyangwa se muhakane muti: ‘Oya, si byo’. Ibindi umuntu agerekaho byose biba biturutse kuri Sekibi." 
Matthew5:38 “Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo: ‘Umennye undi ijisho na we barimumene’, kandi ngo: ‘Ukuye undi iryinyo na we barimukure.’" 
Matthew5:39 Ariko jyewe ndababwira kutitura inabi mwagiriwe. Ahubwo umuntu nagukubita urushyi mu musaya w'iburyo, umuhe n'undi musaya." 
Matthew5:40 Byongeye kandi umuntu nashaka kuguhuguza ishati uyimuhe, ugerekeho n'ikote." 
Matthew5:41 Nihagira uguhata kumwakira umutwaro ngo uwutware kirometero imwe, uzongereho n'iya kabiri." 
Matthew5:42 Ugusabye umuhe, kandi ushaka kugira icyo agutira ntukamwiyame." 
Matthew5:43 “Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo: ‘Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe, kandi wange umwanzi wawe.’" 
Matthew5:44 Ariko jyewe ndababwira nti: ‘Mukunde n'abanzi banyu kandi musabire ababatoteza.’ 
Matthew5:45 Ibyo mubikorere kugira ngo mube abana nyakuri ba So uri mu ijuru, kuko avusha izuba rye ku beza no ku babi, kandi akagusha n'imvura ye ku ntungane no ku bagome." 
Matthew5:46 Niba mukunda ababakunda gusa, ubwo se mukwiriye ngororano ki? Mbese abasoresha bo ntibabigenza batyo?" 
Matthew5:47 Kandi niba muramutsa incuti zanyu gusa, muba murushije iki abandi bantu? Mbese abatazi Imana bo ntibabigenza batyo?" 
Matthew5:48 Mube intungane nk'uko So uri mu ijuru ari intungane. 
Matthew6:1 “Ibikorwa byiza byanyu murajye mwirinda kubikorera imbere y'abantu kugira ngo babarebe, mutazivutsa ingororano ya So uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew6:2 “Igihe uhaye umukene imfashanyo ntukabyamamaze nk'uko abantu b'indyarya babigenza, bari mu nsengero no mu mayira kugira ngo abantu babashime. Ndababwira nkomeje ko ingororano yabo baba bamaze kuyishyikira." 
Matthew6:3 Ahubwo wowe igihe uhaye umukene imfashanyo, ntihakagire n'inyoni ibimenya." 
Matthew6:4 Bityo ibyo umuhaye bizabe ibanga. Nuko So we umenya ibiri mu ibanga azakwitura. 
Matthew6:5 “Igihe musenga ntimukamere nk'abantu b'indyarya, bakunda gusenga bahagaze mu nsengero no mu mahuriro y'inzira kugira ngo abantu bababone. Ndababwira nkomeje ko ingororano yabo baba bamaze kuyishyikira." 
Matthew6:6 Ahubwo wowe igihe usenga ujye winjira mu cyumba cyawe ukinge, maze usenge So uba ahatagaragara. Nuko So we umenya ibiri mu ibanga azakwitura." 
Matthew6:7 “Igihe musenga ntimugatondagure amagambo atagira icyo avuga, nk'uko abatazi Imana babigenza bibwira ko bazasubizwa kubera amagambo menshi." 
Matthew6:8 Ntimukagenze nka bo, kuko So aba azi icyo mukeneye mutarakimusaba." 
Matthew6:9 Nuko rero mujye musenga muti: ‘Data uri mu ijuru, izina ryawe niryubahwe," 
Matthew6:10 ubwami bwawe nibuze. Ibyo ushaka bibe ari byo bikorwa ku isi, nk'uko bikorwa mu ijuru." 
Matthew6:11 Uduhe none ifunguro ridukwiriye. 
Matthew6:12 Utubabarire ibyo twagucumuyeho, nk'uko natwe tubabarira abaducumuyeho." 
Matthew6:13 Ntutureke ngo tugwe mu byadushuka, ahubwo udukize ikibi, [kuko ubwami n'ubushobozi n'ikuzo ari ibyawe iteka ryose. Amina.]’" 
Matthew6:14 “Nimubabarira abandi ibyo babacumuyeho, So uri mu ijuru na we azabababarira ibyo mumucumuraho." 
Matthew6:15 Ariko nimutababarira abandi, So uri mu ijuru na we ntazabababarira ibyo mumucumuraho." 
Matthew6:16 “Igihe mwigomwe kurya ntimukijime mu maso nk'abantu b'indyarya bakambya agahanga, kugira ngo abantu bamenye ko bigomwe kurya. Ndababwira nkomeje ko ingororano yabo baba bamaze kuyishyikira." 
Matthew6:17 Naho wowe niwigomwa kurya, wiyuhagire mu maso kandi usokoze," 
Matthew6:18 kugira ngo abantu batamenya ko wigomwe kurya, keretse So uba ahatagaragara. Nuko So we umenya ibiri mu ibanga azakwitura." 
Matthew6:19 “Ntimukirundanyirize ubukungu ku isi aho inyenzi n'ingese bibwangiza, n'abajura bakahaca ibyuho bakiba." 
Matthew6:20 Ahubwo mubwirundanyirize mu ijuru aho inyenzi n'ingese bitabwangiza, n'abajura ntibahace ibyuho ngo bibe." 
Matthew6:21 Aho ubukungu bwawe buri ni ho uzahoza umutima. 
Matthew6:22 “Itara ry'umubiri ni ijisho. Nuko rero ijisho ryawe niriba rizima, umubiri wawe wose uzaba umurikiwe." 
Matthew6:23 Ariko ijisho ryawe niriba rirwaye, umubiri wawe wose uzaba ucuze umwijima. Niba rero urumuri rwawe ruzimye, mbega ukuntu umwijima ukurimo uba mwinshi!" 
Matthew6:24 “Nta mugaragu ushobora gukorera ba shebuja babiri. Iyo adakunze umwe ngo yange undi, ayoboka umwe agasuzugura undi. Nuko rero ntimushobora kuba abagaragu b'Imana ngo mube n'abagaragu b'amafaranga." 
Matthew6:25 “Reka mbabwire rero ku byerekeye ubuzima: ntimukabunze imitima mwibaza icyo muzarya [cyangwa icyo muzanywa] cyangwa icyo muzambara. Mbese ubuzima ntiburuta ibyokurya, n'umubiri ukaruta imyambaro?" 
Matthew6:26 Nimurebe inyoni: ntizibiba, ntizinasarura, ntizihunika, nyamara So uri mu ijuru arazigaburira. Mbese ntimuzirusha agaciro cyane?" 
Matthew6:27 Ni nde muri mwe wakongēra nibura akanya na gato ku gihe azamara, kubera ko yabungije imitima?" 
Matthew6:28 “Ni iki gituma rero mubunza imitima mwibaza icyo muzambara? Mwitegereze ukuntu indabyo zo mu gasozi zikura: nta murimo zikora, nta n'imyenda ziboha." 
Matthew6:29 Nyamara mbabwiye ko na Salomo mu bukire bwe bwose, atigeze arimba nka rumwe muri zo." 
Matthew6:30 None se mwa bantu bafite ukwizera guke mwe, ubwo Imana yambika ityo ibyatsi byo ku gasozi biba biriho none ejo bakabicana, ntizabarushirizaho cyane?" 
Matthew6:31 “Ntimukabunze imitima rero mwibaza muti: ‘Tuzarya iki?’ cyangwa muti: ‘Tuzanywa iki?’ cyangwa muti: ‘Tuzambara iki?’ 
Matthew6:32 Ibyo byose abanyamahanga batazi Imana ni byo baharanira, nyamara So uri mu ijuru azi ko mubikeneye uko bingana." 
Matthew6:33 Ahubwo mbere ya byose muharanire ubwami bw'Imana no kuyitunganira, bityo n'ibyo bindi byose na byo muzabihabwa." 
Matthew6:34 Nuko rero ntimukabunze imitima mwibaza iby'ejo, kuko ‘iby'ejo bibara ab'ejo’. Ingorane za buri munsi zirahagije ku bwawo!" 
Matthew7:1 “Ntimukihe gucira abandi imanza namwe mutazazicirwa," 
Matthew7:2 kuko muzacirwa imanza ukurikije uko mwaziciriye abandi. Akebo mubagereramo ni ko namwe muzagererwamo. 
Matthew7:3 Kuki ushishikazwa n'agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mugenzi wawe, ariko ukirengagiza umugogo uri mu ryawe?" 
Matthew7:4 Washobora ute kubwira mugenzi wawe uti: ‘Reka ngutokore agatotsi kakuri mu jisho’, kandi nawe ufite umugogo mu ryawe?" 
Matthew7:5 Wa ndyarya we, banza witokore umugogo ukuri mu jisho, bityo ubone gutokora agatotsi kari mu jisho rya mugenzi wawe." 
Matthew7:6 “Ibyeguriwe Imana ntimukabijugunyire imbwa, kugira ngo zitabahindukirana zikabatanyagura. Byongeye kandi amasaro yanyu y'agahebuzo ntimukayate imbere y'ingurube, kugira ngo zitayaribata." 
Matthew7:7 “Musabe muzahabwa, mushake muzabona, mukomange muzakingurirwa." 
Matthew7:8 Usabye wese ni we uhabwa, ushatse ni we ubona kandi n'ukomanze ni we ukingurirwa." 
Matthew7:9 Ni nde muri mwe waha umwana we ibuye igihe amusabye umugati," 
Matthew7:10 cyangwa akamuha inzoka igihe amusabye ifi? 
Matthew7:11 None se ko muzi guha abana banyu ibyiza kandi muri babi, So uri mu ijuru we ntazarushaho guha ibyiza ababimusabye?" 
Matthew7:12 “Ibyo mwifuza ko abandi babagirira byose namwe mube ari byo mubagirira, ibyo ni byo bibumbye Amategeko n'ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi." 
Matthew7:13 “Mwinjire mu irembo rifunganye, kuko irembo rigari n'inzira ya gihogera bijyana abantu mu ukurimbuka, kandi abahanyura ni benshi." 
Matthew7:14 Naho irembo ry'impatanwa n'inzira ifunganye ni byo bigeza ku bugingo buhoraho, kandi ababinyuramo ni bake." 
Matthew7:15 “Mwirinde abahanurabinyoma! Baza babasanga bigize nk'intama, ariko imbere muri bo ari impyisi z'ibirura." 
Matthew7:16 Muzababwirwa n'imigirire yabo, nk'uko igiti mukibwirwa n'imbuto zacyo. Mbese hari uwasoroma imbuto z'umuzabibu ku mutobotobo cyangwa iz'umutini ku bitovu?" 
Matthew7:17 Nuko rero igiti cyiza cyose cyera imbuto nziza, naho igiti kibi kikera imbuto mbi." 
Matthew7:18 Igiti cyiza ntikibasha kwera imbuto mbi, n'igiti kibi ntikibasha kwera imbuto nziza." 
Matthew7:19 Igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza baragitema bakagitwika. 
Matthew7:20 Ni na ko abo bahanurabinyoma muzababwirwa n'imigirire yabo. 
Matthew7:21 “Abahora bampamagara ngo ‘Nyagasani, Nyagasani’, si ko bose bazinjira mu bwami bw'ijuru, keretse abakora ibyo Data uri mu ijuru ashaka bonyine." 
Matthew7:22 Kuri uwo munsi benshi bazambaza bati: ‘Nyagasani, Nyagasani, mbese ntitwahanuye mu izina ryawe? Ese ntitwamenesheje ingabo za Satani mu izina ryawe? Mbese ntitwakoze ibitangaza byinshi mu izina ryawe?’" 
Matthew7:23 Ubwo nzababwira neruye nti: ‘Sinigeze mbamenya. Nimumve imbere mwa nkozi z'ibibi mwe!’ 
Matthew7:24 “Nuko rero umuntu wese wumva ayo magambo maze kuvuga akayakurikiza, yagereranywa n'umuntu uzi ubwenge wubatse inzu ye ku rutare," 
Matthew7:25 maze imvura iragwa imigezi iruzura, umuyaga urahuha byose byikubita kuri iyo nzu, ariko ntiyagwa kuko yubatswe ku rutare." 
Matthew7:26 Naho umuntu wese wumva ayo magambo maze kuvuga ntayakurikize, yagereranywa n'umuntu w'igicucu wubatse inzu ye ku musenyi," 
Matthew7:27 maze imvura iragwa imigezi iruzura, umuyaga urahuha byose bikoranira kuri iyo nzu ihita igwa. Si ukugwa irarindimuka!”" 
Matthew7:28 Yezu amaze kuvuga ibyo byose, imbaga y'abantu bari aho batangazwa cyane n'imyigishirize ye," 
Matthew7:29 kuko atigishaga nk'abigishamategeko babo, ahubwo yabigishaga nk'ufite ubushobozi." 
Matthew8:1 Nuko Yezu amanuka wa musozi, imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu iramukurikira." 
Matthew8:2 Umuntu wari urwaye ibibembe aramusanga, aramupfukamira aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani, ubishatse wankiza.”" 
Matthew8:3 Yezu arambura ukuboko amukoraho agira ati: “Ndabishaka kira.” Ako kanya arakira. 
Matthew8:4 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Uramenye ntugire uwo ubibwira. Icyakora ujye kwiyereka umutambyi maze utange ituro Musa yategetse, ribabere icyemezo cy'uko wakize.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yezu ageze i Kafarinawumu, umukapiteni w'Umunyaroma aramusanga aramwinginga ati:" 
Matthew8:6 “Nyagasani, nasize umugaragu wanjye imuhira aryamye, yaramugaye kandi araribwa bikabije.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndaje mukize.” 
Matthew8:8 Uwo mukapiteni arasubiza ati: “Nyagasani, ntibinkwiye ko winjira iwanjye, ahubwo tegeka gusa umugaragu wanjye arakira." 
Matthew8:9 Erega nanjye ndi umuntu utegekwa, kandi mfite abasirikari ntegeka. Iyo mbwiye umwe muri bo nti: ‘Genda’, aragenda, nabwira undi nti: ‘Ngwino’, akaza, nabwira umugaragu wanjye nti: ‘Kora iki’, akagikora.”" 
Matthew8:10 Yezu abyumvise aratangara, maze abwira abari bamukurikiye ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko no mu Bisiraheli, ntigeze mbona ufite ukwizera kugeze aha!" 
Matthew8:11 Kandi reka mbabwire, benshi bazaturuka iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba, basangirire na Aburahamu na Izaki na Yakobo mu bwami bw'ijuru." 
Matthew8:12 Naho abari babugenewe bajugunywe hanze mu mwijima, aho bazaririra kandi bagahekenya amenyo.”" 
Matthew8:13 Yezu abwira umukapiteni ati: “Genda bikubere nk'uko wizeye.” Uwo mwanya umugaragu we arakira. 
Matthew8:14 Yezu ageze kwa Petero asanga nyirabukwe wa Petero aryamye, ahinda umuriro." 
Matthew8:15 Nuko Yezu amukora ku kuboko umuriro urazima, arabyuka aramuzimanira." 
Matthew8:16 Bugorobye bamuzanira abantu benshi bahanzweho, maze abameneshamo ingabo za Satani azikabukiye gusa, kandi abandi barwayi bose arabakiza." 
Matthew8:17 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Ubwe yishyizeho ubumuga bwacu, yigerekaho n'indwara zacu.”" 
Matthew8:18 Yezu abonye ko akikijwe n'imbaga y'abantu, ategeka abigishwa be kwambuka bagafata hakurya." 
Matthew8:19 Nuko umwigishamategeko aramwegera aramubwira ati: “Mwigisha, nzagukurikira aho uzajya hose.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Za nyiramuhari zigira amasenga zibamo, n'inyoni zigira ibyari, nyamara Umwana w'umuntu ntagira aho aruhukira.”" 
Matthew8:21 Undi mu bigishwa be aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani, reka mbanze njye gushyingura data.”" 
Matthew8:22 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Nkurikira ureke abapfu bahambe abapfu babo.” 
Matthew8:23 Nuko yurira mu bwato, abigishwa be bajyana na we." 
Matthew8:24 Ni bwo haje inkubi y'umuyaga mu kiyaga kugeza ubwo ubwato bwari bugiye kurengerwa n'amazi. Ubwo Yezu yari asinziriye. 
Matthew8:25 Baramwegera baramukangura, baramubwira bati: “Nyagasani, dutabare turashize!”" 
Matthew8:26 Arababwira ati: “Ni iki kibateye ubwoba, yemwe abafite ukwizera guke mwe?” Aherako arahaguruka acyaha imiyaga n'ikiyaga, maze haba ituze ryinshi." 
Matthew8:27 Abigishwa barumirwa baravuga bati: “Uyu ni muntu ki utegeka imiyaga n'ikiyaga bikamwumvira?” 
Matthew8:28 Yezu afata hakurya mu ntara y'Abanyagadara, abantu babiri bahanzweho bavumbuka mu irimbi baza bamusanga. Bari bateye ubwoba ku buryo nta muntu wari ukinyura iyo nzira." 
Matthew8:29 Bamubonye bavuza induru bati: “Uradushakaho iki Mwana w'Imana? Mbese uzanywe hano no kutwica urubozo igihe cyacu kitaragera?” 
Matthew8:30 Hafi aho hari umugana w'ingurube nyinshi zarishaga. 
Matthew8:31 Izo ngabo za Satani zinginga Yezu ziti: “Niba utumenesheje twohereze muri ziriya ngurube!” 
Matthew8:32 Yezu arazibwira ati: “Ngaho nimugende.” Nuko ziva mu bantu zijya mu ngurube, maze umugana wose ucuncumuka ku gacuri wiroha mu kiyaga urarohama." 
Matthew8:33 Abashumba bazo barahunga bajya mu mujyi, batekerereza abantu ibyabaye byose n'ibya ba bantu bari bahanzweho." 
Matthew8:34 Nuko abatuye umujyi bose bahururira Yezu, bamubonye baramwinginga ngo abavire ku musozi." 
Matthew9:1 Nuko Yezu yurira ubwato, arambuka ajya mu mujyi w'iwabo." 
Matthew9:2 Bamuzanira umuntu umugaye bamuhetse mu ngobyi, abonye ukwizera kwabo abwira uwo murwayi ati: “Humura mwana wanjye, ibyaha byawe urabibabariwe.”" 
Matthew9:3 Bamwe mu bigishamategeko babyumvise baribwira bati: “Uriya muntu aratuka Imana.” 
Matthew9:4 Yezu amenya ibyo bibwira arababaza ati: “Ni iki kibateye ibyo bitekerezo bibi? 
Matthew9:5 Icyoroshye ni ikihe, ari ukuvuga ngo ‘Ibyaha byawe urabibabariwe’, cyangwa ngo ‘Byuka ugende’?" 
Matthew9:6 Nyamara ndagira ngo mumenye ko ku isi Umwana w'umuntu afite ubushobozi bwo kubabarira abantu ibyaha.” Nuko abwira uwo muntu umugaye ati: “Byuka ufate ingobyi yawe witahire.” 
Matthew9:7 Uwo muntu arabyuka arataha. 
Matthew9:8 Aho hari imbaga y'abantu benshi babibonye barakangarana, basingiza Imana yahaye abantu ubushobozi bugeze aho." 
Matthew9:9 Nuko Yezu ahise abona umuntu witwa Matayo, yicaye ku biro by'imisoro. Aramubwira ati: “Nkurikira!” Matayo aherako arahaguruka aramukurikira." 
Matthew9:10 Igihe Yezu n'abigishwa be bari kwa Matayo bafungura, abasoresha benshi n'abandi banyabyaha baraza basangira na bo." 
Matthew9:11 Abafarizayi babibonye babaza abigishwa be bati: “Kuki umwigisha wanyu asangira n'abasoresha n'abanyabyaha?” 
Matthew9:12 Yezu abumvise arababwira ati: “Abazima si bo bakenera umuvuzi, ahubwo abarwayi ni bo bamukenera." 
Matthew9:13 Nimugende mwige uko iri jambo risobanura, ‘Icyo mbashakaho si ibitambo, ahubwo ni uko mugira impuhwe.’ Sinazanywe no guhamagara intungane, ahubwo naje guhamagara abanyabyaha.”" 
Matthew9:14 Nuko abigishwa ba Yohani Mubatiza begera Yezu baramubaza bati: “Kuki twebwe n'Abafarizayi twigomwa kurya kenshi, naho abigishwa bawe ntibabikore?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese mu bukwe abasangwa bashobora kugira agahinda, umukwe akiri kumwe na bo? Nyamara igihe kizagera umukwe avanwe muri bo, ni bwo bazigomwa kurya." 
Matthew9:16 “Ntawe utera ikiremo gishya ku mwenda ushaje. Uwabikora, ikiremo gishya cyawukurura ukarushaho gushishimuka." 
Matthew9:17 Nta n'usuka inzoga y'umubira mu mpago z'impu zishaje. Uwabikora, impago zaturika zikangirika inzoga igasandara. Ahubwo inzoga y'umubira bayisuka mu mpago zikiri nshya, ntihagire icyangirika muri byombi.”" 
Matthew9:18 Akibabwira ayo magambo, umutware wo mu Bayahudi aramusanga, aramupfukamira aramubwira ati: “Umukobwa wanjye amaze gupfa, none ngwino umurambikeho ibiganza yongere abeho.”" 
Matthew9:19 Nuko Yezu arahaguruka aramukurikira, ajyanye n'abigishwa be." 
Matthew9:20 Muri bo hari umugore wari urwaye indwara yo kuva, ayimaranye imyaka cumi n'ibiri. Amuturuka inyuma akora ku ncunda z'umwitero we," 
Matthew9:21 kuko yibwiraga ati: “Ninkora ku mwitero we byonyine ndakira.” 
Matthew9:22 Nuko Yezu arahindukira, amurabutswe aramubwira ati: “Humura mwana wanjye, ukwizera kwawe kuragukijije.” Ako kanya uwo mugore arakira." 
Matthew9:23 Yezu ageze mu rugo rwa wa mutware, ahasanga abantu bavuza imyironge baririra uwapfuye, ahasanga n'imbaga y'abantu basakabaka." 
Matthew9:24 Arababwira ati: “Nimusohoke, umwana ntiyapfuye ahubwo arasinziriye.” Baramuseka cyane." 
Matthew9:25 Bose bamaze guhēzwa Yezu arinjira amufata ukuboko, umukobwa arabyuka." 
Matthew9:26 Iyo nkuru ikwira muri ako karere kose. 
Matthew9:27 Yezu avuye aho hantu, abantu babiri b'impumyi bamukurikira batakamba bati: “Yewe Mwene Dawidi, tugirire impuhwe!”" 
Matthew9:28 Ageze mu rugo baramwegera, maze arababaza ati: “Muremera ko nshobora kubakiza?” Baramusubiza bati: “Turabyemera Nyagasani.”" 
Matthew9:29 Nuko abakora ku maso arababwira ati: “Bibabere uko mwizeye.” 
Matthew9:30 Nuko barahumuka. Arabihanangiriza ati: “Muririnde ntihagire ubimenya.” 
Matthew9:31 Ariko bagitirimuka aho bamwamamaza muri ako karere kose. 
Matthew9:32 Bakiva aho, abantu bazanira Yezu ikiragi cyahanzweho." 
Matthew9:33 Yezu amenesha ingabo ya Satani, uwari ikiragi aravuga. Rubanda baratangara cyane baravuga bati: “Ntihigeze kuboneka ibintu nk'ibi mu Bisiraheli.”" 
Matthew9:34 Naho Abafarizayi bo bakavuga bati: “Ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani abuhabwa n'umutware wazo.” 
Matthew9:35 Yezu agenda mu mijyi yose no mu byaro yigisha mu nsengero zaho, atangaza Ubutumwa bwiza bwerekeye ubwami bw'ijuru, akiza n'indwara zose n'ubumuga bwose." 
Matthew9:36 Abonye iyo mbaga y'abantu abagirira impuhwe, kuko bari bashobewe kandi bananiwe, bameze nk'intama zitagira umushumba." 
Matthew9:37 Nuko abwira abigishwa be ati: “Dore imyaka yeze ari myinshi nyamara abasaruzi ni bake," 
Matthew9:38 nuko rero nimusabe Nyir'imyaka yohereze abasaruzi mu murima we.” 
Matthew10:1 Nuko Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be cumi na babiri, abaha ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani, n'ubwo gukiza indwara zose n'ubumuga bwose." 
Matthew10:2 Dore amazina y'izo Ntumwa ze uko ari cumi n'ebyiri: uwa mbere ni Simoni wiswe Petero na Andereya umuvandimwe we, na Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi," 
Matthew10:3 na Filipo na Barutolomayo, na Tomasi na Matayo w'umusoresha, na Yakobo mwene Alufeyi na Tadeyo," 
Matthew10:4 na Simoni w'umurwanashyaka w'igihugu, na Yuda Isikariyoti wa wundi wagambaniye Yezu." 
Matthew10:5 Nuko Yezu atuma abo cumi na babiri, arabihanangiriza ati: “Ntimujye mu turere tw'abanyamahanga, kandi ntimwinjire mu mijyi ituwe n'Abanyasamariya." 
Matthew10:6 Ahubwo mujye mu bazimiye nk'intama bakomoka kuri Isiraheli. 
Matthew10:7 Mugende mutangaza muti: ‘Ubwami bw'ijuru buregereje.’ 
Matthew10:8 Mukize abarwayi, muzure abapfuye, muhumanure ababembe kandi mumeneshe ingabo za Satani. Mwaherewe ubuntu, mutangire ku buntu." 
Matthew10:9 Ntimugire ibiceri mutwara mu mikandara yanyu, byaba iby'izahabu, cyangwa iby'ifeza, cyangwa iby'umuringa." 
Matthew10:10 Ntimujyane kandi imifuka y'urugendo, cyangwa amakanzu abiri cyangwa inkweto, habe n'inkoni kuko umukozi akwiye guhabwa ifunguro." 
Matthew10:11 “Nimugera mu mujyi cyangwa mu mudugudu mujye mushaka uwishimira kubākīra, maze mugume iwe kugeza igihe muzahavira." 
Matthew10:12 Mukigera iwe mubwire ab'aho muti: ‘Nimugire amahoro!’ 
Matthew10:13 Niba bene urugo babakiriye, amahoro mubifurije agumane na bo, naho nibatabakira ayo mahoro abagarukire." 
Matthew10:14 Ahantu hose batazabakira ntibabatege amatwi, nimujya kuva muri urwo rugo cyangwa muri uwo mujyi, mujye muhungura umukungugu wo mu birenge byanyu." 
Matthew10:15 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ku munsi Imana izaca imanza, abari batuye i Sodoma n'i Gomora bazahanishwa igihano kidakaze nk'icy'abatuye uwo mujyi." 
Matthew10:16 “Dore mbatumye nk'intama hagati y'impyisi. Nuko rero murabe inyaryenge nk'inzoka, mube n'abanyamahoro nk'inuma." 
Matthew10:17 Mujye mwirinda abantu kuko bazabajyana mu nkiko, bakabakubitira no mu nsengero zabo." 
Matthew10:18 Bazabagabiza abatware n'abami babampōra, bityo muzaba abagabo bo guhamya ibyanjye imbere yabo n'imbere y'abanyamahanga." 
Matthew10:19 Igihe bazabarega mu nkiko, ntimuzahagarike umutima mwibaza uburyo mugiye kwiregura, kuko igihe nikigera muzahabwa icyo mukwiriye kuvuga." 
Matthew10:20 Si mwe muzaba mwivugira, ahubwo ni Mwuka wa So uri mu ijuru uzavugira muri mwe." 
Matthew10:21 “Umuntu azicisha uwo bava inda imwe, umubyeyi yicishe umwana we, n'abana bazagomera ababyeyi babo babicishe." 
Matthew10:22 Muzangwa n'abantu bose babampōra, ariko uzihangana akageza ku munsi w'imperuka azarokoka." 
Matthew10:23 Kandi nibabatoteza mu mujyi uyu n'uyu, muzahungire mu wundi. Ndababwira nkomeje ko mutazahetura imijyi yose y'Abisiraheli Umwana w'umuntu ataraza." 
Matthew10:24 “Nta mwigishwa uruta umwigisha we, nta n'umugaragu uruta shebuja." 
Matthew10:25 Biba bihagije ko umwigishwa agera ku rugero rw'umwigisha, naho umugaragu akagera ku rugero rwa shebuja. None ubwo Nyir'urugo bamwise Bēlizebuli, mbega amazina mabi bazita abo mu rugo rwe!" 
Matthew10:26 “Nuko rero ntimugatinye abantu kuko nta gihishwe kitazahishurwa, kandi nta banga ritazamenyekana." 
Matthew10:27 Ibyo mbabwira rwihishwa muzabivugire ku mugaragaro, kandi ibyo mbongorera muzabitangarize ahirengeye." 
Matthew10:28 Ntimugatinye abica umubiri ariko batabasha kwica ubugingo, ahubwo mutinye Imana yo ibasha kurimburira umubiri n'ubugingo mu nyenga y'umuriro." 
Matthew10:29 “Mbese ibishwi bibiri ntibigura ifaranga? Nyamara nta na kimwe muri byo gipfa So atabyemeye. 
Matthew10:30 Naho mwe, n'imisatsi yanyu yose irabaze." 
Matthew10:31 Nuko rero ntimugatinye kuko mwe murusha kure agaciro ibishwi byinshi. 
Matthew10:32 “Umuntu wese uzanyemera imbere y'abantu, nanjye nzamwemera imbere ya Data uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew10:33 Ariko uzanyihakanira imbere y'abantu, nanjye nzamwihakanira imbere ya Data uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew10:34 “Ntimutekereze ko naje kuzana amahoro ku isi. Sinaje kuzana amahoro ahubwo ni inkota. 
Matthew10:35 Naje gutandukanya umuhungu na se, umukobwa na nyina, umukazana na nyirabukwe." 
Matthew10:36 Nuko rero abanzi b'umuntu bazaba abo mu rugo rwe. 
Matthew10:37 “Ukunda se cyangwa nyina akabandutisha ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye. Ukunda umuhungu we cyangwa umukobwa we akabandutisha, na we ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye." 
Matthew10:38 Udatwara umusaraba we ngo ankurikire ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye. 
Matthew10:39 Uwihambira ku buzima bwe azabubura, nyamara uwemera kubuhara ari jye azira azabusubirana." 
Matthew10:40 “Ubakira ni jye aba yakiriye, kandi unyakira aba yakiriye Uwantumye." 
Matthew10:41 Uwakira umuhanuzi kuko ari umuntu watumwe n'Imana, azahabwa ingororano iteganyirijwe abahanuzi. Uwakira kandi umuntu utunganiye Imana kuko ayitunganiye, azahabwa ingororano iteganyirijwe intungane." 
Matthew10:42 Uzaha umwe muri aba boroheje nibura agakombe k'amazi afutse yo kunywa, ayamuhereye ko ari umwigishwa wanjye, ndababwira nkomeje ko atazabura kugororerwa.”" 
Matthew11:1 Yezu amaze guha abigishwa be cumi na babiri ayo mabwiriza, aherako ajya kwigisha no kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza mu mijyi y'iwabo." 
Matthew11:2 Ubwo Yohani yari muri gereza yumvise ibyo Kristo akora, amutumaho abigishwa be" 
Matthew11:3 kumubaza bati: “Mbese ni wowe wa wundi ugomba kuza, cyangwa se dutegereze undi?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mugende mutekerereze Yohani ibyo mwiyumviye n'ibyo mwiboneye muti: 
Matthew11:5 ‘Impumyi zirahumuka, abamugaye baragenda, ababembe barakira, ibipfamatwi birumva, abapfuye barazuka, n'abakene baragezwaho Ubutumwa bwiza!’" 
Matthew11:6 Hahirwa rero umuntu wese utazareka kunyizera.” 
Matthew11:7 Abo bigishwa ba Yohani batirimutse aho, Yezu atangira kubwira rubanda ibyerekeye Yohani, arababaza ati: “Mwagiye mu butayu kureba iki? Mbese ni urubingo ruhungabanywa n'umuyaga?" 
Matthew11:8 None se mwagiye kureba iki? Ese ni umuntu wambaye imyambaro y'agaciro? Oya, abambaye imyambaro y'agaciro ni abibera mu ngoro z'abami." 
Matthew11:9 None se nyine mwagiye kureba iki? Ese ni umuhanuzi? Ni we koko ndetse aruta umuhanuzi! 
Matthew11:10 Yohani uwo ni we Ibyanditswe bivuga, aho Imana igira iti: ‘Dore nohereje intumwa yanjye mbere yawe kugira ngo igutunganyirize inzira.’" 
Matthew11:11 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko mu bana b'abantu hatigeze habaho uruta Yohani Mubatiza, nyamara umuto mu bwami bw'ijuru aramuruta." 
Matthew11:12 Kuva igihe Yohani Mubatiza yigishaga kugeza ubu ubwami bw'ijuru buraharanirwa, ab'intwari bakaba ari bo babwegukana." 
Matthew11:13 Ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi bose no mu Mategeko, byakomeje guhanura ibyabwo kugeza igihe cya Yohani." 
Matthew11:14 Mushatse kandi kubyemera, Yohani uwo ni we Eliya wagombaga kuza." 
Matthew11:15 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve! 
Matthew11:16 “Mbese abantu b'iki gihe nabagereranya n'iki? Ni nk'abana bicaye mu masoko bahamagarana bati: 
Matthew11:17 ‘Twateye imbyino z'umunezero ntimwabyina! Duteye iz'ishavu ntimwarira!’ 
Matthew11:18 Yohani yaje yigomwa kurya no kunywa baravuga bati: ‘Yahanzweho!’ 
Matthew11:19 Naho Umwana w'umuntu aje arya kandi anywa baravuga bati: ‘Mbega igisahiranda cy'igisinzi, cy'incuti y'abasoresha n'abanyabyaha!’ Nyamara ubwenge bw'Imana bugaragazwa n'icyo bwakoze.”" 
Matthew11:20 Nuko Yezu atangira gutonganya abo mu mijyi yakoreyemo ibitangaza byinshi, kuko banze kwihana. Aravuga ati:" 
Matthew11:21 “Mwa bantu b'i Korazini mwe, muzabona ishyano! Namwe bantu b'i Betsayida, muzabona ishyano! Ibitangaza Imana yakoreye muri mwe iyo bikorerwa i Tiri n'i Sidoni, kuva kera abaho baba barambaye imyambaro igaragaza akababaro kandi bakisiga ivu, bagaragaza ko bihannye." 
Matthew11:22 Nyamara reka mbabwire: ku munsi Imana izaca imanza, ab'i Tiri n'i Sidoni bazahanishwa igihano kidakaze nk'icyanyu." 
Matthew11:23 Namwe bantu b'i Kafarinawumu, ese muragira ngo muzashyirwa hejuru mugere ku ijuru? Reka da! Ahubwo muzamanurwa mugere ikuzimu, kuko ibitangaza Imana yakoreye iwanyu iyo bikorerwa i Sodoma, Sodoma iba igihagaze kugeza n'ubu." 
Matthew11:24 Reka mbabwire: ku munsi Imana izaca imanza, abo mu karere ka Sodoma bazahanishwa igihano kidakaze nk'icyanyu.”" 
Matthew11:25 Uwo mwanya Yezu aravuga ati: “Ndagushimiye Data Nyir'ijuru n'isi, kuko ibyo wabihishe abanyabwenge n'abahanga, ukabihishurira abaciye bugufi." 
Matthew11:26 Yego Data, uko ni ko biri kuko ari byo wishimiye." 
Matthew11:27 “Ibintu byose nabyeguriwe na Data. Ntawe uzi Umwana w'Imana keretse Se, kandi ntawe uzi Se keretse Umwana we n'abo uwo Mwana we ashatse kumuhishurira." 
Matthew11:28 “Mwese abarushye n'abaremerewe nimunsange mbaruhure! 
Matthew11:29 Mwikorere umutwaro wanjye kandi mundebereho, kuko ndi umugwaneza nkaba niyoroshya. Bityo muzagira ituze mu mutima," 
Matthew11:30 kuko umutwaro mbakorera utavunanye kandi umuzigo mbahambirira nturemere.” 
Matthew12:1 Icyo gihe Yezu anyura mu mirima y'ingano ari ku isabato, abigishwa be bari bashonje maze batangira guca amahundo bararya." 
Matthew12:2 Abafarizayi babibonye baramubwira bati: “Dore abigishwa bawe barakora ibidakwiriye gukorwa ku isabato.” 
Matthew12:3 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimwasomye ibyo Dawidi yakoze igihe we n'abo bari kumwe bari bashonje? 
Matthew12:4 Icyo gihe yinjiye mu Nzu y'Imana, we n'abo bari kumwe barya imigati yatuwe Imana kandi batari babyemerewe, kuko yari igenewe abatambyi bonyine." 
Matthew12:5 Cyangwa se ntimwasomye mu Mategeko ko iyo abatambyi bafashe igihe mu Ngoro y'Imana ku isabato, bica itegeko rigenga isabato kandi ntibibabere icyaha?" 
Matthew12:6 Reka mbabwire ko hano hari uruta Ingoro y'Imana. 
Matthew12:7 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: ‘Icyo mbashakaho si ibitambo, ahubwo ni uko mugira impuhwe.’ Iyo musobanukirwa iryo jambo ntimwashyize abere mu rubanza," 
Matthew12:8 kuko Umwana w'umuntu ari we mugenga w'isabato.” 
Matthew12:9 Yezu avayo ajya mu rusengero rwabo," 
Matthew12:10 aho hakaba umuntu unyunyutse ikiganza. Nuko babaza Yezu bati: “Mbese biremewe gukiza umurwayi ku isabato?” Ibyo babivugiraga kugira ngo babone icyo bamurega. 
Matthew12:11 Na we arababaza ati: “Ni nde muri mwe waba afite intama imwe, maze ikagwa mu rwobo ku munsi w'isabato ntajye kuyikuramo?" 
Matthew12:12 Nyamara ukuntu umuntu arusha intama agaciro! Nuko rero mumenye ko byemewe kugira neza ku munsi w'isabato.” 
Matthew12:13 Yezu ni ko kubwira uwo muntu ati: “Rambura ikiganza.” Arakirambura maze cyongera kuba kizima nk'ikindi. 
Matthew12:14 Abafarizayi basohotse bahuza umugambi ngo bashake uko bamwica. 
Matthew12:15 Yezu abimenye ava aho hantu aragenda. Abantu benshi baramukurikira, abarwayi bose akabakiza." 
Matthew12:16 Abihanangiriza akomeje ngo be kumwamamaza. 
Matthew12:17 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: 
Matthew12:18 “Dore umugaragu wanjye nitoranyirije, ndamukunda cyane ni we nishimira. Nzamushyiramo Mwuka wanjye, azatangariza amahanga ubutabera." 
Matthew12:19 Ntazatongana kandi ntazasakuza, ntazarangurura ijwi rye mu mayira." 
Matthew12:20 Urubingo ruvunitse ntazaruhwanya, itara rigicumbeka ntazarizimya, kugeza igihe azaba atumye ubutabera butsinda." 
Matthew12:21 Bityo amahanga yose azamwiringira.” 
Matthew12:22 Nuko bamuzanira umuntu wahanzweho, akaba impumyi n'ikiragi, Yezu aramukiza ku buryo yahumutse kandi akavuga." 
Matthew12:23 Rubanda rwose babibonye baratangara maze baravuga bati: “Aho uriya si we Mwene Dawidi?” 
Matthew12:24 Abafarizayi babyumvise baravuga bati: “Uriya mugabo nta wundi umuha ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani, keretse Bēlizebuli umutware wazo.”" 
Matthew12:25 Yezu amenye ibyo batekereza arababwira ati: “Iyo igihugu gisubiranyemo kirasenyuka, kandi iyo umujyi usubiranyemo ntukomera, n'umuryango na wo ni uko." 
Matthew12:26 None se niba Satani amenesha Satani, ntiyaba yiciyemo ibice? Ubwo se ubwami bwe bwakomera bute?" 
Matthew12:27 Ikindi kandi, mbese niba ari Bēlizebuli umpa ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo ze, bene wanyu bo ubwo bubasha babuhabwa na nde? Ubwo babikora ni bo bazatuma mutsindwa n'urubanza." 
Matthew12:28 Noneho kubera ko ari Mwuka w'Imana utuma menesha ingabo za Satani, ni ukuvuga ko ubwami bwayo bubagezeho." 
Matthew12:29 “Mbese umuntu yabasha ate kwigabiza urugo rw'umunyamaboko kugira ngo amusahure ibyo atunze, atabanje kumuboha? Ubwo ni bwo yasahura urugo rwe." 
Matthew12:30 “Utari mu ruhande rwanjye aba andwanya, kandi udakoranyiriza hamwe nanjye aba atatanya." 
Matthew12:31 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira ko nta cyaha abantu batazababarirwa naho kwaba gutuka Imana, ariko umuntu wese uzatuka Mwuka Muziranenge ntazababarirwa." 
Matthew12:32 Umuntu wese uzavuga nabi Umwana w'umuntu azababarirwa, ariko uzavuga nabi Mwuka Muziranenge ntazababarirwa, haba muri iki gihe, haba no mu gihe kizaza." 
Matthew12:33 “Nimugira igiti cyiza kizera imbuto nziza, nyamara niba ari kibi kizera imbuto mbi, kuko igiti kimenyekanira ku mbuto zacyo." 
Matthew12:34 Mwa rubyaro rw'impiri mwe, mubasha mute kuvuga amagambo meza kandi muri babi? Koko ‘Akuzuye umutima ni ko gasesekara ku munwa’." 
Matthew12:35 Umuntu mwiza akura ibyiza mu migambi ye myiza, naho umuntu mubi agakura ibibi mu migambi ye mibi." 
Matthew12:36 Reka mbabwire: ku munsi Imana izaca imanza, abantu bazabazwa ijambo ryose ry'impfabusa bavuze," 
Matthew12:37 kuko amagambo wivugiye ni yo azatuma utsinda cyangwa utsindwa n'urubanza.” 
Matthew12:38 Nuko bamwe mu bigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha, turashaka ko utanga ikimenyetso cyatuma tukwemera.”" 
Matthew12:39 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Abantu b'iki gihe b'abasambanyi n'abagizi ba nabi bashaka ko mbaha ikimenyetso, nyamara nta kimenyetso kindi bazahabwa kitari icy'umuhanuzi Yonasi." 
Matthew12:40 Nk'uko Yonasi yamaze iminsi itatu n'amajoro atatu mu nda y'igifi, ni ko n'Umwana w'umuntu azamara iminsi itatu n'amajoro atatu mu nda y'isi." 
Matthew12:41 Ku munsi Imana izaca imanza, ab'i Ninive bazahagurukira ab'iki gihe maze bababuranye babatsinde, kuko bitaye ku byo Yonasi yabatangarije bakihana, kandi rero hano hari uruta Yonasi." 
Matthew12:42 Ku munsi Imana izaca imanza, wa mwamikazi waturutse mu majyepfo azahagurukira ab'iki gihe maze ababuranye abatsinde, kuko we yavuye iyo bigwa akaza kumva amagambo y'ubwenge bwa Salomo, kandi rero hano hari uruta Salomo." 
Matthew12:43 “Iyo ingabo ya Satani ivuye mu muntu izerera ku gasi ishaka aho yaruhukira, yahabura" 
Matthew12:44 ikibwira iti: ‘Reka nsubire mu nzu yanjye navuyemo.’ Yagerayo igasanga nta muntu urimo, ikubuye iteguye." 
Matthew12:45 Nuko ikajya kuzana izindi ngabo ndwi ziyitambukije ubugome, zose zikinjirana zigatura muri uwo muntu. Nuko imibereho ye ya nyuma ikarusha iya mbere kuba mibi. Uko ni ko bizaba ku bantu babi b'iki gihe.”" 
Matthew12:46 Igihe Yezu akiganira na rubanda, nyina n'abavandimwe be baba barahageze, baguma hanze bashaka kuvugana na we. [" 
Matthew12:47 Nuko umuntu aramubwira ati: “Yewe, nyoko n'abavandimwe bawe bahagaze hanze barashaka ko muvugana.”]" 
Matthew12:48 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Mama ni nde, abavandimwe banjye ni bande?”" 
Matthew12:49 Nuko arambura ukuboko yerekana abigishwa be, aravuga ati: “Mama n'abavandimwe banjye ni aba!" 
Matthew12:50 Umuntu wese ukora ibyo Data uri mu ijuru ashaka ni we murumuna wanjye, ni we mushiki wanjye, ni na we mama.”" 
Matthew13:1 Uwo munsi Yezu ava imuhira, ajya ku kiyaga yicara ku nkombe." 
Matthew13:2 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu iramukikiza bituma ajya mu bwato yicaramo, abantu bose bahagarara ku nkombe." 
Matthew13:3 Nuko ababwira ibintu byinshi akoresheje imigani ati: “Habayeho umuntu wagiye kubiba," 
Matthew13:4 igihe abiba imbuto zimwe zigenda zigwa ku nzira, hanyuma inyoni ziraza zirazitoragura." 
Matthew13:5 Izindi zigwa ku gasi zihita zimera, kuko ubutaka ari bugufi." 
Matthew13:6 Izuba ricanye rirazotsa ziruma, kuko zidafite aho zishorera imizi." 
Matthew13:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa, amahwa azirengaho maze ziragwingira." 
Matthew13:8 Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza zirera, zimwe zera imbuto ijana, izindi mirongo itandatu, izindi mirongo itatu." 
Matthew13:9 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!” 
Matthew13:10 Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera baramubaza bati: “Ni iki gituma wigisha abantu ukoresheje imigani?” 
Matthew13:11 Arabasubiza ati: “Mwebwe mwahawe kumenya amabanga y'ubwami bw'ijuru, nyamara bo ntibabihawe." 
Matthew13:12 Ufite azongererwa ndetse ahabwe byinshi, naho udafite na busa azakwa n'utwo yaririragaho." 
Matthew13:13 Naho abandi igituma mbabwira nkoresheje imigani ni uko bareba ariko ntibabone, batega amatwi ariko ntibumve kandi ntibasobanukirwe." 
Matthew13:14 Bityo biba nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: ‘Kumva muzumva ariko ntimuzasobanukirwa, kureba muzareba ariko nta cyo muzabona." 
Matthew13:15 Erega aba ni abantu binangiye! Biziba amatwi, bahunza amaso, kugira ngo be kubona, be no kumva, kandi be gusobanukirwa, kugira ngo batangarukira nkabakiza.’" 
Matthew13:16 Mwebwe murahirwa kuko amaso yanyu areba, n'amatwi yanyu akaba yumva." 
Matthew13:17 Ndababwira nkomeje ko abahanuzi benshi n'intungane nyinshi bashatse kureba ibyo mureba ntibabibona, kandi bashatse kumva ibyo mwumva ntibabyumva." 
Matthew13:18 “Nimutege amatwi rero mwumve iby'uwo mugani w'umubibyi. 
Matthew13:19 Umuntu wese wumva Ijambo ry'ubwami bw'ijuru ntarisobanukirwe, ahwanye na ha handi ku nzira imbuto zaguye, maze Sekibi akaza agasahura icyabibwe mu mutima we." 
Matthew13:20 Aho zabibwe ku gasi ni nk'umuntu wumva Ijambo ry'Imana, ako kanya akaryakirana ubwuzu," 
Matthew13:21 nyamara ntatume rishorera imizi muri we, bityo akarimarana igihe gito. Iyo habaye ingorane cyangwa gutotezwa ahōrwa Ijambo ry'Imana, ahita acika intege." 
Matthew13:22 Aho zabibwe mu mahwa ni nk'umuntu wumva Ijambo ry'Imana, nyamara guhagarikwa umutima n'iby'isi no gushukwa n'ubukungu, bikarenga kuri iryo Jambo rikaba nk'imbuto zarumbye." 
Matthew13:23 Aho zabibwe mu butaka bwiza ni nk'umuntu wumva Ijambo ry'Imana akarisobanukirwa akera imbuto, umwe ijana, undi mirongo itandatu, undi mirongo itatu.”" 
Matthew13:24 Yezu abaha ikindi kigereranyo ati: “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umuntu wari warabibye imbuto nziza mu murima we. 
Matthew13:25 Igihe abantu basinziriye, umwanzi araza abiba urukungu hagati mu ngano." 
Matthew13:26 Nuko imyaka ibaye imigengararo, urukungu ruramenyekana." 
Matthew13:27 Abagaragu babibonye, basanga nyir'umurima baramubaza bati: ‘Mbese ntiwabibye imbuto nziza mu murima wawe? None se urukungu rwajemo rute?’" 
Matthew13:28 Arabasubiza ati: ‘Ibyo ni umwanzi wabikoze.’ Abagaragu bati: ‘Mbese urashaka ko tujya kururandura?’ 
Matthew13:29 Na we ati: ‘Oya, mutarurandurana n'ingano." 
Matthew13:30 Nimureke bikurane byombi kugeza igihe cy'isarura, ni bwo nzabwira abasaruzi nti: Mubanze murundanye urukungu, muruhambiremo imiba muyitwike, maze ingano muzihunike mu kigega cyanjye.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Yezu yongera kubaha ikigereranyo ati: “Ubwami bw'ijuru wabugereranya n'akabuto kitwa sinapi, umuntu yabibye mu murima we." 
Matthew13:32 Karutwa n'izindi mbuto zose, nyamara kamara kumera kagasumba ibindi bihingwa kakangana n'igiti, inyoni zikaza zikarika mu mashami yacyo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Arongera abaha n'ikindi kigereranyo ati: “Ubwami bw'ijuru wabugereranya n'umusemburo umugore yafashe, akawuvanga n'ibyibo bitatu by'ifu kugeza ubwo yose itutumbye.”" 
Matthew13:34 Ibyo byose Yezu yabibwiraga rubanda akoresheje imigani. Nta cyo yababwiraga adakoresheje imigani. 
Matthew13:35 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi ngo: “Nzababwirira mu migani, mbamenyeshe ibyahishwe kuva isi yaremwa.”" 
Matthew13:36 Nuko Yezu asezera kuri rubanda asubira imuhira. Abigishwa be bajya aho ari baramubwira bati: “Dusobanurire cya kigereranyo cy'urukungu rwabibwe mu murima.” 
Matthew13:37 Nuko arababwira ati: “Ubiba imbuto nziza ni Umwana w'umuntu," 
Matthew13:38 umurima abibamo ni isi. Imbuto nziza abiba ni abayoboka ubwami bw'ijuru, naho urukungu ni abayoboka Sekibi." 
Matthew13:39 Umwanzi warubibye ni Satani. Isarura ryo ni imperuka y'isi, naho abasaruzi ni abamarayika." 
Matthew13:40 Nk'uko barundarunda urukungu bakarutwika, ni ko bizamera ku mperuka y'isi." 
Matthew13:41 Umwana w'umuntu azatuma abamarayika be, batoratore abatera abandi gukora ibyaha n'inkozi z'ibibi, babakure mu bwami bwe" 
Matthew13:42 maze babarohe mu itanura ry'umuriro, aho bazarira kandi bagahekenya amenyo." 
Matthew13:43 Ubwo abatunganiye Imana bazarabagirana nk'izuba mu bwami bwa Se. Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve! 
Matthew13:44 “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'ikintu cy'agaciro gihishwe mu murima, umuntu yakigwaho akongera akagihisha maze akagenda yamazwe n'ibyishimo, ku buryo agurisha ibyo afite byose akagaruka kugura uwo murima." 
Matthew13:45 “Na none iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umucuruzi washakaga amasaro y'agahebuzo. 
Matthew13:46 Nuko abonye rimwe ry'igiciro kinini, aragenda agurisha ibye byose ararigura." 
Matthew13:47 “Byongeye kandi, iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umutego w'amafi banaze mu kiyaga, ugafata amafi y'amoko yose." 
Matthew13:48 Iyo umaze kūzura bawukururira ku nkombe, bakicara bakajonjora amafi, ameza bakayashyira mu bitebo, amabi bakayajugunya." 
Matthew13:49 Uko ni ko bizamera ku mperuka y'isi, abamarayika bazaza bajonjore ababi babakure mu ntungane," 
Matthew13:50 babarohe mu itanura ry'umuriro aho bazarira kandi bagahekenya amenyo.” 
Matthew13:51 Nuko arababaza ati: “Ibyo byose murabyumvise?” Bati: “Yee.” 
Matthew13:52 Arababwira ati: “Noneho rero umwigishamategeko wese wigishijwe iby'ubwami bw'ijuru, wamugereranya na nyir'urugo ukora mu byo atunze, akazana ibintu bimwe bishya n'ibindi bya kera.”" 
Matthew13:53 Nuko Yezu amaze kubacira iyo migani, arahava" 
Matthew13:54 ajya mu mujyi w'iwabo maze yigishiriza mu rusengero rwaho. Baratangara cyane bati: “Mbese ubwenge afite n'ibitangaza akora abikura he? 
Matthew13:55 Mbese si umwana wa wa mubaji? Ese nyina ntiyitwa Mariya? Mbese abavandimwe be si Yakobo na Yozefu na Simoni na Yuda? 
Matthew13:56 Mbese bashiki be bose ntiduturanye? None se biriya akora byose abikura he?” 
Matthew13:57 Ibyo bituma batamwemera. Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nta handi umuhanuzi asuzugurwa, uretse mu karere k'iwabo n'iwe mu rugo.”" 
Matthew13:58 Nuko aho ntiyahakorera ibitangaza byinshi kubera ko batamwemeye. 
Matthew14:1 Muri icyo gihe Herodi umutegetsi w'intara ya Galileya yumva ibya Yezu. 
Matthew14:2 Nuko abwira abo mu rugo rwe ati: “Uriya muntu ni Yohani Mubatiza wazutse! Ni cyo gituma afite ububasha bwo gukora ibitangaza.” 
Matthew14:3 Koko rero Herodi yari yarategetse ko bafata Yohani bakamuboha bakamushyira muri gereza. Impamvu yaturutse kuri Herodiya, umugore w'umuvandimwe we Filipo." 
Matthew14:4 Yohani yari yabwiye Herodi ati: “Ntibyemewe ko umutunga.” 
Matthew14:5 Ibyo bitera Herodi gushaka kwica Yohani, ariko yatinyaga rubanda kuko bemeraga ko Yohani ari umuhanuzi." 
Matthew14:6 Ku munsi mukuru wo kwibuka ivuka rya Herodi, umukobwa wa Herodiya abyinira imbere y'abatumirwa. Binyura Herodi cyane" 
Matthew14:7 ku buryo yamurahiye ati: “Ndaguha icyo unsaba cyose.” 
Matthew14:8 Nuko uwo mukobwa amaze kugirwa inama na nyina aravuga ati: “Nimumpe igihanga cya Yohani Mubatiza, bahite bakinzanira ku mbehe.”" 
Matthew14:9 Umwami Herodi arababara, nyamara kubera ko yari yabirahiriye imbere y'abatumirwa be, ategeka ko biba bityo." 
Matthew14:10 Atuma umuntu muri gereza aca Yohani igihanga. 
Matthew14:11 Yakizanye ku mbehe agiha uwo mukobwa, na we agishyikiriza nyina." 
Matthew14:12 Nyuma abigishwa ba Yohani baraza bajyana umurambo we barawushyingura, maze bajya kubimenyesha Yezu." 
Matthew14:13 Yezu abyumvise avayo, afata ubwato ajya kwiherera ahantu hadatuwe. Ariko imbaga y'abantu babimenye bava mu mujyi, bamusangayo banyuze iy'ubutaka." 
Matthew14:14 Ageze imusozi abona iyo mbaga y'abantu, abagirira impuhwe abakiriza abarwayi." 
Matthew14:15 Bugorobye abigishwa be baramwegera, baramubwira bati: “Aha hantu ntihatuwe kandi dore burije. Sezerera iyi mbaga y'abantu, bajye mu mihana bihahire ibyokurya.”" 
Matthew14:16 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Si ngombwa ko bagenda, ahubwo mube ari mwe mubafungurira.”" 
Matthew14:17 Baramubwira bati: “Icyo dufite imbere n'inyuma ni imigati itanu n'amafi abiri.” 
Matthew14:18 Arababwira ati: “Nimubinzanire hano.” 
Matthew14:19 Nuko ategeka abantu kwicara mu byatsi, afata iyo migati itanu n'amafi abiri, areba ku ijuru ashimira Imana. Arabimanyura abiha abigishwa be, na bo babikwiza abo bantu." 
Matthew14:20 Nuko bose bararya barahaga, bateranya utumanyu dusagutse twuzura inkangara cumi n'ebyiri." 
Matthew14:21 Abariye bari nk'ibihumbi bitanu, utabariyemo abagore n'abana." 
Matthew14:22 Bikirangira Yezu ategeka abigishwa be kujya mu bwato ngo bamubanzirize kugera hakurya, mu gihe agisezerera iyo mbaga y'abantu." 
Matthew14:23 Amaze kubasezerera azamuka umusozi, ajya gusenga yiherereye. Umugoroba ukuba akiri yo wenyine." 
Matthew14:24 Icyo gihe bwa bwato bwari bwamaze kugera kure y'inkombe, umuhengeri ubukoza hirya no hino kuko umuyaga wabaturukaga imbere." 
Matthew14:25 Nuko bujya gucya Yezu aza abagana agenda ku mazi. 
Matthew14:26 Abigishwa be bamubonye agenda ku mazi, bakuka umutima baravuga bati: “Ni umuzimu!” Bagira ubwoba barataka." 
Matthew14:27 Yezu aherako arababwira ati: “Nimuhumure ni jye, mwigira ubwoba!”" 
Matthew14:28 Petero aramusubiza ati: “Nyagasani, niba ari wowe tegeka ngusange ngenda ku mazi!”" 
Matthew14:29 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ngwino!” Nuko Petero ava mu bwato, agenda ku mazi agana Yezu." 
Matthew14:30 Nyamara abonye ko umuyaga ukajije umurego, agira ubwoba atangira kurohama, maze aratabaza ati: “Nyagasani nkiza!”" 
Matthew14:31 Ako kanya Yezu arambura ukuboko aramusingira, aramubwira ati: “Yewe ufite ukwizera guke we, utewe n'iki gushidikanya?”" 
Matthew14:32 Bageze mu bwato umuyaga urahosha. 
Matthew14:33 Nuko abari mu bwato bapfukama imbere ya Yezu bati: “Koko uri Umwana w'Imana.” 
Matthew14:34 Bafata hakurya mu ntara ya Genezareti. 
Matthew14:35 Abantu baho bamenye ko ari Yezu bakwiza inkuru muri ako karere kose, bamuzanira abarwayi babo bose." 
Matthew14:36 Nuko baramwinginga ngo byibura bakore ku ncunda z'umwitero we, abazikozeho bose bagakira." 
Matthew15:1 Nuko Abafarizayi n'abigishamategeko baturutse i Yeruzalemu basanga Yezu, baramubaza bati:" 
Matthew15:2 “Kuki abigishwa bawe barenga ku muhango wa ba sogokuruza? Kuki mu gihe cyo gufungura batabanza gukaraba?” 
Matthew15:3 Yezu arababaza ati: “Kuki mwe murenga ku Mategeko y'Imana mukihambira ku mihango yanyu? 
Matthew15:4 Imana yaravuze iti: ‘Ujye wubaha so na nyoko’, kandi iti: ‘Uzatuka se cyangwa nyina azicwe.’" 
Matthew15:5 Naho mwebwe muvuga ko umuntu yabwira se cyangwa nyina ati: ‘Icyo najyaga kugufashisha ngomba kugitura Imana’," 
Matthew15:6 ntabe acyubaha se [cyangwa nyina]. Bityo mukaba muhinduye ubusa Amategeko y'Imana mwitwaje imihango yanyu. 
Matthew15:7 Mwa ndyarya mwe, Ezayi yabahanuye uko muri agira ati:" 
Matthew15:8 ‘Aba bantu bampoza ku rurimi, ariko imitima yabo imba kure." 
Matthew15:9 Barushywa n'ubusa bansenga, kuko inyigisho bigisha ari amategeko y'abantu gusa.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Nuko Yezu ahamagara rubanda arababwira ati: “Nimuntege amatwi kandi musobanukirwe ibi: 
Matthew15:11 igihumanya umuntu si ikijya mu kanwa, ahubwo ni ikikavamo.”" 
Matthew15:12 Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera baramubaza bati: “Uzi ko Abafarizayi bumvise ibyo uvuze bikabarakaza?” 
Matthew15:13 Yezu ni ko kubasubiza ati: “Agati kose katatewe na Data uri mu ijuru kazarandurwa. 
Matthew15:14 Nimubareke ni impumyi zirandata izindi. Iyo impumyi irandase indi mpumyi, zombi zigwa mu rwobo.”" 
Matthew15:15 Petero ni bwo amubwiye ati: “Dusobanurire ayo marenga.” 
Matthew15:16 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Mbese namwe muri abaswa bigeze aho? 
Matthew15:17 Mbese ntimwumva ko ikintu cyose cyinjiye mu muntu kinyuze mu kanwa kijya mu nda, nyuma kikamuvamo kinyuze epfo?" 
Matthew15:18 Ariko igisohoka mu kanwa cyose kiba kivuye mu mutima, ni na cyo gihumanya umuntu," 
Matthew15:19 kuko mu mitima y'abantu ari ho hava imigambi mibi: ubwicanyi n'ubusambanyi n'ubujura, kubeshyerana no gutukana." 
Matthew15:20 Ibyo ni byo bihumanya umuntu, naho kurisha intoki zidakarabye si byo byamuhumanya.”" 
Matthew15:21 Nuko Yezu avayo ajya mu karere gahereranye n'imijyi ya Tiri na Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Umugore w'Umunyakanānikazi wabaga muri ako karere, aramusanga avuga aranguruye ati: “Nyagasani Mwene Dawidi, ngirira impuhwe! Umukobwa wanjye yahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani, ameze nabi rwose.”" 
Matthew15:23 Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza, maze abigishwa be baramwegera baramwinginga bati: “Musezerere kuko adusakuza inyuma.”" 
Matthew15:24 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Nta bandi natumweho uretse Abisiraheli bameze nk'intama zazimiye.” 
Matthew15:25 Uwo mugore araza aramupfukamira ati: “Nyagasani mfasha!” 
Matthew15:26 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Si byiza gufata ibyokurya by'abana ngo ubijugunyire imbwa.” 
Matthew15:27 Umugore aramusubiza ati: “Ni koko Nyagasani, ariko kandi n'imbwa zitungwa n'ibigwa hasi bivuye ku meza ya ba shebuja.”" 
Matthew15:28 Yezu ni ko kumusubiza ati: “Wa mugore we, ufite ukwizera gukomeye, bikubere uko ubishaka.” Uwo mwanya umukobwa we arakira." 
Matthew15:29 Nuko Yezu ava aho agenda akikiye ikiyaga cya Galileya, azamuka umusozi maze aricara." 
Matthew15:30 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu iramusanga bamuzaniye abacumbagira n'impumyi, ibirema n'ibiragi n'abandi barwayi benshi, babashyira imbere ye arabakiza." 
Matthew15:31 Nuko rubanda batangazwa no kubona ibiragi bivuga, ibirema bikira, abacumbagira bagenda neza n'impumyi zikareba. Nuko basingiza Imana ya Isiraheli." 
Matthew15:32 Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Aba bantu barambabaje. Dore uyu ni umunsi wa gatatu turi kumwe kandi ntibagifite icyo bafungura. None sinshaka kubasezerera kandi nta mpamba bafite, inzara itabatsinda ku nzira.”" 
Matthew15:33 Abigishwa be baramubaza bati: “Ko aha hantu hadatuwe, twakura he ibyahaza abantu bangana batya?”" 
Matthew15:34 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mufite imigati ingahe?” Baramusubiza bati: “Dufite irindwi n'udufi dukeya.” 
Matthew15:35 Nuko ategeka abantu kwicara hasi. 
Matthew15:36 Afata iyo migati uko ari irindwi na twa dufi, ashimira Imana, arabimanyura, abiha abigishwa na bo babikwiza iyo mbaga." 
Matthew15:37 Bose bararya barahaga, bateranya ibisagutse byuzura ibitebo birindwi." 
Matthew15:38 Abariye bari ibihumbi bine, utabariyemo abagore n'abana." 
Matthew15:39 Nuko Yezu amaze gusezerera iyo mbaga y'abantu ajya mu bwato, yerekeza mu karere ka Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Nuko Abafarizayi n'Abasaduseyi basanga Yezu, bamusaba ikimenyetso cyemeza ko yatumwe n'Imana, ariko ari umutego bamutega." 
Matthew16:2 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Iyo izuba rirenze muravuga muti: ‘Ejo hazaramuka umucyo kuko ijuru ari umutuku’," 
Matthew16:3 bwacya mukavuga muti: ‘Haramutse umuvumbi kuko ijuru ritukura kandi rikaba ryijimye.’ Muzi gutahura ijuru ngo mumenye ibihe, nyamara mukananirwa gutahura ibimenyetso biranga iby'iki gihe." 
Matthew16:4 Abantu b'iki gihe b'abasambanyi n'abagizi ba nabi bashaka ko mbaha ikimenyetso, nyamara nta kimenyetso kindi bazahabwa kitari icya Yonasi.” Nuko abasiga aho, aragenda." 
Matthew16:5 Bafashe hakurya, abigishwa ba Yezu basanga bibagiwe kujyana imigati." 
Matthew16:6 Yezu arababwira ati: “Muramenye mujye mwirinda umusemburo w'Abafarizayi n'uw'Abasaduseyi.” 
Matthew16:7 Bo rero baravugana bati: “Ubanza ari uko nta migati twazanye!” 
Matthew16:8 Yezu amenye ibyo bavugana arababwira ati: “Yemwe abafite ukwizera guke mwe, ni iki gituma mujya impaka ngo nta migati mufite?" 
Matthew16:9 Mbese ntimurasobanukirwa, nta n'ubwo mwibuka ya migati itanu yahagije bya bihumbi bitanu, n'umubare w'inkangara z'ibyasagutse mwahavanye?" 
Matthew16:10 Cyangwa se ntimwibuka na ya migati irindwi yahagije bya bihumbi bine, na bya bitebo by'ibyasagutse mwahavanye?" 
Matthew16:11 Kuki mudasobanukirwa ko atari imigati nababwiraga? Mujye mwirinda ahubwo umusemburo w'Abafarizayi n'uw'Abasaduseyi.” 
Matthew16:12 Noneho abigishwa basobanukirwa ko atari umusemburo w'imigati yababwiraga kwirinda, ahubwo ko ari uw'inyigisho z'Abafarizayi n'Abasaduseyi." 
Matthew16:13 Bageze mu karere gahereranye n'i Kayizariya ya Filipo, Yezu abaza abigishwa be ati: “Umwana w'umuntu abantu bavuga ko ari nde?”" 
Matthew16:14 Baramusubiza bati: “Bamwe bavuga ko uri Yohani Mubatiza, abandi ngo uri Eliya, naho abandi ngo uri Yeremiya cyangwa undi wo mu bahanuzi.”" 
Matthew16:15 Nuko Yezu arababaza ati: “Mwebwe se muvuga ko ndi nde?” 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati: “Uri Kristo Umwana w'Imana nzima.” 
Matthew16:17 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Urahirwa Simoni mwene Yonasi, kuko ibyo nta muntu wabiguhishuriye, ahubwo ni Data uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew16:18 Noneho nanjye reka nkubwire: uri Petero (ni ukuvuga ‘Ibuye’), kandi kuri urwo rutare nzubakaho Umuryango wanjye, ndetse n'urupfu ntiruzabasha kuwutsinda." 
Matthew16:19 Nzaguha imfunguzo z'ubwami bw'ijuru, icyo uzaboha ku isi kizaba cyaboshywe n'Imana mu ijuru, kandi icyo uzabohora ku isi kizaba cyabohowe n'Imana mu ijuru.”" 
Matthew16:20 Nuko Yezu yihanangiriza abigishwa be kutagira uwo bahingukiriza ko ari we Kristo. 
Matthew16:21 Uhereye ubwo, Yezu atangira gusobanurira abigishwa be ko ari ngombwa ko ajya i Yeruzalemu, akababazwa cyane n'abakuru b'imiryango n'abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko, bakamwica maze ku munsi wa gatatu akazuka." 
Matthew16:22 Nuko Petero aramwihererana, atangira kumuhana ati: “Nyagasani, ibyo biragatsindwa! Imana ntizakunda ko bikubaho!”" 
Matthew16:23 Yezu arahindukira aramubwira ati: “Mva iruhande Satani! Umbereye inkomyi kuko ibitekerezo byawe bitavuye ku Mana, ahubwo ari iby'abantu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Ushaka kunyoboka wese nareke kwiyitaho, ahubwo atware umusaraba we ankurikire." 
Matthew16:25 Ushaka gukiza ubuzima bwe azabubura, naho uhara ubuzima bwe ari jye ahōrwa azaba abukijije." 
Matthew16:26 Mbese umuntu byamumarira iki kwigarurira isi yose, ariko akaba yivukije ubugingo bwe? Cyangwa se ubugingo bw'umuntu yabugurana iki?" 
Matthew16:27 Ni koko Umwana w'umuntu agiye kuzaza afite ikuzo rya Se, ashagawe n'abamarayika be, maze agirire umuntu wese ibikwiranye n'ibyo yakoze." 
Matthew16:28 Ndababwira nkomeje ko bamwe mu bari aha, batazapfa batabonye Umwana w'umuntu aje kwima ingoma ye.”" 
Matthew17:1 Iminsi itandatu ishize Yezu ajyana Petero n'abavandimwe babiri Yakobo na Yohani, bihererana mu mpinga y'umusozi muremure." 
Matthew17:2 Nuko ahinduka bamureba, mu maso he harabagirana nk'izuba, imyambaro ye irererana." 
Matthew17:3 Bagiye kubona babona Musa na Eliya baganira na Yezu. 
Matthew17:4 Petero abwira Yezu ati: “Nyagasani, ko ari nta ko bisa kwibera hano! Nubishaka ndubaka utuzu dutatu tw'ingando, kamwe kabe akawe, akandi aka Musa, naho akandi kabe aka Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Akivuga atyo igicu kibengerana kirabatwikīra, bumva ijwi ry'uvugira muri icyo gicu ati: “Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane, ni we nishimira. Nimumutege amatwi!”" 
Matthew17:6 Abigishwa bumvise iryo jwi bagwa bubamye, bagira ubwoba bwinshi cyane." 
Matthew17:7 Maze Yezu arabegera abakoraho, ati: “Nimubyuke mwigira ubwoba.”" 
Matthew17:8 Bubuye amaso ntibagira undi babona, uretse Yezu wenyine." 
Matthew17:9 Bakimanuka umusozi arabihanangiriza ati: “Ntimugire uwo mubwira ibyo mumaze kwerekwa, kugeza ubwo Umwana w'umuntu azaba amaze kuzuka.”" 
Matthew17:10 Abigishwa ba Yezu ni ko kumubaza bati: “Kuki abigishamategeko bavuga ko Eliya agomba kubanza kuza?” 
Matthew17:11 Arabasubiza ati: “Ni koko, Eliya agomba kuza agatunganya byose." 
Matthew17:12 Ndetse mbabwire: Eliya yaraje nyamara abantu ntibamumenya, ahubwo bamugirira nabi uko bishakiye. Umwana w'umuntu na we ni ko bazamugirira.”" 
Matthew17:13 Noneho abigishwa basobanukirwa ko ari Yohani Mubatiza yababwiraga. 
Matthew17:14 Bageze aho imbaga y'abantu yari iri, umuntu yegera Yezu aramupfukamira." 
Matthew17:15 Nuko aravuga ati: “Nyagasani, girira impuhwe umwana wanjye! Arwara igicuri akababara cyane ku buryo kenshi kimutura mu muriro, kikamuroha no mu mazi." 
Matthew17:16 Namuzaniye abigishwa bawe bananirwa kumukiza.” 
Matthew17:17 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Yemwe bantu b'iki gihe mutizera Imana kandi mugoryamye, nzabana namwe ngeze ryari? Nzabihanganira ngeze ryari? Ngaho nimumunzanire.”" 
Matthew17:18 Yezu acyaha iyo ngabo ya Satani, imuvamo. Uwo mwanya umwana arakira." 
Matthew17:19 Nuko abigishwa be baramusanga, baramwihererana bati: “Kuki twe tutabashije kuyimenesha?”" 
Matthew17:20 Arabasubiza ati: “Ni ukubera ukwizera kwanyu kudahagije. Ndababwira nkomeje ko muramutse mufite ukwizera nibura kungana urwara, mwabwira uyu musozi muti: ‘Va aha ujye hariya’ maze ukahajya, nta kintu na kimwe cyabananira. [" 
Matthew17:21 Ariko bene iyo ngabo ya Satani ntishoborwa n'ikindi kitari ugusenga no kwigomwa kurya.”] 
Matthew17:22 Abigishwa bageze muri Galileya, Yezu arababwira ati: “Umwana w'umuntu agiye kuzagabizwa abantu," 
Matthew17:23 bamwice maze ku munsi wa gatatu azuke.” Nuko barashavura cyane. 
Matthew17:24 Yezu n'abigishwa be bageze i Kafarinawumu, abasoresha b'Ingoro y'Imana basanga Petero baramubaza bati: “Mbese umwigisha wanyu ntatanga umusoro w'Ingoro y'Imana?”" 
Matthew17:25 Petero arasubiza ati: “Arawutanga.” Nuko Petero agarutse imuhira Yezu aramutanguranwa ati: “Mbe Simoni, ubibona ute? Abami b'isi bahabwa na ba nde imisoro cyangwa amakoro? Mbese ni abana babo cyangwa ni rubanda? ”" 
Matthew17:26 Petero aramusubiza ati: “Ni rubanda.” Yezu ati: “Nuko rero abana babo si abo gusoreshwa. 
Matthew17:27 Nyamara kugira ngo tudaha abo bantu urwitwazo, jya ku kiyaga unagemo urushundura, ifi ufata bwa mbere uyasamure, urayisangamo igikoroto gihwanye n'umusoro wanjye n'uwawe, maze ukizane ugitange ho umusoro wacu twembi.”" 
Matthew18:1 Icyo gihe abigishwa begera Yezu baramubaza bati: “Mbese ni nde mukuru mu bwami bw'ijuru?” 
Matthew18:2 Nuko Yezu arembuza umwana amushyira hagati yabo," 
Matthew18:3 maze arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko niba mudahindutse ngo mumere nk'abana bato, mutazinjira mu bwami bw'ijuru." 
Matthew18:4 Uwiyoroshya akamera nk'uyu mwana muto, ni we mukuru mu bwami bw'ijuru." 
Matthew18:5 Byongeye kandi, uwakira umwana muto nk'uyu kubera jye ni jye aba yakiriye." 
Matthew18:6 “Nihagira ugusha mu cyaha umwe muri aba bato banyemera, icyaruta kuri we ni uko bamuhambira urusyo ku ijosi, bakamuroha mu kiyaga rwagati." 
Matthew18:7 Mbega ngo isi iragatora kubera ibigusha abantu mu byaha! Ibigusha abantu ntibizabura kubaho, ariko umuntu bizaturukaho azaba agatoye." 
Matthew18:8 “Niba ikiganza cyawe cyangwa ikirenge cyakugusha mu cyaha, ugice ugite kure. Icyaruta ni uko wakwinjira ahari ubugingo buhoraho ucitse ikiganza cyangwa ikirenge kimwe, aho kurohwa mu muriro utazima ufite ibiganza cyangwa ibirenge byombi." 
Matthew18:9 Niba kandi ijisho ryawe ryakugusha mu cyaha, urinogore urite kure. Icyaruta ni uko wakwinjira ahari ubugingo buhoraho ufite ijisho rimwe, aho kurohwa mu nyenga y'umuriro ufite amaso yombi." 
Matthew18:10 “Muramenye mutagira uwo musuzugura muri aba bato. Ndababwira ko mu ijuru abamarayika babo bahora imbere ya Data uri mu ijuru!” [ 
Matthew18:11 Umwana w'umuntu yazanywe no gukiza abazimiye.] 
Matthew18:12 “None se murabibona mute? Hagize umuntu ufite intama ijana maze imwe ikazimira, mbese ntiyasiga izindi mirongo cyenda n'icyenda ku musozi, kugira ngo ajye gushaka iyazimiye?" 
Matthew18:13 Ndababwira nkomeje ko iyo ayibonye, bimushimisha kurusha za zindi mirongo cyenda n'icyenda zitazimiye." 
Matthew18:14 Uko ni ko So uri mu ijuru ashaka ko hatabura n'umwe muri bariya bato. 
Matthew18:15 “Mugenzi wawe nagucumuraho, umusange umwereke icyaha cye mwiherereye. Nagukundira uzaba ugaruye umuvandimwe." 
Matthew18:16 Naho natakumva umutorere undi muntu umwe cyangwa babiri, kugira ngo nk'uko byanditswe, ‘ashinjwe n'abagabo babiri cyangwa barenzeho kugira ngo icyo aregwa kimuhame.’" 
Matthew18:17 Ariko niyanga kubumva ubibwire ikoraniro ry'ab'Imana. Niba kandi na ryo yanze kuryumva, kuva ubwo akubere nk'umuntu utazi Imana cyangwa umusoresha." 
Matthew18:18 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko icyo muzaboha ku isi kizaba kiboshywe n'Imana mu ijuru. Kandi icyo muzabohora ku isi kizaba kibohowe n'Imana mu ijuru. 
Matthew18:19 “Reka nongere mbabwire: niba ku isi babiri muri mwe bashyize hamwe kugira ngo basabe ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose, bazagihabwa na Data uri mu ijuru," 
Matthew18:20 kuko aho babiri cyangwa batatu bateraniye mu izina ryanjye mba ndi hamwe na bo.” 
Matthew18:21 Nuko Petero yegera Yezu aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani, mbese umuvandimwe wanjye akomeje kuncumuraho nkwiriye kumubabarira kangahe? Ese namubabarira karindwi?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Sinkubwiye ko wagarukira kuri karindwi gusa, ahubwo uzageze kuri karindwi incuro mirongo irindwi." 
Matthew18:23 “Ni yo mpamvu iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umwami, washatse kumurikisha imari yari yarabikije abagaragu be." 
Matthew18:24 Agitangira kubikora bamuzanira umwe muri bo, wari umurimo za miliyoni na za miliyoni z'amafaranga." 
Matthew18:25 Nuko abonye ko uwo muntu atari afite icyo kwishyura, shebuja ategeka ko bamugurisha we n'umugore n'abana be, n'ibyo yari afite byose kugira ngo yishyure uwo mwenda." 
Matthew18:26 Uwo mugaragu ni ko kumwikubita imbere akoma yombi ati: ‘Nimunyihanganire nzabishyura ibyanyu byose!’ 
Matthew18:27 Shebuja amugirira impuhwe, amurekera uwo mwenda aramurekura." 
Matthew18:28 “Uwo mugaragu avuye aho ahura n'undi mugaragu mugenzi we wari umurimo amafaranga ibihumbi bikeya, aramufata aramuniga ati: ‘Nyishyura umwenda undimo!’" 
Matthew18:29 Mugenzi we ni ko kumwikubita imbere aramwinginga ati: ‘Nimunyihanganire nzabishyura ibyanyu byose!’ 
Matthew18:30 Aranga ahubwo aragenda aramufungisha, kugeza igihe azaba amwishyuriye uwo mwenda." 
Matthew18:31 “Abagaragu bagenzi be babonye ibibaye barababara cyane, bajya gutekerereza shebuja uko byagenze kose." 
Matthew18:32 Nuko shebuja atumira uwo mugaragu aramubwira ati: ‘Yewe mugaragu gito, nakurekeye umwenda wawe kuko wanyinginze." 
Matthew18:33 None se ntiwari ukwiriye kugirira mugenzi wawe impuhwe nk'uko nazikugiriye?’ 
Matthew18:34 Shebuja ararakara amwegurira abo kumwica urubozo, kugeza igihe azaba amaze kwishyura umwenda arimo.”" 
Matthew18:35 Yezu yungamo ati: “Nguko uko Data uri mu ijuru azagirira buri wese muri mwe, natababarira mugenzi we abikuye ku mutima.”" 
Matthew19:1 Nuko Yezu amaze kuvuga ayo magambo ava muri Galileya, ajya mu gice cy'intara ya Yudeya iri iburasirazuba bw'uruzi rwa Yorodani." 
Matthew19:2 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu bamukurikirayo, maze abarwayi babo arabakiza." 
Matthew19:3 Abafarizayi baza aho ari kugira ngo bamutegere mu byo avuga, baramubaza bati: “Mbese biremewe ko umugabo yirukana umugore we ku mpamvu ibonetse yose?”" 
Matthew19:4 Arabasubiza ati: “Mbese ntimwasomye ko mbere na mbere igihe Imana yaremaga yaremye abantu, umugabo n'umugore?" 
Matthew19:5 Nyuma yaravuze iti: ‘Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina akabana n'umugore we akaramata, bombi bakaba umuntu umwe’," 
Matthew19:6 ku buryo baba batakiri babiri ahubwo baba babaye umuntu umwe. Nuko rero ntihakagire umuntu utandukanya abo Imana yafatanyije.” 
Matthew19:7 Abafarizayi baramubaza bati: “None se ni kuki Musa yategetse umugabo guha umugore we urwandiko rwemeza ko amusenze, akabona kumwirukana?”" 
Matthew19:8 Arabasubiza ati: “Igituma Musa yabemereye gukora ibyo ni ukubera imitima yanyu inangiye. Ariko mbere na mbere si uko byahoze. 
Matthew19:9 Naho jye mbabwiye ko umugabo wese wirukana umugore we bitavuye ku kubana kutemewe n'Amategeko maze akazana undi, aba asambanye.”" 
Matthew19:10 Abigishwa baramubwira bati: “Niba imibanire y'umugabo n'umugore ari iyo, icyarutaho ni ukudashaka!”" 
Matthew19:11 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Erega si bose bashobora kwakira iyo nyigisho, keretse abayigenewe!" 
Matthew19:12 Hariho bamwe batabasha kurongora kuko bavutse ari ibiremba. Hari abandi batabibasha kuko bagizwe batyo n'abantu. Hariho n'abandi babyigomwa ubwabo kubera ubwami bw'ijuru. Ubasha kumva iryo jambo naryumve.” 
Matthew19:13 Abantu bazanira Yezu abana bato kugira ngo abarambikeho ibiganza abasengere, maze abigishwa be barabacyaha." 
Matthew19:14 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nimureke abana bato bansange, mwibabuza kuko ubwami bw'ijuru ari ubw'abameze nka bo.”" 
Matthew19:15 Amaze kubarambikaho ibiganza ava aho hantu. 
Matthew19:16 Hari ubwo umuntu yasanze Yezu aramubaza ati: “Mwigisha, mbese ibyiza nakora ni ibihe kugira ngo mpabwe ubugingo buhoraho?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Kuki umbaza ibyiza ugomba gukora? Imana yonyine ni yo nziza, niba ushaka kubona ubugingo buhoraho ujye ukurikiza Amategeko yayo.”" 
Matthew19:18 Undi aramubaza ati: “Ayahe?” Yezu ati: “Ntukice, ntugasambane, ntukibe, ntukabeshyere abandi," 
Matthew19:19 wubahe so na nyoko kandi ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.” 
Matthew19:20 Uwo musore aramubwira ati: “Ayo yose narayakurikije. Ikindi nshigaje ni iki?” 
Matthew19:21 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Niba ushaka kuba indakemwa koko, genda ugurishe ibyo utunze ibivuyemo ubihe abakene, ni bwo uzaba ufite ubutunzi mu ijuru, maze uze unkurikire.”" 
Matthew19:22 Uwo musore yumvise iryo jambo agenda ashavuye, kuko yari afite ibintu byinshi." 
Matthew19:23 Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko biruhije ko umukungu yinjira mu bwami bw'ijuru. 
Matthew19:24 Nongere kandi mbabwire: icyoroshye ni uko ingamiya yanyura mu mwenge w'urushinge, kuruta ko umukungu yakwinjira mu bwami bw'Imana.”" 
Matthew19:25 Abigishwa babyumvise baratangara cyane bagira bati: “Mbese noneho ni nde ubasha kurokoka?” 
Matthew19:26 Yezu arabitegereza arababwira ati: “Koko ku bantu ntibishoboka, ariko ku Mana byose birashoboka.”" 
Matthew19:27 Nuko Petero aramubaza ati: “Mbese nkatwe ko twasize byose tukagukurikira, bizagenda bite?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko igihe ibintu byose bizaba bihinduwe bishya, Umwana w'umuntu azicara ku ntebe ya cyami ahabwe ikuzo. Icyo gihe mwebwe mwankurikiye namwe muzicara ku ntebe cumi n'ebyiri za cyami, mucire imanza imiryango cumi n'ibiri y'Abisiraheli." 
Matthew19:29 Umuntu wese wasize amazu cyangwa abavandimwe, cyangwa se cyangwa nyina, cyangwa abana cyangwa amasambu kubera jye, azahabwa ibiruta ibyo incuro ijana kandi ahabwe ubugingo buhoraho." 
Matthew19:30 Ikindi kandi benshi mu b'imbere bazaba ab'inyuma, na benshi mu b'inyuma babe ab'imbere." 
Matthew20:1 “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umukungu wazindutse kare, ararika abantu bo kumukorera mu biti bye by'imizabibu." 
Matthew20:2 Amaze gusezerana na bo igihembo gisanzwe cy'umubyizi, abohereza gukora mu mizabibu ye." 
Matthew20:3 Asohotse saa tatu abona abandi bantu bahagaze ku isoko nta cyo bakora," 
Matthew20:4 arababwira ati: ‘Namwe nimujye mu mizabibu yanjye mukore, ndabahemba uko bikwiye.’"
