Matthew20:5 Nuko baragenda. Yongeye gusohoka saa sita na saa cyenda, na bwo abigenza atyo." 
Matthew20:6 Na none nka saa kumi n'imwe yongera gusohoka, asanga abandi bahagaze aho arababaza ati: ‘Kuki mwahagaze aho umunsi wose nta cyo mukora?’" 
Matthew20:7 Baramusubiza bati: ‘Ni uko nta waduhaye akazi.’ Na we ati: ‘Namwe nimujye mu mizabibu yanjye.’ 
Matthew20:8 “Nimugoroba nyir'imizabibu abwira umukoresha we ati: ‘Hamagara abakozi baze ubahembe, uhereye ku baje nyuma kugeza ku ba mbere.’" 
Matthew20:9 Nuko abatangiye nka saa kumi n'imwe baraza, buri muntu ahabwa igihembo cy'umubyizi." 
Matthew20:10 Aba mbere na bo baraza batekereza ko ari bubarengerezeho, ariko na bo abahembera umubyizi." 
Matthew20:11 Bakira ibihembo bitotombera nyir'imizabibu bati: 
Matthew20:12 ‘Bariya baje nyuma bakora isaha imwe gusa, none tunganyije igihembo kandi twe twatangiye bugicya, izuba ry'umunsi wose rikaturengeraho!’" 
Matthew20:13 “Ni bwo asubije umwe muri bo ati: ‘Mugenzi wanjye, nta cyo nkurenganyijeho. Mbese si igihembo cy'umubyizi twasezeranye?" 
Matthew20:14 Fata ibyawe ugende. Koko nshatse guha uyu waje nyuma igihembo kingana n'icyawe. 
Matthew20:15 Mbese hari icyambuza gukora icyo nshatse mu byanjye? Cyangwa undebye nabi kuko ngize ubuntu?’ ” 
Matthew20:16 Nuko Yezu ati: “Uko ni ko aba nyuma bazaba aba mbere, n'aba mbere bakaba aba nyuma.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yezu azamutse ajya i Yeruzalemu, yihererana n'abigishwa be cumi na babiri. Bakigenda arababwira ati:" 
Matthew20:18 “Dore tugiye i Yeruzalemu, Umwana w'umuntu azashyikirizwa abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko, bamucire urubanza rwo gupfa." 
Matthew20:19 Bazamugabiza abanyamahanga bamushinyagurire, bamukubite ibiboko bamubambe ku musaraba, maze ku munsi wa gatatu azuke.”" 
Matthew20:20 Nuko nyina wa bene Zebedeyi ari kumwe n'abahungu be, asanga Yezu aramupfukamira agira ngo agire icyo amusaba." 
Matthew20:21 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Mbese urashaka iki?” Na we ati: “Tegeka ko aba bana banjye bombi bazicarana nawe, umwe iburyo undi ibumoso igihe uzaba wimye ingoma.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yezu arasubiza ati: “Ntimuzi icyo musaba. Mbese mwashobora kunywera ku gikombe cy'umubabaro ngomba kunywa?” Baramusubiza bati: “Twabishobora.” 
Matthew20:23 Arababwira ati: “Ni koko igikombe cyanjye muzakinyweraho, naho gutanga ibyicaro iburyo cyangwa ibumoso bwanjye si jye ubigaba, ahubwo Data afite abo yabigeneye.”" 
Matthew20:24 Bagenzi babo uko ari icumi babyumvise, barakarira abo bavandimwe bombi." 
Matthew20:25 Yezu arabarembuza arababwira ati: “Muzi ko abategeka amahanga bayatwaza igitugu, kandi n'abakomeye bo muri yo bakayabuza epfo na ruguru." 
Matthew20:26 Ariko muri mwe ntibikagende bityo. Ahubwo ushaka kuba mukuru muri mwe agomba kujya abakorera," 
Matthew20:27 kandi ushaka kuba uw'imbere muri mwe agomba kuba umugaragu wanyu. 
Matthew20:28 Ni na ko Umwana w'umuntu atazanywe no gukorerwa, ahubwo yazanywe no gukorera abandi no kubapfira, kugira ngo abe incungu ya benshi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Bavuye i Yeriko imbaga y'abantu benshi ikurikira Yezu. 
Matthew20:30 Nuko impumyi ebyiri zikaba zicaye iruhande rw'inzira. Zumvise ko Yezu aje zirangurura amajwi ziti: “Nyagasani Mwene Dawidi, tugirire impuhwe!”" 
Matthew20:31 Abantu barazicyaha ngo ziceceke, ariko zo zirushaho kurangurura ziti: “Nyagasani Mwene Dawidi, tugirire impuhwe!”" 
Matthew20:32 Yezu arahagarara ahamagara izo mpumyi, arazibaza ati: “Murashaka ko mbakorera iki?”" 
Matthew20:33 Ziramusubiza ziti: “Nyagasani, uduhumūre!”" 
Matthew20:34 Yezu azigirira impuhwe azikora ku maso, uwo mwanya zirahumuka ziherako ziramukurikira." 
Matthew21:1 Begereye i Betifage ku Musozi w'Iminzenze uteganye na Yeruzalemu, Yezu atuma babiri mu bigishwa be" 
Matthew21:2 ati: “Mujye muri ziriya ngo, nimuhagera murahita mubona indogobe iziritse hamwe n'iyayo, muziziture muzinzanire." 
Matthew21:3 Nihagira ubabaza impamvu mumubwire muti: ‘Ni Databuja uzikeneye kandi arazigarura vuba.’ ” 
Matthew21:4 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi ngo: 
Matthew21:5 “Nimubwire abaturage b'i Siyoni muti: ‘Dore umwami wanyu aje abasanga, yicishije bugufi ahetswe n'indogobe, ndetse ahetswe n'icyana cyayo.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Abigishwa baragenda bakora uko Yezu yabategetse," 
Matthew21:7 bazana indogobe n'icyana cyayo, bazisasaho imyitero yabo maze Yezu ayicaraho." 
Matthew21:8 Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu bari aho barambura imyitero yabo mu nzira, abandi baharambika amashami y'ibiti baciye." 
Matthew21:9 Nuko imbaga y'abantu bari kumwe na we, bamwe imbere abandi inyuma, barangurura amajwi bati: “Hozana! Harakabaho Mwene Dawidi! Hasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani! Mu ijuru nibasingize Imana bati: ‘Hozana!’ ”" 
Matthew21:10 Yezu yinjiye muri Yeruzalemu umujyi wose urakangarana, abantu bakabaza bati: “Mbese uyu ni nde?”" 
Matthew21:11 Rubanda bati: “Ni Yezu wa muhanuzi w'i Nazareti muri Galileya.” 
Matthew21:12 Nuko Yezu yinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana, amenesha abacuruzaga n'abaguraga ahasanze. Ahirika ameza y'abavunjaga amafaranga n'intebe z'abacuruzaga inuma." 
Matthew21:13 Nuko arababwira ati: “Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo ‘Inzu yanjye izitwa Inzu yo gusengeramo’, naho mwe mwayigize indiri y'abajura.”" 
Matthew21:14 Nuko impumyi n'abacumbagira bamusanga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana maze arabakiza. 
Matthew21:15 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abigishamategeko bararakara babonye ibitangaza akoze, babonye n'abana basakuriza mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana bavuga bati: “Hozana! Harakabaho Mwene Dawidi!”." 
Matthew21:16 Ni ko kubwira Yezu bati: “Aho ntiwiyumvira ibyo bavuga?” Arabasubiza ati: “Yee, ndabyumva. Ariko se ntimwasomye Ibyanditswe ngo ‘Wateganyije ko ibitambambuga n'abana bonka bagusingiza’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Nuko abasiga aho ava mu mujyi, yerekeza i Betaniya ararayo." 
Matthew21:18 Kare mu gitondo Yezu ari mu nzira asubira mu mujyi arasonza. 
Matthew21:19 Arabukwa igiti cy'umutini kiri ku nzira. Akigeze iruhande asanga ari amababi masa maze arakibwira ati: “Ntukere imbuto ukundi!” Ako kanya icyo giti kiruma. 
Matthew21:20 Abigishwa be babibonye baratangara baramubaza bati: “Kiriya giti cyumye gite aka kanya?” 
Matthew21:21 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje. Mwizeye Imana mudashidikanya ntimwakora ibyo nkoreye uyu mutini gusa ahubwo mwashobora no kubwira uriya musozi muti: ‘Shyiguka aho wirohe mu nyanja’, maze bikaba bityo." 
Matthew21:22 Rwose nimusenga mwizeye Imana, icyo muzasaba cyose muzagihabwa.”" 
Matthew21:23 Nuko Yezu yinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana. Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango y'Abayahudi bajya aho yari ari yigisha, baramubaza bati: “Uvana he ubushobozi bwo gukora ibyo ukora? Ni nde wabuguhaye?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Nanjye reka ngire icyo mbibariza kimwe gusa, nimunsubiza ndabona kubabwira aho nkura ubushobozi bwo kubikora." 
Matthew21:25 Mbese Yohani yatumwe na nde kubatiza? Ni Imana cyangwa se ni abantu?” Bajya inama bati: “Nituvuga ko yatumwe n'Imana, aratubaza ati: ‘Kuki mutamwemeye?’" 
Matthew21:26 Na none kandi nituvuga ko yatumwe n'abantu, ntidukira rubanda kuko bose bemera ko Yohani yari umuhanuzi.”" 
Matthew21:27 Nuko basubiza Yezu bati: “Ntitubizi.” Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Nanjye rero simbabwiye aho nkura ubushobozi bwo gukora ibyo nkora.” 
Matthew21:28 “Mbese iby'uyu mugani mubivugaho iki? Habayeho umugabo akagira abahungu babiri. Asanga uwa mbere aramubwira ati: ‘Mwana wanjye, uyu munsi ujye gukorera ibiti by'imizabibu.’" 
Matthew21:29 Nuko aramusubiza ati: ‘Ndanze’, nyuma yisubiraho ajyayo." 
Matthew21:30 Wa mubyeyi asanga n'uwa kabiri na we amubwira atyo. Uwo we ahita amusubiza ati: ‘Ndajyayo mubyeyi’, nyamara ntiyagenda." 
Matthew21:31 Mbese muri abo bombi ni nde wakoze ibyo se ashaka?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni uwa mbere.” Yezu arababwira ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko abasoresha n'indaya bazabatanga kwinjira mu bwami bw'Imana. 
Matthew21:32 Yohani yazanywe no kubayobora inzira y'ubutungane ntimwamwemera. Abasoresha n'indaya bo baramwemera naho mwe murabireba, ariko ntimwihana ngo mumwemere." 
Matthew21:33 “Nimwumve n'undi mugani. Habayeho umugabo wari afite umurima, awuteramo ibiti by'imizabibu awuzengurutsa uruzitiro, acukuramo urwengero yubakamo n'umunara w'abarinzi, maze uwo murima awātira abahinzi. Birangiye ajya mu rugendo." 
Matthew21:34 Igihe cy'isarura kigeze atuma abagaragu kuri ba bahinzi, kugira ngo bamuhe icyatamurima ku mbuto basaruye." 
Matthew21:35 Nuko abahinzi basumira abo bagaragu, umwe baramukubita undi baramwica, undi bamutera amabuye." 
Matthew21:36 Arongera yohereza abandi bagaragu baruta aba mbere ubwinshi, na bo babagenza batyo." 
Matthew21:37 Ubwa nyuma abatumaho umuhungu we yibwira ati: ‘Umwana wanjye ntibazamwubahuka.’ 
Matthew21:38 Abahinzi babonye uwo mwana baravugana bati: ‘Dore uwarazwe ibintu araje! Nimuze tumwice maze ibye byose bibe ibyacu.’ 
Matthew21:39 Baramusumira, bamukurubana inyuma y'uruzitiro baramwica." 
Matthew21:40 “Mbese nk'ubwo igihe nyir'imizabibu azagarukira, mubona azagenza ate abo bahinzi?”" 
Matthew21:41 Baramubwira bati: “Abo bagome azabatsemba, maze imizabibu ayishyiremo abandi bazajya bamuha ibye uko isarura rigeze.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimwasomye Ibyanditswe? Biravuga ngo ‘Ibuye abubatsi banze, ni ryo ryabaye insanganyarukuta. Ibyo ni Nyagasani wabikoze, none bitubereye igitangaza!’" 
Matthew21:43 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira ko muzanyagwa ubwami bw'Imana, bugahabwa abandi bakora imirimo ikwiranye n'ubwo bwami. [" 
Matthew21:44 Umuntu wese uzagwa kuri iryo buye azavunagurika, ariko uwo rizagwira rizamujanjagura.”]" 
Matthew21:45 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi bumvise imigani ye, bamenya ko ari bo avuga." 
Matthew21:46 Nuko bashaka uburyo bamufata ariko batinya rubanda, kuko bo bemezaga ko ari umuhanuzi." 
Matthew22:1 Yezu yongera kuvugana n'abantu akoresheje imigani agira ati: 
Matthew22:2 “Iby'ubwami bw'ijuru wabigereranya n'umwami wacyuje ubukwe bw'umuhungu we. 
Matthew22:3 Nuko atuma abagaragu be guhamagara abatumiwe mu bukwe, maze banga kuza." 
Matthew22:4 Arongera atuma abandi bagaragu kubwira abatumiwe ngo: ‘Dore nateguye amazimano, nabagishije ibimasa byanjye n'andi matungo y'imishishe. Byose byateguwe nimuze mu bukwe.’" 
Matthew22:5 Ariko bo ntibabyitaho barigendera, umwe ajya mu murima we undi mu bucuruzi bwe." 
Matthew22:6 Abasigaye basumira abagaragu b'umwami, babagirira nabi barabica." 
Matthew22:7 Noneho umwami ararakara atuma ingabo ze zitsemba abo bicanyi, zitwika ibigo byabo." 
Matthew22:8 “Nyuma abwira abagaragu be ati: ‘Iby'ubukwe byateguwe, ariko abatumiwe ntibari babikwiye." 
Matthew22:9 Nuko rero nimujye amayira ahurira, mutumire mu bukwe abantu bose muri bubone.’" 
Matthew22:10 Abagaragu bahita bagenda bakwira amayira, bakoranya abo babonye bose ari abeza ari ababi. Nuko inzu y'ubukwe yuzura abatumirwa." 
Matthew22:11 “Umwami aherako arinjira agira ngo arebe abatumirwa be, maze ahabona umuntu utambaye umwambaro w'ubukwe." 
Matthew22:12 Aramubaza ati: ‘Mugenzi wanjye, waje hano ute udafite umwambaro w'ubukwe?’ Undi araceceka." 
Matthew22:13 Nuko umwami abwira abahereza ati: ‘Nimumubohe amaboko n'amaguru mumujugunye hanze mu mwijima, ni ho bazaririra bagahekenya amenyo.’ ”" 
Matthew22:14 Yezu yungamo ati: “Erega hahamagarwa benshi hagatoranywa bake!” 
Matthew22:15 Nuko Abafarizayi baragenda, bajya inama y'uburyo bari bufatire Yezu mu byo avuga." 
Matthew22:16 Bamutumaho abigishwa babo hamwe n'abo mu ishyaka rya Herodi bati: “Mwigisha, tuzi ko uri umunyakuri kandi ko wigisha abantu inzira y'Imana mu kuri nta cyo utinya, kuko ufata abantu bose kimwe." 
Matthew22:17 Ngaho rero tubwire rero: mbese ibi ubyumva ute? Ese ni ngombwa ko dutanga umusoro w'umwami w'i Roma, cyangwa si ngombwa?”" 
Matthew22:18 Nuko Yezu wari uzi ubugome bwabo arababaza ati: “Mwa ndyarya mwe, kuki muntega iyo mitego?" 
Matthew22:19 Nimunyereke igiceri mutanga ho umusoro.” Bakimuzaniye," 
Matthew22:20 arababaza ati: “Iyi shusho n'iri zina biriho ni ibya nde?” 
Matthew22:21 Baramusubiza bati: “Ni iby'umwami w'i Roma.” Yezu arababwira ati: “Nuko rero iby'umwami w'i Roma mubihe umwami w'i Roma, n'iby'Imana mubihe Imana.”" 
Matthew22:22 Babyumvise batyo baratangara, bamusiga aho barigendera." 
Matthew22:23 Uwo munsi Abasaduseyi (abo ni bo bavuga ko kuzuka bitabaho) basanga Yezu baramubwira bati: 
Matthew22:24 “Mwigisha, Musa yaravuze ngo niba umuntu apfuye agasiga umugore batarabyarana, umugabo wabo ajye amucyura acikure nyakwigendera." 
Matthew22:25 Iwacu rero habayeho abavandimwe barindwi. Uwa mbere ashaka umugore apfa nta mwana babyaranye, maze murumuna we acyura uwo mugore." 
Matthew22:26 Uwa kabiri na we biba bityo, n'uwa gatatu kugeza ku wa karindwi, bose bapfa ntawe umubyayeho umwana." 
Matthew22:27 Amaherezo umugore na we arapfa. 
Matthew22:28 Mbese igihe abantu bazazuka uwo mugore azaba muka nde, ko bose uko ari barindwi bazaba baramutunze?”" 
Matthew22:29 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mwarayobye, kuko mutamenye Ibyanditswe ntimumenye n'ububasha bw'Imana." 
Matthew22:30 Erega mu gihe cy'izuka ntawe uzagira umugore, nta n'uzagira umugabo. Ahubwo bazamera nk'abamarayika bo mu ijuru." 
Matthew22:31 Ku byerekeye izuka ry'abapfuye, mbese ntimwasomye ijambo Imana yababwiye iti:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Ndi Imana ya Aburahamu n'Imana ya Izaki n'Imana ya Yakobo?’ Erega Imana si iy'abapfuye, ahubwo ni iy'abazima!”" 
Matthew22:33 Nuko rubanda babyumvise batangarira izo nyigisho ze. 
Matthew22:34 Abafarizayi bumvise ko Abasaduseyi babuze icyo basubiza Yezu, bahita bakoranira aho ari." 
Matthew22:35 Umwe muri bo wari umuhanga mu by'Amategeko ashatse kumutegera mu byo avuga, aramubaza ati:" 
Matthew22:36 “Mwigisha, mu Mategeko yose iry'ingenzi ni irihe?”" 
Matthew22:37 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “ ‘Ukunde Nyagasani Imana yawe n'umutima wawe wose n'ubuzima bwawe bwose, n'ubwenge bwawe bwose.’" 
Matthew22:38 Iryo ni ryo tegeko ry'ingenzi riruta ayandi yose. 
Matthew22:39 Irya kabiri rimeze nka ryo ni iri: ‘Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.’ 
Matthew22:40 Ayo mategeko yombi ni yo shingiro ry'Amategeko yose n'ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi.” 
Matthew22:41 Abafarizayi bamaze gukorana, Yezu arababaza ati:" 
Matthew22:42 “Ibya Kristo mubyumva mute? Ni mwene nde?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni mwene Dawidi.” 
Matthew22:43 Yezu ati: “Bishoboka bite, kandi Dawidi ubwe abihishuriwe na Mwuka w'Imana, yaravuze ko Kristo ari umwami we igihe yagiraga ati:" 
Matthew22:44 ‘Nyagasani yabwiye Umwami wanjye ati: “Icara ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bwanjye, nanjye nzashyira abanzi bawe munsi y'ibirenge byawe.” ’" 
Matthew22:45 None se ubwo Dawidi yita Kristo umwami we, Kristo yaba ate kandi umwana we?”" 
Matthew22:46 Nuko ntihagira ubasha kugira icyo amusubiza, ndetse kuva uwo munsi nta wongeye kumuhangara agira icyo amubaza." 
Matthew23:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Yezu abwira imbaga y'abantu hamwe n'abigishwa be ati: 
Matthew23:2 “Abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi ni bo basimbuye Musa mu gusobanura Amategeko. 
Matthew23:3 Nuko rero ntimukabure gukora ibyo bababwira byose, nyamara muzirinde gukora ibyo bakora, kuko ibyo bavuga atari byo bakora." 
Matthew23:4 Bahambirira abantu imitwaro iremereye bakayibashyira ku ntugu, nyamara bo bakaba batakwemera kuyikozaho n'urutoki." 
Matthew23:5 Byose babikorera kwibonekeza, ni cyo gituma bakunda kongēra udufuka batwaramo udupapuro tw'Ibyanditswe, kandi bagahinura incunda z'amakanzu yabo bakazigira ndende." 
Matthew23:6 Bakunda ibyicaro by'imbere aho batumiwe, n'intebe z'icyubahiro mu nsengero." 
Matthew23:7 Bakunda kuramukirizwa aho abantu bateraniye no kumva abantu babita ‘Mwigisha’. 
Matthew23:8 Mwe ntimugakunde ko babita ‘Mwigisha’, kuko Umwigisha wanyu ari umwe gusa naho mwebwe mwese mukaba muri abavandimwe." 
Matthew23:9 Ntimukagire uwo mwita ngo ‘data’ kuri iyi si, kuko So ari umwe kandi akaba mu ijuru." 
Matthew23:10 Ntimukemere kandi ko babita abatware, kuko umutware wanyu ari umwe gusa, ni Kristo." 
Matthew23:11 Umukuru muri mwe nabe umugaragu wa bagenzi be. 
Matthew23:12 Uwishyira hejuru wese azacishwa bugufi, naho uwicisha bugufi azashyirwa hejuru." 
Matthew23:13 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, kuko mukingirana abantu mukababuza kwinjira mu bwami bw'ijuru, ubwanyu ntimwinjire kandi abashaka kwinjira mukabakumira. [" 
Matthew23:14 Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, kuko murya ingo z'abapfakazi nyamara mukiha kuvuga amasengesho y'urudaca. Ni cyo gituma muzacirwa urubanza rukaze kurusha abandi.]" 
Matthew23:15 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, kuko mucuragana mu nyanja no mu bihugu muhirimbanira kugira uwo mwemeza idini, mwamara kumushyikira mukamuhindura uwo kurohwa mu nyenga y'umuriro, ndetse biruse ibyanyu incuro ebyiri." 
Matthew23:16 “Muzabona ishyano bayobozi muhumye muvuga ngo, niba umuntu arahiye ashingiye ku Ngoro y'Imana nta cyo bivuze, ariko yaba arahiye ashingiye ku izahabu yo mu Ngoro ngo ni bwo aba akomeje." 
Matthew23:17 Mwa bapfu mwe b'impumyi, mbese ikiruta ikindi ni ikihe, ni iyo zahabu, cyangwa ni Ingoro yubahiriza iyo zahabu?" 
Matthew23:18 Ubundi kandi muravuga ngo, niba umuntu arahiye ashingiye ku rutambiro nta cyo bivuze, ariko yaba arahiye ashingiye ku ituro riri ku rutambiro ngo ni bwo aba akomeje." 
Matthew23:19 Ni ko mwa mpumyi mwe, ikiruta ikindi ni ikihe, ni ituro, cyangwa ni urutambiro rwubahiriza iryo turo?" 
Matthew23:20 Urahiye ashingiye ku rutambiro, aba arahiye arushingiyeho hamwe n'ibiruteretsweho byose." 
Matthew23:21 Urahiye ashingiye ku Ngoro y'Imana, aba arahiye ayishingiyeho hamwe n'Uyituyemo." 
Matthew23:22 Urahiye ashingiye ku ijuru, na we aba arahiye ashingiye ku ntebe ya cyami y'Imana no ku Mana iyicayeho." 
Matthew23:23 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, mutanga na kimwe cya cumi cy'isogi n'icy'imbwija n'icy'inyabutongo, ariko mukirengagiza ingingo z'ingenzi z'Amategeko, ari zo ubutabera n'impuhwe n'umurava. Ibyo ni byo mwagombaga gukora mutaretse n'ibyo bindi." 
Matthew23:24 Mwa bayobozi muhumye mwe, muminina umubu mu byo munywa, nyamara ingamiya mukayimira bunguri!" 
Matthew23:25 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, mumeze nk'ibikombe n'amasahane boza inyuma gusa, kuko imbere mwuzuye ubwambuzi no kutifata." 
Matthew23:26 Mufarizayi uhumye, banza woze igikombe imbere, ni bwo n'inyuma hazaba hasukuye." 
Matthew23:27 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, mumeze nk'imva zisīze ingwa, ugasanga inyuma ari nziza nyamara imbere huzuye amagufwa y'abapfuye, n'ibihumanya by'ubwoko bwose." 
Matthew23:28 Namwe ni nk'uko mugaragariza abantu ko muri intungane, nyamara imbere mwuzuye uburyarya n'ubugome." 
Matthew23:29 “Muzabona ishyano mwa ndyarya mwe z'abigishamategeko n'Abafarizayi, kuko mwubakira imva z'abahanuzi kandi mugashyira imitāko ku bituro mwubakiye intungane z'Imana zapfuye." 
Matthew23:30 Mukavuga ngo: ‘Iyo tuba twarabayeho mu gihe cya ba sogokuruza, ntituba twarafatanyije na bo kwica abahanuzi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Bityo mukaba muhamya ubwanyu ko mukomoka ku babishe. 
Matthew23:32 Ngaho namwe nimurangize ibyo ba sokuruza batangiye! 
Matthew23:33 Yemwe mwa nzoka mwe, mwa rubyaro rw'impiri mwe, muzarokoka mute igihano cyo kujugunywa mu nyenga y'umuriro?" 
Matthew23:34 Dore nzaboherereza abahanuzi n'abanyabwenge n'abigisha, bamwe muzabica mubabambe ku musaraba, abandi muzabakubitira mu nsengero zanyu, kandi muzabatoteza mubirukane no mu mijyi bahungiyemo." 
Matthew23:35 Bityo muzaryozwa amaraso y'intungane zose yamenetse ku isi, uhereye ku maraso ya Abeli w'intungane, kugeza ku ya Zakariya mwene Barakiya mwatsinze hagati y'Ingoro y'Imana n'urutambiro rwayo." 
Matthew23:36 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyo byose ab'iki gihe bazabiryozwa. 
Matthew23:37 “Yeruzalemu! Yeruzalemu! Wica abahanuzi kandi ukicisha amabuye abagutumweho! Ni kangahe nashatse gukorakoranya abana bawe nk'uko inkoko ibundikira imishwi yayo mu mababa, ariko ntimunkundire!" 
Matthew23:38 Dore iwanyu hagiye gusigara ari itongo. 
Matthew23:39 Reka mbabwire: ntimuzongera kumbona kugeza igihe muzavuga muti: ‘Hasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani!’ ” 
Matthew24:1 Yezu ava mu Ngoro y'Imana aragenda, abigishwa be baramwegera kugira ngo bamuratire imyubakire myiza y'iyo Ngoro." 
Matthew24:2 Nuko arababwira ati: “Aho ntimureba biriya byose? Ndababwira nkomeje ko aha nta buye rizasigara rigeretse ku rindi, byose bizasenywa!”" 
Matthew24:3 Nyuma yicaye ku Musozi w'Iminzenze, abigishwa bamusanga ahiherereye baramubaza bati: “Tubwire igihe ibyo bizabera, n'ikimenyetso kizaranga ukuza kwawe n'icy'iherezo ry'isi.”" 
Matthew24:4 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Muramenye ntihazagire ubayobya," 
Matthew24:5 kuko hazaduka benshi biyita izina ryanjye bavuga bati: ‘Ni jye Kristo’, kandi bazayobya benshi." 
Matthew24:6 Mugiye kuzumva urusaku rw'intambara ziri hafi n'amakuru y'intambara za kure. Muramenye ntibizabakure umutima. Ibyo bizagomba kuba ariko si byo herezo. 
Matthew24:7 Igihugu kizarwana n'ikindi, kandi umwami atere undi mwami. Hirya no hino hazaba inzara n'imitingito y'isi." 
Matthew24:8 Ibyo byose bizaba bimeze nk'imigendo ibanziriza ibise by'umugore. 
Matthew24:9 “Ubwo ni bwo bazabagabiza ababababaza kandi bakabica. Muzangwa n'amahanga yose babampōra. 
Matthew24:10 Ibyo bizaca benshi intege, bitume bagambanirana bangane." 
Matthew24:11 Hazaduka n'abahanurabinyoma batari bake, bayobye abantu benshi." 
Matthew24:12 Kuko ubugome buzaba bwiyongereye, urukundo rwa benshi ruzayoyoka," 
Matthew24:13 ariko uzihangana akageza ku munsi w'imperuka azarokoka. 
Matthew24:14 Ubu Butumwa bwiza bw'ubwami bw'ijuru buzamamazwa ku isi yose bubere amahanga yose ubuhamya, noneho rero imperuka igere." 
Matthew24:15 “Nimubona cya ‘Giterashozi kirimbuzi’ cyavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Daniyeli gihagaze mu Ngoro y'Imana – usoma ibi abyumve neza - 
Matthew24:16 icyo gihe abazaba bari muri Yudeya bazahungire mu misozi. 
Matthew24:17 Uzaba ari hejuru y'inzu aramenye ntazamanuke ngo yinjire mu nzu agire icyo avanamo. 
Matthew24:18 N'uzaba ari mu murima ntazasubire imuhira gushaka umwitero we. 
Matthew24:19 Hagowe abazaba batwite cyangwa bonsa muri iyo minsi. 
Matthew24:20 Musabe Imana kugira ngo uko guhunga kwanyu kutazaba mu mezi y'imbeho cyangwa ku isabato," 
Matthew24:21 kuko icyo gihe hazaba amakuba akabije atigeze abaho kuva isi yaremwa kugeza ubu, kandi atazongera kubaho ukundi." 
Matthew24:22 Iyo Imana itagabanya iyo minsi nta wari kuzarokoka. Ariko kubera abo yitoranyirije iyo minsi izagabanywa. 
Matthew24:23 “Icyo gihe nihagira ubabwira ati: ‘Dore nguyu Kristo’, cyangwa ati: ‘Nguriya’ ntimuzabyemere." 
Matthew24:24 Hazaduka abiyita Kristo n'abiyita abahanuzi. Bazerekana ibimenyetso bikomeye bakore n'ibitangaza, ku buryo byayobya n'abo Imana yitoranyirije bibaye ibishoboka." 
Matthew24:25 Dore mbibamenyesheje bitaraba. 
Matthew24:26 “Nuko rero nibababwira bati: ‘Dore ageze mu butayu’ ntimuzajyeyo, cyangwa bati: ‘Dore ari mu mbere ariherereye’ ntimuzabyemere." 
Matthew24:27 Uko umurabyo urabiriza iburasirazuba ako kanya ukabonekera n'iburengerazuba, ni ko no kuza k'Umwana w'umuntu kuzaba." 
Matthew24:28 “Aho intumbi izaba hose ni ho inkongoro zizakoranira. 
Matthew24:29 “Bidatinze, nyuma y'imibabaro yo muri iyo minsi, izuba rizijima n'ukwezi kwe kumurika, inyenyeri zihanantuke ku ijuru, n'ibinyabubasha byo mu ijuru bihungabane." 
Matthew24:30 Ubwo ni bwo mu ijuru hazagaragara ikimenyetso kiranga ukuza k'Umwana w'umuntu. Amoko yose yo ku isi azacura imiborogo, maze abone Umwana w'umuntu aje ku bicu byo ku ijuru, afite ububasha n'ikuzo byinshi." 
Matthew24:31 Azatuma abamarayika be bavuza impanda nyamunini, bakoranye abo yitoranyirije babavane iburasirazuba n'iburengerazuba, mu majyaruguru no mu majyepfo, kuva aho ijuru ritangirira kugera mu mpera zaryo." 
Matthew24:32 “Murebere ku giti cy'umutini kibabere urugero: iyo mubonye amashami yacyo atoshye akameraho ibibabi, mumenya ko impeshyi yegereje." 
Matthew24:33 Ni na ko rero igihe muzabona ibyo byose muzamenya ko Umwana w'umuntu ari hafi, ndetse ko ageze ku irembo." 
Matthew24:34 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ab'iki gihe batazashira ibyo byose bitabaye. 
Matthew24:35 Ijuru n'isi bizashira, ariko amagambo yanjye azahoraho." 
Matthew24:36 “Icyakora umunsi n'isaha bizabera ntawe ubizi, habe n'abamarayika bo mu ijuru cyangwa Umwana w'Imana, bizwi na Data wenyine." 
Matthew24:37 Nk'uko byagenze mu gihe cya Nowa, ni ko bizaba no mu gihe cyo kuza k'Umwana w'umuntu." 
Matthew24:38 Muri iyo minsi yabanjirije umwuzure, bararyaga bakanywa bagashyingirwa, kugeza umunsi Nowa yinjiriye muri bwa bwato bunini." 
Matthew24:39 Abantu b'icyo gihe ntibagira icyo bikanga kugeza igihe umwuzure uziye, urabahitana bose. Ni na ko bizamera mu kuza k'Umwana w'umuntu." 
Matthew24:40 Icyo gihe, abagabo babiri bazaba bari mu murima, umwe azajyanwa undi asigare." 
Matthew24:41 Abagore babiri bazaba bari hamwe basya, umwe azajyanwa undi asigare." 
Matthew24:42 “Murabe maso rero, kuko mutazi umunsi Umwami wanyu azazira." 
Matthew24:43 Murabizi. Iyaba nyir'urugo yamenyaga igihe umujura azira, yabaye maso ntatume acukura inzu ye!" 
Matthew24:44 Namwe rero muhore mwiteguye, kuko Umwana w'umuntu azaza igihe mudakeka." 
Matthew24:45 “Mubirebye ni nde mugaragu w'indahemuka kandi uzi ubwenge, shebuja yashinze abo mu rugo rwe ngo abahe ifunguro mu gihe gikwiye?" 
Matthew24:46 Ni uwo shebuja azasanga akora ibyo yamushinze, uwo mugaragu azaba ahiriwe." 
Matthew24:47 Ndababwira nkomeje ko azamwegurira ibyo afite byose. 
Matthew24:48 Nyamara niba ari umugaragu mubi azibwira ati: ‘Databuja aratinze’," 
Matthew24:49 maze atangire gukubita abagaragu bagenzi be, yirire yinywere, asangira n'abasinzi." 
Matthew24:50 Shebuja azaza ku munsi atamwiteze no mu gihe atari azi," 
Matthew24:51 amucemo kabiri abarirwe hamwe n'indyarya, ni ho bazarira kandi bagahekenya amenyo." 
Matthew25:1 “Icyo gihe iby'ubwami bw'ijuru bizaba nk'iby'uyu mugani. Habayeho abakobwa icumi bafashe amatara yabo bajya gusanganira umukwe. 
Matthew25:2 Batanu muri bo bari abapfu, abandi batanu ari abanyamutima." 
Matthew25:3 Abakobwa b'abapfu bajyana amatara yabo ariko ntibitwaza amavuta yo kongeramo. 
Matthew25:4 Abanyamutima bo bajyana amatara yabo hamwe n'amacupa y'amavuta ku ruhande. 
Matthew25:5 Umukwe atinze bose barahunyiza, barasinzira." 
Matthew25:6 “Igicuku kinishye bumva urusaku ngo ‘Dore umukwe araje nimujye kumusanganira!’ 
Matthew25:7 Ubwo abakobwa bose barabaduka baboneza amatara yabo. 
Matthew25:8 Abakobwa b'abapfu ni ko kubwira abanyamutima bati: ‘Nimuduhe ku mavuta yanyu kuko amatara yacu agiye kuzima!’ 
Matthew25:9 Abanyamutima bati: ‘Oya, ntabwo yadukwira twese, ahubwo nimujye mu bacuruzi mwigurire ayanyu.’" 
Matthew25:10 “Igihe bagiye kuyagura, umukwe araza. Abakobwa biteguye binjirana na we mu bukwe, maze urugi ruhita rukingwa." 
Matthew25:11 “Hanyuma ba bakobwa bandi baza kuza, barahamagara bati: ‘Mutware mutware, nimudukingurire!’" 
Matthew25:12 Arabasubiza ati: ‘Ni ukuri simbazi!’ ” 
Matthew25:13 Yezu yungamo ati: “Nuko rero murabe maso, kuko mutazi umunsi cyangwa igihe." 
Matthew25:14 “Iby'icyo gihe wabigereranya n'umuntu witeguraga urugendo, maze ahamagara abagaragu be ababitsa imari ye." 
Matthew25:15 Umwe amuha ibiro na mirongo itanu by'izahabu, undi ibiro mirongo itandatu, naho uwa gatatu amuha ibiro mirongo itatu akurikije ubushobozi bwa buri wese, maze arigendera." 
Matthew25:16 Nuko uwahawe ibiro ijana na mirongo itanu ahita ajya gucuruza iyo zahabu, yunguka ibindi biro ijana na mirongo itanu." 
Matthew25:17 N'uwahawe ibiro mirongo itandatu na we abigenza atyo, yungukamo ibindi biro mirongo itandatu." 
Matthew25:18 Naho uwahawe ibiro mirongo itatu aragenda acukura umwobo, awuhishamo iyo mari ya shebuja." 
Matthew25:19 “Hahise igihe kirekire shebuja w'abo bagaragu aragaruka, maze bamumurikira ibyo yababikije." 
Matthew25:20 Nuko uwahawe ibiro ijana na mirongo itanu by'izahabu asanga shebuja, amumurikira ibindi biro ijana na mirongo itanu maze aramubwira ati: ‘Mwambikije ibiro ijana na mirongo itanu, none ngibi hamwe n'ibindi biro ijana na mirongo itanu nungutsemo.’" 
Matthew25:21 Shebuja ni ko kumubwira ati: ‘Nuko nuko mugaragu mwiza w'indahemuka, ubwo wabaye indahemuka muri bike nzakwegurira byinshi, ngwino twishimane.’" 
Matthew25:22 “Uwahawe ibiro mirongo itandatu na we asanga shebuja aramubwira ati: ‘Mwambikije ibiro mirongo itandatu, none ngibi hamwe n'ibindi biro mirongo itandatu nungutsemo.’" 
Matthew25:23 Na we shebuja aramubwira ati: ‘Nuko nuko mugaragu mwiza w'indahemuka, ubwo wabaye indahemuka muri bike nzakwegurira byinshi, ngwino twishimane.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Hanyuma haza uwahawe ibiro mirongo itatu abwira shebuja ati: ‘Nari nzi ko uri umuntu utoroshye, usarura aho utabibye ukanura ibyo utanitse," 
Matthew25:25 nuko ngira ubwoba maze imari yawe nyicukurira umwobo ndayihisha, none dore ibyawe!’" 
Matthew25:26 “Shebuja aramusubiza ati: ‘Wa mugaragu mubi we! Wa munebwe we! Harya ngo wari uzi ko nsarura aho ntabibye, nkanura ibyo ntanitse!" 
Matthew25:27 Kuki utabikije imari yanjye mu isanduku yo kuzigama? Aho ngarukiye mba nyibikuje hamwe n'inyungu zayo. 
Matthew25:28 Nimumwake izo zahabu muzihe uwahawe ibiro ijana na mirongo itanu," 
Matthew25:29 kuko ufite wese azongererwa, naho udafite na busa azakwa n'utwo yaririragaho." 
Matthew25:30 Uwo mugaragu mubi nimumujugunye hanze mu mwijima, ni ho bazarira kandi bagahekenya amenyo.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Igihe Umwana w'umuntu azaza afite ikuzo ashagawe n'abamarayika bose, azicara ku ntebe ya cyami afite ikuzo rimukwiriye." 
Matthew25:32 Abatuye amahanga yose yo ku isi bazakoranyirizwa imbere ye, maze abavangure nk'uko umushumba avangura intama akazitandukanya n'ihene." 
Matthew25:33 Azashyira intama iburyo bwe, naho ihene zijye ibumoso." 
Matthew25:34 Noneho Umwami azabwira abari iburyo bwe ati: ‘Nimuze abo Data yahaye umugisha, mugabirwe ubwami yabateguriye kuva isi ikiremwa." 
Matthew25:35 Igihe nari nshonje mwaramfunguriye, ngize inyota mumpa icyo kunywa, nje ndi umushyitsi murancumbikira" 
Matthew25:36 igihe nari mbuze icyo nambara muranyambika, ndwaye murandwaza, ndi imfungwa muza kunsura.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Nuko izo ntungane zizamusubiza ziti: ‘Nyagasani, ni ryari twakubonye ushonje tukagufungurira, cyangwa ufite inyota tukaguha icyo kunywa?" 
Matthew25:38 Ni ryari twakubonye uri umushyitsi tukagucumbikira, cyangwa ubuze icyo wambara tukakwambika?" 
Matthew25:39 Ni ryari twakubonye urwaye cyangwa uri imfungwa maze tukaza kugusura?’ 
Matthew25:40 Nuko Umwami azabasubiza ati: ‘Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyo mwakoreye umwe muri aba bavandimwe banjye boroheje, burya ari jye mwabikoreye.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Hanyuma Umwami azabwira ab'ibumoso bwe ati: ‘Nimumve iruhande mwa bivume mwe, mujye mu muriro w'iteka wateguriwe Satani n'abamarayika be!" 
Matthew25:42 Igihe nari nshonje ntimwamfunguriye, ngize inyota ntimwampa icyo kunywa," 
Matthew25:43 nje ndi umushyitsi ntimwancumbikira igihe nari mbuze icyo nambara ntimwanyambika, ndwaye ndi n'imfungwa ntimwansura.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Icyo gihe na bo bazamusubiza bati: ‘Nyagasani, ni ryari twakubonye ushonje, ufite inyota, uri umushyitsi, ubuze icyo wambara, urwaye cyangwa uri imfungwa maze ntitugufashe?’" 
Matthew25:45 “Umwami azabasubiza ati: ‘Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyo mutakoreye umwe muri aba boroheje, burya nanjye mutabinkoreye.’" 
Matthew25:46 Ubwo rero bazahita bajya mu gihano cy'iteka, naho za ntungane zijye mu bugingo buhoraho.”" 
Matthew26:1 Nuko Yezu arangije kuvuga ibyo byose abwira abigishwa be ati: 
Matthew26:2 “Nk'uko mubizi, hasigaye iminsi ibiri ngo habe umunsi mukuru wa Pasika, ni bwo Umwana w'umuntu azatangwa abambwe ku musaraba.”" 
Matthew26:3 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango y'Abayahudi bakoranira mu ngoro y'Umutambyi mukuru witwaga Kayifa," 
Matthew26:4 bajya inama yo gufata Yezu ku mayeri kugira ngo bamwicishe. 
Matthew26:5 Baravuga bati: “Ntituzamufate mu minsi mikuru kugira ngo rubanda badatera imidugararo.” 
Matthew26:6 Igihe Yezu yari i Betaniya kwa Simoni umubembe," 
Matthew26:7 haje umugore azanye icupa ryuzuye amarashi ahenda cyane, ayasuka ku mutwe wa Yezu ari ku meza." 
Matthew26:8 Abigishwa be babibonye bararakara, baravuga bati: “Ariya marashi ayapfushirije iki ubusa?" 
Matthew26:9 Mbese ntiyari kugurishwa amafaranga menshi agahabwa abakene?” 
Matthew26:10 Yezu abimenye arababwira ati: “Uyu mugore muramuhora iki kandi icyo ankoreye ari cyiza? 
Matthew26:11 Abakene muhorana na bo, naho jye ntituzahorana." 
Matthew26:12 Ansīze aya marashi ku mubiri, antegurira guhambwa." 
Matthew26:13 Ndababwira nkomeje ko ku isi yose aho ubu Butumwa bwiza buzamamazwa, ibyo uyu mugore angiriye bizavugwa, abantu babimwibukireho.”" 
Matthew26:14 Maze umwe mu bigishwa cumi na babiri witwa Yuda Isikariyoti, asanga abakuru bo mu batambyi" 
Matthew26:15 arababaza ati: “Murampa iki nkabashyikiriza Yezu?” Bamubarira ibikoroto mirongo itatu by'ifeza. 
Matthew26:16 Kuva icyo gihe Yuda asigara ashaka igihe gikwiriye cyo kumubashyikiriza. 
Matthew26:17 Umunsi wa mbere w'iminsi mikuru y'Imigati idasembuye, abigishwa ba Yezu baramusanga baramubaza bati: “Ni hehe ushaka ko tugutegurira ifunguro rya Pasika?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yezu ati: “Nimujye mu mujyi kwa kanaka, mumubwire muti: ‘Umwigisha akudutumyeho ngo igihe cye kiregereje, arashaka kuza iwawe akizihiza Pasika hamwe n'abigishwa be.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Abigishwa ba Yezu babigenza uko yabategetse, bategura ifunguro rya Pasika." 
Matthew26:20 Bugorobye Yezu yicarana n'abigishwa be cumi na babiri barafungura. 
Matthew26:21 Nuko mu gihe bafungura aravuga ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umwe muri mwe agiye kungambanira.” 
Matthew26:22 Birabababaza cyane batangira kumubaza umwe umwe bati: “Nyagasani, mbese ni jye?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Uwo duhuriza intoki ku mbehe ni we ugiye kungambanira. 
Matthew26:24 Koko Umwana w'umuntu agiye kwicwa nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga kuri we. Nyamara ugiye kumugambanira azabona ishyano. Icyari kuba cyiza kuri uwo muntu ni iyo aba ataravutse.” 
Matthew26:25 Maze Yuda wari ugiye kumugambanira, aramubaza ati: “Mwigisha, mbese ni jye?” Yezu aramubwira ati: “Urabyivugiye.”" 
Matthew26:26 Igihe bafunguraga, Yezu afata umugati, amaze gushimira Imana arawumanyura, awuhereza abigishwa be ati: “Nimwakire murye, uyu ni umubiri wanjye.”" 
Matthew26:27 Afata n'igikombe, ashimira Imana, arakibahereza, ati: “Nimunyweho mwese." 
Matthew26:28 Aya ni amaraso yanjye ahamya Isezerano [rishya] Imana igiranye n'abayo, amenwe ku bw'abantu benshi kugira ngo bababarirwe ibyaha." 
Matthew26:29 Reka mbabwire: sinzongera kunywa kuri bene iyi divayi, kugeza igihe nzasangirira namwe divayi nshya mu bwami bwa Data.”" 
Matthew26:30 Nuko bamaze kuririmba, barasohoka bajya ku Musozi w'Iminzenze." 
Matthew26:31 Maze Yezu arababwira ati: “Ibigiye kumbaho iri joro biri bubace intege mwese, ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: ‘Nzica umushumba, intama zitatane.’" 
Matthew26:32 Ariko nimara kuzuka, muzansanga muri Galileya.”" 
Matthew26:33 Petero aramubwira ati: “Ibigiye kukubaho naho bose byabaca intege, jye ndi bukomere nta kabuza!”" 
Matthew26:34 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ndakubwira nkomeje ko muri iri joro, inkoko ijya kubika umaze kunyihakana gatatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petero ati: “Naho byatuma mpfana nawe sindi bukwihakane na gato!” Abandi bigishwa bose na bo bavuga batyo. 
Matthew26:36 Nuko Yezu ajyana n'abigishwa be ahantu hitwa Getsemani. Bahageze arababwira ati: “Nimube mwicaye hano mu gihe ngiye hariya gusenga.” 
Matthew26:37 Maze ajyana na Petero na bene Zebedeyi bombi, atangira kugira agahinda n'ishavu." 
Matthew26:38 Nuko arababwira ati: “Agahinda mfite karenda kunyica. Nimugume hano mube maso hamwe nanjye.” 
Matthew26:39 Nuko yigira imbere gato yikubita hasi yubamye, arasenga ati: “Data, niba bishoboka igiza kure yanjye iki gikombe cy'umubabaro. Icyakora ntibibe uko nshaka, ahubwo bibe uko ushaka.”" 
Matthew26:40 Nyuma asubira aho yasize abigishwa be asanga basinziriye, abaza Petero ati: “Bite se, ntimuruhije muba maso hamwe nanjye byibura isaha imwe?" 
Matthew26:41 Mube maso kandi musenge kugira ngo mutagwa mu bishuko. Umutima w'umuntu ugira imigambi myiza, ariko umubiri wo ugira intege nke.”" 
Matthew26:42 Asubirayo arasenga ati: “Data, niba bidashoboka ko iki gikombe gica kure yanjye ntakinyoye, ibyo ushaka bibe.”" 
Matthew26:43 Ahindukiye asanga na none basinziriye, kuko amaso yabo yari aremerewe n'ibitotsi." 
Matthew26:44 Yongera kubasiga ajya gusenga ubwa gatatu, avuga amagambo nk'aya mbere." 
Matthew26:45 Nuko asubira aho yasize abigishwa be arababwira ati: “Mbese muracyasinziriye? Muriruhukiye? Yemwe, igihe kiregereje kugira ngo Umwana w'umuntu agabizwe abanyabyaha." 
Matthew26:46 Nimuhaguruke tugende, dore ungambanira araje.”" 
Matthew26:47 Akivuga ibyo, Yuda umwe muri ba bigishwa cumi na babiri aba araje. Yari kumwe n'igitero cy'abantu benshi, bitwaje inkota n'amahiri, boherejwe n'abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango." 
Matthew26:48 Uwamugambaniraga yari yabahaye ikimenyetso ati: “Uwo nza kuramutsa musoma, araba ari we mumufate.”" 
Matthew26:49 Ako kanya Yuda asanga Yezu aramusuhuza ati: “Mwiriwe mwigisha.” Nuko aramusoma. 
Matthew26:50 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ncuti, kora ikikuzanye!” Nuko ba bantu baratambuka, basumira Yezu baramufata." 
Matthew26:51 Ni bwo umwe mu bari kumwe na Yezu akuye inkota, ayikubita umugaragu w'Umutambyi mukuru amuca ugutwi." 
Matthew26:52 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Subiza inkota yawe mu rwubati, kuko umuntu wese urwanisha inkota na we azicishwa inkota." 
Matthew26:53 Mbese ntuzi ko nshobora gutabaza Data, agahita ampa imitwe y'ingabo y'abamarayika irenze cumi n'ibiri?" 
Matthew26:54 Ariko se bibaye bityo Ibyanditswe byasohozwa bite, kandi bivuga ko ari uku bigomba kuba?”" 
Matthew26:55 Ubwo nyine Yezu ni ko kubaza igitero cy'abantu bari baje ati: “Kuki muje kumfata mwitwaje inkota n'amahiri nk'abagiye gufata igisambo? Iminsi yose nicaraga mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana nigisha, ntimwamfashe." 
Matthew26:56 Ariko ibi byose bibereyeho kugira ngo ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi bibe.” Maze abigishwa be bose baramutererana barahunga. 
Matthew26:57 Abari bafashe Yezu bamujyana kwa Kayifa Umutambyi mukuru, abigishamategeko n'abakuru b'imiryango barahakoranira." 
Matthew26:58 Ubwo Petero amukurikirira kure aza kugera mu rugo rw'Umutambyi mukuru, arinjira yicarana n'abakozi baho, ashaka kureba amaherezo." 
Matthew26:59 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abandi bose bagize urukiko rw'ikirenga, bashakaga ibyo babeshyera Yezu kugira ngo bamwicishe," 
Matthew26:60 ariko ntibabibona nubwo hari haje benshi bo kumushinja ibinyoma. Nyuma haza kugoboka abantu babiri bati: 
Matthew26:61 “Uyu muntu yaravuze ngo: ‘Mbasha gusenya Ingoro y'Imana, nkongera nkayubaka mu minsi itatu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Noneho Umutambyi mukuru arahaguruka, aramubaza ati: “Ko nta cyo usubiza ku byo aba bantu bagushinja?”" 
Matthew26:63 Yezu aricecekera. Umutambyi mukuru ni ko kumubwira ati: “Nkurahije Imana nzima, utubwire niba ari wowe Kristo, Umwana w'Imana.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Urabyivugiye. Byongeye kandi reka mbabwire, bidatinze muzabona Umwana w'umuntu yicaye ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bw'Imana Nyirububasha, munamubone aje ku bicu byo ku ijuru.”" 
Matthew26:65 Umutambyi mukuru ni ko gushishimura imyambaro ye kugira ngo agaragaze ko bimushegeshe, maze aravuga ati: “Aratuka Imana! Turacyashaka abagabo b'iki se kandi? Dore namwe mumwiyumviye atuka Imana!" 
Matthew26:66 Murabitekerezaho iki?” Barasubiza bati: “Akwiriye gupfa!” 
Matthew26:67 Nuko bamucira mu maso bamutera n'amakofi, abandi bamukubita inshyi bati:" 
Matthew26:68 “Kristo, hanura. Ni nde ugukubise?”" 
Matthew26:69 Icyo gihe Petero yari yicaye hanze mu rugo. Umwe mu baja aramwegera aramubwira ati: “Nawe wari kumwe na Yezu wo muri Galileya!” 
Matthew26:70 Petero ahakanira imbere ya bose ati: “Sinzi icyo ushaka kuvuga!” 
Matthew26:71 Ahavuye agana ku irembo undi muja aramubona, abwira abari aho ati: “Uyu yari kumwe na Yezu w'i Nazareti!”" 
Matthew26:72 Petero yongera guhakana ndetse ararahira ati: “Uwo muntu simuzi!” 
Matthew26:73 Hashize akanya, abari aho basanga Petero baramubwira bati: “Ni ukuri nawe uri uwo muri bo, yewe n'imvugo yawe irakuranga!”" 
Matthew26:74 Nuko Petero atangira kwivuma no gucurikiranya indahiro ati: “Uwo muntu simuzi!” Ako kanya inkoko irabika. 
Matthew26:75 Petero ni ko kwibuka ijambo Yezu yari yavuze ati: “Inkoko irajya kubika umaze kunyihakana gatatu.” Asohoka ashavuye, ararira cyane." 
Matthew27:1 Igitondo gitangaje, abakuru bose bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango bajya inama yo kwicisha Yezu." 
Matthew27:2 Bamaze kumuboha baramujyana, bamushyikiriza Umutegetsi Pilato." 
Matthew27:3 Nuko Yuda wamugambaniye abonye ko Yezu yaciriwe urwo gupfa yicuza ibyo yakoze, asubiza abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango bya bikoroto mirongo itatu by'ifeza," 
Matthew27:4 aravuga ati: “Nakoze ishyano kuko nagambaniye amaraso y'umuntu w'umwere.” Baramubwira bati: “Ibyo ni ibyawe twe ntibitureba.” 
Matthew27:5 Ajugunya bya bikoroto mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana, avayo ajya kwimanika." 
Matthew27:6 Abakuru bo mu batambyi bafata ibyo bikoroto baravugana bati: “Ntibikwiriye ko dushyira aya mafaranga hamwe n'amaturo yandi, kuko yaguzwe amaraso y'umuntu.”" 
Matthew27:7 Bamaze kujya inama, bayagura umurima wari uw'umubumbyi, kugira ngo ube irimbi ryo guhambamo abatari Abayahudi." 
Matthew27:8 Bituma witwa “Umurima w'Amaraso” kugeza na n'ubu. 
Matthew27:9 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Yeremiya ngo: “Bakiriye ibikoroto mirongo itatu by'ifeza, ari cyo giciro Abisiraheli bari biyemeje kumugura." 
Matthew27:10 Babigura umurima w'umubumbyi nk'uko Nyagasani yari yarantegetse.” 
Matthew27:11 Yezu ageze imbere y'umutegetsi, uwo mutegetsi aramubaza ati: “Ni wowe mwami w'Abayahudi?” Yezu ati: “Urabyivugiye.”" 
Matthew27:12 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango baramurega, ariko ntiyagira icyo asubiza." 
Matthew27:13 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati: “Ntiwumva ibyo byose bagushinja?” 
Matthew27:14 Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza kuri ibyo birego byose. Umutegetsi abibonye aratangara cyane. 
Matthew27:15 Ku munsi mukuru wa Pasika, umutegetsi w'Umunyaroma yari amenyereye kurekurira rubanda imfungwa imwe bashakaga." 
Matthew27:16 Icyo gihe bari bafite imfungwa y'ikirangirire yitwaga Baraba. 
Matthew27:17 Nuko Pilato abaza abantu bakoraniye aho ati: “Uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni nde, Baraba cyangwa Yezu witwa Kristo?”" 
Matthew27:18 Pilato yari azi ko bamugabije Yezu babitewe n'ishyari. 
Matthew27:19 Igihe Pilato yari yicaye kugira ngo ace urubanza, umugore we amutumaho ati: “Uramenye ntugire icyo ukora kuri uwo muntu, ni umwere. Naraye ndose byinshi kuri we byambabaje.”" 
Matthew27:20 Ariko abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango bemeza rubanda gusaba Umutegetsi ngo abarekurire Baraba, yicishe Yezu." 
Matthew27:21 Nuko arababaza ati: “Muri aba bombi uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni nde?” Baramusubiza bati: “Ni Baraba.” 
Matthew27:22 Pilato arababaza ati: “None se Yezu witwa Kristo mugire nte?” Bose bati: “Nabambwe ku musaraba!” 
Matthew27:23 Pilato ati: “Kuki? Ikibi yakoze ni ikihe?” Barushaho gusakuza bati: “Nabambwe!” 
Matthew27:24 Pilato abonye ko arushywa n'ubusa ahubwo ko bigiye gucika, atumiza amazi maze akarabira imbere ya rubanda, aravuga ati: “Amaraso y'uyu muntu ntazambarweho. Birabe ibyanyu!”" 
Matthew27:25 Bose barasubiza bati: “Amaraso ye araduhame ahame n'abana bacu!” 
Matthew27:26 Pilato ni ko kubarekurira Baraba. Ategeka ko Yezu abambwa ku musaraba bamaze kumukubita ibiboko. 
Matthew27:27 Nuko abasirikari bajyana Yezu mu gikari cy'ingoro y'umutegetsi, maze abasirikari bose baramukikiza." 
Matthew27:28 Bamucuza imyambaro bamwambika umwitero utukura. 
Matthew27:29 Bazingazinga ikamba ry'amahwa barimutamiriza ku mutwe, bamufatisha ikibingo mu kuboko kw'iburyo. Nuko bakajya bamupfukamira bamushinyagurira bati: “Urakarama Mwami w'Abayahudi!”" 
Matthew27:30 Bakamuvundereza amacandwe, bagafata na cya kibingo bakakimukubita mu mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Nuko bamaze kumushinyagurira batyo bamwambura wa mwitero utukura, bamusubiza imyambaro ye. Nuko bamujyana kumubamba ku musaraba." 
Matthew27:32 Bagisohoka mu mujyi bahura n'umuntu ukomoka i Sirene witwaga Simoni, baramufata kugira ngo atware umusaraba wa Yezu." 
Matthew27:33 Bageze ahitwa Gologota ari ko kuvuga “ahitiriwe igihanga”," 
Matthew27:34 bamuha divayi ivanze n'indurwe ngo anywe, asomyeho yanga kuyinywa." 
Matthew27:35 Nuko bamubamba ku musaraba, bigabanya imyambaro ye bakoresheje ubufindo." 
Matthew27:36 Birangiye bicara aho baramurinda. 
Matthew27:37 Hejuru y'umutwe we, bahamanika itangazo ry'icyo yaregwaga, ngo “Uyu ni Yezu Umwami w'Abayahudi.”" 
Matthew27:38 Yari abambanywe n'abambuzi babiri, umwe iburyo undi ibumoso." 
Matthew27:39 Abahisi baramutukaga bakazunguza umutwe bati: 
Matthew27:40 “Wowe wasenya Ingoro y'Imana ukayubaka mu minsi itatu, ngaho ikize! Niba uri Umwana w'Imana ivane ku musaraba turebe!”" 
Matthew27:41 Abakuru bo mu batambyi hamwe n'abigishamategeko n'abakuru b'imiryango, na bo bamushinyaguriraga bamuseka bati:" 
Matthew27:42 “Yakijije abandi none ananiwe kwikiza! Umva ko ari Umwami w'Abisiraheli, ngaho namanuke ku musaraba ni bwo tumwemera!" 
Matthew27:43 Yiringiye Imana avuga ngo ‘Ndi Umwana wayo’, none reka turebe ko imurokora umva ko imukunda!”" 
Matthew27:44 Ndetse na ba bambuzi bari babambanywe na we ni ko bamutukaga. 
Matthew27:45 Uhereye saa sita, mu gihugu cyose hacura umwijima kugeza saa cyenda." 
Matthew27:46 Ahagana mu masaa cyenda Yezu avuga aranguruye ati: “Eli, Eli, lama sabakitani?” Ni ukuvuga ngo: “Mana yanjye, Mana yanjye, ni iki gitumye untererana?”" 
Matthew27:47 Bamwe mu bari bahagaze aho babyumvise baravuga bati: “Aratabaza Eliya.” 
Matthew27:48 Umwe muri bo ahita yiruka, afata icyangwe acyinika muri divayi isharira, agihambira ku kibingo akimushyira ku munwa kugira ngo akinyunyuze." 
Matthew27:49 Abandi baravuga bati: “Mureke turebe ko Eliya aza kumutabara!” 
Matthew27:50 Yezu yongera kurangurura ijwi, aherako avamo umwuka." 
Matthew27:51 Nuko mu Ngoro y'Imana umwenda wakingirizaga Icyumba kizira inenge cyane utabukamo kabiri, uhereye hejuru ukageza hasi. Isi iratingita, ibitare biriyasa." 
Matthew27:52 Imva zirakinguka, intore z'Imana nyinshi zapfuye zirazuka." 
Matthew27:53 Yezu amaze kuzuka, ziva mu mva zigera i Yeruzalemu umujyi Imana yitoranyirije, zibonekera abantu benshi." 
Matthew27:54 Umukapiteni n'abasirikari be barindaga Yezu bumvise umutingito w'isi, kandi babonye ibindi byabaye, baratinya cyane baravuga bati: “Ni ukuri uyu muntu yari umwana w'Imana!”" 
Matthew27:55 Hari n'abagore benshi babireberaga kure, ni bo bakurikiye Yezu kuva muri Galileya bamufasha imirimo." 
Matthew27:56 Barimo Mariya w'i Magadala na Mariya nyina wa Yakobo na Yozefu, na nyina wa bene Zebedeyi." 
Matthew27:57 Bugiye kwira haza umugabo w'umukire witwaga Yozefu, ukomoka mu mujyi wa Arimateya, yari umwigishwa wa Yezu." 
Matthew27:58 Ajya kwa Pilato amusaba umurambo wa Yezu. Pilato ategeka ko bawumuha. 
Matthew27:59 Nuko Yozefu ajyana uwo murambo, awuhambira mu mwenda wera utanduye." 
Matthew27:60 Aherako awushyingura mu mva ye nshya yari yarakorogoshoye mu rutare, nyuma ahirikiraho ibuye rinini, arikingisha umuryango maze arataha." 
Matthew27:61 Mariya w'i Magadala na Mariya wundi basigara bicaye ahateganye n'imva. 
Matthew27:62 Umunsi w'imyiteguro y'isabato urangiye, bukeye bwaho abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi bateranira kwa Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 baramubwira bati: “Nyakubahwa, twibutse ko wa mubeshyi akiriho yavuze ati: ‘Nzazuka iminsi itatu ishize.’" 
Matthew27:64 Nuko rero, mutegeke ko barinda imva kugeza ku munsi wa gatatu, kugira ngo abigishwa be bataza kwiba umurambo bakabeshya rubanda ngo ‘Yazutse’, maze icyo kinyoma cya nyuma kikaruta icya mbere.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato arababwira ati: “Ngaba abasirikari, mugende muyirinde uko mushoboye.”" 
Matthew27:66 Nuko baragenda badanangira umuryango w'imva, bashyira ikimenyetso kuri rya buye bahasiga n'abasirikari." 
Matthew28:1 Isabato ishize, ku cyumweru ari wo munsi wa mbere, Mariya w'i Magadala na Mariya wundi baza mu museke kureba imva." 
Matthew28:2 Ako kanya haba umutingito w'isi ukomeye, umumarayika wa Nyagasani amanuka mu ijuru, araza yigizayo rya buye aryicaraho." 
Matthew28:3 Yarabagiranaga nk'umurabyo n'imyambaro ye yeraga de. 
Matthew28:4 Abarinzi bamurabutswe bagira ubwoba bwinshi, bahinda umushyitsi bamera nk'abapfuye." 
Matthew28:5 Umumarayika abwira abagore ati: “Mwitinya! Nzi ko mushaka Yezu umwe babambye ku musaraba 
Matthew28:6 ariko ntari hano, yazutse nk'uko yari yarabivuze. Nimuze murebe aho yari aryamye." 
Matthew28:7 Noneho mwihute mubwire abigishwa be muti: ‘Yazutse kandi agiye kubategerereza muri Galileya, ni ho muzamusanga.’ Ngubwo ubutumwa nari mbafitiye.”" 
Matthew28:8 Bava ku mva bwangu bafite ubwoba buvanze n'ibyishimo byinshi, biruka bajya kumenyesha abigishwa ba Yezu iyo nkuru." 
Matthew28:9 Noneho Yezu ahura na bo arababwira ati: “Ndabaramutsa!” Baramwegera bamwikubita imbere, bamufata ibirenge baramuramya." 
Matthew28:10 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Mwitinya! Mugende mubwire abavandimwe banjye bajye muri Galileya, ni ho bazambonera.”" 
Matthew28:11 Abagore bakiri mu nzira, bamwe mu basirikari barindaga imva bajya mu mujyi, maze batekerereza abakuru bo mu batambyi ibyari byabaye byose." 
Matthew28:12 Abo batambyi baterana n'abakuru b'imiryango bajya inama, baha abasirikari amafaranga menshi" 
Matthew28:13 barababwira bati: “Mujye muvuga ko abigishwa be baje nijoro bakamwiba musinziriye. 
Matthew28:14 Umutegetsi naramuka abimenye, tuzamugusha neza dutume mudakurikiranwa.”" 
Matthew28:15 Abarinzi bamaze gushyikira amafaranga bagenza uko babwirijwe. Nuko iyo nkuru yamamara mu Bayahudi kugeza na n'ubu. 
Matthew28:16 Nuko abo bigishwa cumi n'umwe bajya muri Galileya ku musozi Yezu yari yarabarangiye. 
Matthew28:17 Bamubonye baramuramya, ariko bamwe barashidikanya." 
Matthew28:18 Yezu arabegera arababwira ati: “Nahawe ubushobozi kuri byose mu ijuru no ku isi. 
Matthew28:19 Nuko rero nimugende muhindure abo mu mahanga yose babe abigishwa banjye, mubabatize mu izina rya Data n'Umwana we na Mwuka Muziranenge," 
Matthew28:20 mubigishe gukurikiza ibyo nabategetse byose, kandi dore ndi kumwe namwe iminsi yose kugeza ku mperuka y'isi.”" 
Mark1:1 Ngiyi intangiriro y'Ubutumwa bwiza bwerekeye Yezu Kristo Umwana w'Imana. 
Mark1:2 Byanditswe mu gitabo cy'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Dore nohereje intumwa yanjye mbere yawe, kugira ngo igutunganyirize inzira." 
Mark1:3 Nimwumve ijwi ry'urangururira mu butayu ati: ‘Nimutunganye inzira ya Nyagasani, muringanize aho azanyura.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Yohani yatungutse mu butayu atangaza ko abantu bagomba kwihana bakabatizwa, kugira ngo bababarirwe ibyaha." 
Mark1:5 Icyo gihe abaturage bo mu ntara yose ya Yudeya n'abo mu murwa wayo wa Yeruzalemu bose basangaga Yohani, akababatiriza mu ruzi rwa Yorodani, bemerera mu ruhame ibyaha byabo." 
Mark1:6 Yohani yambaraga umwambaro uboheshejwe ubwoya bw'ingamiya, akawukenyeza umukandara w'uruhu. Yatungwaga n'isanane n'ubuki bw'ubuhura," 
Mark1:7 akajya atangaza ati: “Nyuma yanjye hagiye kuza undusha ububasha, ntibinkwiriye no kunama ngo mbe napfundura udushumi tw'inkweto ze." 
Mark1:8 Jyewe ndababatirisha amazi, ariko we azababatirisha Mwuka Muziranenge.”" 
Mark1:9 Muri iyo minsi Yezu ava i Nazareti yo muri Galileya, maze Yohani amubatiriza muri Yorodani." 
Mark1:10 Yezu akiva mu mazi abona ijuru rirakingutse, na Mwuka w'Imana amumanukiraho asa n'inuma." 
Mark1:11 Nuko humvikana ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: “Uri Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane, ni wowe nishimira.”" 
Mark1:12 Mwuka w'Imana aherako amujyana mu butayu," 
Mark1:13 ahamara iminsi mirongo ine ageragezwa na Satani. Yahabanaga n'inyamaswa, abamarayika ari bo bamukorera." 
Mark1:14 Yohani amaze gufungwa, Yezu ajya muri Galileya yamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza bw'Imana agira ati:" 
Mark1:15 “Igihe kirageze, ubwami bw'Imana buregereje. Nimwihane maze mwemere Ubutumwa bwiza.”" 
Mark1:16 Nuko Yezu anyura iruhande rw'ikiyaga cya Galileya, abona Simoni n'umuvandimwe we Andereya barobesha imitego y'amafi mu kiyaga, kuko bari abarobyi." 
Mark1:17 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimunkurikire nzabagira abarobyi b'abantu.” 
Mark1:18 Bahita basiga aho imitego yabo baramukurikira. 
Mark1:19 Yigiye imbere ho gato abona Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi. Na bo bari mu bwato batunganya imitego barobeshaga. 
Mark1:20 Ako kanya Yezu arabahamagara. Nuko basiga se Zebedeyi n'abakozi be mu bwato baramukurikira. 
Mark1:21 Nuko bagera i Kafarinawumu. Ku munsi w'isabato Yezu ajya mu rusengero rw'Abayahudi atangira kwigisha. 
Mark1:22 Abaho batangazwa cyane n'imyigishirize ye, kuko atigishaga nk'abigishamategeko, ahubwo we yigishaga nk'ufite ubushobozi." 
Mark1:23 Ako kanya mu rusengero haboneka umuntu wahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani, avuga aranguruye ati:" 
Mark1:24 “Yezu w'i Nazareti, uradushakaho iki? Mbese wazanywe no kuturimbura? Nzi uwo uri we, ni wowe Muziranenge wavuye ku Mana.”" 
Mark1:25 Yezu acyaha iyo ngabo ya Satani ati: “Ceceka muvemo!” 
Mark1:26 Nuko itigisa uwo muntu bikabije maze imuvamo ivuza induru. 
Mark1:27 Bose barumirwa bigeza aho babazanya bati: “Ibi ni ibiki? Mbega inyigisho nshya! Arategekana ububasha ingabo za Satani na zo zikamwumvira!” 
Mark1:28 Bidatinze inkuru ye yamamara mu karere kose ka Galileya. 
Mark1:29 Bakiva mu rusengero Yezu ajya kwa Simoni na Andereya, ari kumwe na Yakobo na Yohani." 
Mark1:30 Bagezeyo basanga nyirabukwe wa Simoni aryamye ahinda umuriro. Ako kanya babwira Yezu iby'uburwayi bwe. 
Mark1:31 Yezu aramusanga, amufata ukuboko aramwegura. Nuko umuriro urazima, arabyuka arabazimanira." 
Mark1:32 Nimugoroba izuba rirenze, abantu bamuzanira abarwayi bose n'abahanzweho n'ingabo za Satani." 
Mark1:33 Abaturage b'umujyi bose bari bateraniye ku irembo. 
Mark1:34 Nuko akiza abantu benshi bari barwaye indwara zitari zimwe, amenesha n'ingabo nyinshi za Satani zari mu bantu. Ariko ntiyazikundira kuvuga kuko zari zamumenye." 
Mark1:35 Bukeye bwaho Yezu abyuka kare mu rukerera, ajya ahantu hiherereye arasenga." 
Mark1:36 Simoni na bagenzi be bajya kumushaka. 
Mark1:37 Bamubonye baramubwira bati: “Abantu bose baragushaka.” 
Mark1:38 Arabasubiza ati: “Ahubwo nimuze tujye mu yindi misozi idukikije, na ho namamazeyo Ubutumwa bwiza kuko ari cyo cyanzanye.”" 
Mark1:39 Nuko azenguruka Galileya yose avuga Ubutumwa bwiza, abutangariza mu nsengero zaho kandi amenesha ingabo za Satani zari mu bantu." 
Mark1:40 Nuko umuntu urwaye ibibembe asanga Yezu aramupfukamira, aramubwira ati: “Ubishatse wankiza.”" 
Mark1:41 Yezu amugirira impuhwe, arambura ukuboko amukoraho agira ati: “Ndabishaka kira.”" 
Mark1:42 Ako kanya ibibembe bimushiraho arakira. 
Mark1:43 Yezu ahita amusezerera amwihanangiriza ati: 
Mark1:44 “Uramenye ntugire uwo ubibwira. Icyakora ujye kwiyereka umutambyi maze uture igitambo cyo guhumanurwa nk'uko Musa yabitegetse, bibabere icyemezo cy'uko wakize.”" 
Mark1:45 Nyamara uwo muntu akimara kuva aho atangira kubyamamaza, abibwira umuhisi n'umugenzi bigeza aho Yezu yari atakigenda mu mijyi ku mugaragaro, ahubwo akigumira mu gasozi ahantu hadatuwe, akaba ari ho abantu bamusanga baturutse hirya no hino." 
Mark2:1 Hashize iminsi mike Yezu agaruka i Kafarinawumu, abantu bamenya ko ari imuhira." 
Mark2:2 Hateranira abantu benshi buzura mu nzu, ku buryo nta kanya na busa kabonekaga haba no mu muryango. Yezu atangira kubabwira Ijambo ry'Imana." 
Mark2:3 Haza abantu bamuzaniye umuntu umugaye ahetswe na bane muri bo. 
Mark2:4 Basanga badashoboye kumugeza aho Yezu ari kuko hari abantu benshi. Nuko basambura igisenge cy'inzu aharinganiye n'aho Yezu yari ari, maze mu cyuho baciye bamanuriramo ingobyi uwo muntu umugaye yari ahetswemo." 
Mark2:5 Yezu abonye ukwizera kwabo abwira uwo murwayi ati: “Mwana wanjye, ibyaha byawe urabibabariwe.”" 
Mark2:6 Bamwe mu bigishamategeko bari bicaye aho barabazanya bati: 
Mark2:7 “Uriya atewe n'iki kuvuga atyo? Aratuka Imana! Ni nde ubasha kubabarira abantu ibyaha uretse Imana yonyine?” 
Mark2:8 Ako kanya Yezu amenya ibyo batekereza, ni ko kubabaza ati: “Ni iki kibateye gutekereza mutyo?" 
Mark2:9 Icyoroshye ni ikihe, ari ukubwira uyu muntu umugaye ngo ‘Ibyaha byawe urabibabariwe’, cyangwa ngo ‘Byuka ufate ingobyi yawe ugende?’" 
Mark2:10 Nyamara ndagira ngo mumenye ko ku isi Umwana w'umuntu afite ubushobozi bwo kubabarira abantu ibyaha.” Nuko abwira uwo muntu umugaye ati: 
Mark2:11 “Ndagutegetse, byuka ufate ingobyi yawe witahire.”" 
Mark2:12 Ako kanya arabyuka afata ingobyi ye, asohoka abantu bose bamureba ku buryo bose batangaye cyane, basingiza Imana bati: “Nta na rimwe twigeze tubona ibintu nk'ibi!”" 
Mark2:13 Yezu asubira ku Kiyaga cya Galileya, maze imbaga y'abantu irahamusanga arabigisha." 
Mark2:14 Nuko ahise abona Levi mwene Alufeyi, yicaye ku biro by'imisoro. Aramubwira ati: “Nkurikira!” Levi aherako arahaguruka aramukurikira." 
Mark2:15 Igihe Yezu n'abigishwa be bari kwa Levi bafungura, abasoresha benshi n'abandi banyabyaha baraza basangira na bo, kuko mu bamukurikiraga, bene nk'abo bari benshi!" 
Mark2:16 Abigishamategeko bo mu Bafarizayi babonye Yezu asangira n'abasoresha n'abanyabyaha, babaza abigishwa be bati: “Kuki asangira n'abasoresha n'abanyabyaha?”" 
Mark2:17 Yezu abyumvise arababwira ati: “Abazima si bo bakenera umuvuzi, ahubwo abarwayi ni bo bamukenera. Sinazanywe no guhamagara intungane, ahubwo naje guhamagara abanyabyaha.”" 
Mark2:18 Igihe kimwe abigishwa ba Yohani Mubatiza n'Abafarizayi bari bigomwe kurya, maze abantu basanga Yezu baramubaza bati: “Kuki abigishwa ba Yohani n'ab'Abafarizayi bigomwa kurya, naho abawe ntibabikore?”" 
Mark2:19 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mbese mu bukwe abasangwa bashobora kwigomwa kurya, umukwe akiri kumwe na bo? Oya, igihe cyose bakiri kumwe ntibashobora kwigomwa kurya." 
Mark2:20 Nyamara igihe kizagera umukwe avanwe muri bo, ni bwo bazigomwa kurya." 
Mark2:21 “Ntawe utera ikiremo gishya ku mwenda ushaje. Uwabikora, ikiremo gishya cyawukurura ukarushaho gushishimuka." 
Mark2:22 Nta n'usuka inzoga y'umubira mu mpago z'impu zishaje. Uwabikora, impago zaturika zikangirika inzoga igasandara. Ahubwo inzoga y'umubira bayisuka mu mpago zikiri nshya.”" 
Mark2:23 Igihe kimwe Yezu anyuze mu mirima y'ingano ku isabato, abigishwa be bagenda baca amahundo." 
Mark2:24 Nuko Abafarizayi babwira Yezu bati: “Dorere, kuki bakora ibidakwiriye gukorwa ku isabato?”" 
Mark2:25 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese ntimwigeze musoma ibyo Dawidi yakoze, igihe we n'abo bari kumwe bari bashonje cyane?" 
Mark2:26 Icyo gihe yinjiye mu Nzu y'Imana arya imigati yatuwe Imana, kandi nta wemererwaga kuyirya uretse abatambyi. Ariko Dawidi yayiriyeho ahaho n'abo bari kumwe. Ibyo byabaye igihe Abiyatari yari Umutambyi mukuru.”" 
Mark2:27 Yezu arababwira ati: “Isabato yabereyeho abantu, abantu si bo babereyeho isabato." 
Mark2:28 Nuko rero Umwana w'umuntu ni we ugenga n'isabato.” 
Mark3:1 Yezu asubiye mu rusengero ahasanga umuntu wari unyunyutse ikiganza. 
Mark3:2 Bagenzura Yezu ngo barebe ko amukiza ku isabato, kugira ngo babone icyo bamurega." 
Mark3:3 Yezu abwira uwo muntu wari unyunyutse ikiganza ati: “Haguruka ujye hariya hagati.” 
Mark3:4 Nuko arababaza ati: “Mbese hemewe iki ku munsi w'isabato, kugira neza cyangwa se kugira nabi? Gukiza umuntu cyangwa kumwica?” Baricecekera." 
Mark3:5 Yezu abararanganyamo amaso arakaye, kandi atewe agahinda n'uko imitima yabo inangiye. Nuko abwira uwo muntu ati: “Rambura ikiganza.” Arakirambura maze cyongera kuba kizima." 
Mark3:6 Abafarizayi basohotse, ako kanya bahuza umugambi n'abo mu ishyaka rya Herodi, kugira ngo bashake uko bamwica." 
Mark3:7 Nuko Yezu n'abigishwa be bagenda bagana ku kiyaga, imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu iramukurikira. Bari baturutse muri Galileya no muri Yudeya," 
Mark3:8 baturutse n'i Yeruzalemu no mu ntara ya Idumeya no hakurya ya Yorodani, no mu karere ka Tiri na Sidoni. Bazanywe n'uko bumvise ibyo Yezu yakoraga." 
Mark3:9 Nuko abwira abigishwa be kumwegereza ubwato ngo ajyemo rubanda rutamuniganaho," 
Mark3:10 kuko yari yakijije abantu benshi bigatuma abari barwaye bose bamwisukaho kugira ngo bamukoreho. 
Mark3:11 Ingabo za Satani na zo iyo zabonaga Yezu, zituraga hasi imbere ye zikarangurura ziti: “Uri Umwana w'Imana.”" 
Mark3:12 Na we akazibuza azihanangiriza ngo ze kumwamamaza. 
Mark3:13 Hanyuma Yezu azamuka umusozi, maze ahamagara abo yishakiye baramusanga." 
Mark3:14 Nuko atoranya muri bo cumi na babiri kugira ngo babane na we, ajye abohereza kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza," 
Mark3:15 abaha n'ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani. 
Mark3:16 Abo cumi na babiri yatoranyije ni aba: Simoni Petero," 
Mark3:17 na Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi ari bo yahimbye Bowanerige (ni ukuvuga “abakubita nk'inkuba”)," 
Mark3:18 na Andereya na Filipo na Barutolomayo, na Matayo na Tomasi na Yakobo mwene Alufeyi, na Tadeyo na Simoni w'umurwanashyaka w'igihugu," 
Mark3:19 na Yuda Isikariyoti wa wundi wagambaniye Yezu. 
Mark3:20 Hanyuma Yezu agaruka imuhira, imbaga y'abantu yongera guterana, bigeza aho we n'abigishwa be babura uko bafungura." 
Mark3:21 Bene wabo babimenye baza kuhamuvana, kuko bavugaga bati: “Yasaze.”" 
Mark3:22 Abigishamategeko bari bavuye i Yeruzalemu baravuga bati: “Yahanzweho na Bēlizebuli”, kandi bati: “Ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani abuhabwa n'uwo mutware wazo.”" 
Mark3:23 Yezu arabahamagara maze abaha urugero ati: “Satani ashobora ate kumenesha Satani? 
Mark3:24 Iyo igihugu gisubiranyemo ntigishobora gukomera. 
Mark3:25 Byongeye kandi iyo umuryango usubiranyemo, ntushobora gukomera." 
Mark3:26 Nuko rero niba Satani ubwe yirwanya, aba yiciyemo ibice ntashobore gukomera, ibye bikaba birangiye." 
Mark3:27 “Ntawe ubasha kwigabiza urugo rw'umunyamaboko ngo amusahure ibyo atunze keretse abanje kumuboha, ubwo ni bwo yasahura urugo rwe." 
Mark3:28 “Ndababwira nkomeje ko ibyaha byose abantu bakoze, ndetse n'ibyo batutse Imana byose bazabibabarirwa." 
Mark3:29 Ariko uzatuka Mwuka Muziranenge ntabwo azababarirwa bibaho. Azabarwaho icyaha gihoraho iteka ryose.” 
Mark3:30 Icyateye Yezu kuvuga ibyo ni uko bari bavuze ngo yahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani. 
Mark3:31 Nyina wa Yezu n'abavandimwe be baraza bahagarara hanze, bamutumaho." 
Mark3:32 Abantu benshi bari bicaye bamukikije baramubwira bati: “Yewe, nyoko n'abavandimwe bawe bari hanze baragushaka.”" 
Mark3:33 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mama n'abavandimwe banjye ni bande?” 
Mark3:34 Nuko araranganya amaso mu bari bicaye bamukikije, aravuga ati: “Mama n'abavandimwe banjye ni aba:" 
Mark3:35 umuntu wese ukora ibyo Imana ishaka ni we murumuna wanjye, ni we mushiki wanjye, ni na we mama.”" 
Mark4:1 Yezu yongera kwigishiriza ku nkombe y'ikiyaga. Imbaga y'abantu iramukikiza bituma ajya mu bwato yicaramo, abantu bose baguma imusozi." 
Mark4:2 Nuko abigisha ibintu byinshi akoresheje imigani ati: 
Mark4:3 “Nimutege amatwi: umuntu yagiye kubiba," 
Mark4:4 igihe abiba imbuto zimwe zigenda zigwa ku nzira, hanyuma inyoni ziraza zirazitoragura." 
Mark4:5 Izindi zigwa ku gasi zihita zimera, kuko ubutaka ari bugufi." 
Mark4:6 Izuba ricanye rirazotsa ziruma, kuko zidafite aho zishorera imizi." 
Mark4:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa, amahwa azirengaho ziragwingira ntizera." 
Mark4:8 Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza, ziramera zirakura maze zirera. Zimwe zera imbuto mirongo itatu, izindi mirongo itandatu, izindi ijana.”" 
Mark4:9 Nuko Yezu aravuga ati: “Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!” 
Mark4:10 Yezu asigaye wenyine, abari kumwe na we barimo ba bandi cumi na babiri, bamusobanuza iby'imigani ye." 
Mark4:11 Nuko arababwira ati: “Mwebwe mwahawe kumenya ibanga ry'ubwami bw'Imana, naho abandi byose babimenyeshwa n'imigani," 
Mark4:12 kugira ngo ‘Kureba barebe ariko be kubona, kumva bumve ariko be gusobanukirwa, kugira ngo batagarukira Imana ikabababarira.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Nuko yongera kubabwira ati: “Ese ko mutumvise uwo mugani, iyindi yose muzayimenya mute?" 
Mark4:14 Imbuto umubibyi abiba ni Ijambo ry'Imana. 
Mark4:15 Imbuto zaguye ku nzira zigereranywa n'abantu bumva iryo Jambo, maze ako kanya Satani akaza agakuraho Ijambo ryabibwe muri bo." 
Mark4:16 Izabibwe ku gasi ni nk'abantu bumva Ijambo ry'Imana, ako kanya bakaryakirana ubwuzu," 
Mark4:17 nyamara ntibatume rishorera imizi muri bo, bityo bakarimarana igihe gito. Iyo habaye ingorane cyangwa gutotezwa bahōrwa Ijambo ry'Imana, bahita bacika intege." 
Mark4:18 Abandi ni nk'izabibwe mu mahwa. Ni abumva Ijambo ry'Imana," 
Mark4:19 nyamara guhagarikwa umutima n'iby'isi no gushukwa n'ubukungu, no gutwarwa n'irari ry'ibindi bintu byose bikarenga kuri iryo Jambo, rikaba nk'imbuto zarumbye." 
Mark4:20 Naho abagereranywa n'izabibwe mu butaka bwiza, ni abumva Ijambo ry'Imana bakaryakira bakera imbuto, bamwe mirongo itatu, abandi mirongo itandatu, abandi ijana.”" 
Mark4:21 Yezu arababaza ati: “Mbese hari uwacana itara akaryubikaho akabindi, cyangwa akaritereka munsi y'igitanda, ahubwo ntiyaritereka ahirengeye?" 
Mark4:22 Nta gihishwe kitazahishurwa, nta n'ibanga ritazashyirwa ahagaragara." 
Mark4:23 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!” 
Mark4:24 Arongera arababwira ati: “Murajye mwitondera ibyo mwumva. Akebo mugeramo ni ko namwe muzagererwamo, ndetse muzarushirizwaho." 
Mark4:25 Ufite azongererwa, naho udafite na busa azakwa n'utwo yaririragaho.”" 
Mark4:26 Yezu arongera aravuga ati: “Iby'ubwami bw'Imana wabigereranya n'umuntu utera imbuto mu murima. 
Mark4:27 Yasinzira cyangwa yaba maso ijoro n'amanywa, izo mbuto ziramera zigakura atazi uko bigenda." 
Mark4:28 Ubutaka ubwabwo ni bwo bwera imyaka: habanza ingemwe zigakura zikaba imigengararo, hanyuma na yo ikaba amahundo arimo impeke zeze." 
Mark4:29 Nuko imyaka yamara kwera, nyir'umurima agahita ategeka ko bazana imihoro ngo bayisarure, kuko ari igihe.”" 
Mark4:30 Yezu yongera kuvuga ati: “Mbese ubwami bw'Imana twabugereranya n'iki, cyangwa twabacira uwuhe mugani wo kubwerekana?" 
Mark4:31 Twabugereranya n'akabuto kitwa sinapi, igihe bagatera kaba karutwa n'izindi mbuto zose zo ku isi." 
Mark4:32 Nyamara iyo bamaze kugatera karamera kagakura, kagasumba ibihingwa byose kakagaba amashami manini, inyoni zikaza kugamamo.”" 
Mark4:33 Nuko Yezu akomeza kubabwira Ijambo ry'Imana, akoresha imigani myinshi nk'iyo ku rugero bashoboye kumva." 
Mark4:34 Nta cyo yababwiraga adakoresheje imigani, ariko abigishwa be akabasobanurira byose biherereye." 
Mark4:35 Uwo munsi bugorobye, Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati: “Twambuke dufate hakurya.”" 
Mark4:36 Basiga rubanda aho bamujyana muri bwa bwato yarimo, n'andi mato aramuherekeza." 
Mark4:37 Nuko haza inkubi y'umuyaga, umuhengeri w'amazi utangira kwiroha mu bwato bwenda gusendera." 
Mark4:38 Yezu we yari aryamye inyuma mu bwato, yiseguye agasego asinziriye. Abigishwa be baramukangura baramubwira bati: “Mwigisha, nta cyo bikubwiye ko tugiye gushira?”" 
Mark4:39 Nuko arakanguka maze acyaha umuyaga, abwira n'ikiyaga ati: “Tuza! Gwa neza!” Umuyaga urahosha haba ituze ryinshi." 
Mark4:40 Hanyuma arababaza ati: “Ni iki cyabateye ubwoba bungana butyo? Mbese n'ubu ntimurizera?” 
Mark4:41 Abigishwa be bakuka umutima barabazanya bati: “Uyu ni muntu ki utegeka umuyaga n'ikiyaga bikamwumvira?” 
Mark5:1 Yezu afata hakurya y'ikiyaga mu ntara y'Abanyagerasa. 
Mark5:2 Yezu akigera imusozi, umuntu aza amusanga aturutse mu irimbi. Uwo muntu yari ahanzweho n'ingabo ya Satani." 
Mark5:3 Yiberaga mu irimbi kandi nta muntu n'umwe wari ugishobora kumuboha, haba no kumubohesha iminyururu." 
Mark5:4 Akenshi bamubohaga amaguru bakoresheje ibyuma, n'amaboko bakoresheje iminyururu, noneho iminyururu akayituraguritsa, n'ibyuma akabicagagura. Nta muntu wari ukimushobora." 
Mark5:5 Ijoro n'amanywa yazereraga mu irimbi no ku misozi, avuza induru kandi yikebesha amabuye." 
Mark5:6 Akiri kure abona Yezu, aza yiruka aramupfukamira." 
Mark5:7 Maze avuga cyane aranguruye ijwi ati: “Uranshakaho iki, Yezu Mwana w'Imana Isumbabyose? Girira Imana we kunyica urubozo!”" 
Mark5:8 Ibyo byatewe n'uko Yezu yari ategetse ati: “Ngabo ya Satani, va muri uwo muntu!”" 
Mark5:9 Yezu abaza uwo muntu ati: “Witwa nde?” Aramusubiza ati: “Nitwa Giteronyamwinshi, kuko turi benshi cyane.”" 
Mark5:10 Nuko yinginga Yezu cyane ngo ye kumenesha izo ngabo za Satani mu gihugu. 
Mark5:11 Hafi aho ku musozi hari umugana munini w'ingurube zarishaga. 
Mark5:12 Izo ngabo za Satani zinginga Yezu ziti: “Tureke twigire muri ziriya ngurube tuziberemo!” 
Mark5:13 Arazemerera. Nuko ziva muri uwo muntu zinjira mu ngurube, maze umugana wose ucuncumuka ku gacuri wiroha mu kiyaga. Izo ngurube zose uko zari nk'ibihumbi bibiri zirarohama." 
Mark5:14 Abashumba bazo barahunga, iyo nkuru bayikwiza mu mujyi no mu byaro. Abaturage bahita baza kureba ibibaye ibyo ari byo." 
Mark5:15 Bageze aho Yezu ari, babona wa muntu wari warahanzweho na cya gitero nyamwinshi cy'ingabo za Satani, basanga yicaye yambaye, yagaruye ubwenge bibatera ubwoba." 
Mark5:16 Ababibonye babatekerereza ibyabaye kuri uwo muntu wari warahanzweho, n'ibyabaye kuri za ngurube." 
Mark5:17 Baherako binginga Yezu ngo abavire ku musozi. 
Mark5:18 Yezu agiye mu bwato, uwari warahanzweho aramwinginga ngo bijyanire." 
Mark5:19 Yezu ntiyamwemerera ahubwo aramubwira ati: “Subira imuhira usange bene wanyu, ubatekerereze ibyo Nyagasani yagukoreye byose n'impuhwe yakugiriye.”" 
Mark5:20 Nuko uwo muntu aragenda, atangira kwamamaza muri ako karere ka Dekapoli ibyo Yezu yamukoreye byose, abantu bose baratangara." 
Mark5:21 Hanyuma Yezu ajya mu bwato asubira hakurya. Imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu yongera guteranira aho ari, ku nkombe y'ikiyaga." 
Mark5:22 Haza umuntu witwaga Yayiro, wari umwe mu batware b'urusengero rw'Abayahudi. Abonye Yezu aramupfukamira," 
Mark5:23 aramwinginga cyane ati: “Umukobwa wanjye arenda gupfa. Ndakwinginze ngwino umurambikeho ibiganza, kugira ngo akire ye gupfa.”" 
Mark5:24 Nuko barajyana. Yezu aherekezwa n'abantu benshi bagenda bamubyiganiraho. 
Mark5:25 Muri bo hari umugore wari urwaye indwara yo kuva, ayimaranye imyaka cumi n'ibiri." 
Mark5:26 Yarababaraga cyane, biturutse no ku baganga benshi yivujeho. Ibintu bimushiraho ntibyagira icyo bimumarira, ahubwo arushaho kumererwa nabi." 
Mark5:27 Yumvise ibyo bavugaga kuri Yezu, araza aca mu kivunge cy'abantu, amuturuka inyuma akora ku mwitero we" 
Mark5:28 kuko yibwiraga ati: “Ninkora ku myambaro ye ndakira.” 
Mark5:29 Amaraso ahita akama, maze yumva mu mubiri we akize ya ndwara." 
Mark5:30 Ako kanya Yezu yiyumvamo ko hari imbaraga zimuvuyemo, arahindukira areba abantu, arababaza ati: “Ni nde ukoze ku myambaro yanjye?”" 
Mark5:31 Abigishwa be baramusubiza bati: “Dorere! Abantu barakubyiganiraho nawe ukabaza ngo ‘Ni nde unkozeho?’ ” 
Mark5:32 Yezu abararanganyamo amaso, kugira ngo arebe uwabikoze uwo ari we." 
Mark5:33 Wa mugore ashya ubwoba ahinda umushyitsi, kuko yari azi ibimaze kumubaho. Araza amwikubita imbere, amubwiza ukuri kose." 
Mark5:34 Yezu ni ko kumubwira ati: “Mwana wanjye, ukwizera kwawe kuragukijije. Genda amahoro kandi ukire icyo cyago!”" 
Mark5:35 Akivuga atyo haza intumwa zibwira wa mutware w'urusengero ziti: “Ko umukobwa wawe amaze gupfa, uraruhiriza iki umwigisha?”" 
Mark5:36 Ariko Yezu yirengagiza ibyo bavuze, abwira uwo mutware w'urusengero ati: “Witinya, nyizera gusa!”" 
Mark5:37 Nuko ntiyagira uwo akundira kujyana na we, uretse Petero, na ba bavandimwe Yakobo na Yohani." 
Mark5:38 Bageze mu rugo rw'uwo mutware w'urusengero, Yezu ahasanga urusaku rw'abarira n'abacura imiborogo." 
Mark5:39 Yinjiye mu nzu arababaza ati: “Ni iki gitumye musakuza? Murarizwa n'iki? Umwana ntiyapfuye, ahubwo arasinziriye.”" 
Mark5:40 Baramuseka cyane. Yezu ni ko guhēza abantu bose, ajyana n'ababyeyi b'umwana n'abari kumwe na we, bajya aho umwana ari." 
Mark5:41 Amufata ukuboko aramubwira ati: “Talita kumi”, ni ukuvuga ngo “Mukobwa, byuka!”" 
Mark5:42 Ako kanya uwo mukobwa arabyuka atangira kugenda, abantu barumirwa. Yari amaze imyaka cumi n'ibiri avutse." 
Mark5:43 Yezu arabihanangiriza ngo be kugira uwo bamenyesha ibibaye, kandi ababwira kugaburira uwo mwana." 
Mark6:1 Yezu ava aho ngaho ajya mu mujyi w'iwabo. Abigishwa be bajyana na we. 
Mark6:2 Isabato igeze ajya kwigishiriza mu rusengero. Abenshi bamwumvise baratangara cyane bati: “Mbese biriya byose abikomora he? Ubu bwenge yahawe ni bwenge ki? Ibi bitangaza byo abikora ate? 
Mark6:3 Mbese si we wa mubaji mwene Mariya, akaba n'umuvandimwe wa Yakobo na Yozefu, na Yuda na Simoni? Ese bashiki be bo ntiduturanye?” Ibyo bituma batamwemera." 
Mark6:4 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati: “Nta handi umuhanuzi asuzugurwa uretse mu karere k'iwabo no muri bene wabo, n'iwe mu rugo.”" 
Mark6:5 Ntiyashobora kugira igitangaza ahakorera, uretse abarwayi bamwe yakijije abarambitseho ibiganza." 
Mark6:6 Atangazwa n'uko batamwemeye. Yezu azenguruka ako karere kose yigisha, ava ku murenge ajya ku wundi." 
Mark6:7 Nuko ahamagara ba bigishwa be cumi na babiri, atangira kubatuma babiri babiri, abaha ububasha bwo kumenesha ingabo za Satani." 
Mark6:8 Arabihanangiriza ati: “Ntimugire icyo mujyana, yaba impamba cyangwa umufuka, cyangwa amafaranga mutwara mu mikandara yanyu, keretse inkoni yonyine." 
Mark6:9 Mwambare inkweto, mwambare n'ikanzu imwe ntimujyane iya kabiri." 
Mark6:10 Urugo muzabonamo icumbi, muzarugumemo kugeza igihe muzahavira." 
Mark6:11 Ahantu hose batazabakira ntibabatege amatwi, muzaveyo muhunguye umukungugu wo mu birenge byanyu, kugira ngo bibabere icyemezo cy'icyaha cyabo.”" 
Mark6:12 Nuko baragenda bajya kubwira abantu ko bagomba kwihana. 
Mark6:13 Bamenesha ingabo nyinshi za Satani zari mu bantu, basīga abarwayi benshi amavuta barabakiza." 
Mark6:14 Umwami Herodi yumva ibya Yezu, kandi koko izina rye ryari rimaze kwamamara hose. Bamwe baravugaga bati: “Ni Yohani Mubatiza wazutse! Ni cyo gituma afite ububasha bwo gukora ibitangaza.”" 
Mark6:15 Abandi bakavuga bati: “Ni Eliya.” Naho abandi bati: “Ni umuhanuzi kimwe n'abahanuzi ba kera.” 
Mark6:16 Herodi na we abyumvise aravuga ati: “Ni Yohani! Namuciye igihanga none yazutse!” 
Mark6:17 Koko kandi Herodi yari yaratumye abantu gufata Yohani, baramuboha bamushyira muri gereza, impamvu yaturutse kuri Herodiya umugore w'umuvandimwe we Filipo. Uwo mugore Herodi yari yaramutunze." 
Mark6:18 Ni cyo cyatumaga Yohani abwira Herodi ati: “Ntibyemewe ko utunga umugore w'umuvandimwe wawe.” 
Mark6:19 Kubera iyo mpamvu Herodiya arwara Yohani inzika, agashaka uko yamwicisha nyamara ntabishobore." 
Mark6:20 Herodi yatinyaga Yohani akajya amurengera, kuko yari azi ko ari intungane akaba n'umuziranenge. Yakundaga kumwumva nubwo yamubwiraga ibimubangamiye." 
Mark6:21 Nuko Herodi atumira abatware be n'abakuru b'abasirikari n'abanyacyubahiro bo muri Galileya, mu munsi mukuru wo kwibuka ivuka rye. Noneho Herodiya abona ko ari cyo gihe cyo kwihimūra." 
Mark6:22 Umukobwa we araza arabyina, binyura Herodi n'abatumirwa be. Umwami Herodi ni ko kubwira uwo mukobwa ati: “Nsaba icyo ushaka cyose ndakiguha.”" 
Mark6:23 Ndetse aramurahira ati: “Icyo unsaba cyose ndakiguha, naho cyaba ari kimwe cya kabiri cy'igihugu cyanjye.”" 
Mark6:24 Nuko uwo mukobwa arasohoka, abaza nyina ati: “Nsabe iki?” Undi ati: “Saba igihanga cya Yohani Mubatiza.”" 
Mark6:25 Ako kanya uwo mukobwa ariruka asanga umwami ati: “Ndashaka ko mumpa igihanga cya Yohani Mubatiza, mukakimpa nonaha ku mbehe.”" 
Mark6:26 Umwami agira agahinda kenshi, nyamara kubera ko yari yabirahiriye imbere y'abatumirwa be yanga kukimwima." 
Mark6:27 Ako kanya yohereza umusirikari, amutegeka kuzana igihanga cya Yohani. Uwo musirikari ajya muri gereza, aca Yohani igihanga" 
Mark6:28 akizana ku mbehe. Agiha uwo mukobwa, na we agishyikiriza nyina." 
Mark6:29 Abigishwa ba Yohani bumvise ibyabaye, baraza bajyana umurambo we bawushyingura mu mva." 
Mark6:30 Nuko Intumwa za Yezu zigaruka aho ari, zimutekerereza ibyo zakoze n'ibyo zigishije byose." 
Mark6:31 Arazibwira ati: “Nimuze tujye kwiherera ahantu hadatuwe muruhuke ho gato”, kuko abantu bari benshi cyane ari urujya n'uruza, bigatuma batabona n'uko bafungura." 
Mark6:32 Nuko bajya mu bwato bajya kwiherera ahantu hadatuwe. 
Mark6:33 Benshi mu bababonye bagenda barabamenya. Nuko bava mu mijyi yaho yose, bariruka banyura iy'ubutaka, babatanga kuhagera." 
Mark6:34 Yezu ageze imusozi abona iyo mbaga y'abantu abagirira impuhwe, kuko bari bameze nk'intama zitagira umushumba. Nuko atangira kubigisha byinshi." 
Mark6:35 Umunsi ukuze abigishwa be baramwegera, baramubwira bati: “Aha hantu ntihatuwe kandi dore burije." 
Mark6:36 Sezerera aba bantu bajye mu mihana no mu nsisiro za bugufi, bihahire ibyo barya.”" 
Mark6:37 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Ahubwo mube ari mwe mubafungurira.” Baramubaza bati: “Mbese uragira ngo dutange ay'igihembo cy'imibyizi magana abiri, tubagurire imigati yo kurya?”" 
Mark6:38 Na we arababaza ati: “Mufite imigati ingahe? Nimujye kureba.” Bamaze kubimenya baramubwira bati: “Hari itanu n'amafi abiri.” 
Mark6:39 Nuko abategeka kwicaza abantu mu byatsi bitoshye, biremyemo amatsinda." 
Mark6:40 Bicara mu matsinda, rimwe ijana, irindi mirongo itanu, bityo bityo." 
Mark6:41 Afata iyo migati itanu n'amafi abiri, areba ku ijuru, ashimira Imana. Nuko amanyura iyo migati, ayiha abigishwa be, na bo bayikwiza abantu. N'amafi abiri ayagabanya abantu bose." 
Mark6:42 Nuko bose bararya barahaga. 
Mark6:43 Bateranya utumanyu tw'imigati n'utw'amafi twasigaye, twose twuzura inkangara cumi n'ebyiri." 
Mark6:44 Mu bariye, abagabo bonyine bari ibihumbi bitanu." 
Mark6:45 Bikirangira Yezu ategeka abigishwa be kujya mu bwato, kugira ngo bamubanzirize kugera hakurya i Betsayida, mu gihe agisezerera iyo mbaga y'abantu." 
Mark6:46 Amaze kubasezerera azamuka umusozi ajya gusenga. 
Mark6:47 Bumaze kwira ubwato bwari bugeze mu kiyaga hagati, naho Yezu yasigaye imusozi wenyine." 
Mark6:48 Abonye ko bagashya bibaruhije kuko umuyaga wabaturukaga imbere, bujya gucya Yezu aza abagana agenda ku mazi, asa n'ushaka kubanyuraho." 
Mark6:49 Bamubonye agenda ku mazi bakeka ko ari umuzimu bavuza induru," 
Mark6:50 kuko bose bamubonye bagakuka umutima cyane. Ako kanya Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimuhumure ni jye, mwigira ubwoba!”" 
Mark6:51 Abasanga mu bwato umuyaga urahosha, abigishwa be barumirwa." 
Mark6:52 N'igihe yatuburaga imigati ntibari basobanukiwe icyo bivuga, kuko imitima yabo yari ihumye." 
Mark6:53 Bamaze gufata hakurya mu ntara ya Genezareti, bazirika ubwato." 
Mark6:54 Bakibuvamo abantu babona Yezu baramumenya. 
Mark6:55 Bagenda bihuta bakwiza inkuru muri ako karere kose. Abantu bumvise aho Yezu ari, bahita baheka abarwayi babo barabamushyīra." 
Mark6:56 Byongeye kandi aho yahingukaga hose, ari mu byaro, ari mu mijyi, ari no mu misozi bashyiraga abarwayi ahagaragara, bakamwinginga ngo byibura bakore ku ncunda z'umwitero we, abazikozeho bose bagakira." 
Mark7:1 Abafarizayi na bamwe mu bigishamategeko baturutse i Yeruzalemu bakikiza Yezu. 
Mark7:2 Babona bamwe mu bigishwa be barisha intoki zanduye, ni ukuvuga badakarabye." 
Mark7:3 Koko kandi Abafarizayi kimwe n'abandi Bayahudi bose, ntabwo barya batabanje gukaraba intoki babyitondeye, bakurikiza umuco wa ba sekuruza." 
Mark7:4 N'iyo bavuye mu isoko, ntabwo barya batabanje kwitera amazi. Bafite n'indi mihango baziririza basigiwe na ba sekuruza, nk'iyo koza ibikombe n'ibibindi n'inzabya z'umuringa [n'ibitanda] babihumanura." 
Mark7:5 Noneho Abafarizayi n'abigishamategeko babaza Yezu bati: “Kuki abigishwa bawe batubahiriza umuhango wa ba sogokuruza, bakarya badakarabye?”" 
Mark7:6 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Mwa ndyarya mwe, Ezayi yabahanuye uko muri nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: ‘Aba bantu bampoza ku rurimi, ariko imitima yabo imba kure." 
Mark7:7 Barushywa n'ubusa bansenga, kuko inyigisho bigisha ari amategeko y'abantu gusa.’ ”" 
Mark7:8 Yezu arakomeza ati: “Amategeko y'Imana muyarengaho, mukihambira ku mihango y'abantu." 
Mark7:9 Mwihatira kwirengagiza ibyo Imana yategetse, kugira ngo mukurikize imihango yanyu." 
Mark7:10 Musa yaravuze ati: ‘Ujye wubaha so na nyoko’, kandi ati: ‘Uzatuka se cyangwa nyina azicwe.’" 
Mark7:11 Naho mwebwe muvuga ko umuntu ashobora kubwira se cyangwa nyina ati: ‘Icyo najyaga kugufashisha ni “Korubani” (ni ukuvuga ituro ryagenewe Imana)’. 
Mark7:12 Bityo mukaba mutakimukundiye kugifashisha se cyangwa nyina," 
Mark7:13 mukaba muhinduye ubusa Amategeko y'Imana kubera imihango yababayemo akarande. Hariho kandi n'ibindi byinshi bene nk'ibyo mukora.” 
Mark7:14 Nuko Yezu yongera guhamagara rubanda arababwira ati: “Nimuntege amatwi mwese kandi musobanukirwe ibi: 
Mark7:15 nta cyinjira mu muntu kivuye inyuma cyamuhumanya. Ahubwo ikiva mu muntu ni cyo kimuhumanya. [ 
Mark7:16 Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve!]”
