John11:40 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Mbese sinakubwiye ko nunyizera uri bwibonere ikuzo ry'Imana?” 
John11:41 Nuko bavanaho ibuye maze Yezu areba hejuru aravuga ati: “Data, ngushimiye yuko wanyumvise." 
John11:42 Jyewe nsanzwe nzi ko unyumva iteka, ariko ibyo mbivuze kubera rubanda bankikije kugira ngo bemere ko ari wowe wantumye.”" 
John11:43 Amaze kuvuga atyo arangurura ijwi ahamagara ati: “Lazaro, sohoka!”" 
John11:44 Nuko uwari warapfuye arasohoka, amaguru n'amaboko bihambiriwe n'udutambaro, no mu maso he hapfutswe igitambaro. Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimumuhambure mureke agende.”" 
John11:45 Benshi mu Bayahudi bari baje gusura Mariya, babonye ibyo Yezu akoze baramwemera." 
John11:46 Ariko bamwe muri bo basanga Abafarizayi, babatekerereza ibyo Yezu yakoze." 
John11:47 Nuko abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi bakoranya urukiko rw'ikirenga, baravuga bati: “Tubigenje dute ko uyu muntu agumya gukora ibitangaza byinshi?" 
John11:48 Nitumwihorera agakomeza atyo abantu bose bazamwemera, bitume Abanyaroma baza bigarurire Ingoro y'Imana n'igihugu cyacu.”" 
John11:49 Umwe muri bo witwa Kayifa wari Umutambyi mukuru uwo mwaka arababwira ati: “Burya koko nta cyo muzi! 
John11:50 Ntimuriyumvisha ko icyababera cyiza ari uko umuntu umwe apfira rubanda, aho gutuma ubwoko bwose burimbuka?”" 
John11:51 Ibyo ntiyabivuze abyihangiye, ahubwo kuko yari Umutambyi mukuru uwo mwaka yahanuye ko Yezu agiye kuzapfira ubwoko bw'Abayahudi," 
John11:52 kandi si ubwo bwoko bwonyine ahubwo ngo anahurize hamwe abana b'Imana bari hirya no hino ku isi. 
John11:53 Kuva uwo munsi biyemeza kumwica. 
John11:54 Ni cyo cyatumye Yezu atongera kugaragara muri bo. Ahubwo yigira mu mujyi witwa Efurayimu uri hafi y'akarere kadatuwe, ahagumana n'abigishwa be." 
John11:55 Umunsi mukuru wa Pasika y'Abayahudi wari wegereje, bityo abantu benshi bajya i Yeruzalemu mbere y'uwo munsi kugira ngo bakore umuhango wo kwihumanura." 
John11:56 Babuze Yezu abari mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana barabazanya bati: “Murabitekerezaho iki? Mbese ntazaza mu minsi mikuru?” 
John11:57 Ubwo abakuru bo mu batambyi n'Abafarizayi bakaba bategetse ko hagize uwamenya aho Yezu aherereye, yababwira kugira ngo bamufate." 
John12:1 Hasigaye iminsi itandatu umunsi mukuru wa Pasika y'Abayahudi ukaba, Yezu ajya i Betaniya iwabo wa Lazaro, uwo yari yarazuye mu bapfuye." 
John12:2 Baramuzimanira. Marita yaraherezaga naho Lazaro yicaranye n'abatumirwa. 
John12:3 Mariya afata nk'inusu ya litiro y'amarashi ahumura neza yitwa naridi, amininnye kandi ahenda cyane, ayasīga Yezu ku birenge abihanaguza umusatsi we, maze inzu yose yuzura impumuro y'ayo marashi." 
John12:4 Nuko Yuda Isikariyoti umwe mu bigishwa ba Yezu ari we wari ugiye kuzamugambanira, arabaza ati:" 
John12:5 “Kuki aya marashi batayaguze amafaranga ngo bayahe abakene, ko yari kuvamo ahwanye n'igihembo cy'imibyizi magana atatu?”" 
John12:6 Ntiyavugaga atyo abitewe no kwita ku bakene, ahubwo ni uko yari igisambo kandi ari we ushinzwe umufuka w'amafaranga, akajya ayanyereza." 
John12:7 Yezu ni ko kuvuga ati: “Mwihorere, yateganyirije ibyo afite umunsi w'ihambwa ryanjye." 
John12:8 Abakene bo murahorana naho jye ntituzahorana.” 
John12:9 Abayahudi benshi cyane bamenye ko Yezu ari i Betaniya, bajyayo atari ugushaka kubona Yezu gusa, ahubwo ngo babone na Lazaro uwo yari yarazuye." 
John12:10 Nuko kuva ubwo abakuru bo mu batambyi bafata icyemezo cyo kwica na Lazaro," 
John12:11 kuko yatumaga Abayahudi benshi babacikaho bakemera Yezu. 
John12:12 Bukeye imbaga y'abantu bari baje mu minsi mikuru ya Pasika bamenya ko Yezu ari bugere i Yeruzalemu. 
John12:13 Nuko bafata amashami y'imikindo bajya kumusanganira, bavuga baranguruye bati: “Hozana! Hasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani! Hasingizwe Umwami w'Abisiraheli!”" 
John12:14 Yezu abonye icyana cy'indogobe, acyicaraho nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo:" 
John12:15 “Mwitinya, baturage b'i Siyoni! Dore umwami wanyu araje, ahetswe n'icyana cy'indogobe!”" 
John12:16 Ibyo abigishwa be ntibahita babisobanukirwa, ariko Yezu amaze kuzuka agahabwa ikuzo, ni bwo bibutse ko Ibyanditswe bimwerekeyeho ari ko byavugaga kandi ko ari ko abantu bamugenje." 
John12:17 Ba bantu benshi bari kumwe na Yezu igihe yahamagaraga Lazaro ngo ave mu mva akamuzura, bari bagihamya ibyo babonye." 
John12:18 Rubanda baramusanganira, kuko bari bumvise ko yakoze icyo gitangaza kiranga ibye." 
John12:19 Nuko Abafarizayi baravugana bati: “Murabona ko ibi byose nta cyo bizatugezaho. Dore abantu bose baramuyobotse!” 
John12:20 Mu bari baje i Yeruzalemu gusenga mu minsi mikuru harimo n'abanyamahanga. 
John12:21 Begera Filipo wari uw'i Betsayida ho muri Galileya baramubwira bati: “Mutware, turifuza kubona Yezu.”" 
John12:22 Filipo ajya kubibwira Andereya, maze bombi bajya kubibwira Yezu." 
John12:23 Yezu arababwira ati: “Igihe kirageze kugira ngo Umwana w'umuntu ahabwe ikuzo. 
John12:24 Ndababwira nkomeje ko iyo akabuto k'ingano kadatewe mu gitaka ngo gapfe kagumaho konyine, ariko iyo gapfuye ni ho kera imbuto nyinshi." 
John12:25 Ukunda ubuzima bwe azabubura, naho utihambira ku buzima bwe muri iyi si azaburindira ubugingo buhoraho." 
John12:26 Unkorera wese agomba kunkurikira, kugira ngo aho nzaba ndi na we azabeyo, kandi unkorera wese Data azamwubahiriza." 
John12:27 “Ubu umutima wanjye urahagaze – mvuge iki kandi? Ese nsabe nti: ‘Data, nkiza urwa none?’ Nyamara kandi ni cyo cyanzanye." 
John12:28 Ahubwo ndasaba nti: ‘Data, iheshe ikuzo!’ ” Nuko humvikana ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru ati: “Maze kuryihesha kandi nzongera ndyiheshe.”" 
John12:29 Bamwe muri rubanda bari aho bumvise iryo jwi baravuga bati: “Ni inkuba!” Abandi bati: “Ni umumarayika uvuganye na we.” 
John12:30 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Iryo jwi si jye rigenewe ahubwo ni mwebwe. 
John12:31 Ubu igihe cyo gucira ab'isi urubanza kirageze, ubu umutware w'iyi si agiye kuzameneshwa." 
John12:32 Nanjye ninshyirwa hejuru y'isi nzikururiraho abantu bose.” 
John12:33 Ibyo Yezu yabivugiraga kwerekana urupfu yari agiye gupfa urwo ari rwo. 
John12:34 Noneho rubanda baramubwira bati: “Twumvise mu gitabo cy'Amategeko ko Kristo ahoraho ibihe byose. None se uvuga ute ko Umwana w'umuntu azagomba gushyirwa hejuru? Mbese uwo Mwana w'umuntu ni nde?” 
John12:35 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati: “Urumuri muracyarufite akanya gato, nimugende mukirufite kugira ngo umwijima utabatungura, kuko ugenda mu mwijima atamenya iyo ajya." 
John12:36 Umwanya mugifite urumuri nimurwizere mube abantu bayoborwa n'urumuri.” Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo, arigendera arabihisha." 
John12:37 Nubwo Abayahudi bari barabonye akora ibyo bitangaza byose bimuranga, ntabwo bamwemeye" 
John12:38 bityo biba nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi Ezayi ngo: “Nyagasani, ni nde wemeye ibyo yatwumvanye? Kandi ni nde wahishuriwe ukuboko kwa Nyagasani?”" 
John12:39 Ntibashoboraga kubyemera nk'uko Ezayi yongeye kuvuga ati: 
John12:40 “Imana yabahumye amaso, ibanangira imitima, kugira ngo be kubona, kandi be gusobanukirwa, batava aho bangarukira nkabakiza.”" 
John12:41 Ezayi yavuze ibyo ngibyo kuko yeretswe ikuzo rya Yezu, akaba ari we avuga." 
John12:42 No mu batware b'Abayahudi benshi baramwemeraga, nyamara ntibabivuge ku mugaragaro kugira ngo Abafarizayi batabaca mu rusengero," 
John12:43 kuko bahitagamo gushimwa n'abantu kuruta gushimwa n'Imana. 
John12:44 Yezu avuga aranguruye ati: “Unyemera si jye aba yemeye gusa, ahubwo aba yemeye n'Uwantumye." 
John12:45 Kandi n'umbonye aba abonye n'Uwantumye. 
John12:46 Naje kuba urumuri rw'isi, kugira ngo unyemera wese ataguma mu mwijima." 
John12:47 Kandi umuntu wese wumva amagambo yanjye ntayakurikize si jye umucira urubanza. Sinazanywe no gucira abantu urubanza ahubwo nazanywe no kubakiza. 
John12:48 Umpinyura ntiyakire n'amagambo yanjye afite ikimucira urubanza: amagambo navuze ni yo azamucira urubanza ku munsi w'imperuka. 
John12:49 Erega sinavuze ibyo nihangiye, ahubwo Data wantumye ni we wantegetse icyo ngomba kuvuga n'icyo ngomba gutangaza." 
John12:50 Nzi yuko amategeko ye ageza ku bugingo buhoraho. Nuko rero ibyo Data yambwiye ni byo mvuga.” 
John13:1 Hari ku munsi ubanziriza Pasika y'Abayahudi. Yezu yari azi ko igihe kigeze cyo kuva kuri iyi si agasubira kwa Se. Nk'uko yari asanzwe akunda abe bari ku isi, ni ko yakomeje kubakunda byimazeyo." 
John13:2 Nimugoroba Yezu n'abigishwa be bari ku meza bafungura. Satani yari yamaze kwemeza Yuda Isikariyoti mwene Simoni kumugambanira. 
John13:3 Yezu yari azi ko Se yamweguriye ibintu byose kandi ko yaturutse ku Mana, akazasubira ku Mana." 
John13:4 Ni ko kuva ku meza, avanamo umwitero maze afata igitambaro aragikenyera." 
John13:5 Asuka amazi ku ibesani atangira koza abigishwa be ibirenge, no kubahanaguza cya gitambaro yari akenyeje." 
John13:6 Ageze kuri Simoni Petero we ahita amubaza ati: “Nyagasani, ni wowe ugiye kunyoza ibirenge?”" 
John13:7 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Nturamenya icyo nkora ariko uzakimenya hanyuma.” 
John13:8 Petero ati: “Reka da, ntuzigera unyoza ibirenge!” Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Nintakoza ibirenge nta cyo turi bube tugihuriyeho.”" 
John13:9 Simoni Petero ati: “Noneho rero Nyagasani, ntunyoze ibirenge gusa ahubwo unyuhagire n'ibiganza no mu mutwe!”" 
John13:10 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Uwiyuhagiye umubiri wose ntakeneye gusubira kwiyuhagira, keretse koga ibirenge kuko aba atunganye rwose. Kandi koko muratunganye, nyamara si mwese.”" 
John13:11 Yari azi uri bumugambanire, ni yo mpamvu yavuze ati: “Ntimutunganye mwese.”" 
John13:12 Yezu amaze kuboza ibirenge asubizamo umwitero we asubira ku meza. Nuko arababaza ati: “Aho musobanukiwe ibyo maze kubagirira? 
John13:13 Munyita Umwigisha na Shobuja kandi ntimwibeshya kuko ari ko biri. 
John13:14 Ubwo rero mbogeje ibirenge, ndi Shobuja n'Umwigisha wanyu namwe mugomba kubyozanya." 
John13:15 Mbahaye urugero ngo mujye mukora nk'uko mbagiriye. 
John13:16 Ndababwira nkomeje ko nta mugaragu uruta shebuja, kandi ko nta ntumwa iruta uwayitumye." 
John13:17 Ubwo mumenye ibyo muzaba muhiriwe nimubikurikiza. 
John13:18 “Si mwebwe mwese mvuga kuko nzi abo natoranyije. Ariko ni ngombwa ko ibi Byanditswe biba ngo: ‘Uwo dusangira ni we umpindutse’. 
John13:19 Igitumye mbibabwira bitaraba ni ukugira ngo igihe bizaba bibaye muzemere uwo ndi we. 
John13:20 Ndababwira nkomeje ko uwakiriye uwo ntumye ari jye azaba yakiriye, kandi unyakiriye aba yakiriye Uwantumye.”" 
John13:21 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo ni ko gushenguka maze avuga yeruye ati: “Ndababwira nkomeje ko umwe muri mwe agiye kungambanira.” 
John13:22 Abigishwa be barebana bumiwe, bayoberwa uwo avuze uwo ari we." 
John13:23 Umwe muri bo, uwo Yezu yakundaga cyane yari hafi ye." 
John13:24 Simoni Petero amucira amarenga ati: “Mubaze uwo avuze uwo ari we.” 
John13:25 Uwo mwigishwa yegama mu gituza cya Yezu aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani, uwo uvuze ni nde?”" 
John13:26 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Uwo mpereza ikimanyu cy'umugati ngiye gukoza mu burisho ni we uwo.” Nuko afata ikimanyu agikozamo, agihereza Yuda Isikariyoti mwene Simoni." 
John13:27 Yuda amaze guhabwa icyo kimanyu ni bwo Satani yamwinjiyemo. Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati: “Icyo ukora gikore bwangu.” 
John13:28 Ariko nta n'umwe mu basangiraga na we wamenye icyatumye amubwira atyo. 
John13:29 Kubera ko Yuda yari umubitsi w'amafaranga, bamwe batekereje ko Yezu amubwiye kugura ibyo bakeneye by'umunsi mukuru, cyangwa kugira icyo aha abakene." 
John13:30 Yuda akimara kwakira cya kimanyu ako kanya arasohoka. Icyo gihe hari nijoro. 
John13:31 Yuda amaze gusohoka Yezu aravuga ati: “Ubu Umwana w'umuntu ahawe ikuzo kandi ahesheje Imana ikuzo. 
John13:32 Kandi ubwo ahesheje Imana ikuzo, na yo izamuha ku ikuzo ryayo bwite kandi izabikora bidatinze." 
John13:33 Bana banjye, ndacyari kumwe namwe akanya gato. Ariko nk'uko nabwiye Abayahudi namwe ni ko mbabwira: muzanshaka nyamara aho ngiye ntimuzashobora kuhagera." 
John13:34 Mbahaye itegeko rishya ngo mukundane. Nk'uko nabakunze abe ari ko namwe mukundana. 
John13:35 Icyo bose bazamenyeraho ko muri abigishwa banjye ni uko bazabona mukundana.” 
John13:36 Simoni Petero aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani, ugiye he?” Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Aho ngiye ntushobora kuhankurikira ubu, ariko uzahankurikira mu gihe kizaza.”" 
John13:37 Petero aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani, nabuzwa n'iki kugukurikira ubu? No kugupfira nabyemera!”" 
John13:38 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Aho wakwemera kumpfira koko? Ndakubwira nkomeje ko inkoko itari bubike utaranyihakana gatatu.” 
John14:1 Yezu arababwira ati: “Ntimuhagarike imitima. Mwizere Imana nanjye munyizere. 
John14:2 Mu rugo rwa Data harimo amazu menshi. Iyo bitaba bityo simba narababwiye ko ngiye kubategurira umwanya. 
John14:3 Nuko rero ningenda nkamara kuwubategurira, nzagaruka mbajyaneyo kugira ngo aho ndi namwe muzabeyo." 
John14:4 Aho njya, inzira ijyayo murayizi.”" 
John14:5 Tomasi aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani, ko tutazi aho ugiye inzira yo twayibwirwa n'iki?”" 
John14:6 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ni jye nzira n'ukuri n'ubugingo. Ntawe ujya kwa Data atanyuze kuri jye. 
John14:7 Ubwo munzi na Data muzamumenya. Ndetse kuva ubu muramuzi kandi mwaramubonye.” 
John14:8 Filipo aramubwira ati: “Nyagasani, twereke So biraba bihagije.”" 
John14:9 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Filipo we, nabanye namwe igihe kingana gitya none ukaba utanzi! Umbonye aba abonye na Data. None wavuga ute ngo nimbereke Data?" 
John14:10 Mbese ntiwemera ko ndi muri Data kandi na Data akaba ari muri jye? Ibyo mbabwira si ibyo nihangira, ahubwo Data uba muri jye ni we ukora umurimo we." 
John14:11 Nimwemere ibyo mbabwira, ko ndi muri Data na Data akaba ari muri jye. Nibura mubyemezwe n'ibyo mubona nkora." 
John14:12 Ndababwira nkomeje ko unyizera, ibyo nkora na we azabikora ndetse azakora n'ibibiruta, kuko ngiye kwa Data." 
John14:13 Icyo muzasaba cyose mu izina ryanjye nzagikora, kugira ngo ikuzo rya Data ryerekanirwe mu Mwana we." 
John14:14 Nimugira icyo munsaba cyose mu izina ryanjye nzagikora. 
John14:15 “Nimunkunda muzakurikiza amategeko yanjye. 
John14:16 Nanjye nzasaba Data kubaha undi Mujyanama kugira ngo agumane namwe iteka. 
John14:17 Uwo ni we Mwuka w'ukuri. Ab'isi ntibabasha kumwakira kuko batamureba ntibanamumenye. Naho mwebweho muramuzi kuko ari kumwe namwe kandi azaba muri mwe. 
John14:18 “Sinzabasiga mwenyine nk'impfubyi, nzagaruka mbasange." 
John14:19 Hasigaye umwanya muto ab'isi ntibabe bakimbona, ariko mwebweho muzambona. Kuko ndiho namwe muzabaho." 
John14:20 Uwo munsi muzamenya ko ndi muri Data kandi namwe mukaba muri jye, nk'uko nanjye ndi muri mwe." 
John14:21 “Uwemera amategeko yanjye, akayakurikiza, uwo ni we unkunda kandi unkunda azakundwa na Data, nanjye nzamukunda kandi nzamwiyereka.”" 
John14:22 Yuda (utari Isikariyoti) aramubaza ati: “Nyagasani, kuki uzatwiyereka twenyine ntiwiyereke rubanda rwose?”" 
John14:23 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Unkunda wese azakurikiza ibyo mvuga, na Data azamukunda maze tumusange tugumane na we." 
John14:24 Utankunda ntakurikiza ibyo mvuga, kandi rero amagambo mwumva mvuga si ayanjye, ahubwo ni aya Data wantumye." 
John14:25 “Ibyo mbibabwiye nkiri hamwe namwe. 
John14:26 Ariko wa Mujyanama ari we Mwuka Muziranenge Data azohereza mu izina ryanjye, ni we uzabigisha byose kandi azabibutsa ibyo nababwiye byose." 
John14:27 “Mbasigiye amahoro, amahoro yanjye ni yo mbahaye. Sinyabahaye nk'uko ab'isi bayatanga. Ntimuhagarike imitima kandi ntimugire ubwoba." 
John14:28 Mwumvise ko nababwiye nti: ‘Ndagiye kandi nzagaruka mbasange.’ Iyaba mwankundaga mwakwishimiye ko ngiye kwa Data, kuko Data anduta." 
John14:29 Ibyo mbaye mbibabwiye bitaraba, kugira ngo nibiba muzanyemere." 
John14:30 Nta gihe ngifite cyo kuvugana namwe byinshi kuko umutware w'iyi si aje, icyakora nta bushobozi amfiteho." 
John14:31 Nyamara ab'isi bagomba kumenya ko nkunda Data kandi ngakora byose nk'uko yabintegetse “Nimuhaguruke, tuve hano.”" 
John15:1 “Ni jye muzabibu w'ukuri kandi Data ni we uwuhingira. 
John15:2 Ishami ryose ryo kuri jye ritera arivanaho, naho iryera ryose ararikaragira ngo ribe risukuye rirusheho kurumbuka." 
John15:3 Namwe mumaze gusukurwa n'ibyo nababwiye. 
John15:4 Nimugume kuri jye nanjye ngume muri mwe. Nk'uko ishami ubwaryo ritabasha kwera ridafashe ku muzabibu, ni ko namwe mutabasha gukora ibyiza mutagumye kuri jye." 
John15:5 “Ni jye muzabibu namwe muri amashami. Uguma kuri jye nanjye nkaguma muri we, uwo ni we wera imbuto nyinshi kuko ari nta cyo mubasha gukora mudafashe kuri jye." 
John15:6 Utaguma kuri jye ajugunywa kure akuma nk'ishami. Amashami nk'ayo barayasakuma bakayashyira mu muriro agakongoka. 
John15:7 Nimuguma kuri jye, n'amagambo yanjye agahora muri mwe, musabe icyo mushaka cyose muzagihabwa." 
John15:8 Igihesha Data ikuzo ni uko mwera imbuto nyinshi, ni bwo muzaba abigishwa banjye." 
John15:9 Uko Data yankunze, ni ko nanjye nabakunze, nimugume mu rukundo rwanjye." 
John15:10 Nimukurikiza amategeko yanjye muzaguma mu rukundo rwanjye, nk'uko nanjye nakurikije amategeko ya Data nkaguma mu rukundo rwe." 
John15:11 “Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo ibyishimo byanjye bibe muri mwe, kandi n'ibyishimo byanyu bibe bisesuye." 
John15:12 Ngiri itegeko ryanjye: mukundane nk'uko nabakunze. 
John15:13 Nta wagira urukundo ruruta urw'umuntu upfira incuti ze. 
John15:14 Mwe muri incuti zanjye niba mukora ibyo mbategeka. 
John15:15 Sinkibita abagaragu kuko umugaragu atamenya ibyo shebuja akora. Ahubwo nabise incuti kuko nabamenyesheje ibyo Data yambwiye byose. 
John15:16 Si mwe mwantoranyije, ahubwo ni jye wabatoranyije, mbatuma kujya kwera imbuto kandi ngo izo mbuto zanyu zigumeho, kugira ngo icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye azakibahe." 
John15:17 Icyo mbategetse rero ni ugukundana. 
John15:18 “Ab'isi nibabanga mumenye ko ari jye babanje kwanga. 
John15:19 Iyo muba ab'isi, bari kubakunda nk'uko bakunda ababo. Ariko ntimuri ab'isi ahubwo narabatoranyije mbatandukanya na bo, ni cyo gituma babanga." 
John15:20 Mwibuke iri jambo nababwiye nti; ‘Nta mugaragu uruta shebuja.’ Ubwo bantoteje bazabatoteza namwe. Niba barakurikije inyigisho zanjye n'izanyu bazazikurikiza. 
John15:21 Ariko ibyo byose bazabibagirira babampōra kuko batazi Uwantumye. 
John15:22 Iyo ntaza ngo mvugane na bo nta cyaha bajyaga kugira, naho ubu ngubu ntibafite icyo kwireguza." 
John15:23 Unyanga aba yanze na Data. 
John15:24 Iyo ntakorera muri bo ibitigeze bikorwa n'undi muntu wese nta cyaha bajyaga kugira, ariko none babonye ibyo nakoze kandi basigaye batwanga jye na Data." 
John15:25 Nyamara byagenze bityo kugira ngo bibe nk'uko byanditswe mu gitabo cy'Amategeko yabo ngo: ‘Banyanze ari nta mpamvu.’ 
John15:26 “Wa Mujyanama azaza, ni we Mwuka w'ukuri ukomoka kuri Data. Nimuboherereza muhawe na Data, azaba umugabo wo guhamya ibyanjye." 
John15:27 Namwe kandi muzambera abagabo kuko turi kumwe uhereye mbere na mbere. 
John16:1 “Ibyo nabibabwiriye kugira ngo hatagira ikibacogoza. 
John16:2 Bazabaca mu nsengero zabo, ndetse hagiye kuzaza igihe ubwo uzabica wese azibwira ko akorera Imana." 
John16:3 Bazabagirira batyo kuko batamenye Data, nanjye ntibamenye." 
John16:4 Ariko ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo igihe nikigera muzibuke ko nabibamenyesheje. “Icyatumye ntabibabwira mbere ni uko nari nkiri kumwe namwe. 
John16:5 Ariko ubu ngiye gusanga Uwantumye, kandi rero muri mwe ntawe umbaza ati: ‘Urajya he?’" 
John16:6 None ishavu rirabashengura kuko maze kubibabwira. 
John16:7 Nyamara ndababwira ukuri: icyabagirira akamaro ni uko ngenda, kuko nintagenda wa Mujyanama atazaza muri mwe, ariko ningenda nzamuboherereza." 
John16:8 Kandi naza azemeza ab'isi ko batsinzwe ku byerekeye icyaha cyabo no ku byerekeye gutunganira Imana, no ku byerekeye urubanza." 
John16:9 Azabemeza ibyerekeye icyaha cyabo kuko batanyemeye. 
John16:10 Azabemeza ibyerekeye gutunganira Imana kuko ngiye kwa Data mukaba mutakimbonye. 
John16:11 Azabemeza ibyerekeye urubanza kuko umutware w'iyi si yamaze kurucirwa. 
John16:12 “Ndacyafite byinshi nababwira ariko ubu ntimwabasha kubyihanganira. 
John16:13 Mwuka werekana ukuri naza azabayobora mu kuri kose, kuko atazavuga ibyo yihangiye, ahubwo azavuga ibyo azaba yumvise kandi azanabamenyesha ibizaza." 
John16:14 Azanyubahiriza kuko azahabwa ku byanjye akabibamenyesha. 
John16:15 Ibyo Data afite byose ni ibyanjye, ni cyo gitumye mbabwira nti: ‘Mwuka azahabwa ku byanjye maze abibamenyeshe’." 
John16:16 “Hasigaye igihe gito mwe kumbona hanyuma mu kindi gihe gito mukazambona.” 
John16:17 Nuko bamwe mu bigishwa be barabazanya bati: “Ibyo se ni ibiki atubwiye ngo hasigaye igihe gito twe kumubona hanyuma mu kindi gihe gito tukazamubona, kandi ngo kuko agiye kwa Se?”" 
John16:18 Bati: “Icyo ‘gihe gito’ ni ukuvuga iki? Ntituzi icyo ashaka kuvuga.” 
John16:19 Yezu amenye ko bashaka kumubaza ni ko kugira ati: “Ese murabazanya kuri iryo jambo navuze nti: ‘Hasigaye igihe gito mwe kumbona hanyuma mu kindi gihe gito mukazambona?’ 
John16:20 Ndababwira nkomeje ko muzarira muboroge, naho ab'isi bo bazishima. Muzababara ariko akababaro kanyu kazahinduka ibyishimo." 
John16:21 Iyo umugore aramukwa arababara kuko agejeje igihe, ariko yamara kubyara ntabe acyibuka uburibwe kubera ibyishimo, kuko isi iba yungutse umuntu." 
John16:22 Namwe ubu murababaye koko, ariko nzongera kubabona, maze ibyishimo bibasābe mu mutima kandi ntawe uzabibavutsa." 
John16:23 “Uwo munsi nugera nta cyo muzaba mukinsiganuza. Ndababwira nkomeje ko icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye azakibaha. 
John16:24 Kugeza ubu nta cyo mwigeze musaba mu izina ryanjye. Musabe muzahabwa kugira ngo ibyishimo byanyu bisendere. 
John16:25 “Ibyo mbibabwiye mu marenga. Igihe kizaza ubwo ntazongera kubabwira mu marenga, ahubwo nzabamenyesha ibya Data neruye." 
John16:26 Uwo munsi muzamwambaza mu izina ryanjye. Simvuze ko nzabavuganira kuri Data. 
John16:27 Erega Data ubwe asanzwe abakunda, kuko munkunda mukaba mwaremeye ko navuye ku Mana!" 
John16:28 Naturutse kwa Data nza ku isi, kandi ubu ngiye kuva ku isi nsubire kwa Data.”" 
John16:29 Abigishwa be baramubwira bati: “Dore noneho utubwiye weruye utaducira amarenga. 
John16:30 Ubu tumenye yuko uzi byose kandi ntukeneye ko hari uwagira icyo akubaza. Kubera ibyo twemera ko wavuye ku Mana.” 
John16:31 Yezu arababwira ati: “Noneho murashyize muranyemeye! 
John16:32 Ariko igihe kigiye kuza ndetse kirageze, ubwo mwese muri butatane umuntu wese akajya ukwe maze mukansiga jyenyine. Nyamara sindi jyenyine kuko ndi kumwe na Data." 
John16:33 Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo mugire amahoro mukomora kuri jye. Ku isi muzagira amakuba, ariko nimuhumure isi narayitsinze!”" 
John17:1 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo, yubura amaso areba ku ijuru aravuga ati: “Data, igihe kirageze. Hesha Umwana wawe ikuzo kugira ngo na we aguheshe ikuzo." 
John17:2 Wamuhaye ububasha ku bantu bose, ni ukugira ngo abo wamuhaye bose abaheshe ubugingo buhoraho." 
John17:3 Kandi ubugingo buhoraho ngubu: ni uko bakumenya wowe Mana y'ukuri wenyine bakamenya n'uwo watumye Yezu Kristo. 
John17:4 Naguhesheje ikuzo ku isi ndangiza umurimo wampaye gukora. 
John17:5 Noneho Data, umpe kubana nawe mfite rya kuzo twari dusangiye isi itararemwa." 
John17:6 “Abantu wampaye ubakuye mu b'isi nabagaragarije uwo uri we. Bari abawe maze urabampa kandi bakurikije ijambo ryawe. 
John17:7 None bazi ko ibyo wampaye byose ari wowe biturukaho," 
John17:8 kuko ubutumwa wampaye nabubagejejeho bakabwakira. Bazi badashidikanya ko naturutse kuri wowe kandi bemera ko ari wowe wantumye. 
John17:9 “Ni bo nsabira sinsabira ab'isi, ahubwo nsabira abo wampaye kuko ari abawe." 
John17:10 Ibyanjye byose ni ibyawe, n'ibyawe byose ni ibyanjye kandi ikuzo ryanjye ryagaragariye kuri bo." 
John17:11 Kuva ubu sinkiri ku isi ariko bo baracyayiriho, naho jye nje iwawe. Data uzira inenge, ubarindishe ububasha wampaye, kugira ngo babe umwe nk'uko natwe turi umwe." 
John17:12 Nkiri kumwe na bo, ububasha wampaye ni bwo bwatumye mbagumana nkabarinda, ntihagire n'umwe muri bo ubura uretse wa wundi wagombaga kurimbuka, kugira ngo bibe nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga." 
John17:13 Ubu rero nje aho uri ariko ibyo mbivuze nkiri ku isi, kugira ngo ibyishimo byanjye bibasendere mu mitima." 
John17:14 Nababwiye ijambo ryawe, ab'isi barabanga babaziza ko atari abayo nk'uko nanjye ntari uwayo." 
John17:15 Singusaba ngo ubakure ku isi, ahubwo ndagusaba ngo ubarinde Sekibi." 
John17:16 Si ab'isi nk'uko nanjye ntari uw'isi. 
John17:17 Ubiyegurire ukoresheje ukuri kwawe, ijambo ryawe ni ryo kuri." 
John17:18 Nk'uko wantumye ku isi ni ko nanjye mbatumye ku isi. 
John17:19 Ku bwabo ndakwiyeguriye kugira ngo na bo babe bakwiyeguriye by'ukuri. 
John17:20 “Ntabwo ari bo nsabira bonyine, ahubwo nsabira n'abazanyemera kubera ubutumwa babazaniye." 
John17:21 Ndasaba ko bose baba umwe. Data, nk'uko uri muri jye nanjye nkaba muri wowe, ni ko nsaba ko baba umwe natwe kugira ngo ab'isi bemere ko ari wowe wantumye." 
John17:22 Ikuzo wampaye nanjye nararibahaye kugira ngo babe umwe nk'uko natwe turi umwe," 
John17:23 mbe muri bo nawe ube muri jye. Bibumbire hamwe byimazeyo, kugira ngo ab'isi bamenye ko wantumye kandi ko ubakunda nk'uko unkunda." 
John17:24 “Data, ni wowe wabampaye none ndashaka kuzabana na bo aho nzaba ndi, kugira ngo bitegereze ikuzo wampaye kuko wankunze isi itararemwa." 
John17:25 Data nyir'ubutungane, ni koko ab'isi ntibigeze bakumenya, ariko jye ndakuzi kandi n'aba basobanukiwe ko ari wowe wantumye." 
John17:26 Narabakumenyesheje kandi nzakomeza kubikora, kugira ngo urukundo wankunze rube muri bo nanjye mbe muri bo.”" 
John18:1 Yezu amaze gusenga atyo, ajyana n'abigishwa be bambuka umugezi wa Kedironi. Hakurya yaho hari ubusitani, maze Yezu n'abigishwa be babujyamo." 
John18:2 Yuda wari ugiye kumugambanira yari azi aho hantu, kuko Yezu yakundaga kuhateranira n'abigishwa be." 
John18:3 Nuko Yuda ajyayo ayoboye igitero cy'abasirikari n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana, batumwe n'abakuru bo mu batambyi hamwe n'Abafarizayi. Bari batwaye imuri n'amatara n'intwaro." 
John18:4 Yezu yari azi ibigiye kumubaho byose, maze aza abasanga arababaza ati: “Murashaka nde?”" 
John18:5 Baramusubiza bati: “Yezu w'i Nazareti.” Yezu arababwira ati: “Ni jyewe.” Yuda w'umugambanyi yari kumwe na bo. 
John18:6 Yezu avuze ati: “Ni jyewe”, barihinda basubira inyuma bikubita hasi." 
John18:7 Nuko yongera kubabaza ati: “Murashaka nde?” Bati: “Yezu w'i Nazareti.” 
John18:8 Yezu arabasubiza ati: “Nababwiye ko ari jye. Niba rero ari jye mushaka nimureke aba bigendere.” 
John18:9 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko yari yavuze ati: “Sinabuze n'umwe mu bo wampaye.” 
John18:10 Nuko Simoni Petero wari ufite inkota arayikura ayikubita umugaragu w'Umutambyi mukuru, amuca ugutwi kw'iburyo. Uwo mugaragu yitwaga Malikusi." 
John18:11 Yezu abwira Petero ati: “Subiza inkota mu rwubati. Mbese uragira ngo ndeke kunywa igikombe cy'umubabaro Data yampaye?” 
John18:12 Ubwo rero abasirikari n'umukuru wabo hamwe n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana b'Abayahudi, bafata Yezu baramuboha." 
John18:13 Babanza kumujyana kwa Ana, ari we sebukwe wa Kayifa wari Umutambyi mukuru muri uwo mwaka." 
John18:14 Kayifa ni we wari waragiriye Abayahudi inama, yuko ikiruta ari uko umuntu umwe yapfira rubanda." 
John18:15 Nuko Simoni Petero n'undi mwigishwa bakurikira Yezu. Uwo mwigishwa wundi yari azwi n'Umutambyi mukuru, bituma yinjirana na Yezu mu rugo rwe" 
John18:16 naho Petero asigara ku irembo. Nuko wa mwigishwa wundi wari uzwi n'Umutambyi mukuru, arasohoka avugana n'umuja ukumīra, ni ko kwinjiza Petero." 
John18:17 Uwo muja abaza Petero ati: “Mbese aho nawe nturi uwo mu bigishwa b'uriya muntu?” Aramusubiza ati: “Oya.” 
John18:18 Abagaragu n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana bari bacanye umuriro kubera imbeho bari bahagaze bota, Petero na we ahagararanye na bo yota." 
John18:19 Nuko wa Mutambyi mukuru Ana abaza Yezu ibyerekeye abigishwa be n'inyigisho ze. 
John18:20 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Nahoze mbwira abantu bose ku mugaragaro. Iteka nigishirizaga mu nsengero no mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana, aho Abayahudi bateranira. Nta cyo nigeze mvuga rwihishwa." 
John18:21 None urambariza iki? Ahubwo baza abumvise ibyo navuze, bo babizi neza.”" 
John18:22 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo, umwe mu barinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana wari uhagaze aho, amukubita urushyi avuga ati: “Ugasubiza Umutambyi mukuru utyo?”" 
John18:23 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Niba mvuze nabi erekana aho ikibi kiri, ariko se niba mvuze neza unkubitiye iki?”" 
John18:24 Nuko Ana amwohereza aboshye kwa Kayifa Umutambyi mukuru. 
John18:25 Ubwo Simoni Petero akaba ahagaze yota. Nuko baramubaza bati: “Mbese aho nawe nturi uwo mu bigishwa be?” Arabihakana ati: “Oya.” 
John18:26 Umwe wo mu bagaragu b'Umutambyi mukuru, wari mwene wabo w'uwo Petero yari yaciye ugutwi aramubaza ati: “Sinakwiboneye uri kumwe na we muri bwa busitani?”" 
John18:27 Nuko Petero yongera kubihakana, maze ako kanya inkoko irabika." 
John18:28 Igitondo gitangaje bavana Yezu kwa Kayifa, bamujyana mu ngoro y'umutegetsi. Abayahudi ntibinjira muri iyo ngoro, kugira ngo badahumana bikababuza kurya ifunguro rya Pasika." 
John18:29 Nuko Pilato arasohoka abasanga hanze arababaza ati: “Uyu muntu muramurega iki?” 
John18:30 Baramusubiza bati: “Iyo ataba umugizi wa nabi ntituba tumukuzaniye.” 
John18:31 Pilato arababwira ati: “Nimube ari mwe mumujyana, mumucire urubanza mukurikije amategeko yanyu.” Abayahudi baramubwira bati: “Ntidufite uburenganzira bwo kugira uwo twica.”" 
John18:32 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko Yezu yari yavuze, yerekana urwo yari agiye gupfa." 
John18:33 Pilato asubira mu ngoro ye, maze ahamagara Yezu aramubaza ati: “Ni wowe mwami w'Abayahudi?”" 
John18:34 Yezu ni ko kumubaza ati: “Ibyo ni wowe ubyihangiye, cyangwa se ni abandi babigushyizemo?”" 
John18:35 Pilato aramusubiza ati: “Nanjye se uragira ngo ndi Umuyahudi? Ni bene wanyu n'abakuru bo mu batambyi banyu bakunzaniye. Mbese wakoze iki?” 
John18:36 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Ubwami bwanjye si ubwo kuri iyi si. Iyo buza kuba ubwo kuri iyi si, abantu banjye baba bandwaniriye kugira ngo ntagabizwa Abayahudi. Noneho rero ubwami bwanjye si ubw'ino aha.”" 
John18:37 Maze Pilato aramubaza ati: “Ni ukuvuga rero ko uri umwami?” Yezu ati: “Ubwawe wivugiye ko ndi umwami! Icyo navukiye kandi cyanzanye ku isi ni ukugira ngo mpamye ibyerekeye ukuri. Umuntu wese ukunda ukuri antega amatwi.” 
John18:38 Pilato ati: “Ukuri ni iki?” Pilato amaze kuvuga atyo, yongera gusanga Abayahudi hanze arababwira ati: “Nsanze nta cyaha kimuhama." 
John18:39 None se, ko hari akamenyero ko mbarekurira imfungwa imwe ku munsi mukuru wa Pasika, murashaka ko mbarekurira umwami w'Abayahudi?”" 
John18:40 Barasakuza bati: “Si we dushaka ahubwo duhe Baraba!” Nyamara Baraba uwo yari umwambuzi. 
John19:1 Ni bwo Pilato ategetse ko bafata Yezu ngo bamukubite. 
John19:2 Nuko abasirikari bazingazinga ikamba ry'amahwa barimutamiriza ku mutwe, bamwambika n'umwitero w'umutuku wijimye" 
John19:3 bakamwegera bati: “Urakarama Mwami w'Abayahudi”, bakamukubita inshyi." 
John19:4 Nuko Pilato yongera gusohoka abwira Abayahudi ati: “Dore ndamubazaniye kugira ngo mumenye ko nta cyaha namusanganye.” 
John19:5 Yezu ni ko gusohoka yambaye rya kamba ry'amahwa na wa mwitero w'umutuku wijimye. Pilato arababwira ati: “Nguyu wa muntu.” 
John19:6 Abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana bamukubise amaso, bavuga baranguruye bati: “Mubambe ku musaraba! Mubambe!” Pilato arababwira ati: “Mube ari mwe mumujyana mumubambe, kuko jyewe nta cyaha musanganye.”" 
John19:7 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati: “Twebwe dufite itegeko rivuga ko agomba gupfa kuko yigize Umwana w'Imana.” 
John19:8 Pilato yumvise iryo jambo arushaho kugira ubwoba," 
John19:9 maze asubira mu ngoro ye abaza Yezu ati: “Ukomoka hehe?” Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza. 
John19:10 Pilato ni ko kumubwira ati: “Nta cyo unsubiza? Ese ntuzi ko mfite ububasha bwo kukurekura cyangwa bwo kukubamba ku musaraba?” 
John19:11 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Nta bubasha na buke wari kuba umfiteho iyo utabuhabwa n'Imana. Noneho rero uwangambaniye kuri wowe agusumbije icyaha.” 
John19:12 Guhera ubwo Pilato akora uko ashoboye ngo amurekure, ariko Abayahudi bararangurura bati: “Nurekura uwo muntu uraba utari incuti y'umwami w'i Roma. Uwigira umwami wese aba arwanya umwami w'i Roma.”" 
John19:13 Pilato abyumvise atyo asubiza Yezu hanze, yicara ku ntebe ahantu hirengeye hitwa ku Muteguro w'Amabuye, mu kinyarameya hakitwa Gabata." 
John19:14 Ubwo hari mu masaa sita ku munsi w'imyiteguro ya Pasika y'Abayahudi. Abwira Abayahudi ati: “Dore umwami wanyu!” 
John19:15 Ariko bo bararangurura bati: “Mukureho! Mukureho! Mubambe ku musaraba!” Pilato arababaza ati: “Ese mbambe umwami wanyu?” Abakuru bo mu batambyi barasubiza bati: “Nta mwami tugira utari umwami w'i Roma.” 
John19:16 Ni bwo Pilato amubahaye kugira ngo bamubambe. Nuko bafata Yezu baramujyana. 
John19:17 Agenda yitwariye umusaraba agana ahantu hitiriwe igihanga, mu giheburayi hakitwa Gologota." 
John19:18 Aho ni ho bamubambye ku musaraba abambanwa n'abandi babiri, umwe hino undi hirya naho Yezu ari hagati yabo." 
John19:19 Pilato yari yandikishije itangazo arishyira ku musaraba, rivuga ngo: “Yezu w'i Nazareti, Umwami w'Abayahudi”." 
John19:20 Abayahudi benshi basoma iryo tangazo, kuko aho Yezu yari abambwe hari hafi y'Umurwa, kandi itangazo ryari ryanditswe mu giheburayi no mu kilatini no mu kigereki." 
John19:21 Nuko abakuru bo mu batambyi b'Abayahudi babwira Pilato bati: “Wikwandika ngo ‘Umwami w'Abayahudi’, ahubwo wandike uti: ‘Uyu muntu yiyise umwami w'Abayahudi’.”" 
John19:22 Pilato arabasubiza ati: “Icyo nanditse nacyanditse.” 
John19:23 Abasirikari bamaze kubamba Yezu ku musaraba, bafata imyambaro ye bayigabanyamo imigabane ine, buri wese abona uwe hasigara ikanzu ye gusa. Iyo kanzu ntiyari ifite uruteranyirizo, ahubwo yari iboshywe yose kuva hejuru kugeza hasi." 
John19:24 Nuko baravugana bati: “Twe kuyicamo ibice, ahubwo reka tuyifindire turebe uwo iri buherereho.” Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Bigabanyije imyambaro yanjye, umwenda wanjye barawufindira.” Nguko uko abasirikari babigenje." 
John19:25 Iruhande rw'umusaraba wa Yezu hari hahagaze nyina, hamwe na nyina wabo Mariya muka Kilopa na Mariya w'i Magadala." 
John19:26 Nuko Yezu abonye nyina, na wa mwigishwa yakundaga ahagaze hafi aho, abwira nyina ati: “Mubyeyi, nguwo umuhungu wawe!”" 
John19:27 Abwira n'uwo mwigishwa ati: “Nguwo nyoko!” Nuko guhera icyo gihe uwo mwigishwa amujyana iwe. 
John19:28 Nyuma y'ibyo, Yezu amenye ko byose birangiye kugira ngo bibe nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga, aravuga ati: “Mfite inyota.”" 
John19:29 Ikibindi cyuzuye divayi isharira cyari giteretse aho. Nuko bafata icyangwe bagihambira ku gati kitwa hisopo, bacyinika muri iyo divayi bakimushyira ku munwa." 
John19:30 Yezu amaze kunyunyuza iyo divayi isharira, aravuga ati: “Birarangiye!” Nuko yubika umutwe, avamo umwuka." 
John19:31 Kuko wari umunsi w'imyiteguro y'isabato, Abayahudi basaba Pilato kubavuna amaguru ngo babamanure, kugira ngo imirambo yabo itaguma ku misaraba ku isabato, kandi iyo sabato ari umunsi mukuru." 
John19:32 Nuko abasirikari baraza, bavuna amaguru y'umuntu wa mbere n'ay'uwa kabiri bari babambanywe na Yezu," 
John19:33 ariko bageze kuri Yezu basanga amaze gupfa, ntibirirwa bamuvuna amaguru." 
John19:34 Ahubwo umwe mu basirikari amutoboza icumu mu rubavu, muri ako kanya havamo amaraso n'amazi." 
John19:35 Uwabyiboneye ni we ubihamya kandi ibyo ahamya ni iby'ukuri. Uwo azi ko ibyo avuga ari ukuri kugira ngo namwe mubyemere. 
John19:36 Ibyo bintu byabereyeho kugira ngo bibe nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nta gufwa rye na rimwe rizavunwa.” 
John19:37 Kandi ahandi havuga ngo: “Bazitegereza uwo batoboye.” 
John19:38 Hanyuma y'ibyo haza uwitwa Yozefu ukomoka mu mujyi wa Arimateya, wari umwigishwa wa Yezu rwihishwa abitewe no gutinya Abayahudi. Nuko asaba Pilato uburenganzira bwo gutwara umurambo wa Yezu, Pilato aramwemerera maze araza arawujyana." 
John19:39 Nikodemu wigeze gusanga Yezu nijoro na we araza, azana imibavu ivanze n'amakakama ahumura neza, ipima nk'ibiro mirongo itatu." 
John19:40 Bombi bajyana umurambo wa Yezu, bawuhambira mu myenda hamwe n'iyo mibavu nk'uko Abayahudi babigenza bahamba." 
John19:41 Hafi y'aho yabambwe hari ubusitani burimo imva nshya itigeze ihambwamo. 
John19:42 Kubera ko wari umunsi w'imyiteguro y'isabato kandi iyo mva ikaba yari bugufi, baba ari ho bashyingura Yezu." 
John20:1 Ku cyumweru ari wo munsi wa mbere, Mariya w'i Magadala aza ku mva bwenda gucya, abona ibuye ryavanywe ku mva." 
John20:2 Nuko ariruka asanga Simoni Petero na wa mwigishwa wundi Yezu yakundaga, arababwira ati: “Bavanye databuja mu mva kandi ntituzi aho bamushyize.”" 
John20:3 Petero ahagurukana na wa mwigishwa wundi bajya ku mva. 
John20:4 Bombi bariruka ariko wa mwigishwa wundi asiga Petero, amutanga kugera ku mva." 
John20:5 Arunama abona imyenda irambitse aho, ariko ntiyinjiramo." 
John20:6 Simoni Petero na we aba arahageze yinjira mu mva, abona imyenda irambitse aho" 
John20:7 n'igitambaro cyari gitwikiriye umutwe wa Yezu kitari hamwe n'indi myenda, ahubwo kiri ukwacyo kizinze." 
John20:8 Nuko wa mwigishwa wundi wageze ku mva bwa mbere na we arinjira, abonye ibyo yemera ko Yezu yazutse." 
John20:9 Bari batarasobanukirwa Ibyanditswe bivuga ko agomba kuzuka. 
John20:10 Nuko abo bigishwa bisubirira imuhira. 
John20:11 Mariya yari ahagaze hafi y'imva arira. Akirira arunama areba mu mva 
John20:12 maze abona abamarayika babiri bambaye imyambaro yera bicaye aho umurambo wa Yezu wari uri, umwe yicaye aho umutwe wari uri undi aho ibirenge byari biri." 
John20:13 Baramubaza bati: “Wa mugore we, urarizwa n'iki?” Arabasubiza ati: “Ni uko batwaye umurambo wa databuja, kandi sinzi aho bawushyize.”" 
John20:14 Amaze kuvuga atyo ahindukiye ngo arebe inyuma, abona Yezu ahagaze aho ariko ntiyamenya ko ari we." 
John20:15 Yezu aramubaza ati: “Wa mugore we, urarizwa n'iki? Urashaka nde?” Mariya akeka ko ari ushinzwe ubusitani, ni ko kumubwira ati: “Nyabuneka, niba ari wowe watwaye umurambo, mbwira aho wawushyize maze nywujyane.”" 
John20:16 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Mariya we.” Mariya arahindukira amubwira mu kinyarameya ati: “Rabuni!” (Bisobanurwa ngo “Mwigisha”). 
John20:17 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Wishaka kungumana kuko ntarazamuka ngo njye kwa Data! Ahubwo genda usange abavandimwe banjye, ubabwire ko ngiye kuzamuka nkajya kwa Data ari we So, nkajya ku Mana yanjye ari yo Mana yanyu.”" 
John20:18 Mariya w'i Magadala aragenda abwira abigishwa ati: “Niboneye Nyagasani!” Nuko abatekerereza ibyo yamubwiye. 
John20:19 Nuko kuri uwo munsi bugorobye, ku cyumweru (ari wo munsi wa mbere), abigishwa ba Yezu bari bateraniye mu nzu, bakinze inzugi babitewe no gutinya Abayahudi. Yezu araza ahagarara hagati yabo arababwira ati: “Nimugire amahoro!”" 
John20:20 Amaze kuvuga atyo abereka ibiganza bye no mu rubavu rwe. Abigishwa babonye Nyagasani barishima cyane. 
John20:21 Ababwira ubwa kabiri ati: “Nimugire amahoro! Uko Data yantumye ni ko nanjye mbatumye.” 
John20:22 Amaze kuvuga atyo abahumekeraho ati: “Nimwakire Mwuka Muziranenge! 
John20:23 Abo muzababarira ibyaha bose bazaba babibabariwe, kandi abo mutazabibabarira bazaba batabibabariwe.”" 
John20:24 Ariko Tomasi witwaga Didimo umwe mu bigishwa cumi na babiri, ntiyari kumwe na bo igihe Yezu yazaga." 
John20:25 Nuko abandi bigishwa baramubwira bati: “Twabonye Nyagasani!” Tomasi arababwira ati: “Nintabona imyenge y'imisumari mu biganza bye ngo nshyiremo urutoki, kandi ngo nshyire n'ikiganza mu rubavu rwe sinzabyemera.”" 
John20:26 Nuko iminsi umunani ishize na bwo abigishwa ba Yezu bari muri ya nzu, noneho na Tomasi ari kumwe na bo. Yezu aza inzugi zikinze, ahagarara hagati yabo aravuga ati: “Nimugire amahoro!”" 
John20:27 Abwira Tomasi ati: “Shyira urutoki aha ngaha, witegereze ibiganza byanjye kandi ushyire n'ikiganza cyawe mu rubavu rwanjye. Nuko ureke gushidikanya ahubwo unyemere!”" 
John20:28 Tomasi aramusubiza ati: “Mwami wanjye! Mana yanjye!” 
John20:29 Yezu aramubwira ati: “Unyemejwe n'uko umbonye. Hahirwa abanyemera kandi batambonye.” 
John20:30 Yezu ari kumwe n'abigishwa be yakoze n'ibindi bitangaza byinshi bimuranga, bitanditswe muri iki gitabo." 
John20:31 Ariko ibi byandikiwe kugira ngo mwemere yuko Yezu ari Kristo Umwana w'Imana, kandi ngo nimumwizera muherwe ubugingo muri we." 
John21:1 Nyuma y'ibyo Yezu yongera kubonekera abigishwa be ku nkombe z'ikiyaga cya Tiberiya. Dore uko byagenze: 
John21:2 abari bahari ni Simoni Petero na Tomasi witwaga Didimo, na Natanayeli ukomoka i Kana ho muri Galileya na bene Zebedeyi bombi, n'abandi bigishwa ba Yezu babiri." 
John21:3 Simoni Petero arababwira ati: “Ngiye kuroba.” Baramusubiza bati: “Reka tujyane!” Nuko baragenda bajya mu bwato, barara ijoro ariko ntibagira icyo bafata." 
John21:4 Mu gitondo cya kare Yezu yari ku nkombe, ariko abigishwa ntibamenya ko ari we." 
John21:5 Nuko arababaza ati: “Yemwe, hari icyo mwafashe?” Baramusubiza bati: “Habe na busa!”" 
John21:6 Arababwira ati: “Nimuterere umutego iburyo bw'ubwato murayafata.” Nuko babigenza batyo, maze ntibabasha gukurura umutego kubera ubwinshi bw'amafi bari bafashe." 
John21:7 Wa mwigishwa Yezu yakundaga abwira Petero ati: “Ni Nyagasani!” Simoni Petero yumvise ko ari Nyagasani, ahita akenyera kuko yari yiyambuye, maze arasimbuka agwa mu mazi." 
John21:8 Abandi bigishwa baza mu bwato, bagera ku nkombe bakurura umutego wuzuye amafi. Ntibari kure y'inkombe bari nko muri metero ijana." 
John21:9 Bageze imusozi bahasanga amakara yaka, yokejweho ifi n'umugati." 
John21:10 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimuzane ku mafi mumaze gufata.” 
John21:11 Simoni Petero asubira mu bwato, akurura wa mutego wuzuye amafi manini ijana na mirongo itanu n'atatu, kandi nubwo yari menshi atyo umutego ntiwacika." 
John21:12 Yezu arababwira ati: “Nimuze mufungure!” Nta n'umwe mu bigishwa be wubahutse kumubaza ati: “Uri nde?” Bari bamenye ko ari Nyagasani. 
John21:13 Yezu araza afata umugati arawubahereza, abahereza n'amafi." 
John21:14 Ubwo bwari ubwa gatatu Yezu abonekera abigishwa be amaze kuzuka. 
John21:15 Nuko bamaze gufungura Yezu abaza Simoni Petero ati: “Simoni mwene Yohani, urankunda kuruta aba? ” Aramusubiza ati: “Yego Nyagasani, uzi ko ngukunda.” Yezu ati: “Ragira abana b'intama banjye!”" 
John21:16 Yongera kumubaza ubwa kabiri ati: “Simoni mwene Yohani, urankunda?” Aramusubiza ati: “Yego Nyagasani, uzi ko ngukunda.” Yezu ati: “Ragira intama zanjye uziteho!”" 
John21:17 Yongera kumubaza ubwa gatatu ati: “Simoni mwene Yohani, urankunda?” Petero aterwa agahinda n'uko Yezu amubajije ubwa gatatu ati: “Urankunda?” Ni ko kumubwira ati: “Nyagasani, uzi byose, uzi ko ngukunda.” Yezu aramubwira ati: “Ragira intama zanjye!" 
John21:18 Ndakubwira nkomeje ko igihe wari ukiri umusore, warikenyezaga ukajya aho wishakiye, ariko numara gusaza uzajya urambura amaboko undi muntu agukenyeze, kandi akujyane aho udashaka.”" 
John21:19 Yavugiye atyo kugira ngo yerekane urwo Petero azapfa rugahesha Imana ikuzo. Amaze kuvuga atyo aramubwira ati: “Nkurikira!” 
John21:20 Petero akebutse abona wa mwigishwa Yezu yakundaga abakurikiye. Uwo ni umwe wari wegamye mu gituza cya Yezu cya gihe bari ku meza, akamubaza ati: “Nyagasani, ni nde uri bukugambanire?”" 
John21:21 Petero amubonye abaza Yezu ati: “Naho se Nyagasani, uyu we bite?”" 
John21:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati: “Niba nshaka ko abaho kugeza aho nzazira bigutwaye iki? Wowe nkurikira!” 
John21:23 Nuko iyo nkuru ikwira mu bavandimwe yuko uwo mwigishwa atazapfa. Ariko Yezu ntiyavugaga ko atazapfa, ahubwo yaravuze ati: “Niba nshaka ko abaho kugeza aho nzazira bigutwaye iki?”" 
John21:24 Uwo mwigishwa ni we ubwe uhamya ibyo, ni na we wabyanditse kandi tuzi ko ibyo ahamya ari ukuri." 
John21:25 Hariho n'ibindi byinshi Yezu yakoze. Uwabyandika byose uko bingana, ngira ngo ibitabo byakwandikwa byasaguka isi." 
Acts1:1 Kuri Tewofili, Mu gitabo cyanjye cya mbere narondoye ibintu byose Yezu yakoze n'ibyo yigishije, kuva agitangira umurimo we" 
Acts1:2 kugeza ku munsi ajyanywe mu ijuru. Ibyo bitaraba yagize ibyo amenyesha abo yari yaratoranyije kuba Intumwa ze, akoresheje Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Acts1:3 Abo ni bo yari yariyeretse nyuma yo kubabazwa agapfa, abemeza ko ari muzima akoresheje ibimenyetso byinshi. Nuko amara iminsi mirongo ine ababonekera, ababwira ibyerekeye ubwami bw'Imana." 
Acts1:4 Igihe kimwe bari kumwe arabategeka ati: “Ntimuzave i Yeruzalemu, ahubwo mutegereze uwo Data yabasezeranyije, ari na we mwanyumvanye." 
Acts1:5 Yohani we yabatirishaga amazi, ariko mu minsi mike muzabatirishwa Mwuka Muziranenge.”" 
Acts1:6 Nuko Intumwa za Yezu zimaze guterana ziramubaza ziti: “Mbese Nyagasani, iki ni cyo gihe ugiye gusubiza Abisiraheli ubwami bwabo?”" 
Acts1:7 Arabasubiza ati: “Ibihe n'iminsi ibyo bizabera byagenwe n'ubushobozi bwite bwa Data, si umurimo wanyu kubimenya." 
Acts1:8 Icyakora Mwuka Muziranenge nabazaho muzahabwa ububasha. Bityo muzaba abagabo bo guhamya ibyanjye i Yeruzalemu no muri Yudeya hose, no muri Samariya ndetse no kugeza ku mpera z'isi.”" 
Acts1:9 Amaze kuvuga atyo azamurwa bamureba, igicu kiramubakingiriza." 
Acts1:10 Igihe bagihanze amaso ku ijuru akigenda, ngo bajye kubona, babona abagabo babiri bambaye imyambaro yera babahagaze iruhande." 
Acts1:11 Barababaza bati: “Yemwe bagabo bo muri Galileya, ni iki kibahagaritse aho mwitegereza ku ijuru? Yezu uwo ubavanywemo akajyanywa mu ijuru, azagaruka nk'uko mumubonye ajyayo.”" 
Acts1:12 Nuko basubira i Yeruzalemu bavuye ku musozi w'Iminzenze, uri nko muri kirometero imwe." 
Acts1:13 Bagezeyo bajya muri cya cyumba cyo hejuru, aho babaga ubusanzwe. Abo bari Petero na Yohani na Yakobo, Andereya na Filipo, na Tomasi na Barutolomayo, na Matayo na Yakobo mwene Alufeyi, na Simoni wari umurwanashyaka w'igihugu, na Yuda mwene Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Abo bose bakomeza kubana bashishikariye gusenga bahuje umutima, bari kumwe n'abagore hamwe na Mariya nyina wa Yezu, n'abavandimwe ba Yezu." 
Acts1:15 Muri iyo minsi Petero ahaguruka hagati y'abemera Yezu bari bateranye ari nk'ijana na makumyabiri, arababwira ati:" 
Acts1:16 “Bavandimwe, byari ngombwa ko Ibyanditswe biba, ibyo Mwuka Muziranenge yari yarahaye Dawidi guhanura kuri Yuda wayoboye abafashe Yezu." 
Acts1:17 Uwo yahoze abarwa muri twe kandi yari yaratorewe umurimo umwe n'uwacu.” 
Acts1:18 Yuda uwo amaze kugura umurima ibivuye mu buhemu bwe, yaguye yubamye araturika amara ye yose arasandara." 
Acts1:19 Ibyo bimenyekana mu baturage b'i Yeruzalemu bose, bigeza aho uwo murima bawita Akeludama (ari ko kuvuga umurima w'amaraso)." 
Acts1:20 Petero yungamo ati: “Koko kandi ni ko byanditswe mu gitabo cya Zaburi ngo ‘Iwe hazahinduke itongo, he kugira uhatura’, kandi ngo ‘Umurimo yari ashinzwe uhabwe undi.’" 
Acts1:21 “Dore rero uko bigomba kugenda: hariho abagabo twajyanaga igihe cyose Nyagasani Yezu yabanye natwe," 
Acts1:22 uhereye ubwo Yohani yabatizaga ukageza ku munsi Yezu yadukuriwemo akajya mu ijuru. Umwe muri bo ni we uzafatanya natwe, kugira ngo abe umugabo wo guhamya izuka rye.”" 
Acts1:23 Nuko bazana abantu babiri. Umwe ni Yozefu witwaga Barisaba wari waranahimbwe Yusito, undi ni Matiyasi." 
Acts1:24 Basenga bagira bati: “Nyagasani, wowe uzi imitima y'abantu bose, erekana muri aba bombi uwo utoranyije" 
Acts1:25 kugira ngo abe Intumwa ya Kristo mu cyimbo cya Yuda, kandi afate umurimo Yuda yataye akajya ahamukwiye.”" 
Acts1:26 Barafinda maze ubufindo bwerekana Matiyasi, abarwa hamwe n'Intumwa cumi n'imwe." 
Acts2:1 Umunsi mukuru wa Pentekote ugeze bose bari bakoraniye hamwe. 
Acts2:2 Nuko umuriri ubatungura uvuye mu ijuru umeze nk'umuyaga w'ishuheri, wuzura inzu yose bari bicayemo." 
Acts2:3 Haboneka indimi zisa n'ibirimi by'umuriro zibajyaho, rumwe ku muntu urundi ku wundi, bityo bityo." 
Acts2:4 Bose buzuzwa Mwuka Muziranenge, batangira kuvuga izindi ndimi nk'uko Mwuka abahaye kuzivuga." 
Acts2:5 I Yeruzalemu habaga Abayahudi bubaha Imana, bari baraturutse mu bihugu byose by'isi." 
Acts2:6 Bumvise urwo rusaku, imbaga nyamwinshi irashika maze barayoberwa, kuko buri wese yumvaga bavuga mu rurimi rwe kavukire." 
Acts2:7 Barumirwa baratangara bati: “Mbese aba bose bavuga si Abanyagalileya? 
Acts2:8 Bishoboka bite se ko buri wese muri twe yumva bavuga ururimi rwe kavukire? 
Acts2:9 Ko bamwe twaturutse muri Pariti no mu Bumedi no muri Elamu, abandi bakaba abo muri Mezopotamiya na Yudeya, no muri Kapadokiya na Ponto, na Aziya" 
Acts2:10 na Furujiya, na Pamfiliya na Misiri, no mu turere twa Libiya duhereranye na Sirene? Abandi ni abashyitsi b'Abanyaroma," 
Acts2:11 abandi ni Abayahudi kavukire, hamwe n'abanyamahanga bemeye idini y'Abayahudi. Abandi ni abo muri Kireti n'Abarabu. None se bite ko tubumva twese bavuga mu ndimi zacu, ibikorwa bitangaje by'Imana?”" 
Acts2:12 Bose barumirwa bagwa mu kantu, barabazanya bati: “Ibi ni ibiki?”" 
Acts2:13 Abandi baraseka bavuga bati: “Basinze inzoga y'ihīra!” 
Acts2:14 Petero arahaguruka ari kumwe na ba bandi cumi n'umwe, atera hejuru abwira abari aho ati: “Yemwe Bayahudi! Yemwe baturage b'i Yeruzalemu mwese! Ibi mubimenye kandi mutege amatwi ibyo ngiye kubabwira!" 
Acts2:15 Erega aba bantu ntibanyoye nk'uko mubyibwira. Dore ni mu gitondo haracyari isaa tatu! 
Acts2:16 Ahubwo ibyo mureba ibi ni ibyahanuwe n'umuhanuzi Yoweli," 
Acts2:17 ngo Imana iravuga iti: ‘Mu minsi y'imperuka nzasuka Mwuka wanjye ku bantu bose, abahungu n'abakobwa banyu bazahanura, abasore banyu bazagira iyerekwa, abasaza bo muri mwe bazabonekerwa mu nzozi." 
Acts2:18 Mu minsi y'imperuka nzasuka Mwuka wanjye ku bagaragu banjye no ku baja banjye, na bo bazahanura." 
Acts2:19 Nzerekana ibitangaza hejuru ku ijuru, nzerekana n'ibimenyetso hasi ku isi, hazaboneka amaraso n'umuriro n'umwotsi ucucumuka." 
Acts2:20 Izuba rizijima, ukwezi kuzasa n'amaraso, umunsi wa Nyagasani uzaba utaragera, wa munsi ukomeye w'akataraboneka." 
Acts2:21 Umuntu wese uzatakambira Nyagasani azakizwa.’ 
Acts2:22 “Yemwe Bisiraheli, nimwumve ibyo mbabwira! Yezu w'i Nazareti ni umuntu Imana yemeje ko ari yo yamutumye, imukoresheje ibitangaza n'ibindi bikorwa by'ububasha, kimwe n'ibimenyetso yatangiye hagati muri mwe, ibyo namwe murabizi." 
Acts2:23 Uwo muntu yatanzwe nk'uko Imana yari yarabigennye ikabiteganya mbere, maze mwe mumwicisha kumushyikiriza abantu b'abagome ngo bamubambe ku musaraba." 
Acts2:24 Ariko Imana iramuzura imugobotora ingoyi z'urupfu, kuko bitagombaga ko rumuherana." 
Acts2:25 Mwibuke ko Dawidi yavuze ibyerekeye Yezu uwo ati: ‘Nabonye Nyagasani imbere yanjye iteka, sinzigera mpungabana kuko ampora hafi." 
Acts2:26 Ni cyo gituma nezerwa nkanishima, ndetse nkumva mfite ibyiringiro bishyitse." 
Acts2:27 Koko rero ntuzandeka ngo mpere ikuzimu, ntuzemera ko ugutunganiye abora." 
Acts2:28 Unyobora inzira izangeza ku bugingo, kubana nawe bintera ibyishimo bisesuye.’" 
Acts2:29 “Bavandimwe, nta cyambuza kubabwira neruye ibyerekeye sogokuruza Dawidi. Dore yarapfuye arahambwa, kandi imva ye na n'ubu iracyari ino aha." 
Acts2:30 Yari umuhanuzi kandi yazirikanaga indahiro Imana yamurahiye, ko mu bazamukomokaho izatoranyamo uzamusimbura ku ngoma." 
Acts2:31 Yeretswe mbere y'igihe uko bizamera, nuko avuga ko Kristo azazuka agira ati: ‘Imana ntizamureka ngo ahere ikuzimu kandi ntizatuma abora.’" 
Acts2:32 Yezu uwo rero Imana yaramuzuye, twese turi abagabo bo kubihamya." 
Acts2:33 Amaze kuzamurwa mu ijuru ashyirwa iburyo bw'Imana, maze Se amushyikiriza Mwuka Muziranenge, uwo yasezeranyije abantu, aherako asuka ibyo mubona n'ibyo mwumva ibi." 
Acts2:34 Erega Dawidi we ntiyagiye mu ijuru, nyamara kandi yaravuze ati: ‘Nyagasani yabwiye Umwami wanjye, ati: “Icara ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bwanjye," 
Acts2:35 nanjye nzahindura abanzi bawe nk'akabaho ukandagizaho ibirenge.” ’ 
Acts2:36 “None rero urubyaro rwose rwa Isiraheli rukwiriye kumenya rudashidikanya ko Yezu uwo mwabambye, Imana yamugize Nyagasani imugira na Kristo.”" 
Acts2:37 Abantu bumvise ibyo barakangarana, maze babaza Petero n'izindi Ntumwa bati: “Bavandimwe, dukore iki?”" 
Acts2:38 Petero arababwira ati: “Nimwihane buri wese abatizwe mu izina rya Yezu Kristo, kugira ngo mubabarirwe ibyaha. Ni bwo Imana izabaha impano, ari yo Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Acts2:39 Erega Isezerano ni mwe ryagenewe kimwe n'abana banyu, ndetse n'abari kure, abo Nyagasani Imana yacu izihamagarira uko bangana.”" 
Acts2:40 Avuga n'andi magambo menshi yo kubemeza no kubakomeza agira ati: “Nimwikize, mwitandukanye n'abantu b'iki gihe b'abagome!”" 
Acts2:41 Abemeye izo nyigisho za Petero barabatizwa, maze kuri uwo munsi umubare w'abigishwa ba Yezu wiyongeraho abantu bagera ku bihumbi bitatu." 
Acts2:42 Bakomezaga kwita ku nyigisho z'Intumwa, bagashyira hamwe, bakamanyura umugati kandi bagasenga." 
Acts2:43 Abantu bose bagize ubwoba, babonye ibitangaza izo Ntumwa zakoraga n'ibimenyetso zerekanaga." 
Acts2:44 Abemeraga Yezu bose babaga hamwe bafatanya byose. 
Acts2:45 Bagurishaga amasambu yabo n'ibindi bintu bari batunze, bakagabana ibiguzi bavanyemo bakurikije ubukene bwa buri wese." 
Acts2:46 Iminsi yose bagiraga umwete wo guteranira mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana bahuje umutima, no gusangirira mu ngo bya kivandimwe. Uko basangiraga babaga bafite ibyishimo bicisha bugufi," 
Acts2:47 bahimbaza Imana kandi bashimwa n'abantu bose. Uko bukeye Nyagasani akungura umubare w'abagenda bakizwa. 
Acts3:1 Umunsi umwe saa cyenda, ari cyo gihe cyo gusenga, Petero na Yohani bagiye mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana." 
Acts3:2 Hariho umuntu wavutse ari ikirema bahekaga buri munsi, bakamushyira ku irembo ry'Ingoro y'Imana ryitwa “Irembo ry'Igikundiro”, kugira ngo asabirize amafaranga abazaga mu rugo rw'Ingoro." 
Acts3:3 Ngo abone Petero na Yohani bagiye kwinjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro na bo arabasaba. 
Acts3:4 Petero na Yohani baramutumbira, maze Petero aramubwira ati: “Ngaho turebe!”" 
Acts3:5 Nuko uwo mugabo agumya kubahanga amaso agira ngo hari icyo bamuha. 
Acts3:6 Petero aramubwira ati: “Nta mafaranga mfite, yaba ifeza yaba izahabu, ariko icyo mfite ndakiguha. Mu izina rya Yezu Kristo w'i Nazareti, ndagutegetse nti: ‘Haguruka maze ugende!’ ”" 
Acts3:7 Nuko amufata ukuboko kw'iburyo aramuhagurutsa. Muri ako kanya, ibirenge bye n'ubugombambari birakomera." 
Acts3:8 Nuko arabaduka arahagarara, atangira kugenda. Yinjirana na bo mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana atambuka, yitera hejuru asingiza Imana." 
Acts3:9 Rubanda rwose babonye agenda kandi asingiza Imana," 
Acts3:10 bamenya ko ari wa wundi wajyaga asabiriza, yicaye ku irembo ry'Ingoro y'Imana bita iry'Igikundiro, barumirwa bayoberwa icyamubayeho." 
Acts3:11 Igihe uwo muntu yanze kuvirira Petero na Yohani, rubanda rwose barashika babasanga ku ibaraza ryitwa irya Salomo, baratangara cyane." 
Acts3:12 Petero abibonye arababaza ati: “Bisiraheli, ni iki gitumye muduhanga amaso, nk'aho ari ububasha bwacu cyangwa se kubaha Imana kwacu byatumye uyu muntu ashobora gutambuka?" 
Acts3:13 Imana ya Aburahamu n'Imana ya Izaki n'Imana ya Yakobo, Imana ya ba sogokuruza yahaye ikuzo Umugaragu wayo Yezu, uwo mwebwe mwatanze mukamwihakanira imbere ya Pilato, kandi we yari yiyemeje kumurekura." 
Acts3:14 Mwihakanye uwo Muziranenge akaba n'Intungane, maze mu cyimbo cye musaba ko bababohorera umwicanyi." 
Acts3:15 Nuko uwo Mugaba w'ubugingo we muramwica, ariko Imana iramuzura. Ni twe bagabo bo kubihamya." 
Acts3:16 Uyu muntu mureba kandi muzi yakijijwe ubumuga kubera kwizera ubushobozi bwa Yezu. Ubushobozi bwa Yezu n'ukwizera gukomoka kuri we, ni byo byamuhaye kuba muzima rwose mwese mubireba." 
Acts3:17 “None rero bavandimwe, nzi yuko mwebwe n'abategetsi banyu mwishe Yezu mutazi icyo mukora." 
Acts3:18 Nyamara Imana ni yo yatumye biba bityo, ikurikije uko yari yaratumye abahanuzi bose kuvuga mbere ko Kristo agomba kubabazwa." 
Acts3:19 Nuko rero nimwisubireho, mugarukire Imana kugira ngo ibyaha byanyu bihanagurwe," 
Acts3:20 habeho ibihe byo guhemburwa bituruka kuri Nyagasani, kandi aboherereze Yezu ari we Kristo yabatoranyirije mbere." 
Acts3:21 Yezu uwo agomba kuguma mu ijuru kugeza igihe Imana izahindura byose bishya, nk'uko yabivuze kera kose itumye abahanuzi bayo." 
Acts3:22 Musa yaravuze ati: ‘Nyagasani Imana yanyu azabatumaho umuhanuzi umeze nkanjye ukomoka muri mwe, muzumvire ibyo azababwira byose." 
Acts3:23 Umuntu wese utazumvira uwo muhanuzi azarimburwe.’ 
Acts3:24 Kandi abahanuzi bose uhereye kuri Samweli no ku bamukurikiye, igihe cyose bahanuraga bagushaga ku by'iyi minsi turimo." 
Acts3:25 Ni mwe mwarazwe ibyavuzwe n'abahanuzi n'ibyo Imana yasezeranye na ba sokuruza, igihe yabwiraga Aburahamu iti: ‘Amahanga yose yo ku isi azaherwa umugisha mu rubyaro rwawe.’" 
Acts3:26 Noneho igihe Imana yahagurutsaga uwo Mugaragu wayo, ni mwebwe yabanje kumutumaho kugira ngo abaheshe umugisha, bityo umuntu wese muri mwe azinukwe ibibi yakoze.”" 
Acts4:1 Igihe Petero na Yohani bakivugana n'abantu, abatambyi n'umutware w'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana n'Abasaduseyi baba baraje, babahagarara iruhande." 
Acts4:2 Barakajwe cyane n'uko Petero na Yohani bigisha abantu, bagatangaza ko abapfuye bazuka babihereye kuri Yezu." 
Acts4:3 Nuko barabafata babaraza muri gereza kuko bwari bugorobye. 
Acts4:4 Nyamara abenshi mu bari bumvise ibyo bavuga bemera Yezu, bituma umubare w'abamwemeye ugera ku bihumbi bitanu." 
Acts4:5 Bukeye abatware b'Abayahudi n'abakuru b'imiryango n'abigishamategeko bakoranira i Yeruzalemu. 
Acts4:6 Basanga Ana Umutambyi mukuru na Kayifa, na Yohani na Alegisanderi n'abo mu muryango w'Umutambyi mukuru bose." 
Acts4:7 Nuko bazana Petero na Yohani bababariza mu ruhame bati: “Mbese mwabashije mute gukiza uwo muntu? Ese mwashobojwe na nde kubikora?” 
Acts4:8 Petero yuzuye Mwuka Muziranenge arabasubiza ati: “Batware namwe bakuru b'imiryango," 
Acts4:9 uyu munsi duhamagariwe kubazwa ibyerekeye ineza uyu muntu yagiriwe n'uburyo yakijijwe ubumuga! 
Acts4:10 Noneho mwebwe mwese n'umuryango wose wa Isiraheli, mumenye icyatumye uyu muntu ahagarara imbere yanyu ari mutaraga, ni ukubera ubushobozi bwa Yezu Kristo w'i Nazareti uwo mwabambye ku musaraba Imana ikamuzura." 
Acts4:11 Yezu ni we Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo ‘Ibuye mwebwe abubatsi mwanze, ni ryo ryabaye insanganyarukuta.’" 
Acts4:12 Nta wundi agakiza kabonekaho, kuko ku isi yose nta wundi Imana yahaye abantu ufite ubushobozi bwo kudukiza.”" 
Acts4:13 Abanyarukiko babonye ukuntu Petero na Yohani bavuga bashize amanga, kandi baruzi ko ari abanyamusozi batize barumirwa maze bibuka ko bahoranye na Yezu." 
Acts4:14 Babonye uwo muntu wakijijwe ubumuga ahagararanye na bo, babura icyo basubiza." 
Acts4:15 Nuko bamaze kubaheza abanyarukiko barabazanya bati: 
Acts4:16 “Bariya bantu tubagenze dute? Erega abaturage bose b'i Yeruzalemu bamenye ko bakoze igitangaza gikomeye, natwe ntidushobora kubihakana!" 
Acts4:17 Ariko kugira ngo bitarushaho gukwizwa muri rubanda mureke tubakange, tubihanangirize kutazongera kugira uwo babwira ijambo bitwaje iryo zina rya Yezu.”" 
Acts4:18 Nuko bongera kubahamagara, bababuza kuvuga izina rya Yezu ngo bigishe abantu baryitwaje." 
Acts4:19 Ariko Petero na Yohani barabasubiza bati: “Mbese tubumvire cyangwa twumvire Imana? Namwe nimwihitiremo icyo Imana ishima! 
Acts4:20 Twe rero ntitubasha guceceka ibyo twiyumviye n'ibyo twiboneye.” 
Acts4:21 Bamaze kubuka inabi barabarekura. Ubwo bari babuze uko babahana, kubera ko rubanda rwose basingizaga Imana bakurije ku byabaye." 
Acts4:22 Koko kandi uwo muntu wari wakijijwe ubumuga ku buryo butangaje butyo, yari arengeje imyaka mirongo ine avutse." 
Acts4:23 Petero na Yohani bamaze kurekurwa basanga bagenzi babo, babatekerereza ibyo babwiwe n'abakuru bo mu batambyi n'abakuru b'imiryango." 
Acts4:24 Babyumvise bose bahita basenga Imana bashyize hamwe bati: “Nyagasani, ni wowe waremye ijuru n'isi n'inyanja n'ibirimo byose." 
Acts4:25 Ni wowe watumye Mwuka Muziranenge avugisha umugaragu wawe sogokuruza Dawidi ati: ‘Kuki amahanga yarubiye? Kuki amoko yiha imigambi y'impfabusa? 
Acts4:26 Abami bayo barahagurutse, abategetsi bayo na bo bishyize hamwe, barikunganyije ngo barwanye Nyagasani, barwanye n'Uwo yimikishije amavuta.’" 
Acts4:27 Ni ukuri Herodi na Ponsiyo Pilato, hamwe n'abanyamahanga n'Abisiraheli bose bateraniye muri uyu mujyi, bahuza umugambi wo kurwanya Umugaragu wawe w'umuziranenge Yezu, uwo wimikishije amavuta." 
Acts4:28 Kwari ugusohoza imigambi wateganyije kuva kera kose ku bw'ububasha n'ubushake bwawe. 
Acts4:29 None Nyagasani, witegereze ibikangisho byabo, maze uhe abagaragu bawe kuvuga ibyawe dushize amanga." 
Acts4:30 Urambure ukuboko ukize indwara, utange ibimenyetso ukore n'ibitangaza mu izina rya Yezu, umugaragu wawe w'umuziranenge.”" 
Acts4:31 Bamaze gusenga ahantu bari bakoraniye haratigita. Bose buzura Mwuka Muziranenge maze batangaza Ijambo ry'Imana bashize amanga. 
Acts4:32 Ikoraniro ry'abemeye Yezu bose ryari rihuje umutima n'imigambi. Nta n'umwe wavugaga ko icyo atunze cyose acyihariye, ahubwo basaranganyaga ibyo babaga bafite byose." 
Acts4:33 Nuko Intumwa za Kristo zikomeza guhamya ibyerekeye izuka rya Nyagasani Yezu zibivugana ububasha bukomeye, maze Imana isesekaza umugisha kuri bose." 
Acts4:34 Nta n'umwe muri bo wagiraga icyo akena ngo akibure, ababaga bafite amasambu cyangwa amazu barabigurishaga, ikiguzi bakakizana" 
Acts4:35 bakagishyikiriza Intumwa za Kristo, kigasaranganywa hakurikijwe ubukene buri muntu afite." 
Acts4:36 Umwe wakoze atyo ni Yozefu, Umulevi wavukiye i Shipure, uwo izo Ntumwa zahimbye Barinaba, ari ko kuvuga “Urema abandi agatima”." 
Acts4:37 Yagurishije umurima yari afite ikiguzi agishyikiriza Intumwa. 
Acts5:1 Ariko umugabo witwaga Ananiya amaze kumvikana n'umugore we Safira, agurisha isambu yabo maze yisigira igice cy'ikiguzi, igisigaye agishyikiriza Intumwa za Kristo." 
Acts5:2  
Acts5:3 Petero aramubaza ati: “Ananiya, ni iki cyatumye ureka Satani akigarurira umutima wawe ukabeshya Mwuka Muziranenge, ugasigarana igice cy'ikiguzi cy'isambu yawe?" 
Acts5:4 Mbese isambu utarayigurisha ntiyari iyawe, kandi umaze no kuyigurisha amafaranga ntiyari ayawe? Ni iki cyatumye wiyemeza kugenza utyo? Si abantu wabeshye ahubwo wabeshye Imana!”" 
Acts5:5 Ananiya yumvise ayo magambo yitura hasi araca, ababyumvise bose bashya ubwoba." 
Acts5:6 Nuko abasore barahaguruka baramupfunya bajya kumuhamba. 
Acts5:7 Hashize nk'amasaha atatu umugore we arinjira, ariko ntiyari azi ibyabaye." 
Acts5:8 Petero aramubaza ati: “Cyo se ye, iki ni cyo kiguzi wowe n'umugabo wawe mwagurishije isambu yanyu?” Aravuga ati: “Ni icyo ngicyo.”" 
Acts5:9 Petero ni ko kumubwira ati: “Ni iki cyatumye muhuza inama yo kugerageza Mwuka wa Nyagasani? Umva imirindi y'abavuye guhamba umugabo wawe bageze ku muryango, nawe barakujyana.”" 
Acts5:10 Ako kanya Safira amugwa imbere araca. Abasore binjiye basanga yapfuye, maze bajyana umurambo bawuhamba iruhande rw'uw'umugabo we." 
Acts5:11 Umuryango wose wa Kristo n'abumvise ibyabaye bose bashya ubwoba. 
Acts5:12 Intumwa zikomeza gukora ibitangaza no gutanga ibimenyetso byinshi muri rubanda, kandi bose bajyaga bakoranira ku ibaraza rya Salomo bahuje umutima." 
Acts5:13 Ariko nubwo rubanda babashimaga, nta n'umwe watinyukaga kuhabasanga." 
Acts5:14 Nyamara abantu benshi cyane, abagabo n'abagore, bagumya kwiyongera ku basanzwe bemera Nyagasani." 
Acts5:15 Ibyo Intumwa zakoraga byatumaga abantu bazana abarwayi mu mihanda y'umujyi, bakabaryamisha ku mariri no mu ngobyi, kugira ngo igihe Petero ahita nibura igicucu cye kigere kuri bamwe muri bo." 
Acts5:16 Nuko rubanda nyamwinshi bagashika baturutse mu mijyi ikikije Yeruzalemu, bazanye abarwayi n'abahanzweho n'ingabo za Satani maze bose bagakira." 
Acts5:17 Umutambyi mukuru na bagenzi be bose bo mu ishyaka ry'Abasaduseyi bashengurwa n'ishyari. 
Acts5:18 Nuko bafata izo Ntumwa za Kristo bazishyira muri gereza rusange. 
Acts5:19 Nyamara muri iryo joro umumarayika wa Nyagasani akingura inzugi za gereza, abajyana hanze arababwira ati:" 
Acts5:20 “Nimugende muhagarare mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana, mubwire abantu iby'ubu bugingo bushya byose.”" 
Acts5:21 Babyumvise bahita binjira mu rugo rw'Ingoro mu museke, batangira kwigisha. Umutambyi mukuru na bagenzi be baraza, bakoranya urukiko rw'ikirenga rugizwe n'abahagarariye Abisiraheli bose, ni ko gutuma ngo bavane Intumwa muri gereza." 
Acts5:22 Abatumwe kubazana bageze muri gereza ntibabasangamo. Nuko baragaruka baravuga bati: 
Acts5:23 “Twasanze gereza idanangiye n'abarinzi bahagaze ku nzugi, ariko dukinguye ntitwagira n'umwe dusangamo.”" 
Acts5:24 Babyumvise batyo umutware w'abarinzi b'Ingoro y'Imana n'abakuru bo mu batambyi, birabayobera bibaza uko bizagenda." 
Acts5:25 Nuko umuntu araza arababwira ati: “Dore ba bagabo mwashyize muri gereza bahagaze mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana, barigisha rubanda!”" 
Acts5:26 Uwo mutware ajyana n'abarinzi, bazana Intumwa batazakuye kuko batinyaga ko rubanda babatera amabuye." 
Acts5:27 Nuko bazihagarika imbere y'urukiko, maze Umutambyi mukuru arababaza ati:" 
Acts5:28 “Twari twarabihanangirije kutigisha mwitwaje iryo zina, none inyigisho zanyu mwazikwije i Yeruzalemu mushaka kutugerekaho amaraso y'uwo muntu”." 
Acts5:29 Petero n'izindi Ntumwa barasubiza bati: “Tugomba kumvira Imana kuruta kumvira abantu. 
Acts5:30 Imana ya ba sogokuruza yazuye Yezu mumaze kumwica mumubambye ku musaraba," 
Acts5:31 imushyira hejuru iburyo bwayo ngo abe Umutegetsi n'Umukiza, kugira ngo ashoboze Abisiraheli kwihana ngo bababarirwe ibyaha." 
Acts5:32 Turi abagabo bo kubihamya – twe na Mwuka Muziranenge, uwo Imana yahaye abayumvira.”" 
Acts5:33 Babyumvise batyo umujinya urabasya bashaka kubica. 
Acts5:34 Ariko muri urwo rukiko hari Umufarizayi witwaga Gamaliyeli, umwigisha w'Amategeko wubahwaga n'abantu bose. Arahaguruka ategeka ko baheza Intumwa akanya gato." 
Acts5:35 Nuko abwira abari mu rukiko ati: “Bisiraheli, mwitondere ibyo mugiye kugirira bariya bantu!" 
Acts5:36 Hambere aha Teyuda yadutse avuga ko ari umuntu ukomeye, abantu nka magana ane baramuyoboka. Nyamara amaze kwicwa abantu be bose baratatana, ibyo yari atangiye birayoyoka." 
Acts5:37 Nyuma ye mu minsi y'ibarura, haduka Yuda w'Umunyagalileya arigomeka, abantu benshi baramukurikira. Nuko na we aricwa, abari baramwemeye bose baratatana." 
Acts5:38 Mureke mbagire inama: ntimugire icyo mutwara bariya bagabo mubihorere. Niba ibyo batekereza n'ibyo bakora bikomoka ku bantu bizayoyoka. 
Acts5:39 Ariko niba bikomoka ku Mana koko ntimuzabasha kubatsinda. Muramenye hato mutaba murwanya Imana.” Nuko bemera iyo nama," 
Acts5:40 bahamagaza za Ntumwa barazikubita, bazibuza rwose kongera kwigisha ibyerekeye Yezu maze barazirekura." 
Acts5:41 Intumwa ziva mu rukiko zishimira ko zemerewe gusuzugurwa zihōrwa Yezu, zibyita amahirwe." 
Acts5:42 Nuko buri munsi ntizisibe kwigishiriza mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana no mu ngo, zitangaza Ubutumwa bwiza ko Yezu ari we Kristo." 
Acts6:1 Muri iyo minsi umubare w'abigishwa ba Kristo ukomeje kwiyongera, habaye ubwumvikane buke hagati y'Abayahudi bavuga ikigereki n'abavuga ikinyarameya. Abavuga ikigereki bitotomberaga ko abapfakazi babo batitabwaho, ngo bahabwe igaburo rya buri munsi uko bikwiye." 
Acts6:2 Nuko Intumwa cumi n'ebyiri zikoranya imbaga y'abigishwa bose zirababwira ziti: “Ntibikwiye ko tureka kwigisha Ijambo ry'Imana ngo duhugire ku kugabura. 
Acts6:3 None rero bavandimwe, nimwitoremo abagabo barindwi bazwiho ko buzuye Mwuka w'Imana kandi ko bafite ubwenge, tubashinge uwo murimo." 
Acts6:4 Bityo twebwe tuzagumya kwibanda ku murimo wo gusenga no kwigisha Ijambo ry'Imana.” 
Acts6:5 Iyo nama y'Intumwa inyura abakoraniye aho bose. Nuko batoranya Sitefano umuntu wemeraga Kristo byimazeyo kandi wuzuye Mwuka Muziranenge, batoranya na Filipo na Porokori, na Nikanori na Timoni, na Parumena na Nikola wo mu mujyi wa Antiyokiya wari waremeye idini y'Abayahudi." 
Acts6:6 Abo bantu babashyikiriza Intumwa maze zirabasabira, zibarambikaho ibiganza." 
Acts6:7 Nuko Ijambo ry'Imana rikomeza gukwira, umubare w'abigishwa urushaho kwiyongera i Yeruzalemu, ndetse n'abatambyi benshi cyane barumvira bemera Kristo." 
Acts6:8 Sitefano wari waragiriye umugisha ku Mana ikamuha n'ububasha bwinshi, yakoraga ibitangaza agatanga n'ibimenyetso bikomeye muri rubanda." 
Acts6:9 Ariko abantu bamwe bo mu rusengero rw'abitwaga “Ababohowe” barahaguruka, bari Abayahudi bo muri Sirene no mu mujyi wa Alegisanderiya, hamwe n'abo mu ntara ya Silisiya n'iya Aziya. Abo bantu batangira kujya impaka na Sitefano." 
Acts6:10 Nyamara ntibashobora guhangana n'ubwenge bwari bumurimo, na Mwuka w'Imana wamuhaga icyo avuga." 
Acts6:11 Nuko bagurira abantu ngo bazavuge bati: “Twumvise avuga amagambo yo gutuka Musa n'Imana.” 
Acts6:12 Bahuruza rubanda n'abakuru b'imiryango n'abigishamategeko, maze baraza basumira Sitefano bamujyana mu rukiko rw'ikirenga." 
Acts6:13 Ni ko guhagurutsa abagabo bo kumushinja ibinyoma, barahamya bati: “Uyu muntu ntahwema gusebya iyi Ngoro y'Imana n'Amategeko." 
Acts6:14 Twumvise avuga ko Yezu uwo w'i Nazareti azasenya iyi Ngoro, agahindura n'imigenzo twahawe na Musa.”" 
Acts6:15 Abanyarukiko bose bitegereje Sitefano babona mu maso he hasa n'ah'umumarayika. 
Acts7:1 Umutambyi mukuru abaza Sitefano ati: “Mbese ibyo bakuvugaho ni ukuri?” 
Acts7:2 Sitefano arasubiza ati: “Bavandimwe namwe babyeyi, nimunyumve: Imana nyir'ikuzo yabonekeye sogokuruza Aburahamu akiri muri Mezopotamiya atari yimukira i Harani," 
Acts7:3 iramubwira iti: ‘Va mu gihugu cyanyu, usige bene wanyu ujye mu gihugu nzakwereka.’" 
Acts7:4 Nuko ava mu gihugu cy'Abanyakalideya ajya gutura i Harani. Nyuma y'urupfu rwa se Imana imuvanayo, imuzana muri iki gihugu mutuyemo ubu ngubu." 
Acts7:5 Imana ntiyigeze imukebera isambu ye bwite, habe ngo imuhe n'ahangana urwara, ahubwo yamusezeraniye kuzamuha iki gihugu ho gakondo we n'abazamukomokaho, kandi icyo gihe Aburahamu yari ataragira umwana." 
Acts7:6 Imana ni ko kumubwira iti: ‘Abazagukomokaho bazasuhukira mu kindi gihugu bakimaremo imyaka magana ane yose, bazafatwa nabi bakoreshwe n'imirimo y'agahato." 
Acts7:7 Ariko nzahana igihugu kizabakoresha agahato, hanyuma bazakivamo maze bansengere aha hantu.’ Uko ni ko Imana yavuze." 
Acts7:8 Nuko igirana na we Isezerano rirangwa n'umuhango wo gukebwa. Hanyuma abyaye Izaki amukeba ku munsi wa munani. Ni na ko Izaki yagenje Yakobo, maze na we abigenza atyo kuri ba sogokuruza uko ari cumi na babiri." 
Acts7:9 “Ba sogokuruza abo bagirira Yozefu ishyari, baramugurisha ajyanwa mu Misiri, ariko Imana ibana na we" 
Acts7:10 imugobotora mu magorwa ye yose. Imuha ubwenge no gutona ku mwami wa Misiri, maze amugira umutegetsi ugenga igihugu n'urugo rwe rwose." 
Acts7:11 Hanyuma inzara itera hose mu Misiri no muri Kanāni, habaho amagorwa akomeye ba sogokuruza barasonza." 
Acts7:12 Nuko Yakobo yumvise ko mu Misiri hari ibiribwa, yoherezayo ba sogokuruza ubwa mbere." 
Acts7:13 Bagiyeyo ubwa kabiri Yozefu yibwira bene se, ni bwo umwami wa Misiri amenyanye n'umuryango wa Yozefu." 
Acts7:14 Yozefu atumira se Yakobo n'umuryango we wose, bari abantu mirongo irindwi na batanu." 
Acts7:15 Nuko Yakobo yimukira mu Misiri, asazirayo we na ba sogokuruza." 
Acts7:16 Imirambo yabo ijyanwa i Shekemu, ihambwa mu mva Aburahamu yari yaraguze na bene Hamori." 
Acts7:17 “Igihe kigeze ngo bibe nk'uko Imana yasezeraniye Aburahamu, umuryango wacu wari umaze kugwirira cyane mu Misiri." 
Acts7:18 Ni bwo mu Misiri himye undi mwami utarigeze amenya ibya Yozefu. 
Acts7:19 Uwo mwami mushya apyinagaza umuryango wacu, agirira nabi ba sogokuruza, ageza aho abahatira kujugunya impinja zabo ku gasi ngo zitabaho." 
Acts7:20 Ubwo ni bwo Musa avutse ari umwana mwiza bihebuje. Nuko arererwa imuhira amezi atatu. 
Acts7:21 Bamuhisha mu gasozi ariko umukobwa w'umwami aramwitorera, amurera nk'umwana we bwite." 
Acts7:22 Musa yigishwa ubuhanga bwose bw'Abanyamisiri, aba ikirangirire mu byo avuga no mu byo akora." 
Acts7:23 “Musa amaze imyaka mirongo ine avutse, yiyemeje kujya gusura bene wabo b'Abisiraheli." 
Acts7:24 Abona umwe muri bo agirirwa nabi n'Umunyamisiri aramurengera, aramuhōrera yica uwo Munyamisiri." 
Acts7:25 Musa yibwiraga ko bene wabo bamenyeraho ko ari we Imana yatumye kubakiza, ariko ntibabisobanukirwa." 
Acts7:26 Bukeye asanga Abisiraheli babiri barwana, agerageza kubakiranura ati: ‘Mwa bagabo mwe, murapfa iki kandi muri abavandimwe?’" 
Acts7:27 Uwarenganyaga mugenzi we asunika Musa amuhinda ati: ‘Ni nde wakugize umutware cyangwa umucamanza wacu? 
Acts7:28 Mbese urashaka kunyica nk'uko ejo wishe wa Munyamisiri?’ 
Acts7:29 Musa abyumvise arahunga ajya gutura mu gihugu cya Midiyani, ahabyarira abahungu babiri." 
Acts7:30 “Imyaka mirongo ine ishize abonekerwa n'umumarayika mu gihuru cyaka umuriro, mu butayu bw'umusozi wa Sinayi." 
Acts7:31 Musa abibonye aratangara, ashatse kwegera ngo yitegereze yumva Nyagasani avuga ati:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Ndi Imana ya ba sokuruza, Imana ya Aburahamu na Izaki na Yakobo.’ Musa ahinda umushyitsi kubera ubwoba, ntiyatinyuka kubyitegereza." 
Acts7:33 Nuko Nyagasani aramubwira ati: ‘Kuramo inkweto kuko uhagaze ahantu nitoranyirije. 
Acts7:34 Nabonye uko ubwoko bwanjye bukoreshwa agahato mu Misiri, numva no gutaka kwabwo. None ndamanutse ngo mbutabare. Nuko rero ngwino ngutume mu Misiri.’" 
Acts7:35 “Musa uwo bene wabo bari baramwanze bamubaza bati: ‘Ni nde wakugize umutware cyangwa umucamanza wacu?’ Nyamara ni we Imana yohereje kubabera umutware n'umutabazi, imutumyeho umumarayika wamubonekereye muri cya gihuru." 
Acts7:36 Musa ni we wabavanye mu Misiri akora ibitangaza, atanga n'ibimenyetso muri icyo gihugu, ku Nyanja Itukura no mu butayu mu gihe cy'imyaka mirongo ine." 
Acts7:37 Ni we wabwiye Abisiraheli ati: ‘Imana izabatumaho umuhanuzi umeze nkanjye ukomoka muri mwe.’ 
Acts7:38 Musa uwo ni we wari mu ikoraniro ry'Abisiraheli mu butayu, yari hamwe na ba sogokuruza, akaba ari hamwe na none na wa mumarayika bavuganaga ku musozi wa Sinayi. Ni na we wahaherewe amagambo y'ubugingo ngo ayadushyikirize." 
Acts7:39 “Ariko ba sogokuruza banga kumwumvira baramuhinda, ndetse bifuza kwisubirira mu Misiri." 
Acts7:40 Babwira Aroni bati: ‘Turemere imana zo kutuyobora, kuko Musa wa muntu wadukuye mu Misiri tutazi icyamubayeho.’" 
Acts7:41 Ubwo ni bwo bacuze ishusho y'ikimasa bagitambira igitambo, bityo bishimira ikintu bakuye mu bukorikori bwabo." 
Acts7:42 Nuko Imana irabazibukira, irabareka ngo basenge inyenyeri nk'uko byanditswe mu gitabo cy'abahanuzi ngo ‘Mwa Bisiraheli mwe, ya myaka mirongo ine mwamaze mu butayu sinigeze mbaka ibitambo n'amaturo." 
Acts7:43 Nyamara mwahetse ihema ry'ikigirwamana Moleki n'ishusho y'inyenyeri y'ikigirwamana Refani, ni yo mashusho mwaremeye kuramya. Nuko rero nzatuma mujyanwa ho iminyago babarenze i Babiloni.’" 
Acts7:44 “Mu butayu ba sogokuruza bari bafite Ihema rihamya Isezerano Imana yagiranye na bo, rya rindi yari yategetse Musa gushinga akurikije urugero yamweretse." 
Acts7:45 Hanyuma ba sogokuruza bahererekanya iryo Hema kugeza mu gihe cya Yozuwe, aba ari we ubayobora baza kwigarurira iki gihugu Imana imaze kucyirukanamo amahanga, rirahaguma kugeza mu gihe cya Dawidi." 
Acts7:46 Dawidi uwo yatonnye ku Mana, asaba uburenganzira bwo kubakira Imana ya Yakobo Inzu." 
Acts7:47 Nyamara ni Salomo wayubakiye iyo Nzu. 
Acts7:48 “Ariko Usumbabyose ntaba mu mazu yubatswe n'abantu, nk'uko byavuzwe n'umuhanuzi ati:" 
Acts7:49 ‘Ijuru ni intebe yanjye ya cyami, naho isi ni akabaho nkandagizaho ibirenge. None se muzanyubakira nzu ki? Ni hehe mubona ko natura?" 
Acts7:50 Mbese si jye waremye ibyo byose?’ 
Acts7:51 “Yemwe bantu b'ibyigomeke! Yemwe bantu batagira umutima kandi b'ibipfamatwi! Muri kimwe na ba sokuruza, muhora murwanya Mwuka Muziranenge!" 
Acts7:52 Mbese hari umuhanuzi n'umwe ba sokuruza batatoteje? Ese ntibishe n'abahanuye kuza kwa ya Ntungane? None namwe ni yo mwagambaniye murayica. 
Acts7:53 Mwahawe Amategeko y'Imana muyashyikirijwe n'abamarayika, nyamara ntimwayakurikiza.”" 
Acts7:54 Abari aho bumvise ibyo Sitefano avuze, bicwa n'uburakari bamuhekenyera amenyo." 
Acts7:55 Naho Sitefano yuzura Mwuka Muziranenge, ahanga amaso mu ijuru abona ikuzo ry'Imana na Yezu ahagaze iburyo bwayo." 
Acts7:56 Aravuga ati: “Dore ndareba ijuru rikinguye, n'Umwana w'umuntu ahagaze iburyo bw'Imana.”" 
Acts7:57 Baherako bavuza induru barasakuza cyane, baziba amatwi bamwiroheraho icyarimwe," 
Acts7:58 baramukurubana bamuvana mu mujyi maze bamutera amabuye. Abamushinjaga basigira imyitero yabo umusore witwaga Sawuli. 
Acts7:59 Bakimutera amabuye Sitefano arasenga ati: “Nyagasani Yezu, nyakira.”" 
Acts7:60 Nuko arapfukama avuga aranguruye ati: “Nyagasani, ubababarire iki cyaha.” Akimara kuvuga atyo araca." 
Acts8:1 Ibyo kwica Sitefano Sawuli yari abishyigikiye. Uwo munsi Abakristo b'i Yeruzalemu batangira gutotezwa bikomeye. Uretse Intumwa, bose batatanira mu ntara ya Yudeya n'iya Samariya." 
Acts8:2 Abantu bubahaga Imana bashyingura Sitefano kandi baramuririra cyane. 
Acts8:3 Naho Sawuli we agumya kuyogoza Umuryango wa Kristo. Yavaga mu rugo akajya mu rundi, agakurubana abagabo n'abagore akabata muri gereza." 
Acts8:4 Abatatanye bagenda hose bamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza. 
Acts8:5 Filipo we ajya mu mujyi wo muri Samariya, atangariza abaho ibya Kristo." 
Acts8:6 Rubanda bitondera ibyo Filipo avuga, bose bagahuza umutima mu kubyumva no kureba ibitangaza yakoraga." 
Acts8:7 Ingabo za Satani zavaga mu bantu benshi zomongana, kandi abamugaye benshi n'abacumbagiraga bagakira." 
Acts8:8 Nuko muri uwo mujyi hakaba ibyishimo byinshi. 
Acts8:9 Muri uwo mujyi kandi hari umugabo witwaga Simoni wari usanzwe aragura agatangaza Abanyasamariya, akiyita umuntu w'akataraboneka." 
Acts8:10 Nuko abantu bose bakamurangarira, abakuru n'abato bavuga bati: “Uyu muntu arimo ububasha bw'Imana, ubwo bita Indahangarwa.”" 
Acts8:11 Bamuhugiraho kuko bari bamaze igihe batangazwa n'ubupfumu bwe. 
Acts8:12 Bamaze kwemera Ubutumwa bwiza Filipo yabazaniye yerekeye ubwami bw'Imana na Yezu Kristo, abagabo n'abagore barabatizwa." 
Acts8:13 Nuko Simoni na we yemera izo nyigisho arabatizwa, yihambira kuri Filipo. Abonye ibimenyetso atanze n'ibitangaza bikomeye akoze arumirwa." 
Acts8:14 Intumwa za Kristo zari i Yeruzalemu zumvise ko abo muri Samariya bemeye Ijambo ry'Imana, ziboherereza Petero na Yohani." 
Acts8:15 Bagezeyo barabasabira ngo bahabwe Mwuka Muziranenge," 
Acts8:16 kuko ari nta n'umwe muri bo yari yamanukiraho, ariko gusa bari barabatijwe mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu." 
Acts8:17 Petero na Yohani bamaze kubarambikaho ibiganza, abo bantu bahita bahabwa Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Acts8:18 Simoni abonye uko abo Intumwa za Kristo zirambitseho ibiganza bahawe Mwuka Muziranenge, azanira amafaranga Petero na Yohani arababwira ati:" 
Acts8:19 “Mumpe nanjye ubwo bushobozi, kugira ngo uwo nzarambikaho ibiganza ahabwe Mwuka Muziranenge.”" 
Acts8:20 Petero aramubwira ati: “Uragapfana n'amafaranga yawe! Ubonye ngo utekereze ko wagura impano y'Imana amafaranga! 
Acts8:21 Ntaho uhuriye n'ibi ngibi, nta n'icyo byakungura kuko imigambi yawe itagororokeye Imana." 
Acts8:22 Nuko rero wihane ubwo bugome bwawe maze usabe Nyagasani, urebe ko yakubabarira uwo mugambi wagize." 
Acts8:23 Erega ndasanga umazwe n'ishyari kandi wahambiranye n'ubuhemu!” 
Acts8:24 Simoni ni ko gusubiza ati: “Munsabire Nyagasani, kugira ngo hatagira ikimbaho mu byo mumaze kuvuga.”" 
Acts8:25 Petero na Yohani bamaze kwemeza abantu ibyo biboneye no kubabwira ijambo rya Nyagasani, basubira i Yeruzalemu. Bari mu nzira bamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza mu mirenge myinshi yo muri Samariya." 
Acts8:26 Umumarayika wa Nyagasani abwira Filipo ati: “Haguruka ugende werekeje mu majyepfo, ufate umuhanda utakiri nyabagendwa uva i Yeruzalemu ugana i Gaza.”" 
Acts8:27 Nuko Filipo arahaguruka aragenda, ahura n'Umunyetiyopiya wari icyegera cya Kandake umwamikazi w'Abanyetiyopiya, ari na we ugenga imari ye yose. Yari yaragiye i Yeruzalemu gusenga Imana." 
Acts8:28 Mu gihe yari mu nzira ataha, yari yicaye mu igare rye asoma igitabo cy'umuhanuzi Ezayi." 
Acts8:29 Mwuka w'Imana abwira Filipo ati: “Egera uriya mugabo wicaye mu igare mugendane.” 
Acts8:30 Filipo ariruka maze yumva wa mugabo asoma igitabo cy'umuhanuzi Ezayi, aramubaza ati: “Mbese aho ibyo usoma urabyumva?”" 
Acts8:31 Undi aramusubiza ati: “Nkabyumva nte se ntabonye unsobanurira?” Nuko asaba Filipo kurira ngo bicarane mu igare. 
Acts8:32 Ibyo yasomaga mu Byanditswe byari ibi ngo: “Yajyanywe nk'intama bajyana mu ibagiro, yabaye nk'umwana w'intama uceceka bawukemura ubwoya, ntiyigeze abumbura umunwa." 
Acts8:33 Bamucishije bugufi ntihagira umurengera. Ni nde uzamenyekanisha urubyaro rwe ko nta cyo yasize? Koko yakuwe ku isi.” 
Acts8:34 Uwo mugaragu w'umugabekazi abaza Filipo ati: “Mbese ni nde umuhanuzi yavuzeho ibyo ngibyo? Ni we wivugaga, cyangwa ni undi muntu yavugaga?”" 
Acts8:35 Filipo ahera kuri ibyo byanditswe, amubwira Ubutumwa bwiza bwerekeye Yezu."
