Acts25:11 Niba narishe amategeko, cyangwa se niba narakoze icyaha cyanyicisha sinanga gupfa. Ariko rero niba nta na kimwe nakoze mu byo aba bandega, nta muntu ushobora kubangabiza. Njuririye umwami w'i Roma!”" 
Acts25:12 Nuko Fesito amaze kuvugana n'abajyanama be, aramusubiza ati: “Ubwo ujuririye umwami w'i Roma uzamusanga!”" 
Acts25:13 Hashize iminsi Umwami Agiripa na Berenike bajya i Kayizariya kuramutsa Fesito. 
Acts25:14 Bahamaze iminsi Fesito atekerereza umwami ibya Pawulo agira ati: “Hari umugabo Feliki yasize afunze. 
Acts25:15 Nageze i Yeruzalemu abatambyi bakuru n'abakuru b'imiryango y'Abayahudi baramundegera, bansaba kumucira iteka." 
Acts25:16 Ariko mbasubiza ko atari umuco w'Abanyaroma gucira umuntu iteka, atabanje guhangana n'abamurega ngo yiregure." 
Acts25:17 Igihe nazaga twarazanye na bo maze sinakerereza urubanza, bwarakeye mpita njya mu rukiko mpamagaza uwo muntu." 
Acts25:18 Abamuregaga bahagurutse ntibagira ikirego na kimwe bamurega mu bibi nakekaga. 
Acts25:19 Ahubwo bari bafite ibyo bapfa na we byerekeye idini yabo n'umuntu witwa Yezu wapfuye, Pawulo we akemeza ko ariho." 
Acts25:20 Bitewe n'uko ntabashije kumenya uko nasuzuma izo mpaka zabo, ni ko kubaza Pawulo ko yakunda kujya i Yeruzalemu ngo aburanireyo ibyo bamurega." 
Acts25:21 Nuko Pawulo ahita ajurira ashaka ko ibye bizarangizwa na nyir'icyubahiro umwami w'i Roma, ni bwo ntegetse ko afungwa kugeza ubwo nzamwohereza ku mwami.”" 
Acts25:22 Agiripa ni ko kubwira Fesito ati: “Nanjye nakunda kwiyumvira uwo muntu.” Na we ati: “Ejo uzamwumva.” 
Acts25:23 Nuko bukeye Agiripa na Berenike binjirana ishema ryinshi mu rukiko, bashagawe n'abasirikari bakuru n'abagabo b'ibikomerezwa bo muri uwo mujyi. Fesito ategeka ko bazana Pawulo." 
Acts25:24 Nuko Fesito aravuga ati: “Mwami Agiripa, namwe mwese abari hano, uyu muntu mureba aha ni we Abayahudi bose b'ino n'ab'i Yeruzalemu bandegeye, basakabaka bavuga ko adakwiriye kubaho!" 
Acts25:25 Ariko nasanze ari nta kintu yakoze gikwiriye kumwicisha, kandi kubera ko na we yajuririye Nyiricyubahiro, niyemeza kumwohereza i Roma." 
Acts25:26 Icyakora nta kirego na kimwe cy'ukuri mbonye nakwandikira umwami w'i Roma. Ngicyo igitumye muzana imbere yanyu, cyane cyane imbere yawe Mwami Agiripa, kugira ngo nimumara kumubaza mbone icyo nandika," 
Acts25:27 kuko nasanze nta cyo bivuze kohereza umuntu w'imfungwa ntagaragaje neza icyo aregwa.” 
Acts26:1 Nuko Agiripa abwira Pawulo ati: “Ngaho iregure.” Pawulo arambura ukuboko atangira kwiregura ati: 
Acts26:2 “Mwami Agiripa, nshimishijwe no kuba ndi imbere yawe uyu munsi, kugira ngo niregure ku byo Abayahudi bandeze byose," 
Acts26:3 cyane cyane kuko usanzwe uzi neza imico y'Abayahudi n'ibyo bajyaho impaka. Ni cyo gitumye ngusaba ngo wihanganire kunyumva. 
Acts26:4 “Abayahudi bose bazi imibereho yanjye uhereye mu buto bwanjye, kuva mbere mba mu gihugu cyacu ndetse n'igihe nari i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts26:5 Banzi kuva kera, babishatse bashobora guhamya ko nahoze ndi Umufarizayi, ni ukuvuga uwo mu ishyaka ry'abakurikiza idini yacu ku buryo bukataje." 
Acts26:6 None ubu ndaregwa ko nizera ibyo Imana yasezeraniye ba sogokuruza. 
Acts26:7 Iryo sezerano ni ryo imiryango yacu cumi n'ibiri ikomoka kuri Isiraheli yizera kuzahabwa, ari na cyo gituma ishishikarira gusenga Imana ijoro n'amanywa. None Nyagasani, kwizera iryo sezerano ni ibyo Abayahudi bandega!" 
Acts26:8 Kuki mwihandagaza muvuga muti: ‘Ntibishoboka ko Imana yazura abapfuye?’ 
Acts26:9 “Nanjye ubwanjye natekerezaga ko ngomba kurwanya ibya Yezu w'i Nazareti uko nshoboye kose. 
Acts26:10 Ni na byo nakoze i Yeruzalemu: benshi mu ntore z'Imana nabashyize muri gereza mpawe uburenganzira n'abakuru bo mu batambyi, kandi n'igihe babaga baciriwe urwo gupfa narabishyigikiraga." 
Acts26:11 Kenshi mu nsengero zose nabahanishaga bikomeye, nkabahatira no gutuka Kristo. Nakabyaga kubarakarira ku buryo mbatoteza kugeza no mu mijyi yo mu mahanga." 
Acts26:12 “Ni cyo cyatumye njya i Damasi abatambyi bakuru bampaye uburenganzira n'amabwiriza. 
Acts26:13 Nuko rero Mwami Agiripa, ndi mu nzira ngenda ku manywa y'ihangu, ngiye kubona mbona umucyo uturutse mu ijuru ukaze kuruta uw'izuba, urangota kimwe n'abo twagendanaga." 
Acts26:14 Twese twikubita hasi maze numva ijwi ry'umbwira mu Giheburayi ati: ‘Sawuli, Sawuli! Urantotereza iki? Uribabariza ubusa – “Nta nduru irwana n'ingoma!” ’" 
Acts26:15 Nuko ndabaza nti: ‘Uri nde Nyagasani?’ Na we aransubiza ati: ‘Ndi Yezu uwo utoteza. 
Acts26:16 Ariko byuka uhagarare. Igituma nkubonekeye ni ukugira ngo nkugire umugaragu wanjye n'umugabo wo guhamya ibyo ubonye kuri jye, kimwe n'ibyo nzakwereka." 
Acts26:17 Nzagutabara ngukize Abayahudi n'abanyamahanga ngutumyeho. 
Acts26:18 Ngutumye kubahumura amaso kugira ngo ubahindure, bave mu mwijima bagere mu mucyo, bave no mu bushobozi bwa Satani bagarukire Imana, kugira ngo nibanyemera bababarirwe ibyaha, kandi bahabwe ku munani wagenewe abantu Imana yagize intore zayo.’" 
Acts26:19 “Kubera iyo mpamvu Mwami Agiripa, nta cyari kumbuza kumvira ibyo neretswe biturutse mu ijuru." 
Acts26:20 Nuko mbanziriza i Damasi, maze ngera i Yeruzalemu no mu ntara yose ya Yudeya ndetse no mu yandi mahanga, nemeza abaho bose kwihana ngo bahindukirire Imana, maze bakore ibikwiranye no kwihana." 
Acts26:21 Ni cyo cyatumye Abayahudi bamfata igihe nari mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana, bakagerageza kunyica." 
Acts26:22 No kugeza uyu munsi Imana iracyantabara, nkaba mpagaritswe aha no kubyemeza aboroheje n'abakomeye. Nta bindi mvuga bitari ibyo abahanuzi na Musa bavuze ko bizaba:" 
Acts26:23 ko Kristo yagombaga kubabazwa agapfa maze akaba ubimburiye abandi kuzuka, akava mu bapfuye ngo atangaze ko ari we rumuri rumurikira Abayahudi ndetse n'amahanga yose.”" 
Acts26:24 Pawulo amaze kwiregura atyo Fesito ariyamirira ati: “Pawulo, wasaze! Wize byinshi none biragushajije!”" 
Acts26:25 Pawulo aramusubiza ati: “Nyakubahwa Fesito, sindi umusazi ahubwo ibyo mvuga ni iby'ukuri, kandi ni iby'umuntu ushyira mu gaciro." 
Acts26:26 Ibyo byose Umwami Agiripa arabizi, ni na cyo kintera kumubwira ntishisha. Ndemeza ko nta na kimwe muri ibyo atazi kuko bitakozwe rwihishwa." 
Acts26:27 Mwami Agiripa, mbese wemera ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi? Nzi ko ubyemera!”" 
Acts26:28 Nuko Agiripa abwira Pawulo ati: “Mbese uragira ngo muri aka kanya gato unyemeze kuba Umukristo?” 
Acts26:29 Pawulo aramusubiza ati: “Kaba ari akanya gato cyangwa kanini, ndasaba Imana ngo uretse wowe gusa, ahubwo n'abanyumva none mwese mumere nkanjye, ukuyeho izi ngoyi ndiho gusa!”" 
Acts26:30 Umwami n'Umutegetsi Fesito na Berenike n'abandi bari bicaranye na bo barahaguruka. 
Acts26:31 Bagitirimuka aho baravugana bati: “Uyu muntu nta cyaha yakoze cyo kumwicisha, habe n'icyo kumufungisha.”" 
Acts26:32 Nuko Agiripa abwira Fesito ati: “Uyu muntu yajyaga kurekurwa iyo atajuririra umwami w'i Roma.” 
Acts27:1 Bamaze kwemeza ko dufata ubwato tukajya mu Butaliyani, bashinga Pawulo n'izindi mbohe umukapiteni witwa Yuli wo mu mutwe w'abasirikari bita uw'umwami w'i Roma." 
Acts27:2 Twurira ubwato buvuye Aduramiti, bwari bugiye kujya mu byambu byo mu ntara ya Aziya, maze turagenda. Tujyana na Arisitariko ukomoka i Tesaloniki muri Masedoniya." 
Acts27:3 Bukeye duhagarara i Sidoni, Yuli agirira Pawulo neza amuha uruhusa rwo gusura incuti ze, kugira ngo zimuhe icyo akeneye." 
Acts27:4 Tuvuye aho tugenda dukikiye ikirwa cya Shipure, ku buryo kidukingira umuyaga waduturukaga imbere." 
Acts27:5 Tuhavuye tunyura mu nyanja ihereranye n'intara za Silisiya na Pamfiliya, maze turambuka turasuka i Mira ho mu ntara yitwa Lisiya." 
Acts27:6 Aho ngaho umukapiteni ahabona ubundi bwato buturutse Alegisanderiya bujya mu Butaliyani, maze arabutwuriza." 
Acts27:7 Tumara iminsi itari mike tugenda buhoro, tugera ahateganye n'umujyi w'i Kinida bitugoye. Umuyaga utubujije gukomeza, ni bwo dukikiye ikirwa cya Kireti, ahateganye na Salumoni kugira ngo kidukingire umuyaga." 
Acts27:8 Tumaze kuhakikira bituruhije, tugera ku cyambu cyitwa Myaromyiza hafi y'umujyi wa Lasaya." 
Acts27:9 Turahatinda ndetse turenza umunsi w'Abayahudi wo kwigomwa kurya, ku buryo gukomeza urugendo mu bwato kwari ukwigerezaho. Pawulo ni ko kubaburira ati:" 
Acts27:10 “Mwa bagabo mwe, ndabona uru rugendo rurimo ingorane: ubwato kimwe n'imitwaro buhetse bizangirika, si byo gusa natwe bishobora kuduhitana.”" 
Acts27:11 Ariko umukapiteni aho kwita ku cyo Pawulo avuga, akurikiza inama y'umutware w'abasare na nyir'ubwato." 
Acts27:12 Icyo cyambu nticyari kiboneye ku buryo bari kuhamara amezi y'imbeho n'umuyaga, ni cyo cyatumye abenshi bahuza inama yo kuvayo, biringira kugera ahitwa Fenike, kugira ngo baharangirize ayo mezi y'imbeho. Fenike ni icyambu cyo muri Kireti cyerekeje aho imiyaga ituruka, uwo mu majyepfo y'iburengerazuba n'uwo mu majyaruguru y'iburengerazuba." 
Acts27:13 Bumvise umuyaga woroshye uva mu majyepfo utangiye guhuha, bibwira ko bashyikiriye icyo bashakaga, ni ko kuzitura ubwato bagenda bakikiye ikirwa cya Kireti ahegereye inkombe." 
Acts27:14 Ariko bidatinze ishuheri y'umuyaga witwa “Majyaruguru y'iburasirazuba”, itangira guhuha ituruka ku kirwa." 
Acts27:15 Ikubita ubwato bananirwa kuyirwanya, ni ko kubureka bujya iyo umuyaga ushaka." 
Acts27:16 Igihe twanyuraga mu majyepfo y'akarwa kitwa Kawuda, twabonye aho twikinga umuyaga akanya gato. Aho ni ho twashoboye kwiyegereza akato kaziritse ku bwato bwacu ariko bituruhije." 
Acts27:17 Abasare barakūriza bagashyira mu bwato, maze bazengurutsa ubwato imigozi ikomeye, barabuhambira kugira ngo butajegajega. Nuko barekurira mu mazi ingiga nsikabwato kugira ngo bugende buhoro, ibyo babitewe no gutinya kurigita mu musenyi usaya, ahagana ku nkombe za Libiya. Nuko ubwato butwarwa n'umuyaga." 
Acts27:18 Dukomeza guteraganwa bikomeye n'inkubi y'umuyaga, ku buryo bukeye bwaho batangiye kuroha mu nyanja imitwaro ubwato bwari bwikoreye, kugira ngo bwe kuremererwa." 
Acts27:19 Ku munsi wa gatatu, abasare ubwabo bafata ibikoresho by'ubwato na byo barabiroha." 
Acts27:20 Twamaze iminsi myinshi tutareba izuba n'inyenyeri, umuyaga n'umuhengeri bikomeza guhōrera kugeza ubwo tutari twiringiye ko hari ubasha kurokoka." 
Acts27:21 Bari bamaze iminsi batarya. Pawulo ni ko guhagarara hagati yabo arababwira ati: “Mwa bagabo mwe, byajyaga kuba byiza iyo muza kunyumva ntimuve muri Kireti, ntimwari kugera muri aya makuba no guhomba ibintu bingana bitya." 
Acts27:22 Ariko ubu bwo ndabagira inama yatuma musubiza umutima mu nda, kuko ari nta n'umwe muri mwe uzagira icyo aba keretse ubwato." 
Acts27:23 Iri joro nabonekewe n'umumarayika w'Imana niyeguriye kandi nkorera," 
Acts27:24 arambwira ati: ‘Pawulo, witinya! Ni ngombwa ko ugera imbere y'umwami w'i Roma kandi dore Imana ikugiriye neza, igusezeranyije kugukiza wowe n'aba bose mufatanyije urugendo.’" 
Acts27:25 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero mwa bagabo mwe, nimukomere! Nizeye Imana, bizaba nk'uko nabibwiwe." 
Acts27:26 Icyakora hari ikirwa ubwato buzagomba kudusukaho.” 
Acts27:27 Mu ijoro rya cumi na kane, igihe tugitwarwa n'imbaraga z'umuyaga mu Nyanja ya Mediterane rwagati, nko mu gicuku abasare bibwira ko bari hafi kugera imusozi." 
Acts27:28 Bamanurira mu mazi umugozi uziritseho icyuma kugira ngo bapime uko hareshya, basanga ari metero mirongo itatu n'indwi z'ubujyakuzimu. Bicumye gato bongera gupima, babona ari metero makumyabiri n'umunani." 
Acts27:29 Batinya ko ubwato bwasekura ku ntaza, ni ko kumanurira mu mazi ibitsikabwato bine by'ibyuma bifashwe n'imigozi, ngo ahari byafata hasi bikabuhagarika, maze basaba Imana ko bucya vuba." 
Acts27:30 Abasare biyemeza gucika ni ko gusubiza mu mazi ka kato, bitwaje ko bagiye kurekurira mu mazi ibindi byo guhagarika ubwato." 
Acts27:31 Pawulo ni ko kubwira umukapiteni n'abasirikari ati: “Aba nibataguma mu bwato, mwebwe ntimushobora kurokoka”." 
Acts27:32 Abasirikari bahita batema imigozi iziritse ako kato, barakareka amazi aragatwara." 
Acts27:33 Bujya gucya Pawulo abasaba bose kugira icyo bafungura agira ati: “Dore uyu ni umunsi wa cumi n'ine muhangayitse, nta cyo mukoza ku munwa." 
Acts27:34 Ndabasabye rero nimufungure, kugira ngo mubone kubaho. Erega nta n'umwe muri mwe uzagira icyo aba, habe no gupfuka agasatsi na kamwe!”" 
Acts27:35 Amaze kuvuga atyo afata umugati, ashimira Imana imbere yabo bose, arawumanyura atangira gufungura." 
Acts27:36 Bose bagarura agatima na bo barafungura. 
Acts27:37 Abari mu bwato twese twari magana abiri na mirongo irindwi na batandatu. 
Acts27:38 Umuntu wese amaze guhaga bajugunya ingano zasigaye mu nyanja, kugira ngo borohereze ubwato." 
Acts27:39 Bumaze gucya abasare ntibamenya ahantu bitegeye aho ari ho, ariko babonye ikigobe gifite inkuka z'umusenyi, biyemeza ko bishobotse ari ho bomorera ubwato." 
Acts27:40 Bazitura bya byuma bihagarika ubwato birokera mu mazi, bahambura n'imigozi yari iziritse ingashya zerekeza ubwato, bazamura umwenda w'imbere ubugendesha kugira ngo umuyaga ubusunike bagane ku nkombe." 
Acts27:41 Ariko ubwato bugeze ku gashoro butikura mu musenyi, igihande cy'imbere kirigitamo ku buryo kitanyeganyega, naho icy'inyuma gitangira kumenagurwa n'umuhengeri." 
Acts27:42 Abasirikari biyemeza kwica imbohe zose, kugira ngo hatagira uwoga agacika." 
Acts27:43 Ariko umukapiteni ashaka gukiza Pawulo ni ko kubabuza kubikora, ibiri amambu ategeka ko abazi koga babanza kugera ku nkombe," 
Acts27:44 abasigaye bakabona kuhagera bogeye ku mbaho cyangwa ku bimene by'ubwato. Uko ni ko bose babashije gufata imusozi amahoro. 
Acts28:1 Tumaze guhonoka icyo cyago tumenya yuko ikirwa tugezeho cyitwa Malita. 
Acts28:2 Abaturage baho batwakira neza bitangaje, baducanira umuriro kuko imvura yagwaga hariho n'imbeho." 
Acts28:3 Pawulo amaze gusakuma inkwi ngo azishyire mu muriro, inzoka isosorokamo kubera ubushyuhe maze imusumira ikiganza." 
Acts28:4 Abaturage babonye icyo gisimba kimunagana ku kiganza baravugana bati: “Ni ukuri uyu muntu agomba kuba ari umwicanyi. Nubwo yakize urw'inyanja, Idaca urwa kibera ntiyareka abaho!”" 
Acts28:5 Ariko Pawulo akungutira iyo nzoka mu muriro, we ntiyagira icyo aba na mba." 
Acts28:6 Abantu bategereza ko abyimbirwa, cyangwa ko yitura hasi agapfa, bamara umwanya bamwitegereza. Babonye nta cyo abaye barahindura bati: “Si umuntu, ni imwe mu mana!”" 
Acts28:7 Hafi aho hakaba amasambu y'umutware w'icyo kirwa witwa Pubuliyo. Na we atwakira neza tumara iwe iminsi itatu. 
Acts28:8 Se wa Pubuliyo yari mu kirago ari indembe, arwaye amacinya ahinda n'umuriro. Pawulo ajya kumureba, amaze gusenga amurambikaho ibiganza aramukiza." 
Acts28:9 Ibyo bimaze kuba, abandi barwayi b'icyo kirwa na bo baraza abakiza indwara." 
Acts28:10 Abaho baherako baduha icyubahiro cyinshi, kandi ubwo twari twuriye ubwato ngo tugende, badupakirira ibyo twari dukeneye mu rugendo." 
Acts28:11 Hashize amezi atatu twurira ubwato bwavaga Alegisanderiya bwitiriwe imana z'impanga, ubwo bwato bwamaze amezi y'imbeho n'umuyaga bwikinze kuri icyo kirwa." 
Acts28:12 Tugera mu mujyi wa Sirakuza tuhamara iminsi itatu. 
Acts28:13 Tuhavuye dukikira inkombe tugera ahitwa Regiyo. Hashize umunsi umwe umuyaga utangira guhuha uturutse mu majyepfo, maze ku munsi wa kabiri twururukira i Puteyoli." 
Acts28:14 Tuhasanga abavandimwe badusaba kumarana na bo icyumweru. Nyuma turahava tugana i Roma. 
Acts28:15 Abavandimwe b'i Roma bumvise ko tuje baza kudusanganirira ku Isoko rya Apiyo, n'ahitwa Macumbatatu. Pawulo ababonye ashima Imana kandi biramukomeza cyane." 
Acts28:16 Tugeze i Roma bemerera Pawulo kwicumbikira ukwe, afite umusirikari wo kumurinda." 
Acts28:17 Iminsi itatu ishize Pawulo atumiza abakuru b'Abayahudi b'aho hantu, bamaze guterana arababwira ati: “Bavandimwe, nubwo nta kibi nagiriye bene wacu b'Abayahudi, cyangwa ngo mbe ngira icyo nkora gicishije ukubiri n'imihango ya ba sogokuruza, nyamara nabohewe i Yeruzalemu nshyikirizwa Abanyaroma." 
Acts28:18 Basuzumye ibyo ndegwa basanga nta cyo nakoze cyo kunyicisha, bashaka kundekura." 
Acts28:19 Ariko Abayahudi babirwanyije biba ngombwa ko njuririra umwami w'i Roma, ariko atari uko hari icyo ndega bene wacu." 
Acts28:20 Ngicyo icyatumye mbatumiza kugira ngo tuganire. Koko nashyizwe kuri iyi ngoyi mpōrwa Uwo Abisiraheli bizera kuzabona.” 
Acts28:21 Baramusubiza bati: “Ntabwo twigeze tubona urwandiko ruturutse i Yudeya rukuvuga, ndetse nta n'umwe mu bavandimwe bacu bavuyeyo wigeze akubaraho ikibi." 
Acts28:22 Icyakora turashaka kumenya icyo utekereza, kuko tuzi yuko icyo gice urimo hose bakigaya.”" 
Acts28:23 Basezerana na we umunsi bazongera guterana, uwo munsi ugeze haza benshi bamusanga aho acumbitse. Pawulo ahera mu gitondo ageza nimugoroba arabasobanurira. Abatangariza iby'ubwami bw'Imana agerageza no kubemeza ibyerekeye Yezu, Amategeko ya Musa n'ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi aba ari byo atanga ho umugabo." 
Acts28:24 Bamwe bemezwa n'ibyo avuze, abandi ntibabyemera." 
Acts28:25 Nuko ntibahuza maze igihe benda gutaha, Pawulo yongeraho iri jambo ati: “Mbega ukuntu rya jambo ari iry'ukuri, iryo Mwuka Muziranenge yabwiye ba sogokuruza abinyujije ku muhanuzi Ezayi, agira ati:" 
Acts28:26 ‘Genda ubwire abo bantu uti: Kumva muzumva ariko ntimuzasobanukirwa, kureba muzareba ariko ntimuzabona." 
Acts28:27 Erega aba ni abantu binangiye, biziba amatwi bahunza n'amaso, kugira ngo be kubona be no kumva, kandi be gusobanukirwa, kugira ngo batavaho bangarukira nkabakiza.’ ”" 
Acts28:28 Pawulo yungamo ati: “Nuko none mumenye ko ab'andi mahanga bagejejweho aka gakiza kava ku Mana, bo bazakakira!” [" 
Acts28:29 Amaze kuvuga atyo Abayahudi bataha bajya impaka zikomeye.] 
Acts28:30 Pawulo amara imyaka ibiri yuzuye ari mu icumbi akodesha, kandi akajya yakira abamugendereraga bose." 
Acts28:31 Yatangazaga ubwami bw'Imana kandi akigisha ibyerekeye Nyagasani Yezu Kristo, nta nkomyi nta n'umususu." 
Romans1:1 Ni jye Pawulo ubandikiye, jyewe umugaragu wa Kristo Yezu. Imana yampamagariye kuba Intumwa yayo, intoranyiriza kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwayo bwiza." 
Romans1:2 Ubwo Butumwa Imana yabusezeranye kuva mbere mu Byanditswe yatugeneye, itumye abahanuzi bayo." 
Romans1:3 Buvuga ibyerekeye Umwana wayo Yezu Kristo Umwami wacu. Ukurikije amasekuruza y'abantu akomoka kuri Dawidi, naho ukurikije ibya Mwuka Muziranenge, Imana yerekanye ko ari Umwana wayo, ikoresheje ububasha bwayo igihe imuzuye mu bapfuye." 
Romans1:4  
Romans1:5 Ku bw'uwo Imana yangiriye ubuntu ngo mbe Intumwa yayo, nemeze abo mu mahanga yose ibya Kristo kugira ngo bamwemere, bityo bamwumvire." 
Romans1:6 Namwe muri muri abo kuko Imana yabahamagaye ngo mube aba Yezu Kristo. 
Romans1:7 Ni mwe mwese nandikiye abakundwa n'Imana b'i Roma, abo yahamagariye kuba intore zayo. Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu, ibahe n'amahoro ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
Romans1:8 Mbere na mbere ndashimira Imana yanjye ku bwa Yezu Kristo kubera mwe mwese, kuko kwemera Kristo kwanyu kwamamaye ku isi yose." 
Romans1:9 Imana nkorera n'umutima wanjye wose, namamaza Ubutumwa bwerekeye Umwana wayo, ni yo ntanzeho umugabo ko mpora mbazirikana" 
Romans1:10 mu masengesho. Nyisaba ubudasiba ngo ubu ibe yampa uburyo bwo kuza iwanyu, bivuye ku bushake bwayo." 
Romans1:11 Mbega ukuntu nifuza kubabona, kugira ngo ngire impano ya Mwuka w'Imana mbagezaho yo kubakomeza!" 
Romans1:12 Ndifuza kuba muri mwe ngo muterwe inkunga no kwemera Kristo kwanjye, nanjye nyiterwe n'ukwanyu." 
Romans1:13 Bavandimwe, sinabahisha ko kenshi nafashe umugambi wo kuza iwanyu, ariko kugeza ubu nkagira impamvu zibimbuza. Nifuzaga ko umurimo wanjye wakwera imbuto iwanyu, bityo nkaba nungutse abemera Kristo muri mwe kimwe no mu yandi mahanga nagezemo." 
Romans1:14 Koko nahawe inshingano yo kugeza Ubutumwa bwiza ku bantu bose, baba abasirimu cyangwa abanyamusozi, baba abanyabwenge cyangwa abaswa." 
Romans1:15 Ni cyo gituma nshaka namwe kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwiza, mwebwe abari i Roma." 
Romans1:16 Erega kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza ntibintera isoni, kuko ari bwo bubasha Imana ikoresha ngo ikize uwemera Kristo wese, uhereye ku Bayahudi ukageza no ku bandi." 
Romans1:17 Ubwo Butumwa ni bwo buhishura uburyo Imana iha abantu kuyitunganira babikesha kwemera Kristo, bigatuma bagenda barushaho kumwizera. Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo “Utunganiye Imana abitewe no kuyizera azabaho”." 
Romans1:18 Uhereye mu ijuru, Imana yahishuye uburakari iterwa n'ubugome bwose bw'abantu bayisuzugura bakagira nabi, bagapfukirana ukuri bitewe n'ubwo bugome bwabo." 
Romans1:19 Erega ibyo umuntu ashobora kumenya ku byerekeye Imana bimaze kubagaragarira, kuko Imana ubwayo yabibagaragarije!" 
Romans1:20 Kuva isi yaremwa, ibitaboneka by'Imana – ni ukuvuga ububasha buhoraho bwayo n'ubumana bwayo – abantu babibona mu byo yaremye ku buryo busobanutse. Nta cyo rero bafite bakwireguza." 
Romans1:21 Nubwo bazi Imana, ntibayihaye ikuzo kandi ntibayishimiye nk'uko biyikwiye. Ahubwo ibitekerezo byabo byabaye imburamumaro, kandi ukujijwa kw'imitima yabo kwatumye bahera mu mwijima." 
Romans1:22 Barirase ngo ni abanyabwenge, nyamara babaye ibicucu." 
Romans1:23 Ikuzo ry'Imana idapfa bariguranye amashusho y'abantu bapfa, n'ay'inyoni n'ay'inyamaswa n'ay'ibikurura inda." 
Romans1:24 Ni yo mpamvu Imana yabaretse ngo biyandarike babitewe no kurarikira, bityo bagafatanya gutesha imibiri yabo agaciro." 
Romans1:25 Ukuri kw'Imana bakuguranye ibinyoma, maze baramya kandi bagakorera ibyaremwe babisimbuza Imana Rurema, ari iyo ikwiye gusingizwa iteka ryose. Amina." 
Romans1:26 Ni cyo gituma Imana yabaretse bakagengwa n'irari ritesha agaciro, bigeza aho abagore babo bakoresha imibiri yabo ku buryo bunyuranye n'ubwo yaremewe." 
Romans1:27 Abagabo na bo biba bityo bareka kubana n'abagore bashakanye uko Imana yabigennye, ahubwo barararikirana ubwabo bigeza aho bakora ibizira umugabo ku wundi, maze babona mu mibiri yabo ingaruka ikwiranye n'ubuyobe bwabo." 
Romans1:28 Bibwiraga ko atari ngombwa kumenyana n'Imana, ni cyo cyatumye na yo ibareka ngo bagire ibitekerezo bigoramye, bakore n'ibidakwiye." 
Romans1:29 Buzuye ubugome bw'uburyo bwose, hamwe n'ubugizi bwa nabi n'irari ry'ibintu n'urugomo. Bigwizamo ishyari n'ubwicanyi, amakimbirane n'ubutiriganya n'amatiku, gukwiza amagambo" 
Romans1:30 no gusebanya. Ni abanzi b'Imana n'abanyagasuzuguro n'abirasi, barirarira bagahimba ibibi ntibumvire ababyeyi," 
Romans1:31 barangwaho ubujiji n'ubuhemu, ni indashoboka nta n'impuhwe bagira." 
Romans1:32 Bazi iteka ry'Imana rivuga ko ibyaha nk'ibyo bikwiye guhanishwa urupfu, nyamara ntibabikora gusa ahubwo banashima ababikora." 
Romans2:1 Wowe uwo uri we wese wigira umucamanza w'abandi, nta cyo ufite wakwireguza. Erega igihe unegura abandi nawe uba wineguye, kubera ko ibyo bakora ari ibyo nawe ukora!" 
Romans2:2 Koko kandi tuzi ko Imana icira urubanza abagenza batyo ishingiye ku kuri. 
Romans2:3 Ese wowe wigira umucamanza w'abakora bene ibyo kandi ukora nka bo, ukeka ko uzarokoka urubanza rw'Imana?" 
Romans2:4 Cyangwa wirengagiza ineza yayo isesuye n'ubugwaneza n'ukwihangana kwayo? Mbese ntuzi ko ikugirira neza ityo kugira ngo wihane? 
Romans2:5 Ibiri amambu winangiye umutima, ntiwemera guhanwa. Ni cyo gituma urushaho kwikururira uburakari bw'Imana, kuri wa munsi izahishura imanza zayo zitabera." 
Romans2:6 Ubwo ni bwo izagirira umuntu wese ibikwiranye n'ibyo yakoze. 
Romans2:7 Abazaba baravunwe no gukora neza bagaharanira ikuzo n'icyubahiro no kudapfa, izabaha ubugingo buhoraho." 
Romans2:8 Naho abatera amahane bagahakana ukuri bakiyegurira ubugome, izabagirira umujinya n'uburakari." 
Romans2:9 Umugizi wa nabi uwo ari we wese azagubwaho n'amakuba n'ishavu, bibanzirize ku Bayahudi bigere no ku batari Abayahudi." 
Romans2:10 Naho abagiraneza bose bazahabwa ikuzo n'icyubahiro n'amahoro, bibanzirize ku Bayahudi bigere no ku batari Abayahudi," 
Romans2:11 kuko Imana ifata abantu bose kimwe. 
Romans2:12 Abacumura bose batazi Amategeko bazapfa batazize ayo mategeko, naho abacumura bose bazi ayo mategeko bazacirwa urubanza rushingiye kuri yo." 
Romans2:13 Koko rero abumva Amategeko si bo ntungane ku Mana, keretse abayakurikiza gusa." 
Romans2:14 Abanyamahanga ntibazi Amategeko, nyamara iyo bayumviye bayabwirijwe n'imitima yabo, baba bibereye itegeko ubwabo kandi nta mategeko basanganywe." 
Romans2:15 Bityo ibikorwa byabo byerekana ko amategeko y'Imana yanditswe mu mitima yabo, n'imitima yabo na yo irabihamya, kimwe n'ibitekerezo byabo bibabwira biti: “Wakoze nabi”, cyangwa biti: “Wakoze neza”." 
Romans2:16 Ni ko bizamera ku munsi Imana izaca urubanza rw'ibihishwe mu mitima y'abantu ikoresheje Kristo Yezu – ni na ko Ubutumwa bwiza nahawe bubyemeza. 
Romans2:17 Noneho wowe witwa Umuyahudi, wishingikiriza ku Mategeko kandi ukarata Imana yawe," 
Romans2:18 uzi icyo Imana ishaka kandi wigishijwe n'Amategeko yayo guhitamo ibyiza. 
Romans2:19 Wowe wemeza ko uri umurandasi w'impumyi n'urumuri ruboneshereza abari mu mwijima," 
Romans2:20 ukaba n'umwigisha w'injiji n'umwarimu w'abana, uzi ko muri ayo Mategeko ufite ubumenyi n'ukuri nya byo." 
Romans2:21 None se ubwo bimeze bityo, kuki wigisha abandi ntiwiyigishe? Ubuzanya kwiba kandi ukiba!" 
Romans2:22 Ubwiriza kudasambana kandi ugasambana! Uvuga ko wanga ibigirwamana urunuka kandi ugasahura ingoro zabyo! 
Romans2:23 Urata Amategeko kandi ugasuzuguza Imana uyacaho! 
Romans2:24 Nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga, “Ni mwebwe mutuma abatari Abayahudi batuka Imana.”" 
Romans2:25 Niba ukurikiza Amategeko gukebwa biba bigufitiye akamaro, ariko niba uyarengaho ni nk'aho waba utigeze ukebwa." 
Romans2:26 Naho rero umuntu utigeze akebwa agakurikiza ibiri mu Mategeko byose, mbese Imana ntizamufata nk'aho yaba yarakebwe?" 
Romans2:27 Ndetse utigeze akebwa umubiri ariko agakurikiza amategeko y'Imana, uwo azagucira urubanza wowe uca kuri ayo mategeko, nubwo ufite inyandiko yayo kandi warakebwe." 
Romans2:28 Koko rero ikibonekera amaso gusa si cyo kiranga Umuyahudi nyakuri, kandi gukebwa umubiri gusa si ko gukebwa nyakuri." 
Romans2:29 Ahubwo Umuyahudi nyakuri arangwa n'ibiri mu mutima we, akaba yarakebwe ku mutima bigizwe na Mwuka w'Imana, bitavuye ku Mategeko yanditswe. Uwo nguwo aba adashaka gushimwa n'abantu, ahubwo ngo ashimwe n'Imana." 
Romans3:1 None se kuba Umuyahudi birushije iki kutaba we? Mbese gukebwa byo bifite kamaro ki? 
Romans3:2 Ku buryo bwose ni kanini! Icya mbere Abayahudi ni bo bashinzwe amabwiriza y'Imana. 
Romans3:3 None se naho bamwe muri bo baba barabaye abahemu, ubuhemu bwabo bwatuma Imana ireka kuba indahemuka?" 
Romans3:4 Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ni ngombwa kumenya ko Imana ari inyakuri, naho umuntu wese yaba umubeshyi. Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Ibyo uvuga bifite ishingiro, washyirwa mu rubanza watsinda.”" 
Romans3:5 None rero niba ubugome bwacu bushyira ku mugaragaro ubutungane bw'Imana, ibyo se ni ukuvuga iki? Bibaye bityo igihe Imana irakaye ikaduhana, mbese iba iturenganyije? (Ibyo mbivuze nk'uko abantu babivuga.)" 
Romans3:6 Ntibikanavugwe! None se Imana iramutse irenganya, yazashobora ite gucira abantu bose urubanza?" 
Romans3:7 Icyakora niba ikinyoma cyanjye gituma ukuri kw'Imana kurushaho kugaragara bikayihesha ikuzo, kuki jyewe nkigomba guhōrwa icyaha cyanjye?" 
Romans3:8 Niba ari uko bimeze, ni kuki tutakora ikibi kugira ngo kivemo icyiza, nk'uko bamwe batubeshyera ngo ni ko tuvuga? Abo ngabo bazacirwa urubanza rubakwiriye." 
Romans3:9 Bite rero? Twebwe Abayahudi se hari icyo turusha abandi? Nta na gito. Nk'uko tumaze kubigaragaza, Abayahudi kimwe n'abatari Abayahudi, ibyaha ni byo bibagenga bose." 
Romans3:10 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nta muntu n'umwe w'intungane ubaho," 
Romans3:11 nta n'umwe usobanukiwe, nta n'umwe wambaza Imana." 
Romans3:12 Bose bayiteshutseho, bose uko bangana ni imburamumaro, ntawe ukora ibikwiye, habe n'umwe!”" 
Romans3:13 “Bafite akarimi gashyanuka, ariko bikingirije ubwicanyi.” “Ibyo bavuga bimera nk'ubumara bw'incira.”" 
Romans3:14 “Amagambo yabo yuzuyemo imivumo no gukariha.” 
Romans3:15 “Bihutira kumena amaraso," 
Romans3:16 aho banyuze hasigara ari amatongo n'umubabaro," 
Romans3:17 ntibamenya imigenzereze y'amahoro.” 
Romans3:18 “Ntibigera batinya Imana.” 
Romans3:19 Tuzi ko ibyo Amategeko y'Imana avuga byose abibwira abagengwa na yo, kugira ngo hatagira ubona icyo yireguza, kandi ngo abari ku isi bose bashyirwe mu rubanza imbere y'Imana." 
Romans3:20 Ngiyo impamvu nta muntu n'umwe uba intungane imbere y'Imana, yitwaje ko akurikiza amategeko yayo. Icyo Amategeko abereyeho ni ukumenyesha umuntu ko yacumuye." 
Romans3:21 Ubu ariko Imana yagaragaje uburyo igira abantu intungane imbere yayo, Amategeko atabigizemo uruhare. Ubwo buryo bwemejwe n'Amategeko n'ibyanditswe n'abahanuzi." 
Romans3:22 Ibagira intungane babikesha kwemera Yezu Kristo. Ibigirira abamwizera bose nta kurobanura. 
Romans3:23 Koko bose bakoze ibyaha, ntibagera ku kigero cy'ikuzo ry'Imana." 
Romans3:24 Ariko none Imana yabahereye ubuntu kuba intungane imbere yayo, babikesha gucungurwa na Kristo Yezu." 
Romans3:25 Ni we Imana yagennye ngo abere abantu icyiru ku bw'amaraso yabameneye babikesha kumwizera. Kwari ukwerekana ubutabera bwayo igihe yihanganiraga abantu, ntibahanire ibyaha bari barakoze mbere. No muri iki gihe yerekanye ubutabera bwayo, kugira ngo itaretse kuba intabera, igire intungane umuntu wese wizera Yezu." 
Romans3:26  
Romans3:27 None se haracyari impamvu yatuma abantu birata? Nta n'imwe. Kubera iki? Barata se ko bakora ibyategetswe n'Amategeko? Oya, ahubwo barata ko bizera Yezu." 
Romans3:28 Koko rero dusanga umuntu agirwa intungane imbere y'Imana kuko yizera Kristo, bidaturutse ku gukora ibitegekwa n'Amategeko." 
Romans3:29 Cyangwa se Imana yaba ari iy'Abayahudi bonyine? Ese ntabwo ari n'iy'abatari Abayahudi? Koko ni iyabo na bo," 
Romans3:30 kuko Imana ari imwe rukumbi. Abayahudi bakebwe izabagira intungane imbere yayo kuko bemeye Kristo, n'abatigeze bakebwa na bo ni uko ibonye ko bamwemeye." 
Romans3:31 Ibyo se bivuga ko ukwemera Kristo gutuma dutesha Amategeko agaciro? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo kudutera kuyashyigikira rwose. 
Romans4:1 Twavuga iki se kuri Aburahamu umukurambere wacu? Mbese byamugendekeye bite? 
Romans4:2 Niba yaragizwe intungane n'ibikorwa bye afite icyo yirata, ariko nta cyo yakwirata imbere y'Imana." 
Romans4:3 Mbese Ibyanditswe bivuga iki? Biravuga ngo: “Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma abarwa nk'intungane.” 
Romans4:4 Uwakoze umurimo igihembo ahabwa ntaba agiherewe ubuntu, ahubwo baba bamwishyuye ibyo yakoze." 
Romans4:5 Naho udashingira ku byo akora, ahubwo akizera Imana igira abanyabyaha intungane, uwo nguwo ukwizera kwe kuzatuma abarwa nk'intungane." 
Romans4:6 Ni uko Dawidi avuga ibyerekeye amahirwe y'umuntu Imana ibara nk'intungane, bidashingiye ku byo akora. Yaravuze ati:" 
Romans4:7 “Hahirwa abantu Imana yababariye ibicumuro, ikabahanaguraho ibyaha byabo." 
Romans4:8 Hahirwa umuntu Nyagasani atabaraho icyaha.” 
Romans4:9 Mbese ayo mahirwe Dawidi avuga agenewe abantu bakebwe gusa, cyangwa agenewe n'abatakebwe? Nk'uko tumaze kuvuga, ukwizera kwa Aburahamu kwatumye Imana imubara nk'intungane." 
Romans4:10 Ariko se byabaye ryari? Ese ni mbere cyangwa nyuma y'ugukebwa kwe? Si nyuma ahubwo ni mbere. 
Romans4:11 Nyuma yaho Imana yahaye Aburahamu ikimenyetso cyo gukebwa. Kwari ukugaragaza ko yari yaramufashe nk'intungane imbere yayo, kubera ko yari yarayizeye atarakebwa. Bityo Aburahamu yabaye umubyeyi w'abizera Imana bose batakebwe, na yo ikababara nk'intungane." 
Romans4:12 Ubusanzwe kandi ni umubyeyi w'abakebwe bidatewe n'uko bakebwe, ahubwo ari uko bakurikiza urugero rwo kwizera Imana sogokuruza Aburahamu yari afite atarakebwa." 
Romans4:13 Imana yasezeranyije Aburahamu ko we cyangwa urubyaro rwe bazahabwa isi ho umunani. Ntiyahawe iryo sezerano kubera ko yumviye Amategeko y'Imana, ahubwo ni ubutungane bwe buvuye ku kuyizera." 
Romans4:14 Niba abakurikiza amategeko ari bo bonyine bahabwa umunani, ukwizera Imana nta cyo kwaba kukimaze kandi n'Isezerano ryayo ryaba ritaye agaciro." 
Romans4:15 Koko Amategeko y'Imana akururira umuntu uburakari bwayo, ariko aho batazi amategeko nta waregwa ko atayumviye." 
Romans4:16 None rero abizera Imana ni bo bahabwa umunani yabasezeranyije, kugira ngo babe bawuhawe ku buntu kandi ngo urubyaro rwose rwa Aburahamu rwemererwe kuwuhabwa. Urwo rubyaro ntirugizwe gusa n'abakurikiza Amategeko, rugizwe kandi n'abizera Imana kimwe n'uko Aburahamu yayizeraga. Ni we mukurambere wacu twese." 
Romans4:17 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nzaguha gukomokwaho n'amahanga menshi.” Ni umukurambere wacu imbere y'Imana yizeye ari yo Mana izura abapfuye, n'ibitariho ikabibeshaho." 
Romans4:18 Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma yiringira, kandi nta cyariho cyatera umuntu kwiringira. Bityo aba umukurambere w'amahanga menshi. Ni na ko Imana yari yaramubwiye iti “Urubyaro rwawe ni ko ruzangana.”" 
Romans4:19 Yari amaze imyaka nk'ijana umubiri we umeze nk'uwapfuye na Sara akaba yari yaracuze, nyamara ntiyacogoye mu kwizera Imana." 
Romans4:20 Ntabwo yigeze ashidikanya ibyo Imana yamusezeranyije, ahubwo yakomejwe no kuyizera kandi arayisingiza." 
Romans4:21 Yemejwe rwose ko Imana ifite ububasha bwo gukora icyo yasezeranye. 
Romans4:22 Ngiyo impamvu Imana yamubaze nk'intungane kubera ko yayizeye. 
Romans4:23 Kandi si we wenyine Ibyanditswe bivugaho iri jambo ngo: “Imana yamubaze nk'intungane”," 
Romans4:24 ahubwo natwe biratureba kuko Imana izatubara nk'intungane, kubera ko twizeye iyazuye Yezu Umwami wacu mu bapfuye." 
Romans4:25 Yashyikirijwe abamwica azira ibyaha byacu, maze arazuka ngo tugirwe intungane imbere y'Imana." 
Romans5:1 Nuko rero ubwo ukwemera Kristo kwatugize intungane imbere y'Imana, tubana amahoro na yo tubikesha Yezu Kristo Umwami wacu." 
Romans5:2 Ni we watugejeje kuri ubu buntu bw'Imana dushingiyeho kubera kumwizera. Noneho dufite ishema kuko twiringira kuzahabwa ku ikuzo ry'Imana. 
Romans5:3 Si ibyo gusa ahubwo dufite n'ishema ry'amakuba yacu kuko tuzi ko amakuba atera kwihangana," 
Romans5:4 kwihangana na ko kukadutera gutsinda ibitugerageza, kubitsinda na ko kukadutera kwiringira Imana." 
Romans5:5 Uyiringira kandi ntabwo azakorwa n'isoni, kuko urukundo rw'Imana rwasakajwe mu mitima yacu bitewe na Mwuka Muziranenge twahawe." 
Romans5:6 Koko rero ku gihe Imana yateganyije twe tukiri abanyantege nke, Kristo yapfiriye abatubaha Imana." 
Romans5:7 Birakomeye kubona umuntu wemera gupfira intungane, icyakora ahari hari uwakwiyemeza gupfira umunyangeso nziza." 
Romans5:8 Ariko Imana yatweretse ukuntu idukunda, igihe Kristo yadupfiraga tukiri abanyabyaha." 
Romans5:9 Noneho ubwo twagizwe intungane imbere y'Imana n'amaraso ye, tuzarushaho gukizwa uburakari bwayo tubikesha Kristo." 
Romans5:10 Igihe twari tukiri abanzi b'Imana ni bwo yiyunze na twe ikoresheje urupfu rw'Umwana wayo, none rero ubwo twunzwe na yo n'urupfu rwe, tuzarushaho gukizwa no kubaho kwe." 
Romans5:11 Ikindi kandi, dusigaye duterwa ishema n'Imana kubera Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo waduhaye kwiyunga na yo." 
Romans5:12 Ibyaha byazanywe ku isi n'umuntu umwe ari we Adamu, kandi ni byo byazanye urupfu. Bityo urupfu rugera ku bantu bose kuko bose bakoze ibyaha." 
Romans5:13 No mu gihe Imana yari itaratanga Amategeko ibyaha byahoze ku isi, icyakora ntawashoboraga kubihanirwa igihe nta mategeko ahari." 
Romans5:14 Nyamara kuva mu gihe cya Adamu kugeza mu cya Musa, urupfu rwari rufite ubushobozi ku bantu, ndetse no ku batari barakoze icyaha gihwanye n'igicumuro cya Adamu. Adamu ni ishusho y'uwagombaga kuza." 
Romans5:15 Icyakora igicumuro cya Adamu nta wakigereranya n'impano Imana itanga. Ni ukuri igicumuro cy'umuntu umwe cyateje rubanda rwose urupfu. Nyamara ubuntu bw'Imana mbega ukuntu buhebuje, kimwe n'impano igabira abantu bayikesha umuntu umwe Yezu Kristo, ikarushaho gusakara muri rubanda!" 
Romans5:16 Impano y'Imana kandi nta wayigereranya n'icyaha cya wa muntu umwe Adamu. Urubanza rwaje nyuma y'icyaha cy'umwe ruzanira abantu gucirwa iteka, naho impano y'Imana yatanzwe nyuma y'ibicumuro byinshi izanira abantu gutunganira Imana." 
Romans5:17 Koko rero igicumuro cy'umuntu umwe cyatumye urupfu ruganza mu bantu, bitewe na wa muntu. Ni na ko rero abagiriwe ubuntu busesuye, bakagabirwa impano yo gutunganira Imana, bazarushaho kuganza mu bugingo buhoraho babikesha umuntu umwe ari we Yezu Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Nuko rero nk'uko igicumuro cy'umuntu umwe cyatumye bose baba abo gucirwa iteka, ni na ko umurimo utunganye wakozwe n'umuntu umwe uhesha bose ubutungane bubageza ku bugingo." 
Romans5:19 Koko rero nk'uko kutumvira Imana k'umuntu umwe kwatumye rubanda baba abanyabyaha, ni na ko kumvira k'umuntu umwe kuzahesha rubanda gutunganira Imana." 
Romans5:20 Amategeko yo yazanywe no kugira ngo ibicumuro bigwire, ariko aho ibyaha byagwiriye, ubuntu Imana igira bwarushijeho gusākara." 
Romans5:21 Noneho nk'uko ibyaha byaganje mu bantu bibageza mu rupfu, ni na ko ubuntu bw'Imana buganza bushingiye ku butungane, kugira ngo bubageze ku bugingo buhoraho ku bwa Yezu Kristo Umwami wacu." 
Romans6:1 Ubwo bimeze bityo tuvuge iki? Mbese tugumye gukora ibyaha kugira ngo ubuntu Imana itugirira bugwire? 
Romans6:2 Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ese ko twapfuye ku byerekeye ibyaha twashobora dute kugumya kubikora? 
Romans6:3 Mbese muyobewe ko twese ababatirijwe kuba umwe na Kristo Yezu, twabatirijwe kuba umwe na we mu rupfu rwe?" 
Romans6:4 Ni ukuvuga ko igihe twabatizwaga twahambanywe na we, kwari ugupfa nk'uko na we yapfuye, kugira ngo nk'uko Kristo yazutse mu bapfuye ku bw'ikuzo ry'Imana Data, abe ari ko natwe tubaho dufite ubugingo bushya." 
Romans6:5 Koko rero ubwo twabaye umwe na we, dupfuye nk'uko yapfuye, tuzaba umwe na we na none tuzutse nk'uko yazutse." 
Romans6:6 Tumenye neza ibi ngibi: umuntu twari we kera yabambanywe na Kristo ku musaraba, kugira ngo kamere yacu ikunda ibyaha itsembwe tureke rwose kuba mu buja bw'ibyaha," 
Romans6:7 kuko uwapfuye aba atakigengwa n'ibyaha. 
Romans6:8 Ubwo twapfanye na Kristo, twizeye kandi ko tuzabanaho na we." 
Romans6:9 Tuzi neza ko Kristo yazutse mu bapfuye. Nuko rero ntagipfa, urupfu nta bubasha rukimufiteho." 
Romans6:10 Ubwo yapfaga yapfuye rimwe ku bw'ibyaha, naho uko abaho ubu ngubu ariho ku bw'Imana." 
Romans6:11 Namwe ni uko, mujye mwemera ko mwapfuye ku byaha, mukaba muriho ku bw'Imana mubikesha kuba muri Kristo Yezu." 
Romans6:12 Nuko rero ibyaha ntibikaganze mu mibiri yanyu izapfa, ngo bitume mukurikiza ibyo irarikira." 
Romans6:13 Ingingo z'imibiri yanyu ntimukazigabize ibyaha ngo zibe ibikoresho by'ubugome. Ahubwo mwiyegurire Imana kubera ko mwavuye ikuzimu mukaba bazima, muyegurire n'ingingo zanyu ngo zibe ibikoresho byayo zikora ibiyitunganiye." 
Romans6:14 Ibyaha ntibikabaganze kuko mutakigengwa n'Amategeko, ahubwo mugengwa n'ubuntu Imana ibagirira." 
Romans6:15 Ibyo se ni ukuvuga iki? Mbese tujye dukora ibyaha kubera ko tutakigengwa n'Amategeko, tukaba tugengwa n'ubuntu Imana itugirira? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe!" 
Romans6:16 Mbese ntimuzi ko iyo mwiyeguriye umuntu kugira ngo ababere Shobuja kandi mumwumvire, icyo gihe muba mwishyize mu buja bw'uwo muntu mwemeye kumvira? Byaba ari ibyaha mwiyeguriye bizabageza ku rupfu, kwaba ari ukumvira Imana bizabageza ku butungane." 
Romans6:17 Dushimire Imana. Mwahoze mu buja bw'ibyaha, ariko none mwakurikije urugero rw'inyigisho mwahawe mubikuye ku mutima." 
Romans6:18 Imana yabakuye ku ngoyi y'ibyaha ibagira abagaragu b'ubutungane. 
Romans6:19 Ibyo ndabibabwira ntanga ingero ku bisanzwe mu bantu, kubera intege nke zanyu. Nk'uko kera mwari mwaratanze ingingo z'imibiri yanyu kugira ngo zibe abaja b'ubwomanzi n'ibicumuro bibyara ibindi, na none abe ari ko muzitanga kugira ngo zibe abagaragu b'ubutungane bubageza ku buziranenge." 
Romans6:20 Igihe mwari mu buja bw'ibyaha ntimwagengwaga n'ubutungane. 
Romans6:21 Mbese ibyo mwakoraga kera byabamariye iki, ko ubu mugira n'isoni zo kubyibuka? Koko kandi ibyo bikorwa bigeza umuntu ku rupfu." 
Romans6:22 Ariko none mwakuwe ku ngoyi y'ibyaha muba abagaragu b'Imana, bituma mugira ibikorwa bibaganisha ku buziranenge, amaherezo bikazabahesha ubugingo buhoraho." 
Romans6:23 Ibihembo by'ibyaha ni urupfu, ariko impano y'Imana ni ubugingo buhoraho duherwa muri Kristo Yezu Umwami wacu." 
Romans7:1 Bavandimwe, ubwo musanzwe muhugukiwe n'Amategeko ntimwabura kumva ibyo ngiye kubabwira. Mbese muyobewe ko Amategeko agenga umuntu igihe akiriho gusa?" 
Romans7:2 Itegeko rigenga abashakanye rishinga umugore kubana n'umugabo we igihe cyose akiriho, ariko iyo umugabo amaze gupfa, umugore ntaba akigengwa n'iryo tegeko." 
Romans7:3 Ni cyo gituma umugore wishyingira undi mugabo uwe akiriho, yitwa umusambanyi. Ariko niba umugabo we amaze gupfa uwo mugore ntaba akigengwa n'iryo tegeko, ku buryo ashyingiwe undi mugabo ntiyaba umusambanyi." 
Romans7:4 Bavandimwe, namwe ni uko. Kuba umwe na Kristo mu rupfu rwe byatumye mupfa mu ruhande rw'Amategeko, kugira ngo mube ab'undi ari we Kristo wazutse mu bapfuye. Kwari ukugira ngo tugwize ibikorwa bishimisha Imana." 
Romans7:5 Koko rero tukigengwa na kamere yacu, irari ryo gukora ibyaha ryakangurwaga n'Amategeko, rigakora ibyaryo mu mitima yacu, rigatuma tugwiza ibikorwa bizana urupfu." 
Romans7:6 Naho ubu ntitukigengwa n'Amategeko, kuko twapfuye mu ruhande rw'ibyari bitugize imfungwa. Noneho dusigaye dukorera Imana ku buryo bushya dushobozwa na Mwuka, ntitukiyikorera ku buryo bushaje tuyoborwa n'Amategeko yanditswe." 
Romans7:7 Ibyo se tubivugeho iki? Ese Amategeko tuyite icyaha? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo iyo Amategeko atakinyereka sinari kumenya icyaha icyo ari cyo. Sinari kumenya irari, iyo hataba itegeko rivuga ngo: “Ntukifuze ibyo abandi batunze.”" 
Romans7:8 Icyakora ibyaha byishingikirije ku Mategeko bintera irari ry'uburyo bwose. Koko hatabayeho amategeko ibyaha ntibyabaho. 
Romans7:9 Kera ntaramenya icyitwa itegeko nari muzima. Ariko haje Amategeko ibyaha birampagurukana," 
Romans7:10 bityo ndapfa. Amabwiriza y'Imana yari agenewe kuzana ubugingo, jyewe yanzaniye urupfu." 
Romans7:11 Bityo ibyaha byishingikirije kuri ayo mabwiriza, biranshuka, bibona urwaho biranyica." 
Romans7:12 Ni ukuvuga ko Amategeko y'Imana atagira inenge, n'amabwiriza yayo nta nenge, anyuze mu kuri kandi ni meza rwose." 
Romans7:13 None se ibyiza nk'ibyo byanzaniye urupfu? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo ibyaha ni byo byarunzaniye. Byitwaje ibyiza binteza urupfu kugira ngo byigaragaze ukuntu ari bibi. Uko ni ko amabwiriza y'Imana yatumye ibyaha bimbera ibyaha ku buryo bukabije. 
Romans7:14 Tuzi ko Amategeko aturuka ku Mana, nyamara jyewe ndi umuntu ugengwa na kamere yanjye, naraguzwe mba inkoreragahato y'ibyaha." 
Romans7:15 Sinsobanukirwa ibyo nkora kuko ibyo nshaka gukora ntabikora, ahubwo ibyo nanga nkaba ari byo nkora." 
Romans7:16 Noneho ubwo nkora ibyo ntashaka, mba nemeye ko Amategeko ari meza." 
Romans7:17 Bityo rero si jye ubikora, ahubwo ni ibyaha binyaritsemo." 
Romans7:18 Nzi rero ko muri jye, ni ukuvuga muri kamere yanjye, nta cyiza kimbamo. Ubushake bwo gukora ibyiza ndabufite, ariko kubikora simbishobora." 
Romans7:19 Ibyiza nshaka simbikora, naho ibibi ntashaka akaba ari byo nkora." 
Romans7:20 Ubwo rero nkora ibyo ntashaka si jye ubikora, ahubwo ni ibyaha binyaritsemo." 
Romans7:21 Dore uko nasanze bigenda: igihe nshaka gukora ibyiza, ibibi bintanga imbere." 
Romans7:22 Mu mutima wanjye Amategeko y'Imana aranshimisha," 
Romans7:23 ariko muri kamere yanjye nsangamo ibindi bintegeka birwana intambara n'amategeko yemewe n'umutima wanjye. Ibyaha ni byo bitegeka kamere yanjye bikangira imfungwa. 
Romans7:24 Mbega ngo ndagatora! Ni nde wankiza uyu mubiri wigaruriwe n'urupfu? 
Romans7:25 Imana ishimirwe ko izabikora, ibinyujije kuri Yezu Kristo Umwami wacu. Noneho dore uko bingendekera: mu mutima nkurikiza Amategeko y'Imana, ariko kandi ku bwa kamere ndi inkoreragahato y'ibyaha bintegeka." 
Romans8:1 Ubu rero abari muri Kristo Yezu nta teka bacirwa," 
Romans8:2 kuko gutegekwa na Mwuka w'ubugingo buri muri Kristo Yezu kwankuye mu buja bwo gutegekwa n'ibyaha n'urupfu. 
Romans8:3 Ibyo Amategeko atashoboye bitewe n'intege nke za kamere y'umuntu, Imana yarabikoze. Yohereje Umwana wayo bwite afite kamere imeze nk'iy'abantu b'abanyabyaha, kugira ngo abe igitambo cy'ibyaha byabo. Ni ko gutsinda burundu ibyaha biri muri kamere y'umuntu," 
Romans8:4 kugira ngo tugirwe intungane rwose nk'uko Amategeko ashaka, twebwe abatayoborwa na kamere yacu, ahubwo tuyoborwa na Mwuka w'Imana." 
Romans8:5 Abayoborwa na kamere yabo baharanira ibyo kamere yabo ishaka, naho abayoborwa na Mwuka baharanira ibyo Mwuka ashaka." 
Romans8:6 Guharanira ibyo kamere ishaka bibyara urupfu, naho guharanira ibyo Mwuka ashaka bibyara ubugingo n'amahoro." 
Romans8:7 Ni yo mpamvu abaharanira ibyo kamere yabo ishaka ari abanzi b'Imana, ntibumvira Amategeko y'Imana, nta n'ubwo bashobora kuyumvira." 
Romans8:8 Abagengwa na kamere yabo ntibabasha gushimisha Imana. 
Romans8:9 Mwebwe rero ntabwo mugengwa na kamere yanyu, ahubwo mugengwa na Mwuka kubera ko Mwuka w'Imana abatuyemo. Udafite Mwuka wa Kristo ntabwo aba ari uwe." 
Romans8:10 Ariko niba Kristo ari muri mwe, nubwo imibiri yanyu ari iyo gupfa kubera ibyaha, nyamara Mwuka abahesha ubugingo kuko yabagize intungane imbere y'Imana." 
Romans8:11 Niba kandi Mwuka w'Imana yazuye Yezu mu bapfuye abatuyemo, iyo Mana yazuye Kristo Yezu izabeshaho n'imibiri yanyu ipfa, ikoresheje Mwuka wayo utuye muri mwe." 
Romans8:12 Bityo rero bavandimwe, twahawe inshingano atari kamere yacu iyidushinze, ngo tubeho uko ishaka." 
Romans8:13 Niba mubaho uko kamere yanyu ishaka muzapfa, naho niba muheshwa na Mwuka gutsinda imigirire muterwa na kamere yanyu muzabaho." 
Romans8:14 Koko rero abayoborwa na Mwuka w'Imana ni bo bana b'Imana. 
Romans8:15 Mwuka mwahawe si uwo kubashyira mu buja ngo musubire mu bwoba. Ahubwo Mwuka mwahawe ni uwo kubagira abana b'Imana, agatuma dutakambira Imana tuti: “Aba.” ni ukuvuga ngo: “Data.”" 
Romans8:16 Mwuka ubwe ni we utwemeza mu mitima ko turi abana b'Imana. 
Romans8:17 Ubwo turi abana bayo rero, ni natwe yageneye umunani. Koko Imana izaduha umunani, ndetse tuzawuhānwa na Kristo. Ubwo dufatanyije na we imibabaro, tuzahabwa ikuzo hamwe na we." 
Romans8:18 Ndatekereza ko imibabaro yacu yo muri iki gihe ntaho ihuriye n'ikuzo Imana izaduhishurira. 
Romans8:19 Ibyaremwe byose bitegereje n'ubwuzu bwinshi igihe Imana izahishura abana bayo. 
Romans8:20 Koko rero ibyaremwe byose byahawe kugengwa n'ibitagira umumaro, atari ku bushake bwabyo ahubwo ari uko Imana yiyemeje ko biba bityo. Nyamara biracyafite kwiringira" 
Romans8:21 ko bizavanwa mu buja bw'uko kononekara, kugira ngo byishyire byizane, kandi bihabwe ikuzo uko bigenewe abana b'Imana." 
Romans8:22 Tuzi ko na n'ubu ibyaremwe byose biniha, bikanababazwa nk'umugore uri ku nda." 
Romans8:23 Si byo byonyine, natwe dufite Mwuka ho umusogongero, turanihira mu mutima dutegereje kugirwa abana b'Imana, no gukizwa kw'imibiri yacu." 
Romans8:24 Twarakijijwe ariko hari ibyo tucyiringiye. Iyo ubonye ikintu uba utacyiringira kuzakibona. Ni nde wavuga ko yiringiye kubona ikintu kandi amaze kugishyikira? 
Romans8:25 Ariko ubwo twiringira ibyo tutarabona bidutera kubitegereza twihanganye. 
Romans8:26 Bityo Mwuka adusanga dufite intege nke akatwunganira. Koko ntituzi gusenga nk'uko bikwiye, ariko Mwuka ubwe adusabira ku Mana na we aniha, kandi uko aniha nta wabona uko abivuga." 
Romans8:27 Nyamara Imana ireba mu mitima izi imigambi ya Mwuka, kuko asabira intore zayo ibihuje n'ibyo ishaka." 
Romans8:28 Tuzi kandi ko byose bifatanyiriza hamwe kuzanira ibyiza abakunda Imana, abo yahamagaye nk'uko yabyiyemeje." 
Romans8:29 Abo yamenye kuva kera yabageneye kumera nk'Umwana wayo, kugira ngo abe ari we uba impfura mu bavandimwe benshi." 
Romans8:30 Abo yageneye ibyo yarabahamagaye, abo yahamagaye yabagize intungane imbere yayo, abo yagize intungane yabahaye n'ikuzo." 
Romans8:31 None se ibyo twabivugaho iki? Ubwo Imana itwemera ni nde uzaturwanya? 
Romans8:32 Ubwo itimanye Umwana wayo bwite, ahubwo ikamushyikiriza abamwica ari twe twese azira, izabura ite kuduhāna byose na we?" 
Romans8:33 Ni nde uzarega abo Imana yitoranyirije? Nta we kuko yo ibita abere. 
Romans8:34 Ni nde wabaciraho iteka? Nta we kuko Kristo Yezu ari we wapfuye ndetse akazuka, ubu akaba ari iburyo bw'Imana adusabira." 
Romans8:35 Ni nde uzadutandukanya n'urukundo rwa Kristo? Ese amakuba yabishobora, cyangwa ishavu, cyangwa ugutotezwa, cyangwa inzara, cyangwa ubukene, cyangwa akaga, cyangwa urupfu?" 
Romans8:36 Ni ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Turicwa umunsi ukira bakuduhōra, batugira nk'intama zagenewe kubagwa.”" 
Romans8:37 Ariko muri ibyo byose turushaho gutsinda tubikesha uwadukunze. 
Romans8:38 Koko rero ndemeza ko nta kizadutandukanya n'urukundo rwe, ari urupfu cyangwa ubuzima, ari abamarayika cyangwa ibinyabutware bigenga isi, ari iby'ubu cyangwa ibizaza, ari ibinyabubasha, ari ibyo mu ijuru cyangwa iby'ikuzimu, ari n'ikindi cyaremwe icyo ari cyo cyose, nta na kimwe kizabasha kudutandukanya n'urukundo rw'Imana rugaragarira muri Kristo Yezu Umwami wacu." 
Romans8:39  
Romans9:1 Ibyo mbabwira ni ukuri, ndi uwa Kristo sinabeshya. Mbyemejwe kandi n'umutima wanjye, uyoborwa na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Romans9:2 Mbega ukuntu mfite agahinda kenshi kandi nkababara ubutitsa! 
Romans9:3 Rwose nakwifuza kuba ari jye uvumwa n'Imana nkaba natandukana na Kristo, mbigirira abavandimwe banjye duhuje ubwoko." 
Romans9:4 Ni bo muryango wa Isiraheli Imana yagize abana bayo, ikanabaha ku ikuzo ryayo. Yagiranye amasezerano na bo ibashinga Amategeko, ibaha kuyisenga uko ishaka kandi ibasezeranya ibyiza." 
Romans9:5 Ba sekuruza ni bo na Kristo akomokaho, ukurikije igisekuru cy'abantu. Imana Isumbabyose iragasingizwa iteka ryose. Amina." 
Romans9:6 Nyamara si ukuvuga ko Imana yashēshe ibyo yari yarasezeranye, kuko abakomoka kuri Isiraheli atari ko bose ari Abisiraheli nyakuri." 
Romans9:7 Kandi abakomoka kuri Aburahamu si ko bose ari urubyaro rwe nyakuri. Ahubwo Imana yaramubwiye iti: “Izaki ni we uzakomokwaho n'urubyaro nagusezeranyije.” 
Romans9:8 Ibyo bivuga ko abakomotse kuri Aburahamu ku buryo busanzwe atari bo bitwa abana b'Imana, keretse abavutse ku buryo bw'amasezerano yayo ni bo bonyine bitwa urubyaro rwe." 
Romans9:9 Koko rero iri ni ryo sezerano Imana yahaye Aburahamu, ngo: “Undi mwaka iki gihe nzagaruka, kandi Sara azaba yarabyaye umwana w'umuhungu.”" 
Romans9:10 Si ibyo gusa hari na Rebeka wabyaye abana babiri, bombi bakaba bafite se umwe ari we sogokuruza Izaki." 
Romans9:11 Nyamara kandi Imana ifite ibyo ikurikiza mu gutoranya abantu bidaturutse ku bikorwa byabo, ahubwo biturutse kuri yo ubwayo yabihamagariye. Ni yo mpamvu igihe abana b'impanga ba Rebeka bari bataravuka, bataranakora icyiza cyangwa ikibi, Imana yamubwiye iti: “Gakuru azaba umugaragu wa Gato.”" 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nikundiye Yakobo, naho Ezawu mwigizayo.”" 
Romans9:14 None se ibyo twabivugaho iki? Ese Imana yaba irenganya? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! 
Romans9:15 Yabwiye Musa iti: “Ngirira imbabazi n'impuhwe uwo nshatse.” 
Romans9:16 Ibyo rero ntabwo biterwa n'ubushake bw'umuntu cyangwa n'umwete we, ahubwo bituruka ku Mana nyir'imbabazi." 
Romans9:17 Ni na ko mu Byanditswe Imana yabwiye Umwami wa Misiri iti: “Ngiki icyatumye ngushyiraho: ni ukugira ngo nerekanire muri wowe imbaraga zanjye, kandi bitume menyekana ku isi yose.”" 
Romans9:18 Ni ukuvuga rero ko Imana igirira imbabazi uwo ishaka, kandi ikanangira umutima w'uwo ishaka." 
Romans9:19 Noneho rero wabaza uti: “Ubwo ari uko bimeze, ni iki Imana ikigaya abantu? Mbese ubundi hari uwaca ku bushake bwayo?”" 
Romans9:20 Wowe muntu, uri iki kugira ngo ugishe Imana impaka? Ese ikibumbano cyabaza uwakibumbye kiti: “Kuki wambumbye utya?”" 
Romans9:21 Ese umubumbyi si we ufite ubushobozi bwo kugena icyo ibumba riri bukore, mu mutege umwe waryo agakoramo urwabya rugenewe imirimo y'icyubahiro, n'urundi rugenewe imirimo isuzuguritse?" 
Romans9:22 Ni na ko Imana yihitiyemo kwerekana uburakari bwayo no kugaragaza ububasha bwayo. Nyamara yiyemeje kwihanganira cyane abikururiragaho uburakari byayo bagenewe kurimbuka. 
Romans9:23 Ibyo kwari ukugaragaza ukuntu ikuzo ryayo risesuye ku bo ishaka kugirira imbabazi, abo uhereye kera yari yarateguriye kuzagira uruhare kuri iryo kuzo." 
Romans9:24 Abo kandi ni twebwe Imana yahamagaye, itadutoranyije mu Bayahudi gusa, ahubwo idutoranyije no mu yandi mahanga." 
Romans9:25 Ni na ko Imana yavuze mu gitabo cyanditswe na Hozeya iti: “Abahoze batari abo mu bwoko bwanjye nzabita ubwoko bwanjye, abatari inkoramutima zanjye nzabita inkoramutima." 
Romans9:26 Kandi ahantu bababwiriraga ngo ‘Ntimuri ubwoko bwanjye’, ni ho bazitirwa abana b'Imana nzima.”" 
Romans9:27 Ezayi na we yavuze aranguruye ibyerekeye Abisiraheli ati: “Nubwo Abisiraheli bangana n'umusenyi wo ku nyanja, agace gato kazaba gasigaye ni ko kazarokoka," 
Romans9:28 Nyagasani ntazatinda gusohoza ijambo rye mu isi ku buryo bunonosoye.” 
Romans9:29 Ni byo Ezayi yari yarahanuye mbere ati: “Iyo Nyagasani Nyiringabo atadusigira nibura urubyaro ruke, tuba twararimbutse nk'umujyi wa Sodoma, tuba twararimbutse nk'umujyi wa Gomora.”" 
Romans9:30 None se ibyo twabivugaho iki? Ni uko abatari Abayahudi batigeze bashaka gutunganira Imana, bagizwe intungane babikesha kwizera Kristo." 
Romans9:31 Ibiri amambu Abisiraheli bashakashakaga amategeko yatuma batunganira Imana, nyamara ntabwo bageze ku ntego Amategeko yari agamije." 
Romans9:32 Kubera iki se? Kubera ko ubwo butungane batabukuraga ku kwemera Kristo, ahubwo biringiraga kubuheshwa n'ibikorwa byabo. Basitaye kuri rya buye risitaza" 
Romans9:33 ryavuzwe mu Byanditswe ngo: “Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye risitaza abantu, ni n'urutare rubagusha. Nyamara uwishingikiriza kuri rwo ntazakorwa n'ikimwaro.”" 
Romans10:1 Bavandimwe, icyo nifuriza Abisiraheli mbikuye ku mutima ni uko bakizwa, ni na byo mbasabira ku Mana." 
Romans10:2 Ndahamya rwose ko bafite ishyaka ryo gukorera Imana, ariko ni ishyaka ridashingiye ku kuyimenya." 
Romans10:3 Ntibasobanukiwe uburyo Imana igira abantu intungane, ahubwo bashaka ubwabo buryo bwo kwigira intungane, bagasuzugura ubutungane Imana itanga." 
Romans10:4 Erega Kristo ni we wanonosoye ibyo Amategeko yari agamije, kugira ngo umwizera wese Imana imugire intungane!" 
Romans10:5 Musa ubwe yanditse ibyerekeye gutunganira Imana bivuye ku Mategeko agira ati: “Uzayumvira azabeshwaho na yo.” 
Romans10:6 Nyamara dore icyo avuga ku byerekeye ubutungane buvuye ku kwizera: “Ntukibaze uti: ‘Ni nde washobora kuzamuka mu ijuru?’ (ari ukugira ngo ajye kumanurayo Kristo)," 
Romans10:7 cyangwa ngo wibaze uti: ‘Ni nde washobora kumanuka ikuzimu?’ (ari ukugira ngo azamureyo Kristo amuvana mu bapfuye.)” 
Romans10:8 Ahubwo aravuga ati: “Ijambo ry'Imana urarifite, warifashe mu mutwe ndetse ushobora kuritondagura.” Ni ryo jambo twamamaza rikubwira kwizera Kristo," 
Romans10:9 ngo nubyivugira n'umunwa wawe ko Yezu ari Nyagasani, ukemera mu mutima wawe ko Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye uzakizwa." 
Romans10:10 Koko rero kubyemera mu mutima bituma Imana ikugira intungane, naho kubyivugira n'umunwa bigatuma ukizwa." 
Romans10:11 Ibyanditswe bigira biti: “Nta n'umwe umwizera uzakorwa n'isoni.” 
Romans10:12 Bityo Umuyahudi n'utari Umuyahudi nta kurobanura, bose bafite Nyagasani umwe usendereza ibyiza bye ku bamwambaza bose." 
Romans10:13 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Umuntu wese uzatakambira Nyagasani azakizwa.” 
Romans10:14 None se bamwiyambaza bate batabanje kumwemera? Kandi bamwemera bate batigeze bamwumva? Mbese bamwumva bate hatabonetse umuntu umwamamaza? 
Romans10:15 Ikindi kandi abantu bamwamamaza bate ntawe ubatumye? Ni yo mpamvu Ibyanditswe bigira biti: “Mbega ukuntu ari byiza kubona abazanye Inkuru nziza!” 
Romans10:16 Ariko si bose bumviye ubwo Butumwa bwiza. Ni na ko Ezayi yavuze ati: “Nyagasani, ni nde wemeye ibyo yatwumvanye?”" 
Romans10:17 Bityo abantu bemera Kristo bamaze kumva ubutumwa, kandi ubwo butumwa ni ukubwirwa ibyerekeye Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Noneho ndabaza. Mbese abantu ntibumvise ubwo butumwa? Yee, barabwumvise. Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ijwi ryabwo ryasakaye ku isi yose, ubutumwa bwageze ku mpera zayo.”" 
Romans10:19 Ndabaza rero. Mbese Abisiraheli ntibabisobanukiwe? Erega mbere Musa yari yaravuze ati: “Nzabaharika abanyamahanga mbatere gufuha, nzabarakaza ntonesha abanyabwengebuke!”" 
Romans10:20 Ndetse Ezayi yageze n'aho yerura ati: “Abatanshakaga barambonye, abatagize icyo bambaza ndabiyeretse.”" 
Romans10:21 Ariko ku byerekeye Abisiraheli agira ati: “Nirizaga umunsi nteze amaboko ngo nakire abantu b'ibyigomeke batanyumvira.” 
Romans11:1 None rero ndabaza. Mbese Imana yaba yaraciye ubwoko bwayo? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Nanjye ubwanjye ndi Umwisiraheli ukomoka kuri Aburahamu, mu muryango wa Benyamini." 
Romans11:2 Imana ntiyatereranye ubwoko bwayo yitoranyirije kuva kera. Mbese ntimuzi icyo Ibyanditswe bivuga, aho Eliya yaregaga Abisiraheli ku Mana? Yaravuze ati:" 
Romans11:3 “Nyagasani, bishe abahanuzi bawe basenya intambiro zawe, ni jye usigaye jyenyine none nanjye barampigira kunyica.”" 
Romans11:4 Ariko se Imana yamushubije iki? Yaravuze iti: “Nisigiye abantu ibihumbi birindwi batarapfukamira ikigirwamana Bāli.” 
Romans11:5 No muri iki gihe na bwo, agace gato kitwa Abasigaye, Imana yakagiriye ubuntu irakitoranyiriza." 
Romans11:6 Kwari ukubagirira ubuntu koko itabitewe n'ibikorwa byabo, kuko bitabaye bityo ubuntu igira bwaba butakiri ubuntu." 
Romans11:7 Ibyo se ni ukuvuga iki? Icyo Abisiraheli bashakaga nta bwo bakibonye. Abakibonye ni abo Imana yatoranyije, naho abandi bose barinangiye." 
Romans11:8 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Imana yabahaye imitima ihuramye n'amaso atabona n'amatwi atumva kugeza n'ubu.” 
Romans11:9 Dawidi na we ati: “Ibyokurya byabo nibibabere umutego wo kubatega, bibabere nk'ibuye ryo kubasitaza n'igihano kibakwiriye." 
Romans11:10 Amaso yabo ahume atsiratsize, uteze imigongo yabo guhora ihetamye.”" 
Romans11:11 Nuko rero ndabaza. Mbese igihe Abisiraheli basitaraga kwari ukugwa burundu? Ibyo ntibikanavugwe! Ahubwo gucumura kwabo kwatumye agakiza kagera ku banyamahanga, kugira ngo bitere Abisiraheli ishyari." 
Romans11:12 None se ubwo gucumura kwabo kwakungahaje abatuye isi, gucogora kwabo kugakungahaza abanyamahanga, hazacura iki nibaramuka basubiye byuzuye mu byabo?" 
Romans11:13 Noneho reka mbabwire mwebwe abatari Abayahudi: ni jye Ntumwa Kristo yatumye ku batari Abayahudi, mfite ishema ry'umurimo yanshinze." 
Romans11:14 Icyampa nkabona uko ntera bene wacu b'Abayahudi kugira ishyari ngo mbakizemo bamwe! 
Romans11:15 Koko rero ubwo guhēzwa kwabo kwatumye rubanda rutari Abayahudi bungwa n'Imana, hazacura iki igihe Abayahudi ubwabo bazayigarukira? Bazamera nk'abazutse mu bapfuye!" 
Romans11:16 Igihe bafata igisate cy'umugati ho umuganura bakagitura Imana, byerekana ko uwo mugati wose na wo ari uwayo. Kandi igihe imizi y'igiti yegurirwa Imana, amashami na yo aba ari ayayo." 
Romans11:17 Urubyaro rwa Isiraheli rugereranywa n'igiti cy'umunzenze cyakonzweho amashami. Wowe utari Umuyahudi ugereranywa n'ishami ry'umunzeze wo mu gasozi ryagemetswe aho ayo mashami yakonzwe, bityo nawe ukaba ufite uruhare ku byo imizi itungisha icyo giti." 
Romans11:18 Nuko rero we kwirata ngo wigambe ku mashami. None se wakwirata iki? Si wowe ushyigikiye imizi, ahubwo imizi ni yo igushyigikiye." 
Romans11:19 Ahari aho wakwibwira uti: “Amashami yarakonzwe kugira ngo ngemekwe.” 
Romans11:20 Yee, ni byo. Icyo ayo mashami yazize ni uguhemuka kwayo. Naho wowe ikiguhagaritse ni ukuyoboka Kristo kwawe. Ntukirate rero, ahubwo utinye Imana." 
Romans11:21 Koko ubwo Imana itababariye abagereranywa n'amashami kamere, nawe ntizakubabarira." 
Romans11:22 Zirikana rero kugira neza kw'Imana n'igitsure cyayo, abayivuyeho yabagiriye igitsure naho wowe ikugirira neza. Icyakora ni ngombwa ko uguma muri ubwo buntu ikugirira, bitabaye bityo nawe ni uko, uzakondwa nka ya mashami." 
Romans11:23 Naho Abayahudi nibareka ubuhemu bwabo, bazaba nk'amashami yakonzwe nyuma akagemekwa aho yahoze mbere, kuko Imana ifite ububasha bwo kongera kubagemeka." 
Romans11:24 Wowe utari Umuyahudi, uri nk'ishami kamere ryavuye ku munzenze wa mu gasozi, maze ku buryo bunyuranye n'imihingire isanzwe y'ibiti, ugemekwa ku munzenze w'umuterano. None se ko Abayahudi ari bo mashami kamere y'uwo munzenze w'umuterano, babura bate kugemekwa ku munzenze wabo bwite?" 
Romans11:25 Koko rero bavandimwe, sinshaka ko muyoberwa iri banga hato mutibeshya ko muri abanyabwenge, ni uko igice kimwe cy'Abisiraheli cyinangiye. Ibyo bizakomeza kugeza igihe abanyamahanga bazemera Kristo byuzuye." 
Romans11:26 Uko ni ko urubyaro rwose rwa Isiraheli ruzakizwa, nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo “Umutabazi azava i Siyoni, atsembe ubugome mu bakomoka kuri Yakobo." 
Romans11:27 Ngiryo Isezerano nzagirana na bo nimbakuraho ibyaha.” 
Romans11:28 Ku byerekeye Ubutumwa bwiza, Abayahudi babaye abanzi b'Imana mwe bibagirira akamaro. Naho ku byerekeye gutoranya kw'Imana, ni abatoni bayo kubera ba sekuruza." 
Romans11:29 Koko Imana ntabwo yisubiza ibyo yahaye abantu, cyangwa ngo yivuguruze iyo yabahamagaye." 
Romans11:30 Namwe kera mwanze kumvira Imana, none ubu yabagiriye imbabazi bitewe n'uko Abayahudi banze kuyumvira." 
Romans11:31 Ubu ni ko biri kuri bo, babaye intumvira kugira ngo mwe mumaze kugirirwa imbabazi, ubu na bo bazigirirwe." 
Romans11:32 Imana yagize abantu bose imbohe babitewe no kutayumvira, kugira ngo ibone uko igirira bose imbabazi." 
Romans11:33 Mbega ukuntu Imana ari umukungu wa byose! Mbega ukuntu ubwenge bwayo n'ubumenyi bwayo biturenze! Ibyo yiyemeza ni amayobera rwose, kandi imigenzereze yayo nta wayimenya." 
Romans11:34 Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Ni nde wamenye ibyo Nyagasani atekereza? Ni nde wabaye umujyanama we?” 
Romans11:35 “Ni nde wigeze abanza kugira icyo amuha, ngo na we abe amwituye?”" 
Romans11:36 Erega byose bikomoka ku Mana, byose bibeshwaho na yo, byose bigenewe kuba ibyayo! Nihorane ikuzo iteka ryose. Amina." 
Romans12:1 Bavandimwe, kubera ko Imana yabahaye imbabazi ndabihanangiriza ngo mwitange, maze mube ibitambo bizima byeguriwe Imana biyishimisha. Uko ni ko kuyikorera kubakwiriye." 
Romans12:2 Ntimugakurikize imibereho y'ab'iki gihe, ahubwo mureke Imana ivugurure ibitekerezo byanyu mube muhindutse rwose. Ni bwo muzashobora kumenya neza ibyo Imana ishaka, kugira ngo muhitemo ibyiza biyishimishije kandi bitunganye rwose." 
Romans12:3 Kubera ubuntu Imana yangiriye ndabwira buri wese muri mwe nti: “Uramenye we kwitekerezaho birenze urugero uriho, ahubwo ushyire mu gaciro wiyoroheje ukurikije urugero Imana yaguhaye rwo kuyizera." 
Romans12:4 Buri muntu muri twe afite umubiri umwe ugizwe n'ingingo nyinshi, kandi izo ngingo ntizigira umurimo umwe." 
Romans12:5 Uko ni ko nubwo turi benshi muri Kristo twabaye umubiri umwe, twese duhurijwe hamwe buri muntu akaba urugingo rwa mugenzi we." 
Romans12:6 Dufite kandi impano zitandukanye Imana yatugabiye buri wese iye. Uwahawe guhanura ngo avuge ibyo yeretswe, nakoreshe iyo mpano ashingiye ku kwizera yahawe n'Imana." 
Romans12:7 Uwahawe impano yo gukorera abandi ngaho nabakorere, uwahawe iyo kwigisha niyigishe," 
Romans12:8 uwahawe iyo gukomeza abantu imitima nabakomeze, utanga ku bye natange atitangiriye itama, uyobora abandi nabikorane umwete, n'ugiriye undi impuhwe nazigire yishimye." 
Romans12:9 “Mujye mukundana mutaryarya. Mwange ikibi cyose mwibande ku byiza. 
Romans12:10 Mukundane urukundo rwa kivandimwe. Mwubahane buri muntu ashyire mugenzi we imbere. 
Romans12:11 Mugire umwete mwe kuba abanyabute. Mukorere Nyagasani mufite ishyaka ryinshi. 
Romans12:12 Mwishimire ibyo mwiringiye, mwihangane mu makuba, ntimugacogore mu gusenga." 
Romans12:13 Intore z'Imana zikennye muzifashishe ku byo mufite, n'izibasanga muzicumbikire." 
Romans12:14 “Musabire umugisha ababatoteza – koko mubasabire umugisha atari umuvumo. 
Romans12:15 Mwishimane n'abishimye, murirane n'abarira." 
Romans12:16 Mubane muhuje. Mwe kwishyira hejuru, ahubwo mwemere gukora imirimo yoroheje. Ntimukīgire abanyabwenge." 
Romans12:17 “Ntimwiture umuntu inabi yabagiriye. Muharanire gukora ibigaragarira abantu bose ko ari byiza. 
Romans12:18 Uko bizashoboka kose, mu rwanyu ruhande mubane amahoro n'abantu bose." 
Romans12:19 Ncuti zanjye, ntimwihōrere ahubwo mujye mureka uburakari bw'Imana abe ari bwo buhōra, kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: ‘Guhōra no kwitura ni ibyanjye’, ni ko Nyagasani avuga." 
Romans12:20 Ahandi ngo: ‘Ariko umwanzi wawe nasonza umuhe icyo arya, nagira inyota umuhe icyo anywa, nugenza utyo bizaba nk'aho urahuriye amakara agurumana ku mutwe we.’" 
Romans12:21 Ibibi ntibikagutsinde, ahubwo utsinde ibibi ukoresheje ibyiza.”" 
Romans13:1 Buri muntu niyemere kugengwa n'abategetsi kuko nta butegetsi buriho butaturutse ku Mana, n'abategetsi bariho ni yo yabubahaye." 
Romans13:2 Bityo rero ugomeye abategetsi aba agomeye urwego rwashyizweho n'Imana, abagira batyo bazagibwaho n'urubanza." 
Romans13:3 Koko kandi abakora neza si bo batinya abatware, keretse abakora nabi. Ese urashaka kudatinya abategetsi? Jya ukora neza ni bwo bazagushima." 
Romans13:4 Erega abategetsi ni abagaragu b'Imana, bashyiriweho kugutera gukora neza! Icyakora nukora nabi ugomba kubatinya, kuko ububasha bwo guhana batabuherewe ubusa. Koko rero ni abagaragu b'Imana bashyiriweho guhana inkozi z'ibibi nk'uko uburakari bwayo buri." 
Romans13:5 Ni yo mpamvu buri muntu agomba kwemera ko bamugenga, bidatewe no gutinya uburakari bw'Imana gusa, ahubwo umuntu abyemejwe n'umutima we." 
Romans13:6 Ni na cyo gituma mutanga imisoro, kuko abasoresha ari abakozi Imana yashinze kwita kuri uwo murimo." 
Romans13:7 Muhe buri muntu ikimugenewe: usoresha mumusorere, uwaka amahōro muyamuhe, abakwiye gutinywa mubatinye, n'abakwiye kubahwa mububahe." 
Romans13:8 Ntimukagire uwo mubamo umwenda atari uwo gukundana, kuko umuntu ukunda mugenzi we aba arangije kumvira Amategeko." 
Romans13:9 Koko rero ya Mategeko avuga ngo “Ntugasambane, ntukice, ntukibe, ntukifuze ibyo abandi batunze”, hamwe n'ayandi yose akubiye muri iri jambo rimwe ngo: “Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.”" 
Romans13:10 Ukunda mugenzi we ntamugirira nabi. Nuko rero gukunda abandi ni ko kumvira Amategeko ku buryo bunonosoye. 
Romans13:11 Mugenze mutyo rero ubwo muzi igihe tugezemo. Ubu ngubu ni igihe cyo gukanguka, kuko gukizwa kwacu kwegereje kurusha igihe twatangiraga kwemera Kristo." 
Romans13:12 Ijoro rirenda gucya maze amanywa atangaze. Tureke rero ibikorerwa mu mwijima, ahubwo dufate intwaro z'abari mu mucyo." 
Romans13:13 Twifate uko bikwiriye abagenda ku manywa, tutarangwaho kurara inkera no gusinda, ubusambanyi n'ubwomanzi, intonganya n'ishyari." 
Romans13:14 Ahubwo Nyagasani Yezu Kristo ubwe ababere nk'umwambaro, kandi ntimureke kamere yanyu ibakoresha ibyo irarikira." 
Romans14:1 Umunyantegenke mu byo kwemera Kristo, mumwakire mutamugisha impaka ku byo yibwira." 
Romans14:2 Umwe ibyo yemera bimukundira kurya byose, naho undi kubera intege nke ze akīrira imboga gusa." 
Romans14:3 Urya byose ye gusuzugura urobanura, kandi urobanura ye kunegura urya byose kuko na we Imana yamwakiriye." 
Romans14:4 Ese wowe uri nde wo kunegura umugaragu w'undi? Nta wundi utari shebuja wamenya niba akora neza cyangwa nabi, kandi azakora neza kuko shebuja ari we Nyagasani, abasha kumushyigikira." 
Romans14:5 Usanga umuntu umwe yubahiriza umunsi umwe kurusha indi, naho undi agasanga iminsi yose ari kimwe. Buri muntu agomba gukurikiza icyo umutima we umwemeza." 
Romans14:6 Umuntu wubahiriza umunsi umwe kurusha indi aba abigirira Nyagasani. N'urya byose aba abigirira Nyagasani kuko ashimira Imana. Urobanura ibyo arya na we aba abigirira Nyagasani, agashimira Imana." 
Romans14:7 Koko rero nta n'umwe muri twe ubaho yigenga, cyangwa ngo apfe yigenga." 
Romans14:8 Niba turiho, turiho tugengwa na Nyagasani, dupfuye twaba dupfuye tugengwa na Nyagasani. Bityo rero twaba turiho cyangwa dupfuye, turi aba Nyagasani." 
Romans14:9 Ni cyo cyatumye Kristo apfa akazuka, kugira ngo abe umwami w'abariho n'abapfuye." 
Romans14:10 Wowe rero kuki unegura umuvandimwe wawe, kandi kuki usuzugura umuvandimwe wawe? Erega twese tuzitaba urukiko rw'Imana iducire urubanza!" 
Romans14:11 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Jyewe Nyagasani, ndarahiye, buri muntu azampfukamira, buri wese azemerera mu ruhame ko ari jye Mana.”" 
Romans14:12 Bityo umuntu wese azamurikira Imana ibyo yakoze. 
Romans14:13 Noneho rero tureke kunegurana. Ahubwo mwiyemeze rwose kutagira icyo mukora cyaca umuvandimwe wanyu intege, cyangwa ngo kimugushe mu cyaha." 
Romans14:14 Icyo nzi rwose ncyemejwe na Nyagasani Yezu, ni uko nta kintu kiriho cyahumanya umuntu ubwacyo. Nyamara uwagira icyo akora kandi yibwira ko gihumanya, koko kiba kimuhumanyije." 
Romans14:15 None rero niba umuvandimwe wawe abangamirwa n'ibyo uriye, uba utakigenza nk'ufite urukundo. Uramenye ntugatume ibyo urya bibera umuvandimwe wawe ibyo kumurimbura, kandi Kristo yaramupfiriye!" 
Romans14:16 Ikibabereye cyiza ntikigatere abantu gutukana. 
Romans14:17 Koko rero ubwami bw'Imana ntibushingiye ku kurya no kunywa, ahubwo bushingiye ku migirire itunganye n'amahoro n'ibyishimo duheshwa na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Romans14:18 Ukorera Kristo atyo ashimisha Imana kandi akemerwa n'abantu. 
Romans14:19 Nuko rero nimucyo duharanire gukora ibintu bigamije kuzana amahoro, no kubaka ubugingo bwa bagenzi bacu." 
Romans14:20 Ntugasenye umurimo w'Imana bitewe n'ibyo urya. Koko nta byokurya bizira, ariko ikibi ni uko umuntu yarya ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose cyagusha undi mu cyaha." 
Romans14:21 Ibyiza ahubwo ni ukutarya inyama cyangwa kutanywa divayi, cyangwa kudakora ikindi kintu cyose cyatuma umuvandimwe wawe agwa mu cyaha." 
Romans14:22 Imyemerere yawe kuri bene ibyo ibe hagati yawe n'Imana. Hahirwa umuntu utishyira mu rubanza kubera ibyo yiyemeje gukora. 
Romans14:23 Ariko umuntu urya ikintu ashidikanya ko gikwiye aba yiciriye urubanza, kuko akiriye binyuranye n'ibyo umutima we umwemeza. Icyo umuntu akora cyose kinyuranye n'ibyo umutima we umwemeza kimubera icyaha." 
Romans15:1 Twebwe abakomeye mu byo kwemera Kristo tugomba gufasha abadakomeye kwihangana mu ntege nke, ntidushake ibidushimisha ubwacu." 
Romans15:2 Buri muntu muri twe nashimishe mugenzi we, ashake ibimugirira akamaro bikamwubaka ubugingo." 
Romans15:3 Erega na Kristo ubwe ntabwo yishakiye ibimushimisha, ahubwo byamugendekeye nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga biti: “Ibitutsi bagututse ni jye byahamye.”" 
Romans15:4 Koko rero ibyanditswe mbere byose byandikiwe kutwigisha, kugira ngo kwihangana no gukomezwa duterwa na byo biduheshe kwiringira ibizaba." 
Romans15:5 Nuko Imana yo sōko yo kwihangana no gukomezwa, nibahe guhuza imitima mukurikije urugero rwa Kristo Yezu," 
Romans15:6 kugira ngo mwese mube muhurije hamwe muvuga kimwe, bityo muheshe ikuzo Imana Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
Romans15:7 Nuko rero buri wese ajye yakira mugenzi we nk'uko Kristo yabakiriye, kugira ngo biheshe Imana ikuzo." 
Romans15:8 Ndababwira ko Kristo yabaye umugaragu w'Abayahudi, kugira ngo Imana isohoze amasezerano yahaye ba sogokuruza, bityo yerekane ko ari indahemuka." 
Romans15:9 Kwari ukugira ngo n'abatari Abayahudi baheshe Imana ikuzo kubera imbabazi yabagiriye, nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Ni cyo gituma ngusingiza mu ruhame rw'amahanga, ni na cyo gituma nzakuririmba.”" 
Romans15:10 Byanditswe kandi ngo: “Mwa mahanga mwe, nimwishimane n'ubwoko bwa Nyagasani.”" 
Romans15:11 Kandi ngo: “Mwa mahanga yose mwe, nimusingize Nyagasani. Abantu b'amoko yose nibamuheshe ikuzo.”" 
Romans15:12 Ezayi na we yungamo ati: “Ku gishyitsi cya Yese hazashibuka uzahagurukira gutegeka amahanga. Ni na we amahanga aziringira.” 
Romans15:13 None Imana yo sōko yo kwiringira, ibasenderezemo ibyishimo n'amahoro mukesha kuyizera, kugira ngo mubone kwiringira ku buryo busesuye mubashishijwe na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Romans15:14 Bavandimwe banjye, jyewe ubwanjye ndemeza ko musendereye ineza, kandi ko mufite ubumenyi buhagije bwatuma mugirana inama." 
Romans15:15 Icyakora kuri bimwe na bimwe, nabandikiye nshyizemo umunya kugira ngo mbibibutse. Nanditse ntyo mbitewe n'ubuntu Imana yangiriye," 
Romans15:16 kugira ngo nkorere Kristo Yezu umurimo w'umutambyi mu banyamahanga. Yantumye kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwayo bwiza, kugira ngo nyishyikirize abo banyamahanga babe ituro yemera, bagizwe intore zayo na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Romans15:17 Ni yo mpamvu rero narata umurimo nakoreye Imana mbishobojwe na Kristo Yezu. 
Romans15:18 Koko sinatinyuka kugira icyo mvuga, uretse ibyo Kristo yankoresheje kugira ngo nemeze abatari Abayahudi kumvira Imana. Yakoresheje inyigisho n'ibikorwa byanjye," 
Romans15:19 kimwe n'ibimenyetso n'ibitangaza byakorewe muri bo, ndetse n'ububasha bwa Mwuka w'Imana. Bityo kuva i Yeruzalemu kugera muri Iliriya, inzira yose naje namamaza byimazeyo Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo." 
Romans15:20 Naharaniye kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza aho Kristo yari ataramenyekana honyine, ngira ngo ntubaka ku rufatiro rwashyizweho n'undi." 
Romans15:21 Bityo rero nkurikiza icyo Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Abatigeze bamenyeshwa ibye bazabibona, abatigeze bamwumva bazamusobanukirwa.”" 
Romans15:22 Ni yo mpamvu yambujije kenshi kuza iwanyu. 
Romans15:23 Ariko ubu nta murimo ngifite mu turere tw'ino, kandi nkaba maze imyaka myinshi nifuza cyane kugera iwanyu." 
Romans15:24 Noneho ubwo nzajya muri Esipaniya, nizeye ko nzanyura iwanyu nkabasura kandi mukamfasha mu by'urwo rugendo, ariko tumaranye akanya gato nkabashira urukumbuzi." 
Romans15:25 Icyakora ubu ngiye i Yeruzalemu gufasha intore z'Imana zaho," 
Romans15:26 kuko abo muri Masedoniya no muri Akaya biyemeje guha imfashanyo intore z'Imana z'i Yeruzalemu zikennye. 
Romans15:27 Bishimiye kubikora kandi koko byari ngombwa. Erega ubwo Abayahudi basangiye n'abanyamahanga imigisha iva kuri Mwuka w'Imana, na bo bagomba kubunganira ku byo imibiri yabo ikeneye!" 
Romans15:28 Ibyo nibirangira nkaba maze kubashyikiriza ibyo bazaba babageneye byose, nzajya muri Esipaniya nyuze iwanyu." 
Romans15:29 Ninza iwanyu kandi nzi ko nzaza mbazaniye umugisha usesuye wa Kristo. 
Romans15:30 Bavandimwe, ku bw'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo n'urukundo ruva kuri Mwuka, ndabinginze ngo mumfashe kurwana intambara munsabira ku Mana." 
Romans15:31 Munsabire nkire abatemera Kristo bo muri Yudeya, kandi n'imfashanyo njyanye i Yeruzalemu izakirwe neza n'intore z'Imana zaho." 
Romans15:32 Bityo Imana ibishatse nzagera iwanyu nishimye, mbone kuruhuka turi kumwe." 
Romans15:33 Imana yo sōko y'amahoro nihorane namwe mwese. Amina. 
Romans16:1 Mbashinze mushiki wacu Foyibe ukorera itorero rya Kristo ry'i Kenkireya. 
Romans16:2 Mumwakire muri Nyagasani nk'uko bikwiriye intore z'Imana, mumwunganire ku kintu cyose yabakeneraho. Erega na we yunganiye abantu benshi, nanjye ndimo!" 
Romans16:3 Mutashye Purisila na Akwila, bagenzi banjye twakoranye umurimo wa Kristo Yezu." 
Romans16:4 Bari biyemeje no gupfa kugira ngo bandokore. Si jye jyenyine ubashimira, ahubwo n'amatorero yose ya Kristo yo mu mahanga." 
Romans16:5 Mutashye n'itorero rya Kristo rikoranira mu rugo rwabo. Mutashye n'incuti nkunda Epayineto, wabimburiye abo mu ntara ya Aziya bose kwemera Kristo." 
Romans16:6 Na Mariya wabavunikiye cyane mumutashye. 
Romans16:7 Mutashye bene wacu Andironiko na Yuniya twafunganywe. Ni intumwa za Kristo z'ibirangirire, kandi bemeye Kristo mbere yanjye." 
Romans16:8 Mutashye na Ampuliyato, incuti yanjye nkunda muri Kristo." 
Romans16:9 Mutashye Urubano dufatanya umurimo dukorera Kristo, hamwe n'incuti nkunda Sitaki." 
Romans16:10 Mutashye Apele uzwiho ko akomeye kuri Kristo. Mutashye n'abo kwa Arisitobule. 
Romans16:11 Mutashye mwene wacu Herodiyoni, n'abo kwa Narisisi bari muri Nyagasani." 
Romans16:12 Mutashye Tirifayina na Tirifoza bakorera Nyagasani bashyizeho umwete. Mutashye n'incuti nkunda Perusi, na we yakoreye Nyagasani ashyizeho umwete mwinshi." 
Romans16:13 Mutashye Rufo watorewe kuba uwa Nyagasani, mutashye na nyina wambereye nanjye umubyeyi." 
Romans16:14 Mutashye na Asinkirito na Fulegoni, na Herumesi na Patiroba, na Herumasi n'abavandimwe bari kumwe na bo." 
Romans16:15 Mutashye Filologo na Yuliya, Nereyi na mushiki we Olimpa, n'abo bari kumwe bose Nyagasani yagize intore ze." 
Romans16:16 Muramukanye muhoberana ku buryo butagira amakemwa. Abagize amatorero yose ya Kristo barabatashya. 
Romans16:17 Bavandimwe, ndabihanangirije ngo mwirinde abaca ibice mu bavandimwe, kandi bakababangamira bagaca ukubiri n'inyigisho mwahawe, bene abo ngabo mubagendere kure." 
Romans16:18 Koko rero abameze batyo ntibakorera Umwami wacu Kristo, ahubwo bakorera inda zabo. Bakoresha akarimi keza n'amagambo yo kuryoshyaryoshya, bakayobya abafite imitima yoroshye." 
Romans16:19 Abantu bose bazi ukuntu mwumvira Nyagasani, ibyo biranshimisha. Ariko icyo mbifuriza ni ukujijukira gukora neza, mudafata impu zombi ngo mukore nabi." 
Romans16:20 Imana yo sōko y'amahoro, ntizatinda kujanjagurira Satani munsi y'ibirenge byanyu. Umwami wacu Yezu nagumye kubagirira ubuntu." 
Romans16:21 Mugenzi wanjye dukorana Timoteyo arabatashya, hamwe na bene wacu Lusiyo na Yasoni na Sosipateri." 
Romans16:22 Jyewe Terutiyo wanditse uru rwandiko ndabatashya – nanjye ndi uwa Nyagasani. 
Romans16:23 Gayo uncumbikiye arabatashya, ni we wakira itorero rya Kristo rikoranira iwe. Erasito umubitsi w'uyu mujyi n'umuvandimwe Kwaruto, na bo barabatashya. [" 
Romans16:24 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese. Amina.] 
Romans16:25 Dusingize Imana ibasha kubakomeza, ishingiye ku Butumwa bwiza namamaza n'ibyo nababwirije kuri Yezu Kristo. Rugikubita ubwo Butumwa bwahoze ari ibanga, none bumaze guhishurwa." 
Romans16:26 Ubu iryo banga ryashyizwe ahagaragara n'Ibyanditswe n'Abahanuzi, nk'uko Imana ihoraho yabitegetse rimenyeshwa abantu bo mu mahanga yose kugira ngo bemere Kristo bamwumvire." 
Romans16:27 Imana nyir'ubwenge yonyine nihabwe ikuzo ku bwa Yezu Kristo iteka ryose. Amina. 
1Corinthians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo wahamagawe ngo mbe Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse, n'umuvandimwe Sositeni," 
1Corinthians1:2 turabandikiye mwebwe ab'itorero ry'Imana riri i Korinti, mwebwe ntore zayo mubikesha kuba muri Kristo Yezu. Imana yabahamagaye ngo mube abayo, hamwe n'abantu bose bambaza Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo aho bari hose – ni Umwami wacu akaba n'uwabo." 
1Corinthians1:3 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro, ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:4 Mpora nshimira Imana yanjye kubera mwebwe, nyishimira ubuntu yabagiriye ibinyujije kuri Kristo Yezu." 
1Corinthians1:5 Kuba muri we byatumye Imana ibakungahaza, ibaha impano zose zo kuvuga no kumenya ibyayo." 
1Corinthians1:6 Ibyo twabemeje byerekeye Kristo byashinze imizi muri mwe," 
1Corinthians1:7 ku buryo nta mpano n'imwe y'Imana mubuze, mwebwe abategereje guhishurwa k'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:8 Ni na we uzabakomeza kugeza ku iherezo, kugira ngo mutarangwaho umugayo ku munsi Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo azaziraho." 
1Corinthians1:9 Imana ni indahemuka, ni na yo yabahamagaye ngo mugirane ubumwe n'Umwana wayo Yezu Kristo Umwami wacu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Bavandimwe, ndabinginze mu izina ry'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo ngo mwese mwumvikane, kandi mwe kwicamo ibice, ahubwo mushyire hamwe muhuje ibitekerezo n'imigambi." 
1Corinthians1:11 Bavandimwe, abo kwa Kilowe bambwiye amakuru yanyu ko muri mwe hari amakimbirane." 
1Corinthians1:12 Dore icyo mvuga ni iki: buri wese avuga ibye umwe ati: “Ndi uwa Pawulo,” undi ati: “Jyewe ndi uwa Apolo,” naho undi ati: “Jyewe ndi uwa Petero,” n'undi ati: “Jyeweho ndi uwa Kristo.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Ese Kristo yaciwemo ibice byinshi? Mbese Pawulo ni we wababambiwe ku musaraba? Mbese ni mu izina rya Pawulo mwabatijwe? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndashimira Imana ko nta n'umwe muri mwe nabatije uretse Krisipo na Gayo," 
1Corinthians1:15 bityo nta wavuga ko yabatijwe mu izina ryanjye. 
1Corinthians1:16 Koko nabatije na Sitefana n'abo mu rugo rwe, ariko uretse abo sinzi ko hari undi nabatije." 
1Corinthians1:17 Erega Kristo ntiyantumye kubatiza ahubwo yantumye gutangaza Ubutumwa bwiza, ntakoresheje amagambo y'ubwenge bw'abantu kugira ngo urupfu rwa Kristo ku musaraba rutaba impfabusa." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ubutumwa bwerekeye umusaraba wa Kristo ku bazimiye ni ubupfu, naho kuri twebwe abakizwa ni ububasha bw'Imana," 
1Corinthians1:19 kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Nzamaraho ubwenge bw'abanyabwenge, nzahindura ubusa ubumenyi bw'abahanga.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Mbese umunyabwenge bimumariye iki? Ese umwigishamategeko bimumariye iki? Mbese intyoza mu mpaka z'iki gihe yo biyimariye iki? Mbese aho ubwenge bw'iyi si Imana ntiyabuhinduye ubupfu?
