1Corinthians1:21 Imana mu bwenge bwayo ntiyakunze ko abantu bayimenya bayobowe n'ubwenge bwabo bwite. Ahubwo yishimiye gukoresha ubupfu bw'ubutumwa tuvuga kugira ngo ikize abemera Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:22 Abayahudi basaba ibitangaza byo kubemeza, naho Abagereki bagashaka ubwenge." 
1Corinthians1:23 Nyamara twebweho dutangaza ibya Kristo wabambwe ku musaraba, Abayahudi ibyo birabashegesha, naho Abagereki bibabera ubupfu." 
1Corinthians1:24 Nyamara ku bantu Imana yahamagaye, baba Abayahudi cyangwa Abagereki, Kristo ni ububasha bw'Imana n'ubwenge bwayo," 
1Corinthians1:25 kuko ubupfu bw'Imana burusha abantu ubwenge, n'intege nke z'Imana zirusha abantu imbaraga." 
1Corinthians1:26 Bavandimwe, nimwibaze uko mumeze mwebwe abo Imana yahamagaye. Ukurikije uko abantu babibona si benshi muri mwe b'abanyabwenge, si benshi bakomeye, si benshi b'imfura." 
1Corinthians1:27 Ahubwo Imana yatoranyije ibyo abantu bita ubupfu kugira ngo ikoze isoni abanyabwenge, yatoranyije ibyo abantu bita ibinyantege nke kugira ngo ikoze isoni abakomeye." 
1Corinthians1:28 Yatoranyije ibyo abantu bahinyura n'ibyo basuzugura, ndetse n'ibyo bibwira ko ari ubusa kugira ngo ihindure ubusa ibyo bibwira ko bifite akamaro," 
1Corinthians1:29 ari ukugira ngo hatagira umuntu n'umwe wishyira hejuru imbere y'Imana. 
1Corinthians1:30 Imana ubwayo ni yo yabahaye kuba muri Kristo Yezu, ni we utubera ubwenge buva ku Mana n'ubutungane n'ubuziranenge n'ugucungurwa." 
1Corinthians1:31 Bityo nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga: “Ushaka kwirata yirate Nyagasani.” 
1Corinthians2:1 Bavandimwe, igihe nazaga iwanyu nje kubahishurira amabanga y'Imana, sinakoresheje amagambo y'akarimi keza cyangwa ay'ubwenge." 
1Corinthians2:2 Ndi kumwe namwe niyemeje kutagira ikindi nibandaho, keretse kubamenyesha Yezu Kristo, cyane cyane Yezu Kristo wabambwe ku musaraba." 
1Corinthians2:3 Igihe nazaga iwanyu nari mfite intege nke, ndetse ntinya mpinda umushyitsi." 
1Corinthians2:4 Mu nyigisho zanjye no mu byo nabatangarizaga, ntabwo nigeze mbashukisha amagambo y'ubwenge buhanitse, ahubwo naberetse ububasha bwa Mwuka w'Imana." 
1Corinthians2:5 Ibyo nabikoreye kugira ngo ukwemera Kristo kwanyu kutaba gushingiye ku bwenge bw'abantu, ahubwo kube gushingiye ku bubasha bw'Imana." 
1Corinthians2:6 Icyakora abakuze mu bya Mwuka ni bo twigisha ubwenge, ariko ubwo bwenge si ubw'iyi si cyangwa ubw'ibinyabutware bigenga iyi si byagenewe kurimbuka." 
1Corinthians2:7 Ubwenge tubabwira bwo ni ubw'Imana, ni ibanga ryahishwe abantu kuva kera kose, Imana ikabugenera kuduhesha ikuzo." 
1Corinthians2:8 Nta n'umwe muri bya binyabutware bigenga iyi si wamenye ubwo bwenge, kuko iyo biza kubumenya ntibyari kubamba Nyagasani Nyir'ikuzo." 
1Corinthians2:9 Ahubwo nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga, “Ibyo ijisho ritigeze rireba, cyangwa ugutwi ngo kubyumve, ibintu umuntu atigeze anatekereza, Imana yabiteguriye abayikunda.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Ibyo Imana yabiduhishuriye ikoresheje Mwuka wayo. Burya Mwuka w'Imana agenzura byose ndetse n'amayobera y'Imana. 
1Corinthians2:11 Ni nde wamenya ibyo umuntu atekereza uretse umutima w'uwo muntu nyine? Nta we. Ni na ko rero nta wamenya ibyo Imana itekereza uretse Mwuka wayo. 
1Corinthians2:12 Twebwe si umwuka w'iyi si twahawe ahubwo ni Mwuka uturuka ku Mana, kugira ngo tumenye impano Imana itugabira ku buntu." 
1Corinthians2:13 Ibyo ntitubivuga mu magambo twigishijwe n'ubwenge bw'abantu, ahubwo tubivuga uko tubyigishijwe na Mwuka w'Imana. Uko ni ko dusobanurira ibya Mwuka abasanzwe bamufite." 
1Corinthians2:14 Umuntu ugengwa na kamere ntasobanukirwa ibyerekeye Mwuka w'Imana, ndetse abyita ubupfu. Ntabasha kubimenya kuko bigenzurwa n'ufite Mwuka w'Imana wenyine." 
1Corinthians2:15 Umuntu ufite Mwuka w'Imana agenzura byose, nyamara we nta wumugenzura." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo “Ni nde uzi ibyo Nyagasani atekereza? Ni nde ubasha kumugira inama?” Nyamara twebwe twahawe gutekereza kimwe na Kristo. 
1Corinthians3:1 Bavandimwe, sinabashije kuvugana namwe nk'ubwira abafite Mwuka w'Imana. Ahubwo navuganye namwe nk'uvugana n'abantu b'isi, bakiri bato mu bya Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nabatungishije amata, sinabagaburira ibyokurya bikomeye kuko mwari mutarabibasha, ndetse n'ubu ntimurabibasha." 
1Corinthians3:3 Muracyifata nk'ab'isi. Mbese ubwo ishyari n'amakimbirane bikirangwa muri mwe, ntibigaragara ko mwifata nk'ab'isi mukagengwa na kamere yanyu nk'abantu bose?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Igihe umwe muri mwe avuga ati: “Jye ndi uwa Pawulo”, undi ati: “Jyewe ndi uwa Apolo ”, ntibiba byerekana ko mukimeze nk'ab'isi?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Mbese ye, Apolo ni nde? Ese Pawulo we ni nde? Twembi turi abagaragu b'Imana batumye mwemera Kristo. Buri wese muri twe akora umurimo yiherewe na Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians3:6 Jyewe nateye imbuto Apolo arazivomera, ariko Imana ni yo yatumye zikura." 
1Corinthians3:7 Utera imbuto nta cyo ari cyo, uzivomera na we nta cyo ari cyo, Imana yonyine ni yo ituma zikura." 
1Corinthians3:8 Utera imbuto n'uzivomēra barahwanye, bombi Imana izabahemba ibihwanye n'umurimo bakoze." 
1Corinthians3:9 Twe dufatanya gukora umurimo w'Imana, naho mwe muri umurima wayo. Ikindi kandi muri inzu y'Imana." 
1Corinthians3:10 Kubera ubuntu Imana yangiriye, nagenje nk'umwubatsi w'umuhanga nshyiraho urufatiro, undi muntu arwubakaho. Icyakora buri muntu niyitondere uburyo yubaka kuri urwo rufatiro." 
1Corinthians3:11 Nta muntu ubasha gushyiraho urundi rufatiro, rutari urwashyizweho ari rwo Yezu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Kuri urwo rufatiro umuntu ashobora kurwubakishaho izahabu cyangwa ifeza, cyangwa amabuye y'agaciro, cyangwa agakoresha ibiti, cyangwa ibyatsi cyangwa ibikenyeri." 
1Corinthians3:13 Uko byaba kose, ibikorwa bya buri muntu bizashyirwa ahagaragara ku munsi Imana izaciraho imanza. Kuri uwo munsi bizamenyekana birangwe n'umuriro, umuriro ni na wo uzasuzuma akamaro k'ibikorwa bya buri muntu." 
1Corinthians3:14 Umuntu azahembwa niba ibikorwa bye birokotse uwo muriro. 
1Corinthians3:15 Nyamara icyo yubatse nigikongorwa n'umuriro azaba ahombye, ariko we ubwe azakizwa nk'uwiyatse umuriro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Mbese ntimuzi yuko muri Ingoro y'Imana, na Mwuka wayo akaba atuye muri mwe?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Nuko rero umuntu usenya Ingoro y'Imana na we Imana izamuhindura ivu, kuko iyo ngoro yayigize iyayo kandi iyo Ngoro ni mwebwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Ntihakagire uwishuka. Nihagira umuntu muri mwe wibwira ko ari umunyabwenge uko ab'iki gihe babibona, abanze yemere kuba umupfu kugira ngo abone kuba umunyabwenge nyakuri." 
1Corinthians3:19 Erega ubwenge bw'iyi si ku Mana ni ubupfu, nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Imana ifatira abanyabwenge mu mutego w'uburiganya bwabo!”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Biravuga kandi ngo: “Nyagasani azi ibyo abanyabwenge batekereza, azi ko nta kamaro bifite.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Bityo ntihagire uwiratana abantu kuko byose ari ibyanyu," 
1Corinthians3:22 yaba Pawulo cyangwa Apolo cyangwa Petero, yaba isi cyangwa ubugingo cyangwa urupfu, byaba ibyo muri iki gihe cyangwa ibyo mu gihe kizaza byose ni ibyanyu," 
1Corinthians3:23 kandi mwebwe muri aba Kristo, na Kristo ni uw'Imana." 
1Corinthians4:1 Abantu bajye badufata nk'abagaragu ba Kristo, bashinzwe amabanga y'Imana." 
1Corinthians4:2 Icya ngombwa ku muntu washinzwe umurimo ni ukuba indahemuka. 
1Corinthians4:3 Jye nta cyo bimbwiye munciriye urubanza, cyangwa se nduciriwe n'urukiko rusanzwe. Jyewe ubwanjye nta rubanza nicira." 
1Corinthians4:4 Mu by'ukuri nta cyo umutima wanjye unshinja, nyamara si byo byemeza ko ndi intungane, ahubwo ni Nyagasani wenyine uncira urubanza." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ni cyo gituma mutagomba kugira uwo mucira urubanza igihe kitaragera. Mutegereze ko Nyagasani azaza agashyira ahabona ibihishwe mu mwijima, kandi akagaragaza ibyo abantu bibwira. Ubwo ni bwo Imana izaha umuntu wese ishimwe rimukwiriye." 
1Corinthians4:6 Bavandimwe, ibyo nivuzeho ubwanjye n'ibyo navuze kuri Apolo, nabivugaga ari mwe mbigirira kugira ngo mukurikize urugero rwacu, mumenye icyo iri jambo rivuga ngo: “Ntimukarenge ku Byanditswe”. Nuko ntimukirate mubogamira ku ruhande rw'umwe ngo murwanye undi." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ese koko ni nde wakurutishije abandi? Ese hari icyo ufite utahawe n'Imana? Niba kandi waragihawe kuki wirata nk'aho utagihawe? 
1Corinthians4:8 Ubu ga mumaze kurengwa! Mumaze kuba abakungu! Erega mubaye nk'abami twe tutabirimo! Icyampa ngo mube abami koko kugira ngo natwe twimikanwe namwe! 
1Corinthians4:9 Twebwe Intumwa za Kristo nsanga Imana yaradushyize mu mwanya w'inyuma, dusa n'abaciriwe urwo gupfa. Twashyizwe ku karubanda dushungerwa n'ab'isi, imbere y'abamarayika n'abantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Twebwe turi abapfu kubera Kristo, naho mwe muri we mwifata nk'abanyabwenge. Twebwe turi abanyantegenke naho mwe muri abanyambaraga. Mwebwe murubahwa naho twebwe tugasuzugurwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Kugeza n'ubu turasonza tukagira inyota, twambara ubusa tukagirirwa nabi kandi tuzerera hose," 
1Corinthians4:12 tukaruha dukoresha amaboko yacu. Baradutuka tukabasabira umugisha, baradutoteza tukihangana," 
1Corinthians4:13 baradusebya tukabavugisha neza. Kugeza n'ubu baduhinduye nk'icyavu cy'iyi si, mbese batugize nk'ibishingwe bose bajugunye." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ibyo simbyandikira kubakoza isoni, ahubwo ni ukubaburira nk'abana banjye nkunda." 
1Corinthians4:15 Nubwo muri Kristo mwagira ababarera ibihumbi icumi uwababyaye ni umwe, ni jye wababereye so muri Kristo kubera Ubutumwa bwiza nabagejejeho." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ndabinginze rero nimukurikize urugero nabahaye. 
1Corinthians4:17 Ni cyo gituma mbatumyeho Timoteyo, umwana wanjye nkunda kandi w'indahemuka kuri Nyagasani. Azabibutsa imibereho yanjye nkesha Kristo, nk'uko mbyigisha aho njya hose mu matorero yose." 
1Corinthians4:18 Bamwe muri mwe bibwiye yuko ntazagaruka kubasura bibatera ubwirasi. 
1Corinthians4:19 Nyamara Nyagasani nabishaka nzaza iwanyu vuba. Ubwo ni bwo nzirebera ububasha abo birasi bafite atari ukumva amagambo yabo gusa," 
1Corinthians4:20 kuko ubwami bw'Imana atari amagambo gusa, ahubwo bufite ububasha." 
1Corinthians4:21 Mbese icyo mwifuza ni iki? Ese ni uko naza iwanyu nzanye inkoni yo kubahana, cyangwa se ko naza mfite umutima w'urukundo n'ubugwaneza?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Inkuru yamamaye hose yuko muri mwe hari ubusambanyi, ndetse ubusambanyi bukabije butaboneka no mu batazi Imana. Bavuga ko umwe muri mwe atunze muka se!" 
1Corinthians5:2 Mbese muracyirata iki noneho? Ahubwo ga mwari mukwiriye kubabara, kandi umuntu wakoze ibyo agakurwa muri mwe." 
1Corinthians5:3 Jyewe rero nubwo mutakimbona mumenye ko tukiri kumwe, kandi mu izina ry'Umwami wacu Yezu namaze gucira urubanza uwakoze ibyo ngibyo nk'aho mpari. Noneho ubwo muzakoranira hamwe nanjye nzaba nifatanyije namwe, muzakoreshe ububasha bw'Umwami wacu Yezu," 
1Corinthians5:4  
1Corinthians5:5 mushyikirize uwo muntu Satani kugira ngo umubiri we upfe, ariko ubugingo bwe buzakizwe ku munsi Nyagasani azaziraho." 
1Corinthians5:6 Ubwirasi bwanyu si bwiza. Mbese ntimuzi wa mugani ngo “Agasemburo gake gatubura ifu yose?” 
1Corinthians5:7 Nimwitunganye mwivanemo umusemburo wa kera kugira ngo mumere nk'umugati mushya udasembuwe, ni na ko muri. Koko kandi Kristo yatanzwe ho igitambo, ari we mwana w'intama wacu ugenewe umunsi mukuru wa Pasika." 
1Corinthians5:8 Bityo rero twizihize uwo munsi mukuru, tudakoresha umusemburo wa kera w'ubugome n'ubugizi bwa nabi, ahubwo dukoreshe umugati udasembuwe w'ukuri utarangwaho uburyarya." 
1Corinthians5:9 Mu rwandiko nabandikiye nababwiye kutifatanya n'abasambanyi. 
1Corinthians5:10 Sinashakaga kuvuga abantu b'iyi si b'abasambanyi, cyangwa se b'abanyamururumba cyangwa ibisambo, cyangwa abasenga ibigirwamana. Kugira ngo umuntu yitandukanye n'abo bose agomba kuva ku isi." 
1Corinthians5:11 Ahubwo nabandikiye yuko mutagomba kwifatanya n'umuntu wiyita umuvandimwe muri Kristo, kandi akaba ari umusambanyi cyangwa umunyamururumba, cyangwa usenga ibigirwamana cyangwa utukana, cyangwa umusinzi cyangwa igisambo. Ndetse n'umuntu nk'uwo ntimukanasangire." 
1Corinthians5:12 Mbese birandeba gucira urubanza abatari aba Kristo? Imana ni yo izabacira urubanza. Ahubwo abo muri mwe ni bo mukwiriye gucira urubanza, nk'uko byanditswe ngo: “Muzakure inkozi z'ibibi muri mwe.”" 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Muri mwe hagize ugira icyo apfa na mugenzi we wemera Kristo, yahangara ate kumurega ku bacamanza basanzwe baca urwa kibera, aho gusanga intore z'Imana ngo zibunge?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Mbese ntimuzi yuko intore z'Imana zizacira ab'isi urubanza? Ese niba ari mwe muzacira ab'isi urubanza, mwananirwa mute guca imanza zoroheje?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Ntimuzi se ko n'abamarayika tuzabacira imanza, nkanswe kuzicira abantu b'iki gihe bafite ibyo bapfa?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Igihe mufite imanza nk'izo, kuki muzegurira abantu b'imburamumaro bari mu muryango wa Kristo?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Mbivugiye kubakoza isoni. Ese ni ukuvuga yuko nta munyabwenge n'umwe uri muri mwe wabasha kunga abavandimwe? 
1Corinthians6:6 Ese atanabaho birakwiriye koko ko umuntu aburanya umuvandimwe we, kandi bagacirwa urubanza n'abatemera Kristo?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Erega izo manza mufitanye zirerekana ko ibyaha byabatsinze rwose! Kuki ahubwo mutakwemera kurenganywa? Kuki mutakwemera guhuguzwa ibyanyu? 
1Corinthians6:8 Ibiri amambu ni mwe murenganya, mugahuguza abandi kandi ari abavandimwe banyu!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Mbese ntimuzi yuko abarenganya abandi batazabona umunani mu bwami bw'Imana? Ntimukibeshye. Inkozi z'ibibi n'abasenga ibigirwamana, abasambanyi b'ingaragu cyangwa abubatse n'abasambana bahuje igitsina," 
1Corinthians6:10 abajura n'abanyamururumba n'abasinzi n'abatukana n'ibisambo, abo bose nta munani bazagira mu bwami bw'Imana." 
1Corinthians6:11 Bamwe muri mwe ni ko mwari mumeze ariko ubu mwamaze kuhagirwa, mugirwa intore z'Imana, muba n'intungane, mubikesheje Nyagasani Yezu Kristo na Mwuka w'Imana yacu." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Byose mbifitiye uburenganzira” (ni ko bamwe bavuga). Ni koko nyamara si ko byose bimfitiye akamaro. Yee, byose mbifitiye uburenganzira ariko nta na kimwe kizantegeka." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Ibyokurya bigenewe inda, n'inda igenewe ibyokurya” (ni ko bavuga). Yee, nyamara Imana izabitsemba byombi. Umubiri ntiwagenewe ubusambanyi, ahubwo wagenewe guhesha Nyagasani ikuzo kandi Nyagasani akaba ari we uwugenga." 
1Corinthians6:14 Imana yazuye Nyagasani Yezu, natwe izatuzura ikoresheje ububasha bwayo." 
1Corinthians6:15 Mbese ntimuzi yuko imibiri yanyu ari ingingo z'umubiri wa Kristo? None se nafata ingingo z'umubiri wa Kristo nkazigira iz'indaya? Ntibikabeho! 
1Corinthians6:16 Cyangwa se ntimuzi yuko umuntu wifatanya n'indaya, we na yo baba babaye umubiri umwe? Koko kandi Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Bombi bazaba babaye umuntu umwe.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Nyamara uwifatanya na Nyagasani aba abaye umwe na we mu by'ubugingo. 
1Corinthians6:18 Mugendere kure ubusambanyi. Ibindi byaha byose umuntu akora biba bidakorewe mu mubiri, ariko usambana aba acumuye ku mubiri we." 
1Corinthians6:19 Mbese ntimuzi yuko imibiri yanyu ari ingoro za Mwuka Muziranenge utuye muri mwe, mwahawe n'Imana? Ntimuri abanyu bwite ngo mwigenge," 
1Corinthians6:20 kuko mwacunguwe mutanzweho ikiguzi. Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, mukoreshe imibiri yanyu ibyo guhesha Imana ikuzo." 
1Corinthians7:1 Ku byerekeye ibyo mwambajije mu rwandiko rwanyu, icyiza ni uko umuntu atarongora." 
1Corinthians7:2 Ariko kubera ko ubusambanyi bwabaye gikwira, ibyiza ni uko umugabo wese agira uwe mugore, n'umugore wese akagira uwe mugabo." 
1Corinthians7:3 Umugabo ntakwiriye kwiyima umugore we, n'umugore na we ni uko ntakwiriye kwiyima umugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:4 Umugore ntiyigenga ku mubiri we, ugengwa n'umugabo we, n'umugabo na we ni uko ntiyigenga ku mubiri we, ugengwa n'umugore we." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ntihakagire uwiyima undi, keretse mubyumvikanyeho mugahāna igihe kugira ngo mubone uko musenga nta kibarogoya. Ariko hanyuma mwongere kubonana kugira ngo mutananirwa kwifata, Satani akabaca urwaho akabashuka." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ibyo mbabwiye ndabibemereye gusa si itegeko ntanze. 
1Corinthians7:7 Nakwifuza yuko abantu bose bamera nkanjye, ariko umuntu wese afite impano ye bwite yahawe n'Imana, umwe iye undi iye." 
1Corinthians7:8 Abatarashaka bo muri mwe kimwe n'abapfakazi, ndababwira yuko icyiza ari uko bakomeza kumera nkanjye." 
1Corinthians7:9 Ariko abadashoboye kwifata nibashyingiranwe, kuko kurongorana biruta kwicwa n'irari." 
1Corinthians7:10 Dore itegeko ku bashyingiranywe, ariko si jye uribategeka ahubwo ni Nyagasani: umugore ntagatandukane n'umugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:11 Icyakora aramutse atandukanye na we ntagashake undi mugabo, cyangwa se ajye yiyunga n'umugabo we. Umugabo na we ntakirukane umugore we." 
1Corinthians7:12 Ku bandi dore icyo mvuga ku giti cyanjye, si Nyagasani ubivuga: umuvandimwe wese abaye afite umugore utemera Kristo, umugore we akaba yemera kugumana na we, uwo mugabo ntakamwirukane." 
1Corinthians7:13 Bityo kandi n'umugore wo muri mwe aramutse afitwe n'umugabo utemera Kristo, umugabo we akemera kugumana na we, uwo mugore ntagatandukane n'umugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:14 Erega umugabo utemera Kristo aba yeguriwe Imana bitewe n'umugore we, n'umugore utemera Kristo aba yeguriwe Imana bitewe n'umugabo we! Bitabaye bityo abana banyu baba bafite imiziro, nyamara atari ko biri kuko na bo beguriwe Imana." 
1Corinthians7:15 Nyamara kandi utemera Kristo ashatse gutandukana n'uwo bashakanye nagende. Bibaye bityo uwo muvandimwe aba atakigengwa n'amategeko, kuko Imana yabahamagariye kuba mu mahoro." 
1Corinthians7:16 Mbese wa mugore we, ubwirwa n'iki ko uzakiza umugabo wawe? Cyangwa se wa mugabo we, ubwirwa n'iki ko uzakiza umugore wawe?" 
1Corinthians7:17 N'ubundi umuntu akomeze kuba nk'uko Imana yamugeneye, uko yari ari igihe Imana yamuhamagaraga. Uko ni ko ntegeka amatorero yose ya Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:18 Niba umuntu yarahamagawe n'Imana yaramaze gukebwa ntakīgire nk'aho atakebwe, kandi niba yarahamagawe atarakebwa ntakirirwe akebwa." 
1Corinthians7:19 Ari ugukebwa, ari ukudakebwa byose nta cyo bimaze. Icy'ingenzi ni ukumvira amategeko y'Imana." 
1Corinthians7:20 Umuntu wese nagume uko yari ari igihe Imana yamuhamagaraga. 
1Corinthians7:21 Mbese wowe igihe Imana yaguhamagaraga wari inkoreragahato? Ibyo nta cyo bigutwaye, ariko ubonye uburyo bwatuma uvanwa mu buja nakubwira iki?" 
1Corinthians7:22 Uwahamagawe na Nyagasani ari inkoreragahato aba avanywe mu buja na Nyagasani. Bityo rero n'uwahamagawe yigenga, aba ari umugaragu wa Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:23 Imana yarabacunguye ibatangaho ikiguzi, ntimugasubire mu buja bw'abantu." 
1Corinthians7:24 Nuko rero bavandimwe, umuntu wese nagumane n'Imana uko yari ari igihe yamuhamagaraga." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ku byerekeye ingaragu, nta tegeko Nyagasani yampaye rizerekeye ariko ndabaha inama, kandi kuko Nyagasani yangiriye imbabazi, ndi umuntu mushobora kwizera." 
1Corinthians7:26 Kubera ingorane zo muri iki gihe, ndasanga ibyiza ari uko umuntu yagumya kuba ingaragu." 
1Corinthians7:27 Niba usanzwe ufite umugore ntugashake gutandukana na we. Niba uri ingaragu ntugashake kurongora. 
1Corinthians7:28 Icyakora nubwo warongora ntiwaba ukoze icyaha, n'umukobwa w'inkumi ashyingiwe nta cyaha aba akoze. Ariko abubatse bazagira amakuba bakiriho, ni na yo nashakaga kubarinda." 
1Corinthians7:29 Bavandimwe, dore icyo nshaka kuvuga: hasigaye igihe gito. Kuva ubu abafite abagore nibamere nk'abatabafite." 
1Corinthians7:30 Abarira nibamere nk'abatarira, abanezerewe nibamere nk'abatanezerewe, abaguzi nibamere nk'abadafite icyo batunze," 
1Corinthians7:31 n'abatunze iby'iyi si ntibagatwarwe na byo, kuko iyi si uko iteye igenda ishiraho." 
1Corinthians7:32 Icyo mbifuriza ni uko mudahagarika umutima. Ingaragu iharanira ibya Nyagasani, igira ngo ibone uko imushimisha." 
1Corinthians7:33 Naho umuntu warongoye aharanira iby'isi kugira ngo abone uko ashimisha umugore we. 
1Corinthians7:34 Bene uwo aba afite imitima ibiri. Umugore udafite umugabo cyangwa umukobwa w'inkumi, aharanira ibya Nyagasani agira ngo amwiyegurire wese, umubiri n'umutima. Naho umugore ufite umugabo aharanira iby'isi, agira ngo abone uko ashimisha umugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ibyo mbivugiye kubafasha si ukubahata. Ndagira ngo mwifate uko bikwiye, mubone uko mwegukira Nyagasani nta nkomyi." 
1Corinthians7:36 Igihe umusore yasabye umukobwa, akumva ko yamurangaranye kuko yatinze kumurongora, umukobwa akaba agumiwe nashaka bashyingiranwe – nta cyaha azaba akoze." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ariko niba uwo musore ntawe umuhase, akiyemeza kutarongora kandi akaba ashobora gukomera ku cyo yiyemeje, aretse uwo mukobwa yaba akoze neza kurutaho." 
1Corinthians7:38 Nuko rero urongoye umukobwa yasabye aba akoze neza, naho utamurongoye aba arushijeho gukora neza." 
1Corinthians7:39 Umugore aba ahambiriwe ku mugabo we igihe cyose uwo mugabo akiriho. Ariko aramutse apfuye uwo mugore aba afite uburenganzira bwo gushyingirwa uwo ashaka wese, apfa kuba umuyoboke wa Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ariko uko jyewe mbibona, yarushaho kugubwa neza agumye uko ari, kandi ndibwira ko mbivuze nyobowe na Mwuka w'Imana." 
1Corinthians8:1 Ibyerekeye inyama zaterekerejwe ibigirwamana, tuzi ko twese “tujijutse” (nk'uko muvuga). Nyamara kujijuka gutera kwikuza, naho urukundo rurubaka." 
1Corinthians8:2 Uwibwira ko hari icyo ajijutseho, aba atarakimenya uko bikwiye." 
1Corinthians8:3 Nyamara umuntu ukunda Imana amenywa na yo. 
1Corinthians8:4 None se biremewe kurya inyama zaterekerejwe ibigirwamana? Tuzi yuko ku isi ibigirwamana byose ari ubusa, kandi yuko Imana ari imwe rukumbi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Nubwo hariho ibyo bita imana ku isi cyangwa mu ijuru – kandi koko hariho ibyitwa “imana” byinshi n'ibyitwa “abatware” byinshi - 
1Corinthians8:6 nyamara twebwe dufite Imana imwe rukumbi ari yo Mubyeyi ibintu byose bikomokaho, akaba ari na yo twaremewe. Dufite kandi Umutware umwe gusa Yezu Kristo watumye ibintu byose bibaho, ari na we dukesha ubuzima." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ariko ibyo ngibyo abantu bose ntibabisobanukiwe. Hariho abantu bamwe basanganywe akamenyero ko gusenga ibigirwamana, ku buryo iyo bariye inyama bibwira ko zaterekerejwe ikigirwamana, maze kubera intege nke zabo bakumva umutima ubarega ko bahumanye." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ibyokurya si byo byatugeza ku Mana. Iyo tutariye ibyokurya ibi n'ibi nta cyo duhomba, n'iyo tubiriye nta cyo twunguka." 
1Corinthians8:9 Nyamara mwirinde, kugira ngo ubwo burenganzira bwanyu butagusha mu cyaha abanyantegenke." 
1Corinthians8:10 Koko se umuntu w'umunyantegenke akubonye wowe “ujijutse” urīra mu ngoro y'ikigirwamana, ntibyamutera kurya inyama zaterekerejwe kandi umutima we utabimwemerera?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Nuko rero uwo muvandimwe w'umunyantegenke Kristo yapfiriye azaba azize “kujijuka” kwawe. 
1Corinthians8:12 Nimucumura mutyo ku bavandimwe banyu, mukanakomeretsa imitima yabo isanzwe idakomeye, muzaba mucumuye no kuri Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:13 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, niba hari ibyokurya byagusha umuvandimwe wanjye mu cyaha, sinzarya inyama bibaho kugira ngo ntamugusha." 
1Corinthians9:1 Mbese simfite uburenganzira bwo kwishyira nkizana? Ese sindi Intumwa ya Kristo? Mbese siniboneye Yezu Umwami wacu? Ese mwebwe ntimuri ikimenyetso kigaragaza umurimo Nyagasani yampaye gukora? 
1Corinthians9:2 Nubwo ku bw'abandi ntaba Intumwa ye, ku bwanyu ho ngomba kuba yo. Ni mwe cyemezo kiranga ko ndi Intumwa ya Kristo mbihawe na Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians9:3 Dore uko niregura ku bangenza. 
1Corinthians9:4 Mbese simfite uburenganzira bwo gutungwa n'umurimo nkora? 
1Corinthians9:5 Ese simfite uburenganzira bwo kugendana n'umugore wemera Kristo twashakanye, nk'izindi Ntumwa za Nyagasani n'abavandimwe be na Petero?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Cyangwa se ni jye na Barinaba twenyine tugomba gukorera ibidutunga? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ni nde waba umusirikari akitunga? Ni nde watera ibiti by'imizabibu ntarye imbuto zabyo? Ni nde waragira ubushyo bw'inka ntanywe amata? 
1Corinthians9:8 Mwe kugira ngo ibyo ndabivuga nshingiye ku bintu bisanzwe mu bantu gusa. Erega n'Amategeko ya Musa ni ko abivuga! 
1Corinthians9:9 Muri ayo Mategeko handitswe ngo “Ntimugahambire umunwa w'ikimasa igihe gihonyōra ingano.” Mbese ni ukuvuga ko Imana yita ku bimasa gusa? 
1Corinthians9:10 Mbese aho si twebwe cyane cyane yabivugiye? Ni koko byanditswe ku bwacu, kuko uhinga n'uhura bombi baba bafite icyo biringira kuzakura ku musaruro." 
1Corinthians9:11 Twabibye muri mwe imbuto za Mwuka w'Imana, none se byaba bikabije dusaruye ku byo mwe mutunze?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Niba abandi bafite uburenganzira bwo kugira icyo bababonaho, ubwo se ntitububarusha? Nyamara ntitwakoresheje ubwo burenganzira. Ahubwo twihanganiye byose, kugira ngo tudakoma mu nkokora Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Mbese ntimuzi yuko abakora mu Ngoro y'Imana iyo Ngoro ari yo ibatunga, n'abatamba ibitambo bakabihabwaho umugabane?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Ni na ko Nyagasani yategetse ngo abamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza batungwe na bwo. 
1Corinthians9:15 Nyamara jyewe sinagize icyo nitwaza na kimwe muri ibyo ngibyo, kandi ibi simbyandikiye kugira ngo ngire icyo ndonka. Ikiruta ni uko napfa! Ntawe uteze kunyambura ishema niratana." 
1Corinthians9:16 Kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza ntibyambera impamvu yo kwirata kuko ngomba kubikora byanze bikunze, ntabikoze naba ngushije ishyano." 
1Corinthians9:17 Iyo mba nkora uyu murimo ari jye wawihitiyemo, nagombaga kuwuhemberwa. Ariko ubwo atari jye biturukaho, ni ngombwa ko nkora umurimo Imana yanshinze." 
1Corinthians9:18 None se igihembo cyanjye ni ikihe? Ni ukwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza ku buntu, ntiriwe nkoresha bwa burenganzira bwo gutungwa n'ubwo Butumwa." 
1Corinthians9:19 Nubwo nishyira nkizana, nigize inkoreragahato ya bose ngo ndusheho kwigarurira benshi, kugira ngo mbageze kuri Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:20 Iyo ndi mu Bayahudi, mba nk'Umuyahudi kugira ngo nigarurire Abayahudi. Iyo ndi mu batwarwa n'Amategeko mba nk'utwarwa na yo (nubwo jye ndatwarwa n'Amategeko), kugira ngo nigarurire abatwarwa na yo." 
1Corinthians9:21 Iyo ndi mu batazi Amategeko, nanjye mba nk'utayazi kugira ngo nigarurire abatayazi – ibyo simbivugiye yuko ntazi Amategeko y'Imana, kuko Kristo ari we Tegeko ringenga." 
1Corinthians9:22 Iyo ndi mu banyantegenke, mba umunyantegenke kugira ngo nigarurire abanyantegenke. Nigira nk'uko buri wese ameze, kugira ngo ibyo ari byo byose nkizemo bamwe." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ibyo byose mbikora kubera Ubutumwa bwiza ngira ngo mbugireho uruhare. 
1Corinthians9:24 Mbese ntimuzi yuko mu mikino, iyo abantu basiganwa, biruka bose, ariko umwe akaba ari we wegukana ikamba ho igihembo? Nuko rero namwe nimwiruke kugira ngo muzaryegukane." 
1Corinthians9:25 Abarushanwa mu mikino bose bamenya kwifata ku buryo bwose. Bo babikorera kugira ngo begukane ikamba rishira vuba, ariko twebwe tubikorera kuzegukana ikamba ridashira." 
1Corinthians9:26 Ni yo mpamvu nanjye niruka ntameze nk'utazi iyo agana, ngasa nk'ukina umukino wo guterana amakofi ariko simpushe." 
1Corinthians9:27 Ahubwo mbabaza umubiri wanjye nkawukoresha agahato, kugira ngo ntazamara kwigisha abandi naho jye ngasigara ntemewe." 
1Corinthians10:1 Bavandimwe, sinshaka ko muyoberwa ukuntu ba sogokuruza bose bagendaga bayobowe na cya gicu, kandi bose bakambuka ya nyanja." 
1Corinthians10:2 Bose babatirijwe muri cya gicu no muri ya nyanja, kugira ngo babe umwe na Musa." 
1Corinthians10:3 Bose basangiye bya byokurya byavuye ku Mana," 
1Corinthians10:4 bose banasangiye cya kinyobwa cyavuye ku Mana, kuko banyweraga kuri rwa rutare rwavuye ku Mana rwagendanaga na bo, kandi urwo rutare rwari Kristo." 
1Corinthians10:5 Ariko benshi muri bo ntibashimishije Imana, ni cyo cyatumye intumbi zabo zinyanyagira mu butayu." 
1Corinthians10:6 Ibyo byabaye kugira ngo bitubere icyitegererezo cyo kutuburira, kugira ngo tutararikira ibibi nka bo." 
1Corinthians10:7 Ntimukaramye kandi ibigirwamana nk'uko bamwe muri bo babigenje, ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Abantu baricara bararya baranywa, barangije barahaguruka barakina.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Byongeye kandi ntitugasambane nk'uko bamwe muri bo basambanye, bigatuma abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitatu muri bo bapfira umunsi umwe." 
1Corinthians10:9 Nta n'ubwo dukwiriye kugerageza Nyagasani, nk'uko bamwe muri bo bamugerageje bakamarwa na za nzoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Ntimukitotombe nk'uko bamwe muri bo babigenje, umumarayika w'umurimbuzi akabamara." 
1Corinthians10:11 Ibyabaye kuri abo bantu kwari ukugira ngo bibere abandi icyitegererezo, byandikiwe kutuburira kubera ko tugeze mu bihe by'imperuka." 
1Corinthians10:12 Nuko rero uwibwira ko ahagaze yirinde atagwa. 
1Corinthians10:13 Ntimwigeze muhura n'ikigeragezo na kimwe kidasanzwe mu bantu. Imana ni indahemuka, ntabwo izatuma mugeragezwa n'ibiruta ibyo mwabasha gutsinda. Ahubwo nimugeragezwa izabashoboza kubyihanganira, ibacire n'akanzu ngo mubone uko mubyivanamo." 
1Corinthians10:14 Bityo rero ncuti nkunda, mwirinde gusenga ibigirwamana." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndabibabwira kuko muzi ubwenge, namwe nimusuzume ibyo mvuga." 
1Corinthians10:16 Mbese cya gikombe cy'umugisha dushimira Imana tukakinyweraho, si ko gusangira amaraso ya Kristo? Naho se wa mugati tumanyura tukawuryaho, si ko gusangira umubiri wa Kristo?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Umugati turyaho ni umwe, bityo nubwo twe turi benshi turi umubiri umwe, kuko twese dusangira umugati umwe." 
1Corinthians10:18 Nimurebere ku rubyaro rwa Isiraheli. Mbese abarya ku byatambiwe ku rutambiro rweguriwe Imana, ntibaba bagize ubusābane na yo?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Mbese ndashaka kuvuga ko ibigirwamana bifite akamaro, cyangwa se ko ibitambo byabiterekerejwe bifite akamaro?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Oya. Icyo mvuga ni uko abatura ibyo bitambo atari Imana babitura, ahubwo babitura ingabo za Satani. Sinshaka ko mugirana ubusābane n'ingabo za Satani." 
1Corinthians10:21 Ntimushobora kubangikanya kunywera ku gikombe cya Nyagasani, no kunywera ku cy'ingabo za Satani. Ntimushobora kandi kubangikanya kurīra ku meza ya Nyagasani, no kurīra ku meza y'ingabo za Satani." 
1Corinthians10:22 Cyangwa se tuba dushaka kwikorereza ugufuha kwa Nyagasani? Mbese tumurusha amaboko? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Byose tubifitiye uburenganzira” (ni ko bamwe bavuga). Ni koko, nyamara si ko byose bifite akamaro. Yee, byose tubifitiye uburenganzira, ariko si ko byose byubaka ubugingo bw'umuntu." 
1Corinthians10:24 Ntihakagire uwishakira inyungu ye bwite, ahubwo ayishakire abandi." 
1Corinthians10:25 Mujye murya ibyaguriwe mu ibagiro byose mutiriwe mubaza, kugira ngo imitima yanyu itabacira urubanza," 
1Corinthians10:26 kuko isi n'ibiyuzuye byose ari ibya Nyagasani. 
1Corinthians10:27 Nihagira umuntu utemera Kristo ubararikira gusangira na we mukemera kujyayo, mujye murya ibyo abagaburiye byose mutiriwe mubaza kugira ngo imitima yanyu itabacira urubanza." 
1Corinthians10:28 Ariko hagize ubabwira ati: “Izi nyama ni izaterekerejwe ibigirwamana”, ntimukazirye kubera ko abibabwiye no kubera gutinya gushinjwa n'umutima." 
1Corinthians10:29 Umutima mvuga si uwanyu, ahubwo ni uwa wa wundi. Ikindi rero, kuki uburenganzira mfite bwo kwishyira nkizana bwanegurwa n'undi ufite umutima umushinja?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Ubwo nshimira Imana ibyo ndya, kuki abantu bakwiha kunsebya kandi nabishimiye Imana?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Ari ukurya ari ukunywa, cyangwa ari ugukora ikindi kintu cyose, mujye mubikorera guhesha Imana ikuzo." 
1Corinthians10:32 Mujye mwifata ku buryo mutabera imbogamizi Abayahudi, cyangwa abatari Abayahudi ndetse n'Umuryango w'Imana." 
1Corinthians10:33 Jyewe ubwanjye, ngerageza gushimisha abantu bose muri byose ntita ku nyungu zanjye bwite, ahubwo nita ku za bose kugira ngo bakizwe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Nuko rero nimukurikize urugero nabahaye, nk'uko nanjye nkurikiza urwa Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ndabashimira ko muhora munyibuka, kandi mukaba mukomeye ku mabwiriza nabashyikirije." 
1Corinthians11:3 Nyamara ndashaka ko musobanukirwa yuko Kristo ari we mutwe ugenga buri mugabo, naho umugabo akaba umutwe ugenga umugore we, n'Imana ikaba umutwe ugenga Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:4 Nuko rero umugabo witwikira umutwe igihe asenga cyangwa ahanura ngo avuge ibyo ahishuriwe, aba asuzuguye umutwe we (ari wo Kristo)." 
1Corinthians11:5 Naho umugore utitwikiriye umutwe igihe asenga cyangwa ahanura, aba asuzuguye umutwe we (ari wo mugabo we). Uwo mugore aba ahwanye n'uwo bogoshe bakamumora." 
1Corinthians11:6 Atitwikiriye umutwe, ashatse yaniyogoshesha. Ariko ubwo biteye isoni ko umugore yiyogoshesha cyangwa ko yimoza, niyitwikire umutwe." 
1Corinthians11:7 Umugabo ntagomba kwitwikira umutwe kuko ari ishusho y'Imana, akagaragaza ikuzo ryayo. Naho umugore agaragaza ikuzo ry'umugabo we." 
1Corinthians11:8 Umugabo ntiyakomotse ku mugore, ahubwo umugore ni we wakomotse ku mugabo." 
1Corinthians11:9 Umugabo ntiyaremewe umugore, ahubwo umugore yaremewe umugabo." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ni cyo gituma kubera abamarayika bamureba, umugore agomba kwitwikira umutwe ngo bibe ikimenyetso cy'uko agengwa n'umugabo we." 
1Corinthians11:11 Nyamara imbere ya Nyagasani umugore ntiyakwigenga ku mugabo we, n'umugabo ntiyakwigenga ku mugore we, baba magirirane." 
1Corinthians11:12 Nk'uko umugore yakomotse ku mugabo ni na ko umugabo abyarwa n'umugore, ariko ibintu byose bikomoka ku Mana." 
1Corinthians11:13 Namwe nimumbwire: ese birakwiriye ko umugore asenga Imana atitwikiriye umutwe? 
1Corinthians11:14 Mbese umuco w'abantu ubwawo ntutwigisha ko bitera isoni kugira ngo umugabo agire umusatsi muremure," 
1Corinthians11:15 naho umugore yawugira bikamuhesha icyubahiro? Byongeye kandi, umugore yaherewe umusatsi muremure kugira ngo umubere umwambaro w'umutwe." 
1Corinthians11:16 Hagize umuntu ushaka kubigiramo impaka, amenye ko yaba twe yaba amatorero y'Imana, twese nta wundi muco twemera utari uwo." 
1Corinthians11:17 Mu mabwiriza akurikira sindi bubashime, kuko amakoraniro mugira adatuma mukora neza, ahubwo atuma mukora nabi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Bwa mbere numva yuko iyo mukoranye mwicamo uduce, kandi nkaba nemera ko bimwe ari byo." 
1Corinthians11:19 Koko ni ngombwa ko haba ibice muri mwe, kugira ngo abemewe n'Imana muri mwe bagaragare." 
1Corinthians11:20 Iyo mukoraniye hamwe ntabwo ari igaburo rya Nyagasani muba musangiye," 
1Corinthians11:21 kuko igihe mufungura umuntu wese atanguranwa kurya, ugasanga bamwe bishwe n'inzara naho abandi bafite umurengwe." 
1Corinthians11:22 Mbese nta ngo mufite ngo abe ari zo muriramo, abe ari na zo munyweramo? Cyangwa se murashaka gusuzugura Umuryango w'Imana, mugakoza isoni abadafite shinge na rugero? None se muragira ngo mbabwire iki? Ese mbashime? Ashwi sinabibashimira." 
1Corinthians11:23 Nabashyikirije amabwiriza nahawe na Nyagasani ari yo aya: Nyagasani Yezu mu ijoro yagambaniwemo yafashe umugati. 
1Corinthians11:24 Amaze gushimira Imana arawumanyura, aravuga ati: “Uyu ni umubiri wanjye ubatangiwe, mujye mukora mutya kugira ngo munyibuke.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Bamaze gufungura afata n'igikombe, aravuga ati: “Iki gikombe ni Isezerano rishya Imana igiranye n'abayo, rikaba ryemejwe n'amaraso yanjye. Igihe cyose mukinywereyeho mujye mukora mutya kugira ngo munyibuke." 
1Corinthians11:26 Koko rero igihe cyose murya uyu mugati, mukanywera kuri iki gikombe, muba mutangaza iby'urupfu rwa Nyagasani kugeza ubwo azaza.”" 
1Corinthians11:27 Bityo rero umuntu wese urya umugati wa Nyagasani, cyangwa akanywera ku gikombe cye ku buryo budakwiye, aba acumuye ku mubiri n'amaraso bya Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians11:28 Nuko rero umuntu wese abanze yisuzume, abone kurya uwo mugati no kunywera kuri icyo gikombe," 
1Corinthians11:29 kuko urya uwo mugati kandi akanywera kuri icyo gikombe atitaye ku mubiri wa Nyagasani, bizamukururira igihano cy'Imana." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ni na cyo gituma benshi muri mwe ari abanyantegenke n'abarwayi, ndetse bamwe bakaba barapfuye." 
1Corinthians11:31 Tubanje kwisuzuma ubwacu ntitwashyirwa mu rubanza. 
1Corinthians11:32 Igituma Nyagasani adushyira mu rubanza ubu akanaduhana, ni ukugira ngo tutazahanwa kimwe n'ab'isi." 
1Corinthians11:33 Nuko rero bavandimwe, igihe mukoraniye hamwe kugira ngo musangire mujye murindirana." 
1Corinthians11:34 Nihagira usonza arye iby'iwe, kugira ngo gukorana kwanyu kutabakururira gucirwaho iteka n'Imana. Ibisigaye nzabitunganya nje." 
1Corinthians12:1 Bavandimwe, sinshaka ko mwayoberwa ibyerekeye impano za Mwuka." 
1Corinthians12:2 Muzi yuko igihe mwari mutaremera Kristo, mwari mwaratwawe mutabizi ngo musenge ibigirwamana bitavuga." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ni cyo gituma mbamenyesha yuko nta muntu uyoborwa na Mwuka w'Imana wavuga ati: “Yezu navumwe!” Nta wavuga kandi ati: “Yezu ni Nyagasani”, atabiheshejwe na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
1Corinthians12:4 Hariho impano z'uburyo bwinshi, nyamara Mwuka uzitanga ni umwe." 
1Corinthians12:5 Hariho uburyo bwinshi bwo gukorera Imana, nyamara Nyagasani ukorerwa ni umwe." 
1Corinthians12:6 Hariho imikorere y'uburyo bwinshi, nyamara Imana ikorera byose muri bose ni imwe." 
1Corinthians12:7 Mwuka w'Imana yigaragariza mu mpano aha buri muntu, kugira ngo bigirire bose akamaro." 
1Corinthians12:8 Mwuka aha umwe kuvuga ijambo ry'ubwenge, undi uwo Mwuka akamuha kuvuga ijambo ry'ubumenyi." 
1Corinthians12:9 Undi uwo Mwuka akamuha kwizera Imana, undi uwo Mwuka umwe akamuha impano zo gukiza indwara." 
1Corinthians12:10 Undi akamuha gukora ibitangaza, undi akamuha guhanura ngo avuge ibyo ahishuriwe, undi akamuha kugenzura uvuga niba avugishwa n'ingabo za Satani cyangwa na Mwuka w'Imana. Undi akamuha kuvuga mu ndimi zindi, undi akamuha gusobanura izo ndimi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Byongeye kandi Mwuka ukora ibyo byose ni umwe rukumbi, agaba impano uko ashaka kuri buri muntu." 
1Corinthians12:12 Umubiri w'umuntu ni umwe, ariko ukagirwa n'ingingo nyinshi nubwo ari nyinshi, izo ngingo zose zikaba zigize umubiri umwe. Ni ko bimeze no kuri Kristo." 
1Corinthians12:13 Twaba Abayahudi cyangwa se abatari Abayahudi, twaba inkoreragahato cyangwa se abishyira bakizana, twese twabatirijwe muri Mwuka umwe ngo tube ingingo z'umubiri umwe, kandi twese twahawe kunywera ku isōko imwe ari yo Mwuka w'Imana." 
1Corinthians12:14 Koko rero umubiri ntugizwe n'urugingo rumwe gusa, ahubwo ugizwe na nyinshi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ikirenge kivuze kiti “Ubwo ntari ikiganza sindi urugingo rw'umubiri,” si byo byatuma kitaba rwo." 
1Corinthians12:16 N'ugutwi kuvuze kuti: “Ubwo ntari ijisho sindi urugingo rw'umubiri,” si byo byatuma kutaba rwo." 
1Corinthians12:17 Mbese iyo umubiri wose ujya kuba ijisho, umuntu yari kumva ate? Iyo umubiri wose ujya kuba ugutwi, umuntu yari guhumurirwa ate?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ubusanzwe Imana yashyizeho buri rugingo mu mwanya warwo uko ishaka. 
1Corinthians12:19 Mbese iyo zose zijya kuba urugingo rumwe, umubiri wari kubaho ute?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Ubusanzwe hariho ingingo nyinshi, ariko umubiri ni umwe." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ijisho ntiryabwira ikiganza riti: “Singukeneye!” n'umutwe ntiwabwira ibirenge uti: “Simbakeneye!” 
1Corinthians12:22 Ahubwo ingingo z'umubiri zigaragara ko ari inyantege nke ni zo zikenerwa cyane. 
1Corinthians12:23 Ingingo zo ku mubiri dukeka ko zisuzuguritse ni zo twubaha kuruta izindi, kandi izidashyirwa ku mugaragaro ni zo twitaho cyane," 
1Corinthians12:24 naho iziteye neza ntizikeneye kwitabwaho. Imana yahuje ingingo z'umubiri ku buryo yarushijeho guha icyubahiro ingingo zari zikibuze," 
1Corinthians12:25 kugira ngo ingingo z'umubiri zitiremamo ibice, ahubwo kugira ngo zose ziterane inkunga." 
1Corinthians12:26 Iyo urugingo rumwe rubabaye zose zibabarana na rwo, naho iyo rumwe ruhawe icyubahiro, izindi na zo zirishima." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nuko rero mwese hamwe mugize umubiri wa Kristo, kandi buri muntu ni urugingo rwawo." 
1Corinthians12:28 Dore abo Imana yashyizeho mu Muryango wayo: ubwa mbere yashyizeho Intumwa za Kristo, ubwa kabiri abahanuzi bavuga ibyo bahishuriwe, ubwa gatatu abigisha, hanyuma ishyiraho abakora ibitangaza, abafite impano zo gukiza indwara, abafasha abandi, abayobozi n'abavuga indimi zindi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Mbese bose ni ko ari intumwa za Kristo? Ese ni ko bose ari abahanuzi? Mbese ni ko bose ari abigisha? Ese bose ni ko bakora ibitangaza? 
1Corinthians12:30 Mbese ni ko bose bafite impano zo gukiza indwara? Ese bose ni ko bavuga indimi zindi? Cyangwa se ni ko basobanura izo ndimi? 
1Corinthians12:31 Nuko rero nimuharanire impano zisumba izindi. Nanjye kandi ndabarangira inzira ihebuje. 
1Corinthians13:1 Nubwo navuga indimi z'abantu n'iz'abamarayika ariko singire urukundo, naba meze nk'ingoma inihira cyangwa inzogera irangīra." 
1Corinthians13:2 Kandi nubwo nagira impano yo guhanura, nkamenya amabanga yose no gusobanukirwa ibintu byose, ndetse nkagira ukwizera guhagije kwatuma ntegeka imisozi ngo ive aho iri ariko singire urukundo, nta cyo naba ndi cyo." 
1Corinthians13:3 Nubwo natanga ibyo ntunze byose ngo bihabwe abakene, ndetse nanjye ubwanjye nkitanga ngo ntwikwe ariko singire urukundo, nta cyo byamarira." 
1Corinthians13:4 Urukundo rurihangana rukagira neza, urukundo ntirugira ishyari, ntirwirarira kandi ntirwihimbaza." 
1Corinthians13:5 Urukundo ntirukoza isoni, ntirwikanyiza, ntirwivumbura, ntirugira inzika," 
1Corinthians13:6 ntirwishimira ibibi abandi bakora, ahubwo rwishimira ukuri." 
1Corinthians13:7 Urukundo rwihanganira byose, muri byose rukemera Imana, rukiringira kandi rukiyumanganya." 
1Corinthians13:8 Urukundo ruzahoraho. Impano yo guhanura izakurwaho, iyo kuvuga indimi zindi izarangira, iy'ubumenyi izakurwaho." 
1Corinthians13:9 Koko rero ubumenyi bwacu ni igicagate, n'uguhanura kwacu ni igicagate." 
1Corinthians13:10 Ariko nihaza ibyuzuye, ibicagase bizakurwaho." 
1Corinthians13:11 Nkiri umwana navugaga nk'umwana, ngatekereza nk'umwana nkibwira nk'umwana. Ariko aho mariye gukura iby'ubwana ndabireka." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ibyo tureba ubu bimeze nk'ibiboneka mu ndorerwamo itabona neza, ariko icyo gihe tuzarebana duhanganye. Ubu ibyo nzi ni igicagate, ariko icyo gihe nzaba mbizi byimazeyo nk'uko Imana inzi." 
1Corinthians13:13 Ubu rero hagumyeho ibi uko ari bitatu: ukwemera Kristo, ukwiringira n'urukundo, ariko ikibiruta byose ni urukundo." 
1Corinthians14:1 Noneho mushishikarire kugira urukundo. Mwifuze kandi impano za Mwuka, ariko cyane cyane impano yo guhanura ngo muvuge ibyo muhishuriwe n'Imana." 
1Corinthians14:2 Uvuga indimi zindi ntaba abwira abantu, ahubwo aba abwira Imana kuko nta wumva icyo avuga. Aba avuga amabanga akesha Mwuka." 
1Corinthians14:3 Nyamara umuntu uhanura aba abwira abantu amagambo yo kubaka ubugingo bwabo no kubakomeza no kubahumuriza. 
1Corinthians14:4 Umuntu uvuga indimi zindi aba yubaka ubugingo bwe wenyine, ariko uhanura aba yubaka ubw'Umuryango w'Imana." 
1Corinthians14:5 Nakwifuza ko mwese muvuga indimi zindi, ariko cyane cyane nakunda ko muhanura kuko uhanura arusha agaciro uvuga indimi zindi, keretse uzivuga aramutse azisobanuye kugira ngo byubake ubugingo bw'Umuryango w'Imana." 
1Corinthians14:6 Ni ko se bavandimwe, ndamutse nje iwanyu mvuga indimi zindi byabamarira iki? Nta cyo keretse mbabwiye ibyo Imana yampishuriye cyangwa ibyo yampaye kumenya, cyangwa ibyo yantumye kubahanurira cyangwa kubigisha." 
1Corinthians14:7 Dutange urugero ku bintu bivuzwa nk'imyironge, cyangwa ibicurangwa nk'inanga. Mbese iyo bavugije umwironge cyangwa bagacuranga, wamenya ute indirimbo iyo ari yo niba amajwi yayo adasobanutse?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ikindi, uvuza ihembe narivuza binyuranyije no gutabaza, ni nde uzitegura kujya ku rugamba?" 
1Corinthians14:9 No kuri mwe ni uko bimeze, mbese nimuvuga ururimi rundi ibyo muvuze bizamenyekana bite? Muzamera nk'abagosorera mu rucaca." 
1Corinthians14:10 Indimi zo ku isi nubwo ari nyinshi cyane, nta na rumwe rutagira icyo rusobanura." 
1Corinthians14:11 Nyamara ntasobanukiwe icyo umuntu avuze, mba mbaye umunyamahanga kuri we, na we bikaba bityo." 
1Corinthians14:12 None rero ubwo namwe muhirimbanira kugira impano za Mwuka, muharanire cyane cyane izakubaka ubugingo bw'Umuryango w'Imana." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ni yo mpamvu uvuga ururimi rundi agomba gusaba Imana ngo imuhe no kurusobanura. 
1Corinthians14:14 Nuko rero iyo nsenga mu rurimi rundi, mba nsenga mvugishwa na Mwuka ubwenge bwanjye bwihagarariye." 
1Corinthians14:15 None se mbigenze nte? Rimwe nzajya nsenga mvugishwa na Mwuka, ubundi nsenge ntekereza ibyo mvuga. Rimwe nzajya ndirimba ndirimbishwa na Mwuka, ubundi ndirimbe ntekereza ibyo ndirimba." 
1Corinthians14:16 Mbese uramutse ushimiye Imana uvugishijwe na Mwuka, mu ikoraniro hakaba haje umuntu utaramenyera ibyanyu, yabasha ate kwikiriza ati: “Amina” kandi atazi ko ushimiye Imana?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Yee, waba ushimiye Imana neza ariko uwo muntu nta cyo biba bimwunguye." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndashimira Imana ko mwese mbarusha kuvuga indimi zindi. 
1Corinthians14:19 Ariko mu ikoraniro nakunda kuvuga amagambo atanu yumvikana kugira ngo nigishe abandi, kuruta kuvuga amagambo ibihumbi n'ibihumbi mu rurimi rundi." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bavandimwe, ntimukabe abana mu mitekerereze yanyu, icyakora ku byerekeye ubugizi bwa nabi mube nk'abana bato koko, naho mu mitekerereze mube nk'abantu bakuze." 
1Corinthians14:21 Mu gitabo cy'Amategeko handitse ibyo Nyagasani yavuze ngo “Nzabwira aba bantu, mbatumyeho abavuga izindi ndimi, mbabwize akanwa k'abanyamahanga, nyamara kandi ntibazantega amatwi.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Nuko rero kuvuga indimi zindi ni ikimenyetso kitagenewe abemera Kristo ahubwo cyagenewe abatamwemera, naho guhanura si ikimenyetso cy'abatamwemera ahubwo ni icy'abamwemera." 
1Corinthians14:23 Mbese ikoraniro ryose riramutse rivugiye icyarimwe mu ndimi zindi, hakinjira abantu batamenyereye ibyo cyangwa batemera Kristo, ntibabita abasazi?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Nyamara bose baramutse bahanuye, hakinjira utemera Kristo cyangwa utamenyereye ibyanyu, azumva bose bamwemeza ibyaha bye, bose bamucira n'urubanza." 
1Corinthians14:25 Ibihishwe mu mutima we bizashyirwa ahagaragara, maze yikubite hasi aramye Imana avuge ati: “Koko Imana iri kumwe namwe.”" 
1Corinthians14:26 None se bavandimwe, bikwiye kumera bite? Igihe mukoraniye hamwe umwe afite indirimbo, undi inyigisho, undi ibyo ahishuriwe, undi ibyo kuvuga mu rurimi rundi, undi ibyo kurusobanura. Byose bibereho kubaka ubugingo bw'Umuryango w'Imana." 
1Corinthians14:27 Hagize abavuga indimi zindi havuge babiri cyangwa batatu gusa, kandi bavuge umwe umwe ndetse habeho n'usobanura ibyo bavuze." 
1Corinthians14:28 Ariko nihabura usobanura ntihakagire uvuga ururimi rundi mu ikoraniro, ahubwo urufite niyibwire mu mutima, abwire n'Imana." 
1Corinthians14:29 Naho abahanura havuge babiri cyangwa batatu, abandi bagenzure ibyo bavuze." 
1Corinthians14:30 Igihe umwe avuga undi akagira icyo ahishurirwa n'Imana, uwavugaga abe aretse." 
1Corinthians14:31 Mwese mubasha guhanura ariko mubikore umwe umwe, kugira ngo mwese bibigishe kandi bibakomeze." 
1Corinthians14:32 Abahanura ni bo bagenga impano bahawe. 
1Corinthians14:33 Imana si iy'imivurungano ahubwo ni iy'amahoro. Nk'uko bisanzwe mu matorero yose y'intore za Kristo," 
1Corinthians14:34 abagore bajye bacecekera mu makoraniro. Ntibafite uburenganzira bwo kuvuga, ahubwo bemere gutegekwa nk'uko n'Amategeko abivuga." 
1Corinthians14:35 Baramutse bafite icyo bashaka kubaza, babarize abagabo babo imuhira kuko biteye isoni ko umugore avugira mu ikoraniro." 
1Corinthians14:36 Mbese muribwira ko Ijambo ry'Imana ari mwe rikomokaho, cyangwa ko ari mwe ryagezeho mwenyine?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Niba muri mwe hari umuntu utekereza ko ari umuhanuzi cyangwa ko ayoborwa na Mwuka, amenye ko ibi mbandikiye ari itegeko rya Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ariko nihagira umuntu utita kuri ibyo, namwe ntimukamwiteho." 
1Corinthians14:39 Bityo rero bavandimwe, muharanire iyo mpano yo guhanura, kandi ntimukagire uwo mubuza kuvuga indimi zindi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Nyamara byose bikorwe uko bikwiye muri gahunda. 
1Corinthians15:1 Bavandimwe, ndashaka kubibutsa Ubutumwa bwiza nabagejejeho, mukabwakira mukabukomeraho" 
1Corinthians15:2 Ubwo Butumwa ni bwo bubahesha agakiza niba mubukomeyeho nk'uko nabubabwiye, naho ubundi ukwizera kwanyu kwaba ari impfabusa." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ubutumwa bw'ingenzi nabanje kubagezaho ni ubu: Kristo yapfuye azize ibyaha byacu nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga. 
1Corinthians15:4 Yarahambwe maze ku munsi wa gatatu arazuka, nk'uko byari byaranditswe." 
1Corinthians15:5 Abonekera Petero, abonekera na za Ntumwa ze cumi n'ebyiri." 
1Corinthians15:6 Nyuma abonekera icyarimwe abavandimwe basāga magana atanu, bamwe muri bo barapfuye ariko abenshi na n'ubu baracyariho." 
1Corinthians15:7 Hanyuma abonekera Yakobo, abonekera n'Intumwa ze zose." 
1Corinthians15:8 Nuko nyuma y'abo bose nanjye arambonekera, kandi meze nk'uwavutse atagejeje igihe." 
1Corinthians15:9 Koko ni jye muto mu Ntumwa za Kristo, ndetse sinkwiriye kwitwa Intumwa ye kuko natoteje abo mu Muryango w'Imana." 
1Corinthians15:10 Nyamara ubuntu nagiriwe n'Imana ni bwo bwatumye mba uko ndi uku, kandi ubwo buntu ntibwapfuye ubusa. Ahubwo nashishikariye gukora kurusha abo bose, ariko atari jye wikoresha ahubwo ari bwa buntu bw'Imana." 
1Corinthians15:11 Nuko rero yaba jye cyangwa bo, ubwo ni bwo Butumwa dutangaza kandi ni na bwo mwemeye." 
1Corinthians15:12 None se ubwo byamamazwa ko Kristo yazutse, abo muri mwe bavuga ko abapfuye batazazuka babiterwa n'iki?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Niba abapfuye batazazuka, ni ukuvuga ko Kristo na we atazutse." 
1Corinthians15:14 Byongeye kandi niba Kristo atazutse, Ubutumwa twamamaza bwaba ari ubusa kandi ibyo mwizera na byo byaba ari ubusa." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ndetse natwe twaba tubaye nk'abahimbiye Imana, kuko twahamije ko yazuye Kristo kandi atari ko biri niba koko abapfuye batazazuka." 
1Corinthians15:16 Niba abapfuye batazazuka, Kristo na we ntiyazutse." 
1Corinthians15:17 Ikindi kandi niba Kristo atarazutse mwaba mwizeye ubusa, mwaba mukiri mu byaha byanyu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Ndetse n'abapfuye bizeye Kristo baba bararimbutse. 
1Corinthians15:19 Niba kwiringira Kristo bidufitiye akamaro tukiriho gusa, twaba turi abantu bo kugirirwa impuhwe kurusha abandi bose." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ariko mu by'ukuri Kristo yarazutse, atubera umuganura w'abapfuye bazazuka." 
1Corinthians15:21 Nk'uko urupfu rwazanywe n'umuntu umwe, ni na ko kuzuka kw'abapfuye kwazanywe n'umuntu umwe." 
1Corinthians15:22 Nk'uko abo mu rubyaro rwa Adamu bose bapfa, ni ko abo muri Kristo bose bazabaho." 
1Corinthians15:23 Buri wese azabigeraho mu rwego rwe. Habanje umuganura wo kuzuka ari we Kristo, noneho abayobotse Kristo bazabona kuzuka igihe azaba aje." 
1Corinthians15:24 Nyuma hazaza imperuka, Kristo atsembe ibyitwa ibinyabutware n'ibinyabushobozi n'ibinyabubasha, maze abone gushyikiriza Imana Se ubwami." 
1Corinthians15:25 Kristo agomba kwima ingoma, Imana na yo izamutsindira abanzi bose ibashyire munsi y'ibirenge bye." 
1Corinthians15:26 Umwanzi uzaheruka gutsembwa ni urupfu. 
1Corinthians15:27 Koko kandi Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Imana yamuhaye kugenga ibintu byose.” Icyakora igihe bivugwa ko Imana yamuhaye kugenga byose, birumvikana ko yo itabibarirwamo." 
1Corinthians15:28 Noneho ubwo Umwana w'Imana azaba amaze kwegurirwa byose, ni ho na we aziyegurira Iyamweguriye byose, bityo Imana igenge byose ku buryo bwuzuye." 
1Corinthians15:29 Bitabaye bityo twibaze kuri ba bandi babatirizwa abamaze gupfa. Niba koko abapfuye batazazuka, baterwa n'iki kubabatirizwa?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Natwe kandi ni iki gituma duhara amagara yacu buri gihe? 
1Corinthians15:31 Buri munsi mpora mpanganye n'urupfu – bavandimwe, ibyo ni ko biri mbitewe n'ishema muntera kubera Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:32 Biba byaramariye iki kurwana n'inyamaswa muri Efezi, iyo nza guharanira inyungu yo kuri iyi si gusa? Yemwe, niba abapfuye batazazuka dukurikize ya mvugo ngo:, “Nimureke twirire kandi twinywere kuko ejo tuzapfa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Ntihakagire ubayobya: “Kubana n'ababi byonona ingeso nziza” (nk'uko umwe yavuze). 
1Corinthians15:34 Mwisubireho mwifate uko bikwiye, mureke gucumura. Erega bamwe muri mwe ntibamenye Imana, ibyo mbivugiye kubakoza isoni!" 
1Corinthians15:35 Ahari hari uwabaza ati: “Abapfuye bazurwa bate? Bazazukana imibiri iteye ite?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Mbega ubupfu! Icyo utera nticyamera kitabanje gupfa. 
1Corinthians15:37 Kandi rero urwo utera ntirusa n'icyo ruzera hanyuma, ahubwo ni urubuto bubuto, rwaba ingano cyangwa urundi rwose." 
1Corinthians15:38 Ariko buri rubuto iyo rumaze guterwa, Imana iruha ishusho yarugeneye, rumwe ukwarwo urundi ukwarwo uko amoko y'imbuto angana." 
1Corinthians15:39 No ku bifite umubiri n'amaraso ni ko biri: icyitwa umubiri cyose si kimwe. Umuntu agira umubiri usa ukwawo, n'inyamaswa ikagira umubiri usa ukwawo, inyoni na yo ni uko n'ifi na yo ni uko." 
1Corinthians15:40 Hari ibyaremwe byo mu ijuru n'ibindi byo ku isi. Ubwiza bw'ibyo mu ijuru buteye ukwabwo, n'ubw'ibyo ku isi buteye ukwabwo." 
1Corinthians15:41 Izuba rifite ukurabagirana kwaryo, ukwezi kukagira ukwako, n'inyenyeri zikagira ukwazo. Ndetse inyenyeri ntizihwanyije kurabagirana." 
1Corinthians15:42 Ni na ko bimera mu kuzuka kw'abapfuye. Umubiri ushyirwa mu butaka ni umurambo wo kubora, ariko uzazuka utakiri uwo kubora." 
1Corinthians15:43 Ushyirwa mu butaka usuzuguritse ariko uzazukana ikuzo, ushyirwa mu butaka ufite intege nke ariko uzazukana imbaraga," 
1Corinthians15:44 ushyirwa mu butaka ari umubiri upfa ariko uzazuka ari umubiri utangwa na Mwuka. Ubwo habaho imibiri ipfa, habaho n'imibiri itangwa na Mwuka." 
1Corinthians15:45 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Umuntu wa mbere Adamu aba muzima”, naho Adamu wa nyuma (Kristo) yabaye Mwuka utanga ubugingo." 
1Corinthians15:46 Ufite umubiri utangwa na Mwuka si we wabanje, ahubwo habanje ufite umubiri upfa, haheruka ufite umubiri utangwa na Mwuka." 
1Corinthians15:47 Adamu wa mbere yaremwe mu gitaka agizwe n'igitaka, naho Adamu wa kabiri yavuye mu ijuru." 
1Corinthians15:48 Abafite imibiri ivanywe mu gitaka bateye nka wa mukurambere wabo wavanywe mu gitaka, naho abafite ubugingo bwo mu ijuru bateye nka wa Muntu wavuye mu ijuru." 
1Corinthians15:49 Noneho rero nk'uko twagiranye isano na wa muntu w'igitaka, ni ko tuzagirana isano na wa Muntu w'ijuru." 
1Corinthians15:50 Nuko bavandimwe, icyo nshaka kuvuga ni iki: umubiri n'amaraso ntibibasha guhesha umuntu umugabane ku bwami bw'Imana, kandi ibibora ntibyamuhesha umugabane ku bitabora." 
1Corinthians15:51 Reka mbabwire ibanga: ntituzapfa twese. Ariko ubwo impanda y'imperuka izavuga tuzahinduka twese, kandi bizaba mu kanya gato nk'ako guhumbya. Impanda izavuga abapfuye bahite bazurwa batagifite imibiri ibora, natwe duhindurwe." 
1Corinthians15:52  
1Corinthians15:53 Ni ngombwa ko twebwe abafite imibiri ibora twambikwa itazabora, kandi ko twebwe abafite imibiri ipfa twambikwa itazapfa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Ndetse twebwe ab'imibiri ipfa ikabora, nitumara kwambikwa idapfa ntinabore ni bwo bizaba nk'uko rya jambo ryanditse ngo: “Urupfu ruratsinzwe burundu!”." 
1Corinthians15:55 “Wa rupfu we, ugutsinda kwawe kuri he? Wa rupfu we, urubori rwawe ruri he?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Koko kandi ibyaha ni byo rubori rw'urupfu, naho igituma ibyaha bituganza kikaba Amategeko." 
1Corinthians15:57 Ariko Imana ishimirwe ko iduha gutsinda kubera Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo. 
1Corinthians15:58 Bityo rero bavandimwe nkunda, nimukomere. Ntimugire ikibahungabanya. Murusheho gushishikarira gukorera Nyagasani, muzi ko muri we imvune zanyu atari impfabusa." 
1Corinthians16:1 Ibyerekeye imfashanyo zo kunganira intore z'Imana, mugenze nk'uko nategetse amatorero ya Kristo yo muri Galati." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ku munsi wa mbere ari ho ku cyumweru, buri muntu wese muri mwe ajye agira icyo azigama akurikije amikoro ye agishyire iruhande, kugira ngo igihe nzaba nje mutazaba ari bwo muhugira mu byo guterateranya imfashanyo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ningera iwanyu rero nzaha abantu mwatoranyije inzandiko zo kubasohoza, bajyane imfashanyo zanyu i Yeruzalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Nibiba ngombwa ko nanjye ngenda tuzajyana. 
1Corinthians16:5 Nzaza iwanyu nyuze muri Masedoniya, kuko ari ho nzanyura." 
1Corinthians16:6 Birashoboka ko natinda iwanyu wenda nkaba naharangiriza amezi y'imbeho, kugira ngo mumfashe gukomeza urugendo rwanjye aho nzajya hose." 
1Corinthians16:7 Sinifuza kubonana namwe huti huti ngo nkomeze urugendo. Nizeye kuzamara iwanyu iminsi, Nyagasani nabishaka." 
1Corinthians16:8 Nzaguma ino muri Efezi kugeza mu gihe cya Pentekote. 
1Corinthians16:9 Hano nugururiwe amarembo kugira ngo mpakore umurimo munini w'ingirakamaro, icyakora abandwanya ni benshi." 
1Corinthians16:10 Timoteyo naza muzamwakire ku buryo atagira icyo yishisha ari iwanyu, kuko na we akorera Nyagasani nkanjye." 
1Corinthians16:11 Nuko rero ntihazagire umusuzugura, ahubwo muzamufashe akomeze urugendo rwe amahoro angereho, kuko jye n'abandi bavandimwe tumutegereje." 
1Corinthians16:12 Ibyerekeye umuvandimwe Apolo, namusabye nkomeje ngo azazane iwanyu n'abandi bavandimwe ariko ntashaka na busa kuza ubungubu, icyakora nabona uburyo azaza." 
1Corinthians16:13 Mube maso mwishingikirije ku uwo twemera, mube abagabo b'intwari kandi mukomere." 
1Corinthians16:14 Icyo mukora cyose mugikorane urukundo. 
1Corinthians16:15 Ikindi bavandimwe, muzi ko ab'urugo rwa Sitefana ari bo babimburiye abandi bo muri Akaya kwemera Kristo, bakitangira kunganira intore z'Imana. Ndabinginze mwemere kugengwa na bene abo, kimwe n'abandi bafatanyije umurimo n'umuruho." 
1Corinthians16:16  
1Corinthians16:17 Byaranshimishije kubona Sitefana na Foritunato na Akayiku baje, bankoreye icyo mwajyaga gukora iyo muhaba." 
1Corinthians16:18 Ari jye ari namwe baturemye agatima. Mujye mushima abameze batyo. 
1Corinthians16:19 Abo mu matorero ya Kristo yo muri Aziya barabaramutsa. Akwila na Purisila hamwe n'itorero rikoranira mu rugo rwabo, barabaramutsa mu izina rya Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians16:20 Abavandimwe bose barabaramutsa. Namwe muramukanye muhoberana ku buryo butagira amakemwa. 
1Corinthians16:21 Jyewe Pawulo ndabatashya. Ibi ni jye ubyiyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko. 
1Corinthians16:22 Nihagira udakunda Nyagasani avumwe! “Marana ta”, ni ukuvuga ngo: “Ngwino Nyagasani.”" 
1Corinthians16:23 Nyagasani Yezu nagumye kubagirira ubuntu. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ni jye ubakunda mwese ku bwa Kristo Yezu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse, hamwe n'umuvandimwe Timoteyo, turabandikiye mwebwe itorero ry'Imana riri i Korinti, hamwe n'intore zayo zose ziri muri Akaya yose." 
2Corinthians1:2 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro, ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
2Corinthians1:3 Dushimire Imana, Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo. Ni yo mubyeyi nyir'impuhwe, ni Imana ihumuriza abayo uko byamera kose." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ni yo iduhumuriza mu makuba yacu yose, kugira ngo natwe dushobore guhumuriza abandi bayafite bose, tubahumuriza uko natwe Imana yaduhumurije." 
2Corinthians1:5 Bityo rero nk'uko imibabaro ya Kristo itugeraho bikabije, ni na ko iduhumuriza bihebuje ikoresheje Kristo." 
2Corinthians1:6 Igihe twe tubabazwa ni ukugira ngo mwe Imana ibahumurize inabakize, kandi igihe Imana iduhumuriza ni ukugira ngo namwe ibahumurize, ibashoboze kwihanganira iyo mibabaro dusangiye." 
2Corinthians1:7 Ntidutezuka kwiringira Imana ku bwanyu, tuzi ko dusangiye guhumurizwa na yo kimwe n'uko dusangiye imibabaro." 
2Corinthians1:8 Bavandimwe, turashaka ko mumenya amakuba twagiriye mu ntara ya Aziya. Yari menshi bikabije, ntiyari ayo kwihanganirwa ku buryo twihebye, ntitwaba tukiringiye kubaho." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ubirebye twabaye nk'abaciriwe urwo gupfa, kwari ukugira ngo tutizera ububasha bwacu ahubwo twizere Imana izura abapfuye." 
2Corinthians1:10 Ni yo yaturokoye urupfu rukomeye, rutyo rwose izanaturokora. Erega ni yo twiringiye, izongera iturokore" 
2Corinthians1:11 kuko namwe mufatanyije natwe mukaba mudusabira! Bityo kubera amasengesho y'abantu benshi, Imana izatugirira ubuntu bitume benshi bayishimira ku bwacu." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ngiki ikidutera ishema: ni uko umutima wacu utwemeza ko twabaye kuri iyi si cyane cyane muri mwe, twiyoroheje tutaryarya kandi tubikesha Imana. Ibyo ntitwabitewe n'ubwenge bw'abantu, ahubwo twabitewe n'ubuntu Imana itugirira." 
2Corinthians1:13 Mu nzandiko zacu nta bindi tubandikira, bitari ibyo musoma kandi mukabisobanukirwa. Ariko nubwo ubu mwabisobanukirwa buhoro, niringiye ko iherezo muzabisobanukirwa neza. Bityo umunsi Umwami wacu Yezu azaza, tuzagira ishema ku bwanyu nk'uko namwe muzarigira ku bwacu." 
2Corinthians1:14  
2Corinthians1:15 Kuko nari nizeye ibyo nagize umugambi wo kuba ari mwe mbanza gusura, kugira ngo Imana ibagirire ubuntu ubwa kabiri." 
2Corinthians1:16 Nari nafashe umugambi wo kunyura iwanyu njya mu ntara ya Masedoniya, no kongera kubareba mvayo ngo mumfashe gukomeza urugendo rwanjye rwo kujya muri Yudeya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Mbese muribwira yuko igihe nateganyaga ibyo nabikoze mpubutse? Cyangwa muribwira yuko mfata imigambi nk'ab'isi, ku buryo mbasha kuvuga nti: “Yego nzaza”, hanyuma nti: “Oya sinzaza”?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Imana ni yo ntanze ho umugabo: ntabwo twabarimanganyije tuti: “Yego”, kandi ngo: “Oya”." 
2Corinthians1:19 Koko rero Kristo Yezu Umwana w'Imana twamamaje iwanyu – jye na Silasi na Timoteyo – ntabwo icyarimwe yaba “Yego” na “Oya”, ahubwo we nta kindi kimuvamo kitari “Yego”." 
2Corinthians1:20 “Yego” ya Kristo ni yo cyemezo cy'amasezerano y'Imana uko angana, natwe rero akaduha kwikiriza tuti: “Amina” kugira ngo duheshe Imana ikuzo." 
2Corinthians1:21 Twebwe namwe, Imana ubwayo ni yo idushoboza gukomera kuri Kristo. Ni na yo yadutoranyije ngo dukore umurimo wayo," 
2Corinthians1:22 kandi ikadushyiraho ikimenyetso kigaragaza ko turi abayo, mu mitima yacu ikaduha Mwuka wayo ho umusogongero w'ibyiza tuzahabwa." 
2Corinthians1:23 Imana ni yo ntanzeho umugabo – niba mbeshya ibimpōre. Icyatumye ntongera kuza i Korinti kwari ukugira ngo ntabaremerera. 
2Corinthians1:24 Erega si twe tubagenga ku byerekeye ibyo kuyoboka Kristo – musanzwe mukomeye kuri we! Ahubwo dukorana namwe kugira ngo mugire ibyishimo. 
2Corinthians2:1 Koko niyemeje kutagaruka iwanyu kugira ngo ntongera kubatera agahinda. 
2Corinthians2:2 None se ndamutse mbateye agahinda, jye ni ba nde bantera ibyishimo? Ese si mwebwe kandi ari mwe nateye agahinda?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Burya icyatumye mbandikira kwari ukugira ngo ningera iwanyu, ndaterwa agahinda n'abantu bagombaga kunshimisha. Mpamya ko igihe jye nishimye, namwe mwese muba mwishimye." 
2Corinthians2:4 Koko nabandikiye ndi mu makuba menshi kandi mfite umutima uhagaze, ndetse mbogoza amarira menshi atari ukugira ngo mbatere agahinda, ahubwo ari ukugira ngo mbereke ukuntu mbakunda cyane." 
2Corinthians2:5 Niba hariho umuntu wagize uwo atera agahinda, si jye yagateye ahubwo ni mwe mwese – cyangwa se ntakabije ni bamwe muri mwe." 
2Corinthians2:6 Igihano abenshi muri mwe bahanishije uwo muntu kirahagije. 
2Corinthians2:7 Ndetse ahasigaye mugomba kubabarira uwo muntu, mukamuhumuriza kugira ngo aticwa n'agahinda gakabije." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ndabinginze rero mumwereke ko mumukunda. 
2Corinthians2:9 Burya icyatumye mbandikira kwari ukugira ngo mbasuzume, ndebe ko mwumvira muri byose." 
2Corinthians2:10 Iyo mubabariye umuntu, nanjye mba mubabariye. Koko kandi niba jye naragize icyo mubabarira – habaye impamvu ituma mubabarira – mba narabikoze ku bwanyu, Kristo ni we ntanze ho umugabo." 
2Corinthians2:11 Bityo tuba tudahaye Satani urwaho rwo kutugusha mu mutego: erega ntituyobewe imigambi ye! 
2Corinthians2:12 Igihe nageraga i Tirowa njyanywe no kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo, nasanze Nyagasani yaranyugururiye amarembo." 
2Corinthians2:13 Icyakora nahagaritswe umutima cyane no gusanga umuvandimwe wanjye Tito adahari, ni ko kubasezeraho njya muri Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Ariko Imana ishimwe yo iturangaza imbere, turi mu myiyereko y'ugutabaruka kwa Kristo. Ni yo ituma tugaragaza ibya Kristo ahantu hose, kugira ngo impumuro nziza yo kumumenya ikwire." 
2Corinthians2:15 Koko rero turi nk'imibavu ihumura neza Kristo atura Imana, impumuro yayo ikagera ku bantu bakizwa no ku bahabye." 
2Corinthians2:16 Ku bahabye ni impumuro y'urupfu ibibutsa ko bazapfa, ku bakizwa ni impumuro y'ubugingo ibibutsa ko bazabaho. Ese ubwo ni nde washobora gukora uwo murimo?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Twebwe ntitumeze nk'abantu benshi bafata Ijambo ry'Imana nk'igicuruzwa mu isoko. Ahubwo turivuga tutaryarya dutumwe n'Imana, turi imbere yayo muri Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Mbese ibyo bivuga ko twongeye kwiyogeza? Cyangwa se dukeneye inzandiko zo kudusohoza kuri mwe, cyangwa izo twabaka tukazitwaza nk'uko bamwe babigenza?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Mwebwe ubwanyu ni mwe rwandiko rwanditswe ku mitima yacu, ruzwi na bose rugasomwa na bose." 
2Corinthians3:3 Biragaragara ko muri urwandiko rwanditswe na Kristo akarudushinga. Urwo rwandiko ntirwanditswe hakoreshejwe wino, ahubwo rwanditswe hakoreshejwe Mwuka w'Imana nzima. Ibyo rwanditsweho si amabuye abaje, ahubwo ni imitima y'abantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ibyo ni byo twemeza tubitewe no kwizera Imana tubikesha Kristo. 
2Corinthians3:5 Ntitwakwibwira ko hari icyo dushobora gukora ubwacu, ahubwo ibyo dukora byose Imana ni yo ibidushoboza." 
2Corinthians3:6 Ni yo yatugize abagaragu bayo ngo dukorere Isezerano rishya ridashingiye ku Mategeko yanditswe, ahubwo rishingiye kuri Mwuka. Amategeko yanditswe aricisha, naho Mwuka akabeshaho." 
2Corinthians3:7 Ayo Mategeko inyuguti zayo zanditswe ku mabuye abaje. Nyamara kandi yaje aherekejwe n'ikuzo ry'Imana, ku buryo Abisiraheli batashoboye kwitegereza mu maso ha Musa, kubera iryo kuzo rirabagirana kandi ari ikuzo rishira. Ubwo Amategeko yari afite umurimo wo guteza abantu urupfu, kandi akaba afite ikuzo ringana rityo," 
2Corinthians3:8 mbega ukuntu umurimo wa Mwuka uzarushaho kugaragaza ikuzo ry'Imana! 
2Corinthians3:9 Ubwo Amategeko afite umurimo wo gucira abantu iteka kandi akaba afite ikuzo, mbega ukuntu umurimo utuma abantu batunganira Imana urushaho kugira ikuzo risesuye!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Ni ukuri ibyahoranye ikuzo nta kuzo bigifite, ubigereranyije n'ibisigaye bifite ikuzo risesuye." 
2Corinthians3:11 Koko rero, ubwo ibyamaze akanya gato bigashira byahawe ikuzo, mbega ukuntu ibizahoraho bizarushaho kurihabwa!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Noneho ubwo dufite ibyo twiringira bingana bityo, ni cyo gituma dushira amanga cyane." 
2Corinthians3:13 Ntitumeze nka Musa witwikiraga igitambaro mu maso, kugira ngo Abisiraheli batabona rya kuzo rishira." 
2Corinthians3:14 Nyamara ibitekerezo byabo byahumiye ku mirari. No kugeza magingo aya cya gitambaro baracyacyitwikira mu maso, igihe basomerwa Isezerano rya Kera. Erega uri muri Kristo wenyine ni we kivanwaho!" 
2Corinthians3:15 Rwose no kugeza uyu munsi iyo umuntu abasomera igitabo cya Musa, cya gitwikirizo kiba kibambītse ku mitima yabo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Ariko nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga: “Iyo umuntu ahindukiriye Nyagasani, icyo gitwikirizo gikurwaho.”" 
2Corinthians3:17 Nyagasani uvugwa aha ni Mwuka kandi aho Mwuka wa Nyagasani ari, ni ho haba kwishyira ukizana by'ukuri." 
2Corinthians3:18 Twebwe twese rero dutwikuruwe mu maso turabagirana ikuzo rya Nyagasani. Bityo tugumya guhindurwa kugira ngo duse na we, tugahabwa ikuzo rigenda ryiyongera ubutitsa. Ibyo Mwuka wa Nyagasani ni we ubikora." 
2Corinthians4:1 Koko rero Imana yatugiriye imbabazi idushinga uyu murimo, ni cyo gituma tudacogora." 
2Corinthians4:2 Ahubwo twazinutswe ibiteye isoni byose bikorwa rwihishwa, ntitucyifata nk'abariganya cyangwa ngo duhindagure Ijambo ry'Imana. Ahubwo tugaragariza buri muntu ukuri kw'Imana, kugira ngo aturebereho agire umutima unyuzwe imbere yayo." 
2Corinthians4:3 Nyamara rero niba Ubutumwa bwiza twashinzwe butwikiriwe, abazimiye ni bo baba babuhishwe." 
2Corinthians4:4 Abo ntibemera ubwo Butumwa kuko imana mbi y'ab'iki gihe yabahumye imitima, kugira ngo batabona urumuri rw'Ubutumwa bwiza buranga ikuzo rya Kristo, ari we shusho y'Imana." 
2Corinthians4:5 Erega si twe twiyamamaza ahubwo ni Kristo twamamaza, twerekana ko ari we Nyagasani naho twebwe tukaba abagaragu banyu ku bwa Yezu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Imana yavuze iti: “Umucyo ubandurire mu mwijima,” ni na yo yatumye urumuri rwayo rubandurira mu mitima yacu kugira ngo ikuzo ryayo tubonera mu maso ha Kristo, turimenye ritumurikire." 
2Corinthians4:7 Icyakora ubukungu bwo kumenya ibyo tubutwaye tumeze nk'ibibindi bimeneka ubusa. Ni ukugira ngo ububasha buhebuje budukoreramo bwe kutwitirirwa, ahubwo bumenyekane ko ari ubw'Imana." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tubabazwa ku buryo bwose nyamara ntibiduca intege, duhura n'ingorane nyamara ntitwiheba," 
2Corinthians4:9 turatotezwa nyamara Imana ntidutererana, dukubitwa hasi nyamara ntibiduhitana." 
2Corinthians4:10 Iteka tugendana urupfu rwa Yezu mu mibiri yacu, kugira ngo ubugingo bwe bugaragarire muri yo." 
2Corinthians4:11 Koko rero duhora twicwa duhōrwa Yezu, kugira ngo ubugingo bwe bugaragarire muri iyi mibiri yacu ipfa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Bityo twe ni urupfu rutubungamo naho mwe ni ubugingo. 
2Corinthians4:13 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Nizeye Imana ni cyo gituma mvuga ibyayo.” Natwe ni uko dufite bene uko kwizera, ni cyo gituma tuvuga ibyayo." 
2Corinthians4:14 Tuzi ko Imana yazuye Nyagasani Yezu, natwe izatuzurana na we, maze idukoranyirize imbere yayo hamwe namwe." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ibyo byose biba ku bwanyu kugira ngo ubuntu Imana igira busenderezwe muri benshi, butume abayishimira biyongera maze bagwize ikuzo ryayo." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ni cyo gituma tudacogora. Koko imibiri yacu igenda isaza, naho mu mitima yacu duhindurwa bashya buri munsi." 
2Corinthians4:17 Nuko rero amakuba y'akanya gato duhura na yo muri iki gihe, nta cyo avuze uyagereranyije n'ikuzo ry'akataraboneka rizahoraho iteka dutegurirwa n'ayo makuba." 
2Corinthians4:18 Noneho ntitwibanda ku bigaragara ahubwo twibanda ku bitagaragara, kuko ibigaragarira amaso bimara igihe gito naho ibitagaragara bihoraho iteka ryose." 
2Corinthians5:1 Koko rero aka kazu k'ingando dutuyemo ari ko mubiri, tuzi ko nigasenyuka mu ijuru dufite inzu idasenyuka tuzabamo, itubatswe n'abantu ahubwo yubatswe n'Imana." 
2Corinthians5:2 Igihe tukigatuyemo turaniha tubitewe no kwifuza cyane gutwikirwa n'iyo nzu yacu yo mu ijuru 
2Corinthians5:3 maze nitumara gutwikirwa na yo tuzasangwe tutambaye ubusa. 
2Corinthians5:4 Koko rero twebwe abakiri muri aka kazu k'ingando, duhora tuniha nk'abantu bikoreye imitwaro iremereye. Si uko dushaka kwamburwa uyu mubiri usanzwe, ahubwo twifuza kwambikwa umubiri tuzaherwa mu ijuru, kugira ngo uyu upfa uzimangatanywe n'ubugingo buhoraho." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ibyo ni byo Imana ubwayo yaduteganyirije, ndetse yaduhaye Mwuka wayo ho umusogongero w'ibyo yatugeneye." 
2Corinthians5:6 Ni cyo gituma tuba indacogora. Tuzi ko igihe tukiri iwacu mu mubiri, tuba turi kure ya Nyagasani." 
2Corinthians5:7 Tugenda tuyoborwa n'ukwizera, tutayoborwa n'ibigaragarira amaso." 
2Corinthians5:8 Ni koko turi indacogora. Icyo twahitamo ni ukwimuka, tukavanwa muri uyu mubiri tugataha kwa Nyagasani." 
2Corinthians5:9 Icyo tugamije rero ni ukumushimisha, twaba tugituye muri uyu mubiri cyangwa tuwimutsemo." 
2Corinthians5:10 Koko rero twese tugomba kuzitaba urukiko kugira ngo ducirwe urubanza na Kristo, umuntu wese yiturwe ibikwiriye ibyiza cyangwa ibibi azaba yarakoze agituye mu mubiri." 
2Corinthians5:11 Noneho tuzi gutinya Nyagasani icyo ari cyo, ni cyo gituma dukora uko dushoboye ngo twemeze abantu ibye. Uko tumeze kose Imana iratuzi imbere n'inyuma, nkaba niringira ko namwe mwamenye imbere n'inyuma." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ntabwo ari ukongera kubiyogezaho, ahubwo dushaka kubaha impamvu mwashingiraho mukaturata, kugira ngo mubone icyo musubiza ba bandi barata iby'inyuma gusa, bidafite ishingiro mu mutima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Niba turi abasazi (nk'uko bavuga), twasaze ku bw'Imana, ariko niba dushyira mu gaciro ni mwe bifitiye akamaro." 
2Corinthians5:14 Koko urukundo rwa Kristo ni rwo rubiduhatira. Twemera ko uwapfiriye abantu bose ari umwe, bityo rero bose bakaba barapfuye." 
2Corinthians5:15 Ikindi yapfiriye bose kugira ngo abakiriho be gukomeza kubaho bishimisha, ahubwo babeho bashimisha Kristo wabapfiriye maze akazuka." 
2Corinthians5:16 Bityo kuva ubu nta muntu tucyemera dushingiye kuri kamere y'abantu. Ndetse nubwo kera na Kristo twamwemeraga dutyo, ubu si ko tukimwemera." 
2Corinthians5:17 Erega iyo umuntu ari muri Kristo aba icyaremwe gishya, ibya kera biba bishize byose bikaba bihindutse bishya." 
2Corinthians5:18 Ibyo byose Imana ni yo yabikoze. Yiyunze na twe ikoresheje Kristo, nyuma idushinga umurimo wo kubwira abantu ngo biyunge na yo." 
2Corinthians5:19 Koko rero Imana yari muri Kristo igihe yiyungaga n'abantu bo ku isi yose, bityo ntiyaba ikibabaraho ibicumuro byabo. Natwe idushinga kubwira abantu ngo biyunge na yo." 
2Corinthians5:20 Koko turi intumwa za Kristo, ndetse Imana ubwayo ni yo ibahamagara ari twe ikoresheje. Turabinginga mu izina rya Kristo, nimwiyunge n'Imana." 
2Corinthians5:21 Kristo utarigeze akora icyaha Imana yamubazeho ibyaha byacu, kugira ngo muri we tubarweho ubutungane bwayo." 
2Corinthians6:1 Noneho ubwo dukorana n'Imana, turabinginga kugira ngo ubuntu yabagiriye bwe gupfa ubusa." 
2Corinthians6:2 Koko rero ubwayo yaravuze iti: “Mu gihe gikwiye narakumvise, ku munsi w'agakiza naragutabaye.” None rero iki ni cyo gihe gikwiye, uyu ni wo munsi w'Imana wo gukiza abantu." 
2Corinthians6:3 Twirinda kugira uwo twabangamira ku buryo bwose, kugira ngo umurimo dukora utagawa." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ahubwo dukora byose twerekana ko turi abagaragu b'Imana, twihanganira cyane amakuba n'ingorane n'ibyago." 
2Corinthians6:5 Twarakubiswe dushyirwa muri gereza, dutezwa imidugararo, twarakoze twiyuha akuya, twaraye tudasinziriye ndetse akenshi ntiturye." 
2Corinthians6:6 Turangwa n'imibereho izira amakemwa no kumenya ukuri no kwihangana no kugira neza. Turangwa kandi na Mwuka Muziranenge n'urukundo ruzira uburyarya," 
2Corinthians6:7 n'ukuri twamamaza n'ububasha Imana iduha. Imyifatire itunganye ni yo ntwaro turwanisha, kandi ni na yo ngabo dukinga." 
2Corinthians6:8 Rimwe abantu baduha icyubahiro ubundi bakadukoza isoni rimwe bakadusebya ubundi bakadushimagiza. Batwita abanyabinyoma nyamara kandi turi abanyakuri. 
2Corinthians6:9 Dusa n'abatazwi nyamara dore tuzwi n'umuhisi n'umugenzi. Dusa n'abagiye gupfa, nyamara dore turiho. Bajya baduhana nyamara ntibatwice." 
2Corinthians6:10 Duterwa ishavu nyamara tugahorana ibyishimo. Turi abakene nyamara tugakenura benshi. Dusa n'abatagira na mba nyamara dufite byose. 
2Corinthians6:11 Yemwe bagenzi bacu b'i Korinti, twababwije ukuri kose kandi turabirundurira." 
2Corinthians6:12 Mu mibanire yacu namwe si twe twizigamye ahubwo ni mwe. 
2Corinthians6:13 Nuko rero ndababwira nk'umubyeyi ubwira abana be, namwe nimutwirundurire nk'uko twabibagiriye." 
2Corinthians6:14 Ntimukifatanye n'abatemera Kristo. Mbese ubutabera n'ubugome byahurira he? Ese umucyo wasābana ute n'umwijima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Cyo nimumbwire: Kristo yahuza inama ate na Satani? Cyangwa uwemera Kristo aba ahuriye ku ki n'utamwemera? 
2Corinthians6:16 Mbese Ingoro y'Imana yayisangira ite n'ibigirwamana? Erega ingoro y'Imana nzima ni twebwe, nk'uko ubwayo yivugiye iti: “Nzatura hagati muri bo ngendane na bo, nzaba Imana yabo na bo babe ubwoko bwanjye.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Ni cyo gituma Nyagasani avuga ati: “Nimuve muri ba bantu mwitandukanye na bo. Ntimugire ikintu cyose gihumanye mukoraho, nanjye nzabakira." 
2Corinthians6:18 Nzababera So, namwe mumbere abahungu n'abakobwa. Uko ni ko Nyagasani Ushoborabyose avuga.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Ncuti nkunda, ayo masezerano ni twe yahawe. Bityo rero nimucyo twiyeze, twivaneho ikintu cyose gishobora kuduhumanya imibiri cyangwa imitima, twihatire kuba abaziranenge rwose tubitewe no gutinya Imana." 
2Corinthians7:2 Nimuduhe umwanya mu mitima yanyu. Dore nta muntu twafudikiye, nta n'uwo twayobeje cyangwa ngo tumurye imitsi." 
2Corinthians7:3 Ibyo simbivuze ari ukubacira urubanza. Nk'uko nabivuze mbere, muri inkoramutima zacu, ku buryo nta cyadutandukanya namwe; twiteguye kubana namwe, cyangwa gupfana namwe." 
2Corinthians7:4 Mbafitiye icyizere cyinshi kandi koko muntera ishema ryinshi. No mu makuba yose twagize Imana irushaho kumpumuriza, ngasābwa n'ibyishimo." 
2Corinthians7:5 Koko rero igihe twageraga mu ntara ya Masedoniya, nta gahenge twigeze tugira ahubwo twagize ingorane impande zose, abanzi baduteraga baturutse hirya no hino tukagira n'inkeke ku mutima." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ariko Imana ihumuriza abashobewe yaraduhumurije tubonye Tito aje. 
2Corinthians7:7 Ukuza kwe si ko kwaduhumurije konyine, ahubwo no kumva ko namwe mwamuhumurije byaturemye agatima. Yatubwiye ukuntu munkumbuye n'ishavu mufite, atubwira n'uko mundwanira ishyaka. Ibyo byatumye ndushaho kugira ibyishimo." 
2Corinthians7:8 Nubwo urwandiko nabandikiye rwaba rwarabateye agahinda, sinicuza ko narwanditse. Nari ngiye kubyicuza igihe mbonye ukuntu rwabateye agahinda akanya gato." 
2Corinthians7:9 Ariko ubu ndishimye atari uko nabateye agahinda, ahubwo ari uko ako gahinda kabateye kwihana. Erega ako ni agahinda gahuje n'ibyo Imana ishaka! Bityo nta kibi mwahuye na cyo kiduturutseho." 
2Corinthians7:10 Burya agahinda gahuje n'ibyo Imana ishaka gatera umuntu kwihana kakamugeza ku gakiza, agahinda nk'ako nta mpamvu yo kukicuza. Naho agahinda gasanzwe ko muri iyi si kageza umuntu ku rupfu." 
2Corinthians7:11 Mbega ibyiza mwazaniwe n'agahinda gahuje n'ibyo Imana ishaka! Mbega umwete kabateye wo kwita ku byabaye ngo mwiregure! Mbega ukuntu kabateye kurakara no guhagarika umutima! Mbega ibyifuzo n'ishyaka kabateye ngo mwemere guhana uwagize nabi! Muri byose mwagaragaje ko muri abere muri urwo rubanza. 
2Corinthians7:12 Nuko rero igihe nabandikiraga rwa rwandiko, sinabitewe n'uwacumuye cyangwa n'uwacumuweho, ahubwo kwari ukugira ngo imbere y'Imana ishyaka mudufitiye ribagaragarire." 
2Corinthians7:13 Uko mwifashe bamaze kurubasomera byaraduhumurije. Erega si uguhumurizwa gusa ahubwo twarushijeho kwishima, tubonye ukuntu Tito yari anezerewe kubera ko mwese mwamuremye agatima." 
2Corinthians7:14 Nari naramuratiye ibyanyu, none koko ntimwankojeje isoni. Nk'uko buri gihe twababwizaga ukuri, ni na ko ibigwi byanyu twaratiye Tito byabaye iby'ukuri." 
2Corinthians7:15 Ni icyo cyatumye arushaho kubakunda, cyane cyane iyo yibutse uko mwumviye ibyo yababwiye n'uburyo mwamwakiriye mutinya kandi muhinda umushyitsi." 
2Corinthians7:16 Nshimishijwe n'uko nshobora kubagirira icyizere muri byose. 
2Corinthians8:1 Bavandimwe, turifuza kubamenyesha ubuntu Imana yagiriye amatorero yayo yo mu ntara ya Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians8:2 Koko bagize amakuba menshi yo kubagerageza, nyamara ibyishimo byabo bisesuye byatumye batanga cyane batizigama, nubwo ari abakene bikabije." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ndahamya ko batanze uko bashoboye, ndetse ibirenze uko bashoboye ari ntawe ubahase." 
2Corinthians8:4 Batwinginze bakomeje ngo bagire uruhare mu gikorwa cyo kugoboka intore za Kristo z'i Yeruzalemu. 
2Corinthians8:5 Nuko bakora ibirenze ibyo twari twizeye, ariko rero nk'uko Imana ishaka babanje kwitanga ubwabo, biyegurira Nyagasani nyuma natwe baratwiyegurira." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ni cyo cyatumye twinginga Tito kuza iwanyu, kugira ngo arangize icyo gikorwa cyo kugira ubuntu yari yaratangiye muri mwe." 
2Corinthians8:7 Musanzwe mushoboye ibintu byose mukanahebuza, ari ukwizera Kristo no kumwamamaza, ari ukumenya ukuri no kugira umwete muri byose ndetse no kudukunda, bityo ndifuza ko munahebuza muri icyo gikorwa cyo kugira ubuntu." 
2Corinthians8:8 Si itegeko mbashyizeho ahubwo nagira ngo, mpereye ku mwete abandi bafite ndebe ko urukundo rwanyu ari urw'ukuri." 
2Corinthians8:9 Koko rero muzi ubuntu Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo yagize: nubwo yari umukungu yigize umukene ku bwanyu, kugira ngo ubukene bwe bubagire abakungu." 
2Corinthians8:10 Reka mbabwire icyo ntekereza kuri ibyo, ni cyo cyababera cyiza. Umwaka ushize ni mwe mwabaye aba mbere kugira icyo mutanga, si ibyo gusa, ni mwe mwabaye aba mbere kwiyemeza gutanga." 
2Corinthians8:11 Umva rero nimurangize icyo gikorwa mwatangiye. Nk'uko mwacyiyemeje mufite ubwuzu, mube ari ko mukirangiza mutanga uko mufite." 
2Corinthians8:12 Koko rero iyo umuntu atanganye ubwuzu, Imana yemera ituro rye uko arifite itamutezeho icyo adafite." 
2Corinthians8:13 Ntabwo ngamije kubakenesha kugira ngo mbone uko nkenura abandi. Oya, ndagira ngo mube magirirane." 
2Corinthians8:14 Kuri ubu mufite ibibasagutse, nuko rero nimubikenuze abakennye, maze igihe muzaba mukennye na bo bafite ibibasagutse, bazabibakenuza bityo na none mukaba mubaye magirirane."
