2Corinthians8:15 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Uwatoraguye byinshi nta cyo yasaguye, n'uwatoraguye bike nta cyo yahombye.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Imana ishimwe ko yatumye Tito agira umwete wo kubafasha, nk'uko nanjye nywubagirira." 
2Corinthians8:17 Icyo twamusabye yemeye kugikora, ndetse ishyaka ryinshi yari abafitiye ryamuteye kuza iwanyu abyiyemeje ubwe." 
2Corinthians8:18 Tumutumanye n'umuvandimwe ushimwa n'amatorero yose ya Kristo, kubera ko yamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza." 
2Corinthians8:19 Byongeye kandi uwo muvandimwe yatoranyijwe n'amatorero, ngo aduherekeze mu rugendo tuzajyamo rwo gusohoza uwo murimo w'ubuntu twashinzwe. Ibyo tubikorera guhesha Nyagasani ikuzo, no kugaragaza ubwuzu dufite bwo gufasha abandi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Twirinda ko hagira umuntu udutera urubwa, akemanga uburyo ducunga iyo mari nyinshi twashinzwe." 
2Corinthians8:21 Icyo duharanira si ugukora ibitunganiye Nyagasani gusa, ahubwo ni ugukora n'ibigaragarira abantu ko ari byiza." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tubatumanye n'undi muvandimwe wacu, ni umuntu twagerageje kenshi no mu buryo bwinshi dusanga agira umwete wo gufasha abandi. Ubu ho arushijeho kuwugira kubera icyizere cyinshi abafitiye." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tito we ni mugenzi wanjye dufatanyije umurimo tubakorera. Naho abo bavandimwe bacu bamuherekeje ni intumwa z'amatorero ya Kristo, na bo bakorera guhesha Kristo ikuzo." 
2Corinthians8:24 Ngaho rero nimubagaragarize urukundo rwanyu, mubereke n'impamvu zaduteraga kurata ibigwi byanyu maze bimenyekane mu matorero." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ntabwo rwose ari ngombwa ko mbandikira ku byerekeye igikorwa cyo kugoboka intore z'Imana zo muri Yudeya. 
2Corinthians9:2 Nzi ko mugira ubwuzu bwo gufasha abandi, ndetse nabaratiye abo muri Masedoniya ngira nti: “Kuva mu mwaka ushize abavandimwe bacu bo muri Akaya biteguye gutanga imfashanyo.” None iryo shyaka ryanyu ryemeje abenshi muri bo kugira icyo bakora." 
2Corinthians9:3 Mboherereje abo bavandimwe kugira ngo ibyo bigwi twabavuze tubashimagiza bitaba impfabusa. 
2Corinthians9:4 Naho ubundi nzanye n'abo muri Masedoniya bagasanga nta cyo mwari mwategura, twakorwa n'isoni kandi namwe mwarushaho kumwara kubera icyizere twari tubafitiye." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ni cyo cyatumye mbona ko ari ngombwa gusaba abo bavandimwe ngo bambanzirize kuza iwanyu, kugira ngo batunganye ibyerekeye imfashanyo mwiyemeje gutanga. Nuko rero nzasange mwarayiteguye, bityo bigaragare ko mwatanganye ubwuzu mudahatwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Muzirikane iri jambo: “Ubiba nkeya azasarura nkeya, naho ubiba nyinshi azasarura nyinshi.”" 
2Corinthians9:7 Buri muntu wese akwiriye gutanga icyo yiyemeje, atinuba kandi adahatwa kuko Imana ikunda umuntu utanga anezerewe." 
2Corinthians9:8 Koko rero ku buryo bwose Imana ibasha kubagirira ubuntu busesuye, kugira ngo muri byose n'igihe cyose mube mwihagije, ndetse munasagure ibyo gukoresha imirimo myiza yose." 
2Corinthians9:9 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga, ngo: “Yagize ubuntu aha abakene ataziganya, ubutungane bwe azabuhorana iteka ryose.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Imana iha umuhinzi imbuto zo kubiba, ikanamuha ibyokurya byo kumutunga, namwe izabaha imbuto zo kubiba inazigwize, kugira ngo zirumbuke umusaruro mwinshi wo kugira neza kwanyu." 
2Corinthians9:11 Izabagwiriza ubukungu bw'uburyo bwose kugira ngo muzashobore gutanga mutizigama, maze bitume benshi bashimira Imana, bitewe n'imfashanyo zanyu tuzaba tubashyikirije." 
2Corinthians9:12 Akamaro k'uwo murimo mukora si ako gukenura intore z'Imana gusa, ahubwo unatuma abashimira Imana barushaho kwiyongera." 
2Corinthians9:13 Kuzirikana ibyo byose mwabakoreye bituma basingiza Imana, babonye ukuntu muyumvira, mugatangaza Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo. Bayisingiza kandi kubera ko mugira ubuntu, mugasangira ibyanyu na bo ndetse n'abantu bose." 
2Corinthians9:14 Bityo bazabasabira babafitiye urukumbuzi, bitewe n'ubuntu bw'Imana buhebuje bababonanye." 
2Corinthians9:15 Imana ishimwe kubera impano itagereranywa yatugabiye. 
2Corinthians10:1 Jyewe Pawulo ndabinginga nkoresheje ubugwaneza no kugira neza bya Kristo. Bavuga ko iyo turi kumwe mba nk'intama, twaba tutari kumwe nkaba nk'intare." 
2Corinthians10:2 Ndabasaba nkomeje rero kugira ngo ninza iwanyu mutazantera gukara. Koko kandi sinzabura gukara, nimbonana na ba bandi bavuga ko tugenza nk'ab'isi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Nubwo turi abantu ntabwo turwana kimwe n'abantu b'isi. 
2Corinthians10:4 Intwaro turwanisha ntizacuzwe n'abantu ahubwo ni intwaro zikomeye twahawe n'Imana, zibasha gusenya ibigo ntamenwa. Zisenya impaka," 
2Corinthians10:5 zikanahirika inkuta ndende zose zashyiriweho gutambamira abantu ngo batamenya Imana. Bityo imigambi yose yo kugomera Kristo tukayinesha, maze ba nyirayo tukabamugandurira." 
2Corinthians10:6 Nuko rero ubwo muzaba mwumviye byimazeyo, twiteguye kuzahana uwanga kumvira uwo ari we wese." 
2Corinthians10:7 Mwebwe mufata ibintu mushingiye ku byo mureba gusa. Umuntu wese wiyumvamo ko ari uwa Kristo niyongere yibaze, amenye ko natwe turi Abakristo kimwe na we." 
2Corinthians10:8 Nyagasani yaduhaye ubushobozi bwo kubaka ubugingo bwanyu atari ubwo kubusenya. Ubanza ahari narakabije kwiratana ubwo bushobozi nyamara nta pfunwe binteye. 
2Corinthians10:9 Sinshaka ko mutekereza ko inzandiko mbandikira ari izo kubatera ubwoba. 
2Corinthians10:10 Nyamara hariho abavuga bati: “Inzandiko za Pawulo ni iz'igitsure, zirimo amagambo akaze. Nyamara iyo turi kumwe, usanga acishije make n'ibyo avuga ari ubusa.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Uvuga atyo wese ndagira ngo amenye neza ko ibyo tuvuze mu nzandiko tutari kumwe, nta ho bitandukaniye n'ibyo tuzakora tugeze iwanyu." 
2Corinthians10:12 Koko rero ntitwahangara kwireshyeshya cyangwa ngo twigereranye n'abo bantu biyogeza. Ni abapfu rwose kuko bishyiriraho igipimo bakacyigeraho, bigereranya ubwabo!" 
2Corinthians10:13 Naho twebwe ntitwirata ngo turenze urugero. Ahubwo tugarukira ku rugero ari zo mbibi Imana yadushingiye, kandi namwe muri muri izo mbibi." 
2Corinthians10:14 Ubwo ari twe twabanje kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo, turamutse tuje iwanyu ntituba turenze imbibi twahawe." 
2Corinthians10:15 Ntiturenga izo mbibi ngo twiratane umurimo wakozwe n'abandi. Ahubwo twiringiye ko muzakomeza gutera imbere mu kwizera Kristo, natwe umurimo dukora muri mwe ukarushaho kwiyongera, tutarenze izo mbibi." 
2Corinthians10:16 Nyuma ni bwo tuzageza Ubutumwa bwiza no mu bihugu biri hirya y'icyanyu. Na bwo ntituziratana umurimo tuzasanga warakozwe n'abandi aho Imana yabakebeye. 
2Corinthians10:17 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ushaka kwirata yirate Nyagasani.” 
2Corinthians10:18 Uwiyogeza si we ushimwa, ahubwo hashimwa uwogezwa na Nyagasani." 
2Corinthians11:1 Yewe, icyampa mukihanganira ubusazi bwanjye ho gato! Nyamuneka nimunyihanganire!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Erega mbafuhira nk'uko Imana ibafuhira. Nabatanze mumeze nk'umugeni wirinze, ngo mbashyingire umugabo umwe rukumbi ari we Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:3 Ariko nk'uko Eva yashutswe n'amayeri ya ya nzoka, ndatinya ko namwe mwashukwa ibitekerezo byanyu bikangirika, maze mugateshuka umurava [no kubonera] mukesha Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:4 Dore nawe iyo hadutse umuntu akamamaza muri mwe Yezu wundi utari uwo twamamaje, cyangwa akabaha umwuka wundi utari Mwuka w'Imana mwahawe, cyangwa akabagezaho ubutumwa bundi butari Ubutumwa bwiza twabagejejeho, uwo muntu muramureka akabigarurira!" 
2Corinthians11:5 Ndibwira ko bene izo “ntumwa” z'akataraboneka nta cyo jye zindusha. 
2Corinthians11:6 Nubwo wenda mu magambo ntari intyoza, ariko rero mu bumenyi sindi umuswa. Ibyo twabibagaragarije neza ku buryo bwose." 
2Corinthians11:7 Nabagejejeho Ubutumwa bwiza nta gihembo mbaka, nicishije bugufi kugira ngo mwe mushyirwe hejuru. Mbese icyo ni icyaha?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Natungwaga n'amatorero ya Kristo y'ahandi – kwari nko kuyasahura kugira ngo mwebwe mbone uko mbakorera. 
2Corinthians11:9 Iyo nagiraga icyo nkenera igihe nari iwanyu, nta muntu n'umwe nigeze ndushya ngira icyo mwaka. Abavandimwe baturutse muri Masedoniya ni bo bamaze ubukene bwose nari mfite. Bityo ku buryo bwose nirinze kubarushya kandi nzakomeza kubyirinda." 
2Corinthians11:10 Nshingiye ku kuri kwa Kristo kundimo, ntawe uzambuza kwiratana ibyo ngibyo mu karere kose ka Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Ese ibyo mbivugiye iki? Mbese ni uko ntabakunda? Imana ni yo izi uko mbakunda. 
2Corinthians11:12 Nzakomeza kugenza uko nsanzwe ngenza, kugira ngo ba bandi biyita intumwa za Kristo babure urwitwazo bajya bashaka rwo kwirata ko ari intumwa kimwe natwe." 
2Corinthians11:13 Bene abo ni ingirwantumwa zikora ibinyuranye n'ibyo zivuga, zikihindura nk'Intumwa za Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ibyo kandi si igitangaza, kuko na Satani ubwe ajya yihindura nk'umumarayika urabagirana." 
2Corinthians11:15 Ntabwo ibyo rero ari ibikomeye kubona n'abakozi be bihindura nk'abagaragu b'Imana nyir'ubutungane. Iherezo baziturwa ibihwanye n'ibyo bakora. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndabisubiramo: ntihagire umuntu unyita umusazi. Ariko rero mushatse kubikora, ngaho nimwihanganire ubusazi bwanjye mureke nirate ho gato." 
2Corinthians11:17 Ibyo ngiye kuvuga simbikuye kuri Nyagasani, ahubwo ubusazi bwanjye ni bwo buntinyuye kwirata!" 
2Corinthians11:18 Benshi birata nk'ab'isi, none rero reka nanjye nirate." 
2Corinthians11:19 Mwebwe muzi ubwenge, ni ukuri mukunda kwihanganira abasazi!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Dore namwe mwihanganira umuntu ubashyira mu buja cyangwa akabarya imitsi, akabariganya akanabasuzugura, cyangwa akabakubita inshyi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Twe twabaye ibigwari ntitwabagirira dutyo – yewe, kubivuga binteye isoni! Niba hari umuntu wahangara kugira icyo yirata naze duhige – na none ibyo mbivuze nk'umusazi." 
2Corinthians11:22 Mbese za ngirwantumwa ni Abaheburayi? Nanjye ndi we. Ese ni Abisiraheli? Nanjye ndi we. Ese ni urubyaro rwa Aburahamu? Nanjye ni uko. 
2Corinthians11:23 Ese ni abagaragu ba Kristo? Noneho reka mvuge nk'uwataye umutwe! Jyewe ndi we kubarusha. Uti kuki? Nabarushije gukora nshishikaye cyane, nabarushije gufungwa kenshi, nabarushije gukubitwa ibiboko byinshi bikabije, ndetse nabarushije no kuba nenda gupfa hato na hato." 
2Corinthians11:24 Ibihe bitanu Abayahudi bankubise ibiboko mirongo itatu n'icyenda. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ibindi bihe bitatu nakubiswe inkoni n'abasirikari b'Abanyaroma. Igihe kimwe natewe amabuye bashaka kuyanyicisha. Ibihe bitatu ubwato nagenderagamo bwaramenetse ndarohama. Hari n'ubwo naraye mu nyanja rwagati bukeye nirirwamo. 
2Corinthians11:26 Mu ngendo nyinshi najyagamo nagiye ngira akaga gatewe n'inzuzi zuzuye, agatewe n'abambuzi, agatewe na bene wacu b'Abayahudi n'agatewe n'abatari Abayahudi. Yewe, nagiriye akaga mu mijyi no mu cyaro no mu nyanja. Ndetse nagize n'akaga gatewe n'abiyita abavandimwe kandi atari bo." 
2Corinthians11:27 Narakoze cyane niyuha akuya. Kenshi nagize ibimbuza kugoheka. Nagize inzara n'inyota ndetse akenshi mbura n'icyo ndya. Nagiye mbura ibyo nambara maze imbeho ikantunda. 
2Corinthians11:28 Uretse ibyo n'ibindi ntavuze, uko bukeye n'uko bwije mporana inkeke, mpagaritse umutima kubera amatorero yose ya Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:29 Iyo hagize ucika intege bituma nanjye ncika intege. Iyo hagize uteshuka agakora icyaha biranshegesha. 
2Corinthians11:30 Niba ari ngombwa ko nirata reka nirate intege nke zanjye. 
2Corinthians11:31 Imana Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo yogahora isingizwa iteka, izi ko ntabeshya." 
2Corinthians11:32 Ubwo nari i Damasi umutegetsi washinzwe umujyi n'Umwami Areta, yashyize abarinzi ku marembo y'umujyi ngo bamfate." 
2Corinthians11:33 Nuko Abakristo baho banshyira mu gitebo bancisha mu idirishya ryo mu rukuta rw'umujyi, ndahunga murokoka ntyo." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ni ngombwa ko nirata nubwo ari nta cyo bimaze. Noneho reka mvuge ibyerekeye ibyo neretswe n'ibyo nahishuriwe na Nyagasani. 
2Corinthians12:2 Hari umuntu wa Kristo nzi wazamuwe, akagezwa mu ijuru rya gatatu hashize imyaka cumi n'ine. Icyakora sinzi neza ko yari ahari koko cyangwa niba kwari ukuherekwa gusa, Imana yonyine ni yo ibizi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Nzi ko uwo muntu yazamuwe akagezwa muri paradiso. Na none sinzi neza ko yari ahari koko cyangwa niba kwari ukuherekwa gusa, Imana yonyine ni yo ibizi. Uko biri kose yahumviye amagambo arenze uko umuntu yayasobanura, ndetse birabujijwe no kuyasubiramo." 
2Corinthians12:4  
2Corinthians12:5 Umuntu nk'uwo ni we nakwiratana koko, naho jyewe ubwanjye nta kindi nakwiratana keretse intege nke zanjye." 
2Corinthians12:6 Nyamara nshatse kugira icyo niratana sinaba mbaye umusazi, kuko naba mvuga iby'ukuri. Ariko noneho ndifashe, kugira ngo hatagira untekerezaho ibirenze ibyo abona nkora cyangwa ibyo yumva mvuga." 
2Corinthians12:7 Koko kandi kugira ngo ntavaho nirata mbitewe n'uko nahishuriwe ibitangaje gutyo, nashyizwe igisa n'ihwa mu mubiri wanjye kimpanda kikambera nk'intumwa ya Satani yo kumpoza ku nkoni, kugira ngo ne kwikuza." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ibihe bitatu nasabye Nyagasani kunkiza icyo cyago," 
2Corinthians12:9 maze na we akansubiza ati: “Ubuntu ngira buraguhagije, kuko ububasha bwanjye bugwira ahiganje intege nke.” Noneho rero nzajya nishimira cyane kwiratana intege nke zanjye, kugira ngo ububasha bwa Kristo bugume kuri jye." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ni cyo gituma nishimira kugira intege nke n'ubukene, ngatukwa ngatotezwa, nkagira ingorane ari Kristo nzira. Erega iyo mbaye umunyantegenke ni bwo mba mfite imbaraga!" 
2Corinthians12:11 Yemwe, nabaye umusazi koko ariko ni mwe mwabimpatiye, kandi rero ari mwe mwagombaga kunyogeza. Nubwo ari nta cyo ndi cyo, ariko za ntumwa mwita akataraboneka nta cyo zindushije." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ibimenyetso biranga Intumwa ya Kristo Imana yampaye kubitanga muri mwe nta gucogora na busa ni byo ibi: kwerekana ibimenyetso no gukora ibitangaza n'ibindi bikorwa by'ububasha. 
2Corinthians12:13 Mbese ni iki nakoreye andi matorero ya Kristo, mwebwe sinkibakorere uretse ko mwebwe ntashatse kubarushya? Ibyo niba ari ukubahemukira mubimbabarire." 
2Corinthians12:14 Ubu niteguye kuzaza iwanyu ubwa gatatu kandi nta bwo nzabarushya ngira icyo mbasaba. Si ibyanyu nshaka ahubwo ni mwebwe ubwanyu. Erega abana si bo bakwiye kuzigama ibyo gukenura ababyeyi babo, ahubwo ababyeyi ni bo bakwiye kubikorera abana babo." 
2Corinthians12:15 Jyewe rero nashimishwa no gutanga ibyo mfite byose ku bwanyu, ndetse nanjye ubwanjye nkitanga byimazeyo. Mbese koko mwabasha kunkunda urumamo, kandi jye mbakunda bigeze aho?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Noneho mwambwira muti: “Koko ntiwaturuhije nyamara wabaye inyaryenge, uradushuka utugusha mu mutego waduteze!”" 
2Corinthians12:17 None se hari inyungu nabashatsemo maze nkayituma umwe mu bo naboherereje? 
2Corinthians12:18 Nasabye Tito kuza iwanyu mutumana na wa muvandimwe. Mbese Tito hari inyungu yabashatsemo? Ese ntimwabonye ko twembi twifata kimwe tukanyura inzira imwe? 
2Corinthians12:19 Mbese mwibwiye ko tumaze igihe kingana gitya tubireguraho? Si ko biri ahubwo imbere y'Imana tuvuga ibyo Kristo ashaka. Ncuti dukunda, ibyo byose twabibabwiriye kugira ngo byubake ubugingo bwanyu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ndatinya ko ninza iwanyu nzasanga mutameze nk'uko nshaka, kandi namwe mugasanga ntameze nk'uko mushaka. Ndatinya ko nzasanga mufitanye amakimbirane n'ishyari, uburakari no gutera amahane, ngasanga munegurana munafitanye amazimwe no gusuzugurana, ndetse n'imivurungano." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndatinya ko ningaruka iwanyu Imana yanjye izankoza isoni imbere yanyu. Koko kandi nzagomba kuririra benshi muri ba bandi bacumuye mbere, bakaba baranze kwisubiraho ngo bareke za ngeso zabo zo kwiyandarika n'ubusambanyi n'ubwomanzi." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ubu ni ubwa gatatu ngiye kuzaza iwanyu kubasura. Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ikirego cyose ntigishobora kwemerwa keretse gihamijwe n'abagabo babiri cyangwa barenzeho.” 
2Corinthians13:2 Ubwo nazaga kubasura ubwa kabiri narababuriye, n'ubu tutari kumwe ndaburira ba bandi bacumuye mbere kimwe n'abandi bose, ningaruka nta n'umwe nzababarira." 
2Corinthians13:3 Ibyo bizababera icyemezo mushaka ko ari Kristo umvugisha. Ku bibareba Kristo si umunyantegenke, ahubwo agira ububasha muri mwe." 
2Corinthians13:4 Koko rero yabambwe ku musaraba afite intege nke, ariko ubu ariho kubera ububasha bw'Imana. Natwe ni uko dusangiye na we izo ntege nke, nyamara kubera ububasha bw'Imana tuzabanaho na we tubakorere." 
2Corinthians13:5 Nimwigerageze ubwanyu, mwisuzume murebe niba koko mugikomeye ku uwo twemera. Mbese ntimwasobanukiwe ko Kristo ari muri mwe koko? Ni ko biri keretse niba mwarasuzumwe mugatsindwa." 
2Corinthians13:6 Ndiringira ko muzamenya ko twebweho tutatsinzwe n'isuzumwa. 
2Corinthians13:7 Tujya dusaba Imana kugira ngo mwe kugira ikibi mukora. Ntitubasabira dutyo kugira ngo twe tuboneke ko twatsinze, ahubwo ni ukugira ngo mwebwe mukore ibyiza mutsinde nubwo twe twaba nk'abatsinzwe." 
2Corinthians13:8 Nta cyo tubasha gukora cyabangamira ukuri kw'Imana, ahubwo turagushyigikira." 
2Corinthians13:9 Koko rero twishimira ibihe tugiramo intege nke mwe mugakomera. Ni yo mpamvu duhora tubasabira kugira ngo mube indakemwa. 
2Corinthians13:10 Dore ikinteye kubandikira ibyo byose kandi tutari kumwe, ni ukugira ngo ubwo nzaba ndi iwanyu ntazagomba kubahana bikomeye, nkoresheje ubushobozi Nyagasani yampaye bwo kubaka ubugingo bwanyu simbusenye." 
2Corinthians13:11 Ahasigaye bavandimwe, murabeho. Mube indakemwa, muterane inkunga muhuze imitima, mube amahoro. Bityo Imana yo sōko y'amahoro n'urukundo izabana namwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Muramukanye muhoberana ku buryo buzira amakemwa. Intore z'Imana z'ino zose zirabatashya. 
2Corinthians13:13 Ubuntu Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo abagirira, n'urukundo rw'Imana n'ubusābane mukesha Mwuka Muziranenge, bihorane namwe mwese." 
Galatians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo utagizwe Intumwa n'abantu cyangwa ngo bicishwe ku muntu runaka, ahubwo nkaba naragizwe Intumwa na Yezu Kristo ubwe n'Imana Se yamuzuye mu bapfuye," 
Galatians1:2 mfatanyije n'abavandimwe bose turi kumwe, ndabandikiye mwebwe abo mu matorero ya Kristo yo mu ntara ya Galati." 
Galatians1:3 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu, ibahe n'amahoro ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
Galatians1:4 Kristo yaradupfiriye kugira ngo adukize ibyaha byacu, maze aturokore ibibi by'iki gihe cya none nk'uko Imana Data yabishatse." 
Galatians1:5 Imana nihabwe ikuzo iteka ryose. Amina. 
Galatians1:6 Ntangajwe n'ukuntu mwihutiye kureka Imana yabahamagaye ibitewe n'ubuntu mwagiriwe na Kristo, maze mukemera ubundi butumwa." 
Galatians1:7 Mu by'ukuri nta bundi butumwa bwiza bubaho, ahubwo ni abantu bahagurukiye kubatera imidugararo, bashaka guhindagura Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo." 
Galatians1:8 Ariko hagize undi ubagezaho ubutumwa buciye ukubiri n'ubwo twabagejejeho, yaba uwo muri twe cyangwa umumarayika uvuye mu ijuru, Imana imuvume!" 
Galatians1:9 Nk'uko twari twarabivuze na none nongeye kubisubiramo, hagize umuntu ubagezaho ubutumwa buciye ukubiri n'ubwo mwakiriye, Imana imuvume!" 
Galatians1:10 Mbese ubu naba nshaka gushimwa n'abantu cyangwa gushimwa n'Imana? Ese ubu mparanira kunezeza abantu? Oya. Iyo mba nkigamije kunezeza abantu sinajyaga kuba umugaragu wa Kristo. 
Galatians1:11 Bavandimwe, ndabamenyesha ko Ubutumwa bwiza nabatangarije rwose budakomoka ku bantu." 
Galatians1:12 Nta muntu n'umwe wigeze abungezaho, nta n'umwe wabunyigishije, ahubwo nabuhishuriwe na Yezu Kristo." 
Galatians1:13 Mwumvise amatwara nari mfite kera nkiri mu idini ya kiyahudi. Muzi ko natotezaga Umuryango w'Imana bikabije, mparanira kuwutsemba." 
Galatians1:14 Nateraga imbere mu by'idini ya kiyahudi kurusha benshi bo muri bene wacu b'Abayahudi b'urungano, nkarwana ishyaka bihambaye nshyira imbere imihango twasigiwe na ba sogokuruza." 
Galatians1:15 Nyamara Imana yo yantoranyije ntaravuka ikampamagara ibitewe n'ubuntu bwayo, yishimiye" 
Galatians1:16 kumpishurira Umwana wayo kugira ngo mwamamaze mu batari Abayahudi. Ni ko guhaguruka nta we niriwe ngisha inama," 
Galatians1:17 habe no kujya i Yeruzalemu ngo mbaze abantanze kuba Intumwa ya Kristo, ahubwo nerekeje muri Arabiya nyuma nsubira i Damasi." 
Galatians1:18 Hashize imyaka itatu mbona kujya i Yeruzalemu gusura Petero, marana na we ibyumweru bibiri." 
Galatians1:19 Nta yindi Ntumwa ya Kristo nigeze kubona, uretse Yakobo umuvandimwe wa Nyagasani Yezu." 
Galatians1:20 Ibyo mbandikiye ni ukuri, Imana ni yo ntanze ho umugabo." 
Galatians1:21 Hanyuma nagiye mu ntara ya Siriya n'iya Silisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Icyo gihe abo mu matorero ya Kristo yo muri Yudeya bari bataranca iryera. 
Galatians1:23 Bari barumvise gusa inkuru ngo: “Wa wundi wadutotezaga asigaye yamamaza ubutumwa bwemeza abantu Kristo, kandi ari bwo yarwanyaga.”" 
Galatians1:24 Nuko ibyambayeho bibatera gusingiza Imana. 
Galatians2:1 Nyuma y'imyaka cumi n'ine nsubira i Yeruzalemu hamwe na Barinaba, na Tito turamujyana." 
Galatians2:2 Icyanteye kujyayo ni uko Imana yari yabimpishuriye. Nuko nihererana n'abitwaga abayobozi baho, mbasobanurira ibyerekeye Ubutumwa bwiza ngeza ku batari Abayahudi. Kwari ukugira ngo ntaba nararuhiye ubusa cyangwa ngo ejo ntazaruhira ubundi." 
Galatians2:3 Yewe na Tito wamperekeje utari Umuyahudi, habe ngo ahatirwe gukebwa." 
Galatians2:4 Icyakora aba yarakebwe bitewe na bamwe biyita abavandimwe, bacengeye muri twe rwihishwa. Abo bari bagendereye kugenzura ukwishyira ukizana dufite muri Kristo Yezu, kugira ngo badushyire mu buja." 
Galatians2:5 Nta bwo twigeze tubabererekera na gato, kugira ngo ukuri k'Ubutumwa bwiza kugume muri mwe kudahinyutse." 
Galatians2:6 Ku byerekeye ba bandi bitwa abayobozi – icyo bari cyo nta cyo bindebaho, kuko Imana itita ku busumbane bw'abantu – abo ngabo nta kintu gishya bantegetse." 
Galatians2:7 Ahubwo na bo babonye ko Imana yanshinze umurimo wo kugeza Ubutumwa bwiza ku batari Abayahudi, nk'uko yawushinze Petero mu Bayahudi." 
Galatians2:8 Koko Imana yampaye ububasha bwo kuba Intumwa yayo ku batari Abayahudi, kimwe n'uko yabuhaye Petero ngo abe Intumwa ku Bayahudi." 
Galatians2:9 Yakobo na Petero na Yohani bitwa inkingi z'Umuryango w'Imana, bamaze kuzirikana ubwo buntu Imana yangiriye, jye na Barinaba badukora mu ntoki. Icyo kiba ikimenyetso cy'ubufatanye, kugira ngo twe tujye mu batari Abayahudi, naho bo bagume mu Bayahudi." 
Galatians2:10 Icyo badusabye gusa ni ukwibuka abakene kandi nanjye ibyo nashishikariye kubikora. 
Galatians2:11 Icyakora ubwo Petero yazaga Antiyokiya namurwanyije ku mugaragaro, kuko yari yigayishije." 
Galatians2:12 Mbere y'uko abantu baturutse kwa Yakobo bahagera, Petero yasangiraga n'abatari Abayahudi. Aho baziye yigira nyoni nyinshi, areka gukomeza gusangira na bo kuko yatinyaga abavugaga ko gukebwa ari ngombwa." 
Galatians2:13 N'abandi Bayahudi batangira kugenza nka we, ku buryo na Barinaba yakurikije urwo rugero rw'uburyarya." 
Galatians2:14 Nuko mbonye ko badakurikiza ukuri k'Ubutumwa bwiza, ni ko kubwira Petero mu ruhame nti: “Niba wowe w'Umuyahudi warifataga nk'abatari bo ugata umurongo w'idini ya kiyahudi, ubu se bishoboka bite ko wahatira abatari Abayahudi kwifata nk'Abayahudi?”" 
Galatians2:15 Twebwe turi Abayahudi kavukire, ntituri “abavamahanga b'abanyabyaha.”" 
Galatians2:16 Nyamara tuzi ko umuntu atagirwa intungane no gukora ibyategetswe n'Amategeko, ahubwo agirwa intungane imbere y'Imana no kwemera Kristo Yezu. Ndetse natwe twemeye Kristo Yezu kugira ngo tugirwe intungane tubitewe no kumwemera, tutabitewe no gukora ibyategetswe n'Amategeko. Erega nta muntu ugirwa intungane abitewe no gukora ibyategetswe n'Amategeko!" 
Galatians2:17 Ariko rero niba dushaka kugirwa intungane tubikesha Kristo, kandi tukaboneka ko natwe turi abanyabyaha, byaba se bivuga ko Kristo ari we utuma abantu bakora ibyaha? Ntibikabeho!" 
Galatians2:18 Nanjye nsubiye kugengwa n'Amategeko, byasa no kongera kubaka ibyo namaze gusenya, bityo na none nkaba nigize uwica amategeko." 
Galatians2:19 Ku byerekeye kugengwa n'Amategeko, jye narapfuye mu ruhande rw'Amategeko, kugira ngo noneho mbeho ngengwa n'Imana." 
Galatians2:20 Nabambanywe na Kristo ku musaraba ku buryo atari jye ukiriho, ahubwo ari Kristo uriho muri jye. Imibereho yanjye yo muri iki gihe nyikesha kwizera Umwana w'Imana, wankunze akampfira." 
Galatians2:21 Sinirengagiza ubuntu bw'Imana, kuko niba ari Amategeko ahesha umuntu gutunganira Imana, noneho urupfu rwa Kristo rwaba rubaye impfabusa." 
Galatians3:1 Yemwe mwa Banyagalati b'abapfu mwe, ni nde wabaroze? Abantu mwamenyeshejwe neza ukuntu Kristo yabambwe ku musaraba, mukaba nk'ababyiboneye!" 
Galatians3:2 Ndifuza ko munsubiza iki kibazo cyonyine: mbese mwahawe Mwuka w'Imana kubera ko mwakoze ibyategetswe n'Amategeko, cyangwa ni uko mwumvise Ubutumwa bwiza mukabwemera?" 
Galatians3:3 Bishoboka bite ko muba abapfu bigeze aho? Ibyo mwatangiye mubishobojwe na Mwuka w'Imana, none murashaka kubyirangiriza n'imbaraga zanyu?" 
Galatians3:4 Noneho ga bya bindi byose mwanyuzemo byabaye impfabusa? Ese birashoboka? 
Galatians3:5 Mbese Imana ibaha Mwuka wayo igakora ibitangaza muri mwe, ibiterwa n'uko mukora ibyategetswe n'Amategeko? Cyangwa ni uko mwumvise Ubutumwa bwayo mukabwemera?" 
Galatians3:6 Ibyanditswe bivuga ko “Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma abarwa nk'intungane.” 
Galatians3:7 Bityo rero mumenye ko abizera Imana ari bo rubyaro nyakuri rwa Aburahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Ibyanditswe byateganyije kandi ko n'abatari Abayahudi Imana izabagira intungane, ibitewe n'uko bayizeye. Ni cyo gituma Aburahamu yarabwiwe iyo nkuru nziza mbere y'igihe, ngo “Amahanga yose azaguherwamo umugisha.”" 
Galatians3:9 Nuko rero abizera Imana bose baherwa umugisha hamwe na Aburahamu wayizeraga. 
Galatians3:10 Nyamara abishingikiriza ku kumvira Amategeko baba biteje umuvumo, kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Havumwe umuntu wese udahora akurukiza ibyanditswe byose mu gitabo cy'Amategeko.”" 
Galatians3:11 Biragaragara rwose ko nta muntu watunganira Imana abitewe no kumvira Amategeko, kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Utunganiye Imana abitewe no kuyizera azabaho.”" 
Galatians3:12 Naho Amategeko yo ntaho ahuriye no kwizera Imana. Ahubwo nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga, umuntu ukurikiza Amategeko azabeshwaho na yo." 
Galatians3:13 Kristo yadukijije umuvumo uterwa n'Amategeko igihe yahindukaga ikivume ku bwacu, nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Umuntu wese umanitswe ku giti aba yaravumwe.”" 
Galatians3:14 Ibyo kwari ukugira ngo abatari Abayahudi baherwe muri Kristo umugisha Imana yasezeranyije Aburahamu, no kugira ngo duhabwe Mwuka Imana yadusezeranyije tubikesha kwizera Kristo." 
Galatians3:15 Bavandimwe, reka mfate urugero rusanzwe mu mibereho y'abantu: iyo umuntu agiranye n'undi isezerano rihamye, ntawe ushobora kurikura cyangwa ngo agire icyo aryongeraho." 
Galatians3:16 Ngibyo rero. Aburahamu ni we Imana yahaye amasezerano we n'urubyaro rwe. Ibyanditswe ntibivuga “abazamukomokaho”, nk'aho ari abantu benshi bavugwa. Ahubwo bivuga “urubyaro rwe”, kugira ngo bisobanuke ko bigenewe umuntu umwe rukumbi ari we Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Icyo nshaka kuvuga ni iki: Imana yagiranye Isezerano na Aburahamu irarikomeza, maze Amategeko ashingwa nyuma y'imyaka magana ane na mirongo itatu. Ntibishoboka rero ko ayo Mategeko asesa rya Sezerano ngo ribe impfabusa." 
Galatians3:18 Niba rero ari ukumvira Amategeko bihesha abantu umunani w'Imana, bityo baba batakiwuheshwa na rya sezerano. Nyamara Aburahamu we Imana yamugiriye ubuntu ishingiye ku Isezerano ryayo." 
Galatians3:19 None se kuki Amategeko yatanzwe? Yongeweho nyuma kugira ngo ibicumuro by'abantu bigaragare, kugeza igihe wa wundi ukomoka kuri Aburahamu aziye, ari we wagenewe Isezerano ry'Imana. Amategeko yatanzwe anyujijwe ku bamarayika, maze agezwa ku bantu acishijwe ku muntu w'umuhuza." 
Galatians3:20 Icyakora nta muhuza wakenerwa iyo atari uguhuza abantu babiri, naho Imana yo ni imwe rukumbi." 
Galatians3:21 Noneho se Amategeko acisha ukubiri n'amasezerano y'Imana? Ntibikabeho! Koko iyo haza kubaho Amategeko ahesha umuntu ubugingo, bityo yajyaga kuyumvira akaba intungane." 
Galatians3:22 Ariko Ibyanditswe bivuga ko ibiriho byose bizitiwe n'ibyaha, kugira ngo abemeye Yezu Kristo bahabwe ibyasezeranyijwe babikesha kumwizera." 
Galatians3:23 Mbere y'uko igihe cyo kwemera Kristo kigera, twari tuzitiwe kandi turinzwe n'Amategeko, kugeza igihe Imana ihishuriye agakiza duheshwa no kwemera Kristo." 
Galatians3:24 Bityo Amategeko yashyiriweho kuturera kugeza igihe Kristo aziye, kugira ngo dutunganire Imana tubikesha kumwemera." 
Galatians3:25 Ariko ubu igihe cyo kwemera Kristo kirasohoye, nta bwo rero tukirerwa n'Amategeko." 
Galatians3:26 Koko mwese muri abana b'Imana mubiheshejwe no kwemera Kristo," 
Galatians3:27 kuko mwese mwabatirijwe kuba muri Kristo, ku buryo Kristo ababera nk'umwambaro." 
Galatians3:28 Nuko rero nta tandukaniro riba riri hagati y'Umuyahudi n'utari Umuyahudi, hagati y'inkoreragahato n'uwishyira akizana, no hagati y'umugabo n'umugore, kuko muri Kristo Yezu mwese muri umwe." 
Galatians3:29 Ubwo rero muri aba Kristo, muri urubyaro rwa Aburahamu. Bityo mukaba abo Imana yasezeranyije umunani." 
Galatians4:1 Icyo nshaka kuvuga ni uko ugenewe guhabwa umunani mu bya se, igihe akiri umwana nta cyo aba arusha umugaragu w'inkoreragahato, nubwo ari we uzaba umutware wa byose." 
Galatians4:2 Ahubwo agumya kugengwa n'abamurera n'abashinzwe ibintu bye, kugeza igihe se yategetse." 
Galatians4:3 Natwe igihe twari nk'abana, burya twakoreshwaga agahato n'ibinyabutware bigenga iyi si." 
Galatians4:4 Ariko igihe cyagenwe kigeze Imana yohereje Umwana wayo, abyarwa n'umugore kandi avuka agengwa n'Amategeko," 
Galatians4:5 kugira ngo acungure abari bakigengwa n'Amategeko, bityo tugirwe abana b'Imana." 
Galatians4:6 Koko muri abana bayo ndetse Imana yashyize mu mitima yacu Mwuka w'Umwana wayo, utuma tuyitakambira tuti: “Aba!” ni ukuvuga ngo: “Data!”" 
Galatians4:7 Bityo wowe ntukiri inkoreragahato ahubwo uri umwana w'Imana, kandi ubwo uri umwana wayo iguteganyirije umunani yageneye abana bayo." 
Galatians4:8 Kera mutaramenya Imana, mwari inkoreragahato z'ibyitwa “imana” bitari Imana nyakuri." 
Galatians4:9 None ubwo mumaze kumenya Imana ndetse ikirutaho na yo ikaba ibazi, bishoboka bite ko mwashaka gusubira mu buja bwa bya binyabutware by'ibitindi bitagira icyo bishoboye?" 
Galatians4:10 Musigaye muziririza iminsi runaka kimwe n'amezi n'ibihe n'imyaka! 
Galatians4:11 Mfite impungenge ku bwanyu ko ahari ibyo nabakoreye byose naba naravunikiye ubusa. 
Galatians4:12 Bavandimwe, ndabinginze ngo mumere nkanjye nk'uko nanjye nigize nkamwe. Burya nta kibi mwigeze munkorera." 
Galatians4:13 Muzi ko icyatumye bwa mbere mbona uburyo bwo kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwiza ari uko nari ndwaye. 
Galatians4:14 Iyo ndwara yanjye yababereye ikigeragezo, ariko ntimwigeze munsuzugura cyangwa ngo mbatere ishozi. Ahubwo mwanyakiriye nk'aho ndi umumarayika utumwe n'Imana, ndetse mwanyakiriye nk'aho ndi Yezu Kristo ubwe." 
Galatians4:15 None se bwa bwuzu mwari mufite bwagiye he? Koko ndahamya ko iyo biba ibishoboka, muba mwarinogoyemo amaso mukayanyihera." 
Galatians4:16 Mbese ubu mpindutse umwanzi wanyu kuko mbabwiza ukuri? 
Galatians4:17 Ba bantu babafitiye ishyaka ariko si ishyaka ryiza, icyo bashaka ni ukudutandukanya kugira ngo abe ari bo mugirira ishyaka." 
Galatians4:18 Si bibi kugira ishyaka iyo ari ishyaka ryo gukora ibyiza, mukarigira igihe cyose atari igihe ndi muri mwe gusa." 
Galatians4:19 Bana banjye, nk'uko umubyeyi uri ku nda ababazwa n'ibise, ni ko nanjye ibyanyu bimbabaza kugeza igihe Kristo agaragariye muri mwe." 
Galatians4:20 Iyaba nari nshoboye kuba hamwe namwe ubu, ngo nongere mbibabwire ku bundi buryo. Ibyanyu bimpagaritse umutima!" 
Galatians4:21 Yemwe abashaka kugengwa n'Amategeko, cyo nimumbwire. Mbese ntimwumva icyo Amategeko avuga?" 
Galatians4:22 Ibyanditswe bivuga ko Aburahamu yari afite abahungu babiri, umwe yavutse ku muja we Hagari, undi ku mugore we Sara utigeze mu buja." 
Galatians4:23 Uw'umugore w'umuja yavutse ku buryo busanzwe, naho uw'umugore utigeze mu buja we yavutse bishingiye ku Isezerano ry'Imana." 
Galatians4:24 Ibyo ni ikigereranyo. Abo bagore bombi bagereranywa n'Amasezerano abiri Imana yagiranye n'abantu bayo. Rimwe muri yo ryatangiwe ku musozi wa Sinayi ribyara abana b'ubuja, ni ryo rigereranywa na Hagari." 
Galatians4:25 Hagari we ashushanya wa musozi wa Sinayi wo muri Arabiya, kandi akaba agereranywa na Yeruzalemu isanzwe iri mu buja, yo n'abayituye bose." 
Galatians4:26 Naho aba Yeruzalemu yo mu ijuru barishyira bakizana, kandi ni yo mama utubyara." 
Galatians4:27 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga biti: “Ishime mugore w'ingumba, wowe utigeze ubyara! Vuga cyane urangurure ijwi, wowe utigeze kuribwa n'ibise! Kuko umugore w'intabwa azagira abana benshi, azagira abana kurusha uw'inkundwakazi.”" 
Galatians4:28 Bavandimwe, nk'uko Izaki yavutse ni ko namwe mwavutse bishingiye ku Isezerano ry'Imana." 
Galatians4:29 Nk'uko byabaye icyo gihe, umwana wavutse ku buryo busanzwe agatoteza uwabyawe ku bwa Mwuka, na n'ubu ni ko biri." 
Galatians4:30 Ariko se Ibyanditswe bibivugaho iki? Biravuga biti: “Irukana uriya muja n'umuhungu we! Umuhungu w'umuja ntagomba kugabana umunani n'uw'umugore utigeze aba umuja.” 
Galatians4:31 Nuko rero bavandimwe, twe ntituri abana b'umuja, ahubwo turi ab'umugore utigeze mu buja." 
Galatians5:1 Ni na ko Kristo yadukuye mu buja kugira ngo twishyire twizane. Nuko rero muhagarare kigabo, mwirinde mudasubira mu buja." 
Galatians5:2 Nimunyumve. Jyewe Pawulo ndabivuga nkomeje, nimwiyemeza gukebwa Kristo nta cyo azaba abamariye." 
Galatians5:3 Na none kandi ndabamenyesha ko umuntu wese wiyemeza gukebwa, aba aniyemeje kumvira Amategeko yose iyo ava akagera." 
Galatians5:4 Mwebwe rero abashaka kugirwa intungane imbere y'Imana mwitwaje kumvira Amategeko, muba mwitandukanyije na Kristo bityo mukaba mwivukije ubuntu bw'Imana." 
Galatians5:5 Kugirwa intungane imbere y'Imana bidutera gutegereza ibyo twiringiye kuzabona, tubikesha kwizera Kristo tubishobojwe na Mwuka." 
Galatians5:6 Iyo umuntu ari muri Kristo Yezu, ari ugukebwa ari ukudakebwa byose nta cyo bimaze. Igifite akamaro ni ukwizera kugaragazwa n'ibikorwa by'urukundo." 
Galatians5:7 Ko mwateraga imbere neza, none se ni nde wababangamiye akabatesha gukurikiza ukuri?" 
Galatians5:8 Iyo rukuruzi ntituruka ku Mana ibahamagara. 
Galatians5:9 N'ubundi bavuga ko “agasemburo gake gatubura ifu yose”. 
Galatians5:10 Jyewe niringiye Nyagasani ku bwanyu, anyemeza ko mutazafata undi mugambi. Nyamara ubatera imidugararo, uwo ari we wese Imana izamuhana." 
Galatians5:11 Naho jyewe rero bavandimwe, bibaye ari ukuri ko ncyamamaza ibyerekeye umuhango wo gukebwa, naba se kandi ngitoterezwa iki? Ari uko bimeze umusaraba wa Kristo namamaza nta we waba ukibangamiye." 
Galatians5:12 Iyaba abo babatera imidugararo bari bishahuye bikarangira! 
Galatians5:13 Naho mwe bavandimwe, Imana yabahamagariye kwishyira mukizana. Nyamara uko kwishyira mukizana ntimukwiye kubigira urwitwazo rwo gukora ibyo kamere yanyu irarikiye. Ahubwo buri wese akorere mugenzi we abitewe n'urukundo." 
Galatians5:14 Koko rero Amategeko yose abumbiye muri iri rimwe ngo: “Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.” 
Galatians5:15 Ariko nimuryana mugacagagurana, mwirinde naho ubundi mwamarana!" 
Galatians5:16 Reka mbabwire: nimureke Mwuka w'Imana abayobore, bityo ntimuzaba mugikora ibyo kamere yanyu irarikira." 
Galatians5:17 Kamere y'umuntu yifuza ibyo Mwuka yanga, Mwuka na we akifuza ibyo kamere yanga. Ni ibintu bibiri bihabanye ku buryo mutakora ibyo mwishakiye." 
Galatians5:18 Naho niba muyoborwa na Mwuka, ntabwo muba mukigengwa n'Amategeko." 
Galatians5:19 Dore ibibi kamere y'umuntu imukoresha: gusambana, kwiyandarika n'ubwomanzi" 
Galatians5:20 gusenga ibigirwamana no kuroga, kwangana, amakimbirane, gufuha, kurakara no gutera amahane kwitandukanya n'abandi no kwicamo ibice," 
Galatians5:21 ishyari, ubusinzi, umurengwe n'ibindi bisa bityo. Nk'uko nigeze kubibabwira na none ndabamenyesha hakiri kare ko abakora bene ibyo, nta munani bazahabwa mu bwami bw'Imana." 
Galatians5:22 Nyamara imbuto ziva kuri Mwuka ni izi: urukundo, ibyishimo, amahoro, kwihangana, kugira neza, imico myiza, kudahemuka," 
Galatians5:23 kugwa neza no kumenya kwifata. Bene ibyo nta mategeko abibuza. 
Galatians5:24 Aba Kristo Yezu babambye kamere yabo ku musaraba, hamwe n'ingeso mbi zayo n'irari ryayo." 
Galatians5:25 Niba ari Mwuka uduha ubugingo nitureke atuyobore. 
Galatians5:26 Ntitukabe abirasi ahubwo twirinde kurakaranya no kugirirana ishyari. 
Galatians6:1 Bavandimwe, niba umuntu afashwe acumura, mwebwe abayoborwa na Mwuka mumugarure ku murongo, ariko mubikorane ubugwaneza. Erega nawe ubwawe wirinde uwo uri we wese, kuko nawe washobora kugwa mu bishuko." 
Galatians6:2 Mwakirane ibibaremereye, bityo muzaba mwumviye itegeko rya Kristo byuzuye." 
Galatians6:3 Umuntu wibwira ko akomeye kandi nta cyo ari cyo aba yibeshya. 
Galatians6:4 Ahubwo umuntu wese niyigenzure ubwe mu byo akora. Niba hari icyo afite kwirata, agikore ku giti cye atigereranya ku bandi," 
Galatians6:5 kuko buri wese azibarizwa ibyo azaba yarakoze. 
Galatians6:6 Uwigishwa Ijambo ry'Imana ajye asangira ibyo atunze byose n'urimwigisha. 
Galatians6:7 Ntimukibeshye, Imana ntikinishwa. Imbuto umuntu abiba ni zo azasarura." 
Galatians6:8 Ubiba imbuto z'ibishimisha kamere ye, azasarura urupfu. Naho ubiba imbuto z'ibishimisha Mwuka w'Imana, azasarura ubugingo buhoraho." 
Galatians6:9 Ntitukarambirwe gukora ibyiza, kuko nitudacogora tuzasarura igihe kigeze." 
Galatians6:10 Nuko rero igihe cyose tubonye uburyo tujye tugirira neza abantu bose, ariko cyane cyane abo dusangira kwemera Kristo." 
Galatians6:11 Dore izi nyuguti nini ni jye ubwanjye uziyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko! 
Galatians6:12 Abashaka gushimwa n'abantu ku mpamvu z'imigenzo igaragara ni bo babahatira gukebwa. Intego yabo ni imwe nsa: ni ukugira ngo badatotezwa bazira umusaraba wa Kristo. 
Galatians6:13 Nyamara kandi abo bantu nubwo bakebwa, ubwabo ntibumvira Amategeko. Barashaka gusa ko mukebwa kugira ngo babone uko birata uwo muhango ukorewe imibiri yanyu." 
Galatians6:14 Naho jye nta kindi ngomba kwiratana kitari umusaraba w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo. Uwo musaraba ni wo utuma isi imbera nk'iwubambweho, nanjye nkabera isi nk'uwubambweho." 
Galatians6:15 Ku bwanjye gukebwa cyangwa kudakebwa nta cyo bimaze, igifite akamaro ni uko umuntu yaremwa ukundi gushya." 
Galatians6:16 Abagenza batyo bakurikiza uwo mugambi, ndetse ab'umuryango wose w'Imana, Imana nibahe amahoro n'imbabazi." 
Galatians6:17 Ahasigaye ntihakagire uwongera kundushya, kuko inkovu mfite ku mubiri ziranga ko ndi uwa Yezu." 
Galatians6:18 Bavandimwe, Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu. Amina." 
Ephesians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse, ndabandikiye mwebwe intore z'Imana [zo mu mu mujyi wa Efezi] z'indahemuka muri Kristo Yezu." 
Ephesians1:2 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu, ibahe n'amahoro ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
Ephesians1:3 Nihasingizwe Imana Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo. Muri Kristo yadusenderejeho imigisha yose ya Mwuka, iyiduhereye “ahantu ho mu ijuru”." 
Ephesians1:4 Isi itararemwa Imana yadutoranyirije muri Kristo, kugira ngo tube intore zayo tudafite umugayo imbere yayo. Kubera urukundo rwayo," 
Ephesians1:5 Imana yari yariyemeje kutugira abana bayo tubiheshejwe na Yezu Kristo, nk'uko yabishatse ikabyishimira." 
Ephesians1:6 Tuyishime rero kubera ikuzo ry'ubuntu bwayo yatugabiye mu Mwana wayo ikunda! 
Ephesians1:7 Muri we twacungujwe amaraso yamennye ku bwacu, bityo Imana itubabarira ibicumuro ikurikije ubuntu bwayo butagira urugero." 
Ephesians1:8 Ubwo buntu yabudusesuyeho buduhesha ubwenge n'ubumenyi bwuzuye. 
Ephesians1:9 Yatumenyesheje ibanga ry'ubushake bwayo, ikurikije ibyiza yari yarateganyije muri Kristo," 
Ephesians1:10 kugira ngo igeze byose ku gihe yagennye, isohoze umugambi wayo wo kwegurira Kristo ibintu byose abibere Umutware, ari ibiri mu ijuru cyangwa ibiri ku isi." 
Ephesians1:11 Muri we Imana yaradutoranyije ngo tube umwihariko wayo, ikurikije imigambi yayo yo gukora byose uko ishaka." 
Ephesians1:12 Kwari ukugira ngo twebwe ababanje kwiringira Kristo dushimishe Imana, tuyiheshe n'ikuzo." 
Ephesians1:13 Muri we kandi mwebwe mwumvise Ijambo ry'ukuri, ari ryo Butumwa bwiza bubazanira agakiza. Muri we na none mumaze kubwemera, Imana yabashyizeho ikimenyetso kigaragaza ko muri abayo bwite, ni cyo Mwuka Muziranenge yabasezeranyije." 
Ephesians1:14 Ni na we musogongero w'umunani tuzahabwa, ubwo Imana izacungura burundu abo yagize abayo, kugira ngo biyiheshe ishimwe n'ikuzo." 
Ephesians1:15 Ni cyo gituma nanjye, aho mariye kumva ukuntu mwizera Nyagasani Yezu n'urukundo mukunda intore z'Imana zose," 
Ephesians1:16 ntahwema gushimira Imana kubera mwebwe. 
Ephesians1:17 Uko nsenze ndabibuka nkabasabira ngo Imana y'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo, ari yo Data nyir'ikuzo, ibahe Mwuka utanga ubwenge kugira ngo ayibahishurire muyimenye neza." 
Ephesians1:18 Abahumure imitima musobanukirwe ibyo kwiringirwa Imana yabahamagariye, kandi mumenye ukuntu umunani yateganyirije intore zayo ufite ikuzo ritagira urugero," 
Ephesians1:19 mumenye kandi ububasha bwayo bukomeye butagereranywa ikoresha muri twe abayizera. Ubwo ni bwo bushobozi budukoreramo, ari na bwo mbaraga zayo" 
Ephesians1:20 yakoresheje muri Kristo, ubwo yamuzuraga mu bapfuye ikamushyira iburyo bwayo ku ntebe ya cyami, “ahantu ho mu ijuru”." 
Ephesians1:21 Yahaye Kristo gusumba bihanitse ibinyabutware byose n'ibinyabushobozi n'ibinyabubasha n'ibinyabutegetsi, ndetse n'izina ryose rishobora kuvugwa atari muri iki gihe gusa, ahubwo no mu bihe bizaza." 
Ephesians1:22 Imana yeguriye Kristo ibintu byose ibishyira munsi y'ibirenge bye, imuha kugenga Umuryango wayo ku buryo bwose ngo awubere umutwe," 
Ephesians1:23 na wo umubere umubiri. Ni wo rero cyuzuzo cya Kristo, nk'uko muri we ibintu byose na byo biba byuzuye ku buryo bwose." 
Ephesians2:1 Namwe mwari mwarapfuye muzize ibicumuro n'ibyaha byanyu. 
Ephesians2:2 Ni byo mwabagamo, mukurikije imigenzereze y'iyi si, mukurikije n'Umugenga w'ibinyabutware byo mu kirere, ari we mwuka ukorera mu bantu batumvira Imana." 
Ephesians2:3 Natwe twese twabarirwaga muri abo, igihe twari tugikurikiza ibyo kamere yacu irarikira, tugakora iby'umubiri n'ibitekerezo byacu byifuza. Ku byerekeye kamere yacu, twari abo kurakaza Imana kimwe n'abandi bose." 
Ephesians2:4 Nyamara Imana yuje imbabazi, kubera urukundo rwinshi yadukunze," 
Ephesians2:5 yadusanze twarapfuye tuzize ibicumuro byacu, maze iduha ubugingo hamwe na Kristo – erega mwakijijwe n'ubuntu bwayo!" 
Ephesians2:6 Yatuzuranye na Kristo idushyira hamwe na we ku ntebe ya cyami “ahantu ho mu ijuru”, turi muri Kristo Yezu." 
Ephesians2:7 Kwari ukugira ngo mu bihe bizaza yerekane ubutunzi buhebuje bw'ubuntu bwayo, ikoresheje ineza itugirira muri Kristo Yezu." 
Ephesians2:8 Koko mwakijijwe n'ubuntu kuko mwizeye Kristo, ntibyakomotse muri mwe ahubwo ni impano y'Imana." 
Ephesians2:9 Ntibyakomotse kandi ku bikorwa byanyu, kugira ngo hatagira umuntu ubyiratana." 
Ephesians2:10 Imana ni yo yaduhanze ituremera muri Kristo Yezu, kugira ngo dukore ibyiza yaduteganyirije kera ngo tujye tugenza dutyo." 
Ephesians2:11 Mwebwe abanyamahanga, abo Abayahudi bita “abatakebwe”, bo bakirata kwa gukebwa kwabo ko ku mubiri, mwibuke rero" 
Ephesians2:12 uko kera mwari mumeze. Mwariho mudafite Kristo nta sano mufitanye n'Abisiraheli, nta ruhare mufite ku byasezeranywe bishingiye ku Isezerano Imana yagiranye n'ubwoko bwayo. Mwari ku isi nta Mana mufite, nta cyo mwiringiye na busa." 
Ephesians2:13 Mwari kure yayo, ariko ubu muri Kristo Yezu mwigijwe hafi n'amaraso yamennye kubera mwe." 
Ephesians2:14 Kristo ni we mahoro yacu, abari babiri yatugize umwe, atanga umubiri we ngo akureho urwangano, ari rwo rusika rwadutandukanyaga." 
Ephesians2:15 Yavanyeho Amategeko hamwe n'amabwiriza n'imigereka yayo, kugira ngo muri we Umuyahudi n'utari Umuyahudi, bombi abagire umuntu umwe mushya. Uko ni ko yazanye amahoro." 
Ephesians2:16 Ku bw'urupfu rwe rwo ku musaraba, abo bombi yabunze n'Imana abagira umubiri umwe, bityo atsemba urwangano rwari hagati yabo." 
Ephesians2:17 Yaraje atangaza inkuru nziza y'amahoro, ayibwira mwebwe mwari kure y'Imana n'Abayahudi bari bugufi bwayo." 
Ephesians2:18 Ubu twese ni we utuma twegera Imana Data tubikesha Mwuka umwe. 
Ephesians2:19 Bityo rero ntimukiri abanyamahanga n'abimukira, ahubwo musangiye ubwenegihugu n'intore z'Imana, mukaba muri inzu yayo." 
Ephesians2:20 Mwubatswe nk'amabuye ku rufatiro rugizwe n'Intumwa za Kristo n'abahanuzi, Kristo Yezu akababera ibuye nsanganyarukuta." 
Ephesians2:21 Muri we ibuye ryose rifungana n'irindi inzu ikajya ejuru, ikaba Ingoro yeguriwe Nyagasani." 
Ephesians2:22 Bityo muri we namwe mwubakwa hamwe, kugira ngo mube inzu Imana ituramo ku buryo bwa Mwuka." 
Ephesians3:1 Ni cyo gituma jyewe Pawulo ndi imbohe mpōrwa Kristo Yezu, kubera mwebwe abatari Abayahudi." 
Ephesians3:2 Mwaba mwarumvise umurimo Imana yanshinze kubakorera, ibitewe n'ubuntu bwayo." 
Ephesians3:3 Yampishuriye ibanga ryayo irimenyesha neza. Namaze kubyandika mu magambo make," 
Ephesians3:4 muyasomye mubasha kwiyumvira ukuntu nasobanukiwe iryo banga rya Kristo. 
Ephesians3:5 Ni ibanga ritigeze rimenyeshwa abantu ba kera, ariko ubu Imana yarihishuriye intore zayo z'Intumwa n'abahanuzi, ikoresheje Mwuka wayo." 
Ephesians3:6 Iryo banga ni uko kubera Ubutumwa bwiza, abanyamahanga kimwe n'Abisiraheli bafite uruhare ku munani w'Imana, bakaba ingingo z'umubiri umwe kandi bagasangira ibyo yasezeranye muri Kristo Yezu." 
Ephesians3:7 Kubera ubuntu yangiriye n'impano yangabiye, nashinzwe umurimo wo kwamamaza ubwo Butumwa mbikesha ububasha bwayo butwarira muri jye." 
Ephesians3:8 Jyewe urutwa n'uworoheje cyane mu ntore z'Imana, yangiriye ubwo buntu bwo gutangariza abatari Abayahudi iyo nkuru nziza, yerekeye ubukungu buboneka muri Kristo burenze ubwenge bw'umuntu," 
Ephesians3:9 no gusobanurira abantu bose uko umugambi w'Imana ugomba gusohozwa. Uwo mugambi ni ibanga Imana Umuremyi wa byose yazigamye uhereye kera kose," 
Ephesians3:10 kugira ngo ubu imenyeshe ibinyabutware n'ibinyabushobozi “by'ahantu ho mu ijuru”, ubwenge bwayo bw'ingeri nyinshi ikoresheje Umuryango wayo." 
Ephesians3:11 Ni uko Imana yabikoze ikurikije umugambi wayo uhoraho, yateganyirije muri Kristo Yezu Umwami wacu." 
Ephesians3:12 Ni na we uduhesha uburenganzira bwo kwegera Imana nta cyo twishisha, bitewe n'icyizere tumufitiye." 
Ephesians3:13 Ni cyo gituma mbasaba kudacogozwa n'amakuba ndimo kubera mwe, kuko ari yo abazanira inyungu." 
Ephesians3:14 Ni yo mpamvu mpfukamira Imana Data," 
Ephesians3:15 uwo imiryango yose yo mu ijuru no ku isi ishingiyeho. 
Ephesians3:16 Ndayisaba ngo ikurikije ubwinshi bw'umutungo w'ikuzo ryayo, ibahe ububasha mukomezwe umutima mubikesha Mwuka wayo," 
Ephesians3:17 kugira ngo Kristo ature muri buri muntu bitewe n'uko amwizera. Ndasaba kandi ngo mushorere imizi mu rukundo rwe murwubakeho," 
Ephesians3:18 maze hamwe n'izindi ntore z'Imana zose, muhabwe ububasha bwo gusobanukirwa ubugari n'umurambararo by'urukundo rwa Kristo, ndetse n'ubujyakuzimu n'ubuhagarike bwarwo." 
Ephesians3:19 Ni bwo muzamenya urwo rukundo rwe rurenze ubwenge bw'umuntu, bityo mwuzuzwe kamere yose y'Imana ibasenderemo." 
Ephesians3:20 Nuko rero Imana ibasha gukora ibirenze kure ibyo twasaba, ndetse n'ibyo twakwibwira byose ibigirishije ububasha bwayo bukorera muri twe," 
Ephesians3:21 nihabwe ikuzo mu Muryango wayo no muri Kristo Yezu iteka ryose, uko ibihe bihaye ibindi. Amina." 
Ephesians4:1 Noneho jyewe imbohe ihōrwa Nyagasani, ndabinginga mujye mugenza uko bikwiye mukurikije ibyo Imana yabahamagariye." 
Ephesians4:2 Mwicishe bugufi rwose, mwiyoroshye kandi mwihangane, mugire n'urukundo rubatera kwihanganirana." 
Ephesians4:3 Muharanire kugumana ubumwe butangwa na Mwuka w'Imana, amahoro abe ari yo mugozi ubafatanya." 
Ephesians4:4 Umubiri wa Kristo ni umwe, Mwuka na we ni umwe nk'uko icyo mwiringira ari kimwe, ari na cyo Imana yabahamagariye." 
Ephesians4:5 Nyagasani ni umwe, ukuri twemera ni kumwe, ukubatiza na ko ni kumwe," 
Ephesians4:6 kandi Imana ni imwe ari yo Mubyeyi wa bose, igenga bose, igakoresha bose kandi ikaba muri bose." 
Ephesians4:7 Buri muntu muri twe yagabiwe impano imukwiye, bikurikije ubuntu Kristo agira." 
Ephesians4:8 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Igihe yazamukaga akajya hejuru, yajyanyeyo imfungwa ho iminyago, maze aha abantu impano.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Ariko iryo jambo “yazamukaga” rivuga iki? Ese si ukuvuga se ko yabanje kumanuka akagera ikuzimu? 
Ephesians4:10 Uwamanutse ni na we wazamutse ajya hejuru y'amajuru yose, kugira ngo yuzure ibyaremwe byose." 
Ephesians4:11 Nuko aha bamwe kuba Intumwa ze, abandi ngo babe abahanuzi, abandi ngo babe abatangaza Ubutumwa bwiza, naho abandi ngo babe abashumba n'abigisha." 
Ephesians4:12 Abigenza atyo kugira ngo intore z'Imana zitegurirwe gukora umurimo wayo, maze zubake Umubiri wa Kristo." 
Ephesians4:13 Bityo igihe nikigera, twese tuzashyike ku rugero rw'ubumwe buva ku kwemera Umwana w'Imana no kumumenya byuzuye, kugira ngo tube abantu bahamye bageze ku rugero rwuzuye rwa Kristo." 
Ephesians4:14 Ubwo ntituzaba tukiri abana ngo duteraganwe hirya no hino n'imiyaga ibonetse yose, ari yo myigishirize y'abantu bashukana biyubikije uburyarya buyobya." 
Ephesians4:15 Ahubwo nituvuga ukuri tubitewe n'urukundo tuzakura ku buryo bwose, twunze ubumwe na Kristo ari we Mutwe w'Umubiri." 
Ephesians4:16 Umutwe ni wo ugenga ingingo z'umubiri zose, ugatuma zihurizwa hamwe zigahuza imikorere, zibikesha imitsi iwukomeza ikawutunga, bityo buri rugingo rugakora umurimo rugenewe, maze umubiri wose ugakura ukiyubaka. Byose biterwa n'urukundo." 
Ephesians4:17 Ibi ni byo mvuga kandi nemeza mbikomora kuri Nyagasani: nimureke kugenza nk'abatazi Imana bakurikiza ibitekerezo byabo bitagira umumaro," 
Ephesians4:18 kandi n'ubwenge bwabo bwararindagiye. Baciye ukubiri n'ubugingo buva ku Mana, kubera ubujiji bwabo n'imitima inangiye." 
Ephesians4:19 Bataye isoni biroha mu bwomanzi, bigeza aho birundurira mu kwiyandarika k'uburyo bwose kuzanwa no kurarikira." 
Ephesians4:20 Naho mwebwe uko si ko mwamenyeshejwe Kristo. 
Ephesians4:21 Ni iby'ukuri, ibye mwarabyumvise mwigishwa uko ateye, bikurikije ukuri kubonerwa muri Yezu." 
Ephesians4:22 Noneho nimwiyambure kamere yanyu ya kera yagengaga imigenzereze mwari mufite, kuko iyo kamere igenda ibonona kubera ibyifuzo byayo bishukana." 
Ephesians4:23 Ahubwo muhindurwe bashya mu bugingo no mu bitekerezo. 
Ephesians4:24 Mwambare kamere nshya mumere nk'uko Imana ishaka, iyo kamere irangwa n'ubutungane n'ubuziranenge bikomoka ku kuri." 
Ephesians4:25 Ni cyo gituma mugomba kwiyambura n'ibinyoma, umuntu wese ajye abwiza mugenzi we ukuri, kuko twese turi ingingo z'umubiri umwe." 
Ephesians4:26 Kandi nimurakara ntibikabatere gukora icyaha, ndetse izuba ntirikarenge mukirakaye!" 
Ephesians4:27 Ntimugahe Satani urwaho. 
Ephesians4:28 Uwibaga ntakongere kwiba, ahubwo yihatire gukora ibyiza akoresheje amaboko ye, kugira ngo abone icyo afashisha uje akennye." 
Ephesians4:29 Ntimukagire ijambo ribi na rimwe muvuga, ahubwo mujye muvuga ijambo ryose ryakubaka ubugingo bw'abandi nk'uko babikeneye, kugira ngo rigirire akamaro abaryumva." 
Ephesians4:30 Ntimugashavuze Mwuka Muziranenge Imana yabahaye ho ikimenyetso kibaranga, kugeza ku Munsi wo gucungurwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Mwamaganire kure icyitwa ukwishaririza, uburakari n'umujinya, intonganya no gusebanya, kimwe n'ubugome bw'uburyo bwose." 
Ephesians4:32 Ahubwo mugirirane impuhwe n'ineza, mubabarirane nk'uko namwe Imana yabababariye muri Kristo." 
Ephesians5:1 Kuko muri abana b'Imana ikunda cyane, mujye mukurikiza icyitegererezo cyayo." 
Ephesians5:2 Mujye mugenza nk'uko Kristo yadukunze, akitanga ngo atubere ituro n'igitambo bifite impumuro nziza ishimisha Imana." 
Ephesians5:3 Muri intore z'Imana, bityo rero ubusambanyi no kwiyandarika kose cyangwa irari ry'ibintu, ntibikigere bivugwa muri mwe." 
Ephesians5:4 Ntimukavuge amagambo ateye isoni cyangwa amateshwa, cyangwa amahomvu ahubwo mujye muvuga ibishimisha Imana." 
Ephesians5:5 Mumenye ibi: umusambanyi wese n'ukora ibiteye isoni n'umunyamururumba (ni cyo kimwe no gusenga ibigirwamana), abo bose nta munani bazagira mu bwami bwa Kristo n'ubw'Imana." 
Ephesians5:6 Ntihakagire umuntu ubashukisha amagambo y'imburamumaro, kuko ibimeze bityo ari byo bituma Imana irakarira abatayumvira." 
Ephesians5:7 Nuko rero muramenye ntimugafatanye na bo. 
Ephesians5:8 Kera mwahoze mu mwijima, ariko none ubu muri mu mucyo kubera Nyagasani. Nuko rero mujye mugenza nk'abari mu mucyo koko." 
Ephesians5:9 Erega umucyo ni wo sōko y'ingeso nziza zose n'ubutungane n'ukuri! 
Ephesians5:10 Mushishoze maze mumenye ibishimisha Nyagasani. 
Ephesians5:11 Ntimukagire uruhare mu bikorwa by'imburamumaro bikorerwa mu mwijima, ahubwo mujye mubishyira ahagaragara." 
Ephesians5:12 Erega ibyo bakora rwihishwa no kubivuga biteye isoni! 
Ephesians5:13 Nyamara ibintu byose iyo bishyizwe ahagaragara, biboneka neza uko biteye" 
Ephesians5:14 kuko umucyo utuma byose biboneka. Ni cyo gituma bivugwa ngo: “Wowe usinziriye kanguka, uzuke uve mu bapfuye, maze Kristo akumurikire!”" 
Ephesians5:15 Muzirikane rero imigenzereze yanyu mutagenza nk'injiji, ahubwo mugenze nk'abanyabwenge," 
Ephesians5:16 mukoresha neza igihe mufite kuko iyi minsi ari mibi. 
Ephesians5:17 Noneho rero, ntimukabe abapfu, ahubwo mujye mumenya neza ibyo Nyagasani ashaka." 
Ephesians5:18 Ntimugasinde inzoga kuko zitera kwiyandarika, ahubwo mwuzure Mwuka w'Imana." 
Ephesians5:19 Mubwirane zaburi n'indirimbo z'ibisingizo n'izahimbwe zikomoka kuri Mwuka, muririmbire Nyagasani kandi mumucurangire mubikuye ku mutima." 
Ephesians5:20 Igihe cyose mujye mushimira Imana Data ibintu byose, mu izina ry'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
Ephesians5:21 Mujye mwubahana mubitewe no gutinya Kristo. 
Ephesians5:22 Bagore, mwubahe abagabo mwashakanye nk'uko mwubaha Nyagasani." 
Ephesians5:23 Umugabo ni we mutwe akagenga umugore we, nk'uko Kristo ari umutwe akagenga umubiri we, ari wo Muryango abereye Umukiza." 
Ephesians5:24 Nuko rero abagore bagomba kubaha abagabo bashakanye ku buryo bwose, nk'uko Umuryango wa Kristo umwubaha." 
Ephesians5:25 Bagabo, mukunde abagore mwashakanye nk'uko Kristo yakunze Umuryango we akawupfira." 
Ephesians5:26 Kwari ukugira ngo awiyegurire, aweze awuhagije amazi akoresheje Ijambo rye," 
Ephesians5:27 uwo Muryango ari wo Mugeni we, awishyingire ufite ikuzo, nta kizinga, nta munkanyari, cyangwa ikindi cyose gisa gityo, ahubwo uboneye udafite inenge." 
Ephesians5:28 Uko ni ko abagabo bagomba gukunda abagore bashakanye, nk'uko bakunda imibiri yabo. Ukunda umugore we aba yikunze." 
Ephesians5:29 Nta muntu wanga umubiri we bibaho, ahubwo arawugaburira, akawukundwakaza nk'uko Kristo agirira Umuryango we," 
Ephesians5:30 kandi ni twe ngingo z'uwo Mubiri we. 
Ephesians5:31 Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina akabana n'umugore we akaramata, bombi bakaba umuntu umwe.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Iryo ni ibanga rikomeye, ariko jye ndemeza ko rireba Kristo n'Umuryango we." 
Ephesians5:33 Icyakora namwe rirabareba. Umugabo wese muri mwe akunde umugore we nk'uko yikunda, kandi n'umugore na we yubahe umugabo we." 
Ephesians6:1 Bana, mujye mwumvira ababyeyi banyu kuko ari byo bikwiriye aba Nyagasani." 
Ephesians6:2 “Ujye wubaha so na nyoko” – ni ryo tegeko rya mbere ririmo Isezerano – 
Ephesians6:3 “bityo uzagubwa neza kandi urame ku isi.” 
Ephesians6:4 Namwe babyeyi, ntimukarakaze abana banyu ahubwo mubarere neza, mubamenyereza kandi mubagezaho inyigisho za Nyagasani." 
Ephesians6:5 Mwebwe nkoreragahato, mujye mwumvira ba shobuja bo ku isi mubikuye ku mutima nk'abakorera Kristo, mutinya kandi muhinda umushyitsi." 
Ephesians6:6 Ntimugakorere ijisho nk'abashaka gushimisha abantu, ahubwo mukore uko Imana ishaka mubikuye ku mutima nk'abagaragu ba Kristo." 
Ephesians6:7 Imirimo y'agahato mukoreshwa muyikorane umutima ukunze nk'abakorera Nyagasani, atari nk'abakorera abantu." 
Ephesians6:8 Muzirikane ko icyiza cyose umuntu akora, yaba inkoreragahato cyangwa uwigenga, azagihemberwa na Nyagasani." 
Ephesians6:9 Namwe bakoresha, mugirire mutyo abo mukoresha mureke kubashyiraho iterabwoba. Muzirikane ko ari mwe ari n'abo mukoresha, mufite Shobuja umwe uba mu ijuru, ufata abantu bose kimwe." 
Ephesians6:10 Ahasigaye mushake amaboko kuri Nyagasani no ku bubasha bwe bukomeye. 
Ephesians6:11 Mwitwaze intwaro z'Imana kugira ngo mubashe guhagarara kigabo, mudatsinzwe n'uburiganya bwa Satani" 
Ephesians6:12 kuko ibyo turwana na byo atari abantu, ahubwo ni ibinyabutware n'ibinyabushobozi, ni ibihangange bitegeka iyi si y'umwijima, ari byo za ngabo zigira nabi ziba “ahantu ho mu ijuru”." 
Ephesians6:13 Ni cyo gituma mukwiye gufata intwaro zose z'Imana. Bityo igihe cy'iminsi mibi muzabashe guhangana na wa Mwanzi, maze byose birangiye mube muhagaze mudatsinzwe." 
Ephesians6:14 Nuko rero nimuhagarare kigabo, mukenyeye ukuri mwambaye n'ikoti ry'icyuma rikingiriza igituza, ari ryo butungane." 
Ephesians6:15 Naho mu birenge mube mwambaye inkweto, ari zo mwete wo gutangaza Ubutumwa bwiza bw'amahoro." 
Ephesians6:16 Muhore mwitwaje ingabo ari yo kwizera Kristo, kugira ngo mubashe kuzimya ya myambi yose yaka umuriro iraswa na Sekibi." 
Ephesians6:17 Mwambare ingofero y'icyuma ari yo gakiza, kandi mwitwaze inkota muhabwa na Mwuka ari yo Jambo ry'Imana." 
Ephesians6:18 Byose mubikore musenga ku buryo bwose mwinginga Imana. Ibihe byose muyambaze muvugishwa na Mwuka. Mugumye kuba maso, mushishikarire gusabira intore z'Imana zose." 
Ephesians6:19 Nanjye mujye munsabira kugira ngo uko mbumbuye umunwa, Imana impe amagambo akwiriye ngo menyeshe abantu ibanga ry'Ubutumwa bwiza nta mususu." 
Ephesians6:20 No kuri iyi ngoyi ubwo Butumwa ni bwo mpagarariye. Munsabire kugira ngo mbuvuge nshize amanga, uko bikwiye." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikiko umuvandimwe nkunda n'umugaragu w'indahemuka wa Nyagasani, azabagezaho amakuru yanjye yose ngo mumenye ibyo nkora." 
Ephesians6:22 Ni na yo mpamvu muboherereje, kugira ngo mumenye uko tumerewe kandi abakomeze." 
Ephesians6:23 Amahoro n'urukundo hamwe n'ukwizera, bikomoka ku Mana Data no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristo, bibe ku bavandimwe bose." 
Ephesians6:24 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kugirira ubuntu abantu bose bamukunda urukundo rudatezuka. 
Philippians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo na Timoteyo abagaragu ba Kristo Yezu, turabaramukije mwebwe ntore z'Imana ziri muri Kristo Yezu zo mu mujyi wa Filipi, hamwe n'abayobozi b'itorero ry'Imana n'abadiyakoni baryo." 
Philippians1:2 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu, ibahe n'amahoro ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
Philippians1:3 Nshimira Imana yanjye igihe cyose mbibutse," 
Philippians1:4 iteka iyo nsenze mbasabira mwese nezerewe," 
Philippians1:5 mbitewe n'uruhare mufite kimwe nanjye rwo kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza kuva bigitangira kugeza n'ubu. 
Philippians1:6 Ndemeza ko Imana yatangiye uwo murimo mwiza muri mwe izawukora, ikawunonosora kugeza umunsi Kristo Yezu azaza." 
Philippians1:7 Sinabura kubagiraho mwese ibitekerezo nk'ibyo kuko mbahoza ku mutima. Mwese mufite uruhare ku buntu Imana yangiriye, haba ubu ndi ku ngoyi cyangwa igihe nari ngifite uburenganzira bwo kurwanira Ubutumwa bwiza, kugira ngo bushinge imizi muri mwe." 
Philippians1:8 Imana ni yo ntanze ho umugabo ko mbakumbuye mwese, mbitewe n'urukundo rwa Kristo Yezu rundimo." 
Philippians1:9 Icyo mbasabira kandi ni ukugira ngo urukundo rwanyu rurusheho kugwira ngo mumenye byose, musobanukirwe byose," 
Philippians1:10 kugira ngo mushobore gusuzuma ibintu, mumenye ikirushije ibindi gutungana. Bityo muzabe mudafite amakemwa cyangwa umugayo umunsi Kristo azaza," 
Philippians1:11 ahubwo muzabe mwareze imbuto z'ubutungane, zihesha Imana ikuzo n'ishimwe mubikesha Yezu Kristo." 
Philippians1:12 Bavandimwe, ndashaka kubamenyesha ko ibyambayeho byatumye Ubutumwa bwiza butera imbere," 
Philippians1:13 ku buryo abo mu ngoro y'umwami w'i Roma bose, ndetse na rubanda rwose bamenye ko nafunzwe mpōrwa Kristo." 
Philippians1:14 Ikindi kandi izi ngoyi zanjye zatumye abenshi mu bavandimwe bakomera kuri Nyagasani, maze barushaho kuvuga Ijambo ry'Imana bashize amanga." 
Philippians1:15 Icyakora bamwe batangaza ibyerekeye Kristo babitewe n'ishyari n'amakimbirane, ariko abandi bakabikora babikuye ku mutima." 
Philippians1:16 Abo babiterwa n'urukundo bazirikana ko nashinzwe kurwanira Ubutumwa bwiza. 
Philippians1:17 Naho ba bandi batangaza ibya Kristo, babiterwa no gushaka kwishyira imbere n'izindi mpamvu zitaboneye, bibwira ko binyongerera imibabaro yo kuba ku ngoyi." 
Philippians1:18 Mbese bitwaye iki? Baba babiterwa n'urwitwazo cyangwa n'ukuri, uko biri kose Kristo aramamazwa. Ibyo biranshimisha kandi bizakomeza kunshimisha." 
Philippians1:19 Icyo nzi cyo ni uko bizamviramo agakiza, mbikesha amasengesho yanyu no gufashwa na Mwuka wa Yezu Kristo." 
Philippians1:20 Dore icyo mfitiye amatsiko kandi niringiye kuzabona: nta kizatuma nkorwa n'isoni. Ahubwo ubu nk'uko bisanzwe nzakomeza kuvuga nshize amanga, kugira ngo naho nabaho cyangwa napfa, imibereho yanjye iheshe Kristo ikuzo ryinshi." 
Philippians1:21 Ku bwanjye kubaho ni Kristo, naho gupfa byambera inyungu." 
Philippians1:22 Nyamara niba kubaho kwanjye kwatuma nkomeza gukora umurimo w'ingirakamaro, sinzi icyo nahitamo." 
Philippians1:23 Mpeze hagati nk'ururimi. Kimwe cyo ndifuza gutabaruka ngo nibanire na Kristo, ndetse ni cyo cyambera cyiza bihebuje," 
Philippians1:24 nyamara mwebwe icyarushaho kubagirira akamaro ni uko nagumya kubaho. 
Philippians1:25 Icyo nemeza kandi nzi neza ni uko nzagumya kubaho no kubana namwe mwese, kugira ngo mutere imbere kandi mwishimire Kristo Yezu mwemeye," 
Philippians1:26 maze muri we ishema ryanyu risesure kubera jyewe kuko nzaba ngarutse muri mwe. 
Philippians1:27 Gusa mujye mukora ibikwiranye n'Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo, kugira ngo ndamutse nje kubasura cyangwa ntaje, nzumve ko mukomeye, muhuje umugambi, mushyize hamwe gushishikarira kwizera Kristo mubikesha Ubutumwa bwiza." 
Philippians1:28 Ntimugaterwe ubwoba n'ababarwanya, ni cyo kizabera abo bantu icyemezo kivuye ku Mana ko bazarimbuka, naho mwe kibabere icyemezo ko muzakizwa." 
Philippians1:29 Koko kandi Imana yabagiriye ubuntu ni yo ibaha gukorera Kristo, atari ukumwemera gusa, ariko kandi ibaha no kubabazwa ari we muhōrwa." 
Philippians1:30 Iyo ntambara murwana ni iyo mwasanze ndwana, kandi nk'uko mwabyumvise na n'ubu ndacyayirwana." 
Philippians2:1 Mbese mwahawe gukomera kuri Kristo? Ese urukundo rwe rujya rubarema agatima? Mbese Mwuka we yabahaye gushyira hamwe? Ese mugirirana impuhwe n'ibambe? 
Philippians2:2 Nuko rero mugire amatwara amwe, mukundane kimwe, muhuze umutima n'inama, ni bwo muzatuma ibyishimo byanjye bisendera." 
Philippians2:3 Ntimukagire icyo mukora mubiterwa no kwishyira imbere cyangwa kwikuza, ahubwo mujye mwiyoroshya, umuntu wese yibwire ko mugenzi we amuruta." 
Philippians2:4 Umuntu wese yirinde kuzirikana ibye gusa, ahubwo ajye azirikana n'iby'abandi." 
Philippians2:5 Mujye mugira amatwara nk'aya Kristo Yezu. 
Philippians2:6 We nubwo yari asanzwe afite kamere y'Imana, ntiyigeze yibwira ko guhwana na yo ari ikintu cyo kugundīrwa." 
Philippians2:7 Ahubwo yaretse ibye byose, ahinduka nk'umuntu, ndetse afata kamere y'inkoreragahato. Yabonetse ameze nk'umuntu," 
Philippians2:8 yicisha bugufi arumvira, ntiyanga no gupfa, ndetse apfa abambwe ku musaraba." 
Philippians2:9 Ni cyo cyatumye Imana imushyira hejuru cyane, imuha n'ikuzo risumba iry'abandi bose," 
Philippians2:10 kugira ngo mu ijuru no ku isi ndetse n'ikuzimu, bose bapfukamire Yezu bamuramye," 
Philippians2:11 bose bamwogeze mu ruhame, bemeze ko Yezu Kristo ari we Nyagasani, ngo biheshe Imana Se ikuzo." 
Philippians2:12 Mwebwe abo nkunda cyane, iteka mwumviraga Imana, nimukomeze rero kuyumvira atari igihe turi kumwe gusa, ahubwo n'ubu tutari kumwe. Mujye mushyira agakiza kanyu mu bikorwa mutinya kandi muhinda umushyitsi," 
Philippians2:13 kuko Imana ari yo ubwayo itwarira muri mwe kugira ngo mushake kandi mukore ibyo yagambiriye. 
Philippians2:14 Mukore byose mutinuba kandi mutagirana impaka," 
Philippians2:15 kugira ngo mube abana b'Imana batagira umugayo, baboneye, batagira amakemwa, batuye mu bantu b'iki gihe b'abahemu n'abagizi ba nabi, mubabere nk'imuri zimurikira isi," 
Philippians2:16 mubagezaho Ijambo ry'ubugingo. Ibyo bizantera kubiratana ku munsi Kristo azaza, byerekane ko ntirukiye ubusa cyangwa ngo mvunikire ubundi." 
Philippians2:17 Ahari amaraso yanjye azagomba gusukwa ku gitambo mutura Imana, ari wo murimo muyikorera mubitewe no kwemera Kristo. Bibaye bityo nzabyishimira ngo namwe mwese mwishimane nanjye." 
Philippians2:18 Namwe ni uko nimwishime, kugira ngo nanjye nishimane namwe." 
Philippians2:19 Nyagasani Yezu nabishaka niringiye ko bidatinze nzashobora kubatumaho Timoteyo, kugira ngo angezeho inkuru yanyu impumurize." 
Philippians2:20 Ni we wenyine mfite duhuje kubakunda, kandi wita by'ukuri ku byanyu." 
Philippians2:21 Abandi bose baharanira inyungu zabo bwite, aho guharanira iza Yezu Kristo." 
Philippians2:22 Muzi ko Timoteyo yerekanye ko ari ingirakamaro, akorana nanjye umurimo w'Ubutumwa bwiza nk'uko umwana akorana na se." 
Philippians2:23 Ni we rero niringiye kuzabatumaho nimara kumenya aho ibyanjye byerekeye. 
Philippians2:24 Ubundi kandi ndemeza ko Nyagasani nabishaka, ntazatinda kuza iwanyu." 
Philippians2:25 Nabonye ko ari ngombwa kubatumaho umuvandimwe Epafurodito dufatanyije umurimo, kandi turi kumwe ku rugamba. Ni intumwa yanyu mwohereje kugira ngo ankorere kuko nari mukeneye." 
Philippians2:26 Yari abakumbuye mwese kandi ababajwe cyane n'uko mwumvise ko arwaye. 
Philippians2:27 Koko yari arwaye yenda gupfa, ariko Imana ikinga ukuboko. Si we wenyine yabigiriye, nanjye yarabingiriye kugira ngo ne kwicwa n'agahinda kageretse ku kandi." 
Philippians2:28 Ni yo mpamvu ndushaho kumva ari ngombwa kumuboherereza, kugira ngo nimumubona muzongere kwishima, bityo nanjye nshire agahinda." 
Philippians2:29 Muramwakire rero mwishimye nk'umuvandimwe muri Nyagasani, kandi umuntu wese nk'uwo mujye mumwubaha." 
Philippians2:30 Erega yari agiye gupfa azize umurimo wa Kristo, yigerejeho ngo yuzuze ibyo mutari kunshoborera ubwanyu!" 
Philippians3:1 Ahasigaye bavandimwe, mwishimire muri Nyagasani. Sindambirwa kubandikira ibintu mbisubiramo, igihe bibafitiye akamaro." 
Philippians3:2 Mwirinde za mbwa ari zo bagizi ba nabi, bakunda ibyo kwikebagura." 
Philippians3:3 Ahubwo ni twe twakebwe by'ukuri twe dusenga Imana tubikesha Mwuka wayo, tukirata Kristo Yezu wenyine aho kwiyemera ubwacu." 
Philippians3:4 Jyewe mfite impamvu zatuma niyemera ubwanjye. Haramutse hagize uwibwira ko afite impamvu zo kwiyemera, jyewe namuhiga." 
Philippians3:5 Umva nawe: nakebwe ku munsi wa munani. Ndi Umwisiraheli kavukire wo mu muryango wa Benyamini, ndi n'Umuheburayi butwi. Ku byerekeye gukurikiza Amategeko ndi Umufarizayi," 
Philippians3:6 naho ku byerekeye ishyaka, natotezaga Umuryango wa Kristo. Ku byerekeye ubutungane buzanwa n'Amategeko, nari inyangamugayo." 
Philippians3:7 Nyamara ibyari bimfitiye inyungu, mbibara ko ari igihombo kubera Kristo." 
Philippians3:8 Ndetse ibintu byose mbibara ko ari igihombo, iyo mbigereranyije n'ubukungu buhebuje buzanwa no kumenya Kristo Yezu Umwami wanjye. Kubera we nemeye guhara ibyo nitaga inyungu zanjye byose, maze mbibara nk'amazirantoki kugira ngo nunguke Kristo," 
Philippians3:9 kandi mpore muri we ntiratana ubutungane buzanwa no gukurikiza Amategeko, ahubwo nirata ubutungane buzanwa no kwizera Kristo, ari bwo Imana itanga bushingiye ku kumwemera." 
Philippians3:10 Icyo ngamije ni ukumenya Kristo n'ububasha bwo kuzuka kwe, no gusangira na we kubabazwa nkamera nka we mu rupfu rwe," 
Philippians3:11 bityo nkaba niringiye kuzazurwa mu bapfuye. 
Philippians3:12 Si ukuvuga ko namaze kugera kuri ibyo cyangwa ngo mbe naramaze kuba indakemwa, ahubwo ndacyahatana kugira ngo mbishyikire nk'uko nanjye Kristo Yezu yanshyikiriye." 
Philippians3:13 Bavandimwe, sintekereza ko namaze kubishyikira. Oya, ahubwo icyo nkora ni kimwe, nibagirwa ibyahise maze nkihatira gusingira ibiri imbere." 
Philippians3:14 Ndaharanira kugera aho dutanguranwa ngo negukane igihembo Imana imfitiye mu ijuru, mbikesha Kristo Yezu ari na byo yampamagariye." 
Philippians3:15 Twese rero ab'indakemwa nitubifate dutyo, kandi niba hari ibyo bamwe muri mwe bafashe ukundi Imana izabibahishurira." 
Philippians3:16 Uko biri kose dukomereze aho tugeze twe gucogora. 
Philippians3:17 Bavandimwe, mwese mugenze nkatwe kandi abakurikiza icyitegererezo twabahaye mube ari bo muhanga amaso." 
Philippians3:18 Nabibabwiye kenshi n'ubu nongeye kubibabwira mbogoza amarira: abenshi babaye abanzi b'umusaraba wa Kristo. 
Philippians3:19 Iherezo ryabo ni ukurimbuka kuko imana yabo ari inda, ibiteye isoni bakora bikaba ari byo birata, bahoza umutima ku by'isi." 
Philippians3:20 Naho twe iwacu ni mu ijuru, aho Umukiza dutegereje azava ari we Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
Philippians3:21 Azahindura iyi mibiri yacu yoroheje ayigire nk'uwe ufite ikuzo, akoresheje ububasha butuma ashobora kwigarurira ibintu byose." 
Philippians4:1 Nuko rero bavandimwe nkunda kandi nkumbuye, mwebwe kamba natsindiye kandi nishimira, nimuhagarare kigabo bakundwa, mukomere muri Nyagasani." 
Philippians4:2 Ewodiya na Sintike, ndabinginze, nimuhurize imitima kuri Nyagasani." 
Philippians4:3 Kandi nawe mugenzi wanjye dufatanyije umurimo ndagusaba gufasha abo bagore, kuko bafatanyije nanjye kurwanira Ubutumwa bwiza, bo na Kilementi n'abandi twakoranye amazina yabo akaba yanditswe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo." 
Philippians4:4 Mugumye kwishimira muri Nyagasani. Reka mbisubiremo, nimwishime." 
Philippians4:5 Ineza yanyu imenywe n'abantu bose. Nyagasani ari hafi kugaruka. 
Philippians4:6 Ntimukagire ikibahagarika umutima, ahubwo igihe cyose mumenyeshe Imana ibyo mukeneye muyisaba, muyinginga kandi muyishimira." 
Philippians4:7 Bityo amahoro y'Imana asumba kure ubwenge bw'umuntu, arindire imitima yanyu n'ibitekerezo byanyu muri Kristo Yezu." 
Philippians4:8 Ahasigaye bavandimwe, icyitwa ingeso nziza cyose n'igikwiye gushimwa cyose, ni iby'ukuri n'ibikwiye icyubahiro, ibitunganye n'ibiboneye, ibikundwa n'ibivugwa neza abe ari byo muhoza ku mutima." 
Philippians4:9 Ibyo nabigishije rero n'ibyo nabagejejeho, ibyo mwanyumvanye n'ibyo mwambonanye, ibyo byose mube ari byo mukora, kandi Imana itanga amahoro izabana namwe." 
Philippians4:10 Nishimiye cyane muri Nyagasani kuko noneho mwongeye kunzirikana. Erega n'ubundi mwaranzirikanaga, ariko mukabura uko mubingaragariza!" 
Philippians4:11 Ibyo simbivugishwa n'ubukene, kuko uko ndi kose nimenyereje kunyurwa n'ibyo mfite." 
Philippians4:12 Nzi kubaho gikene nzi no kubaho gikungu. Aho ndi hose n'uko byamera kose namenyereye guhaga no gusonza, menyera kugira ibisagutse no kugira bike." 
Philippians4:13 Mbashishwa byose na Kristo untera imbaraga. 
Philippians4:14 Nyamara mwagize neza ubwo mwifatanyaga nanjye mu makuba nagize. 
Philippians4:15 Banyafilipi, igihe nari mvuye muri Masedoniya ngitangira kuhatangaza Ubutumwa bwiza, muzi ko ari mwe muryango wa Kristo wonyine wagize uruhare ku byo nungukaga no ku byo nahombaga" 
Philippians4:16 Nkiri i Tesaloniki ni mwe mwanyoherereje ibyo nari nkeneye, ndetse si rimwe gusa mwabikoze." 
Philippians4:17 Erega ntabwo ari imfashanyo zanyu nkurikiranye, ahubwo nifuza ko mwebwe murushaho kunguka." 
Philippians4:18 Ubundi kandi ibyo mwanyoherereje narabishyikiriye ndetse birasaguka. Ibyo nari nkeneye byose ndabifite, kuva igihe Epafurodito yangezagaho ibyo mwamumpereye. Ni ituro rifite impumuro nziza, ni igitambo Imana yemera kandi yishimira." 
Philippians4:19 Namwe Imana yanjye ntizabura kubahundazaho ibyo kubakenura byose, nk'uko umutungo wayo uhebuje uri muri Kristo Yezu ungana." 
Philippians4:20 Nuko ikuzo ribe iry'Imana Data uko ibihe bihaye ibindi. Amina. 
Philippians4:21 Mudutahirize intore z'Imana zose ziri muri Kristo Yezu. Abavandimwe bose turi kumwe barabatashya. 
Philippians4:22 Intore z'Imana z'ino zose zirabatashya, cyane cyane izo mu rugo rw'umwami w'i Roma." 
Philippians4:23 Nyagasani Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu. 
Colossians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse, n'umuvandimwe Timoteyo," 
Colossians1:2 turabaramukije mwebwe ntore z'Imana z'i Kolosi Kristo yagize abavandimwe b'indahemuka. Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu, ibahe n'amahoro, [ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo]." 
Colossians1:3 Iyo tubasabira duhora dushimira Imana Se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo," 
Colossians1:4 kuko twumvise ko mwemeye Kristo Yezu mugakunda n'intore z'Imana," 
Colossians1:5 mubitewe no kwiringira ibyo mwabikiwe mu ijuru. Ibyo mwabimenyeshejwe n'inyigisho z'ukuri z'Ubutumwa bwiza mwumvise mbere. 
Colossians1:6 Ubwo Butumwa bwamaze kugera ku isi yose, bwera imbuto z'ibyiza mu bantu butera imbere. Uko ni ko biri muri mwe kuva aho mwumviye ubuntu Imana igira, mukabusobanukirwa by'ukuri." 
Colossians1:7 Ibyo mwabyigishijwe na mugenzi wacu Epafura dukunda kandi dufatanyije umurimo, ni we mugaragu udahemuka wa Kristo ukora mu mwanya wanyu." 
Colossians1:8 Ni na we watubwiye urukundo rwanyu mukomora kuri Mwuka w'Imana. 
Colossians1:9 Ni cyo cyatumye natwe kuva aho tubyumviye, tudahwema kubasabira. Twinginga Imana ngo ibagwizemo kumenya ibyo ishaka, ibahaye ubwenge no gusobanukirwa bikomoka kuri Mwuka." 
Colossians1:10 Bityo muzashobora kujya mugenza uko Nyagasani ashaka kugira ngo mumushimishe iteka, mwere imbuto z'imigirire myiza y'uburyo bwose kandi mukure mu kumenya Imana." 
Colossians1:11 Turabasabira ngo muhabwe ububasha ku buryo bwose nk'uko imbaraga z'ikuzo ryayo zingana, kugira ngo mushobore kwihanganira byose mwe gucogora. Bityo mujye munezerwa" 
Colossians1:12 mushimira Imana Data, yabahesheje uruhare ku munani yageneye intore zayo zigengwa n'umucyo." 
Colossians1:13 Ni yo yatubohoye ituvana mu butware bw'umwijima, itujyana mu bwami bw'Umwana wayo ikunda." 
Colossians1:14 Ni we dukesha gucungurwa ari ko kubabarirwa ibyaha. 
Colossians1:15 Kristo ni ishusho y'Imana itarebwa n'amaso. Ni na we Mwana wayo w'impfura wabimburiye ibyaremwe byose kubaho. 
Colossians1:16 Ni we Imana yakoresheje irema ibintu byose, ari ibyo mu ijuru n'ibyo ku isi, ari ibyo amaso areba n'ibyo atareba, ari ibinyabwami cyangwa ibinyabutegetsi, cyangwa ibinyabutware cyangwa ibinyabushobozi. Byose byaremwe na we kandi ni we byaremewe." 
Colossians1:17 Yariho mbere ya byose, ni na we uhuriza hamwe byose akabikomeza." 
Colossians1:18 Ikindi kandi ni we mutwe ugenga umubiri we, ari wo Muryango w'Imana. Ni we shingiro rya byose, ni na we wabimburiye bose kuzuka kugira ngo afate umwanya w'ibanze muri byose." 
Colossians1:19 Koko Imana yishimiye ko ibyuzuye muri yo byose biba mu Mwana wayo," 
Colossians1:20 maze yunga ibintu byose na yo ikoresheje uwo Mwana wayo, ari ibyo ku isi ari n'ibyo mu ijuru, izana amahoro bitewe n'amaraso yamenewe ku musaraba." 
Colossians1:21 Kera namwe mwahoze kure y'Imana muri abanzi bayo, kubera ibyo mwatekerezaga n'ibibi mwakoraga." 
Colossians1:22 Ariko ubu Imana yiyunze namwe ikoresheje urupfu rw'Umwana wayo, watanze umubiri we ho igitambo kugira ngo ibaheshe guhagarara imbere yayo mudafite inenge, nta n'amakemwa cyangwa umugayo." 
Colossians1:23 Icyakora mukomere ku byo twemera, mubyishingikirizeho mutajegajega, ari nta kibatesha kwiringira Ubutumwa bwiza mwumvise. Ubwo ni Ubutumwa bwatangarijwe abo ku isi yose, ari bwo jyewe Pawulo nahawe kwamamaza." 
Colossians1:24 Ubu nishimiye ko mbabazwa ari mwe nzira, ni na byo bimpesha kuzuza mu buzima bwanjye ibibuze ku mibabaro ya Kristo, mbigirira umubiri we ari wo Muryango w'Imana." 
Colossians1:25 Nabaye umugaragu wawo, ntumwe n'Imana kurangiza umurimo yampaye wo kubagezaho Ijambo ryayo." 
Colossians1:26 Iryo ni ibanga ryahishwe abantu bose kuva kera kose, ariko ubu Imana yarigaragarije intore zayo." 
Colossians1:27 Iryo banga Imana yageneye amahanga yose, yiyemeje kumenyesha intore zayo ukuntu rifite ikuzo risendereye. Iryo banga ni Kristo uri muri mwe, ubizeza kuzahabwa ku ikuzo ry'Imana." 
Colossians1:28 Ni we twamamaza tukaburira buri muntu tukamwigisha, dukoresheje ubwenge bwose kugira ngo tubone uko tumushyikiriza Imana, ari indakemwa muri Kristo." 
Colossians1:29 Ibyo ni byo mparanira nshishikaye, mbikesha ububasha bwa Kristo butwarira muri jye." 
Colossians2:1 Ndifuza ko mumenya ukuntu mbarwanira inkundura, mwebwe n'ab'i Lawodiseya ndetse n'abandi bose batigeze banca iryera." 
Colossians2:2 Ni ukugira ngo yaba mwe cyangwa bo, mwese mukomere mwibumbire mu rukundo, bityo mukungahazwe no gusobanukirwa mudashidikanya. Ni bwo muzamenya neza ibanga ry'Imana ari ryo Kristo." 
Colossians2:3 Muri we ni ho habitswe ubwenge n'ubumenyi bwose. 
Colossians2:4 Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo hatagira ubashukisha amagambo y'ubucakura. 
Colossians2:5 N'ubwo tutari kumwe bwose mbahozaho umutima, nkishimira kubona ukuntu mukora byose ku murongo, mugakomezwa no kwizera Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 Nuko rero nk'uko mwakiriye Kristo Yezu akababera Nyagasani, mube ari ko mugumya gutera imbere muri we." 
Colossians2:7 Mushore imizi muri we, ubugingo bwanyu bwubakwe kuri we, mukomeye ku byo twemera nk'uko mwabyigishijwe, byose mubikore mushimira Imana bisesuye." 
Colossians2:8 Muramenye ntihakagire ubatwaza igitugu, abashukisha icurabwenge ry'imburamumaro rishingiye ku migenzo karande no ku binyabutware bikorera ku isi, ridashingiye kuri Kristo." 
Colossians2:9 Erega ibyuzuye mu Mana byose biba muri Kristo wabaye umuntu! 
Colossians2:10 Namwe muruzuye kuko mumufite, we ugenga ibinyabutware n'ibinyabushobozi byose." 
Colossians2:11 Kubera Kristo kandi mwarakebwe bitari bimwe byo ku mubiri, ahubwo mwakebwe mu mutima ku buryo bwa Mwuka, abakuraho imigirire mibi ishingiye kuri kamere yanyu." 
Colossians2:12 Igihe mwabatizwaga mwahambanywe na Kristo, maze muzuranwa na we kubera kwizera ububasha bw'Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye." 
Colossians2:13 Kera mwari mwarapfuye muzize ibyaha byanyu no kudakebwa nk'Abayahudi, maze Imana ibazurana na Kristo. Yatubabariye ibicumuro byacu byose," 
Colossians2:14 isibanganya urwandiko rutondagura imyenda twashinjwaga n'amategeko, irukuzaho kurumanika ku musaraba wa Yezu." 
Colossians2:15 Bityo Imana yanyaze bya binyabutware na bya binyabushobozi, ibikoza isoni ku mugaragaro, yerekana ko Kristo abitsinze burundu." 
Colossians2:16 Nuko rero ntihagire ubashyiraho amategeko y'ibyo murya n'ibyo munywa, cyangwa y'ibyerekeye iminsi mikuru, cyangwa imboneko z'amezi cyangwa amasabato." 
Colossians2:17 Ibyo byose ni ibimenyetso biranga ibizaza, naho icy'ukuri bishushanya ni Kristo." 
Colossians2:18 Ibihembo mwagombaga kwegukana ntimukere kubivutswa n'abantu bishimira kwigira nk'abicisha bugufi, bagasenga abamarayika, bakirata ukuntu babonekerwa bidasanzwe. Bene abo baba bishyira imbere babitewe n'ibitekerezo bya kamere yabo bitagira ishingiro," 
Colossians2:19 bityo bakaba batifatanyije na Kristo ari we mutwe ugenga umubiri. Umutwe ni wo utuma umubiri wose uhuza imikorere kandi ukagaburirwa, ukoresheje imitsi n'ingingo kugira ngo ukure uko Imana ishaka." 
Colossians2:20 Ubwo mwapfanye na Kristo ntimukiri ku ngoyi ya bya binyabutware bikorera ku isi. None se kuki mucyifata nk'aho muri ab'isi? Kuki mukomeza kugengwa n'amategeko nk'aya," 
Colossians2:21 ngo: “Ntugafate iki! Ntugasogongere kiriya! Ntukanakore kuri kino!” 
Colossians2:22 Erega ibyo byose igihe umaze kubikoresha biba birangiye! Ni amategeko n'inyigisho by'abantu gusa. 
Colossians2:23 Ni ukuri bene ibyo wagira ngo bishingiye ku bwenge, kuko byemeza umuntu kwihimbira uburyo bwo gusenga no kwicisha bugufi no kubabaza umubiri. Nyamara nta mumaro bifite wo gucubya irari rya kamere y'umuntu." 
Colossians3:1 Imana yabazuranye na Kristo, none rero nimuharanire ibyo mu ijuru aho Kristo ari, yicaye iburyo bw'Imana ku ntebe ya cyami." 
Colossians3:2 Muhoze imitima ku byo mu ijuru atari ku byo ku isi," 
Colossians3:3 kuko mwapfanye na Kristo kandi ubugingo bwanyu bukaba bwarahishwe hamwe na we mu Mana. 
Colossians3:4 Ubugingo bwanyu nyakuri ni Kristo, ubwo azagaragara rero namwe muzagaragara muri hamwe na we, mufite ikuzo." 
Colossians3:5 Nuko rero nimwice imigirire yanyu ifitanye isano n'iby'isi, nk'ubusambanyi no gukora ibiteye isoni, n'irari n'ibyifuzo bibi, n'umururumba uhwanye no gusenga ibigirwamana." 
Colossians3:6 Ibyo ni byo bitera Imana kurakarira [abatayumvira]. 
Colossians3:7 Namwe ubwanyu mwagenzaga mutyo kera mukigengwa n'ibyo bibi. 
Colossians3:8 Ariko ubu mugomba kuzinukwa ibi byose: uburakari n'umujinya, ubugome n'ibitutsi no kuvuga ibigambo bibi."
