Colossians3:9 Ntimukabeshyane kuko mwiyambuye kamere yanyu ya kera n'imigirire yayo," 
Colossians3:10 mukambara kamere nshya. Iyo kamere nshya igenda ivugururirwa kugira ishusho y'Iyayiremye, kugira ngo mushobore kuyimenya byuzuye." 
Colossians3:11 Aho rero haba hatakivugwa umunyamahanga cyangwa Umuyahudi, uwakebwe cyangwa utakebwe, Umusiti n'umunyeshyamba, inkoreragahato cyangwa uwigenga, ahubwo Kristo ni byose muri bose." 
Colossians3:12 Naho mwebwe abo Imana yitoranyirije ikabagira abantu bayo b'inkoramutima, mwambare impuhwe no kugira neza, kwicisha bugufi no kugwa neza no kwihangana." 
Colossians3:13 Igihe umuntu agize icyo apfa na mugenzi we, mwihanganirane kandi mubabarirane. Mubabarirane nk'uko Nyagasani yabababariye." 
Colossians3:14 Hejuru ya byose kandi mwambare urukundo ho umwitero. Ni na rwo mugozi ubafatanya bihebuje. 
Colossians3:15 Mureke amahoro ya Kristo agenge imitima yanyu, ayo ni yo mwahamagariwe kugira ngo mube ingingo zigize umubiri umwe, kandi muhore mushimira Imana." 
Colossians3:16 Inyigisho za Kristo zibacengere rwose zibakungahaze, mugire n'ubwenge bwo kwigishanya no kugirana inama. Muririmbire Imana zaburi n'indirimbo z'ibisingizo n'izahimbwe zikomoka kuri Mwuka, muyishima cyane bibavuye ku mutima." 
Colossians3:17 Ibyo muvuga byose n'ibyo mukora byose, mubikore mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu mushima Imana Se, mubinyujije kuri we." 
Colossians3:18 Bagore, mwubahe abagabo mwashakanye nk'uko bikwiriye abari muri Nyagasani." 
Colossians3:19 Bagabo, mukunde abagore mwashakanye kandi ntimukabamerere nabi." 
Colossians3:20 Bana, mujye mwumvira ababyeyi banyu ku buryo bwose, kuko ari byo Nyagasani yishimira." 
Colossians3:21 Babyeyi, abana banyu ntimukababuze epfo na ruguru kugira ngo badacika intege." 
Colossians3:22 Namwe nkoreragahato, mujye mwumvira ba shobuja bo ku isi ku buryo bwose, atari ugukorera ijisho ngo mubashimishe, ahubwo mubikore mubikuye ku mutima mutinya Shobuja mukuru, ari we Nyagasani." 
Colossians3:23 Ibyo mukora byose mubikorane umutima ukunze, atari abantu mukorera, ahubwo mukorera Shobuja uwo." 
Colossians3:24 Muzirikane ko Shobuja uwo azabagororera kubaha umunani. Koko kandi Kristo ni we Shobuja mukorera. 
Colossians3:25 Ukora ibibi wese bizamugaruka kuko Imana ifata abantu bose kimwe. 
Colossians4:1 Namwe abafite abo mukoresha mubahe ibibakwiriye n'ibibatunganiye, mwibuka ko namwe mufite Shobuja mu ijuru." 
Colossians4:2 Mwese mugumye gusenga mubihugukiye, mushimira Imana." 
Colossians4:3 Natwe mudusabire kugira ngo Imana itwugururire amarembo, idushoboze kujya kuvuga ubutumwa bwayo ari bwo banga ryerekeye Kristo, ni ryo bampōye banshyira kuri iyi ngoyi." 
Colossians4:4 Munsabire ngo mvuge ibyaryo uko bikwiye, mbishyire ku mugaragaro." 
Colossians4:5 Murajye mwitondera uko mwifata ku batazi Kristo, mukoreshe neza igihe mufite ngo mubabwire ibye." 
Colossians4:6 Muhorane imvugo y'ineza ifitiye abantu akamaro, bityo muzamenya uko musubiza umuntu wese ugize icyo ababaza." 
Colossians4:7 Tikiko umuvandimwe nkunda cyane azababwira ibyanjye byose. Ni umufasha wanjye w'indahemuka, dufatanyije umurimo wa Nyagasani." 
Colossians4:8 Nguwo ndamuboherereje ngo abamenyeshe uko tumerewe, maze abakomeze." 
Colossians4:9 Azanye na Onezimo ukomoka muri mwe, na we ni umuvandimwe nkunda cyane w'indahemuka. Bazabatekerereza iby'ino byose." 
Colossians4:10 Arisitariko dufunganywe, na Mariko mwene se wabo wa Barinaba ngo mutahe. Mwabwiwe ibyerekeye Mariko, nagera iwanyu muzamufate neza." 
Colossians4:11 Yezu witwa Yusito na we arabatashya. Mu Bayahudi bemeye Kristo, abo ni bo bonyine dufatanyije umurimo w'ibyerekeye ubwami bw'Imana kandi baramfashije cyane." 
Colossians4:12 Epafura ukomoka muri mwe arabatashya, na we ni umugaragu wa Kristo Yezu. Iteka ashishikarira kubasabira kugira ngo mukomere mube indakemwa, mumenye mudashidikanya ibyo Imana ishaka byose." 
Colossians4:13 Ndahamya rwose yuko abavunikira, mwebwe n'ab'i Lawodiseya n'ab'i Hiyerapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Umuganga Luka dukunda cyane, hamwe na Dema barabatashya." 
Colossians4:15 Mundamukirize abavandimwe b'i Lawodiseya na Nimfa, n'itorero rya Kristo rikoranira iwe." 
Colossians4:16 Nimumara gusoma uru rwandiko, muzarwoherereze ab'itorero rya Kristo ry'i Lawodiseya, kugira ngo na bo barusome, namwe muzasome urwo nandikiye ab'i Lawodiseya nirubageraho." 
Colossians4:17 Muzabwire Arikipo muti: “Itondere wa murimo wahawe gukorera Nyagasani, uzawurangize neza.”" 
Colossians4:18 Jyewe Pawulo ndabatashya. Ibi ni jye ubyiyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko. Mujye mwibuka ingoyi ndiho. Nyagasani nagumye kubagirira ubuntu. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo hamwe na Silasi na Timoteyo, turabandikiye mwebwe abari mu Mana Data no muri Nyagasani Yezu Kristo, mugize itorero rya Kristo ry'i Tesaloniki. Imana nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Uko dusenze turabazirikana, ntiduhwema kubashimira Imana mwese," 
1Thessalonians1:3 twibuka iteka imbere y'Imana Data ibikorwa byiza muterwa no kwemera Kristo, n'imvune muterwa n'urukundo no kwihangana kwanyu gukomoka ku kwiringira Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Bavandimwe mukundwa n'Imana, tuzi neza ko ari yo yabatoranyije." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Koko rero twabagejejeho Ubutumwa bwiza atari amagambo gusa, ahubwo twabubagejejeho bufite ububasha buherekejwe na Mwuka Muziranenge, tubwemeza bidasubirwaho. Muzi ko imyifatire yacu muri mwe yari igendereye kubazanira ibyiza." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Namwe mwakurikije urugero rwacu n'urwa Nyagasani. Nubwo mwari mu makuba menshi, Ijambo ry'Imana mwaryakiranye ibyishimo bituruka kuri Mwuka Muziranenge." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Bityo mwabereye urugero abemera Kristo bose bo mu ntara ya Masedoniya n'iya Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Koko rero Ijambo rya Nyagasani ryavuye muri mwe ntiryasakaye muri Masedoniya no muri Akaya gusa, ahubwo inkuru ivuga iby'ukwizera Imana kwanyu yamamaye ahantu hose, ku buryo nta cyo twakwirirwa tubivugaho." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Abantu bose usanga bavuga ukuntu mwatwakiriye, n'ukuntu mwahindukiriye Imana mukareka ibigirwamana, kugira ngo mukorere Imana nzima kandi y'ukuri," 
1Thessalonians1:10 igihe mugitegereje Umwana wayo Yezu yazuye mu bapfuye. Ni we uzava mu ijuru aje kudukiza uburakari bw'Imana bwegereje. 
1Thessalonians2:1 Bavandimwe, muzi neza ko tutaje iwanyu tuzanywe n'ubusa." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Twari tuvuye i Filipi, aho bari baratugiriye nabi bakadutuka nk'uko mubizi. Ariko nubwo baturwanyije cyane, Imana yaduhaye kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwayo bwiza dushize amanga." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Koko imyigishirize yacu ntishingiye ku buyobe, cyangwa ku mpamvu mbi cyangwa ku mayeri." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Ahubwo tuvuga uko Imana ibishaka kuko yatugerageje, ikabona kudushinga Ubutumwa bwiza. Ntiduharanira gushimisha abantu, ahubwo duharanira gushimisha Imana yo igenzura ibiri mu mitima yacu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Nk'uko mubizi ntabwo twigeze tubabwira amagambo yo kubacacura, nta n'ubwo twigeze tugira igitekerezo cyo kubashakaho inyungu. Imana ni yo dutanze ho umugabo." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Nta na rimwe kandi twigeze dushaka kwihesha ikuzo ku bantu, haba kuri mwe cyangwa ku bandi." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Nyamara kandi twashoboraga kwitwaza ko turi Intumwa za Kristo tukabategeka kudukorera. Ibiri amambu, ubwo twazaga iwanyu twariyoroheje, tumera nk'uko umubyeyi ashyashyanira abana be." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Kubera ubwuzu twari tubafitiye, uretse no kubagezaho Ubutumwa bwiza bw'Imana, twari no guhara amagara yacu ari mwebwe tubigiriye. Rwose mwari mwatubereye incuti magara." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Bavandimwe, muribuka imvune n'umunaniro twagize. Igihe twabatangarizaga Ubutumwa bwiza bw'Imana twakoraga ijoro n'amanywa, kugira ngo hato hatagira n'umwe muri mwe tubera umutwaro." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imana ubwayo namwe abemera Kristo, ni mwe dutanze ho abagabo b'imyifatire yacu myiza muri mwe, nta makemwa, nta buhemu nta n'umugayo." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Murabizi twitaga kuri buri wese muri mwe, nk'uko se w'abana abitaho." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Twarabakomeje, turabahumuriza kandi turabihanangiriza, ngo mujye mugenza uko bikwiriye abo Imana ihamagara ngo babe mu bwami bwayo bufite ikuzo." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Dore indi mpamvu ituma natwe tudahwema gushimira Imana: igihe twabamenyeshaga Ijambo ryayo ntabwo mwaryakiriye nk'ijambo ry'abantu, ahubwo mwemeye ko ari Ijambo ry'Imana kandi ni ryo koko, ni na ryo rigira imbaraga muri mwebwe abemera Kristo." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Bavandimwe, mwakurikije urugero rw'abo mu matorero y'Imana yo muri Yudeya bari muri Kristo Yezu, uko bagiriwe nabi n'Abayahudi ni ko namwe mwagiriwe nabi na bene wanyu." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Abayahudi ni bo bishe Nyagasani Yezu n'abahanuzi, natwe baradutoteza. Ntabwo bashimisha Imana, ni abanzi b'abantu bose." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Batubuza kwigisha abatari Abayahudi ngo na bo bakizwe, bityo bakagwiza umubare w'ibyaha bakomeje gukora kuva kera kose. Amaherezo ariko uburakari bw'Imana bwabagezeho." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Naho twebwe bavandimwe, twamaze igihe gito dutandukanye namwe ariko tukabahozaho umutima. Ni cyo cyatumye dukora uko dushoboye kose kugira ngo tubonane imbonankubone, kuko twari tubakumbuye cyane." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ni na yo mpamvu twifuje kuza iwanyu. Ndetse jyewe Pawulo ni kenshi nagize uwo mugambi, ariko Satani aratuzitira." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Mwebwe muri mu badutera kwiringira no kwishima, muri n'ikamba ryo gutsinda tuziratana imbere y'Umwami wacu Yezu, ubwo azaba aje." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Koko rero ni mwebwe muduhesha ishema n'umunezero. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Noneho ubwo tutagishoboye kwihanganira kutamenya amakuru yanyu, twasanze ibyiza ari uko twebwe twasigara mu mujyi wa Atene twenyine." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Ni ko kuboherereza Timoteyo, umuvandimwe wacu dufatanyije umurimo w'Imana wo kwamamaza Ubutumwa bwiza bwa Kristo. Twamuboherereje kugira ngo abashyigikire kandi abatere inkunga, kugira ngo murusheho kwizera Kristo," 
1Thessalonians3:3 hatagira n'umwe muri mwe uteshuka kubera amakuba turimo. Muzi kandi ko ibyo ari ibyo Imana yatugeneye. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ubwo twari kumwe twabamenyesheje mbere y'igihe ko tugiye gutotezwa, kandi muzi ko ari ko byagenze." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ni yo mpamvu ntashoboye kwihangana, noneho nkabatumaho Timoteyo kugira ngo amenyere aho mugeze mu kwizera Kristo. Natinyaga ko wa Mushukanyi yaba yarabayobeje maze tukaba twaravunikiye ubusa." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ubu Timoteyo amaze guhindukira aturuka iwanyu, yatuzaniye inkuru nziza y'ukuntu mwizera Kristo n'iy'urukundo rwanyu. Yatubwiye ko muhora mutwibuka, mudufitiye ubwuzu n'urukumbuzi kimwe n'uko natwe tubakumbura." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ni yo mpamvu bavandimwe, ukwizera Kristo kwanyu kwadukomeje mu ngorane zose no mu makuba twagize." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Ubu ngubu rero turumva tuguwe neza kubera ko mugikomeye kuri Nyagasani. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Twabashimira Imana dute? Twayitura dute umunezero mwinshi duterwa namwe imbere yayo? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Ijoro n'amanywa dusaba Imana cyane rwose ngo iduhe kongera kubonana, kandi tubaheshe ibyo mugikeneye mu kwizera Kristo kwanyu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Imana Data ubwayo ifatanyije n'Umwami wacu Yezu, nidushakire akayira kagera iwanyu." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Nyagasani nabagwirize ndetse abasesekarize urukundo mukundana n'urwo mufitiye abantu bose, nk'uko natwe tubakunda." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Nabakomeze imitima maze muzabe mudafite inenge cyangwa umugayo imbere y'Imana Data, igihe Umwami wacu Yezu azaba aje, ashagawe n'intore ze zose." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ahasigaye bavandimwe, turabasaba tubinginga mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu ngo mujye mugenza nk'uko twabigishije, kugira ngo mushimishe Imana. Koko kandi musanzwe mubikora, noneho nimurusheho." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Muzi kandi amabwiriza twabahaye aturutse kuri Nyagasani Yezu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Ngibi ibyo Imana ibashakaho: ni ukuba abaziranenge mukirinda ubusambanyi. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Buri wese muri mwe nabane n'uwo bashakanye, bagirane umubano utagira amakemwa ushimwa na bose," 
1Thessalonians4:5 badatwarwa n'irari nk'abo mu mahanga batazi Imana. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Ku byerekeye imibanire ntihakagire uhemukira umuvandimwe we ngo amuce inyuma, kuko Nyagasani azahana abakora batyo nk'uko twabibabwiye tubihanangiriza." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Erega Imana ntiyaduhamagariye kwiyandavuza, ahubwo yaraduhamagaye ngo tube abaziranenge!" 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ni yo mpamvu uzanga gukurikiza izo nyigisho atazaba ari umuntu yasuzuguye, ahubwo azaba yasuzuguye Imana ibaha Mwuka wayo Muziranenge." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ibyerekeye urukundo rwa kivandimwe, si ngombwa kubibandikira kuko Imana yabigishije gukundana," 
1Thessalonians4:10 ndetse musanzwe mukundana n'abavandimwe bose bo mu ntara yose ya Masedoniya. Bavandimwe, turabasaba rwose kurushaho kugenza mutyo." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Mwihatire kubaho mu ituze mwita ku bibareba, kandi mukoresha amaboko yanyu nk'uko twabibategetse." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Bityo muzajye mugenza uko bikwiye imbere ya rubanda, kandi nta cyabo muzakenera." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Bavandimwe, twifuza ko mutayoberwa ibyerekeye abamaze gupfa, kugira ngo mudashavura nk'abandi badafite icyo biringiye." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Nk'uko twemera ko Yezu yapfuye kandi akazuka, ni na ko twemera ko abapfuye bamwizera, Imana izabazurana na we." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Iri jambo tubabwira ni iryo twatumwe na Nyagasani: twebwe abazaba bakiriho aje, ntabwo tuzabanziriza abazaba barapfuye." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ahubwo tuzumva itegeko twumve n'ijwi ry'umumarayika mukuru, twumve n'impanda y'Imana noneho Nyagasani ubwe amanuke avuye mu ijuru, maze abapfuye bizera Kristo babanze bazuke." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Nyuma natwe abazaba bakiriho duhite tuzamuranwa na bo mu bicu, dusanganire Nyagasani mu kirere maze tuzabane na we iteka ryose." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Nuko rero mubwirane ayo magambo, kugira ngo abahumurize." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Bavandimwe, ntimukeneye ko tubandikira ibyerekeye ibihe n'iminsi ibyo bizabera." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ubwanyu muzi neza ko umunsi wa Nyagasani uzabatungura nk'umujura wa nijoro. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Igihe bazaba bavuga bati: “Ni amahoro, hari umutekano”, ni bwo icyorezo kizabatungura nk'uko ibise bitungura umubyeyi utwite, maze babure aho bahungira." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Nyamara mwebwe bavandimwe, ntabwo muri mu mwijima ku buryo uwo munsi wabatungura nk'umujura," 
1Thessalonians5:5 kuko mwese muri ab'umucyo, muri ab'amanywa. Ntituri ab'ijoro, ntituri n'ab'umwijima." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Nuko rero twe gusinzira nk'abandi, ahubwo tube maso kandi twirinde muri byose." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Abasinzira basinzira nijoro, kandi abasinda basinda nijoro." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Twebwe rero turi ab'amanywa, ntitugategekwe n'inda tujye twirinda muri byose. Tujye twambara ikoti ry'icyuma rikingiriza igituza ari ryo ukwizera n'urukundo, kandi twambare n'ingofero y'icyuma ari yo kwiringira agakiza." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Erega Imana ntiyatugeneye kuzagubwaho n'uburakari bwayo! Ahubwo yatugeneye guhabwa agakiza dukesha Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 wadupfiriye kugira ngo tuzabane na we ubwo azaza, yasanga tukiriho cyangwa twarapfuye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Noneho rero muhumurizanye, kandi muterane inkunga nk'uko musanzwe mubigenza." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Bavandimwe, turabasaba kuzirikana abo muri mwe bavunwa no kubayobora, bakabakosora babishinzwe na Nyagasani." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Nimububahe cyane kandi mubakunde kubera umurimo bakora. Namwe kandi mubane amahoro. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Bavandimwe, turabihanangiriza ngo mucyahe imburamukoro, mutinyure abanyabwoba kandi mukomeze abanyantegenke, bose mujye mubihanganira." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Muramenye he kugira uwitura undi inabi, ahubwo muhore mushaka kugirirana neza, ndetse abantu bose mubagirire neza." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Mwishime iteka," 
1Thessalonians5:17 musenge ubutitsa," 
1Thessalonians5:18 mushimire Imana uko byamera kose, kuko ari byo ibashakaho mwebwe abari muri Kristo Yezu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Ntimugacubye Mwuka w'Imana," 
1Thessalonians5:20 ntimugasuzugure ibyahanuwe. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Mugenzure byose, ibyiza mubigumane," 
1Thessalonians5:22 maze mwirinde icyitwa ikibi cyose. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Imana ubwayo yo sōko y'amahoro ibagire abayo rwose, irinde buri wese uko ari kose: umwuka n'ubuzima n'umubiri, maze Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo naza azasange mutariho umugayo." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Imana ibahamagara ni indahemuka, izabikora nta kabuza." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bavandimwe, natwe mudusabire." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Muramutse kandi abavandimwe bose muhoberana ku buryo butagira amakemwa. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mu izina rya Nyagasani, ndabasaba nkomeje ko uru rwandiko rusomerwa abavandimwe bose." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu! 
2Thessalonians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo hamwe na Silasi na Timoteyo, turabandikiye mwebwe abari mu Mana Data no muri Nyagasani Yezu Kristo, mugize itorero rya Kristo ry'i Tesaloniki." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu, ibahe n'amahoro, ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Bavandimwe, twabura dute kubashimira Imana ubutitsa? Koko birakwiye kuko murushaho gutera imbere mu kwizera Kristo, kandi n'urukundo mufitanye rukiyongera." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Ni yo mpamvu mu matorero y'Imana turata ibyanyu, tuvuga uko mwihangana mukizera Kristo, nubwo mutotezwa mukanahura n'amakuba y'uburyo bwose." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ibyo ni byo byerekana ko Imana idaca urwa kibera. Ni cyo kizatuma mubarwa mu bakwiye ubwami bwayo, ari na bwo babahōra bakabagirira nabi." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Imana ni intabera, ababateza amakuba izabitura amakuba," 
2Thessalonians1:7 namwe abababazwa ibiture kuruhukana natwe. Ni ko bizamera igihe Nyagasani Yezu azahishurwa avuye mu ijuru, ashagawe n'abamarayika be yahaye ububasha." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Azaza mu muriro ugurumana yihōrere ku batazi Imana, ntibumvire Ubutumwa bwiza bw'Umwami wacu Yezu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Bazahabwa igihano cyo kurimbuka bajyanwe kure ya Nyagasani, batandukanywe n'ikuzo rye n'ububasha bwe." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Ni ko bizamera kuri wa munsi Nyagasani azaza guheshwa ikuzo n'intore ze no gutangarirwa n'abamwemeye bose – muri abo namwe murimo, kuko mwemeye ibyo twahamije hagati muri mwe." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ngiyo impamvu ituma duhora tubasabira kugira ngo Imana ibone ko mukwiye ibyo yabahamagariye. Turayisaba kurambura ukuboko kwayo ngo isohoze imigambi myiza yose mwagize, kimwe n'ibikorwa byiza muheshwa no kwizera Kristo." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Bityo Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo aherwe ikuzo muri mwe, kandi namwe muriherwe kuri we, mubikesha ubuntu mugirirwa n'Imana yacu na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Bavandimwe, ku byerekeye kuza k'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo no ku byerekeye uko tuzateranira imbere ye, turabasabye" 
2Thessalonians2:2 ntimuzakurwe umutima cyangwa ngo muterwe ubwoba no kumva ko umunsi wo kuza kwa Nyagasani wageze, naho hagira uvuga ko yabihishuriwe na Mwuka cyangwa ko hari uwabitangaje, cyangwa se ko ari twe twabyanditse." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ntihazagire ubashuka na gato. Ibyo bitaraba hagomba kuzabanza kubaho abantu benshi beguka ku Mana, noneho uwitwa “Umugome Gica” wagenewe kurimbuka agahishurwa." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Uwo ni we urwanya icyo abantu bita imana cyose n'icyo basenga cyose, akishyira hejuru yabyo ku buryo yicara mu Ngoro y'Imana, akigira Imana." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Mbese ntimwibuka ko tukiri kumwe nabibabwiye? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ubu kandi muzi igihagaritse ibyo byose icyo ari cyo. Ni ukugira ngo azahishurwe igihe cye kigeze. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Koko rero amayobera y'ubugome yatangiye gukora ibyayo. Icyakora haracyariho ubuzitiye kugeza igihe azavanwaho. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ubwo ni bwo wa Mugome azahishurwa, noneho igihe Nyagasani Yezu azaba aje amwicishe umwuka wo mu kanwa ke, amutsembeshe ukurabagirana kwe." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Uwo Mugome azaza akoreshwa n'imbaraga za Satani ngo atange ibimenyetso, akore ibitangaza n'ibindi bikorwa by'ububasha by'uburyo bwose byo kuyobya abantu." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Azakoresha ubuhemu bw'uburyo bwose kugira ngo ashuke abagenewe kurimbuka, bazira kudakunda ukuri kwari kubarokora." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ni yo mpamvu Imana iboherereza ubuyobe bukaze butuma bemera ibinyoma. 
2Thessalonians2:12 Bityo abazaba bataremeye ukuri ahubwo bakishimira ubugome, bazatsindwe n'urubanza." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Bavandimwe mukundwa na Nyagasani, nta cyatubuza guhora dushimira Imana kubera mwebwe. Ni mwe Imana yatoranyije ngo mube aba mbere bo guhabwa agakiza mubikesha Mwuka wabeguriye Imana, mubikesha kandi kwemera ukuri." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ni byo yabahamagariye ikoresheje Ubutumwa bwiza twabagejejeho, kugira ngo muhabwe ikuzo ry'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Bityo rero bavandimwe, nimuhagarare kigabo, mukomere ku nyigisho twabagejejeho mu magambo no mu nzandiko." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Nyagasani Yezu Kristo nabakomeze, afatanyije n'Imana Data yadukunze ikadutera inkunga iteka, ikadutera no kwiringira ibyiza kubera ubuntu itugirira." 
2Thessalonians2:17 Nibakomeze rero, ibahe n'imbaraga mu byiza byose mukora kandi muvuga." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ahasigaye rero bavandimwe, mudusabire kugira ngo Ijambo rya Nyagasani rikomeze ryamamare, rihabwe ikuzo nk'uko bigenda iwanyu." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Mudusabire kandi kugira ngo Imana idukize abagome n'abagizi ba nabi. Erega si ko bose bemera Kristo! 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ariko Nyagasani ni indahemuka, azabakomeza kandi abarinde Sekibi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ni Nyagasani utuma tubagirira icyizere, ibyo tubashinga murabikora kandi muzakomeza kubikora." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Nyagasani nabayobore abageze ku rukundo rw'Imana, no ku kwihangana gutangwa na Kristo." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Bavandimwe, mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristo turabihanangiriza kwitandukanya n'umuvandimwe wese w'umunebwe, udakurikiza inyigisho twabahaye." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Mwebwe ubwanyu muzi neza ukuntu mugomba gukurikiza urugero rwacu. Igihe twari kumwe ntabwo twabaye abanebwe," 
2Thessalonians3:8 nta muntu twigeze twaka ibyo kudutunga ku busa. Ahubwo ijoro n'amanywa twarakoze, tugira imvune n'umunaniro kugira ngo tutagira n'umwe turushya." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Si uko tutari tubifitiye uburenganzira, ahubwo twashatse kubaha urugero mukurikiza." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Koko rero igihe twari iwanyu twarababwiye tuti: “Udashaka gukora ntakarye.” 
2Thessalonians3:11 None twumva ko muri mwe hari abanebwe batagira icyo bakora, ahubwo bakivanga mu by'abandi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Abo ngabo turabategeka tubihanangiriza mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristo, ngo bakore bafite ituze kugira ngo babone ibibatunga." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Naho mwebwe bavandimwe, ntimugacogore mu gukora ibyiza." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Nihagira utumvira amabwiriza yacu akubiye muri uru rwandiko, mumumenye mwitandukanye na we bitume akorwa n'isoni." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Icyakora ntimukamufate nk'umwanzi, ahubwo mujye mumuhana bya kivandimwe." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Nyagasani we sōko y'amahoro, ubwe abe ari we ubaha amahoro iteka ku buryo bwose. Nyagasani nabane namwe mwese." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Jyewe Pawulo ndabatashya. Ibi ni jye ubyiyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko. Ni wo mukono njya nshyira ku nzandiko zanjye zose. Uko ni ko nandika. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese. 
1Timothy1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko byategetswe n'Imana Umukiza wacu na Kristo Yezu twiringira," 
1Timothy1:2 ndakwandikiye Timoteyo mwana wanjye nibyariye muri Kristo twemera. Imana Data ikugirire ubuntu iguhe n'imbabazi n'amahoro, ifatanyije na Kristo Yezu Umwami wacu." 
1Timothy1:3 Nk'uko nabigusabye igihe najyaga mu ntara ya Masedoniya, ugume Efezi kugira ngo ubuze abantu bariyo gukwiza inyigisho ziyobya." 
1Timothy1:4 Ubabuze no kwihambira ku bitekerezo bitagira ishingiro, no ku bisekuruza bitagira iherezo. Ibyo bizana impaka gusa, aho guteza imbere imigambi y'Imana twemezwa no kwizera Kristo." 
1Timothy1:5 Intego mfite ngushinga ibyo ni ukugira ngo bagire urukundo rukomoka ku mutima uboneye utabarega ikibi, no kwizera Kristo kuzira uburyarya." 
1Timothy1:6 Bamwe bahushije iyo ntego, bahera mu magambo y'amahomvu." 
1Timothy1:7 Bashaka kuba abigisha b'Amategeko, nyamara batazi neza ibyo bavuga n'ibyo bemeza abantu bihandagaje." 
1Timothy1:8 Turabizi koko Amategeko ni meza, igihe umuntu ayakoresha uko bikwiye." 
1Timothy1:9 N'ubundi tuzi ko Amategeko atashyiriweho intungane, ahubwo dore abo yashyiriweho: abagome n'ibigande, abatubaha Imana n'abanyabyaha, abahakana Imana n'abasuzugura ibyayo, abica ba se na ba nyina kimwe n'abicanyi bose," 
1Timothy1:10 abasambanyi basanzwe n'abasambana n'abo bahuje igitsina, abacuruza abantu n'ababeshyi n'abarahira ibinyoma, mbese abakora ibintu byose binyuranye n'inyigisho zishyitse." 
1Timothy1:11 Izo ni zo nyigisho zihuje n'Ubutumwa nashinzwe, bwerekeye ikuzo ry'Imana nyir'ugusingizwa." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndashimira Umwami wacu Kristo Yezu watumye mbasha kumukorera, akangirira icyizere, bityo akanshinga umurimo we." 
1Timothy1:13 Nari umuntu ukunda gutuka Imana, ngatoteza abayoboke bayo nkaba n'umunyarugomo. Ariko Imana yarambabariye kuko ibyo nabiterwaga n'ubujiji, kubera ko ntemeraga Kristo." 
1Timothy1:14 Ubuntu Umwami wacu agira bwaransābye, kimwe n'ukwizera n'urukundo tubonera muri Kristo Yezu." 
1Timothy1:15 Iri jambo ni iry'ukuri kandi rikwiye kwemerwa na bose: Kristo Yezu yazanywe ku isi no gukiza abanyabyaha, kandi mu banyabyaha ni jye wa mbere." 
1Timothy1:16 Ariko icyatumye Imana ingirira imbabazi, ni ukugira ngo muri jye umunyabyaha wa mbere Kristo Yezu yerekane ukwihangana kwe kuzuye, bityo mbere urugero abazamwizera bose bagahabwa ubugingo buhoraho." 
1Timothy1:17 Umwami uhoraho ari we Mana imwe rukumbi, idapfa kandi itarebwa n'amaso, ahabwe icyubahiro n'ikuzo iteka ryose. Amina." 
1Timothy1:18 Timoteyo mwana wanjye, dore ibyo ngushinze bihuye n'ibyabanje guhanurwa kuri wowe. Ubyiteho bitume urwana intambara nziza," 
1Timothy1:19 ukomere kuri Kristo twemera ufite umutima utakurega ikibi. Uwo mutima bamwe banze kuwumvira bareka kwizera Kristo, bamera nk'abigungiye mu matongo." 
1Timothy1:20 Muri abo hari Himeneyo na Alegisanderi, nabeguriye Satani ngo bibigishe kutazongera gutuka Imana." 
1Timothy2:1 Mbere ya byose ndabihanangiriza ngo mu masengesho yanyu mujye musabira abantu bose, mwinginga Imana kandi muyishimira ku bwabo." 
1Timothy2:2 Mujye musabira abami n'abandi bategetsi bose kugira ngo tugire amahoro n'ituze, maze tubeho twubaha Imana kandi turi inyangamugayo." 
1Timothy2:3 Ngibyo ibyiza bishimisha Imana Umukiza wacu," 
1Timothy2:4 ishaka ko abantu bose bakizwa kugira ngo babashe kumenya ukuri byuzuye. 
1Timothy2:5 Hariho Imana imwe rukumbi kandi umuhuza wayo n'abantu ni umwe, na we ni umuntu, ni Kristo Yezu" 
1Timothy2:6 witanze agapfa ngo abere incungu abantu bose. Icyo ni icyemezo cy'uko Imana ishaka ko bose bakizwa, cyatanzwe igihe kigeze." 
1Timothy2:7 Ku bw'ibyo nashyiriweho kuba umuvugizi wa Kristo, nkaba n'Intumwa ye ngo nigishe abatari Abayahudi ibyerekeye Kristo twemera n'ukuri kwe – ndavuga ukuri simbeshya." 
1Timothy2:8 Ndashaka ko ahantu hose abagabo bajya basenga barambuye amaboko, bafite imitima iboneye kandi badafite umujinya cyangwa impaka." 
1Timothy2:9 N'abagore ni uko bajye bambara uko bikwiye, birimbishe nk'abanyamutima badashira isoni, atari ukuboha imisatsi no kwambara imikufi y'izahabu, cyangwa amasaro y'agahebuzo cyangwa imyambaro y'igiciro gihanitse." 
1Timothy2:10 Ahubwo umurimbo wabo ube ibikorwa byiza bikwiriye abagore bubaha Imana. 
1Timothy2:11 Abagore bajye biga batuje kandi bubaha ku buryo bwose. 
1Timothy2:12 Sinemera ko abagore bigisha cyangwa ngo bategeke abagabo, ahubwo bakwiriye kugira ituze." 
1Timothy2:13 N'ubundi Adamu ni we waremwe mbere, Eva akurikiraho." 
1Timothy2:14 Adamu si we washutswe, ahubwo umugore we ni we washutswe maze acumura ku Mana." 
1Timothy2:15 Nyamara umugore azakirizwa mu ibyara nakomera kuri Kristo twemera, akagira urukundo, akiyegurira Imana kandi akaba umunyamutima." 
1Timothy3:1 Iri jambo ni iry'ukuri: niba umuntu yifuza kuba umuyobozi w'Umuryango w'Imana, aba yifuje umurimo mwiza." 
1Timothy3:2 Umuyobozi w'Umuryango w'Imana agomba kuba umuntu w'inyangamugayo, akaba n'umugabo ufite umugore umwe, udategekwa n'inda, ushyira mu gaciro kandi wiyubaha. Agomba kuba umuntu ukunda kwakira abagenzi, uzi kwigisha," 
1Timothy3:3 utari umunywi w'inzoga cyangwa umurwanyi. Ahubwo agomba kuba umunyamahoro, wirinda amahane kandi udakunda ifaranga." 
1Timothy3:4 Agomba kuba azi kuyobora neza abo mu rugo rwe bwite, no kumenyereza abana be guhora bubaha ababyeyi ku buryo bwose bukwiye." 
1Timothy3:5 None se unanirwa kuyobora urugo rwe bwite yashobora ate kwita ku Muryango w'Imana? 
1Timothy3:6 Umuyobozi w'Umuryango wayo ntakwiriye kuba umuntu wemeye Kristo vuba ngo atigira ishyano ryose, bityo agacirwa iteka nk'irya Satani." 
1Timothy3:7 Na none kandi agomba kuba umuntu n'abatemera Kristo bavuga neza, kugira ngo atagawa akagwa mu mutego wa Satani." 
1Timothy3:8 Abadiyakoni na bo ni uko, bagomba kuba abantu biyubaha, bataryarya, batari abanywi b'inzoga kandi badafite umururumba w'inyungu." 
1Timothy3:9 Bagomba gukomera ku mabanga ya Kristo twemera, bafite imitima iboneye itabarega ikibi." 
1Timothy3:10 Na bo kandi bajye babanza bageragezwe, hanyuma niba nta cyo bagawa babone gukora uwo murimo w'ubudiyakoni." 
1Timothy3:11 Abadiyakonikazi na bo bagomba kuba ari abantu biyubaha, bakirinda gusebanya no gutegekwa n'inda, ahubwo nibabe indahemuka ku buryo bwose." 
1Timothy3:12 Umudiyakoni wese agomba kuba umugabo ufite umugore umwe, uyobora neza abana be n'abandi bo mu rugo rwe." 
1Timothy3:13 Abakora uwo murimo neza bibahesha umwanya mwiza, bigatuma bavuga bashize amanga uko bemera Kristo Yezu." 
1Timothy3:14 Nkwandikiye ibyo niringiye kuzaza kugusura vuba. 
1Timothy3:15 Icyakora nindamuka ntinze, uru rwandiko ruzakumenyesha uko umuntu agomba kwifata mu rugo rw'Imana, ni ukuvuga mu Muryango w'Imana nzima ari wo nkingi ishyigikiye ukuri kwayo." 
1Timothy3:16 Nta wabihakana, ibanga ryo kubaha Imana rirakomeye. Uwo rivuga yagaragajwe ari umuntu, avugwa ko ari intungane na Mwuka w'Imana, arangamirwa n'abamarayika, yamamazwa mu mahanga, yemerwa n'abo ku isi, ajyanwa mu ijuru, ahabwa ikuzo." 
1Timothy4:1 Mwuka w'Imana avuga yeruye ko mu minsi y'imperuka bamwe bazimūra Kristo, bayoboke inyigisho ziyobya zikwizwa n'ingabo za Satani." 
1Timothy4:2 Bazaba bayobejwe n'uburyarya bw'abanyabinyoma bafite imitima ihuramye, ku buryo itakibashinja ibibi bakora." 
1Timothy4:3 Bazabuza abantu gushakana no kurya bimwe na bimwe kandi Imana ari yo yabiremye, kugira ngo abayoboke bayo basobanukiwe ukuri babirye bayishimira." 
1Timothy4:4 Erega ibyo Imana yaremye byose ni byiza, kandi nta na kimwe kigomba gutabwa iyo bacyakiranye ishimwe," 
1Timothy4:5 kuko kiba cyejejwe n'Ijambo ry'Imana no gusenga! 
1Timothy4:6 Niwumvisha abavandimwe ibyo ngibyo uzaba ubaye umugaragu mwiza wa Yezu Kristo, bizagaragara ko utungwa n'amagambo ya Kristo twemera, n'inyigisho nziza wakurikije." 
1Timothy4:7 Naho ibitekerezo by'abakecuru bitagira ishingiro kandi bihakana Imana, ujye ubigendera kure ahubwo wimenyereze kubaha Imana." 
1Timothy4:8 Imyitozo ngororamubiri ifite akamaro ariko gake, naho kubaha Imana byo bigira akamaro ku buryo bwose, bitanga icyizere cyo guhabwa ubugingo bw'ubu n'ubw'igihe kizaza." 
1Timothy4:9 Iri jambo ni iry'ukuri kandi rikwiye kwemerwa na bose: 
1Timothy4:10 igituma twemera kuvunika tugahirimbana, ni uko twiringiye Imana nzima yo Mukiza w'abantu bose cyane cyane abemera Kristo." 
1Timothy4:11 Ngibyo ibyo ugomba kwemeza abantu no kubigisha. 
1Timothy4:12 Ntihakagire ugusuzugura ngo ni uko uri muto. Ahubwo ubere urugero abemera Kristo mu mivugire no mu myifatire, no mu rukundo no mu kwemera Kristo, no mu kugira umutima uboneye." 
1Timothy4:13 Igihe ugitegereje ko nza wihatire gusomera abantu Ibyanditswe, no kubakomeza no kubigisha." 
1Timothy4:14 Ntukirengagize impano ikurimo wahawe n'Imana ubikesha ibyahanuwe, igihe abakuru b'Umuryango w'Imana bakurambikagaho ibiganza." 
1Timothy4:15 Ngibyo ibyo ugomba kuzirikana ukabyitaho. Ni bwo bizagaragarira bose ko utera imbere. 
1Timothy4:16 Wirinde ubwawe, witondere n'ibyo wigisha ubyizirikeho. Nugenza utyo uzahabwa agakiza wowe n'abagutega amatwi." 
1Timothy5:1 Ntugacyahe umusaza ahubwo ujye umuhugura nk'aho ari so, n'abasore ubahugure nk'aho ari abavandimwe bawe." 
1Timothy5:2 Abakecuru ubahugure nk'aho ari ababyeyi bawe, abāri na bo nk'aho ari bashiki bawe ubafitiye umutima uboneye rwose." 
1Timothy5:3 Wubahe abapfakazi bamwe ba nyamwigendaho. 
1Timothy5:4 Naho niba umupfakazi afite abana cyangwa abuzukuru, nibabanze bagaragaze mu rugo rwabo bwite uko bubaha Imana, biture ababyeyi babo ineza babagiriye. Ibyo ni byo bishimisha Imana." 
1Timothy5:5 Umupfakazi nyamwigendaho kandi nyakujya yiringira Imana gusa, ntahwema kuyisenga no kuyiyambaza ijoro n'amanywa." 
1Timothy5:6 Naho umupfakazi wibera mu mudamararo, we ku Mana aba apfuye ahagaze." 
1Timothy5:7 Ibyo ubibashinge kugira ngo babe inyangamugayo. 
1Timothy5:8 Niba umuntu atita kuri bene wabo cyane cyane abo mu rugo rwe, uwo aba yarahakanye Kristo twemera ndetse aba arutwa n'abatemera Kristo." 
1Timothy5:9 Ntihakagire umugore uzandikwa mu mubare w'abapfakazi atarageza ku myaka mirongo itandatu y'ubukuru, kandi atarashatswe n'umugabo umwe gusa." 
1Timothy5:10 Agomba kuba azwi ho ibikorwa byiza ari byo ibi: kurera abana be neza, kwakira neza abagenzi, koza ibirenge by'intore z'Imana, kugoboka imbabare, mbese kugira ibikorwa byiza by'uburyo bwose." 
1Timothy5:11 Abapfakazi bakiri bato ntukabashyire mu mubare w'abandi, kuko iyo irari ryabo ribateye kureka Kristo bongera gushaka abandi bagabo." 
1Timothy5:12 Bityo bakaba batsindwa n'urubanza rwo kureka ibyo bari biyemeje mbere. 
1Timothy5:13 Byongeye kandi bimenyereza kuzerera imihana, bakaba imburamukoro. Si ibyo gusa ahubwo bahinduka n'abanyamazimwe, bakajya bivanga mu bitabareba, bakavuga ibidakwiye." 
1Timothy5:14 Ni cyo gituma nshaka ko abapfakazi bakiri bato bongera gushyingirwa bakabyara, bakayobora ingo zabo, bityo bakima abanzi b'Imana urwaho rwo gusebya abayo." 
1Timothy5:15 Koko hari bamwe muri bo bamaze guteshuka bagakurikira Satani. 
1Timothy5:16 Nihagira umugore wemera Kristo akaba afite abapfakazi muri bene wabo, ajye abafasha kugira ngo byorohereze Umuryango w'Imana, ubone uko ugoboka abapfakazi nyamwigendaho." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakuru bayobora neza Umuryango w'Imana bakwiye guhembwa incuro ebyiri, cyane cyane abavunwa no kwamamaza Ijambo ry'Imana no kwigisha abandi." 
1Timothy5:18 N'ubundi Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Ntimugahambire umunwa w'ikimasa igihe gihonyōra ingano”, kandi ngo: “Umukozi akwiye guhemberwa umurimo akora.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Ntukemere ibyo barega umukuru w'Umuryango w'Imana, keretse ashinjwa n'abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Abacumura ujye ubahanira mu ruhame kugira ngo abandi batinye. 
1Timothy5:21 Ndakwihanangiriza ntanze Imana ho umugabo, ndetse na Kristo Yezu n'abamarayika bayo bayishagara, ukurikize ayo mabwiriza utagize aho ubogamira, cyangwa ngo uce urwa kibera." 
1Timothy5:22 Ntukihutire kugira uwo urambikaho ibiganza ngo abe umukozi w'Imana. Ntukifatanye n'abandi gukora ibyaha, ahubwo wowe ubwawe ugumye kugira umutima uboneye." 
1Timothy5:23 Reka kunywa amazi gusa, ahubwo ujye ukoresha ka divayi gake kubera igifu cyawe no guhora urwaragurika." 
1Timothy5:24 Ibyaha by'abantu bamwe byigaragaza mbere y'uko bacirwa urubanza, naho iby'abandi bikagaragara hanyuma." 
1Timothy5:25 Bityo n'ibikorwa byiza na byo byigaragaza mbere y'igihe, kandi naho bitagaragara ako kanya ntibishobora guhora bihishwe." 
1Timothy6:1 Abagizwe inkoreragahato bose nibemere ko ba shebuja bakwiye kubahwa rwose, kugira ngo hatagira utuka Imana cyangwa inyigisho zacu." 
1Timothy6:2 Abafite ba shebuja bemera Kristo ntibakabasuzugure, bitwaza ko ari abavandimwe babo muri Kristo. Ahubwo barusheho gukora bavunika, kuko abafashwa n'umurimo wabo mwiza ari abo bakunda bahuje kwemera Kristo. Dore ibyo ugomba kwigisha no kugiramo abandi inama:" 
1Timothy6:3 nihagira uwigisha ibindi bidahuje n'amagambo ashyitse y'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo n'inyigisho zinogeye Imana," 
1Timothy6:4 uwo ni umwirasi utagira icyo azi, urwaye indwara yo kujya impaka no guterana amagambo. Ibyo ni byo bibyara ishyari n'amakimbirane, gusebanya no gukekera abandi ibibi," 
1Timothy6:5 n'impaka z'urudaca mu bantu bafite ubwenge bwononekaye bakamyemo ukuri. Bibwira ko uwubaha Imana aba yikurikiraniye inyungu. 
1Timothy6:6 Icyakora koko kubaha Imana iyo gufatanyije no kunyurwa n'ibyo ufite, bizana inyungu ikomeye." 
1Timothy6:7 Erega nta cyo twazanye ku isi, kandi nta n'icyo tuzabasha kuyivanaho!" 
1Timothy6:8 Ariko ubwo dufite ibyokurya n'ibyo kwambara nitunyurwe na byo. 
1Timothy6:9 Naho abararikira ubukungu bagwa mu mutego, bagashukwa n'irari ryinshi ry'ubupfu rikabangiza. Ni cyo gituma bahomba byose bakarimbuka." 
1Timothy6:10 Koko gukunda amafaranga ni yo nkomoko y'ibibi byose. Kuyararikira kwatumye bamwe bateshuka bareka Kristo twemera, bakubitana n'ububabare bwinshi." 
1Timothy6:11 Naho wowe muntu w'Imana, ibyo byose ujye ubigendera kure. Uharanire gutunganira Imana no kuyubaha, kuba indahemuka no kugira urukundo, kudacogora no kwiyoroshya." 
1Timothy6:12 Ujye urwana intambara nziza, urwanire Kristo twemera maze usingire ubugingo buhoraho. Ngibyo ibyo wahamagariwe ukabyemeza neza mu ruhame, abantu benshi bakabibera abagabo." 
1Timothy6:13 Imana ibeshaho byose ni yo ntanze ho umugabo, na Kristo Yezu wabaye umugabo w'iby'ukuri yemera imbere ya Ponsiyo Pilato, na we mutanze ho umugabo yuko ngushinze ibi ngibi:" 
1Timothy6:14 ujye ukurikiza ibyo wategetswe nta makemwa, nta n'umugayo kugeza igihe Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo azaba aje." 
1Timothy6:15 Imana nyir'ugusingizwa kandi ishobora byose, yo Mwami ugenga abami ikaba n'Umutegetsi ugenga abategetsi, izabikora igihe cyabyo kigeze." 
1Timothy6:16 Ni yo yonyine ihoraho ituye mu mucyo utegerwa, nta muntu wigeze ayibona kandi ntawe ubasha kuyibona. Ikuzo n'ububasha buhoraho bibe ibyayo. Amina." 
1Timothy6:17 Abakungu b'iki gihe cya none ubihanangirize, kugira ngo birinde gusuzugura no kwiringira ubukungu bushira vuba. Ahubwo biringire Imana yo iduhundazaho ibintu byose ngo tubikoreshe tubyishimira." 
1Timothy6:18 Ubihanangirize kandi bajye bakora neza, ubukungu bwabo bube ibikorwa byiza, bahore biteguye gutanga ku byabo batitangiriye itama." 
1Timothy6:19 Bityo bazaba bafite ifatizo ry'ubukungu bwiza babikiye igihe kizaza, kugira ngo basingire ubugingo nyakuri." 
1Timothy6:20 Nuko rero Timoteyo, urinde icyo washinzwe, ugendere kure y'amagambo y'amanjwe y'abatitaye ku Mana na kure y'impaka z'ingirwabumenyi." 
1Timothy6:21 Bamwe bitwaje ubwo bumenyi bituma bateshuka kuri Kristo twemera. Nyagasani nagumye kubagirira ubuntu. 
2Timothy1:1 Jyewe Pawulo Intumwa ya Kristo Yezu nk'uko Imana yabishatse, ikanshinga kumenyekanisha isezerano ry'ubugingo duherwa muri Kristo Yezu," 
2Timothy1:2 ndakwandikiye Timoteyo mwana wanjye nkunda. Imana Data ikugirire ubuntu, iguhe n'imbabazi n'amahoro, ifatanyije na Kristo Yezu Umwami wacu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndashimira Imana nkorera mfite umutima utandega ikibi, nk'uko ba sogokuruza babigenzaga. Mpora nkwibuka ijoro n'amanywa uko nsenze." 
2Timothy1:4 Iyo nibutse amarira yawe nifuza cyane kongera kukubona, kugira ngo ngire ibyishimo bihebuje." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndibuka ukwizera Kristo kwawe kuzira uburyarya. Uko kwizera ni ko nyogokuru wawe Lowisi yari afite uhereye mbere, nyuma nyoko Unise na we agira uko kwizera, kandi sinshidikanya ko nawe ari ko ufite." 
2Timothy1:6 Ni yo mpamvu nkwibutsa ngo umere nk'uwatsa umuriro, ukangure impano ikurimo Imana yaguhaye igihe nakurambikagaho ibiganza." 
2Timothy1:7 Koko rero umwuka Imana yaduhaye si uwo kutugira abanyabwoba, ahubwo ni Mwuka uduha ububasha n'urukundo no kumenya kwifata." 
2Timothy1:8 Ntukagire isoni zo guhamya Umwami wacu, kandi ntugaterwe isoni n'uko mfunzwe bamumpōra. Ahubwo wemere kugirirwa nabi kimwe nanjye kubera Ubutumwa bwiza, Imana ibigushoboje." 
2Timothy1:9 Ni yo yadukijije, iduhamagarira kuba intore zayo bidatewe n'ibikorwa byacu, ahubwo bitewe n'umugambi wayo n'ubuntu yatugiriye. Kuva mbere na mbere Imana yatugiriye ubwo buntu muri Kristo Yezu." 
2Timothy1:10 Ariko noneho bwashyizwe ku mugaragaro, igihe Umukiza wacu Kristo Yezu yazaga. Ni we watsembye ubushobozi bw'urupfu, maze ahishura ubugingo budashira akoresheje Ubutumwa bwiza." 
2Timothy1:11 Ubwo Butumwa ni bwo nashinzwe gutangaza ngo mbubere intumwa n'umwigisha. 
2Timothy1:12 Ni na yo mpamvu ituma mbabazwa ntyo. Nyamara ntibinkoza isoni kuko nzi uwo nizeye, kandi nkaba nzi neza ko afite ububasha bwo kurinda ibyo yanshinze, kugeza kuri wa munsi Kristo azazaho." 
2Timothy1:13 Inyigisho zishyitse wanyumvanye uzifate ho urugero uzajya ukurikiza, bityo ukomere kuri Kristo Yezu umwizeye kandi ufite urukundo." 
2Timothy1:14 Ibyiza washinzwe ubirinde ufashijwe na Mwuka Muziranenge uba muri twe. 
2Timothy1:15 Nk'uko ubizi abo mu ntara ya Aziya bose barantereranye, barimo Figelo na Erimogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Nyagasani nagirire neza urugo rwa Onesiforo, kuko yampumurije kenshi ntaterwe isoni n'ingoyi ndiho." 
2Timothy1:17 Ahubwo akigera i Roma yanshatse ashyizeho umwete maze arambona. 
2Timothy1:18 Ntawe ukurusha kumenya ibyiza yangiriye turi Efezi. Kuri wa munsi Nyagasani azamugirire imbabazi, zitangwa na Nyagasani ubwe." 
2Timothy2:1 Wowe rero mwana wanjye, uhagarare kigabo ubishobojwe n'ubuntu Kristo Yezu akugirira." 
2Timothy2:2 Ibyo wanyumvanye hari abahamya benshi, nawe ubishinge abantu b'indahemuka bazashobora kubyigisha abandi." 
2Timothy2:3 Ujye ufatanya nanjye kwihanganira amagorwa, nk'uko bikwiye umusirikari mwiza wa Kristo Yezu." 
2Timothy2:4 Nta musirikari wagira ibindi ahugiramo ngo abe akinejeje uwamwohereje ku rugamba. 
2Timothy2:5 Igihe kandi abantu barushanwa, nta wahembwa ikamba rigenewe abatsinze, keretse akurikije amategeko y'irushanwa." 
2Timothy2:6 Umuhinzi kandi ni we ubanza kuganura ku byo yavunikiye. 
2Timothy2:7 Uzirikane ibyo mvuze, Nyagasani azaguha kubisobanukirwa byose." 
2Timothy2:8 “Ujye wibuka Yezu Kristo, wazutse mu bapfuye, kandi ukomoka kuri Dawidi”, nk'uko Ubutumwa bwiza namamaza bubivuga." 
2Timothy2:9 Ubwo Butumwa ni bwo mpōrwa, ngashyirwa no ku ngoyi nk'umugizi wa nabi. Nyamara Ijambo ry'Imana ryo ntirishyirwa ku ngoyi." 
2Timothy2:10 Ni yo mpamvu nihanganira byose kubera abo Imana yitoranyirije, kugira ngo na bo bahabwe agakiza kabonerwa muri Yezu Kristo hamwe n'ikuzo rihoraho." 
2Timothy2:11 Iri jambo ni iry'ukuri: “Niba twarapfanye na we, na none tuzabanaho na we." 
2Timothy2:12 Nitugumya kwihangana, tuzimana ingoma na we. Nitumwihakana, na we azatwihakana." 
2Timothy2:13 Niyo twamuhemukira we ahora ari indahemuka, kuko atabasha kwica Isezerano.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Ibyo byose ujye ubyibutsa abantu bose, ubihanangirize utanze Imana ho umugabo, ngo birinde amagambo atera impaka kuko nta cyo amaze, uretse gusenya abayumva." 
2Timothy2:15 Ujye wihatira kwishyīra Imana nk'umukozi ushimwa, utagomba guterwa isoni n'umurimo ayikorera, ahubwo ujye uvuga Ijambo ryayo ry'ukuri uko riri." 
2Timothy2:16 Naho amagambo y'amanjwe y'abatemera Imana ujye uyagendera kure, kuko abayasamarira barushaho kutayubaha." 
2Timothy2:17 Inyigisho zabo zimunga abantu nk'igisebe cy'umufunzo. Muri abo harimo Himeneyo na Fileto. 
2Timothy2:18 Barateshutse bareka ukuri, bavuga ko izuka ry'abapfuye ryarangiye. Bityo bagatesha bamwe Kristo bemeraga." 
2Timothy2:19 Nyamara haracyariho ifatizo rikomeye ryashyizweho n'Imana, rirangwa n'iri jambo ngo: “Nyagasani azi abe ”, kandi ngo: “Uvuga ko ari uwa Nyagasani wese nareke gukora ibibi.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Mu nzu nini ntihaba ibikoresho by'izahabu n'iby'ifeza gusa, haba hari n'ibindi byakozwe mu biti no mu ibumba. Bimwe bigenerwa imirimo y'icyubahiro, ibindi imirimo isuzuguritse." 
2Timothy2:21 Uwiboneza rero akimaraho ibyo bibi, azaba igikoresho kigenewe imirimo y'icyubahiro, cyeguriwe nyira cyo kikamugirira akamaro, kandi gikwiranye n'ibikorwa byiza byose." 
2Timothy2:22 Irari rya gisore ujye urigendera kure, ahubwo ushishikarire kuba intungane n'indahemuka no kugira urukundo n'amahoro, ufatanyije n'abandi biyambaza Nyagasani bataryarya." 
2Timothy2:23 Naho impaka ziterwa n'ubujiji n'amanjwe ujye uzirinda, kuko uzi ko zibyara amahane." 
2Timothy2:24 Erega ntibikwiye ko umugaragu wa Nyagasani agira amahane, ahubwo akwiriye kuba umugwaneza kuri bose, ushoboye kwigisha kandi wihangana." 
2Timothy2:25 Agomba kwigisha abamurwanya afite ubugwaneza. Ahari Imana yazabemeza kwihana bagasobanukirwa neza ukuri kwayo," 
2Timothy2:26 bityo bakabasha kwisubiraho maze bakigobotora mu mitego y'umwanzi Satani, wabagize imbohe ze ngo bakore ibyo ashaka." 
2Timothy3:1 Umenye neza ko mu minsi y'imperuka hazaza ibihe bikomeye. 
2Timothy3:2 Abantu bazaba bikunda, bakunda ifaranga, birata, bikuza, batuka Imana, batumvira ababyeyi. Bazaba ari indashima, batubaha Imana," 
2Timothy3:3 badakunda ababo, batagira impuhwe, babeshyerana, bahubuka. Bazaba ari abanyarugomo n'abanzi b'ibyiza," 
2Timothy3:4 abagambanyi n'ibyihebe n'abikakaza. Bazaba bakunda ibibanezeza aho gukunda Imana. 
2Timothy3:5 Bazigira nk'abubaha Imana, ariko bahinyura ububasha bitera. Abo bose ujye ubagendera kure." 
2Timothy3:6 Bamwe muri bo bakunda gusesera mu mazu, bakigarurira ingirwabagore zashenguwe n'ibyaha, zigengwa n'irari ry'uburyo butari bumwe." 
2Timothy3:7 Ni abantu bahora biga iby'Imana, ariko ntibigere bamenya ukuri kwayo." 
2Timothy3:8 Nk'uko Yane na Yambure barwanyije Musa, ni na ko abo bantu barwanya ukuri. Ni abantu bafite ubwenge bwononekaye, kandi ukwemera Kristo kwabo kwarahinyutse." 
2Timothy3:9 Ariko rero nta ho bizabageza kuko ubupfu bwabo buzagaragarira bose, nk'uko byagenze kuri Yane na Yambure." 
2Timothy3:10 Ariko wowe wakurikije neza ibyo nigisha n'uko nifata n'ibyo ngamije. Uzi kandi ukwizera kwanjye n'ukwihangana kwanjye, urukundo rwanjye n'ukudacogora kwanjye." 
2Timothy3:11 Uzi n'ukuntu natotejwe, ndetse n'amakuba nagiriye mu mujyi wa Antiyokiya n'uwa Ikoniyo n'uw'i Lisitira. Mbega ngo ndatotezwa! Nyamara ibyo byose Nyagasani yarabinkijije." 
2Timothy3:12 Erega n'ubundi abashaka bose guhora bubaha Imana, kubera Kristo Yezu ni ukuri bazatotezwa!" 
2Timothy3:13 Naho abagizi ba nabi n'abashukanyi bazarushaho kuba babi, bayobye abandi na bo bagire ababayobya." 
2Timothy3:14 Ariko wowe ukomere ku byo wigishijwe ukiyemeza ko ari iby'ukuri, kandi ukaba uzi neza ababikwigishije." 
2Timothy3:15 Uhereye mu buto bwawe wamenye Ibyanditswe Imana yatugeneye, bibasha kukumenyesha ubwenge bwo kukugeza ku gakiza, ubikesha kwizera Kristo Yezu." 
2Timothy3:16 Ibyo Byanditswe byose byahumetswe n'Imana, kandi bifite akamaro ko kwigisha umuntu ukuri no kwamagana ibibi, gukosora umuntu no kumumenyereza gutunganira Imana," 
2Timothy3:17 kugira ngo umuntu w'Imana abe ashyitse kandi atunganyirijwe rwose gukora ibyiza byose. 
2Timothy4:1 Ndakwihanangiriza ntanze Imana ho umugabo, hamwe na Kristo Yezu uzacira imanza abazima n'abapfuye, no kubera ukuza kwe aje kwima ingoma ye," 
2Timothy4:2 utangaze Ijambo ry'Imana, urivuge mu gihe cyiza no mu gihe gikomeye. Ukosore abantu, ubacyahe, ubahugure ufite kubihanganira no kubigisha ubutitsa." 
2Timothy4:3 Koko igihe kizaza abantu bamwe be kwihanganira inyigisho zishyitse, ahubwo bakurikize ibyifuzo byabo bwite. Bityo bazikoranyirizaho abigisha benshi bababwira ibihuje n'ibyo bashaka kumva." 
2Timothy4:4 Bazajya bica amatwi ngo batumva ukuri, ahubwo bahindukirire ibitekerezo by'imburamumaro." 
2Timothy4:5 Nyamara wowe uramenye, uko byaba kose ujye wirinda muri byose, wihanganire kubabazwa, ukore umurimo wo gutangaza Ubutumwa bwiza, bityo urangize umurimo washinzwe n'Imana." 
2Timothy4:6 Naho jyewe dore ubu ngiye gutangwa ho igitambo. Igihe cyanjye cyo kwitarura kirageze. 
2Timothy4:7 Narwanye intambara nziza, nageze aho dusiganirwa kugera kandi Kristo twemera namukomeyeho." 
2Timothy4:8 Ahasigaye nteganyirijwe ikamba ry'ubutungane, iryo Nyagasani azangororera we mucamanza utabera, umunsi azazaho. Si jye jyenyine azariha, ahubwo azariha n'abantu bose bazaba bafitiye ubwuzu kumubona aje." 
2Timothy4:9 Wihatire kungeraho vuba," 
2Timothy4:10 kuko Dema yantereranye abitewe no gukunda iby'iyi si. Yigiriye i Tesaloniki, Kiresensi ajya mu ntara ya Galati, naho Tito ajya mu ya Dalumatiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka wenyine ni we turi kumwe. Uzaze unzaniye Mariko kuko angirira akamaro mu murimo. 
2Timothy4:12 Tikiko namutumye Efezi. 
2Timothy4:13 Uzaze unzaniye igishura nasize i Tirowa kwa Karupo, hamwe n'ibitabo cyane cyane iby'imizingo y'uruhu." 
2Timothy4:14 Umucuzi Alegisanderi yankoreye ibibi byinshi. Nyagasani azamugirira ibikwiranye n'ibyo yakoze. 
2Timothy4:15 Nawe umwirinde kuko yarwanyije inyigisho zacu bikomeye. 
2Timothy4:16 Mu iburana ryanjye rya mbere nta wamperekeje, bose barantereranye. Imana ntizabibahōre." 
2Timothy4:17 Nyagasani we twari kumwe, bityo ampa ububasha ngo ntangaze Ubutumwa bwiza mu batari Abayahudi bose babwumve. Bityo yangobotoye nk'umvanye mu rwasaya rw'intare." 
2Timothy4:18 Nyagasani azandokora ibibi byose bangirira, hanyuma azangeze mu bwami bwe bwo mu ijuru. Nahabwe ikuzo uko ibihe bihaye ibindi. Amina." 
2Timothy4:19 Tashya Purisila na Akwila, kimwe n'ab'urugo rwa Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasito yagumye i Korinti, naho Tirofimo namusize i Mileto arwaye." 
2Timothy4:21 Uzagerageze kuza mbere y'amezi y'imbeho. Ubulo na Pudensi na Lino na Kilawudiya n'abavandimwe bose ngo mutahe. 
2Timothy4:22 Nyagasani abane nawe. Nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese. 
Titus1:1 Jyewe Pawulo umugaragu w'Imana nkaba n'Intumwa ya Yezu Kristo, natumwe ku bo Imana yitoranyirije ngo mbageze ku kwizera Kristo no kumenya ukuri guhuje no kūbaha Imana," 
Titus1:2 kugira ngo biringire kuzabona ubugingo buhoraho Imana itabeshya yasezeranye kuva kera kose. 
Titus1:3 Mu gihe kigenwe igaragaza Ubutumwa bwayo, maze inshinga umurimo wo kubutangaza nkurikije itegeko ry'iyo Mana Umukiza wacu." 
Titus1:4 Ndakwandikiye Tito mwana wanjye by'ukuri, bitewe no kwemera Kristo dusangiye. Imana Data nikugirire ubuntu, iguhe n'amahoro, ifatanyije na Kristo Yezu Umukiza wacu." 
Titus1:5 Icyatumye nkurekera i Kireti ni ukugira ngo utunganye ibyasigaye bitari ku murongo, no gushyira abakuru b'itorero ry'Imana muri buri mujyi ukurikije amabwiriza naguhaye." 
Titus1:6 Buri wese muri bo agomba kuba indakemwa akaba n'umugabo ufite umugore umwe, abana be bakaba bemera Kristo, batarangwaho kuba ibyomanzi cyangwa ibyigomeke." 
Titus1:7 Erega n'ubundi umuyobozi w'Umuryango w'Imana agomba kuba indakemwa, kubera ko ashinzwe ibintu byayo! Ntakwiye kuba mudakurwakwijambo cyangwa umunyamujinya, cyangwa umunywi w'inzoga cyangwa umurwanyi, cyangwa se umuntu wiruka ku nyungu zishingiye ku buhemu." 
Titus1:8 Agomba kuba umuntu ukunda kwakira abashyitsi, kandi agakunda n'icyitwa icyiza cyose. Agomba kuba ashyira mu gaciro, ari intungane n'inyangamugayo kandi azi kwifata." 
Titus1:9 Agomba kuba akomeye ku magambo adahinyuka ahuje n'ibyo yigishijwe. Ubwo ni bwo azashobora gukomeza abandi akoresheje inyigisho zishyitse, kandi agatsinda abamugisha impaka." 
Titus1:10 Koko rero hariho benshi b'ibyigomeke bavuga amagambo y'amanjwe kandi babeshya, cyane cyane Abayahudi bihambira ku muhango wo gukebwa." 
Titus1:11 Ni ngombwa kubacecekesha, kuko hari ingo bageramo bakazisenya rwose bigisha ibidakwiye, babiterwa no guharanira inyungu zishingiye ku buhemu." 
Titus1:12 Umuhanuzi umwe wo mu Banyakireti ubwabo yaravuze ati: “Abanyakireti iteka ni ababeshyi, ni inyamaswa zuzuye ubugome, ni inda nsa kandi ni inkorabusa.”" 
Titus1:13 Ibyo ahamya ni ukuri. Ni cyo gituma ukwiye kubacyaha ukomeje, kugira ngo bemere Kristo ku buryo bushyitse," 
Titus1:14 bareke kwihambira ku bitekerezo bidafite ishingiro by'Abayahudi no ku mabwiriza y'abantu bacurika ukuri. 
Titus1:15 Abatunganye nta kitabatunganira, naho abanduye imitima batemera Kristo nta na kimwe kibatunganira, ubwenge bwabo buba bwononekaye n'imitima yabo iba itakibashinja ikibi." 
Titus1:16 Bemeza ko bazi Imana, nyamara ibyo bakora bikabavuguruza. Ni indashoboka n'intumvira, nta cyiza na kimwe wabashinga gukora." 
Titus2:1 Wowe ujye wemeza abantu imyifatire ihuye n'inyigisho ziboneye. 
Titus2:2 Abasaza ubabwire ngo be gutegekwa n'inda, ahubwo biyubahe, bashyire mu gaciro, bemere Kristo ku buryo bushyitse, bagire n'urukundo kandi be gucogora." 
Titus2:3 Abakecuru na bo ni uko, ubabwire bifate uko bikwiye abantu bubaha Imana. Ntibabe abanyamazimwe cyangwa abaja b'inzoga. Ahubwo bajye bigisha abandi ibyiza." 
Titus2:4 Bamenyereze abagore bakiri bato gukunda abagabo babo n'abana babo," 
Titus2:5 babigishe kuba abanyangesonziza no kutiyandarika, no gukorera ingo no kugira umutima, no kwemera kugengwa n'abagabo bashakanye kugira ngo hatagira utuka Ijambo ry'Imana." 
Titus2:6 Abasore na bo ubihanangirize utyo, kugira ngo mu byo bakora byose bajye bashyira mu gaciro. Nawe witange ho urugero rw'ibikorwa byiza. Mu kwigisha abantu ube indakemwa kandi wiyubahe." 
Titus2:7  
Titus2:8 Ibyo ubabwira bibe bishyitse kandi bitagayitse, kugira ngo abaturwanya bamware babure ikibi batuvugaho." 
Titus2:9 Abagaragu b'inkoreragahato bemere kugengwa na ba shebuja ku buryo bwose babashimisha, batabavuguruza" 
Titus2:10 kandi nta cyo babība. Ahubwo babe indahemuka rwose, kugira ngo baheshe agaciro inyigisho z'Imana Umukiza wacu ku buryo bwose." 
Titus2:11 Erega ubuntu bw'Imana bwamaze kugaragara, ni bwo sōko y'agakiza ku bantu bose!" 
Titus2:12 Ubwo buntu butwigisha kuzinukwa imico mibi yo kutubaha Imana no kurarikira iby'isi, kugira ngo muri ibi bihe bya none tumenye kwifata, tugire n'imibereho itunganye yo kubaha Imana." 
Titus2:13 Ni na ko dukwiye kumera tugitegereje umunsi muhire dufitiye ubwuzu, ubwo Yezu Kristo ari we Mana yacu ikomeye n'Umukiza azaza afite ikuzo." 
Titus2:14 Ni we witanze kugira ngo aducungure, atuvane mu bugome bwose kandi ngo atweze, atugire abantu be bwite bafite ishyaka ryo gukora ibyiza." 
Titus2:15 Ibyo ni byo ugomba kumenyesha abakumva, ubakomeze kandi ubacyahe, ukoresheje ubushobozi bwose wahawe. Ntihakagire n'umwe ugusuzugura." 
Titus3:1 Ujye wibutsa Abakristo bose kwemera kugengwa n'abatware n'abandi bafite ubushobozi, no kubumvira no guhora biteguye gukora ikintu cyose cyiza." 
Titus3:2 Ntibakagire uwo basebya, ahubwo birinde amahane biyoroshye iteka, babere bose abagwaneza." 
Titus3:3 Burya natwe twahoze turi abapfu n'indakoreka turi mu buyobe. Twari mu buja bw'irari ribi n'ubw'umudamararo ku buryo butari bumwe. Twari abagome n'abanyeshyari, twangwa natwe twangana." 
Titus3:4 Ariko igihe kigeze, Imana Umukiza wacu igaragaza ubuntu igirira abantu n'urukundo ibakunda," 
Titus3:5 ni ko kudukiza, itabitewe n'uko twakoze ibiyitunganiye, ahubwo ibitewe n'imbabazi zayo. Yadukirishije kutwuhagira, iduha kuvuka ubwa kabiri no guhindurwa bashya na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Titus3:6 Mwuka uwo Imana yamudusakajeho itaziganya, ikoresheje Yezu Kristo Umukiza wacu." 
Titus3:7 Kwari ukugira ngo tuyitunganire kubera ubuntu yatugiriye, duhabwe n'umunani ari wo bugingo buhoraho twiringiye kuzahabwa." 
Titus3:8 Iryo jambo ni iry'ukuri. Ndashaka ko wita ukomeje kuri izo ngingo, kugira ngo abantu bose bafitiye Imana icyizere bashishikarire bihebuje gukora ibyiza. Ibyo nta ko bisa, ni na byo bifitiye abantu akamaro." 
Titus3:9 Naho impaka z'amanjwe n'ibyerekeye ibisekuruza, n'intonganya n'imburanya zishingiye ku Mategeko ujye ubigendera kure. Nta kamaro bifite, nta n'aho bigeza umuntu." 
Titus3:10 Umuntu uca ibice mu ba Kristo, numara kumuburira ubwa mbere n'ubwa kabiri umwigizeyo." 
Titus3:11 Urabizi umuntu nk'uwo aba yariyandaritse, ni umunyabyaha, ibibi akora ni byo bimushinja." 
Titus3:12 Nimara kugutumaho Aritema cyangwa Tikiko, uzagerageze kunsanga i Nikopoli kuko ari ho niyemeje kumara amezi y'imbeho." 
Titus3:13 Gira umwete wo gutegura urugendo rwa Apolo n'urwa Zena umuhanga mu kuburanira abantu, kugira ngo batazagira icyo babura." 
Titus3:14 Abantu bacu nibimenyereze gushishikarira ibikorwa byiza kugira ngo babone uko bagoboka abandi, bityo be kuba imburamumaro." 
Titus3:15 Abo turi kumwe bose baragutashya. Tashya abadukunda dusangiye kwemera Kristo. Nyagasani nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese. 
Philemon1:1 Jyewe Pawulo waboshywe mpōrwa Yezu Kristo, jye n'umuvandimwe Timoteyo, turakuramutsa ncuti yacu Filemoni dusangiye umurimo," 
Philemon1:2 tutibagiwe na mushiki wacu Afiya na Arikipo, dufatanyije kuba ku rugamba kimwe n'itorero rya Kristo rikoranira mu rugo rwawe." 
Philemon1:3 Imana Data nibagirire ubuntu, ibahe n'amahoro, ifatanyije na Nyagasani Yezu Kristo." 
Philemon1:4 Filemoni, igihe cyose nsenze ndakuzirikana ngashimira Imana yanjye," 
Philemon1:5 kuko numva bavuga ukuntu wizera Nyagasani Yezu, ugakunda n'intore z'Imana zose." 
Philemon1:6 Ndasaba Imana ngo ukwizera Kristo dusangiye kukugirire akamaro, gutume urushaho gusobanukirwa ibyiza byose duheshwa na we." 
Philemon1:7 Muvandimwe, urukundo rwawe rwanteye ibyishimo, rundema n'agatima kuko wahumurije intore z'Imana." 
Philemon1:8 Ubusanzwe rero mfite uburenganzira mpabwa na Kristo, bwo kugutegeka gukora ibikwiriye nta cyo nishisha." 
Philemon1:9 Nyamara kuko ngukunda mpisemo ahubwo kubigusaba. Jyewe Pawulo, ubu ugeze mu zabukuru nkaba ndi n'imfungwa mpōrwa Kristo Yezu," 
Philemon1:10 ndakwinginga ku byerekeye Onezimo. Ni umwana wanjye nibyariye ndi ku ngoyi. 
Philemon1:11 Uwari warakubereye imburamumaro, ubu atubereye twembi ingirakamaro." 
Philemon1:12 Ndamukoherereje rero nguwo ni ubura bwanjye. 
Philemon1:13 Mba narahisemo kumwigumanira hano ngo ankorere mu mwanya wawe, ndi ku ngoyi mpōrwa Ubutumwa bwiza." 
Philemon1:14 Nyamara nta cyo nashatse gukora utakinyemereye, kugira ngo ineza wagira uyigire ku bwende bwawe atari uko ubihatiwe." 
Philemon1:15 Ubirebye, Onezimo yaba yaratandukanye nawe by'akanya gato, kugira ngo uzamwakire mubane iteka" 
Philemon1:16 atakiri umugaragu w'inkoreragahato, ahubwo arenze kuba umugaragu, abaye umuvandimwe w'inkoramutima. Jyewe ubwanjye ni ko mubona ndetse cyane, ariko wowe uzarushaho kumubona utyo kubera imibanire isanzwe no kubera kuba umwe muri Nyagasani." 
Philemon1:17 Niba rero wumva ko turi umwe, umwakire nk'aho ari jye wakiriye." 
Philemon1:18 Niba kandi yaragufudikiye cyangwa hari icyo agomba kukwishyura, ube ari jye ubibaraho." 
Philemon1:19 Ibi ni jye Pawulo ubyiyandikiye n'ukwanjye kuboko, nzamwishyurira. Siniriwe nkwibutsa umwenda nawe undimo. Erega uwo mwenda ni wowe ubwawe!" 
Philemon1:20 Nyabuneka muvandimwe, ungirire ubwo buntu kubera Nyagasani, bityo uraba ufatanyije na Kristo kundema agatima." 
Philemon1:21 Nkwandikiye niringiye ko uzanyumvira, ugakora ibyo ngusabye ndetse ukarushaho." 
Philemon1:22 Si ibyo gusa, muntegurire n'icumbi kuko niringira ko Imana yumvise amasengesho yanyu, ikazangarura muri mwe." 
Philemon1:23 Epafura tubohanywe duhōrwa Kristo Yezu aragutashya," 
Philemon1:24 kimwe na Mariko na Arisitariko, na Dema na Luka dufatanyije umurimo." 
Philemon1:25 Nyagasani Yezu Kristo nagumye kubagirira ubuntu. 
Hebrews1:1 Kera Imana yamenyesheje ba sogokuruza ibyayo kenshi no ku buryo bwinshi, ibatumyeho abahanuzi." 
Hebrews1:2 Ariko ubu tugeze mu gihe cy'imperuka, yatumenyesheje ibyayo idutumyeho Umwana wayo. Uwo ni we yateganyije guha byose ho umunani, kandi ni na we yakoresheje kurema byose." 
Hebrews1:3 Uwo Mwana w'Imana ni we urabagirana ho ikuzo ryayo, ni na we ubonekwaho n'imiterere yayo nyakuri. Ni we ushyigikiye ibintu byose kubera ububasha bw'ijambo rye. Arangije umurimo wo kweza abantu akabahanaguraho ibyaha, yicaye mu ijuru ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bw'Imana nyir'ubuhangange." 
Hebrews1:4 Imana yahaye uwo Mwana wayo gusumba kure abamarayika, nk'uko izina yahawe risumba iryabo." 
Hebrews1:5 Koko nta mumarayika n'umwe Imana yigeze ibwira iti: “Ni wowe Mwana wanjye, kuva uyu munsi ndi So.” Cyangwa se ngo ivuge iti: “Jyewe nzamubera Se, na we ambere umwana.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Nyamara kandi igihe Imana yoherezaga impfura yayo ku isi, yaravuze iti: “Abamarayika bose b'Imana nibamuramye.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Ku byerekeye abamarayika yaravuze iti: “Igira abamarayika bayo imiyaga, abo bagaragu bayo ibagira ibirimi by'umuriro.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Naho ku byerekeye Umwana wayo iravuga iti: “Mana, ingoma yawe ihoraho iteka ryose, abantu bawe ubategekesha ubutabera." 
Hebrews1:9 Ukunda ubutungane ukanga ubugome, ni yo mpamvu Imana ari yo Mana yawe yagusīze amavuta, yakurobanuye muri bagenzi bawe, igusendereza ibyishimo.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Na none iti: “Nyagasani, mbere na mbere wahanze isi, ijuru na ryo ni umurimo w'intoki zawe." 
Hebrews1:11 Ibyo bizashiraho ariko wowe uzahoraho, byose bizasaza nk'umwambaro." 
Hebrews1:12 Uzabizingazinga nk'uzingazinga umwenda, bizahindurwa nk'uko imyambaro ihinduranywa. Ariko wowe uzahora uri uko wahoze, ntuzigera ugira iherezo.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Nta mumarayika n'umwe Imana yigeze ibwira iti: “Icara ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bwanjye, nanjye nzahindura abanzi bawe nk'akabaho ukandagizaho ibirenge.”" 
Hebrews1:14 None se abamarayika ni iki? Bose ni ingabo zo mu ijuru zikorera Imana, zatumwe gufasha abagenewe guhabwa agakiza ho umunani." 
Hebrews2:1 Ni cyo gituma tugomba kwita cyane ku byo twumvise, kugira ngo tutayoba tukagenda buheriheri." 
Hebrews2:2 Ubutumwa bwavuzwe n'abamarayika bwari bukaze, ku buryo ababucumuyeho ntibabwumvire, bahawe igihano kibakwiriye." 
Hebrews2:3 None se twebwe tuzarokoka dute niba twirengagiza agakiza gakomeye gatyo? Ibyerekeye ako gakiza byabanje gutangazwa na Nyagasani, maze ababyumvise batwemeza ko ari ukuri." 
Hebrews2:4 Imana na yo ishyigikira ibyo bemeje itanga ibimenyetso, ikora ibitangaza n'ibindi bikorwa by'ububasha bitari bimwe, inagaba impano za Mwuka Muziranenge uko ishatse." 
Hebrews2:5 Erega si abamarayika Imana yahaye kugenga isi izabaho, ari na yo tuvuga!" 
Hebrews2:6 Ahubwo mu Byanditswe hari uwavuze ati: “Mana, mbese umuntu ni iki byatuma umuzirikana, ikiremwamuntu ni iki byatuma ucyitaho?" 
Hebrews2:7 Habuzeho gato ngo umuntu umugire nk'abamarayika, wamutamirije ikamba ry'ikuzo n'icyubahiro," 
Hebrews2:8 byose urabimuha kugira ngo abigenge.” Igihe Imana yeguriraga umuntu ibintu byose nta na kimwe yasize. Nyamara kugeza ubu ntiturabona koko umuntu agenga byose. 
Hebrews2:9 Ahubwo Yezu ni we tubona, yacishijwe bugufi, abamarayika bamusumba ho gato. Kwari ukugira ngo anyure mu rupfu, abigiriye abantu bose – ubwo ni bwo buntu Imana yagize. Ariko none yambitswe ikuzo n'icyubahiro nk'ikamba, abitewe n'urupfu yapfuye." 
Hebrews2:10 Imana yaremye byose ibigira ibyayo. Byari bikwiye rero ko itunganya Yezu bidasubirwaho imucishije mu mibabaro, kuko ari we wagenewe kuyobora abantu ku gakiza. Kwari ukugira ngo Imana igeze ku ikuzo ryayo abantu benshi yagize abana bayo." 
Hebrews2:11 Ari Yezu ugeza abantu ku Mana ari n'abo ayigezaho, bose bafite inkomoko imwe. Ni cyo gituma Yezu atagira isoni zo kuvuga ko ari abavandimwe be." 
Hebrews2:12 Nuko akabwira Imana ati: “Nzakuratira abavandimwe banjye, ngusingize mu ikoraniro ry'abayoboke bawe.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Akongera akavuga ati: “Imana ni yo nzaba mfitiye icyizere”, kandi ati: “Dore ndi hano hamwe n'abana Imana yampaye.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Ubwo rero abo yagize abana bayo bahūzwa no kugira umubiri n'amaraso, Yezu na we ubwe yabihuriyeho na bo. Kwari ukugira ngo kubera urupfu rwe anyage Satani ubushobozi, we wagengaga imbaraga z'urupfu," 
Hebrews2:15 maze avane mu buja ababubayemo kuva bakivuka babitewe no gutinya urupfu. 
Hebrews2:16 Erega si abamarayika yaje kugoboka, ahubwo ni urubyaro rwa Aburahamu!" 
Hebrews2:17 Kubera iyo mpamvu yagombaga guhinduka, akamera nk'abavandimwe be ku buryo bwose, kugira ngo abe Umutambyi mukuru udahemuka kandi ugira imbabazi, ahagararire abantu imbere y'Imana, ahongerere ibyaha byabo kugira ngo bababarirwe." 
Hebrews2:18 Nuko rero abasha kugoboka abageragezwa, kubera ko na we yageragejwe akababazwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Bavandimwe, Imana yarabatoranyije ibahamagarira guhabwa umugabane w'ibyiza by'ijuru. Nuko rero nimuzirikane Yezu, uwo Imana yagize Intumwa yayo n'Umutambyi mukuru, kandi akaba ari we dukesha kwemera ibyayo mu ruhame." 
Hebrews3:2 Ni indahemuka ku Mana yamuhamagariye uwo murimo, kimwe na Musa wabaye indahemuka mu byo yamushinze byose." 
Hebrews3:3 Nk'uko umwubatsi ahabwa icyubahiro kirenze icy'inzu yubatse, ni na ko Yezu akwiye guhabwa ikuzo risumba irya Musa." 
Hebrews3:4 Inzu yose igira uwayubatse, naho Imana ni yo mwubatsi wa byose." 
Hebrews3:5 Musa yabaye indahemuka, ari umugaragu wo gukorera inzu yose y'Imana, ashinzwe kugaragaza ibyari kuzavugwa na yo." 
Hebrews3:6 Naho Kristo we yabaye indahemuka, ari Umwana wayo ushinzwe gutegeka inzu yayo. Iyo nzu ni twe niba dukomeye ku byo twiringiye dushize amanga [kugeza ku iherezo]." 
Hebrews3:7 Ni cyo gituma mu Byanditswe Mwuka Muziranenge avuga ati: “Uyu munsi nimwumva icyo Imana ibabwira," 
Hebrews3:8 ntimunangire imitima nka cya gihe cy'imyivumbagatanyo, wa munsi mwangeragezaga mu butayu," 
Hebrews3:9 ubwo ba sokuruza bangeragezaga bampinyuza, nubwo bari biboneye ibyo nakoze." 
Hebrews3:10 Ni cyo cyatumye ndakarira ab'icyo gihe imyaka mirongo ine. Ni ko kuvuga nti: ‘Bahora bateshuka, ntibagenza uko nshaka.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Nuko ndahirana uburakari nti: ‘Ntibateze kwinjira aho kuruhukira nagennye.’ ” 
Hebrews3:12 Bavandimwe, muramenye ntihakagire n'umwe muri mwe wagira umutima mubi utizera bigatuma yimūra Imana nzima." 
Hebrews3:13 Ahubwo mukomezanye buri munsi mu gihe cyose hacyitwa “uyu munsi”, kugira ngo hatagira uwo ibyaha bishuka akinangira." 
Hebrews3:14 Twahawe gukorana na Kristo, niba tukimufitiye icyizere twatangiranye kuzageza ku iherezo." 
Hebrews3:15 Dore uko Ibyanditswe bibivuga: “Uyu munsi nimwumva icyo ibabwira, ntimwinangire imitima nka cya gihe cy'imyivumbagatanyo.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Ni ba nde bumvise ijwi ry'Imana nyamara bakivumbagatanya? Ni ba bandi bose bavuye mu Misiri bayobowe na Musa! 
Hebrews3:17 Ni ba nde se Imana yarakariye imyaka mirongo ine? Ni ba bandi bacumuye, imirambo yabo igakwira mu butayu!" 
Hebrews3:18 Ni ba nde se kandi Imana yarahiye ko batazinjira ha hantu ho kuruhukira yagennye? Ni ba bandi banze kuyumvira! 
Hebrews3:19 Tubona kandi ko batabashije kuhinjira, bitewe n'uko batizera Imana." 
Hebrews4:1 Haracyariho Isezerano ryo kwinjira aho kuruhukira Imana yagennye. Nuko rero twitonde, hato hatazaboneka n'umwe muri mwe waryivutsa." 
Hebrews4:2 Erega natwe twabwiwe Ubutumwa bwiza nk'uko ba bandi ba kera babubwiwe! Bo nta cyo bwabamariye, kuko igihe babwumvaga batabwemeye ngo bizere Imana." 
Hebrews4:3 Naho twebwe abayizeye, twinjira aho kuruhukira yagennye. Aho ni ha handi yavuze iti: “Ndahiranye uburakari nti: ‘Ntibateze kwinjira aho kuruhukira nagennye.’ ” Ni ko Imana yabivuze, nubwo kuva isi ikiremwa yari yararangije gukora umurimo wayo," 
Hebrews4:4 koko kandi, hari aho Ibyanditswe bivuga ibyerekeye umunsi wa karindwi biti: “Ku munsi wa karindwi, Imana iruhuka imirimo yose yari yakoze.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Aho na none Ibyanditswe birongera biti: “Ntibazinjira aho kuruhukira nagennye.” 
Hebrews4:6 Aba mbere bagejejweho Ubutumwa bwiza ntibinjiye aho hantu kubera kutumvira Imana kwabo. Bityo haracyari umwanya w'abandi bashaka kuhinjira. 
Hebrews4:7 Ni cyo gituma Imana yongeye gushyiraho umunsi, ari wo “uyu munsi.” Bitinze cyane yongeye kubivuga nka mbere, ikoresheje Dawidi wavuze ati: “Uyu munsi nimwumva icyo Imana ibabwira, ntimwinangire imitima.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Koko kandi iyo Yozuwe aza kubageza aho baruhukira, Imana ntiyari kuzashyiraho undi munsi." 
Hebrews4:9 Nuko rero haracyariho isabato ari cyo kiruhuko kigenewe abantu b'Imana," 
Hebrews4:10 kuko uwinjiye aho kuruhukira Imana yagennye aba aruhutse imirimo ye, nk'uko Imana yaruhutse iyayo." 
Hebrews4:11 Nuko rero twihatire kwinjira aho hantu ho kuruhukira, kugira ngo hatagira n'umwe ukurikiza urugero rwa ba bandi batumviye Imana, maze akīvutsa icyo kiruhuko." 
Hebrews4:12 Ijambo ry'Imana ni rizima kandi rifite imbaraga, rirusha gutyara inkota zose zifite ubugi impande zombi. Ricengera mu muntu rikagera mu mahuriro y'ubuzima n'umwuka, no ku y'ingingo n'umusokoro, kandi rigatahura ibyo umutima utekereza n'ibyo ugamije." 
Hebrews4:13 Mu byaremwe byose nta cyo Imana ihishwa. Ahubwo byose bitwikuruwe nk'ibyambitswe ubusa imbere yayo, yo tuzamurikira ibyo twakoze." 
Hebrews4:14 Nuko rero ubwo dufite Umutambyi mukuru ukomeye, wagiye mu ijuru akagera imbere y'Imana, ari we Yezu Umwana w'Imana, nimucyo dukomere ku byo twemera kandi twamamaza." 
Hebrews4:15 Umutambyi mukuru dufite ntananirwa kubabarana natwe mu ntege nke zacu, ndetse yageragejwe ku buryo bwose nkatwe uretse ko nta cyaha yakoze." 
Hebrews4:16 Nuko rero nidushire umususu twegere intebe ya cyami y'Imana igira ubuntu, kugira ngo duhabwe imbabazi tugirirwe n'ubuntu, bitume dutabarwa mu gihe gikwiye." 
Hebrews5:1 Umutambyi mukuru wese atoranywa mu bantu kandi agahagararira abantu imbere y'Imana. Umurimo we ni ugusohoza amaturo n'ibitambo kubera ibyaha byabo. 
Hebrews5:2 Abasha korohera no gufata neza injiji n'abakunda kuyoba, kuko na we ubwe agira ibimutera intege nke." 
Hebrews5:3 Kubera iyo mpamvu ntagomba guhongerera ibyaha bya rubanda gusa, ahubwo agomba no guhongerera ibyaha bye bwite." 
Hebrews5:4 Nta muntu washobora kwiha icyubahiro cyo kuba Umutambyi mukuru, ahubwo agihabwa n'Imana yabimutoranyirije nk'uko byagenze kuri Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Kristo na we ntiyihaye ikuzo ryo kuba Umutambyi mukuru, ahubwo yarihawe n'Imana yamubwiye iti: “Ni wowe Mwana wanjye, kuva uyu munsi ndi So.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Na none hari ahandi Imana yavuze iti: “Uri umutambyi iteka ryose, mu buryo bwa Melikisedeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Mu gihe Yezu yari akiri ku isi yasenze yinginga, aniha cyane, abogoza n'amarira, atakambira Imana ifite ububasha bwo kumukiza urupfu. Nuko iramwumva kubera ko yayiyeguriye." 
Hebrews5:8 Nubwo yari Umwana w'Imana, yigishijwe kuyumvira n'imibabaro yagize." 
Hebrews5:9 Nuko amaze kuba indakemwa, yabereye abamwumvira bose isōko y'agakiza gahoraho." 
Hebrews5:10 Imana ni ko kumugira Umutambyi mukuru mu buryo bwa Melikisedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Hari byinshi twavuga kuri ibyo nyamara birakomeye kubisobanura, kuko musigaye muri intumva." 
Hebrews5:12 Urebye igihe mumaze mwari mukwiye kuba abigisha b'abandi, ariko namwe muracyakeneye kwigishwa iby'ifatizo byerekeye inyigisho ziva ku Mana. Aho gutungwa n'ibiryo bikomeye, muracyakeneye amata." 
Hebrews5:13 Umuntu ugitungwa n'amata gusa aba akiri umwana, aba ataraca akenge ku byo gutunganira Imana." 
Hebrews5:14 Naho abantu bakuze bo batungwa n'ibiryo bikomeye, kuko baba baragize akamenyero ko gutandukanya ikibi n'icyiza." 
Hebrews6:1 Nuko rero twe kugarukira gusa ku nyigisho z'ibanze zerekeye Kristo, ahubwo dutere imbere dusingire izikwiriye abakuze. Twe kwirirwa tugaruka ku mahame y'ishingiro ari yo aya: kwihana ibikorwa bitagira umumaro no kwizera Imana," 
Hebrews6:2 inyigisho zerekeye kubatiza kutari kumwe no kurambikwaho ibiganza, kuzuka kw'abapfuye n'urubanza rw'iteka." 
Hebrews6:3 Tuzatera imbere dutyo Imana nibishaka. 
Hebrews6:4 Nimwibaze ku bantu Imana yigeze kumurikira bagasogongera ku mpano yayo iva mu ijuru, kandi bagahabwa kuri Mwuka Muziranenge bakanumva uburyohe bw'Ijambo ry'Imana, bakibonera ibikorwa by'ububasha bwayo biranga ibihe bishya bizaza, nyamara bakarenga bagahakana Kristo bari bemeye. Abameze batyo nta washobora kubagarura ngo bihane, kuko bo ubwabo baba barongeye kubamba Umwana w'Imana bakamukoza isoni ku mugaragaro." 
Hebrews6:5  
Hebrews6:6  
Hebrews6:7 Iyo imvura ihamije umurindi ubutaka bugasoma, bukera imyaka ifitiye ababuhinze akamaro, Imana iba ibuhaye umugisha." 
Hebrews6:8 Nyamara iyo bumeze amahwa n'ibitovu nta cyo buba bumaze, buba busigaje kuvumwa amaherezo bukazatwikwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Nyamara ncuti dukunda, nubwo tuvuga dutyo turahamya rwose ko mwebweho mukunda ibyiza by'ingenzi bihuje n'agakiza." 
Hebrews6:10 Imana ntirenganya, nta n'ubwo izibagirwa ibikorwa byanyu n'ukuntu mwagaragaje ko muyikunda, ubwo mwagobokaga intore zayo na n'ubu mukaba mukizigoboka." 
Hebrews6:11 Icyo twifuza ni uko buri wese akomeza uwo mwete kugeza ku iherezo, kugira ngo ibyo mwiringiye bibe binonosowe." 
Hebrews6:12 Mwe kuba abanebwe ahubwo mwigane abizera Imana bakihangana, bikabahesha umunani yabasezeranyije." 
Hebrews6:13 Ubwo Imana yahaga Aburahamu Isezerano yageretseho indahiro yo kurishyigikira, ndetse irahira izina ryayo ubwayo kuko nta wundi uyisumba yari kurahira." 
Hebrews6:14 Iravuga iti: “Nzaguha umugisha, kandi nzagwiza abazagukomokaho.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Nuko rero Aburahamu amaze gutegereza yihanganye, ashyikira ibyo Imana yamusezeranyije." 
Hebrews6:16 Ubusanzwe abantu barahira izina ry'ubarusha gukomera, iyo ndahiro ikababera icyemezo cyo gukemura impaka hagati yabo." 
Hebrews6:17 Bityo Imana yashatse kwereka abafite uruhare ku byo yasezeranye, ko icyo yiyemeje kitazigera gihinduka. Ni cyo cyatumye igereka indahiro ku Isezerano." 
Hebrews6:18 Ibyo byombi ni ibintu bidahinduka kandi Imana yabivuze ntibasha kubeshya. Ni na byo bidukomeza cyane twebwe abamaze kuyīsunga, tugasingira ibyo twiringiye kuzahabwa." 
Hebrews6:19 Kwiringira ibyo ni ko gukomeza imitima yacu, nk'uko umugozi uzirika ubwato ukabukomeza ngo budatwarwa. Ni ikiziriko kidacika, kitarekura, gicengera hirya y'umwenda ukingirije cya Cyumba kizira inenge cyane." 
Hebrews6:20 Aho ni ho Yezu yatubanjirije kwinjira ngo tubone kumukurikira. Yabaye Umutambyi mukuru iteka ryose mu buryo bwa Melikisedeki. 
Hebrews7:1 Melikisedeki uwo yari umwami w'i Salemu akaba n'umutambyi w'Imana Isumbabyose. Ubwo Aburahamu yatabarukaga atsinze ba bami, Melikisedeki ni we wamusanganiye amusabira umugisha." 
Hebrews7:2 Nuko Aburahamu amutura kimwe cya cumi cy'ibyo yari yagaruje byose. Iryo zina Melikisedeki risobanura ngo: “Umwami nyir'ubutungane.” Byongeye kandi akaba n'umwami w'i Salemu, ari byo bivuga: “Umwami w'amahoro.”" 
Hebrews7:3 Melikisedeki uwo nta kizwi ku byerekeye se na nyina habe n'igisekuru, nta kizwi no ku byerekeye ivuka rye cyangwa urupfu rwe. Agereranywa n'Umwana w'Imana, ahora ari umutambyi iteka ryose." 
Hebrews7:4 Nimwirebere namwe ukuntu uwo muntu akomeye! Dore nawe Sogokuruza Aburahamu yamutuye kimwe cya cumi cy'ibyo yari yanyaze ku rugamba! 
Hebrews7:5 Abo mu rubyaro rwa Levi ni bo beguriwe umurimo wo gusohoza ibitambo, ni na bo bonyine Amategeko yashinze kwaka rubanda kimwe cya cumi, ni ukuvuga bene wabo nubwo abo bose na bo bari bakomotse kuri Aburahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Naho Melikisedeki we ntabwo ari uwo mu rubyaro rwa Levi, nyamara kandi Aburahamu yamutuye kimwe cya cumi cy'ibyo yari afite. Yahesheje Aburahamu umugisha ari we wari warahawe amasezerano n'Imana." 
Hebrews7:7 Nta wahakana ko uhesha abandi umugisha aruta uwuhabwa. 
Hebrews7:8 Bityo urubyaro rwa Levi ruhabwa kimwe cya cumi kandi ari abantu bapfa, nyamara Melikisedeki wagihawe Ibyanditswe bivuga ko ahoraho." 
Hebrews7:9 Ubirebye, Levi – ukomokwaho n'urubyaro ruhabwa kimwe cya cumi – na we ubwe yaragitanze. Dore impamvu: nubwo yari ataravuka hari ukuntu yari mu mubiri wa sekuruza Aburahamu, igihe Melikisedeki yazaga kumusanganira akakira ituro rye." 
Hebrews7:10  
Hebrews7:11 Umurimo w'abatambyi bakomokaga kuri Levi ni wo wari ishingiro ry'Amategeko yahawe Abisiraheli. Nuko rero iyo abo batambyi bajya kunonosora umurimo wabo, ntibiba byarabaye ngombwa ko habaho umutambyi wundi ukurikije umurongo wa Melikisedeki, aho gukurikiza uwa Aroni." 
Hebrews7:12 Koko kandi iyo umurongo w'abatambyi uhindutse, ni ngombwa ko Amategeko ubwayo ahinduka." 
Hebrews7:13 Uvugwaho ibyo byose ni Umwami wacu Yezu kandi rero ni uwo mu wundi muryango, nta wo muri uwo muryango wigeze guhabwa umurimo w'ubutambyi. Birazwi ko Umwami wacu akomoka mu muryango wa Yuda, kandi Musa nta cyo yigeze awuvugaho ku byerekeye ubutambyi." 
Hebrews7:14  
Hebrews7:15 Ngiyi impamvu irushaho kubigaragaza neza: ni uko habonetse undi mutambyi umeze nka Melikisedeki. 
Hebrews7:16 Ntiyagizwe umutambyi bikurikiza amabwiriza agenga igisekuru cy'abantu, ahubwo bikurikiza ububasha afite bwo kubaho ubuziraherezo." 
Hebrews7:17 Ibyanditswe bivuga ibye biti: “Uri umutambyi iteka ryose mu buryo bwa Melikisedeki.” 
Hebrews7:18 Nuko imitegekere ya kera iba ivuyeho, kuko nta bushobozi nta n'umumaro yari ifite." 
Hebrews7:19 Erega Amategeko nta cyo yanonosoraga! Ahubwo haje ibindi turushaho kwiringira byo kutwegereza Imana. 
Hebrews7:20 Ikindi kandi byaje bigeretsweho n'indahiro y'Imana, naho abandi batambyi bashyirwagaho nta ndahiro nk'iyo." 
Hebrews7:21 Nyamara Yezu yagizwe Umutambyi hageretsweho indahiro, igihe Imana yagiraga iti: “Nyagasani yararahiye kandi ntazivuguruza, yaravuze ati: ‘Uri umutambyi iteka ryose.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Ni yo mpamvu Yezu yatubereye umwishingizi w'Isezerano ry'Imana riruta iryo yagiranye n'abayo kera. 
Hebrews7:23 Si byo byonyine, abatambyi basanzwe babaye benshi cyane bitewe n'uko babuzwaga n'urupfu guhora ku murimo." 
Hebrews7:24 Naho Yezu we ni Umutambyi uhoraho iteka, ntawe uzigera amuzungura kuri uwo murimo." 
Hebrews7:25 Ni cyo gituma abasha gukiza byimazeyo abegera Imana banyuze kuri we, kuko abereyeho iteka kubavugira kuri yo." 
Hebrews7:26 Nuko rero Yezu ni we Mutambyi mukuru twari dukeneye, ntagira inenge cyangwa amakemwa cyangwa umugayo. Yatandukanyijwe n'abanyabyaha ashyirwa mu ijuru ahasumba byose." 
Hebrews7:27 We rero si kimwe n'abandi batambyi bakuru, kuko atari ngombwa buri munsi ko abanza gutura igitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha bye, ngo abone guhongerera ibyaha bya rubanda. Igitambo yagisohoje rimwe rizima, ubwo yitangagaho igitambo." 
Hebrews7:28 Abatambyi bakuru Amategeko ashyiraho na bo ni abanyantegenke. Nyamara nyuma y'ayo Mategeko, Imana yashyizeho undi mutambyi igerekaho n'indahiro. Uwo ni Umwana wayo yagize Umutambyi mukuru w'indakemwa iteka ryose." 
Hebrews8:1 Mu byo tuvuga ijambo ry'ingenzi ni iri: dufite Umutambyi mukuru umeze utyo, wicaye mu ijuru iburyo bw'intebe ya cyami y'Imana nyir'ubuhangange." 
Hebrews8:2 Ashinzwe umurimo w'ubutambyi aheguriwe Imana, ni ukuvuga mu Ihema nyakuri ritashyizweho n'umuntu, ahubwo ryashyizweho na Nyagasani." 
Hebrews8:3 Umutambyi mukuru wese ashyirirwaho gusohoza amaturo n'ibitambo. Ni ngombwa rero ko n'uyu wacu agira icyo atura. 
Hebrews8:4 Iyo aza kuba ku isi ntabwo yari kuba umutambyi, kuko hasanzwe hari abandi bagenewe gusohoza amaturo bakurikije Amategeko." 
Hebrews8:5 Umurimo ukorwa n'abo batambyi ni ikigereranyo kiranga ibikorerwa mu ijuru. Ni cyo cyatumye Imana yihanangiriza Musa, igihe yari agiye gushinga rya Hema ry'ibonaniro, iramubwira iti: “Itegereze neza igishushanyombonera werekewe kuri uyu musozi, muzakore ibintu byose migikurikije.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Naho ubu umurimo Yezu ashinzwe usumbye kure uw'abo bandi, kuko ari umuhuza w'Isezerano rishya. Ni Isezerano rihebuje irya kera kuba ryiza kandi rishingiye ku byasezeranyijwe bihebuje." 
Hebrews8:7 Iyo Isezerano rya mbere ritaza kugira inenge, ntibyari kuba ngombwa kurisimbuza irindi rya kabiri." 
Hebrews8:8 Ni yo mpamvu Imana igaya abantu bayo ibabwira iti: “Dore igihe kigiye kugera, ngirane Isezerano rishya n'Abisiraheli n'Abayuda. Ni jye Nyagasani ubivuze." 
Hebrews8:9 Ntabwo rizaba rimeze nk'irya kera nagiranye na ba sekuruza, igihe nabafataga akaboko nkabavana mu Misiri. Nyamara ntibitaye kuri iryo Sezerano, ni na cyo gituma nanjye ntabitayeho. Ni jye Nyagasani ubivuze." 
Hebrews8:10 Noneho ngiri Isezerano nzagirana n'Abisiraheli nyuma y'icyo gihe: nzashyira amategeko yanjye mu bwenge bwabo, nzayandika mu mitima yabo. Nzaba Imana yabo, na bo bazaba abantu banjye. Ni jye Nyagasani ubivuze." 
Hebrews8:11 Nta n'umwe muri bo uzagomba kwigisha mugenzi we cyangwa umuvandimwe we ati: ‘Menya Nyagasani’, kuko bose bazamenya uhereye ku muto ukageza ku mukuru." 
Hebrews8:12 Nzabababarira ibicumuro byabo, ibyaha byabo sinzabyibuka ukundi.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Ubwo Imana yavugaga ko iryo Sezerano ari rishya, kwari ukuvuga ko irya mbere rigizwe irya kera, kandi rero ikintu cyiswe icya kera kiba gishaje, kikaba cyenda kuvaho burundu." 
Hebrews9:1 Mu Isezerano rya mbere harimo amabwiriza agenga kuramya Imana kw'abayo, n'Ingoro bayisengeramo ku isi." 
Hebrews9:2 Ihema ryarashinzwe, icyumba cya mbere cyaryo cyitwa “Icyumba kizira inenge”. Aho habaga igitereko cy'amatara n'ameza yashyirwagaho imigati yatuwe Imana." 
Hebrews9:3 Hagakurikiraho umwenda ukingiriza icyumba cya kabiri cyitwa “Icyumba kizira inenge cyane”. 
Hebrews9:4 Ni ho habaga igicaniro cy'izahabu batwikiragaho imibavu, kandi hakaba n'Isanduku y'Isezerano yometsweho izahabu impande zose.
