Muri iyo Sanduku habagamo urwabya rukozwe mu izahabu rurimo manu, hakabamo na ya nkoni ya Aroni yamezeho udushibu, hakabamo na bya bisate by'amabuye byanditsweho Amategeko ashingiyeho rya Sezerano." 
Hebrews9:5 Hejuru y'iyo Sanduku hari amashusho y'abakerubi. Amababa yabo yatwikiraga aho bahongereraga ibyaha. Icyakora iki si cyo gihe cyo kurondora ibyo byose mu magambo arambuye. 
Hebrews9:6 Byose bimaze gutegurwa bityo, buri gihe abatambyi binjiraga mu cyumba cya mbere cy'Ihema, kugira ngo bakore imirimo ibagenewe." 
Hebrews9:7 Naho mu cyumba cya kabiri, Umutambyi mukuru wenyine ni we wahinjiraga rimwe mu mwaka gusa. Nabwo ntiyahinjiraga atajyanye amaraso y'ibitambo, ngo ayature Imana ho icyiru cy'ibyaha bye n'ibya rubanda byakozwe kubera ubujiji." 
Hebrews9:8 Bityo rero Mwuka Muziranenge yerekanaga ko hataraboneka inzira igeza mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane, mu gihe hakiriho rya Hema rya mbere." 
Hebrews9:9 Ibyo bishushanya iby'iki gihe turimo. Byerekana ko amaturo n'ibitambo bihora biturwa Imana bitabasha guhindura ababitura indakemwa, ku buryo bagira imitima itabarega ikibi." 
Hebrews9:10 Bishingiye ku byokurya n'ibyokunywa, no ku mihango itari imwe yo guhumanura. Ni imihango igaragara gusa, yashyizweho kugeza igihe Imana yategekeye ko byose bivugururwa." 
Hebrews9:11 Ariko Kristo ahingutse, yaje ari Umutambyi mukuru uzaduhesha ibyiza mu bihe bizaza. Ihema akoreramo ni indashyikirwa kandi ni ingirakamaro kurusha irisanzwe. Ntiryakozwe n'abantu, si n'iryo mu byaremwe tubona." 
Hebrews9:12 Ubwo Kristo yinjiraga rimwe na rizima mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane, ntiyabiheshejwe n'amaraso y'ibitambo by'amasekurume y'ihene cyangwa ibimasa, ahubwo yabiheshejwe n'amaraso ye bwite ngo abone kuducungura iteka ryose." 
Hebrews9:13 Ubusanzwe amaraso y'amasekurume y'ihene n'ay'impfizi, kimwe n'ivu ry'ishashi iyo biminjagiwe ku muntu wahumanye, bituma umubiri we uhumanuka." 
Hebrews9:14 Ubwo bimeze bityo, mbega ukuntu amaraso ya Kristo azarushaho kuduhumanura! Kubera Mwuka uhoraho yihaye Imana ho igitambo kidafite inenge. Amaraso ye ni yo azaduhumanura, adukize ibikorwa bituzanira urupfu turegwa n'imitima yacu, kugira ngo dukorere Imana nzima." 
Hebrews9:15 Ni cyo gituma Kristo aba umuhūza ku byerekeye Isezerano rishya Imana yagiranye n'abayo, ari ryo murage mushya. Bityo abo Imana yahamagaye bashobora kuragwa umunani uhoraho yasezeranyije abantu bayo. Ibyo babikesha urupfu rwa Kristo rwababereye incungu, ngo bave mu byaha bakoze mu gihe bagengwaga na rya Sezerano rya mbere." 
Hebrews9:16 Iyo habaye icyemeza uko umurage wateganyijwe, ni ngombwa guhinyuza ko nyir'ukuraga yapfuye." 
Hebrews9:17 Erega umurage ugira agaciro igihe nyir'ukuraga amaze gupfa, nta cyo uba uvuze igihe akiriho!" 
Hebrews9:18 Ni cyo gituma Isezerano rya mbere ry'Imana na ryo ritari kugerwaho hatabanje kumenwa amaraso. 
Hebrews9:19 Musa yabanje guha rubanda rwose amabwiriza yose, akurikije Amategeko yari yarahawe. Ni ko gufata amaraso y'ibimasa n'ay'amasekurume y'ihene hamwe n'amazi, ayamisha ku gitabo cy'Amategeko no kuri rubanda rwose, akoresheje umushandiko w'uduti tubigenewe n'ubwoya bw'intama butukura." 
Hebrews9:20 Ni ko kuvuga ati: “Aya ni amaraso ahamya Isezerano Imana yagiranye namwe ngo muryubahirize.” 
Hebrews9:21 Kandi na rya Hema n'ibikoresho byose by'imihango yo kuramya Imana, na byo Musa abimishaho amaraso." 
Hebrews9:22 Ndetse ukurikije Amategeko, hafi ibintu byose bigomba guhumanurwa hakoreshejwe amaraso, kandi hatamenwe amaraso ntihabaho kubabarirwa ibyaha." 
Hebrews9:23 Nuko ubwo bya bindi bishushanya ibyo mu ijuru byagombaga guhumanurwa na bene ibyo bitambo, ibyo mu ijuru nyir'izina biba bikeneye guhumanurwa n'ibitambo birushaho kubonera." 
Hebrews9:24 Erega Kristo ntiyinjiye mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyubatswe n'abantu, gishushanya gusa icyo mu ijuru! Ahubwo yagiye mu ijuru nyir'izina, ubu ni ho ari aduhagarariye imbere y'Imana." 
Hebrews9:25 Ubusanzwe Umutambyi mukuru yinjira mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane uko umwaka utashye, atuye amaraso atari aye. Naho Kristo we ntiyahinjijwe hato na hato no kwitanga ho igitambo." 
Hebrews9:26 Iyo biba bityo yari kubabazwa akicwa incuro nyinshi kuva isi yaremwa. Ariko muri iki gihe giheruka ibindi yabonetse rimwe rizima, yitanga ho igitambo cyo kumaraho ibyaha." 
Hebrews9:27 Umuntu wese agenewe gupfa rimwe gusa, nyuma yabyo agacirwa urubanza." 
Hebrews9:28 Ni na ko Kristo yatambwe rimwe rizima, yigeretseho ibyaha by'abantu benshi. Ahasigaye azagaruka ubwa kabiri atazanywe no gukuraho ibyaha, ahubwo azaniye abamutegereje agakiza." 
Hebrews10:1 Amategeko ni nk'igishushanyo gusa cy'imigisha tuzahabwa, ntabwo ari iyo migisha nyir'izina. Nta na rimwe rero yabasha guhindura indakemwa abaza kuramya Imana. Nta n'ubwo bya bitambo bihora ari bimwe byabikora, nubwo babitamba hato na hato buri mwaka." 
Hebrews10:2 Iyo biza kugenda bityo, mbese ntibaba bararekeye aho kubitamba? Baba barejejwe rimwe rizima, bakaba batagifite imitima ibashinja ibyaha." 
Hebrews10:3 Ibiri amambu, umumaro w'ibyo bitambo ni ukwibutsa abantu ibyaha byabo buri mwaka." 
Hebrews10:4 Erega amaraso y'ibimasa n'ay'amasekurume y'ihene ntabwo abasha kuvanaho ibyaha! 
Hebrews10:5 Ni cyo gituma Kristo aje ku isi yabwiye Imana ati: “Ibitambo n'amaturo si byo washatse, ahubwo wanteganyirije umubiri." 
Hebrews10:6 Ibitambo bikongorwa n'ibyo guhongerera ibyaha si byo bigushimisha. 
Hebrews10:7 Nuko ndavuga nti: ‘Dore ndaje, Mana, nzanywe no gukora ibyo ushaka, nk'uko byanditswe kuri jye mu muzingo w'igitabo cy'Amategeko.’”" 
Hebrews10:8 Yabanje kuvuga ati: “Ibitambo n'amaturo, ari ibitambo bikongorwa n'umuriro cyangwa ibyo guhongerera ibyaha, si byo washatse kandi si byo bigushimisha”, kandi ibyo bitambo yavuze ari byo biturwa nk'uko Amategeko abiteganya." 
Hebrews10:9 Ahita yungamo ati: “Dore ndaje. Mana, nzanywe no gukora ibyo ushaka.” Ni ko gukuraho bya bitambo bya mbere abisimbuza igitambo kindi gishya." 
Hebrews10:10 Kubera ubwo bushake bwayo, tweguriwe Imana tuba intore zayo, tubikesha igitambo Yezu Kristo yatuye rimwe rizima ari cyo mubiri we." 
Hebrews10:11 Umutambyi wese ahora ahagurutswa no gukora umurimo we, agatamba ibitambo bya buri munsi bitabasha na gato kuvanaho ibyaha." 
Hebrews10:12 Naho Kristo we amaze gusohoza igitambo kimwe gikuraho ibyaha ku buryo budasubirwaho, yicaye ku ntebe ya cyami iburyo bw'Imana." 
Hebrews10:13 Kuva ubwo ategereje ko Imana igira abanzi be nk'akabaho akandagizaho ibirenge. 
Hebrews10:14 Bityo bitewe n'igitambo cye kimwe, Kristo yamaze kugira indakemwa abo ahindura intore z'Imana." 
Hebrews10:15 Mwuka Muziranenge na we ni ko abitwemeza. Abanza kugira ati: 
Hebrews10:16 “Ngiri Isezerano nzagirana na bo nyuma y'icyo gihe, nzashyira amategeko yanjye mu mitima yabo, nzayandika mu bwenge bwabo. Ni jye Nyagasani ubivuze.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Arongera ati: “Ibyaha byabo n'ibicumuro byabo sinzabyibuka ukundi.” 
Hebrews10:18 Koko kandi iyo habayeho kubabarirwa ibyaha, ntibiba bikiri ngombwa kubitambira ibitambo." 
Hebrews10:19 Noneho bavandimwe, dufite uburenganzira bwo kwinjira muri cya Cyumba kizira inenge cyane nta cyo twishisha, tubikesha amaraso Yezu yatumeneye." 
Hebrews10:20 Yaduciriye inzira nshya igeza mu bugingo. Iyo nzira inyura mu mwenda ukingirije cya Cyumba, ni ukuvuga ko inyura mu mubiri we." 
Hebrews10:21 Ikindi kandi dufite Umutambyi mukuru ukomeye, ushinzwe inzu y'Imana." 
Hebrews10:22 Nuko rero nimucyo twegere Imana tutaryarya kandi tuyizeye tudashidikanya, imitima yacu yejejwe ngo ibe itakiturega ikibi, n'imibiri na yo yuhagiwe n'amazi asukuye." 
Hebrews10:23 Dukomeze kuvuga ku mugaragaro ibyo twiringiye tudahungabana, kuko Imana yaduhaye amasezerano ari indahemuka." 
Hebrews10:24 Twite kandi kuri bagenzi bacu, duterane umwete wo gukundana no kugira neza." 
Hebrews10:25 Twirinde kubura mu materaniro, nk'uko bamwe babigize akamenyero. Ahubwo turusheho gukomezanya, kubera ko umunsi wa Nyagasani wegereje nk'uko mubireba." 
Hebrews10:26 Nidukomeza gukora ibyaha nkana kandi twaramaze kumenya ukuri, nta gitambo kiba kikiriho cyo guhongerera ibyaha." 
Hebrews10:27 Ahubwo ikiba gisigaye ni ugutegerezanya ubwoba urubanza rw'Imana, n'umuriro ukaze uzatsemba abayirwanya." 
Hebrews10:28 Umuntu wese wishe Amategeko ya Musa agashinjwa n'abagabo babiri cyangwa barenzeho, agomba kwicwa nta mbabazi." 
Hebrews10:29 Mwibaze namwe rero uko bizamera ku muntu uzaba yaratesheje agaciro Umwana w'Imana, akandavuza amaraso ahamya Isezerano ryayo ari na yo yamugize intore yayo, agatuka na Mwuka ugira ubuntu! Mbega igihano gikomeye umuntu wagize atyo azaba akwiye!" 
Hebrews10:30 Koko kandi tuzi neza uwavuze ati: “Guhōra ni ukwanjye, ni jye uzītura.” Kandi akongera ati: “Nyagasani azacira abantu be urubanza.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Biteye ubwoba gutabwa muri yombi n'Imana nzima! 
Hebrews10:32 Mwibuke ibyababayeho mu bihe bya mbere. Muri iyo minsi mukimara kumurikirwa n'Imana, mwaratewe mubona ibibababaza byinshi maze iyo ntambara muyīfatamo kigabo." 
Hebrews10:33 Rimwe kwari ugutukwa no kugirirwa nabi ku mugaragaro. Ubundi kandi kwari ukwifatanya n'abagirirwa bene ibyo. 
Hebrews10:34 Koko kandi mwababaranye n'abari mu minyururu, kandi mwemera ko ibyanyu bisahurwa ndetse murabyishimira. Mwitwaje ko mufite ubukungu buhebuje kandi buhoraho." 
Hebrews10:35 Nuko rero kuvuga mushize amanga ntimukabitezukeho, kuko ari byo bizabahesha ingororano ikomeye." 
Hebrews10:36 Icyo mukeneye ni ukwihangana kugira ngo mukore ibyo Imana ibashakaho, mubone kwegukana ibyo yasezeranye." 
Hebrews10:37 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga biti: “Hasigaye akanya gato ndetse ni gato cyane, maze Ugomba kuza azaza ntazatinda." 
Hebrews10:38 Umuntu untunganiye azabeshwaho no kunyizera, ariko nasubira inyuma sinzamwishimira.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Twe rero ntituri mu basubira inyuma bakajya kurimbuka, ahubwo turi mu bizeye Imana bakazegukana ubugingo." 
Hebrews11:1 Kwizera Imana ni ukwemera ko umaze guhabwa ibyo wiringiye kuzabona, kandi ni ukumenya udashidikanya ko ibyo utareba biriho." 
Hebrews11:2 Uko kwizera ni ko kwatumye aba kera bashimwa n'Imana. 
Hebrews11:3 Kwizera Imana bitwumvisha ukuntu yavuze maze ijuru n'isi bikabaho, ku buryo ibyo abantu bareba byakomotse ku bitagaragara." 
Hebrews11:4 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Abeli ayitura igitambo kiyishimishije kiruta icya Kayini. Ni na ko kwatumye yemerwa ko atunganiye Imana, na yo igashima amaturo ye. Nubwo yapfuye uko kwizera kwe gutuma na n'ubu akivuga." 
Hebrews11:5 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Henoki yimurwa ku isi atagombye gupfa, ntihagira uwongera kumuca iryera kuko Imana yamujyanye. Kandi byanditswe ko atarimurwa yari yarayinogeye." 
Hebrews11:6 Icyakora nta wabasha kunogera Imana atayizera, kuko uyisanga wese agomba kwemera ko ibaho kandi ko igororera abayishaka." 
Hebrews11:7 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Nowa yita ku byo yaburiwe na yo ku byerekeye ibigiye kuzaba, nubwo yari atarabibona. Nuko yubaka ubwato bunini, we n'umuryango we bari kuzahungiramo umwuzure. Bityo ibyo Nowa yakoze byatumye ab'isi batsindwa n'urubanza, maze Imana imuha umugabane ku butungane iha abayizera." 
Hebrews11:8 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Aburahamu ayumvira igihe yamuhamagaraga, akimukira mu gihugu yari kuzahabwa ho umunani. Nuko agenda atazi iyo ajya." 
Hebrews11:9 Kwizera Imana kwanatumye Aburahamu aba nk'umushyitsi muri icyo gihugu Imana yamusezeranyije. Aba mu mahema kimwe na Izaki na Yakobo, na bo basezeranyijwe uwo munani kimwe na we." 
Hebrews11:10 Erega Aburahamu yari ategereje kuzatura mu murwa wahanzwe n'Imana ubwayo, kandi wubatswe na yo ku mfatiro zikomeye!" 
Hebrews11:11 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Sara abasha gusama inda, n'ubwo yari ageze mu zabukuru kandi ari n'ingumba. Impamvu ni uko yizeye ko Imana itazabura gukora ibyo yasezeranye kuko ari indahemuka." 
Hebrews11:12 Bityo rero umukambwe umwe na we wasaga n'uwapfuye, akomokwaho n'abantu banganya ubwinshi n'inyenyeri zo ku ijuru n'umusenyi wo ku nkombe z'inyanja." 
Hebrews11:13 Abo bose bapfuye bagifitiye Imana icyizere. Bari batarahabwa ibyo yabasezeranyije, icyakora babireberaga kure bakabyishimira. Bemeraga ku mugaragaro ko ari abashyitsi n'abagenzi kuri iyi si." 
Hebrews11:14 Abavuga batyo baba beruye ko bashaka igihugu cyabo bwite. 
Hebrews11:15 Iyo baza rero gukumbura igihugu bari baravuyemo, bari bagifite uburyo bwo gusubirayo." 
Hebrews11:16 Ahubwo bifuzaga igihugu kirusha icyo kuba cyiza, ari icyo mu ijuru. Ni cyo gituma Imana idakorwa n'isoni zo kwitwa Imana yabo, ndetse yabateguriye umurwa bazaturamo." 
Hebrews11:17 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Aburahamu atura Izaki ho igitambo, ubwo yamusuzumaga ngo irebe ko yayumvira. Aburahamu yemeye gutanga uwo mwana we w'ikinege, kandi ari we yari yarahawe ho amasezerano." 
Hebrews11:18 Imana yari yaramubwiye iti: “Izaki ni we uzakomokwaho n'urubyaro nagusezeranyije.” 
Hebrews11:19 Aburahamu yibwiraga ko nubwo umuntu yaba apfuye, Imana ibasha kumuzura. Ubigereranyije rero yagaruriwe Izaki nk'uzutse." 
Hebrews11:20 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Izaki aha Yakobo na Ezawu umugisha ku byo bazahabwa bwanyuma. 
Hebrews11:21 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Yakobo atarapfa aha umugisha abahungu bombi ba Yozefu. Yabikoze yishingikirije inkoni ye, asingiza Imana." 
Hebrews11:22 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Yozefu ajya kwitārūra, ahanura ko urubyaro rwa Isiraheli ruzava mu Misiri, agena n'ibyerekeye amagufwa ye." 
Hebrews11:23 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye ababyeyi ba Musa bamuhisha amezi atatu amaze kuvuka. Babonye ko ari umwana mwiza ntibatinya kurenga ku itegeko ry'umwami wa Misiri. 
Hebrews11:24 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Musa ubwo yari amaze gukura, yanga kwitwa umuhungu w'umukobwa w'umwami wa Misiri." 
Hebrews11:25 Ahubwo yiyemeza kugirirwa nabi hamwe n'ubwoko bw'Imana, abirutisha ibyishimo by'igihe gito yaterwa no gukora ibyaha." 
Hebrews11:26 Yasangaga ko guteshwa agaciro nka Kristo ari ubukungu buruta kure umutungo wose w'igihugu cya Misiri, kuko yari arangamiye ingororano yari kuzahabwa." 
Hebrews11:27 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Musa ava mu Misiri, adatinya uburakari bw'umwami waho. Ntiyatezuka kuko yari arangamiye Imana itaboneka nk'uyiruzi." 
Hebrews11:28 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwamuteye kandi gushyiraho umuhango wa Pasika, maze ategeka ko basīga amaraso ku miryango, kugira ngo uwazaga gutsemba abana b'impfura bose atagira icyo atwara Abisiraheli." 
Hebrews11:29 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye Abisiraheli bambuka Inyanja Itukura, ari nko kunyura ku butaka bwumutse. Nyamara Abanyamisiri babigerageje bararohama." 
Hebrews11:30 Kwizera Imana ni ko kwatumye inkuta z'umujyi wa Yeriko ziritagurika, Abisiraheli bamaze kuzizenguruka iminsi irindwi." 
Hebrews11:31 Kwizera Imana ni na ko kwatumye ya ndaya yitwa Rahabu idapfana n'abatumvira Imana, kubera ko yakiriye abatasi neza." 
Hebrews11:32 Nongere mvuge iki se kandi? Igihe cyambana gito, nshatse kurondora ibya Gideyoni na Baraki na Samusoni, na Yefute na Dawidi na Samweli ndetse n'abahanuzi." 
Hebrews11:33 Kubera ukwizera Imana kwabo bigaruriye ibihugu, bashinga ubutabera maze basingira ibyo Imana yari yarabasezeranyije. Babumbye iminwa y'intare," 
Hebrews11:34 bazimya umuriro ugurumana, barokoka ubugi bw'inkota. Mu mwanya w'intege nke bahabwa imbaraga. Ku rugamba ntihagira ubahangara, ahubwo bahashya ibitero by'abanyamahanga." 
Hebrews11:35 Abagore bahabwa ababo bazuwe mu bapfuye. Abandi bishwe urubozo ntibemera kurengerwa, kugira ngo bazazuke bahabwe ubugingo buhebuje." 
Hebrews11:36 Bamwe bahawe urw'amenyo bakubitwa ibiboko, naho abandi baboheshwa iminyururu barohwa muri gereza." 
Hebrews11:37 Bamwe bicishijwe guterwa amabuye, abandi gukererwamo kabiri, naho abandi bicishwa inkota. Bazereraga bambaye impu z'intama n'iz'ihene badafite gifasha, batotezwa kandi bagirirwa nabi." 
Hebrews11:38 Yemwe, n'isi ntiyari ikwiye ko bayibamo! Bazereraga ahadatuwe no mu misozi, bakibera mu buvumo no mu masenga." 
Hebrews11:39 Abo bose Imana yarāse ukwizera kwabo, nyamara bapfuye batarahabwa ibyo yabasezeranyije." 
Hebrews11:40 Erega natwe Imana yaduteganyirije ibyiza bihebuje, ku buryo abo batari kugirwa indakemwa byuzuye tutari hamwe na bo!" 
Hebrews12:1 Natwe rero ubwo tuzengurutswe n'imbaga ingana ityo y'abahamije ibyo bizera, tureke ibitubuza gutambuka n'ibyaha bikunda kutuganza, maze twihatire kwiruka turangize gusiganwa twateganyirijwe tudacogoye." 
Hebrews12:2 Duhange Yezu amaso we nkomoko y'ukwizera kwacu, akaba ari na we ukunonosora. Yihanganiye kubambwa ku musaraba ntiyita ku isoni bimutera, kuko yazirikanaga ibyishimo abikiwe. Ubu yicaye iburyo bw'intebe ya cyami y'Imana." 
Hebrews12:3 Nuko nimumwibuke, muzirikane ukuntu yihanganiye kurwanywa bene ako kageni n'abanyabyaha, kugira ngo mudacogora mugacika n'intege." 
Hebrews12:4 Erega mu ntambara muhanganye n'ibyaha, ntimuragera aho kumena amaraso yanyu!" 
Hebrews12:5 Kandi rero mwibagiwe ya magambo yo kubakomeza Imana yababwiye nk'ubwira abana be iti: “Mwana wanjye, igihe Nyagasani aguhana ubyiteho, ntucibwe intege n'uko agucyashye." 
Hebrews12:6 Koko rero Nyagasani acyaha uwo akunda, uwo yemera wese ko ari umwana we ni we acishaho umunyafu.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Noneho mwihanganire guhanwa n'Imana, kuko ari uko ibafata nk'abana bayo. Mbese ye, wabona umwana udahanwa na se?" 
Hebrews12:8 Niba rero mudahanwa nk'uko umwana wese ahanwa na se, ntimuba muri abana b'Imana nyakuri, ahubwo muba mubaye ibibyarirano." 
Hebrews12:9 Ba data batubyaye ku buryo busanzwe ko baduhanaga tukabubaha, ubwo se Data watubyaye ku buryo bwa Mwuka, ntitugomba kurushaho kwemera kugengwa na we ngo tubeho?" 
Hebrews12:10 Ba data baduhanaga uko babyumvaga na bwo by'igihe gito, naho uguhana kw'Imana Data bidufitiye akamaro ko kugira ngo tugire uruhare ku buziranenge bwayo." 
Hebrews12:11 Nta muntu uhanwa ngo muri ako kanya bimushimishe, ahubwo biramubabaza. Nyamara ababyitoje amaherezo bibabyarira amahoro n'ubutungane." 
Hebrews12:12 Kubera iyo mpamvu nimukomeze amaboko ananiwe n'amavi adandabirana. 
Hebrews12:13 Muhange inzira zigororotse, kugira ngo ucumbagira ukuguru kwe kudahuhuka ahubwo gukire." 
Hebrews12:14 Mwihatire kubana n'abantu bose mu mahoro no kuba abaziranenge, kuko nta n'umwe utari we uzabona Nyagasani." 
Hebrews12:15 Murabe maso kugira ngo hatagira ucogora ngo yivutse ubuntu Imana igira. Ntihakagire umuntu uba nk'umuzi mubi ushibuka ukēra imbuto zisharira, maze agateza impagarara mu bantu, akanduza rubanda." 
Hebrews12:16 Ntihakagire umuntu uba umusambanyi, cyangwa usuzugura iby'Imana nka Ezawu. Ezawu uwo yari umwana w'impfura, maze ubutware bwe bw'umwana w'impfura abugurana igaburo rimwe." 
Hebrews12:17 Muzi ko bitinze yashatse ko se amuraga umugisha umukwiye maze ntawuhabwe. Ntiyari agishoboye guhindura ibyo yari yarakoze nubwo yabishatse arira. 
Hebrews12:18 Mwe rero ntimuri nk'Abisiraheli ba kera, ngo mube mwegereye umusozi wa Sinayi umuntu yakoza intoki. Aho ni ho babonaga umuriro ugurumana n'umwijima w'icuraburindi, bakumva n'umuyaga w'ishuheri" 
Hebrews12:19 n'impanda zivuga n'ijwi rirangīra. Abumvise iryo jwi basabye bakomeje ko ritongera kuvuga rwose. 
Hebrews12:20 Ntibabashaga kwihanganira kumva ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru agira ati: “Uzakora kuri uyu musozi wese azicishwa amabuye, niriba n'itungo muzarigenze mutyo.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Ibyo babonaga byari biteye ubwoba koko, ku buryo na Musa yavuze ati: “Ndatinye cyane, ndahinda umushyitsi.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Ahubwo mwegereye umusozi Siyoni n'umurwa w'Imana, nzima ari wo Yeruzalemu yo mu ijuru, n'abamarayika ibihumbi n'ibihumbi bakoraniye mu mwidagaduro." 
Hebrews12:23 Mwegereye n'imbaga y'abana b'impfura b'Imana amazina yabo akaba yanditswe mu ijuru. Mwegereye kandi Imana umucamanza wa bose, n'abapfuye ari intungane bagizwe indakemwa." 
Hebrews12:24 Ndetse mwegereye na Yezu Umuhuza w'Imana n'abagengwa n'Isezerano rishya, n'amaraso ye yamishwe adusabira ibyiza kurusha aya Abeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Muramenye ntimwange kumva uvuga! Abanze kumva uwababuriye ku isi ntibanze no guhanwa. Twe rero byaba bikabije. Twazahungira he igihano niba twirengagiza utuburira wo mu ijuru? 
Hebrews12:26 Cya gihe ijwi ry'Imana ryatigishije isi, na n'ubu ni yo ituburira, iti: “Hasigaye rimwe gusa, sintigise isi yonyine, ahubwo nzatigisa n'ijuru.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Iryo jambo ngo: “Hasigaye rimwe …”, rigaragaza ko ibyaremwe byose bizatigiswa bikavanwaho, kugira ngo hagumeho ibidashobora guhungabanywa n'umutingito." 
Hebrews12:28 Dushimire Imana rero ko yaduhaye ubwami budashobora guhungabanywa. Bityo tuyisenge uko ishaka, tuyubaha kandi tuyitinya." 
Hebrews12:29 Erega Imana yacu ni nk'umuriro ukongora! 
Hebrews13:1 Ntimuhweme gukundana bya kivandimwe. 
Hebrews13:2 Ntimukibagirwe no kwakira abashyitsi. Erega hari bamwe babikoze, basanga bakiriye abamarayika batabizi!" 
Hebrews13:3 Muzirikane abanyururu nk'aho mufunganywe na bo. Mwibuke n'abagirirwa nabi, muzirikane ko namwe mufite umubiri." 
Hebrews13:4 Gushyingiranwa kubahwe n'abantu bose, kandi he kugira uwo mu bashakanye wandavuza uburiri bwabo asambana, kuko ibyomanzi n'abasambanyi Imana izabacira urubanza." 
Hebrews13:5 Ntimugatwarwe n'inyota y'ifaranga ahubwo munyurwe n'ibyo mufite, kuko Imana yavuze iti: “Sinzabasiga, nta n'ubwo nzabatererana na gato.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Ni cyo gituma tuvuga nta cyo twishisha tuti: “Nyagasani ni we unshyigikiye, nta cyo nzatinya, umuntu se yantwara iki?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Mujye mwibuka abayobozi banyu babagejejeho Ijambo ry'Imana. Muzirikane uko babayeho n'uko bapfuye, maze mukurikize urugero rwo kwizera Imana kwabo." 
Hebrews13:8 Yezu Kristo uko yari ari ejo na none ni ko ari, ni na ko azahora iteka ryose." 
Hebrews13:9 Ntimugateshwe inzira n'inyigisho zitari zimwe z'inzaduka. Icyiza ni uko imitima yacu yatungwa n'ubuntu Imana igira, aho gutungwa n'ibyokurya twategetswe n'amategeko kandi nta cyo bimarira abayakurikiza." 
Hebrews13:10 Twe dufite urutambiro rundi, abatambyi bakora mu Ihema risanzwe ntibemerewe kurya ku bitambirwa kuri rwo." 
Hebrews13:11 Ubusanzwe Umutambyi mukuru ajyana amaraso y'amatungo atuwe Imana mu Cyumba kizira inenge cyane, akayatanga ho impongano y'ibyaha, naho inyama zigatwikirwa inyuma y'inkambi." 
Hebrews13:12 Ni cyo gituma Yezu yaraguye inyuma y'irembo rya Yeruzalemu, kugira ngo rubanda abegurire Imana akoresheje amaraso ye bwite." 
Hebrews13:13 Noneho rero nimucyo dusohoke tumusange inyuma y'inkambi, twemeye guteshwa agaciro nka we." 
Hebrews13:14 Erega nta mujyi uhoraho dufite hano ku isi, ahubwo twifuza umujyi uteganyijwe kuzaboneka!" 
Hebrews13:15 Nuko rero ntiduhweme gutura Imana ibitambo by'ishimwe tubikesha Yezu. Ni ukuvuga ngo tujye tuyogeza mu ruhame, bibe ari byo bisesekara ku minwa yacu." 
Hebrews13:16 Ntimukibagirwe kugira neza no gusangira ibyo mufite, kuko bene ibyo ari byo bitambo bishimisha Imana." 
Hebrews13:17 Mwumvire ababayobora kandi mwemere kugengwa na bo, kuko ari bo bashinzwe ubugingo bwanyu bakazabubazwa n'Imana. Mubumvire kugira ngo babakorere bishimye batinuba, kuko babakoreye binuba mwe nta kamaro byabagirira." 
Hebrews13:18 Mukomeze kudusabira. Turahamya ko nta kibi imitima yacu iturega, kuko kwifata neza igihe cyose ari icyo dushaka." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndabinginze murusheho kunsabira, kugira ngo Imana ingarure iwanyu bidatinze." 
Hebrews13:20 Umwami wacu Yezu ari we mushumba mukuru w'intama, Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye kubera amaraso ye ahamya Isezerano ryayo ridakuka. Iyo Mana itanga amahoro ibashoboze ibyiza byose, kugira ngo mukore ibyo ishaka. Nuko isohoze muri twe umurimo uyishimisha ikoresheje Yezu Kristo. Ikuzo ribe irye iteka ryose. Amina." 
Hebrews13:21  
Hebrews13:22 Bavandimwe, ibyo nanditse byo kubakomeza ndabasaba kubyitaho. Erega uru rwandiko ntabwo ari rurerure!" 
Hebrews13:23 Mumenye kandi ko umuvandimwe wacu Timoteyo yafunguwe. Naramuka angezeho vuba tuzazana kubasura. 
Hebrews13:24 Muramutse ababayobora bose, kimwe n'intore zose za Nyagasani. Abavandimwe bo mu Butaliyani barabatashya." 
Hebrews13:25 Nyagasani nagumye kubagirira ubuntu mwese. 
James1:1 Jyewe Yakobo umugaragu w'Imana n'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo, ndabaramukije ab'imiryango cumi n'ibiri batataniye mu mahanga." 
James1:2 Bavandimwe, igihe mugezweho n'ibigeragezo by'uburyo bwose mujye mubyishimira." 
James1:3 Mumenye ko iyo ukwizera Imana kwanyu kugeragejwe bibatera kwihangana. 
James1:4 Mureke ukwihangana kurangize umurimo wako, kugira ngo mube indakemwa, mushyitse, nta cyo mubuze." 
James1:5 Niba muri mwe hari ubuze ubwenge nasabe Imana ibumuhe, kuko iha bose itītangira kandi idacyurira umuntu." 
James1:6 Ariko asabe yizeye ari nta cyo ashidikanya, kuko ushidikanya yagereranywa n'umuhengeri wo mu kiyaga, umuyaga ukoza hirya no hino." 
James1:7 Umuntu nk'uwo ntakībwire ko hari icyo Nyagasani yamuha," 
James1:8 kuko ari nyamujyiryanino uhindagurika mu byo akora byose. 
James1:9 Umuvandimwe woroheje ajye yishimira ko Imana imushyira ejuru," 
James1:10 n'umukungu na we ajye yishimira ko Imana imucisha bugufi, kuko iherezo azahita nk'ururabyo rwo ku gasozi." 
James1:11 Izuba rirarasa maze ryakara rikumisha ibyatsi, indabyo zigahunguka n'ubwiza bwazo bukayoyoka. Uko ni ko umukungu azayoyokana n'ibyo ahirimbanamo." 
James1:12 Hahirwa umuntu wihanganira ibimugerageza, kuko Imana nibona ko atsinze izamuhemba ikamba ry'ubugingo yasezeranyije abayikunda." 
James1:13 Igihe umuntu ashutswe ngo akore icyaha ntakavuge ati: “Imana ni yo inshutse”, kuko Imana idashukwa ngo ikore ibibi cyangwa na yo ngo igire uwo ishuka." 
James1:14 Ahubwo umuntu wese ashukwa igihe irari rye bwite rimukuruye rikamugusha mu mutego," 
James1:15 nyuma iryo rari rigatwita rikabyara icyaha, n'icyaha cyamara gukura kikabyara urupfu." 
James1:16 Bavandimwe nkunda, ntimukayobe!" 
James1:17 Icyiza cyose umuntu agabiwe kimwe n'impano yose ihebuje ahawe, bikomoka mu ijuru ku Mana yaremye ibinyarumuri byo ku ijuru. Yo ntigira ubwo ihinduka cyangwa ngo itere umwijima nk'izuba igihe rirenze." 
James1:18 Ni yo yiyemeje kutubyara ikoresheje Ijambo ry'ukuri, kugira ngo tuyiturwe ho umuganura w'ibyaremwe byose." 
James1:19 Bavandimwe nkunda, murazirikane ibi: buri muntu ajye yihutira gutega amatwi ariko atinde kuvuga, atinde no kurakara" 
James1:20 kuko umuntu urakaye adakora ibitunganiye Imana. 
James1:21 Kubera ibyo rero mwitandukanye n'ibyanduza umutima byose, kimwe n'ubugizi bwa nabi bugwiriye, maze mwiyoroshye mwakire Ijambo Imana yateye mu mitima yanyu, kuko ari ryo ribasha kubakiza." 
James1:22 Ntimukishuke ngo mupfe kumva Ijambo ry'Imana gusa, ahubwo mujye mukora icyo ribabwira," 
James1:23 kuko uwumva iryo Jambo ntarikurikize, yagereranywa n'umuntu wirebera mu ndorerwamo," 
James1:24 nyuma akagenda agahita yibagirwa uko asa. 
James1:25 Ariko uhanga amaso ku Mategeko atagira amakemwa, ya yandi abohora abantu, akayizirikaho ntiyibagirwe ibyo yumvise, ahubwo agakora ibyo ayo Mategeko avuga, uwo azagira ihirwe mu byo akora byose." 
James1:26 Umuntu wibwira ko ari umunyedini nyamara ntagenge ururimi rwe aba yishuka, kandi idini ye iba idafite akamaro." 
James1:27 Idini itunganye kandi idafite inenge ndetse igashimwa n'Imana Data, ni ugusūra impfubyi n'abapfakazi bari mu makuba, no kwirinda kwanduzwa n'imigenzereze y'ab'isi." 
James2:1 Bavandimwe, ntimugasumbanye abantu kuko bitagendana no kwemera Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo Nyir'ikuzo." 
James2:2 Tuvuge ko mu ikoraniro ryanyu haje umuntu wambaye impeta y'izahabu ku rutoki n'imyenda ibengerana, hakaza n'umukene wambaye ubushwambagara." 
James2:3 Nuko mukita ku wambaye imyenda ibengerana mukamubwira muti: “Nimushyike aha hantu mwateguriwe.” Nuko mukabwira wa mukene muti: “Hagarara hariya!”, cyangwa muti: “Wowe icara aha hasi!”" 
James2:4 Mbese iyo mugize mutyo ntimuba musumbanyije abantu, mukaba mwigize abacamanza badashingiye ku butabera?" 
James2:5 Bavandimwe nkunda, mbabaze: mbese Imana ntiyatoranyije abakene bo ku isi ngo babe abakungu mu kuyizera, kugira ngo ibahe ubwami bwayo ho umunani yasezeranyije abayikunda?" 
James2:6 Nyamara mwebwe musuzugura abakene. Mbese ye, abakungu si bo babatwaza igitugu bakabakurubana mu nkiko?" 
James2:7 Ese si bo batuka rya zina ryiza mwitiriwe? 
James2:8 Ahubwo muba mukoze neza iyo mukurikije Itegeko ry'ubwami bw'Imana, nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Ujye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk'uko wikunda.”" 
James2:9 Ariko niba musumbanya abantu muba mukora icyaha, noneho iryo tegeko rikabacira urubanza kuko mwaryishe." 
James2:10 Umuntu ukurikiza Amategeko iyo agize rimwe ateshukaho, aba ameze nk'uyishe yose." 
James2:11 Erega iyavuze iti: “Ntugasambane” ni na yo yavuze iti: “Ntukice.” None rero niba udasambana ariko ukica, uba wishe Amategeko." 
James2:12 Mu byo muvuga no mu byo mukora, mujye mumera nk'abategereje gucirwa urubanza na ya Mategeko abohora abantu." 
James2:13 Utagiriye abandi impuhwe azacirwa iteka nta mpuhwe. Nyamara uwagize impuhwe nta rubanza ruzamutsinda. 
James2:14 Bavandimwe, umuntu byamumarira iki kuvuga ko yizera Imana niba ibikorwa bye bitabigaragaza? Mbese ukwizera nk'uko gushobora kumukiza?" 
James2:15 Tuvuge ko abavandimwe bambaye ubusa bakaba babuze ibibatunga 
James2:16 umwe muri mwe akababwira ati: “Nimugende amahoro, mususuruke mushire inzara”, byabamarira iki mutagize icyo mubaha cyo kubabeshaho?" 
James2:17 Bityo ukwizera Imana iyo kuri konyine kutarangwa n'ibikorwa, kuba gupfuye." 
James2:18 Ariko umuntu ashobora kuvuga ati: “Wowe wizera Imana, naho jye mfite ibikorwa.” Ngaho nyereka ukwizera kwawe kutagira ibikorwa, nanjye ndakoresha ibikorwa byanjye ngo nkwereke ko biva ku kwizera Imana." 
James2:19 Mbese wizera Imana ukemera ko ari imwe rukumbi? Ibyo ni byiza. Erega n'ingabo za Satani ni ko zibyemera, ndetse zigahinda umushyitsi!" 
James2:20 Wa mupfu we, ese urashaka icyemezo cyerekana ko kwizera Imana kutazana ibikorwa kuba ari nta kamaro?" 
James2:21 Mbese sogokuruza Aburahamu si ibikorwa bye byatumye atunganira Imana, igihe yatangaga umuhungu we Izaki ho igitambo ku rutambiro?" 
James2:22 Urumva ko kwizera Imana kwe n'ibikorwa bye byagendanaga, kandi ukwizera kwe kujujwe n'ibikorwa." 
James2:23 Kwari ukugira ngo bibe nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Aburahamu yizeye Imana bituma abarwa nk'intungane”, maze yitwa incuti y'Imana." 
James2:24 Murabona ko umuntu atagirwa intungane imbere y'Imana no kuyizera konyine, ahubwo anabiheshwa n'ibikorwa bye." 
James2:25 Mbese Rahabu w'indaya we Imana ntiyamugize intungane bitewe n'ibikorwa bye, igihe yacumbikiraga ba batasi batumwe na Yozuwe akabacikisha abanyujije mu yindi nzira?" 
James2:26 Erega n'ubundi nk'uko umuntu udafite umwuka aba apfuye, ni na ko ukwizera Imana kutagira ibikorwa kuba gupfuye!" 
James3:1 Bavandimwe, si benshi muri mwe mugomba kuba abigisha. Muzi yuko twebwe abigisha tuzacirwa urubanza ruruta urw'abandi." 
James3:2 Twese dufudika mu buryo bwinshi. Udafudika mu byo avuga aba ari indakemwa, abasha no kugenga umubiri we wose." 
James3:3 Dushyira utwuma mu kanwa k'amafarasi bityo akatwumvira, twakurura imikoba utwuma tuziritseho, ifarasi uko yakabaye ikerekera aho dushaka." 
James3:4 Dore n'amato yo mu nyanja nubwo ari manini bwose kandi akagenzwa n'inkubi y'umuyaga, ayoborwa n'ingashya nto cyane akagana aho umusare werekeza ubwato ashaka." 
James3:5 N'ururimi na rwo ni ruto mu ngingo z'umubiri, nyamara rwiratana ibikorwa bikomeye. Ibaze ukuntu agashashi k'umuriro gashobora gutwika ishyamba rinini!" 
James3:6 Ururimi na rwo ni umuriro. Ni isangano y'ububi bungana n'isi. Ni rumwe mu ngingo z'umubiri wacu kandi rukawangiza wose, rugatwikisha imibereho yacu yose umuriro rurahura muri ya nyenga itazima." 
James3:7 Amoko yose y'inyamaswa n'inyoni n'ibikururuka n'ibikoko biba mu mazi, abantu bashobora kubitoza kubumvira ndetse bigeze kubikora." 
James3:8 Ariko ururimi rwo nta wagira icyo arutoza ngo arushobore. Ni icyorezo kidahosha cyuzuye uburozi bwica. 
James3:9 Ni rwo dukoresha ngo dushimire Nyagasani Imana ari yo Data, kandi ni na rwo dukoresha ngo tuvume abantu yaremye basa na yo." 
James3:10 Bityo mu kanwa kamwe hakavamo umugisha n'umuvumo. Bavandimwe, ntibikwiriye kumera bityo." 
James3:11 Mbese isōko imwe yavubura amazi meza n'arura? 
James3:12 Bavandimwe, mbese hari ubwo igiti cy'umutini cyakwera imbuto z'umuzeti, cyangwa ngo umuzabibu were imbuto z'umutini? Ni na ko ari nta wavoma amazi meza mu isōko y'amazi arura." 
James3:13 Ni nde muri mwe ufite ubwenge no gusobanukirwa? Nabyerekanishe ibyo akora abiterwa n'imyifatire myiza, byose abikesha ubugwaneza buva ku bwenge." 
James3:14 Ariko niba imitima yanyu yuzuye ishyari n'amakimbirane, mureke kwirata ngo muhakane ukuri." 
James3:15 Ubwenge nk'ubwo ntibuturuka mu ijuru, ahubwo ni ubw'isi na kamere y'umuntu ndetse na Satani." 
James3:16 Ahari ishyari n'amakimbirane, ntihabura umuvurungano n'ibikorwa by'imburamumaro byose." 
James3:17 Ariko ubwenge buturuka mu ijuru icya mbere buraboneye, byongeye kandi buzana amahoro n'ineza no kumvikana n'abandi, bwuzuye impuhwe no kugira neza, nta gusumbanya abantu nta n'uburyarya." 
James3:18 Abanyamahoro babiba ibizana amahoro, bagasarura ubutungane." 
James4:1 Mbese izo ntambara n'amahane biri muri mwe bikomoka he? Aho ntibikomoka ku byo murarikira birwanira mu mibiri yanyu? 
James4:2 Mwifuza ikintu mwakibura mukica. Muhirimbanira ikintu, mutashobora kukigeraho mugatongana mukarwana. Nta cyo muhabwa kuko mudasaba Imana." 
James4:3 N'iyo musabye ntimuhabwa kuko musaba nabi, mushaka ibyo gutagaguza mu byo murarikiye." 
James4:4 Mwa basambanyi mwe, mbese ntimuzi ko ukunda iby'isi aba ari umwanzi w'Imana? Nuko rero umuntu wese uhitamo gukunda iby'isi aba yigize umwanzi w'Imana." 
James4:5 Ese mutekereza ko Ibyanditswe ari ugupfa kuvuga, igihe bigira biti: “Imana ifuhira umwuka yashyize muri twe”?" 
James4:6 Nyamara kandi ubuntu Imana igira burahebuje, nk'uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Imana irwanya abirasi, ariko abicisha bugufi ibagirira ubuntu.”" 
James4:7 Nuko rero nimwemere kugengwa n'Imana, ariko murwanye Satani na we azabahunga." 
James4:8 Nimwegere Imana na yo izabegera. Mwa banyabyaha mwe, nimukarabe, namwe abafata impu zombi, nimuhumanure imitima yanyu." 
James4:9 Nimushavure, murire muboroge. Ibitwenge byanyu nibihinduke imiborogo, n'ibyishimo byanyu bihinduke agahinda." 
James4:10 Mwicishe bugufi imbere ya Nyagasani na we azabakuza. 
James4:11 Bavandimwe, ntimugasebanye. Usebya umuvandimwe we cyangwa akamunegura, aba asebya Amategeko y'Imana akayanegura. Kandi rero igihe unegura Amategeko ntuba ukigengwa na yo, ahubwo uba wigize umucamanza." 
James4:12 Imana yonyine ni yo itanga Amategeko kandi igaca imanza. Ni yo ifite ububasha bwo gukiza abantu no kubatsemba. Naho se wowe uri nde ngo unegure mugenzi wawe? 
James4:13 Yemwe abavuga muti: “Uyu munsi cyangwa ejo tuzajya mu mujyi uyu n'uyu tumareyo umwaka, tuhacururize twunguke!”" 
James4:14 Mwebwe habe ngo muzi n'uko muzaba mumeze ejo! Mbese ubugingo bwanyu ni iki? Mumeze nk'igihu kiboneka akanya gato kikaba kirayoyotse. 
James4:15 Ahubwo mwari mukwiriye kuvuga muti: “Nyagasani nabishaka tuzabaho maze dukore ibi n'ibi.” 
James4:16 Nyamara ubu murirata ndetse mukirarira! Bene ubwo bwirasi ni bubi. 
James4:17 Nuko rero umuntu uzi gukora icyiza ntagikore aba akoze icyaha. 
James5:1 Mwa bakire mwe, muguweho! Nimurire muboroge kuko mugiye kugira ibyago." 
James5:2 Ubukungu bwanyu bwaraboze n'imyambaro yanyu yariwe n'inyenzi. 
James5:3 Izahabu n'ifeza mwabitse byaguye ingese, ingese yabyo ni yo izabashinja maze ikongore imibiri yanyu nk'umuriro. Mwabitse ubukungu muri iyi minsi y'imperuka." 
James5:4 Abasaruye imyaka yanyu ntimwabahembye none dore baraboroga! Umuborogo wabo kandi wageze mu matwi ya Nyagasani Nyiringabo. 
James5:5 Mwadābagiriye ku isi murarengwa. Mwashishe nk'amatungo none dore umunsi wo kubagwa urageze! 
James5:6 Intungane mwaziciriye urwo gupfa ntizabarwanya murazica! 
James5:7 Bavandimwe, mwihangane kugeza ubwo Nyagasani azaba aje. Muzirikane uko umuhinzi ategereza umusaruro mwiza w'ibyo yahinze. Awurindira yihanganye ategereje imvura y'umuhindo n'iy'itumba." 
James5:8 Namwe mube ari ko mwihangana mukomere, kuko kuza kwa Nyagasani kwegereje." 
James5:9 Bavandimwe, ntihagire uwitotombera undi kugira ngo bitabashyira mu rubanza. Dore umucamanza ageze ku irembo." 
James5:10 Bavandimwe, muzirikane abahanuzi bavuze mu izina rya Nyagasani, mube ari bo mukuraho urugero rwo kwihangana no kwiyumanganya mu mibabaro." 
James5:11 Dore abadacogora tubita abanyehirwe. Mwumvise uko Yobu yihanganye n'ibyo Nyagasani yamukoreye hanyuma, kuko Nyagasani agira impuhwe n'imbabazi." 
James5:12 Cyane cyane bavandimwe, ntimukarahire, kwaba kurahira mushingiye ku ijuru cyangwa ku isi, cyangwa ku kindi kintu icyo ari cyo cyose. Igihe mwemeye ikintu mujye muvuga gusa muti: “Yee”, n'igihe muhakanye muti: “Oya” kugira ngo mudashyirwa mu rubanza." 
James5:13 Mbese hari ubabaye muri mwe? Nasenge Imana. Hari uwishimye? Naririmbe asingize Imana. 
James5:14 Mbese hari urwaye muri mwe? Natumize abakuru b'itorero bamusabire, bamusīge n'amavuta mu izina rya Nyagasani." 
James5:15 Byongeye kandi nibasenga bizeye Nyagasani, bizakiza umurwayi. Nyagasani azamuhagurutsa ari mutaraga, kandi naho yaba yarakoze ibyaha azabibabarirwa." 
James5:16 Mujye mubwirana ibyaha byanyu kandi musabirane, kugira ngo mukire indwara. Isengesho ry'umuntu w'intungane rigira ububasha, kandi Imana irikoresha umurimo wayo." 
James5:17 Eliya yari umuntu umeze nkatwe. Yasabye Imana ko imvura itagwa, maze imara imyaka itatu n'amezi atandatu itagwa." 
James5:18 Hanyuma yongera gusenga, imvura iragwa imyaka irera." 
James5:19 Bavandimwe, niba muri mwe hagize uyoba agateshuka inzira y'ukuri undi akamugarura," 
James5:20 mumenye ko ugaruye umunyabyaha akava mu nzira yayobeyemo, azaba akijije uwo muntu urupfu rw'iteka kandi atume ibyaha byinshi bibabarirwa." 
1Peter1:1 Jyewe Petero Intumwa ya Yezu Kristo, ndabandikiye mwebwe abo Imana yitoranyirije, mu basuhuke batataniye mu ntara za Ponto na Galati, na Kapadokiya na Aziya na Bitiniya." 
1Peter1:2 Imana Data yabatoranyije ikurikije umugambi yagize kuva kera, Mwuka abagira intore zayo kugira ngo mwumvire Yezu Kristo, mwezwe n'amaraso yabameneye. Imana nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro bisesuye." 
1Peter1:3 Nihasingizwe Imana se w'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo, yo yatugiriye imbabazi. Yaduhaye kuvuka ubwa kabiri, tukaba dufite ibyo twiringira bihamye, tubikesha izuka rya Yezu Kristo mu bapfuye." 
1Peter1:4 Bityo mutegereje umunani mwabikiwe mu ijuru utabora, utandura ntunacuyuke." 
1Peter1:5 Kwizera Imana kwanyu gutuma murindwa n'ububasha bwayo, kugeza ubwo muzabona agakiza kagenewe kuzahishurwa mu gihe cy'imperuka." 
1Peter1:6 Ni byo bibatera guhimbarwa, nubwo ubusanzwe mwagombaga kumara igihe gito mushavuzwa n'ibigeragezo bitari bimwe." 
1Peter1:7 Icyo bigamije ni ukugira ngo ukwizera kwanyu kugeragezwe. Koko kandi ukwizera kwanyu kurusha kure izahabu agaciro, kuko yo yangirika nubwo iba yacishijwe mu ruganda. Bityo igihe Yezu Kristo azahishurwa, azasanga mumuhesheje ishimwe n'ikuzo n'icyubahiro." 
1Peter1:8 We muramukunda mutamubonye, mukanamwemera mutaramuca iryera. Ni yo mpamvu muhimbarwa mugasimbagizwa n'ibyishimo bitavugwa, byuzuye ikuzo," 
1Peter1:9 kuko mwegukanye agakiza mwari mwizeye. 
1Peter1:10 Ako gakiza ni ko abahanuzi bashakashatse babishishikariye, bahanura ibyerekeye ubuntu Imana yari kuzabagirira." 
1Peter1:11 Bihatiraga kumenya ibyo Mwuka wa Kristo yabagaragarizaga, igihe bizabera n'ukuntu bizamera, kuko Mwuka uwo wari muri bo yahoze ahamya imibabaro Kristo azacamo n'ikuzo rizakurikiraho." 
1Peter1:12 Imana yahishuriye abo bahanuzi ko ubutumwa yabashinze atari bo bugenewe, ahubwo ko ari ubwanyu. Ubwo ni bwo Butumwa bwiza mumaze kugezwaho ubu ngubu n'ababubazaniye, bafite ubushobozi bwa Mwuka Muziranenge bohererejwe avuye mu ijuru. Ubwo Butumwa abamarayika na bo babufitiye amatsiko." 
1Peter1:13 Nuko rero nimuhaguruke mwitegure, mwirinde gutegekwa n'inda, mwiringire rwose ubuntu muzagirirwa igihe Yezu Kristo azahishurwa." 
1Peter1:14 Mwumvire Imana nk'abana bayo, mureke gukurikiza ibibi mwararikiraga kera mukiri mu bujiji." 
1Peter1:15 Ahubwo mube abaziranenge mu myifatire yanyu yose, nk'uko Imana yabahamagaye ari inziranenge," 
1Peter1:16 kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Mube abaziranenge kuko nanjye ndi umuziranenge.” 
1Peter1:17 Ubwo mwiyambaza Imana muyita So yo ifata abantu bose kimwe, igacira umuntu wese urubanza ikurikije ibyo yakoze, mujye muyitinya mu minsi musigaranye mugicumbitse ku isi." 
1Peter1:18 Muzi ko atari ibintu bita agaciro nk'ifeza cyangwa izahabu, byabacunguye ngo muve mu myifatire y'imburamumaro mwatojwe na ba sogokuruza." 
1Peter1:19 Ahubwo icyabacunguye ni amaraso ya Kristo y'igiciro gikomeye, nk'ay'umwana w'intama utagira inenge cyangwa ubusembwa." 
1Peter1:20 Imana yari yaragennye ko Kristo akora ibyo mbere y'uko isi iremwa, maze muri ibi bihe by'imperuka imugaragaza kubera mwe." 
1Peter1:21 Ni we ubaha kwemera Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye ikamuha n'ikuzo, bityo ibyo mwemera n'ibyo mwiringira bikaba bishingiye ku Mana." 
1Peter1:22 Mwiyejesheje kumvira ukuri kw'Imana kugira ngo mukundane bya kivandimwe, nta buryarya. Nuko rero mushishikarire gukundana mubikuye ku mutima," 
1Peter1:23 kuko mwabyawe ubwa kabiri bidakomotse ku mbuto ibora, ahubwo ku mbuto itabora ari yo jambo ry'Imana rizima kandi rihoraho." 
1Peter1:24 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Abantu bose bameze nk'ibyatsi, ubwiza bwabo bwose bumeze nk'indabyo zo ku gasozi. Ibyatsi biruma indabyo zikarabirana," 
1Peter1:25 ariko ijambo rya Nyagasani rihoraho iteka.” Iryo jambo ni ryo Butumwa bwiza babagejejeho. 
1Peter2:1 Nuko rero nimwivaneho icyitwa ubugizi bwa nabi n'uburiganya bwose, uburyarya n'ishyari n'ugusebanya kose." 
1Peter2:2 Nk'uko uruhinja rukenera konka, abe ari ko namwe mwifuza amata adafunguye ari yo Jambo ry'Imana, kugira ngo atume mukura, mugere ku gakiza." 
1Peter2:3 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Mwamaze gusogongera mumenya uko Nyagasani agira neza.” 
1Peter2:4 Nimwegere Nyagasani we buye rizima abantu banze, nyamara rikaba ryaratoranyijwe n'Imana kandi rifite agaciro kuri yo." 
1Peter2:5 Namwe nimumusange muri nk'amabuye mazima, kugira ngo mwubakwe mube inzu ya Mwuka. Bityo mube imbaga y'abatambyi b'intore z'Imana mushinzwe kuyitura ibitambo biyishimisha, mubikoze ku buryo bwa Mwuka kandi mubishobojwe na Yezu Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye natoranyije, ngo ribe insanganyarukuta rifite agaciro. Urifitemo icyizere ntazakorwa n'isoni.”" 
1Peter2:7 Nuko rero mwebwe abemera Kristo iryo buye ribafitiye agaciro, ariko ku batamwemera ngo: “Ibuye abubatsi banze ni ryo ryabaye insanganyarukuta.”" 
1Peter2:8 Kandi ngo: “Iryo ni ibuye risitaza abantu, ni urutare rubagusha.” Koko kandi barasitaye nk'uko babigenewe, kuko batumviye Ijambo ry'Imana." 
1Peter2:9 Ariko mwebweho muri ubwoko bwatoranyijwe n'abatambyi bakorera Umwami Imana n'abantu baziranenge, n'ubwoko bwayo bw'umwihariko. Bityo mwamamaze ibikorwa bitangaje by'Imana yabahamagaye ngo muve mu mwijima, mugere mu mucyo wayo w'agatangaza." 
1Peter2:10 Kera ntimwari ubwoko, ariko ubu muri ubwoko bw'Imana. Kera ntimwari mwaragiriwe impuhwe, ariko ubu mumaze kuzigirirwa." 
1Peter2:11 Ncuti nkunda, ndabihanangiriza mumeze nk'abanyamahanga n'ibicibwa kuri iyi si, kugira ngo mwirinde irari muterwa na kamere yanyu rirwanya ubugingo bwanyu." 
1Peter2:12 Mugire imyifatire myiza hagati y'abatazi Imana, kugira ngo nubwo babasebya ngo mugira nabi, babone ibyiza mukora bizatume baha Imana ikuzo umunsi izaza muri twe." 
1Peter2:13 Ku mpamvu za Nyagasani Umugenga wanyu mwemere kugengwa n'umutegetsi uwo ari we wese, yaba umwami nyir'igihugu" 
1Peter2:14 cyangwa abatware be yatumye guhana abakora nabi no gushima abakora neza. 
1Peter2:15 Koko rero Imana ishaka ko mukora neza, ku buryo injiji z'ibipfayongo zibura icyo zibavugaho." 
1Peter2:16 Mumere nk'abantu bishyira bakizana, nyamara ukwishyira ukizana kwanyu ntimuguhindure urwitwazo rwo gukora ibibi, ahubwo mugenze nk'abagaragu b'Imana." 
1Peter2:17 Muhe abantu bose agaciro, mukunde abavandimwe banyu, mutinye Imana, muhe Umwami agaciro." 
1Peter2:18 Bagaragu, mwemere kugengwa na ba shobuja mujye mububaha rwose, ntimwubahe abagwaneza n'ababorohera gusa, ahubwo mwubahe n'abanyamakare." 
1Peter2:19 Erega bishimisha Imana igihe umuntu yihanganira kugirirwa nabi arengana, abitewe no kumva muri we icyo ishaka!" 
1Peter2:20 None se mwashimwa mute igihe mwihanganiye gukubitwa muhōrwa ibyaha byanyu? Ariko rero igihe mwakoze neza mukabihōrwa maze mukihangana, ubwo ni bwo muba mushimishije Imana." 
1Peter2:21 Ibyo ni byo Imana yabahamagariye, kuko Kristo na we yababajwe ku bwanyu, bityo akababera urugero kugira ngo mujye mugenza nka we." 
1Peter2:22 We nta cyaha yigeze akora, nta n'iby'uburiganya yigeze avuga." 
1Peter2:23 Yaratutswe ntiyasubiza, bamugiriye nabi ntiyabakangisha, ahubwo yiragiza Imana ica imanza zitabera." 
1Peter2:24 Kristo ubwe yatwaye ibyaha byacu mu mubiri we, abibambanwa ku musaraba kugira ngo tube dupfuye ku byerekeye ibyaha, maze tubeho dutunganiye Imana. Erega “Inguma ze ni zo zabakijije!" 
1Peter2:25 Mwari mumeze nk'intama zazimiye”, ariko none ubu mugarukiye Umushumba wanyu ari we uyobora ubugingo bwanyu." 
1Peter3:1 Namwe bagore, buri wese yemere kugengwa n'umugabo we, kugira ngo nubwo bamwe baba batemera Ijambo rya Nyagasani, baryemezwe n'imyifatire yanyu mutiriwe mugira icyo muvuga." 
1Peter3:2 Bazareba gusa imyifatire yanyu itagira amakemwa n'ukuntu mwubaha. 
1Peter3:3 Umurimbo wanyu ntukabe uw'inyuma nko kuboha imisatsi, kwambara ibyakozwe mu izahabu cyangwa se imyambaro y'akarusho." 
1Peter3:4 Ahubwo umurimbo wanyu ube uw'imbere mu mutima. Ni umurimbo udasaza w'ubugwaneza n'amahoro, uwo ni wo ufite agaciro gakomeye ku Mana." 
1Peter3:5 Abagore ba kera biyeguriye Imana bakayiringira ni ko na bo barimbaga, buri wese agengwa n'umugabo we." 
1Peter3:6 Ni ko na Sara yari ameze, yubahaga Aburahamu akamwita umutware we. Namwe muba mubaye abana be iyo mukora neza, mudaterwa ubwoba n'igikangisho icyo ari cyo cyose." 
1Peter3:7 Namwe bagabo, buri wese abane n'umugore we amufata neza, kuko abagore badafite imbaraga nk'izanyu. Mujye mubaha agaciro rero kuko muzaherwa hamwe na bo umunani w'ubugingo Imana itanga ku buntu. Mugenze mutyo kugira ngo amasengesho yanyu ye kugira inkomyi." 
1Peter3:8 Ahasigaye mwese muhuze ibitekerezo, muhuze n'umutima, mukundane bya kivandimwe, mugirirane impuhwe kandi mwicishe bugufi." 
1Peter3:9 Ntimukiture umuntu inabi yabagiriye cyangwa igitutsi yabatutse, ahubwo mumwiture kumusabira umugisha, kuko namwe Imana yabasezeranyije umugisha wayo igihe yabahamagaraga." 
1Peter3:10 Ibyanditswe biravuga biti: “Ushaka ubugingo no guhorana amahoro, nafate ururimi rwe ye kuvuga ibibi, afunge n'umunwa we ye kubeshya." 
1Peter3:11 Azibukire ibibi akore ibyiza, ashakashake amahoro ayaharanire." 
1Peter3:12 Kuko Nyagasani ahoza ijisho ku ntungane, atega amatwi akumva ibyo zisaba. Nyamara arwanya inkozi z'ibibi.”" 
1Peter3:13 Mbese ni nde uzabagirira nabi nimugira ishyaka ryo gukora ibyiza? 
1Peter3:14 Icyakora nubwo mwababazwa muzira ibikorwa bitunganye, na byo byababera ihirwe. Ntimugatinye abantu kandi ntimugahagarike umutima." 
1Peter3:15 Ahubwo mwubahe Kristo abe Umugenga w'imitima yanyu. Muhore kandi mwiteguye gusubiza umuntu wese wabasaba gusobanura ibyo mwiringira. 
1Peter3:16 Ariko mubikorane ubugwaneza no kwicisha bugufi. Mugire umutima utabarega ikibi, kugira ngo abasebya imyifatire myiza mukomora kuri Kristo babe ari bo bakorwa n'isoni." 
1Peter3:17 Niba Imana ibishaka, ikiruta ni uko mwababazwa muhōrwa ibyiza mukora aho guhōrwa ibibi." 
1Peter3:18 Kristo na we yapfuye rimwe rizima kubera ibyaha byanyu, we ntungane apfira abagome kugira ngo abageze ku Mana. Igihe yari ku isi baramwishe, maze kubera imbaraga za Mwuka arazuka, aba muzima." 
1Peter3:19 Yakoresheje Mwuka atangariza ubutumwa bw'Imana abapfuye bagizwe imfungwa. 
1Peter3:20 Ni zo ba bantu bari baragomeye Imana, na yo ikabihanganira igihe cyose Nowa yubakaga bwa bwato bunini. Muri ubwo bwato hagiyemo abantu bake gusa, ndetse ni umunani bonyine bakijijwe n'amazi." 
1Peter3:21 Ayo mazi ashushanya kubatizwa ari byo bibakiza namwe muri iki gihe. Si uko yuhagira umuntu imbyiro zo ku mubiri, ahubwo ashushanya ukwiyegurira Imana k'umuntu ufite umutima utamurega ikibi. Ako gakiza mugakesha izuka rya Yezu Kristo" 
1Peter3:22 wagiye mu ijuru akaba ari iburyo bw'Imana, aho yahawe kugenga abamarayika n'ibinyabushobozi n'ibinyabubasha." 
1Peter4:1 Ubwo Kristo yababajwe mu mubiri, namwe mugire ayo matwara ye muyitwaze nk'intwaro. Umaze kubabazwa mu mubiri aba atandukanye n'ibyaha." 
1Peter4:2 Bityo igihe mushigaje kubaho mureke gukurikiza ibyo abantu bararikira, ahubwo mujye mukurikiza ibyo Imana ishaka." 
1Peter4:3 Erega mwamaze igihe gihagije mukora ibyo abatazi Imana baharanira! Dore ibyo mwabagamo: ubwomanzi n'irari, ubusinzi n'inkera n'ubunywi, kimwe no gushengerera ibigirwamana kandi icyo ari ikizira ku Mana." 
1Peter4:4 Ubu rero abatazi Nyagasani basigaye babatangarira, babonye ko mutagifatanya na bo gukabya kwiyandarika bityo bakabasebya." 
1Peter4:5 Nyamara ibyo bazabibazwa na Nyagasani, witeguye gucira imanza abazima n'abapfuye." 
1Peter4:6 Ni cyo cyatumye Ubutumwa bwiza butangarizwa abapfuye na bo, baciriwe urubanza bakiriho ku isi kugira ngo babeho uko Imana ishaka babikesha Mwuka." 
1Peter4:7 Iherezo ry'ibintu byose riregereje. Kubera iyo mpamvu mujye mushyira mu gaciro, kandi mwirinde gutegekwa n'inda kugira ngo mubone uko musenga." 
1Peter4:8 Mbere ya byose mukundane urukundo rudatezuka, kuko urukundo rwibagirwa ibyaha byinshi." 
1Peter4:9 Mujye mwakira abashyitsi mutinuba. 
1Peter4:10 Umuntu wese uko Imana yamuhaye impano ajye ayikoresha yunganira abandi, kugira ngo abe umunyabintu ukoresha neza impano izo ari zo zose Imana yamugabiye." 
1Peter4:11 Nihagira uterura kuvuga, navuge ibyo ahawe n'Imana gusa. Nihagira ukorera abandi, abikorane imbaraga ahabwa n'Imana. Ni bwo Imana izahabwa ikuzo byimazeyo kubera Yezu Kristo. Nahorane icyubahiro n'ubutware iteka ryose. Amina." 
1Peter4:12 Ncuti nkunda, ntimugatangazwe n'uruganda rukaze rw'ibigeragezo mugomba gucamo ngo mumere nk'abagezweho n'ikintu kidasanzwe." 
1Peter4:13 Ahubwo mwishimire gufatanya na Kristo imibabaro, kugira ngo igihe ikuzo rye rizahishurwa muzahimbarwe muvuze n'impundu." 
1Peter4:14 Murahirwa niba babatuka babahōra Kristo, kuko biba byerekana ko Mwuka nyir'ikuzo ari we Mwuka w'Imana, aguma kuri mwe." 
1Peter4:15 Ntihagire umuntu n'umwe muri mwe uhōrwa ko ari umwicanyi cyangwa umujura, cyangwa umugizi wa nabi cyangwa kazitereyemo!" 
1Peter4:16 Nyamara nahōrwa ko ari umukristo ntibikamutere isoni, ahubwo asingize Imana kubera ko ahōwe iryo zina." 
1Peter4:17 Koko rero igihe cy'urubanza kirageze kandi rubanjirije kuri twebwe ab'inzu y'Imana. None se ubwo rubanjirije kuri twe, iherezo ry'abatumvira Ubutumwa bwiza bw'Imana rizaba irihe?" 
1Peter4:18 Ni na ko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo: “Ubwo intungane zirokoka biziruhije, bizagendekera bite abatubaha Imana n'abanyabyaha?”" 
1Peter4:19 Kubera ibyo abababazwa bahōrwa gukora ibyo Imana ishaka, nibiyegurire Umuremyi wabo w'indahemuka bagumye bakore ibyiza." 
1Peter5:1 Abakuru b'itorero rya Kristo bo muri mwe ndabihanangiriza. Nanjye ndi umukuru hamwe namwe, ndi n'umwe mu bagabo bo guhamya ukuntu Kristo yababajwe agapfa, kandi nagenewe kuzahabwa uruhare ku ikuzo rya Kristo rigiye guhishurwa." 
1Peter5:2 Noneho nimukenure umukumbi w'Imana yabaragije mubikore mutinuba, ahubwo mubikunze nk'uko Imana ishaka, mubikore mutabitewe no kwishakira inyungu ahubwo mubyitangiye." 
1Peter5:3 Ntimugatwaze igitugu abo mwaragijwe, ahubwo mubere ubushyo urugero rwiza." 
1Peter5:4 Bityo ubwo Umushumba mukuru azaba ahingutse, muzahembwa ikuzo ari ryo kamba ritangirika ry'abatsinze." 
1Peter5:5 Namwe basore, mujye mwumvira ababaruta ubukuru. Ndetse mwese mukenyere kwicisha bugufi, buri wese amere nk'uhereza mugenzi we. Ibyanditswe biravuga ngo: “Imana irwanya abirasi, abiyoroshya ikabahera ubuntu.”" 
1Peter5:6 Nuko rero mwicishe bugufi imbere y'Imana igira amaboko, kugira ngo izabakuze igihe kigeze." 
1Peter5:7 Ibibahagarika imitima byose mubiyegurire kuko ibitaho. 
1Peter5:8 Mwirinde gutegekwa n'inda kandi mube maso, kuko umwanzi wanyu Satani akora hirya no hino nk'intare itontoma ishaka uwo iconshomera." 
1Peter5:9 Mumurwanye kigabo mwitwaje kwizera Kristo, muzirikana ko ku isi yose hari abavandimwe banyu muhuje imibabaro." 
1Peter5:10 Ariko nimumara kubabazwa igihe gito, Imana ubwayo igira ubuntu byuzuye izababoneza, ibakomeze ibahe imbaraga no kutajegajega. Erega ni yo yabahamagaye ngo muhabwe ku ikuzo ryayo rihoraho riri muri Kristo!" 
1Peter5:11 Iragahorana ingoma iteka ryose. Amina. 
1Peter5:12 Mbandikiye aya magambo make mfashijwe na Silasi, uko mbibona ni umuvandimwe w'indahemuka. Nashatse kubatera akanyabugabo, nkanabemeza ko ibyo mbandikiye ari byo buntu nyakuri Imana yabagiriye kugira ngo mubwishingikirizeho." 
1Peter5:13 Abari i Babiloni batoranyijwe n'Imana kimwe namwe barabatashya, ndetse na Mariko umwana wanjye arabatashya." 
1Peter5:14 Nimuramukanye muhoberana mu ndamutso y'urukundo. Abari muri Kristo mwese nimugire amahoro. 
2Peter1:1 Jyewe Simoni Petero umugaragu wa Yezu Kristo n'Intumwa ye, ndabandikiye mwebwe mwahawe kumwizera gufite agaciro kamwe n'ukwacu, mubikesha ubutabera bw'Imana yacu na Yezu Kristo Umukiza." 
2Peter1:2 Imana nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro bisendereye, mubiheshwa no kuyimenya kimwe no kumenya Umwami wacu Yezu." 
2Peter1:3 Kubera ububasha bwayo Imana yaduhaye ibya ngombwa byose, kugira ngo tubeho twubaha Imana tubikesha kumenya uwaduhamagaye ngo duhabwe ku ikuzo rye no ku kugira neza kwe." 
2Peter1:4 Ni cyo cyatumye aduha amasezerano akomeye cyane kandi afite agaciro, kugira ngo nimumara kuyashyikira mugire uruhare kuri kamere y'Imana, bityo mubashe guca ukubiri n'irari ryononnye iyi si." 
2Peter1:5 Kubera iyo mpamvu murusheho kugira umwete wo kwizera Imana, maze kwizera Imana mukugerekeho kugira neza, kugira neza mukugerekeho ubumenyi," 
2Peter1:6 ubumenyi na bwo mubugerekeho kumenya kwifata, kumenya kwifata mukugerekeho kudacogora, kudacogora mukugerekeho kubaha Imana," 
2Peter1:7 maze kubaha Imana mukugerekeho kubana kwa kivandimwe, kubana kwa kivandimwe mukugerekeho urukundo." 
2Peter1:8 Nimugira mutyo byimazeyo bizabarinda kuba abanebwe, cyangwa ingumba mu kumenya Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
2Peter1:9 Umuntu utagenza atyo aba ari nk'impumyi ireba ibiyegereye gusa, uwo nguwo akaba yibagiwe ko yejejwe agakurwaho ibyaha bye bya kera." 
2Peter1:10 Ubwo bimeze bityo bavandimwe, mushishikarire kwemeza abantu ibikorwa byanyu kugira ngo bamenye ko muri abo Imana yahamagaye ikabatoranya. Nimugenza mutyo nta kizabavana kuri Kristo." 
2Peter1:11 Ahubwo bizabahesha kwakiranwa ubwuzu mu bwami buhoraho bwa Yezu Kristo, ari we Mwami n'Umukiza wacu." 
2Peter1:12 Ni yo mpamvu nzahora mbibutsa ibyo ngibyo nubwo musanzwe mubizi, kandi mukaba mushinze imizi neza mu kuri mwakiriye." 
2Peter1:13 Ndibwira ko ari ngombwa guhora mbakangura, nkabibibutsa igihe cyose nkiriho." 
2Peter1:14 Nzi yuko bidatinze ngiye kwimuka nkava muri uyu mubiri nsembereyemo, ni na ko Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo yansobanuriye." 
2Peter1:15 Nuko rero nzakora uko nshoboye kose, kugira ngo nimara gupfa muzabashe kujya mwibuka izo nyigisho." 
2Peter1:16 Igihe twabamenyeshaga uko Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo azaza afite ububasha, si imigani yahimbwe n'abantu twabaciriye, ahubwo twabatekerereje ukuntu twiboneye ubuhangange bwe." 
2Peter1:17 Icyo gihe Imana Data yamuhaye agaciro n'ikuzo, maze twumva ijwi ry'Imana nyir'ikuzo ry'akataraboneka ivuga iti: “Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane, ni we nishimira.”" 
2Peter1:18 Igihe twari kumwe na we mu mpinga ya wa musozi w'Imana, ni bwo twiyumviye iryo jwi rivugira mu ijuru." 
2Peter1:19 Byongeye kandi turushaho kugirira icyizere ubutumwa bw'abahanuzi. Namwe muzaba mugize neza nimubwitaho, kuko ari nk'itara ryakira ahacuze umwijima, rigakesha ijoro kugeza igihe inyenyeri yo mu rukerera imurikiye imitima yanyu." 
2Peter1:20 Mbere ya byose mumenye ko ari nta muntu ubasha kwisobanurira ubuhanuzi bwo mu Byanditswe ubwo ari bwo bwose. 
2Peter1:21 Nta buhanuzi bwigeze kuvugwa ku bushake bw'umuntu habe na rimwe. Ahubwo abahanuzi bavugaga ibyo batumwe n'Imana bayobowe na Mwuka Muziranenge. 
2Peter2:1 Ariko nk'uko abahanurabinyoma badutse kera muri rubanda, ni ko n'abigishabinyoma bazaduka muri mwe. Bazisuka muri mwe rwihishwa bakwize inyigisho ziyobya kandi zisenya, ndetse bazihakana Umugenga wabo wabacunguye, maze bidatinze bikururireho icyorezo." 
2Peter2:2 Benshi bazakurikiza ingeso zabo ziteye isoni, bitume abantu basebya inzira y'ukuri Imana ibayobora." 
2Peter2:3 Kubera irari ryabo abo bigishabinyoma bazababwira amagambo bihimbiye bashaka kurya utwanyu. Nyamara kuva kera urubanza rwabo rwarateguwe, kandi kurimbuka bagenewe kuregereje." 
2Peter2:4 Abamarayika bakoze ibyaha na bo Imana ntiyabababariye, ahubwo yabaroshye mu nyenga ibafungira mu mwijima baboshye, bategereje gucirwa urubanza." 
2Peter2:5 Byongeye kandi Imana ntiyababariye abo ku isi yo mu gihe cya kera, ahubwo abayisuzuguraga yabatsembesheje umwuzure, harokoka Nowa gusa watangazaga ibyo gutunganira Imana, hamwe n'abandi barindwi." 
2Peter2:6 Imijyi ya Sodoma na Gomora na yo Imana yarayihannye, irayitwika iyihindura ivu, kugira ngo bibere urugero abiyemeza gusuzugura Imana." 
2Peter2:7 Yarokoye Loti w'intungane, wababazwaga n'imibereho iteye isoni y'izo nkozi z'ibibi." 
2Peter2:8 Erega uwo muntu w'intungane yari aturanye na bo, agahora abareba kandi abumva! Kubera ko yari intungane, yashengurwaga iminsi yose n'ibikorwa byabo by'ubugome." 
2Peter2:9 Bityo Nyagasani azi uburyo bwo kuvana abamwubaha mu bigeragezo, no guteganyiriza abagizi ba nabi igihano, ku munsi Imana izaciraho imanza." 
2Peter2:10 Cyane cyane hazahanwa abakurikiza irari baterwa na kamere yabo yandavuye, bagasuzugura ubutegetsi ubwo ari bwo bwose. Abo bigishabinyoma barahangara cyane kandi barasuzugura. Ntibubaha ibyitwa ibinyakuzo byo mu ijuru, ahubwo barabisebya." 
2Peter2:11 Nyamara abamarayika nubwo babarusha cyane imbaraga n'ububasha, bo ntibahangara gutuka ibyo binyakuzo ngo babirege kuri Nyagasani." 
2Peter2:12 Ariko abo bantu batuka ibintu kandi batabizi. Bameze nk'inyamaswa zitagira ubwenge, zavukiye gutegwa no gutsembwaho! Koko kandi bazatsembwaho kimwe n'inyamaswa." 
2Peter2:13 Kubera ko bagiriye abandi nabi na bo baziturwa kugirirwa nabi. Bishimira kwiyandarika no ku manywa y'ihangu. Igihe basangira namwe ku munsi mukuru bakoza abantu isoni, bakanabatesha agaciro kuko bashimishwa n'ubutiriganya." 
2Peter2:14 Batwawe umutima n'abagore gito kandi ntibahwema gukora ibyaha, n'abadakomeye babagusha mu mutego. Bazobereye mu kurarikira ibintu. Ni ibivume!" 
2Peter2:15 Bateshutse inzira iboneye banyura iya Balāmu mwene Bewori, wakunze inyungu zizanwa no gukora ibibi." 
2Peter2:16 Icyakora yarakangawe kubera icyo cyaha, kuko indogobe ye isanzwe ari itungo ritavuga yavuze nk'umuntu, ibuza uwo muhanuzi gukora iby'ubusazi." 
2Peter2:17 Abo bantu bameze nk'amasōko yakamye, cyangwa ibihu bitwarwa n'inkubi y'umuyaga. Icyo bagenewe ni ukujugunywa mu mwijima w'icuraburindi." 
2Peter2:18 Bavuga ibigambo by'ubwirasi bitagira icyo bimara. Bareshya abantu bakoresha irari baterwa na kamere yabo, kugira ngo bagushe mu mutego abamaze igihe gito bitandukanyije n'abanambye mu buyobe." 
2Peter2:19 Basezeranira abantu kubakura mu buja, nyamara bo ubwabo bari mu buja bw'ingeso zizabatsembaho. Erega umuntu aba mu buja bw'ikintu cyose cyamuganje!" 
2Peter2:20 Ubundi abantu baca ukubiri n'iby'isi byonona ingeso, babishobojwe no kumenya Nyagasani Umukiza wacu Yezu Kristo. Nyamara iyo bibaye bityo, nyuma bakongera kubohwa na byo bigasubira kubaganza, imibereho yabo ya nyuma irusha iya mbere kuba mibi." 
2Peter2:21 Icyajyaga kubabera cyiza ni ukutigera banyura inzira y'ubutungane kuruta kuyinyura, hanyuma bakayita bakanga itegeko ritagira inenge bari barahawe." 
2Peter2:22 Bikababera nka wa mugani uvuga ukuri ngo: “Imbwa isubiye ku birutsi byayo”, kandi ngo: “Ingurube yamaze kuhagirwa isubiye kwigaragura mu byondo”." 
2Peter3:1 Ncuti nkunda, uru ni urwandiko rwa kabiri mbandikiye. Zombi nazanditse nshaka kubibutsa ibyo mwize, nkabakangurira kubitekerezaho ku buryo buboneye." 
2Peter3:2 Ndabibutsa ibyavuzwe kera n'abahanuzi batumwe n'Imana, kimwe n'amabwiriza ya Nyagasani Umukiza wacu mwashyikirijwe n'Intumwa yabatumyeho." 
2Peter3:3 Mbere ya byose mumenye ko mu minsi y'imperuka, hazaduka abakobanyi bakurikiza irari ryabo. Bazabakoba" 
2Peter3:4 bagira bati: “Mbese ntiyasezeranye ko azaza? None se ubu ari he? Ba sogokuruza bacu baritārūye, nyamara kandi ibintu byose bimeze nk'uko byahoze kuva isi ikiremwa.”" 
2Peter3:5 Abavuga batyo baba biyibagije ko kera Imana yavuze ijambo maze ijuru n'isi bikaremwa. Yaremye isi iyikuye mu mazi kandi ikoresheje amazi. 
2Peter3:6 Byongeye kandi amazi ni yo yarenze hejuru y'abari ku isi cya gihe akabahitana. 
2Peter3:7 Na none Ijambo ry'Imana ni ryo ryemeza ko ijuru n'isi by'ubu bibikiwe gutsembwa n'umuriro, umunsi abasuzugura Imana bazacirwa iteka bakarimbuka." 
2Peter3:8 Ariko ncuti nkunda, hari ikintu kimwe mutagomba kwibagirwa: kuri Nyagasani, umunsi umwe ni nk'imyaka igihumbi, n'imyaka igihumbi ni nk'umunsi umwe." 
2Peter3:9 Nyagasani ntatinda gushyitsa amasezerano ye nk'uko bamwe babitekereza. Nyamara ni mwe yihanganira, adashaka ko hagira n'umwe urimbuka, ahubwo ashaka ko bose bihana." 
2Peter3:10 Ku munsi wa Nyagasani azaza atunguranye nk'umujura. Uwo munsi ijuru rizavanwaho urusaku ari rwose, ibirigize bihitanwe n'umuriro maze isi na yo n'ibiyirimo byose bitsembwe." 
2Peter3:11 Nuko rero ubwo byose bizayoyoka bityo, murumva ukuntu mukwiye kumera. Mbega ukuntu mugomba kuba abaziranenge mukubaha Imana," 
2Peter3:12 mutegereza uwo munsi w'Imana mukanawutebutsa! Uwo munsi ijuru rizagurumana, ibiririmo byose bishongeshwe n'icyokere cy'umuriro." 
2Peter3:13 Ariko nk'uko Imana yabisezeranye, dutegereje ijuru rishya n'isi nshya, iwabo w'ubutungane." 
2Peter3:14 None rero ncuti nkunda ubwo mutegereje ibyo, mukwiriye kugira umwete ngo uwo munsi muzasangwe mu mahoro, nta mugayo ubariho cyangwa inenge." 
2Peter3:15 Mumenye yuko igituma Umwami wacu yihangana atyo, ari ukugira ngo mubone uko mukizwa. Ni na ko Pawulo umuvandimwe wacu dukunda, yabibandikiye akoresheje ubwenge Imana yamuhaye." 
2Peter3:16 Ni ko yanditse mu nzandiko ze zose, aho yavuze ibyerekeye ibyo ngibyo. Mu nzandiko ze hari amagambo amwe akomeye gusobanurwa, ku buryo abaswa n'abahindagurika bayasobanura amafuti nk'uko bagenza ibindi Byanditswe. Bityo bakizanira icyorezo." 
2Peter3:17 Nuko rero ncuti nkunda, muraburiwe. Mwirinde gukururwa n'ubuyobe bw'abantu b'indakoreka, butabatesha ibyo mwishingikirijeho." 
2Peter3:18 Ahubwo mutere imbere mu buntu Imana ibagirira no mu kumenya Yezu Kristo Umwami n'Umukiza wacu. Nahabwe ikuzo none n'iteka ryose. Amina.

2John1:1 Jyewe Umukuru, ndakwandikiye Mubyeyi, wowe mugore watoranyijwe n'Imana hamwe n'abana bawe, mbakunda kubera ukuri kw'Imana dusangiye. Si jye jyenyine ubakunda, ahubwo n'abazi uko kuri bose barabakunda."

2John1:2 Ikibidutera ni uko kuri kuguma muri twe tukazahorana na ko iteka. 
2John1:2 Ikibidutera ni uko kuri kuguma muri twe tukazahorana na ko iteka. 
2John1:3 Imana Data nitugirire ubuntu, iduhe n'imbabazi n'amahoro ifatanyije na Yezu Kristo Umwana wayo, ibyo byose bishingiye ku kuri kwayo no ku rukundo rwayo." 
2John1:3 Imana Data nitugirire ubuntu, iduhe n'imbabazi n'amahoro ifatanyije na Yezu Kristo Umwana wayo, ibyo byose bishingiye ku kuri kwayo no ku rukundo rwayo." 
2John1:4 Nishimiye cyane kubona bamwe mu bana bawe bagendera mu kuri kw'Imana, bakurikije itegeko twahawe n'Imana Data." 
2John1:4 Nishimiye cyane kubona bamwe mu bana bawe bagendera mu kuri kw'Imana, bakurikije itegeko twahawe n'Imana Data." 
2John1:5 None rero Mubyeyi, ndagusabye ngo twese dukundane! Iryo si itegeko rishya mbandikiye, ahubwo ni iryo twahawe kuva mbere na mbere." 
2John1:5 None rero Mubyeyi, ndagusabye ngo twese dukundane! Iryo si itegeko rishya mbandikiye, ahubwo ni iryo twahawe kuva mbere na mbere." 
2John1:6 Urwo rukundo dore uko ruteye: ni ukugenda dukurikiza amategeko y'Imana, kandi itegeko nyaryo ni rya rindi mwabwiwe kuva mbere na mbere, kugira ngo muhore mugenza mutyo." 
2John1:6 Urwo rukundo dore uko ruteye: ni ukugenda dukurikiza amategeko y'Imana, kandi itegeko nyaryo ni rya rindi mwabwiwe kuva mbere na mbere, kugira ngo muhore mugenza mutyo." 
2John1:7 Ku isi hadutse abashukanyi benshi batemera ko Yezu Kristo yaje yigize umuntu. Ugenza atyo ni umushukanyi kandi ni umwanzi urwanya Kristo. 
2John1:7 Ku isi hadutse abashukanyi benshi batemera ko Yezu Kristo yaje yigize umuntu. Ugenza atyo ni umushukanyi kandi ni umwanzi urwanya Kristo. 
2John1:8 Mwirinde rero mutazava aho mubura ibyo mwaruhiye, ahubwo muharanire kuzahabwa ingororano yuzuye." 
2John1:8 Mwirinde rero mutazava aho mubura ibyo mwaruhiye, ahubwo muharanire kuzahabwa ingororano yuzuye." 
2John1:9 Umuntu wese udakomeza inyigisho za Kristo akazirengaho, nta Mana afite. Naho ukomeza izo nyigisho ni we uba afite Imana Data, akaba afite n'Umwana wayo." 
2John1:9 Umuntu wese udakomeza inyigisho za Kristo akazirengaho, nta Mana afite. Naho ukomeza izo nyigisho ni we uba afite Imana Data, akaba afite n'Umwana wayo." 
2John1:10 Nihagira umuntu uza muri mwe mugasanga atemera izo nyigisho, ntimuzamwakire mu mazu yanyu, ndetse ntimuzanamubwire muti: “Urakaza neza!”" 
2John1:10 Nihagira umuntu uza muri mwe mugasanga atemera izo nyigisho, ntimuzamwakire mu mazu yanyu, ndetse ntimuzanamubwire muti: “Urakaza neza!”" 
2John1:11 Erega uwakira bene uwo aba yifatanyije na we mu bibi akora. 
2John1:11 Erega uwakira bene uwo aba yifatanyije na we mu bibi akora. 
2John1:12 Nubwo mfite byinshi nabandikira, ariko sinshatse kubibamenyesha nkoresheje urupapuro na wino. Ahubwo niringiye kuzaza iwanyu nkabibabwira imbonankubone, kugira ngo twishimane bihagije." 
2John1:12 Nubwo mfite byinshi nabandikira, ariko sinshatse kubibamenyesha nkoresheje urupapuro na wino. Ahubwo niringiye kuzaza iwanyu nkabibabwira imbonankubone, kugira ngo twishimane bihagije." 
2John1:13 Abana ba mukuru wawe, na we watoranyijwe n'Imana baragutashya." 
2John1:13 Abana ba mukuru wawe, na we watoranyijwe n'Imana baragutashya." 
3John1:1 Jyewe Umukuru, ndakwandikiye Gayo ncuti yanjye nkunda kubera ukuri kw'Imana."

3John1:2 Ncuti nkunda, ndakwifuriza kumererwa neza no kuba mutaraga mu mubiri, nk'uko uri mutaraga mu mutima." 
3John1:2 Ncuti nkunda, ndakwifuriza kumererwa neza no kuba mutaraga mu mubiri, nk'uko uri mutaraga mu mutima." 
3John1:3 Koko narishimye cyane, igihe abavandimwe bamwe bazaga bagahamya ukuntu ukomeye ku kuri kw'Imana, kandi ukaba ugenda ukurikiza uko kuri."

3John1:4 Nta kintu kinezeza nko kumva ko abana banjye bakurikiza ukuri.

3John1:5 Ncuti nkunda, uri indahemuka mu byo ukorera abavandimwe byose, ndetse nubwo baba ari ab'ahandi." 
3John1:5 Ncuti nkunda, uri indahemuka mu byo ukorera abavandimwe byose, ndetse nubwo baba ari ab'ahandi." 
3John1:6 Bahamije iby'urukundo rwawe imbere y'umuryango wa Kristo. Nyamuneka, nk'uko bikwiriye abakozi b'Imana, ni byiza ko ubahambirira impamba bagakomeza urugendo rwabo." 
3John1:6 Bahamije iby'urukundo rwawe imbere y'umuryango wa Kristo. Nyamuneka, nk'uko bikwiriye abakozi b'Imana, ni byiza ko ubahambirira impamba bagakomeza urugendo rwabo." 
3John1:7 Bahagurutse batumwe na Kristo ntibemera kugira icyo bahabwa n'abatemera Imana yacu. 
3John1:7 Bahagurutse batumwe na Kristo ntibemera kugira icyo bahabwa n'abatemera Imana yacu. 
3John1:8 Tugomba kunganira bene abo bantu rero, kugira ngo tube dufatanyije na bo kogeza ukuri kw'Imana."

3John1:9 Nandikiye umuryango wa Kristo w'iwanyu, ariko Diyoterefe ukunda kwiha ubukuru muri mwe ntatwemera."

3John1:10 Ni cyo gituma ninza nzashyira ahabona ibyo akora n'ukuntu adusebya, akatubeshyera. Si ibyo gusa, yanga no gucumbikira abavandimwe, n'abashaka kubakīra akabibabuza ndetse akanabaca mu Muryango w'Imana." 
3John1:10 Ni cyo gituma ninza nzashyira ahabona ibyo akora n'ukuntu adusebya, akatubeshyera. Si ibyo gusa, yanga no gucumbikira abavandimwe, n'abashaka kubakīra akabibabuza ndetse akanabaca mu Muryango w'Imana." 
3John1:11 Ncuti nkunda, ntugakurikize urugero rw'ibibi abandi bakora, ahubwo ujye ukurikiza urugero rwiza. Ukora ibyiza aba ari uw'Imana, naho ukora ibibi aba atarayibona." 
3John1:11 Ncuti nkunda, ntugakurikize urugero rw'ibibi abandi bakora, ahubwo ujye ukurikiza urugero rwiza. Ukora ibyiza aba ari uw'Imana, naho ukora ibibi aba atarayibona." 
3John1:12 Demeteriyo we abantu bose bamuvugaho ibyiza, yewe n'ukuri twamamaza na ko kurabihamya ndetse natwe ubwacu turabihamya, kandi uzi ko ibyo duhamya ari ukuri." 
3John1:12 Demeteriyo we abantu bose bamuvugaho ibyiza, yewe n'ukuri twamamaza na ko kurabihamya ndetse natwe ubwacu turabihamya, kandi uzi ko ibyo duhamya ari ukuri." 
3John1:13 Nari nshigaje byinshi nakwandikira, ariko sinifuje gukoresha wino n'ikaramu." 
3John1:13 Nari nshigaje byinshi nakwandikira, ariko sinifuje gukoresha wino n'ikaramu." 
3John1:14 Ahubwo niringiye kuzakubona bidatinze maze tuvugane imbonankubone. 
3John1:14 Ahubwo niringiye kuzakubona bidatinze maze tuvugane imbonankubone. 
3John1:15 Gira amahoro. Incuti zawe ziragutashya, nawe udutahirize izacu buri muntu ku giti cye."
