Jude1:1 Jyewe Yuda umugaragu wa Yezu Kristo, nkaba n'umuvandimwe wa Yakobo, ndabandikiye mwebwe abahamagawe, mugakundwa n'Imana Data kandi mukarindwa na Yezu Kristo." 
Jude1:2 Imana ibagirire imbabazi, ibahe amahoro n'urukundo bisesuye." 
Jude1:3 Ncuti nkunda, nari nsanzwe mfite ishyaka ryo kubandikira ibyerekeye agakiza dusangiye, none mbonye ko ari ngombwa kubikora ngo mbatere umwete wo kurwanira ibyerekeye Kristo twemera, ibyo Imana yabishinze intore zayo rimwe rizima." 
Jude1:4 Hari abantu basuzuguye Imana baseseye muri mwe rwihishwa. Ibyerekeye ubuntu tugirirwa n'Imana yacu babihindura ukundi, kugira ngo bishyigikire ubwomanzi bwabo kandi bagahinyura Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo, ari we databuja umwe rukumbi. Iteka bazacirwa ryanditswe kuva kera." 
Jude1:5 Nubwo ibyo byose mubizi, ndashaka kubibutsa ko Nyagasani yarokoye Abisiraheli akabavana mu Misiri, ariko hanyuma agatsemba abatamwemeraga." 
Jude1:6 Mwibuke n'abamarayika batagumye mu myanya Imana yabahaye, maze bakivana ahasusurutse. Barindiwe mu mwijima baboheshejwe iminyururu ihoraho iteka, bategereje kuzacirwa urubanza kuri wa munsi ukomeye." 
Jude1:7 Mwibuke na Sodoma na Gomora n'imijyi yari ihakikije, ukuntu abaturage baho batwawe n'ubusambanyi no guhuza ibitsina bimwe. Bahawe igihano cy'umuriro w'iteka, kugira ngo bibere bose urugero." 
Jude1:8 Na ba bandi ni ko babigenza: bagira inzozi zituma bangiza imibiri yabo, bagasuzugura ubutegetsi ubwo ari bwo bwose, ndetse bagatuka ibyitwa Ibinyakuzo byo mu ijuru." 
Jude1:9 Nyamara na Mikayeli Umumarayika mukuru, igihe yajyaga impaka na Satani baburana umurambo wa Musa, ntiyahangaye gucira Satani urubanza amutuka, ahubwo yaravuze ati: “Nyagasani nagukangare!”" 
Jude1:10 Ariko abo bantu bapfa gutuka icyo batazi cyose, naho ibyo bazi bituruka kuri kamere yabo, kimwe n'inyamaswa zitagira ubwenge, ni na byo biboreka." 
Jude1:11 Bazabona ishyano! Banyuze mu nzira ya Kayini, bakohokera mu buyobe bwa Balāmu ari inyungu bakurikiranye, bagatikirira mu myivumbagatanyo nka Kōra." 
Jude1:12 Ni bo baza kwangiza ugusangira kwa kivandimwe mugira, basangira namwe nta cyo bishisha. Ni abashumba birwanaho ubwabo. Ni ibicu bihuherwa n'umuyaga ntibigushe imvura. Ni ibiti bitera imbuto no mu gihe cy'isarura bikumirana, bikanaranduka." 
Jude1:13 Ni umuhengeri wo mu nyanja warubiye, ukavundereza ifuro ry'ibiteye isoni bakora. Ni inyenyeri zizerera, zagenewe umwijima w'icuraburindi iteka ryose." 
Jude1:14 Henoki uwa karindwi mu masekuruza kuva kuri Adamu, yahanuye iby'abo bantu agira ati: “Dore Nyagasani azanye n'intore ze ibihumbi n'ibihumbi," 
Jude1:15 aje gucira abantu bose urubanza no gushinja abatubaha Imana bose, ibyo bakoze byose byo kuyisuzugura n'ibitutsi abanyabyaha bayitutse!”" 
Jude1:16 Abo bantu bahora bijujuta kandi binuba, bagengwa n'irari ryabo. Bahora mu magambo y'ubwirasi, kandi bakaryoshyaryoshya abo bashakaho inyungu." 
Jude1:17 Nyamara mwebweho ncuti nkunda, mwibuke ibyahanuwe kera n'Intumwa z'Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo." 
Jude1:18 Zarababwiye ziti: “Mu minsi y'imperuka hazaduka abakobanyi, bakurikiza irari ribatera gusuzugura Imana”." 
Jude1:19 Abo ni ba bantu bazana kwicamo ibice, bagengwa na kamere yabo, ntibagengwe na Mwuka w'Imana." 
Jude1:20 Ariko mwebweho ncuti nkunda, mugumye mwishingikirize ku byerekeye Kristo twemera bitagira amakemwa, musenge muvugishwa na Mwuka Muziranenge." 
Jude1:21 Byongeye kandi muhame mu rukundo rw'Imana, mutegereje ko Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo abageza ku bugingo buhoraho kubera imbabazi ze." 
Jude1:22 Abagishidikanya mubagirire impuhwe," 
Jude1:23 mubarokore nk'ababarura mu muriro. Abandi mubagirire impuhwe zivanze n'ubwoba, mwanga ndetse n'imyambaro yabo yandujwe n'imigirire baterwa na kamere yabo." 
Jude1:24 Imana ni yo ibasha kubarinda kugwa mu cyaha, ikabazana imbere yayo mufite ikuzo ryayo nta makemwa, muvuza n'impundu." 
Jude1:25 Iyo Mana imwe rukumbi yadukirishije Umwami wacu Yezu Kristo, igumane ikuzo n'ubuhangange n'ububasha n'ubushobozi, kuva mbere na mbere na n'ubu n'iteka ryose. Amina." 
Revelation1:1 Ibi ni ibyahishuwe na Yezu Kristo abihawe n'Imana, kugira ngo yereke abagaragu be ibyenda kubaho. Yabimenyesheje umugaragu we Yohani amutumyeho umumarayika." 
Revelation1:2 Yohani na we yemeza ijambo ryavuye ku Mana, n'iby'ukuri Yezu Kristo yahamije akurikije ibyo yiboneye." 
Revelation1:3 Hahirwa umuntu usoma iki gitabo, hahirwa n'abumva amagambo yahanuwe akirimo kandi bagakurikiza ibyanditswemo, kuko igihe byagenewe cyegereje." 
Revelation1:4 Jyewe Yohani, ndabandikiye mwebwe amatorero arindwi yo mu ntara ya Aziya. Imana nibagirire ubuntu ibahe n'amahoro, yo iriho kandi yahozeho, kandi igiye kuza. Nibikore ifatanyije n'ibyitwa ibinyamwuka birindwi bihora imbere y'intebe yayo ya cyami." 
Revelation1:5 Ibikore kandi ifatanyije na Yezu Kristo umuhamya w'indahemuka, akaba yarabimburiye abandi kuzuka mu bapfuye, akagirwa umutware w'abami bategeka iyi si. Kristo aradukunda, ni na we watubohoye amena amaraso ye kugira ngo atuvane mu byaha byacu." 
Revelation1:6 Yatugize kandi abantu bo mu bwami bwe b'abatambyi, kugira ngo dukorere Imana Se. Nahabwe ikuzo n'imbaraga iteka ryose. Amina." 
Revelation1:7 Dore aje ku bicu, umuntu wese azamubona ndetse n'abatoboye umubiri we bazamubona. Amoko yose yo ku isi azacura imiborogo ku bwe. Koko bizaba bityo! Amina." 
Revelation1:8 Nyagasani Imana Ishoborabyose, iriho kandi yahozeho, kandi igiye kuza iravuga iti: “Ni jyewe Ntangiriro, ni nanjye Herezo.”" 
Revelation1:9 Ni jye Yohani umuvandimwe wanyu musangiye amakuba duhōrwa Yezu, musangiye kandi ubwami bwe n'ukwihangana duterwa na we. Nari ku kirwa cya Patimo, mpōrwa Ijambo ry'Imana n'iby'ukuri Yezu yahamije." 
Revelation1:10 Ku munsi wa Nyagasani, Mwuka w'Imana anzaho maze ndabonekerwa, inyuma yanjye numva ijwi rimeze nk'iry'impanda" 
Revelation1:11 ry'uvuga cyane ati: “Ibyo ureba ubyandike mu muzingo w'igitabo, uwoherereze amatorero arindwi yo muri iyi mijyi: Efezi na Simirina na Perugamo, na Tiyatira na Saridi, na Filadelifiya na Lawodiseya.”" 
Revelation1:12 Ndahindukira kugira ngo ndebe uwambwiraga, maze mbona hateretswe amatara arindwi akozwe mu izahabu." 
Revelation1:13 Hagati yayo hari hahagaze usa n'umwana w'umuntu. Yari yambaye ikanzu ndende, igituza cye kizengurutswe n'umukandara w'izahabu." 
Revelation1:14 Umutwe we n'umusatsi we byereranaga nk'inyange cyangwa nk'urubura, kandi amaso ye yari nk'indimi z'umuriro." 
Revelation1:15 Ibirenge bye byarabagiranaga nk'umuringa wamazwemo inkamba n'umuriro ugasenwa, kandi ijwi rye ryarangiraga nk'amazi menshi asuma." 
Revelation1:16 Mu kuboko kwe kw'iburyo yari afite inyenyeri ndwi, naho mu kanwa ke havagamo inkota ityaye. Mu maso he harabagiranaga nk'izuba ryo ku manywa y'ihangu." 
Revelation1:17 Murabutswe mpita nikubita hasi imbere ye mera nk'uwapfuye. Nuko andambikaho ikiganza cy'iburyo aravuga ati: “Witinya! Ni jye Ntangiriro, ni nanjye Herezo." 
Revelation1:18 Dore ndi muzima, nari narapfuye none ndiho kugeza iteka ryose. Ni jye ufite imfunguzo, nshobora gufunga no gufungura urupfu n'ikuzimu." 
Revelation1:19 Nuko rero andika ibyo ubonye, ari ibiriho ubu ari n'ibigiye gukurikiraho." 
Revelation1:20 Ibyerekeye inyenyeri ndwi wabonye mu kiganza cyanjye cy'iburyo, n'amatara arindwi y'izahabu ni ibanga. Dore uko iryo banga risobanura: inyenyeri ndwi ni abamarayika bashinzwe ya matorero arindwi, naho amatara arindwi ni ayo matorero arindwi ubwayo." 
Revelation2:1 “Andikira umumarayika ushinzwe itorero ry'Imana ryo muri Efezi uti: ‘Ufashe inyenyeri ndwi mu kuboko kw'iburyo, akanagendera hagati y'amatara arindwi y'izahabu aravuze ngo:" 
Revelation2:2 Nzi ibyo ukora n'ukuntu uvunika ntucogore. Nzi kandi ko utabasha kwihanganira abagizi ba nabi. Wagenzuye abiyita intumwa za Kristo kandi atari zo, maze usanga ko babeshya." 
Revelation2:3 Koko warihanganye, warababajwe bakumpōra ntiwacika intege." 
Revelation2:4 Icyakora hari icyo nkugaya, ni uko waretse kunkunda nk'uko wankundaga mbere." 
Revelation2:5 Nuko rero wibuke aho wavuye ukagwa, maze wihane wongere gukora uko wakoraga mbere. Nibitaba bityo nzaza aho uri, nkure itara ryawe aho riteretse niba utihannye." 
Revelation2:6 Nyamara hari icyo ngushimira, ni uko wanga imigenzereze y'abayoboke ba Nikola nk'uko nanjye nyanga." 
Revelation2:7 “ ‘Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve icyo Mwuka w'Imana abwira amatorero yayo! Utsinda wese nzamuha kurya ku mbuto z'igiti cy'ubugingo, kiri mu busitani bw'Imana. ’" 
Revelation2:8 “Andikira umumarayika ushinzwe itorero ry'Imana ry'i Simirina uti: ‘Uw'Intangiriro akaba n'uw'Iherezo, ari na we wari warapfuye none akaba ariho, aravuze ngo:" 
Revelation2:9 Nzi amakuba ugira n'ubukene bwawe, nyamara kandi uri umukungu rwose! Nzi n'ukuntu utukwa n'abiyita Abayahudi kandi atari bo, ahubwo ari abo mu ikoraniro ry'abasenga Satani." 
Revelation2:10 Ntutinye uburyo uzababazwa: dore Satani agiye kubagerageza arohe bamwe muri mwe muri gereza, mugirirwe nabi kumara iminsi icumi. Urabe indahemuka rero kugeza ku gupfa, nanjye nzaguha ubugingo buhoraho ubugire ho ikamba." 
Revelation2:11 “ ‘Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve icyo Mwuka w'Imana abwira amatorero yayo! Utsinda wese ntacyo urupfu rwa kabiri ruzamutwara.’ 
Revelation2:12 “Andikira umumarayika ushinzwe itorero ry'Imana ry'i Perugamo uti: ‘Ufite inkota ityaye impande zombi aravuze ngo: 
Revelation2:13 Nzi aho utuye, ni aho Satani ashinze intebe ye ya cyami, ariko ntibyakubujije gukomera kuri jye. Ntiwigeze unyihakana, habe no mu gihe Antipa umuhamya wanjye w'indahemuka yicirwaga iwanyu, aho Satani aganje." 
Revelation2:14 Icyakora mfite ibyo nkugaya: ni uko iwanyu hari abantu bakurikiza inyigisho za Balāmu, wigishije Balaki kugusha Abisiraheli mu cyaha, barya inyama zaterekerejwe ibigirwamana bakanasambana." 
Revelation2:15 Iwanyu kandi hari abakurikiza inyigisho z'ubuyobe z'abayoboke ba Nikola. 
Revelation2:16 Nuko rero wihane. Nibitaba bityo ngiye kuza aho uri bidatinze, mbarwanye nkoresheje inkota iva mu kanwa kanjye." 
Revelation2:17 “ ‘Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve icyo Mwuka w'Imana abwira amatorero yayo! Utsinda wese nzamugaburira manu ihishwe. Buri wese kandi nzamuha ibuye ryera ryanditsweho izina rishya, ritazwi n'umuntu uwo ari we wese keretse uzaba arihawe.’" 
Revelation2:18 “Andikira umumarayika ushinzwe itorero ry'Imana ry'i Tiyatira uti: ‘Umwana w'Imana ufite amaso ameze nk'ibirimi by'umuriro, n'ibirenge birabagirana nk'umuringa usenwe aravuze ngo:" 
Revelation2:19 Nzi ibyo ukora n'urukundo ugira, nzi n'uko unyizera n'umurimo unkorera no kwihangana kwawe. Nzi kandi ko ibyo ukora ubu biruta kure ibyo wakoraga mbere." 
Revelation2:20 Ariko mfite icyo nkugaya: ni uko wa mugore Yezebeli wiyita umuhanuzikazi, umwemerera kwigisha. Ayobya abagaragu banjye abigisha gusambana, no kurya ibyaterekerejwe ibigirwamana." 
Revelation2:21 Namuhaye igihe cyo kwihana nyamara ntashaka kureka ubusambanyi bwe. 
Revelation2:22 Ni cyo gituma ngiye kumuheza ku buriri hamwe n'abasambane be, kugira ngo bababazwe bikomeye niba batihannye ngo bareke ibibi bakorana na we." 
Revelation2:23 Ndetse n'abana be nzabica, bityo amatorero yose y'Imana azamenyeraho ko jyewe nzi kugenzura ibitekerezo n'ibyifuzo by'abantu. Umuntu wese muri mwe nzamwitura ibikwiriye ibyo azaba yarakoze." 
Revelation2:24 Naho rero abasigaye bo mu muryango w'Imana w'i Tiyatira mwirinze gukurikiza izo nyigisho mbi, nta n'ubwo muzi ibyo bita “Amabanga akomeye ya Satani.” Ndabamenyesha ko nta wundi mutwaro mbakoreye," 
Revelation2:25 keretse gukomeza ibyo musanganywe kugeza aho nzazira. 
Revelation2:26 Uzatsinda wese agakomeza gukora ibyo nshaka kugeza ku iherezo, nzamuha ubushobozi bwo gutegeka amahanga" 
Revelation2:27 nk'uko nabuhawe na Data. Azayaragiza inkoni y'icyuma, ayajanjagure nk'ujanjagura ikibindi, kandi nzamuha n'inyenyeri yo mu rukerera." 
Revelation2:28  
Revelation2:29 “ ‘Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve icyo Mwuka w'Imana abwira amatorero yayo!’ 
Revelation3:1 “Andikira umumarayika ushinzwe itorero ry'Imana ry'i Saridi uti: ‘Ufite ibinyamwuka birindwi biva ku Mana, kandi akaba afite na za nyenyeri ndwi aravuze ngo: Nzi ibyo ukora. Witwa ko uriho nyamara wapfuye uhagaze." 
Revelation3:2 Kanguka ukomeze ibyo usigaranye na byo byenda gupfa. Ni koko nasanze ibikorwa byawe imbere y'Imana bituzuye. 
Revelation3:3 Nuko rero ibuka ibyo wigishijwe ukabyumva maze ubyitondere, wihane. Naho nutaba maso nzaza ngutunguye nk'umujura, ntabwo uzamenya igihe nzakugereraho." 
Revelation3:4 Icyakora i Saridi ufite bamwe batanduje imyambaro yabo. Bazagendana nanjye bambaye imyambaro yera, koko barabikwiriye." 
Revelation3:5 Utsinda wese azambikwa imyambaro yera, kandi sinzigera mpanagura izina rye mu gitabo cy'ubugingo. Nzemera ko ari uwanjye imbere ya Data n'imbere y'abamarayika be." 
Revelation3:6 “ ‘Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve icyo Mwuka w'Imana abwira amatorero yayo!’ 
Revelation3:7 “Andikira umumarayika ushinzwe itorero ry'Imana ry'i Filadelifiya uti: ‘Uwitwa Umuziranenge n'Umunyakuri wasigaranye urufunguzo rw'Umwami Dawidi, wa wundi ufunga ntihagire ufungura, kandi yafungura ntihagire ufunga aravuze ngo:" 
Revelation3:8 Nzi ibyo ukora. Nubwo ufite intege nke nzi ko wakurikije ibyo nigishije, kandi ko utigeze unyihakana. Nuko rero ngukinguriye irembo ngo ngutume, nta muntu n'umwe ubasha kugukoma imbere." 
Revelation3:9 Bamwe bo mu ikoraniro ry'abasenga Satani babeshya ko ari Abayahudi kandi atari bo, dore ngiye kubakuzanira, bakwikubite imbere, bamenye ko ngukunda." 
Revelation3:10 Ubwo wakurikije ibyo nigishije ukanāmbaho, nanjye nzakurinda mu bihe by'amakuba agiye kuzakwira isi yose ngo agerageze abayituye." 
Revelation3:11 Ngiye kuza bidatinze, komeza ibyo ufite rero kugira ngo hatagira ugutwara ikamba wagenewe." 
Revelation3:12 Utsinda wese nzamugira inkingi mu Ngoro y'Imana yanjye, ntazigera asohokamo ukundi. Nzandika kuri we izina ry'Imana yanjye n'iry'umurwa wayo ari wo Yeruzalemu nshya, igiye kumanuka iturutse mu ijuru ku Mana yanjye. Byongeye kandi nzandika kuri we izina ryanjye rishya." 
Revelation3:13 “ ‘Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve icyo Mwuka w'Imana abwira amatorero yayo!’ 
Revelation3:14 “Andikira umumarayika ushinzwe itorero ry'Imana ry'i Lawodiseya, uti: ‘Uwitwa Amina, umuhamya w'indahemuka kandi w'umunyakuri, ari na we shingiro ry'ibyo Imana yaremye aravuze ngo:" 
Revelation3:15 Nzi ibyo ukora. Ntukonje kandi ntushyushye. Ubonye iyaba wari ukonje cyangwa ngo ube ushyushye! 
Revelation3:16 None rero ubwo uri akazuyazi ukaba udakonje ntunashyuhe, ngiye kukuruka!" 
Revelation3:17 Uravuga uti: “Ndi umukire ndakungahaye, nta cyo nkennye na busa.” Nyamara ntuzi ukuntu uri umutindi wo kubabarirwa, ntugira shinge na rugero, uri impumyi kandi wambaye ubusa." 
Revelation3:18 Ni cyo gituma nkugīra inama yo kunguraho izahabu yatunganyijwe n'umuriro, maze ubone kuba umukungu ungureho n'imyambaro yera, kugira ngo uhishe ubwambure bwawe buteye isoni, kandi ungureho n'umuti wo gusīga ku maso, kugira ngo uhumuke urebe." 
Revelation3:19 Abo nkunda bose ndabacyaha nkabacishaho umunyafu. Nuko rero gira umwete wihane. 
Revelation3:20 Dore mpagaze ku rugi ndakomanga, unyumva wese agakingura nzinjira iwe nsangire na we, na we kandi asangire nanjye." 
Revelation3:21 Utsinda nzamuha kwicarana nanjye ku ntebe yanjye ya cyami, nk'uko nanjye natsinze nkicarana na Data ku ntebe ye ya cyami." 
Revelation3:22 “ ‘Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve icyo Mwuka w'Imana abwira amatorero yayo!’ ” 
Revelation4:1 Hanyuma ngira ntya mbona mu ijuru urugi rukinguye. Uwo nari numvise bwa mbere ijwi rye ryarangiraga nk'iry'impanda, arambwira ati: “Zamuka uze hano nkwereke ibigiye gukurikiraho.”" 
Revelation4:2 Ako kanya Mwuka w'Imana anzaho, maze ndabonekerwa, mbona intebe ya cyami y'Imana mu ijuru, mbona n'Uyicayeho" 
Revelation4:3 arabagirana nk'amabuye y'agaciro yitwa yasipi na sarudiyo. Iyo ntebe ya cyami kandi yari izengurutswe n'umukororombya warabagiranaga nk'ibuye rya emerodi. 
Revelation4:4 Yari izengurutswe kandi n'izindi ntebe za cyami makumyabiri n'enye, zicaweho n'abakuru makumyabiri na bane bambaye imyenda yera, kandi batamirije amakamba y'izahabu." 
Revelation4:5 Kuri iyo ntebe ya cyami haturukaga imirabyo n'amajwi no guhinda kw'inkuba. Imbere y'iyo ntebe hari hateretswe amatara arindwi yaka umuriro, ari yo binyamwuka by'Imana." 
Revelation4:6 Imbere y'iyo ntebe hari igisa n'ikiyaga kigizwe n'ikirahuri, kibonerana nk'ibuye ry'isarabwayi. Imbere y'iyo ntebe n'ahayizengurutse hakaba ibyitwa ibinyabuzima bine, byuzuyeho amaso imbere n'inyuma." 
Revelation4:7 Ikinyabuzima cya mbere cyasaga n'intare, icya kabiri kigasa n'ikimasa, icya gatatu mu maso kigasa n'umuntu, naho icya kane kigasa na kagoma iguruka." 
Revelation4:8 Buri kinyabuzima cyari gifite amababa atandatu, kandi byose byari byuzuyeho amaso ku nda n'inyuma hose. Ijoro n'amanywa ntibituza kuririmba biti: “Umuziranenge, Umuziranenge, Umuziranenge, ni Nyagasani Imana Ishoborabyose. Ni yo yahozeho kandi iriho, kandi igiye kuza.”" 
Revelation4:9 Ibyo binyabuzima bine ni ko bihora biririmba biha ikuzo Imana ihoraho iteka ryose, yicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami, bikayubaha bikanayishimira. Uko bigize bityo kandi" 
Revelation4:10 ba bakuru makumyabiri na bane na bo bikubita imbere y'Iyicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami, bakaramya Ihoraho iteka ryose. Ubwo kandi bakaba banaze amakamba yabo imbere y'iyo ntebe, bakavuga bati:" 
Revelation4:11 “Nyagasani Mana yacu, ni wowe ukwiye guhabwa ikuzo n'icyubahiro n'ububasha, koko ni wowe waremye ibintu byose. Byaremwe ku bushake bwawe, ni wowe ubibeshaho.”" 
Revelation5:1 Nuko mbona umuzingo w'igitabo mu kiganza cy'iburyo cy'Iyicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami. Wari wanditswe imbere n'inyuma, kandi ufungishijwe ibimenyetso birindwi." 
Revelation5:2 Mbona n'umumarayika w'igihangange, warangururaga ijwi abaza ati: “Ni nde ukwiriye gufungura uyu muzingo w'igitabo, akavanaho ibimenyetso biwufunze?”" 
Revelation5:3 Nuko mu ijuru no ku isi ndetse n'ikuzimu, ntihagira n'umwe ubasha gufungura uwo muzingo w'igitabo ngo awurebemo." 
Revelation5:4 Ndizwa cyane n'uko hatabonetse n'umwe ukwiriye gufungura uwo muzingo w'igitabo ngo awurebemo. 
Revelation5:5 Umwe muri ba bakuru arambwira ati: “Wirira! Dore aratsinze ya ntare yo mu muryango wa Yuda, ari na we gishyitsi cya Dawidi. Ni we ugiye gufungura uwo muzingo w'igitabo, akavanaho ibimenyetso birindwi biwufunze.”" 
Revelation5:6 Nuko mbona Umwana w'intama ari kuri ya ntebe ya cyami rwagati, azengurutswe na bya binyabuzima bine hamwe na ba bakuru. Yasaga n'uwishwe. Yari afite amahembe arindwi n'amaso arindwi, ari byo bya binyamwuka by'Imana byatumwe na yo ku isi yose." 
Revelation5:7 Nuko Umwana w'intama araza, yakira uwo muzingo w'igitabo mu kuboko kw'iburyo kw'Iyicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami." 
Revelation5:8 Amaze kuwakira, bya binyabugingo bine na ba bakuru makumyabiri na bane bikubita imbere y'Umwana w'intama. Buri wese yari afite inanga n'inzabya za zahabu zuzuye imibavu, ari yo masengesho y'intore z'Imana." 
Revelation5:9 Baririmbaga indirimbo nshya bati: “Ni wowe ukwiriye kwakira uwo muzingo w'igitabo, ukwiriye no kuvanaho ibimenyetso biwufunze. Koko warishwe, amaraso yawe uyacunguza abantu, wabagaruriye Imana, wabavanye mu miryango yose no mu bavuga indimi izo ari zo zose, wabavanye mu moko yose no mu mahanga yose." 
Revelation5:10 Wabagize abantu b'ubwami bw'Imana, wabagize n'abatambyi ngo bakorere Imana yacu, bityo bazima ingoma bategeke isi.”" 
Revelation5:11 Ndongera ndareba numva ijwi ry'abamarayika, bari benshi cyane, ibihumbi n'ibihumbi. Bari bazengurutse ya ntebe ya cyami na bya binyabuzima na ba bakuru." 
Revelation5:12 Bavuga cyane bati: “Umwana w'intama wishwe ni we ukwiriye guharirwa ububasha n'ubukungu, n'ubwenge n'imbaraga, n'icyubahiro n'ikuzo no gusingizwa.”" 
Revelation5:13 Nuko numva ibyaremwe byose biri mu ijuru no ku isi n'ikuzimu no mu nyanja, mbese iby'aho byose uko bingana bigira biti: “Iyicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami hamwe n'Umwana w'intama, nibahorane ibisingizo n'icyubahiro, ikuzo n'ububasha iteka ryose.”" 
Revelation5:14 Bya binyabuzima bine bikikiriza biti: “Amina.” Na ba bakuru bakikubita hasi bakaramya. 
Revelation6:1 Hanyuma, mbona Umwana w'intama avanyeho kimwe muri bya bimenyetso bifunze wa muzingo w'igitabo, maze numva icya mbere muri bya binyabuzima bine kivuga cyane nk'inkuba ihinda, kigira kiti: “Ngwino!”" 
Revelation6:2 Nuko ngira ntya mbona ifarasi y'igitare. Uwo ihetse yari afite umuheto maze ahabwa n'ikamba. Nuko agenda atsinda kandi agamije gutsinda. 
Revelation6:3 Umwana w'intama avanaho ikimenyetso cya kabiri. Nuko numva ikinyabuzima cya kabiri kigira kiti: “Ngwino!” 
Revelation6:4 Nuko indi farasi y'igaju iraza. Uwo ihetse atumwa guteza intambara ku isi, kugira ngo abantu basubiranemo bicane, ahabwa inkota nini." 
Revelation6:5 Umwana w'intama avanaho ikimenyetso cya gatatu. Nuko numva ikinyabuzima cya gatatu kigira kiti: “Ngwino!” Ngo ngire ntya mbona ifarasi y'umukara. Uwo ihetse yari afite umunzani mu ntoki. 
Revelation6:6 Maze numva ikimeze nk'ijwi ry'umuntu uvugiye hagati muri bya binyabuzima bine, agira ati: “Ikiro cy'ingano kigurwe igihembo cy'umubyizi, ibiro bitatu by'ingano zitwa bushoki na byo bigurwe igihembo cy'umubyizi, naho amavuta na divayi ntugire icyo ubikoraho.”" 
Revelation6:7 Umwana w'intama avanaho ikimenyetso cya kane, maze numva ikinyabuzima cya kane kigira kiti: “Ngwino!”" 
Revelation6:8 Ngo ngire ntya mbona ifarasi y'ikijuju. Uwo ihetse akitwa Rupfu kandi yari akurikiwe n'uwitwa Kuzimu. Bahabwa ubushobozi kuri kimwe cya kane cy'abatuye isi, kugira ngo babicishe inkota n'inzara n'indwara z'ibyorezo, n'inyamaswa z'inkazi." 
Revelation6:9 Umwana w'intama avanaho ikimenyetso cya gatanu. Nuko mbona munsi y'urutambiro abantu bapfuye, bishwe bahōrwa kwamamaza Ijambo ry'Imana no guhamya ibyayo." 
Revelation6:10 Bavugaga cyane baranguruye ijwi, bati: “Databuja, wowe Muziranenge, wowe Munyakuri, uzageza ryari ko watinze gucira urubanza abatuye isi, no guhōrera amaraso yacu bamennye?”" 
Revelation6:11 Nuko buri wese ahabwa ikanzu yera, kandi barabwirwa ngo bagende baruhuke ikindi gihe gito, kugeza ubwo umubare w'abagaragu bagenzi babo n'abavandimwe babo uzaba ushyitse, ari bo bagombaga kuzicwa kimwe na bo." 
Revelation6:12 Mbona Umwana w'intama avanaho ikimenyetso cya gatandatu. Habaho umutingito w'isi ukaze, izuba rihinduka umukara nk'umwambaro ugaragaza akababaro, n'ukwezi guhinduka umutuku nk'amaraso." 
Revelation6:13 Inyenyeri zihanuka ku ijuru, zigwa ku isi, nk'uko imbuto z'umutini zihanantuka zikiri mbisi, iyo zihuye n'umuyaga ukaze." 
Revelation6:14 Ijuru rikurwaho nk'uko bazinga umuzingo w'igitabo, n'imisozi yose n'ibirwa byose bikurwa aho byari biri." 
Revelation6:15 Abami batwara iyi si n'ibikomerezwa byayo, abagaba b'ingabo n'abakungu n'abanyambaraga, abakoreshwa agahato kimwe n'abigenga, bose biroha mu buvumo no mu bitare byo ku misozi ngo bihishe." 
Revelation6:16 Babwiraga imisozi n'ibitare bati: “Nimutugweho muduhishe amaso y'Iyicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami, muduhishe n'uburakari bw'Umwana w'intama." 
Revelation6:17 Uyu ni wo munsi ukaze w'uburakari bwabo. Ni nde uzawurokoka?” 
Revelation7:1 Hanyuma mbona abamarayika bane bahagaze mu mpande enye z'isi. Bari bafashe imiyaga ine ihaturuka, kugira ngo hatagira n'umwe muri yo uhuha ku isi cyangwa ku nyanja, cyangwa ku giti icyo ari cyo cyose." 
Revelation7:2 Mbona n'undi mumarayika uturutse iburasirazuba, afite ikashe yahawe n'Imana nzima. Nuko arangurura ijwi cyane, abwira ba bamarayika bane bari batumwe kwangiza isi n'inyanja ati:" 
Revelation7:3 “Ntimwangize isi cyangwa inyanja cyangwa ibiti, kugeza ubwo tuzaba tumaze gutera icyapa mu ruhanga rwa buri mugaragu w'Imana yacu.”" 
Revelation7:4 Numva ko umubare w'abashyizweho icyo kimenyetso ari ibihumbi ijana na mirongo ine na bine bo mu miryango yose ikomoka kuri Isiraheli. 
Revelation7:5 Mu muryango wa Yuda, abashyizweho ikimenyetso ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri. Mu muryango wa Rubeni, abagishyizweho ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri. Mu muryango wa Gadi, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
Revelation7:6 Mu muryango wa Ashēri, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri. Mu muryango wa Nefutali, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri. Mu muryango wa Manase, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
Revelation7:7 Mu muryango wa Simeyoni, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri. Mu muryango wa Levi, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri. Mu muryango wa Isakari, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
Revelation7:8 Mu muryango wa Zabuloni, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri. Mu muryango wa Yozefu, ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, no mu muryango wa Benyamini, abagishyizweho ni ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
Revelation7:9 Hanyuma ngira ntya mbona imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu batabarika. Bari bakomotse mu mahanga yose no mu miryango yose, mu moko yose no mu bavuga indimi izo ari zo zose. Bari bahagaze imbere y'intebe ya cyami y'Imana n'imbere y'Umwana w'intama, bambaye amakanzu yera kandi bafashe amashami y'imikindo mu ntoki." 
Revelation7:10 Nuko barangurura ijwi cyane bati: “Agakiza kava ku Mana yacu yicaye ku ntebe ya cyami, kava no ku Mwana w'intama.”" 
Revelation7:11 Ubwo abamarayika bose bari bahagaze, bazengurutse ya ntebe na ba bakuru na bya binyabuzima bine. Ni ko kwikubita hasi imbere y'iyo ntebe ya cyami, baramya Imana" 
Revelation7:12 bavuga bati: “Amina! Ugusingizwa n'ikuzo, ubwenge n'ugushimirwa, icyubahiro n'ububasha n'imbaraga, ni iby'Imana yacu iteka ryose! Amina.”" 
Revelation7:13 Nuko umwe muri ba bakuru arambaza ati: “Mbese bariya bambaye amakanzu yera ni ba nde kandi baturutse he?” 
Revelation7:14 Ndamusubiza nti: “Mubyeyi, ni wowe ubizi.” Arambwira ati: “Bariya ni abaciye mu makuba akabije. Bameshe amakanzu yabo bayeza mu maraso y'Umwana w'intama." 
Revelation7:15 Ni yo mpamvu bari imbere y'intebe ya cyami y'Imana, bayikorera ijoro n'amanywa mu Ngoro yayo. Iyicaye kuri iyo ntebe izabacira ingando, ibatwikīre kandi ibarinde." 
Revelation7:16 Ntibazongera kugira inzara cyangwa inyota, cyangwa ngo bicwe n'izuba cyangwa icyokere cyose." 
Revelation7:17 Umwana w'intama uri ku ntebe ya cyami rwagati, azababera umushumba abashore ku masōko y'amazi y'ubugingo, kandi Imana izahanagura amarira yose ku maso yabo.”" 
Revelation8:1 Igihe Umwana w'intama avanyeho ikimenyetso cya karindwi cyari gifunze wa muzingo w'igitabo, numva mu ijuru ngo cee! Bimara nk'igice cy'isaha." 
Revelation8:2 Nuko mbona abamarayika barindwi bahagaze imbere y'Imana, bahabwa impanda ndwi." 
Revelation8:3 Undi mumarayika araza ahagarara iruhande rw'igicaniro, afashe icyotezo cyacuzwe mu izahabu. Ahabwa imibavu myinshi yo kosereza ku gicaniro cy'izahabu kiri imbere y'intebe ya cyami, hamwe n'amasengesho y'intore zose z'Imana." 
Revelation8:4 Umwotsi w'imibavu uva mu ntoki z'uwo mumarayika, uzamukira imbere y'Imana hamwe n'amasengesho y'intore." 
Revelation8:5 Hanyuma umumarayika afata icyotezo, acyuzuzamo umuriro wo ku gicaniro awuroha ku isi. Nuko inkuba zirahinda, habaho urusaku, imirabyo irarabya, n'isi iratingita." 
Revelation8:6 Nuko ba bamarayika barindwi bari bafite impanda bitegura kuzivuza. 
Revelation8:7 Umumarayika wa mbere avuza impanda, urubura n'umuriro bivanze n'amaraso bihita byiroha ku isi. Kimwe cya gatatu cy'isi yose kirashya, na kimwe cya gatatu cy'ibiti kirashya, ibyatsi byose na byo birashya." 
Revelation8:8 Umumarayika wa kabiri avuza impanda, igisa n'umusozi munini ugurumana gihita cyiroha mu nyanja. Kimwe cya gatatu cy'inyanja gihinduka amaraso." 
Revelation8:9 Kimwe cya gatatu cy'ibifite ubuzima byo mu nyanja kirapfa, na kimwe cya gatatu cy'amato kirasenyuka." 
Revelation8:10 Umumarayika wa gatatu avuza impanda, inyenyeri nini igurumana ihubuka ku ijuru igwira kimwe cya gatatu cy'inzuzi, igwira n'amasōko y'imigezi." 
Revelation8:11 Iyo nyenyeri yitwa Muravumba. Bityo kimwe cya gatatu cy'amazi kirarura, abantu benshi bicwa no kunywa ayo mazi yahindutse ibamba." 
Revelation8:12 Umumarayika wa kane avuza impanda, kimwe cya gatatu cy'izuba na kimwe cya gatatu cy'ukwezi na kimwe cya gatatu cy'inyenyeri birakabona, ku buryo kimwe cya gatatu cy'amanywa na kimwe cya gatatu cy'ijoro byacuze umwijima." 
Revelation8:13 Ngiye kumva numva kagoma imwe yagurukaga iriya kure mu kirere, iravuga cyane iti: “Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano abatuye isi bose bazagusha, kubera impanda zigiye kuzavuzwa n'abamarayika batatu basigaye!”" 
Revelation9:1 Hanyuma umumarayika wa gatanu avuza impanda, mbona inyenyeri ihanutse ku ijuru igwa ku isi, ihabwa urufunguzo rufungura ikuzimu." 
Revelation9:2 Imaze kuhafungura havamo umwotsi umeze nk'uw'itanura rinini cyane. Izuba n'ikirere bizimagizwa n'uwo mwotsi uva ikuzimu. 
Revelation9:3 Muri uwo mwotsi havamo inzige zikwira isi. Izo nzige zihabwa ubushobozi bumeze nk'ubw'igisimba bita indyanishamurizo. 
Revelation9:4 Zitegekwa kutagira icyo zitwara ibyatsi cyangwa ibiti cyangwa ikimera icyo ari cyo cyose, keretse abantu batateweho ikimenyetso cy'Imana mu ruhanga." 
Revelation9:5 Izo nzige ntizemererwa kubica burundu, keretse kubica urubozo mu gihe cy'amezi atanu. Uburibwe zabateraga ni nk'ubwo umuntu yumva iyo ariwe n'indyanishamurizo." 
Revelation9:6 Muri iyo minsi abantu bazahamagara urupfu barubure. Bazifuza gupfa ariko urupfu ruzabahunga. 
Revelation9:7 Izo nzige zasaga n'amafarasi yiteguye kujya ku rugamba. Ku mitwe yazo wagira ngo zari zambaye amakamba y'izahabu, naho mu maso zari ziteye nk'abantu." 
Revelation9:8 Zari zifite ubwoya bumeze nk'imisatsi y'abagore itendera mu mugongo, naho amenyo yazo yari nk'ay'intare." 
Revelation9:9 Wagira ngo zambaye amakoti ya gisirikari akozwe mu cyuma, kandi urusaku rw'amababa yazo rwari nk'urw'amagare menshi akururwa n'amafarasi agiye ku rugamba." 
Revelation9:10 Zari zifite imirizo irimo urubori, isa n'iy'indyanishamurizo. Muri iyo mirizo ni ho zakuraga ubushobozi bwo kugirira abantu nabi mu gihe cy'amezi atanu." 
Revelation9:11 Umwami w'izo nzige ni umumarayika ugenga ikuzimu, akitwa Murimbuzi – mu giheburayi ni Abadoni, naho mu kigereki ni Apoliyoni." 
Revelation9:12 Dore icyago cya mbere kirahise, kigiye gukurikirwa n'ibindi bibiri." 
Revelation9:13 Umumarayika wa gatandatu aherako avuza impanda, maze numva ijwi riturutse hagati y'amahembe ari mu mfuruka enye z'igicaniro cy'izahabu kiri imbere y'Imana." 
Revelation9:14 Uwavugaga abwira uwo mumarayika wa gatandatu ufashe impanda ati: “Bohora ba bamarayika bane baboheye hafi y'uruzi rwitwa Efurati.” 
Revelation9:15 Nuko barababohora. Byari bigenwe ko abo bamarayika babohorwa kuri iyo saha y'uwo munsi, muri uko kwezi k'uwo mwaka, kugira ngo bice kimwe cya gatatu cy'abatuye isi bose." 
Revelation9:16 Mbona n'abasirikari bahetswe n'amafarasi, numva bavuga umubare wabo ko ari miliyoni magana abiri." 
Revelation9:17 Dore uko neretswe ayo mafarasi n'abahetswe na yo: bari bambaye amakoti ya gisirikari akozwe mu cyuma. Ayo makoti yari umutuku nk'uw'ikara ryaka n'ubururu nka safiro, n'umuhondo nk'amazuku. Imitwe y'amafarasi yasaga n'iy'intare, kandi mu minwa yayo havagamo umuriro n'umwotsi n'amazuku." 
Revelation9:18 Kimwe cya gatatu cy'abantu cyicwa n'ibyo byorezo bitatu: umuriro n'umwotsi n'ubumara bw'umuhondo byavaga mu minwa ya ya mafarasi. 
Revelation9:19 Ubushobozi bw'ayo mafarasi bwaturukaga mu minwa yayo no mu mirizo yayo. Imirizo yayo yasaga n'inzoka, yari ifite imitwe yakoreshaga kugira ngo igirire abantu nabi." 
Revelation9:20 Nyamara abantu bose basigaye batishwe n'ibyo byorezo, ntibīhana ngo bareke ibigirwamana bari barakoze ubwabo. Ntibareka kuramya ingabo za Satani n'ibigirwamana bikozwe mu izahabu no mu ifeza, no mu muringa no mu ibuye no mu giti, kandi bitabona ntibyumve ntibigende," 
Revelation9:21 habe ngo banihane ibyaha byabo byo kwica no kuroga, no gusambana no kwiba." 
Revelation10:1 Nuko mbona undi mumarayika ukomeye amanuka ava mu ijuru. Yari yambaye igicu ho umwenda, kandi umutwe we uzengurutswe n'umukororombya. Mu maso he harabagiranaga nk'izuba, naho amaguru ye yasaga n'inkingi zaka umuriro." 
Revelation10:2 Mu kiganza cye yari afashe agatabo kabumbuye. Ashinga ikirenge cy'iburyo ku nyanja, naho icy'ibumoso agishinga imusozi." 
Revelation10:3 Aherako arangurura ijwi cyane avuga nk'intare yomongana. Amaze kurangurura ijwi, inkuba ndwi na zo zirahinda cyane." 
Revelation10:4 Izo nkuba ndwi ngo zimare kuvuga nitegura kwandika ibyo zivuze. Nuko numva ijwi riturutse mu ijuru ry'uvuga ati: “Uramenye, ibyo izo nkuba ndwi zivuze ubigire ibanga ntubyandike!”" 
Revelation10:5 Wa mumarayika nabonye ahagaze ku nyanja n'imusozi, ashyira ejuru ukuboko kw'iburyo akwerekeza ku ijuru." 
Revelation10:6 Ni ko kurahira Ihoraho iteka ryose yaremye ijuru n'ibiririmo byose, n'isi n'ibiyiriho byose, n'inyanja n'ibiyirimo byose ati: “Nta kundi gutegereza!" 
Revelation10:7 Igihe umumarayika wa karindwi azaba agiye kuvuza impanda, Imana izahita isohoza umugambi wayo ubu ukiri ibanga, nk'uko yawumenyesheje abagaragu bayo b'abahanuzi.”" 
Revelation10:8 Nuko nongera kumva rya jwi nigeze kumva ry'uvugira mu ijuru, arambwira ati: “Genda ufate ka gatabo kabumbuye, kari mu kiganza cy'umumarayika uhagaze ku nyanja n'imusozi.”" 
Revelation10:9 Nuko ndagenda nsanga uwo mumarayika musaba kumpa ako gatabo. Arambwira ati: “Ngako gatware ukarye ukamare, nikagera mu gifu karagusharirira, naho mu kanwa karaba kakuryoheye nk'ubuki.”" 
Revelation10:10 Nuko mfata ako gatabo ngakura mu kiganza cy'umumarayika, ndakarya ndakamara. Mu kanwa kandyohera nk'ubuki, ariko kageze mu gifu karandurira." 
Revelation10:11 Nuko numva bambwira ngo: “Ugomba kongera gutangaza ibyo Imana ikweretse byerekeye abantu b'amoko menshi n'amahanga menshi, n'abavuga indimi zitari zimwe n'abami benshi.”" 
Revelation11:1 Nyuma mpabwa ikibingo cyo gupimisha, barambwira ngo: “Haguruka ufate ingero z'Ingoro y'Imana n'iz'urutambiro rwayo, kandi ubarure n'abayisengeramo." 
Revelation11:2 Icyakora ntufate ingero z'ikigo kizengurutse Ingoro, kuko cyo cyagizwe icy'abanyamahanga. Bazaribata umurwa w'Imana hashire amezi mirongo ine n'abiri." 
Revelation11:3 Nzatuma abahamya babiri bo guhamya ibyanjye, maze bagende bambaye imyambaro igaragaza akababaro bahanure bavuge ibyo mbatumye, hashire iminsi igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo itandatu.”" 
Revelation11:4 Abo bahamya bombi ni bo bya biti by'iminzenze bibiri, ni na bo ya matara abiri ateretswe imbere ya Nyagasani ugenga isi." 
Revelation11:5 Iyo hagize ushaka kubagirira nabi, umuriro uva mu kanwa kabo ugatwika abanzi babo. Uko ni ko ushaka kubagirira nabi agomba kwicwa." 
Revelation11:6 Bafite ubushobozi bwo gutegeka ijuru imvura ntigwe, kugeza igihe bazarangiriza guhanura. Bafite n'ubushobozi bwo guhindura amazi amaraso, no guteza isi ibyorezo by'ubwoko bwose igihe cyose babishakiye." 
Revelation11:7 Nibarangiza guhamya ibyo batumwe igikōko kizava ikuzimu kibatere, kibatsinde maze kibice." 
Revelation11:8 Nuko imirambo yabo izanama mu muhanda mukuru wa wa mujyi mugari, ha handi Umwami wabo yabambwe ku musaraba. Ku buryo bwo kugereranya, uwo mujyi witwa Sodoma na Misiri." 
Revelation11:9 Abo mu moko yose n'imiryango yose n'abavuga indimi izo ari zo zose, n'abo mu mahanga yose bazashungera iyo mirambo be kwemera ko ihambwa, hashire iminsi itatu n'igice." 
Revelation11:10 Abo bahanuzi bombi abatuye isi yose bazabishima hejuru banezezwe n'uko bapfuye, maze bohererezanye impano zo kwishima kuko abo bombi bari bababaje cyane abatuye isi." 
Revelation11:11 Nyamara iminsi itatu n'igice ishize umwuka w'ubugingo uturutse ku Mana winjira muri bo, maze barahaguruka bahagarara bemye, abababonye bashya ubwoba." 
Revelation11:12 Abo bahanuzi bumva ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru avuga cyane ati: “Nimuzamuke muze hano!” Baherako bazamukira mu gicu, bajya mu ijuru abanzi babo babareba." 
Revelation11:13 Muri ako kanya haba umutingito w'isi ukaze maze kimwe cya cumi cy'umujyi kirasenyuka, abantu ibihumbi birindwi bahitanwa na wo. Abasigaye utahitanye bashya ubwoba, maze baha Imana nyir'ijuru ikuzo." 
Revelation11:14 Dore icyago cya kabiri kirahise. Nyamara, icya gatatu kigiye kuza bidatinze." 
Revelation11:15 Hanyuma umumarayika wa karindwi avuza impanda. Mu ijuru humvikana amajwi y'abavuga cyane bati: “Ukwiriye kwima ingoma ngo ategeke iyi si ni Nyagasani Imana yacu hamwe na Kristo yatoranyije, kandi izayigenga iteka ryose.”" 
Revelation11:16 Nuko ba bakuru makumyabiri na bane bicaye imbere y'Imana ku ntebe zabo za cyami, bikubita hasi baramya Imana" 
Revelation11:17 bavuga bati: “Nyagasani Mana Ishoborabyose, wowe uriho kandi wahozeho, tugushimiye ko wakoresheje ububasha bukomeye ufite ukima ingoma." 
Revelation11:18 Abanyamahanga bararakaye, ariko none igihe kirageze ngo uburakari bwawe bugaragare. Ni igihe cyo gucira abapfuye imanza, no kugororera abagaragu bawe b'abahanuzi n'intore zawe zose zigutinya, ari aboroheje ari n'abakomeye. Ni igihe cyo gutsembaho abatsemba isi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Mu ijuru Ingoro y'Imana iherako irakinguka, Isanduku y'Isezerano iyirimo iraboneka. Imirabyo irarabya, amajwi ararangīra, inkuba zirahinda, isi iratigita hagwa n'urubura rukaze." 
Revelation12:1 Hanyuma mu ijuru haboneka ikimenyetso gikomeye. Yari umugore wambaye izuba, ushinze ibirenge ku kwezi, kandi mu mutwe akaba yambaye ikamba rigizwe n'inyenyeri cumi n'ebyiri." 
Revelation12:2 Yari ku nda atakishwa n'ibise byamuryaga. 
Revelation12:3 Hanyuma ikindi kimenyetso kiboneka mu ijuru. Cyari ikiyoka cya kabutindi cy'urutuku gifite imitwe irindwi n'amahembe icumi, kandi kuri buri mutwe cyari cyambaye ikamba." 
Revelation12:4 Nuko gikoresha umurizo wacyo nk'umukubuzo, gihanantura ku ijuru kimwe cya gatatu cy'inyenyeri kizijugunya ku isi. Icyo kiyoka gihagarara imbere y'uwo mugore wari ugiye kubyara, cyiteguye kumira bunguri umwana akiva mu nda." 
Revelation12:5 Uwo mugore abyara umwana w'umuhungu ugomba kuzayobora amahanga yose, ayaragije inkoni y'icyuma. Nuko uwo mwana ahita arahwa ajyanwa ku Mana yicaye ku ntebe yayo ya cyami." 
Revelation12:6 Uwo mugore ahungira mu butayu ahantu Imana yagennye ko azagaburirwa, hagashira iminsi igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo itandatu." 
Revelation12:7 Mu ijuru intambara irarota, Mikayeli n'ingabo z'abamarayika ayobora barwanya cya kiyoka, maze na cyo kirabarwanya gifashijwe n'abamarayika babaye ingabo zacyo." 
Revelation12:8 Ikiyoka kiratsindwa nticyaba kicyemerewe kuguma mu ijuru, kimwe n'ingabo zacyo." 
Revelation12:9 Nuko icyo kiyoka cya kabutindi kimeneshwa mu ijuru, ni cyo ya nzoka ya kera yitwa Umwanzi na Satani iyobya abatuye isi bose, maze kirohwa ku isi kimwe n'abamarayika bacyo." 
Revelation12:10 Numva ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru avuga cyane ati: “Ubu agakiza k'Imana yacu karasohoye! Ubu yerekanye ububasha bwayo ngo yime ingoma! Noneho Kristo Imana yatoranyije yagaragaje ubushobozi bwe, kuko uwaregaga abavandimwe bacu ku Mana yacu ijoro n'amanywa yameneshejwe mu ijuru!" 
Revelation12:11 Uwaregaga abavandimwe bacu baramutsinze babikesha amaraso y'Umwana w'intama n'ijambo ry'ukuri bahamyaga, ku buryo bemeye guhara amagara yabo ntibatinya no gupfa." 
Revelation12:12 Nuko rero wa juru we n'abagutuyemo, nimwishime! Naho wa si we nawe wa nyanja we, mugushije ishyano! Dore Satani arabamanukiye aje arakaye cyane, kuko azi ko igihe cye gisigaye ari gito.”" 
Revelation12:13 Cya kiyoka kibonye ko kiroshywe ku isi, gitangira guhiga wa mugore wabyaye umwana w'umuhungu." 
Revelation12:14 Umugore ahabwa amababa abiri nk'aya kagoma nini kugira ngo aguruke, ajye ha hantu yateganyirijwe mu butayu ahungireyo ya nzoka, hashire imyaka itatu n'igice ahagaburirirwa." 
Revelation12:15 Iyo nzoka ivundereza amazi ameze nk'uruzi, irukurikiza wa mugore kugira ngo rumutembane." 
Revelation12:16 Nuko isi igoboka umugore, irāsama imira urwo ruzi ruvuye mu kanwa ka cya kiyoka." 
Revelation12:17 Ikiyoka kirakarira uwo mugore maze kijya kurwanya itsinda ry'abasigaye bamukomokaho, abo ni bo bakurikiza amategeko y'Imana kandi bagakomera ku by'ukuri Yezu yahamije." 
Revelation12:18 Nuko icyo kiyoka gisigara gihagaze ku musenyi wo ku nyanja. 
Revelation13:1 Nyuma mbona igikōko giturumbutse mu nyanja. Cyari gifite imitwe irindwi n'amahembe icumi. Buri hembe ryari ritamirijeho ikamba, naho kuri buri mutwe handitswe izina rituka Imana." 
Revelation13:2 Icyo gikōko nabonye cyasaga n'ingwe. Amajanja yacyo yasaga n'ay'ikirūra, naho umunwa wacyo ugasa n'uw'intare. Cya kiyoka giha icyo gikōko ububasha bwacyo n'intebe yacyo ya cyami, n'ubushobozi bwacyo bukomeye." 
Revelation13:3 Mbona umwe muri ya mitwe yacyo usa n'uwari warakomeretse uruguma rwica, ariko urwo ruguma rwari rwarakize. Abatuye isi bose baratangara bakurikira icyo gikōko." 
Revelation13:4 Nuko bose baramya icyo kiyoka kubera ko cyari cyahaye igikōko ubushobozi. Baramya n'icyo gikōko ubwacyo bavuga bati: “Mbese ni nde uhwanye n'iki gikōko? Ni nde wagihangara akakirwanya?” 
Revelation13:5 Icyo gikōko cyemererwa kuvuga amagambo y'ubwirasi atuka Imana, no gukoresha ubushobozi bwacyo hagashira amezi mirongo ine n'abiri." 
Revelation13:6 Nuko gitangira gutuka Imana, gituka n'izina ryayo n'aho ituye hamwe n'abatuye ijuru bose." 
Revelation13:7 Icyo gikōko cyemererwa kurwanya intore z'Imana no kuzitsinda, gihabwa ubushobozi bwo kwigarurira imiryango yose n'amoko yose, abavuga indimi izo ari zo zose n'amahanga yose." 
Revelation13:8 Abatuye isi yose bazakiramya, ni ukuvuga abatanditswe kuva isi ikiremwa mu gitabo cy'ubugingo cy'Umwana w'intama wishwe." 
Revelation13:9 “Ufite amatwi yumva ngaho niyumve! 
Revelation13:10 Ugenewe kuba imfungwa nta kabuza azafungwa, naho ugenewe kwicishwa inkota nta kabuza azicishwa inkota. Ni ngombwa rero ko intore z'Imana zigumya kwihangana zikaba n'indahemuka.”" 
Revelation13:11 Nuko mbona ikindi gikōko giturumbutse ikuzimu. Cyari gifite amahembe abiri asa n'ay'umwana w'intama, nyamara kikavuga nka cya kiyoka." 
Revelation13:12 Cyakoreshaga ubushobozi bwose cyahawe na cya gikōko cya mbere, na cyo kigihagarikiye. Cyahatiraga isi n'abayituye kuramya icyo gikōko cya mbere cyakize uruguma rwica." 
Revelation13:13 Icyo gikōko cya kabiri cyakoraga ibitangaza bikomeye byo kwemeza abantu, kikamanura umuriro mu ijuru ukagwa ku isi abantu babireba." 
Revelation13:14 Bityo kiyobya abatuye isi kubera ibitangaza cyemerewe gukora, gihagarikiwe na cya gikōko cya mbere. Cyabwiraga abatuye isi ngo bareme ishusho y'icyo gikōko cyakomerekejwe n'inkota, ariko kikarenga kikabaho." 
Revelation13:15 Icyo gikōko cya kabiri gihabwa ububasha bwo guhumekera kuri iyo shusho y'icya mbere, kugira ngo kiyihe umwuka ibe nzima, ibashe kuvuga no kwicisha abantu bose batemera kuyiramya." 
Revelation13:16 Nuko aboroheje n'abakomeye, abakire n'abakene, abigenga n'abakoreshwa agahato, bose kibahatira gushyirwa ikimenyetso mu kiganza cy'iburyo no mu ruhanga," 
Revelation13:17 kugira ngo hatagira uwemererwa kugira icyo agura cyangwa agurisha adafite icyo kimenyetso, ari cyo zina ry'igikōko cyangwa umubare uranga iryo zina." 
Revelation13:18 Aha ni ho hagomba ubwenge. Umunyabwenge nafindure umubare w'icyo gikōko kuko uranga izina ry'umuntu. Uwo mubare ni magana atandatu na mirongo itandatu na gatandatu. 
Revelation14:1 Hanyuma ngira ntya mbona Umwana w'intama ahagaze ku musozi wa Siyoni.Yari kumwe n'abantu ibihumbi ijana na mirongo ine na bine, buri wese uruhanga rwe rwanditsweho izina ry'uwo Mwana w'intama n'irya Se." 
Revelation14:2 Nuko numva ijwi riturutse mu ijuru rimeze nk'amazi menshi asuma, cyangwa nk'inkuba ihinda cyane. Iryo jwi numvaga ryari rimeze kandi nk'iry'abacuranzi bacuranga inanga." 
Revelation14:3 Abo bantu bari imbere ya ya ntebe ya cyami n'imbere ya bya binyabuzima bine, n'imbere ya ba bakuru baririmba indirimbo nshya. Nta muntu wabashaga kwiga iyo ndirimbo ngo ayimenye, keretse abo ngabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongo ine na bine bacunguwe bakavanwa ku isi." 
Revelation14:4 Abo ni abatigeze biyandurisha kuryamana n'abagore, ahubwo barinze ubusore bwabo. Abo ni bo bagenda bashagaye Umwana w'intama aho agiye hose. Ni abacunguwe bavanywe mu bantu, kugira ngo babe umuganura w'Imana n'uw'Umwana w'intama." 
Revelation14:5 Nta wigeze abumvana ikinyoma na kimwe, koko ni indakemwa." 
Revelation14:6 Hanyuma mbona undi mumarayika agurukira iriya kure mu kirere cy'ijuru. Yari afite Ubutumwa bwiza buhoraho yahawe ngo abutangarize abatuye isi bose b'amahanga yose, n'imiryango yose n'abavuga indimi izo ari zo zose n'ab'amoko yose." 
Revelation14:7 Yavugaga cyane ati: “Nimutinye Imana kandi muyihe ikuzo, kuko igihe cyayo cyo guca imanza kigeze. Nimuramye Iyaremye ijuru n'isi n'inyanja n'amasōko y'amazi.”" 
Revelation14:8 Umumarayika wa kabiri akurikiraho aravuga ati: “Babiloni irasenyutse! Irasenyutse Babiloni, wa mujyi mugari wuhiye amahanga yose ubusambanyi bwawo bukabije nk'uyuhira inzoga.”" 
Revelation14:9 Umumarayika wa gatatu na we akurikiraho avuga cyane ati: “Umuntu wese uramya cya gikōko n'ishusho yacyo, agashyirwa ikimenyetso cyacyo mu ruhanga cyangwa mu kiganza," 
Revelation14:10 azanywa ku nzoga idafunguye, ari yo burakari bw'Imana yasutse mu gikombe cy'umujinya wayo. Bene uwo azababarizwa mu muriro no mu mazuku, abamarayika b'Imana n'Umwana w'intama babireba." 
Revelation14:11 Umwotsi w'inkongi bababarizwamo uhora ucumba iteka ryose. Ijoro n'amanywa nta gahenge kazigera kabaho ku baramije cya gikōko n'ishusho yacyo, no ku muntu wese washyizweho ikimenyetso kiriho izina ryacyo.”" 
Revelation14:12 Ni ngombwa rero ko intore z'Imana zigumya kwihangana zigakurikiza amategeko yayo, zigakomeza kwizera Yezu." 
Revelation14:13 Nuko numva ijwi ry'uvugira mu ijuru arambwira ati: “Andika ngo: ‘Kuva ubu hahirwa abapfa bakinambye kuri Nyagasani!’ ” Ibyo ni koko! Ni na ko Mwuka w'Imana abivuze ati: “Abo bazaruhuka imvune z'imirimo yabo, kuko bazaherekezwa n'ibyiza bakoze.”" 
Revelation14:14 Hanyuma ngira ntya mbona igicu cyera. Kuri icyo gicu hari hicaye usa n'umwana w'umuntu. Mu mutwe yari yambaye ikamba ry'izahabu, naho mu kiganza yari afite umuhoro utyaye." 
Revelation14:15 Undi mumarayika asohoka mu Ngoro y'Imana arangurura ijwi cyane, abwira uwicaye kuri icyo gicu ati: “Ahura umuhoro wawe usarure, kuko igihe cy'isarura kigeze. Dore imyaka yo ku isi ireze.”" 
Revelation14:16 Nuko uwicaye kuri cya gicu yahura umuhoro we, asarura iyo myaka yo ku isi." 
Revelation14:17 Undi mumarayika asohoka mu Ngoro y'Imana iri mu ijuru, na we afite umuhoro utyaye." 
Revelation14:18 Undi mumarayika na none wahawe ubushobozi bwo kugenga umuriro, aza avuye ku rutambiro rw'Imana. Avuga cyane ahamagara wa wundi ufite umuhoro utyaye ati: “Turira umuhoro wawe utyaye maze usarure amaseri y'imizabibu yo ku isi, kuko imbuto zayo zihishije.”" 
Revelation14:19 Uwo mumarayika aturira umuhoro we asarura imizabibu yo ku isi, ayiroha mu muvure mugari havamo inzoga, ari yo burakari bw'Imana." 
Revelation14:20 Nuko izo mbuto z'imizabibu zengerwa inyuma y'umurwa, maze havamo amaraso asendera ahantu hafite umurambararo ungana n'ibirometero magana atatu, n'ubujyakuzimu bwa metero imwe n'igice." 
Revelation15:1 Nyuma mbona mu ijuru ikindi kimenyetso gikomeye kandi gitangaje: ni abamarayika barindwi bacigatiye ibyago birindwi by'imperuka, ari ibyo Imana yarangirijemo uburakari bwayo." 
Revelation15:2 Nuko mbona igisa n'ikiyaga cy'ibirahure bivanzwemo umuriro. Mbona n'abatsinze cya gikōko n'ishusho yacyo, kandi batsinze wa mubare uranga izina ryacyo. Bari bahagaze ku kiyaga cy'ibirahure bafashe inanga bahawe n'Imana." 
Revelation15:3 Baririmbaga indirimbo ya Musa umugaragu w'Imana, n'indirimbo y'Umwana w'intama bagira bati: “Nyagasani Mana Ishoborabyose, mbega ukuntu ibyo ukora bikomeye kandi bitangaje! Wowe Mwami ugenga amahanga, mbega ukuntu imigenzereze yawe ari iy'ubutabera n'ukuri!" 
Revelation15:4 Nyagasani, ni nde utagutinya? Ni nde utagusingiza? Ni wowe Muziranenge wenyine. Amahanga yose azaza akwikubite imbere, azakuramya kuko ibikorwa byawe by'ubutabera byagaragaye.”" 
Revelation15:5 Nyuma y'ibyo mbona mu ijuru Ingoro y'Imana irakinguwe, ari ryo Hema rihamya Isezerano yagiranye n'abayo." 
Revelation15:6 Ba bamarayika barindwi bacigatiye bya byago birindwi basohoka muri iyo Ngoro, bari bakenyeye mu gituza imyenda ikenkemuye kandi irabagirana, bayikenyeje imikandara y'izahabu." 
Revelation15:7 Kimwe muri bya binyabuzima bine giha ba bamarayika barindwi inzabya ndwi z'izahabu, zuzuye uburakari bw'Imana ihoraho iteka ryose." 
Revelation15:8 Iyo Ngoro yuzura umwotsi kubera ikuzo ry'Imana n'ububasha bwayo. Nta muntu n'umwe wabashije kwinjira mu Ngoro, kugeza ubwo ibyago birindwi byazanywe n'abamarayika barindwi birangiye." 
Revelation16:1 Hanyuma numva ijwi rikaze ry'uvugira cyane mu Ngoro y'Imana, abwira ba bamarayika barindwi ati: “Nimugende musuke ku isi za nzabya ndwi zuzuye uburakari bw'Imana.”" 
Revelation16:2 Umumarayika wa mbere aragenda asuka urwabya rwe ku isi, ibisebe bibi biryana bihita byaduka ku bantu bashyizweho ikimenyetso cya cya gikōko bakanaramya ishusho yacyo." 
Revelation16:3 Umumarayika wa kabiri asuka urwabya rwe mu nyanja, amazi ahita ahinduka amaraso nk'ay'umuntu wapfuye, maze ibifite ubuzima byose byo mu nyanja birapfa." 
Revelation16:4 Umumarayika wa gatatu asuka urwabya rwe mu nzuzi no mu masōko y'amazi, bihita bihinduka amaraso." 
Revelation16:5 Nuko numva umumarayika ushinzwe iby'amazi agira ati: “Uri intabera kuko wagennye guca imanza utyo, wowe Muziranenge uriho kandi wahozeho." 
Revelation16:6 Kubera ko bamennye amaraso y'intore zawe n'ay'abahanuzi bawe, ni cyo gitumye nawe ubaha amaraso ngo abe ari yo banywa, ubakaniye urubakwiye.”" 
Revelation16:7 Hanyuma numva ijwi ry'uvugira ku rutambiro agira ati: “Ni koko Nyagasani Mana Ishoborabyose, uca imanza z'ukuri n'ubutabera.”" 
Revelation16:8 Umumarayika wa kane asuka urwabya rwe ku zuba, rihita rihabwa uburenganzira bwo kotsa abantu bikabije." 
Revelation16:9 Nuko abantu bababurwa n'icyokere cy'izuba rikaze, maze batuka Imana ifite ububasha kuri ibyo byorezo, nyamara ntibemera kwisubiraho ngo bayihe ikuzo." 
Revelation16:10 Umumarayika wa gatanu asuka urwabya rwe ku ntebe ya cyami ya cya gikōko, ubwami bwacyo buhita bucura umwijima. Abantu bakanjakanja indimi zabo babitewe no kuribwa cyane," 
Revelation16:11 maze batuka Imana nyir'ijuru kubera ububabare n'ibisebe bafite. Nyamara ntibemera kwisubiraho ngo bareke ibibi bakora. 
Revelation16:12 Umumarayika wa gatandatu asuka urwabya rwe mu ruzi rugari rwa Efurati, amazi yarwo ahita akama kugira ngo abami baturutse iburasirazuba babone inzira." 
Revelation16:13 Nuko mbona ingabo za Satani eshatu zisa n'ibikeri, zavaga mu kanwa ka cya kiyoka no mu kanwa ka cya gikōko, no mu kanwa ka wa muhanurabinyoma." 
Revelation16:14 Izo ni zo ngabo za Satani zikora ibitangaza byo kwemeza abantu, zisanga abami bo ku isi yose ngo zibakoranyirize kujya ku rugamba kuri wa munsi ukomeye w'Imana Ishoborabyose." 
Revelation16:15 Nyagasani aravuga ati: “Dore ndaje ngutunguye nk'umujura! Hahirwa umuntu wese uhora ari maso, akagumana imyambaro ye kugira ngo atavaho agenda ari umutumbure, maze agaterwa isoni n'uko bamubona yambaye ubusa.”" 
Revelation16:16 Izo ngabo za Satani zikoranyiriza abami ahantu hitwa Harimagedoni mu giheburayi. 
Revelation16:17 Umumarayika wa karindwi asuka urwabya rwe mu kirere, maze mu Ngoro y'Imana kuri ya ntebe ya cyami humvikana ijwi ry'uvuga cyane ati: “Karabaye!”" 
Revelation16:18 Nuko imirabyo irarabya, amajwi ararangira, inkuba zirahinda n'isi iratingita cyane. Kuva abantu baba ku isi ntihigeze habaho umutingito w'isi ukaze nk'uwo." 
Revelation16:19 Wa mujyi w'icyatwa Babiloni usadukamo gatatu, n'indi mijyi y'amahanga irasenyuka. Uwo mujyi w'icyatwa Imana iwugerera mu kebo kawukwiye, iwuhira inzoga ibirira mu gikombe, ari yo burakari bwayo bukaze." 
Revelation16:20 Ibirwa byose birahunga, imisozi na yo ntiyongera kuboneka." 
Revelation16:21 Nuko amahindu manini ava mu ijuru agwira abantu, rimwe rifite uburemere bwaba nk'ibiro mirongo ine. Abantu ni ko gutuka Imana kubera icyo cyorezo cy'amahindu kuko cyari gikabije." 
Revelation17:1 Hanyuma umwe mu bamarayika barindwi bari bafashe za nzabya ndwi araza arambwira ati: “Ngwino nkwereke igihano giteganyirijwe indaya kabuhariwe, ari yo wa mujyi w'icyatwa wubatswe ku nkombe z'amazi magari." 
Revelation17:2 Abami bo ku isi basambanye na yo, kandi abatuye isi basinze ubusambanyi bwayo nk'uwasinze inzoga.”" 
Revelation17:3 Mwuka w'Imana anzaho maze ndabonekerwa, umumarayika anjyana kure mu butayu. Nuko mbona umugore uhetswe n'igikōko gitukura, cyari cyuzuyeho amazina atuka Imana. Icyo gikōko cyari gifite imitwe irindwi n'amahembe icumi." 
Revelation17:4 Umugore yari yambaye imyenda y'agaciro y'umutuku wijimye n'itukura tukutuku, kandi yirimbishije ibintu bikozwe mu izahabu, no mu mabuye y'agaciro n'amasaro y'agahebuzo." 
Revelation17:5 Mu ruhanga rwe hari handitswe izina ry'irigenurano ngo: “Babiloni y'icyatwa, nyina w'indaya n'ibyo ku isi byose bizira ku Mana.”" 
Revelation17:6 Nuko mbona ko uwo mugore yasinze amaraso y'intore z'Imana, kimwe n'amaraso y'abishwe bahōrwa guhamya ibya Yezu. Mubonye ntyo ndumirwa!" 
Revelation17:7 Nuko umumarayika arambaza ati: “Utangajwe n'iki? Ngiye kugusobanurira amayobera yerekeye uwo mugore n'ayerekeye igikōko kimuhetse, gifite imitwe irindwi n'amahembe icumi." 
Revelation17:8 Igikōko wabonye cyahozeho kera none ntikikiriho. Ubu kigiye kuva ikuzimu kugira ngo kirimburwe. Abatuye isi batanditswe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo kuva isi ikiremwa, bazatangara babonye icyo gikōko cyigeze kubaho none kikaba kitakiriho, ariko kikazongera kubaho." 
Revelation17:9 “Kuri ibyo haragomba ubwenge butuma umuntu asobanukirwa. Ya mitwe irindwi ni yo misozi irindwi wa mugore yicayeho. Ubundi kandi ni yo bami barindwi," 
Revelation17:10 abatanu muri bo barahangutse, umwe ni we uri ku ngoma ubu, naho undi ntaraza. Naza azagomba kumara igihe gito." 
Revelation17:11 Cya gikōko cyahozeho ubu kikaba kitakiriho, ni cyo mwami wa munani. Uwo mwami abarirwa hamwe na ba bandi barindwi kandi agiye kuzatsembwaho." 
Revelation17:12 “Amahembe icumi wabonye na yo ni abami icumi bataratangira kwima ingoma, ariko bazahabwa ubushobozi bwo kwima ingoma, bafatanyije na cya gikōko kumara isaha imwe." 
Revelation17:13 Bose uko ari icumi bahuje umugambi wo kwegurira cya gikōko ububasha n'ubushobozi bwabo. 
Revelation17:14 Bazarwanya Umwana w'intama, ariko azabatsinda kuko ari we Mutegetsi ugenga abategetsi akaba n'Umwami ugenga abami. Azabatsinda afatanyije n'abo yahamagaye akabatoranya, bakamubaho indahemuka.”" 
Revelation17:15 Umumarayika arongera arambwira ati: “Amazi wabonye ha handi ya ndaya yicaye, ni yo moko n'imbaga n'amahanga n'abavuga indimi zitari zimwe." 
Revelation17:16 Na ya mahembe icumi wabonye kimwe na cya gikōko, bizanga ya ndaya. Bizayicuza ibyo ifite byose, biyisige ari umutumbure. Bizayirya bitapfune inyama zayo, maze biyitwike ikongoke." 
Revelation17:17 Erega Imana yashyize umugambi wayo mu mitima yabyo, ngo bikore ibyo na yo yagambiriye! Bityo ayo mahembe azahuriza ku mugambi umwe rukumbi, yegurire cya gikōko ubushobozi bwayo bwa cyami, kugeza ubwo ibyo Imana yavuze bibaye." 
Revelation17:18 “Naho umugore wabonye ni wa mujyi w'icyatwa, uganjemo ubwami bufite ubutegetsi ku bami bose bo ku isi.”" 
Revelation18:1 Hanyuma mbona undi mumarayika amanutse ava mu ijuru. Aza afite ubushobozi burambuye, isi yose imurikirwa n'ikuzo rye." 
Revelation18:2 Nuko arangurura ijwi cyane agira ati: “Babiloni irasenyutse! Irasenyutse Babiloni wa mujyi w'icyatwa! Usigaye utuwe n'ingabo za Satani, uhindutse isenga ry'intumwa ze zose zihumanya, uhindutse kandi indiri y'ibisiga byose bihumanya kandi bizira." 
Revelation18:3 Amahanga yose yanyoye inzoga zawo, ari zo busambanyi bwawo bukabije. Abami b'isi bagiye basambana na wo, kandi n'abacuruzi bo ku isi bakungahajwe n'umurengwe wawo utagira akagero.”" 
Revelation18:4 Hanyuma numva ijwi ry'undi uvugira mu ijuru agira ati: “Nimusohoke muri Babiloni bantu banjye, kugira ngo mutagira uruhare ku byaha byayo, maze mugasangira na yo ibyorezo biyigenewe." 
Revelation18:5 Erega ibyaha byayo byarenze ihaniro, kandi Imana ntiyibagiwe ubugome bwa Babiloni!" 
Revelation18:6 Nimuyīture ibihwanye n'ibyo yakoze, akebo yabagereyemo mukayigereremo incuro ebyiri, inzoga ikaze yabahaye muyiyihe irushijeho gukara incuro ebyiri." 
Revelation18:7 Aho Babiloni iyo yageze yiha ikuzo n'umurengwe, muhageze kuyiteza ububabare n'icyunamo. Dore iribwira iti: ‘Ndimakajwe, ndi umwamikazi, sindi umupfakazi kandi sinteze kugira uwo ngira mu cyunamo bibaho!’" 
Revelation18:8 Ni yo mpamvu ibyorezo biyigenewe, ari byo ndwara zica no gupfusha n'inzara bizayigwira icyarimwe. Izashya ikongoke, kuko Nyagasani Imana yayiciriye urwo rubanza igira amaboko.”" 
Revelation18:9 Abami b'isi bihaye gusambana n'icyo cyatwa Babiloni bakarengwa, bazarira baboroge babonye umwotsi w'inkongi yayo." 
Revelation18:10 Bazayitaza kubera gutinya ububabare bwayo bagire bati: “Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano rikugwiriye, wowe Babiloni mujyi w'icyatwa w'igihangange! Isaha imwe irahagije kugira ngo akawe kabe gashobotse!”" 
Revelation18:11 Abacuruzi bo ku isi na bo baririra uwo mujyi ndetse bawugira mu cyunamo, kuko nta muntu n'umwe ukigira icyo agura ku bicuruzwa byabo." 
Revelation18:12 Ntawe ukigura izahabu yabo n'ifeza, n'amabuye y'agaciro n'amasaro y'agahebuzo, n'imyenda myiza inoze n'imyenda y'umuhemba, n'itukura tukutuku n'indi yitwa hariri. Nta n'ukigura ibiti byabo by'imbonekarimwe by'amoko atari amwe, kimwe n'ibikozwe mu mahembe y'inzovu, no mu mbaho z'agaciro no mu muringa, no mu butare no mu mabuye yitwa marumari." 
Revelation18:13 Ntawe ukigura n'ibyitwa sinamomu n'ishangi, n'amarashi n'ububani n'indi mibavu na divayi, kimwe n'amavuta y'iminzenze n'ifu n'ingano. Ndetse ntawe ukigura ibimasa byabo n'intama, amafarasi n'amagare akururwa na yo, n'abantu bacuruzwa cyangwa b'inkoreragahato." 
Revelation18:14 Abo bacuruzi babwira uwo mujyi bati: “Ibyo wararikiye kubona byagushizeho, ibyakuryoheraga n'ibyaguteraga kurengwa byose ngo hubi, ntibizongera kuboneka ukundi!”" 
Revelation18:15 Abakungahajwe no gucuruza muri uwo mujyi bazawitarura, babitewe no gutinya ububabare bwawo. Bazawugira mu cyunamo baboroge," 
Revelation18:16 bavuge bati: “Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano rigwiriye umujyi w'icyatwa! Wari wambaye imyenda myiza inoze, n'iy'umuhemba n'itukura tukutuku. Wari urimbishijwe izahabu n'amabuye y'agaciro n'amasaro y'agahebuzo." 
Revelation18:17 Nyamara isaha imwe irahagije kugira ngo ubukungu bwawo buwushireho!” Abayobozi b'amato n'abagenzi atwara, n'abasare bayo n'abandi bose batunzwe n'imirimo yo ku nyanja bari bitaruye uwo mujyi." 
Revelation18:18 Babonye umwotsi w'inkongi yawo bariyamira cyane bati: “Nta mujyi wigeze kubaho uhwanye n'uyu w'icyatwa!” 
Revelation18:19 Biyorera umukungugu ku mutwe, bagira mu cyunamo uwo mujyi, baboroga cyane bati: “Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano uno mujyi ubonye! Dore ubukungu bwawo ni bwo bwakungahaje bene amato yo mu nyanja! Nyamara isaha imwe irahagije kugira ngo byose biwushireho!”" 
Revelation18:20 Icyakora wowe wa juru we ishime, kuko Babiloni isenyutse. Namwe ntore z'Imana, namwe ntumwa zayo, namwe bahanuzi bayo nimwishime, kuko Imana yayiciriye urubanza rukwiranye n'ibibi yabagiriye." 
Revelation18:21 Umumarayika w'igihangange aherako aterura ibuye ringana n'urusyo runini cyane, arijugunya mu nyanja aravuga ati: “Uku ni ko umujyi w'icyatwa Babiloni uzatsembwaho, ntihagire uwongera kuwubona ukundi." 
Revelation18:22 Muri wowe ntawe uzumva ukundi abacuranzi b'inanga n'abaririmbyi, n'abavuza imyironge n'impanda. Ntawe uzongera kukubarizamo umunyabukorikori uzi umwuga uwo ari wo wose. Muri wowe nta jwi ry'urusyo rizongera kumvikana ukundi." 
Revelation18:23 Urumuri rw'itara ntiruzakuboneshereza ukundi, kandi muri wowe nta jwi ry'umukwe n'umugeni rizongera kumvikana. Impamvu ni uko abacuruzi bawe bigize ibihangange ku isi, kandi ubupfumu bwawe bwayobeje amahanga yose.”" 
Revelation18:24 Koko Babiloni yahōwe gutahurwamo amaraso y'abahanuzi n'ay'intore z'Imana, kimwe n'ay'abiciwe kuri iyi si bose." 
Revelation19:1 Nyuma y'ibyo mu ijuru numva urusaku rw'imbaga nyamwinshi y'abantu bavuga cyane bati: “Haleluya! Agakiza n'ikuzo n'ububasha ni iby'Imana yacu. 
Revelation19:2 Imanza ica ni iz'ukuri n'ubutabera. Yaruciriye ya ndaya kabuhariwe yahumanishije isi ubusambanyi bwayo. Imana yayihōye amaraso y'abagaragu bayo yishe.” 
Revelation19:3 Barongera bati: “Haleluya! Inkongi y'uwo mujyi ihora icumba iteka ryose!” 
Revelation19:4 Ba bakuru makumyabiri na bane bikubita hasi kimwe na bya binyabuzima bine, baramya Imana yicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami bagira bati: “Amina. Haleluya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Numva ijwi ry'uvugira kuri ya ntebe ya cyami agira ati: “Nimushime Imana yacu, mwa bagaragu bayo mwese mwe, namwe abayitinya, aboroheje n'abakomeye.”" 
Revelation19:6 Hanyuma numva ijwi ry'imbaga nyamwinshi rirangira nk'amazi menshi asuma, cyangwa nk'iry'inkuba zihinda cyane. Numva bavuga ngo: “Haleluya! Nidushime Nyagasani Imana yacu Ishoborabyose, kuko yimye ingoma." 
Revelation19:7 Nitunezerwe twitere hejuru tumusingize, kuko igihe cy'ubukwe bw'Umwana w'intama kigeze kandi umugeni we akaba yiteguye." 
Revelation19:8 Yemerewe kwambara umwenda mwiza unoze, ukenkemuye kandi urabagirana. Uwo mwenda unoze ushushanya ibikorwa bitunganiye Imana by'intore zayo.”" 
Revelation19:9 Nuko umumarayika arambwira ati: “Andika ibi: Hahirwa abatumiwe mu bukwe bw'Umwana w'intama.” Yungamo ati: “Ubwo ni ubutumwa bw'ukuri buvuye ku Mana.” 
Revelation19:10 Mpita mwikubita imbere ngo muramye, ariko arambwira ati: “Sigaho! Jye ndi umugaragu w'Imana kimwe nawe, kandi kimwe n'abavandimwe bawe bakomera ku by'ukuri Yezu yahamije, ahubwo uramye Imana.” Iby'ukuri Yezu yahamije ni byo bikoresha abahanuzi." 
Revelation19:11 Hanyuma mbona ijuru rikingutse mbona n'ifarasi y'igitare, uwo ihetse akitwa Indahemuka n'Umunyakuri. Ashingiye ku butabera, aca imanza kandi akajya ku rugamba." 
Revelation19:12 Amaso ye ameze nk'ibirimi by'umuriro, kandi yambaye amakamba menshi mu mutwe. Afite izina rimwanditsweho ritazwi n'undi uwo ari we wese, keretse we wenyine." 
Revelation19:13 Yambaye ikanzu yinitswe mu maraso kandi yitwa Jambo w'Imana. 
Revelation19:14 Ingabo zo mu ijuru zari zimukurikiye zihetswe n'amafarasi y'ibitare, kandi zambaye imyenda inoze y'igitare ikenkemuye." 
Revelation19:15 Mu kanwa ke havamo inkota ityaye azatera amahanga. Azayaragiza inkoni y'icyuma, kandi imbuto z'imizabibu azazengera mu muvure havemo inzoga, ari yo burakari bukaze bw'Imana Ishoborabyose." 
Revelation19:16 Ku mwambaro we no ku kibero cye handitswe iri zina: “Umwami ugenga abami n'Umutegetsi ugenga abategetsi”. 
Revelation19:17 Nuko mbona umumarayika uhagaze ku zuba. Arangurura ijwi cyane, abwira ibisiga byose byagurukaga iriya kure mu kirere cy'ijuru ati: “Nimuze mukorane, murye iby'umunsi mukuru wateguwe n'Imana!" 
Revelation19:18 Nimuze murye intumbi z'abami n'iz'abagaba b'ingabo n'iz'ibihangange. Murye intumbi z'amafarasi n'iz'abo yari ahetse. Murye abantu bose, abigenga n'abakoreshwa agahato, aboroheje n'abakomeye!”" 
Revelation19:19 Hanyuma mbona cya gikōko, mbona n'abami b'isi n'ingabo zabo, bakoraniye kurwanya Uhetswe n'ifarasi n'ingabo ze." 
Revelation19:20 Icyo gikōko kirafatwa, kimwe na wa muhanurabinyoma. Ni we wari warakoze ibitangaza byo kumuranga, ahagarikiwe na cya gikōko. Ibyo bitangaza abishukisha abantu bari barashyizweho ikimenyetso cy'igikōko, kandi bakaramya ishusho yacyo. Icyo gikōko kirohwa ari kizima mu kiyaga cyaka umuriro n'amazuku, na wa muhanurabinyoma akirohwamo." 
Revelation19:21 Ingabo zacyo zo zicishwa inkota iva mu kanwa k'Uhetswe n'ifarasi. Nuko ibisiga byose byijuta intumbi zazo. 
Revelation20:1 Nuko mbona umumarayika amanuka ava mu ijuru, yari afashe mu ntoki umunyururu munini n'urufunguzo rw'ikuzimu." 
Revelation20:2 Agira atya asumira cya kiyoka, ari cyo ya nzoka ya kera yitwa Umwanzi cyangwa Satani, maze akibohesha uwo munyururu mu gihe cy'imyaka igihumbi." 
Revelation20:3 Aherako akiroha ikuzimu arahafunga arahadanangira, kugira ngo icyo kiyoka kidakomeza kuyobya amahanga kugeza ubwo imyaka igihumbi irangiriye. Nyuma yaho kigomba kuzarekurwa igihe gito." 
Revelation20:4 Mbona n'intebe za cyami zicaweho n'abahawe ubushobozi bwo guca imanza. Mbona n'abantu baciwe imitwe bahōrwa gukomera ku by'ukuri Yezu yahamije, no gutangaza Ijambo ry'Imana. Abo ntibigeze baramya cya gikōko cyangwa ishusho yacyo, kandi ntibigeze bemera gushyirwaho ikimenyetso cyacyo mu ruhanga cyangwa mu kiganza. Nuko barazuka bimana ingoma na Kristo imyaka igihumbi." 
Revelation20:5 Iryo ryabaye izuka rya mbere. Abapfuye bandi ntibazutse kugeza ubwo imyaka igihumbi irangiye. 
Revelation20:6 Abahawe umwanya mu izuka rya mbere barahirwa, kandi abo ni umwihariko w'Imana. Urupfu rwa kabiri nta bushobozi rubafiteho, bazaba abatambyi b'Imana na Kristo, kandi bazima ingoma hamwe na we imyaka igihumbi." 
Revelation20:7 Imyaka igihumbi nishira Satani azarekurwa ave aho yari afungiye," 
Revelation20:8 ajye kuyobya abo mu mahanga yo mu mpande zose z'isi ari yo Gogi na Magogi, maze abakoranyirize kujya ku rugamba. Umubare wabo uzaba ungana n'umusenyi wo ku nyanja." 
Revelation20:9 Nuko baraza bakwira isi yose, maze bazenguruka inkambi z'intore z'Imana n'umurwa wayo ikunda, ariko umuriro umanuka mu ijuru urabatsemba." 
Revelation20:10 Satani wabayobyaga arohwa mu kiyaga cyaka umuriro kirimo n'amazuku, aho cya gikōko na wa muhanurabinyoma bari bamaze kurohwa. Bazahagorerwa ijoro n'amanywa iteka ryose." 
Revelation20:11 Nuko mbona intebe ya cyami nini kandi yera de y'Imana, mbona n'Uyicayeho. Isi n'ijuru biyihungira kure birabura rwose." 
Revelation20:12 Mbona n'abapfuye, abakomeye n'aboroheje bahagaze imbere y'iyo ntebe. Nuko ibitabo birabumburwa. Habumburwa n'ikindi gitabo, ari cyo gitabo cy'ubugingo. Abapfuye bacirwa imanza zishingiye ku byo bakoze, uko byanditswe muri ibyo bitabo." 
Revelation20:13 Inyanja igarura abapfuye yari ibitse. Urupfu ubwarwo n'ikuzimu bigarura abapfuye byari bibitse. Nuko bose bacirwa imanza zishingiye ku byo bakoze. 
Revelation20:14 Urupfu n'ikuzimu bijugunywa mu kiyaga cyaka umuriro. Icyo ni cyo rupfu rwa kabiri. 
Revelation20:15 Umuntu wese batasanze yanditswe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo, na we arohwa mu kiyaga cyaka umuriro." 
Revelation21:1 Hanyuma mbona ijuru rishya n'isi nshya. Ijuru rya mbere n'isi ya mbere byari byavuyeho, nta n'inyanja yari ikiriho." 
Revelation21:2 Nuko mbona umurwa w'Imana ari wo Yeruzalemu nshya, umanuka uva mu ijuru ku Mana. Wari uteguwe nk'umugeni warimbishijwe agiye gusanganira umukwe." 
Revelation21:3 Numva ijwi ry'uvugira kuri ya ntebe ya cyami, avuga cyane ati: “Ubu Imana ije gutura hagati mu bantu, ibane na bo maze babe abantu bayo. Imana ubwayo izabana na bo [ibe Imana yabo]." 
Revelation21:4 Izahanagura amarira yose ku maso yabo, kandi urupfu ntiruzongera kubaho ukundi. Ntawe uzongera gupfusha cyangwa kuboroga, cyangwa kuribwa kuko ibya mbere bizaba bivuyeho.”" 
Revelation21:5 Nuko Uwari wicaye kuri ya ntebe ya cyami aravuga ati: “Dore byose mbihinduye bishya.” Nuko yungamo ati: “Andika ibyo kuko ayo magambo ari ay'ukuri, akwiye kugirirwa icyizere.”" 
Revelation21:6 Arambwira ati: “Byose birarangiye. Ndi Alufa na Omega, ni ukuvuga intangiriro n'iherezo. Ufite inyota nzamuha kunywa ku mazi y'ubugingo ku buntu." 
Revelation21:7 Utsinda wese ibyo nzabimuha ho umunani, kandi nzaba Imana ye na we abe umwana wanjye." 
Revelation21:8 Naho ibigwari n'abahemu n'abakora ibizira ku Mana, abicanyi n'abasambanyi, n'abarozi n'abasenga ibigirwamana kimwe n'ababeshya bose, umugabane wabo uzaba kurohwa mu kiyaga cyaka umuriro kirimo n'amazuku. Ni rwo rupfu rwa kabiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Hanyuma haza umwe muri ba bamarayika barindwi, bari bacigatiye za nzabya ndwi zuzuye ibyorezo birindwi biheruka ibindi, arambwira ati: “Ngwino nkwereke umugeni w'Umwana w'intama.”" 
Revelation21:10 Mwuka anzaho ndabonekerwa maze umumarayika anjyana mu mpinga y'umusozi muremure cyane, anyereka umurwa w'Imana ari wo Yeruzalemu, umanuka uva mu ijuru ku Mana." 
Revelation21:11 Warabagiranaga ikuzo ryayo, ukabengerana nk'ibuye ry'agaciro, mbese nk'iryitwa yasipi ribonerana nk'isarabwayi." 
Revelation21:12 Wari uzengurutswe n'urukuta rurerure kandi rugari, rufite amarembo cumi n'abiri arinzwe n'abamarayika cumi na babiri. Kuri ayo marembo hari handitswe amazina cumi n'abiri y'imiryango cumi n'ibiri ikomoka kuri Isiraheli." 
Revelation21:13 Iburasirazuba hari amarembo atatu, mu majyaruguru atatu no mu majyepfo atatu, n'iburengerazuba atatu." 
Revelation21:14 Urukuta rw'uwo murwa rwari rwubatswe ku rufatiro rw'amabuye cumi n'abiri, kandi kuri ayo mabuye hari handitseho amazina y'Intumwa cumi n'ebyiri z'Umwana w'intama." 
Revelation21:15 Umumarayika twavuganaga yari afite ikibingo cy'izahabu, kugira ngo afate ingero z'umurwa, n'amarembo yawo n'urukuta rwawo." 
Revelation21:16 Uwo murwa wari mpandenye, umurambararo wawo wanganaga n'ubugari. Nuko umumarayika afata ingero z'umurwa n'icyo kibingo, umurambararo wawo wari ibirometero ibihumbi bibiri na magana abiri, kandi umurambararo n'ubugari n'ubuhagarike byaranganaga." 
Revelation21:17 Umumarayika afata ingero z'urukuta, rwari metero mirongo itandatu n'eshanu z'ubuhagarike, kandi urugero yakoreshaga ni urwo abantu bari basanzwe bakoresha." 
Revelation21:18 Urukuta rwari rwubatswe n'amabuye yitwa yasipi, naho umurwa ubwawo wubatswe mu izahabu itavanze, ibonerana nk'ikirahuri." 
Revelation21:19 Amabuye yari yubatse urufatiro rw'urukuta yari arimbishijwe n'amabuye y'agaciro y'ubwoko butari bumwe. Dore amazina y'amabuye yari agize urufatiro: irya mbere ni yasipi, irya kabiri safiro, irya gatatu agata, irya kane emerodi," 
Revelation21:20 irya gatanu onigisi, irya gatandatu saridiyo, irya karindwi kirizolito, irya munani berilo, irya cyenda topazi, irya cumi kirisopuraso, irya cumi na rimwe yakinto, irya cumi na kabiri ametisito." 
Revelation21:21 Amarembo cumi n'abiri y'umurwa yari agizwe n'amasaro y'agahebuzo cumi n'abiri, buri rembo ryari rikozwe mu isaro rimwe. Umuhanda mugari unyura mu murwa wari ushashwemo izahabu itavanze, ibonerana nk'ikirahuri." 
Revelation21:22 Muri uwo murwa nta Ngoro nahabonye, kuko Nyagasani Imana Ishoborabyose ari yo Ngoro yawo hamwe n'Umwana w'intama." 
Revelation21:23 Uwo murwa ntukeneye kuvirwa n'izuba cyangwa ngo umurikirwe n'ukwezi, kuko ikuzo ry'Imana ari ryo riwumurikira, kandi Umwana w'intama akawubera urumuri." 
Revelation21:24 Amahanga azagenda amurikiwe na rwo, kandi abami b'isi bazahazana ibyiza byabo bihebuje." 
Revelation21:25 Amarembo y'umurwa azahora akinguye amanywa yose, ndetse ntazigera akingwa kuko nta joro rizahaba." 
Revelation21:26 Bazahazana ibyiza bihebuje n'ibifite agaciro by'amahanga. 
Revelation21:27 Ariko nta gihumanya kizinjira muri uwo murwa, cyangwa umuntu wese ukora ibizira ku Mana cyangwa ubeshya. Hazinjira gusa abanditswe mu gitabo cy'ubugingo cy'Umwana w'intama." 
Revelation22:1 Hanyuma umumarayika anyereka uruzi rw'amazi y'ubugingo, abengerana nk'isarabwayi. Urwo ruzi rwavaga kuri ya ntebe ya cyami y'Imana n'Umwana w'intama," 
Revelation22:2 rugatemba hagati mu muhanda mugari w'umurwa. Ku nkombe zombi z'urwo ruzi, hari igiti cy'ubugingo cyera imbuto incuro cumi n'ebyiri mu mwaka, incuro imwe buri kwezi. Ibibabi byacyo bikoreshwa mu kuvura amahanga indwara." 
Revelation22:3 Nta muvumo uzongera kubaho ukundi. Intebe ya cyami y'Imana n'Umwana w'intama izaba muri uwo murwa, kandi abagaragu bayo bazaza kuyiramya." 
Revelation22:4 Bazabona mu maso hayo kandi bazandikwaho izina ryayo mu ruhanga. 
Revelation22:5 Nta joro rizongera kubaho, kandi bazaba batagikeneye urumuri rw'itara cyangwa urw'izuba, kuko Nyagasani Imana azababera urumuri maze bime ingoma iteka ryose." 
Revelation22:6 Hanyuma umumarayika arambwira ati: “Ayo magambo ni ay'ukuri kandi akwiye kugirirwa icyizere. Nyagasani Imana ukoresha abahanuzi, ni we watumye umumarayika kwereka abagaragu be ibyenda kubaho bidatinze.”" 
Revelation22:7 Yezu aravuga ati: “Dore ngiye kuza bidatinze. Hahirwa abakurikiza ibyahanuwe biri muri iki gitabo.” 
Revelation22:8 Ni jyewe Yohani wumvise ibyo kandi ndanabyibonera. Maze kubyumva no kubibona, nikubita imbere y'umumarayika wabinyerekaga ngo muramye." 
Revelation22:9 Ariko arambwira ati: “Sigaho! Jye ndi umugaragu w'Imana kimwe nawe, kandi kimwe n'abavandimwe bawe b'abahanuzi, n'abandi bose bitondera ubutumwa buri muri iki gitabo, ahubwo uramye Imana.”" 
Revelation22:10 Hanyuma arambwira ati: “Ubuhanuzi buri muri iki gitabo ntubugire ibanga, kuko igihe ibyo byose byagenewe cyegereje." 
Revelation22:11 Inkozi y'ibibi yose nigumye ikore ibibi, n'uwanduye umutima agumye yandure, naho intungane igumye ikore ibitunganye, n'umuziranenge agumye abe umuziranenge.”" 
Revelation22:12 Yezu aravuga ati: “Dore ngiye kuza bidatinze, nzanye ibihembo kugira ngo mpembe umuntu wese ibikwiranye n'ibyo azaba yarakoze." 
Revelation22:13 Ndi Alufa na Omega, ni ukuvuga uw'ibanze n'uheruka. Ndi intangiriro n'iherezo." 
Revelation22:14 “Hahirwa abamesa amakanzu yabo, bityo bakemererwa kunyura mu marembo bakinjira mu murwa w'Imana, bakarya ku mbuto z'igiti cy'ubugingo." 
Revelation22:15 Inyuma y'uwo murwa hazasigara abiyandarika n'abarozi, n'abasambanyi n'abicanyi, n'abasenga ibigirwamana n'abakunda kubeshya kandi bakariganya." 
Revelation22:16 “Jyewe Yezu natumye umumarayika wanjye ngo abemeze ibyo byerekeye amatorero y'Imana. Ni jye gishyitsi cya Dawidi nkaba mukomokaho, kandi ni jye nyenyeri imurika mu rukerera.”" 
Revelation22:17 Mwuka n'Umugeni baravuga bati: “Ngwino!” Uwumva ibyo na we navuge ati: “Ngwino!” Ufite inyota na we naze, n'ushaka wese aze, ajyane amazi y'ubugingo ku buntu!" 
Revelation22:18 Ndaburira umuntu wese wumva ibyahanuwe biri muri iki gitabo: nihagira umuntu ugira icyo abyongeraho, Imana izongera ku gihano cye ibyorezo bivugwa muri iki gitabo." 
Revelation22:19 Nihagira umuntu ugira icyo agabanya ku byahanuwe biri muri iki gitabo, Imana izakuraho umugabane we ku giti cy'ubugingo no ku murwa wayo, nk'uko byanditswe muri iki gitabo." 
Revelation22:20 Uhamya ukuri kw'ibyo byose aravuga ati: “Yego, ngiye kuza bidatinze.” Ni koko birakaba bityo! Ngwino Nyagasani Yezu."
